Genesis1:1 Khí-thâu
Genesis1:2 Tōe sī hūn-tūn
Genesis1:3 Siōng-tè kóng “Tio̍h ū kng”
Genesis1:4 Siōng-tè khòaⁿ kng sī hó; Siōng-tè chiong kng kap àm pun-khui.
Genesis1:5 Siōng-tè kiò kng chòe Ji̍t--sî
Genesis1:6 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:7 Siōng-tè chiū chō kiong-chhong

Genesis1:9 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:10 Siōng-tè kiò ta-tōe chòe Tōe
Genesis1:11 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:12 Tōe chiū chiàu chióng-lūi siⁿ-chhut si̍t-bu̍t
Genesis1:13 Ū ē-hng ū chá-khí
Genesis1:14 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:15 koh tī kiong-chhong hoat-kng chiò tōe-bīn.” Tāi-chì chiū án-ni oân-sêng.
Genesis1:16 Siōng-tè chiū chō nn̄g ê tōa ê kng-thé
Genesis1:17 Siōng-tè chiong in hē tī thiⁿ-téng ê kiong-chhong
Genesis1:18 mā koán ji̍t kap mî
Genesis1:19 Ū ē-hng ū chá-khí
Genesis1:20 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:21 Siōng-tè chiū chhòng-chō hái--ni̍h ê tōa-hî
Genesis1:22 Siōng-tè sù-hok in
Genesis1:23 Ū ē-hng ū chá-khí
Genesis1:24 Siōng-tè kóng
Genesis1:25 Siōng-tè chiū chiàu in ê chióng-lūi chō tōe-chiūⁿ ê cháu-siù

Genesis1:28 Siōng-tè sù-hok in
Genesis1:29 Siōng-tè koh kóng
Genesis1:30 Tōe-chiūⁿ ta̍k-chióng ê cháu-siù

Genesis2:1 Thiⁿ tōe kap bān-siōng í-keng chhòng-chō oân-sêng.
Genesis2:2 Tī tē-chhit ji̍t
Genesis2:3 Siōng-tè sù-hok tē-chhit ji̍t
Genesis2:4 Che chiū-sī thiⁿ kap tōe chhòng-chō ê kè-thêng. Chú Siōng-tè chō thiⁿ kap tōe ê sî
Genesis2:5 tāi-tōe iáu-bē ū chháu-ba̍k
Genesis2:6 Chóng-sī ū chúi tùi tōe chhèng--chhut-lâi
Genesis2:7 Chú Siōng-tè ēng tōe-chiūⁿ ê thô͘-hún lia̍p-chō lâng
Genesis2:8 Chú Siōng-tè tī tang-hng ê I-tiân khai-khún chi̍t ê hn̂g
Genesis2:9 Chú Siōng-tè hō͘ tōe hoat ta̍k-chióng hó-khòaⁿ ê chhiū-á
Genesis2:10 Ū chi̍t tiâu hô tùi I-tiân lâu--chhut-lâi
Genesis2:11 Thâu chi̍t tiâu kiò-chòe Pí-sùn-hô
Genesis2:12 sī siōng-hó ê kim; koh chhut-sán tin-kùi ê phang-liāu kap âng-bé-ló.
Genesis2:13 Tē-jī tiâu kiò-chòe Ki-hùn-hô
Genesis2:14 Tē-saⁿ tiâu kiò-chòe Tí-kek-lí-su-hô
Genesis2:15 Chú Siōng-tè chiong hit-ê lâng an-tùn tī I-tiân-hn̂g
Genesis2:16 Chú Siōng-tè hoan-hù hit-ê lâng kóng

Genesis4:3 Kè chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan

Genesis10:7 Kó͘-si̍t ê kiáⁿ sī Se-pa
Genesis10:8 Kó͘-si̍t koh siⁿ Lêng-lio̍k; i sī sè-kan tē-it ê ióng-sū.
Genesis10:9 I in-ūi Siōng Chú ê pang-chān chiâⁿ-chòe gâu phah-la̍h ê ióng-sū; só͘-í sio̍k-gú kóng

Genesis10:12 í-ki̍p tī Nî-nî-bî kap Ka-la tiong-kan ê tōa-siâⁿ Lī-sián.

Genesis10:14 Phà-su-ló͘-sòe -lâng

Genesis10:20 Che chiū-sī Hâm ê hō͘-tāi

Genesis10:22 Siám ê kiáⁿ sī Í-lân
Genesis10:23 A-lân ê kiáⁿ sī O͘-su
Genesis10:24 A-hoat-sat siⁿ Sa-la; Sa-la siⁿ Hi-pek.

Genesis10:28 Gô-pa-lō͘

Genesis19:38 Sòe--ê mā siⁿ-kiáⁿ
Genesis20:1 A-pek-la-hán tùi hia chiām-chiām sóa-khì Nî-kek-hu

Genesis20:3 Mî--sî
Genesis20:4 A-pí-bí-le̍k iáu-bē chhin-kūn Sa-la

Genesis20:6 Siōng-tè tī A-pí-bí-le̍k ê bîn-bāng tiong tùi i kóng

Genesis21:1 Siōng Chú chiàu I í-chêng só͘ kóng ê ōe koàn-kò͘ Sa-la
Genesis21:2 A-pek-la-hán nî-lāu
Genesis21:3 A-pek-la-hán kā Sa-la ūi i siⁿ ê kiáⁿ hō-miâ kiò-chòe Í-sat.
Genesis21:4 Í-sat chhut-sì tē-poeh ji̍t
Genesis21:5 Í-sat chhut-sì ê sî
Genesis21:6 Sa-la kóng
Genesis21:7 Koh kóng
Genesis21:8 Gín-á chiām-chiām tōa-hàn
Genesis21:9 Ū chi̍t ji̍t

Genesis21:14 A-pek-la-hán thàu-chá khí--lâi
Genesis21:15 Phê-tē lāi ê chúi lim-liáu
Genesis21:16 I ka-kī kiâⁿ lī-khui
Genesis21:17 Siōng-tè thiaⁿ-tio̍h gín-á ê siaⁿ; Siōng-tè ê sù-chiá tùi thiⁿ kiò Hā-kah
Genesis21:18 Khí--lâi
Genesis21:19 Siōng-tè khui Hā-kah ê ba̍k-chiu
Genesis21:20 Siōng-tè kap gín-á tông-chāi; i chiām-chiām tōa-hàn
Genesis21:21 I tòa tī Pa-lân ê khòng-iá; i ê lāu-bú tùi Ai-ki̍p kā i chhōa chi̍t ê bó͘.
Genesis21:22 Hit-sî
Genesis21:23 Lí hiān-chāi tio̍h kí Siōng-tè tùi góa chiù-chōa
Genesis21:24 A-pek-la-hán kóng
Genesis21:25 Í-chêng A-pí-bí-le̍k ê po̍k-jîn bat pà-chiàm chi̍t kháu chúi-chíⁿ
Genesis21:26 A-pí-bí-le̍k kóng
Genesis21:27 A-pek-la-hán chiū chiong gû kap iûⁿ sàng hō͘ A-pí-bí-le̍k; nn̄g ê lâng chiū li̍p-iok.
Genesis21:28 A-pek-la-hán koh chiong chhit chiah bú ê iûⁿ-ko lēng-gōa ûi tī pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi.
Genesis21:29 A-pí-bí-le̍k mn̄g A-pek-la-hán kóng
Genesis21:30 A-pek-la-hán ìn kóng

Genesis24:1 A-pek-la-hán nî-lāu
Genesis24:2 A-pek-la-hán tùi i chu-chhim ê koán-ke kóng
Genesis24:3 lí tio̍h kí Siōng Chú — thiⁿ kap tōe ê Siōng-tè chiù-chōa
Genesis24:4 Lí tio̍h khì góa ê pún-tōe pún-cho̍k
Genesis24:5 Hit-ê koán-ke ìn kóng
Genesis24:6 A-pek-la-hán kā i kóng
Genesis24:7 Siōng Chú — thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè bat chhōa góa lī-khui goán lāu-pē ê ke kap pún-cho̍k ê tōe
Genesis24:8 Hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á nā m̄-khéng tè lí lâi
Genesis24:9 Koán-ke chiū chiong chhiú hē tī i ê chú-lâng A-pek-la-hán ê tōa-thúi-ē
Genesis24:10 Hit-ê koán-ke tùi i chú-lâng ê lo̍k-tô soán cha̍p chiah
Genesis24:11 I hō͘ lo̍k-tô kūi tī siâⁿ-gōa ê chíⁿ-piⁿ; hit-sî tú-tú hông-hun
Genesis24:12 I kóng
Genesis24:13 Góa taⁿ khiā tī chíⁿ-piⁿ

Genesis24:15 Ōe iáu-bē kóng soah
Genesis24:16 Hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á bīn-māu hui-siông súi
Genesis24:17 Koán-ke cháu-khì tùi i kóng
Genesis24:18 Cha-bó͘ gín-á kóng
Genesis24:19 Hō͘ koán-ke lim-liáu
Genesis24:20 I chiū kóaⁿ-kín chiong pân-lāi ê chúi piàⁿ tī chô--ni̍h
Genesis24:21 Hit-ê koán-ke chù-ì kā khòaⁿ
Genesis24:22 Lo̍k-tô lim-liáu
Genesis24:23 tùi i kóng
Genesis24:24 Lē-pek-ka chiū kā i kóng
Genesis24:25 Goán ū chhiong-chiok ê chháu-liāu bí-niû
Genesis24:26 Hit-ê koán-ke chiū kūi lo̍h-khì kèng-pài Siōng Chú
Genesis24:27 “Góa beh chheng-chàn Siōng Chú — góa ê chú-lâng A-pek-la-hán ê Siōng-tè; I it-ti̍t ēng chû-ài sìn-si̍t tùi-thāi góa ê chú-lâng
Genesis24:28 Cha-bó͘ gín-á cháu--tò-khì
Genesis24:29 Lē-pek-ka ū chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-ko La-pan
Genesis24:30 
Genesis24:31 I kā hit-ê lâng kóng
Genesis24:32 Hit-ê koán-ke chiū ji̍p-khì La-pan ê chhù. Ū lâng lâi tháu lo̍k-tô chài ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Genesis24:33 Ū lâng chiong chia̍h-mi̍h pâi tī koán-ke bīn-chêng
Genesis24:34 I chiū kóng
Genesis24:35 Siōng Chú ū tōa-tōa sù-hok góa ê chú-lâng
Genesis24:36 Góa ê chú-lâng ê bó͘ Sa-la nî-lāu ê sî
Genesis24:37 Góa ê chú-lâng kah góa chiù-chōa
Genesis24:38 Lí tio̍h khì góa ê lāu-pē ê ke
Genesis24:39 Góa tùi góa ê chú-lâng kóng
Genesis24:40 I chiū kā góa kóng
Genesis24:41 Lí nā ū khì kàu góa pún-cho̍k hia
Genesis24:42 “Kin-á-ji̍t góa kàu chíⁿ-piⁿ
Genesis24:43 Góa taⁿ khiā tī chíⁿ-piⁿ
Genesis24:44 i nā kóng ‘Chhiáⁿ lim
Genesis24:45 Góa sim-lāi ê ōe kóng iáu-bē liáu
Genesis24:46 I chiū kóaⁿ-kín tùi keng-thâu téng pàng-lo̍h chúi-pân
Genesis24:47 Góa koh mn̄g i
Genesis24:48 Góa kūi lo̍h-khì kèng-pài Siōng Chú
Genesis24:49 Taⁿ lín nā beh ēng chû-ài sìn-si̍t tùi-thāi góa ê chú-lâng
Genesis24:50 La-pan kap Pí-thó͘-lī ìn kóng
Genesis24:51 Taⁿ
Genesis24:52 A-pek-la-hán ê koán-ke thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe
Genesis24:53 Hit-ê koán-ke khí--lâi
Genesis24:54 Hit-ê koán-ke kap tè i ê lâng chit-sî chiah lim-chia̍h hioh-mî. Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
Genesis24:55 Lē-pek-ka ê hiaⁿ-ko kap lāu-bú kóng
Genesis24:56 I tùi in kóng
Genesis24:57 In kóng
Genesis24:58 In chiū kiò Lē-pek-ka lâi
Genesis24:59 In chiū sàng sió-bē Lē-pek-ka kap i ê lin-bú
Genesis24:60 In kā Lē-pek-ka chiok-hok
Genesis24:61 Lē-pek-ka kap i ê lú-pī khiâ lo̍k-tô tè hit-ê koán-ke khì; koán-ke chiū chhōa Lē-pek-ka tńg--khì.
Genesis24:62 Hit-sî
Genesis24:63 Hông-hun ê sî
Genesis24:64 Lē-pek-ka khòaⁿ-tio̍h Í-sat
Genesis24:65 I mn̄g hit-ê koán-ke kóng
Genesis24:66 Koán-ke chiong i só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lóng kā Í-sat pò-kò.
Genesis24:67 Í-sat chiū khan Lē-pek-ka ji̍p-khì i ê lāu-bú Sa-la ê pò͘-pîⁿ
Genesis25:1 A-pek-la-hán koh chhōa Ki-thó͘-la chòe bó͘.
Genesis25:2 Ki-thó͘-la kā i siⁿ Sim-lân
Genesis25:3 Iok-san siⁿ Sī-pa kap Tí-tān. Tí-tān ê hō͘-tāi sī A-su-lī -lâng
Genesis25:4 Bí-tiân ê kiáⁿ sī Í-hoat
Genesis25:5 A-pek-la-hán chiong i it-chhè só͘ ū--ê hō͘ Í-sat.
Genesis25:6 A-pek-la-hán mā thàn i iáu oa̍h--teh ê sî
Genesis25:7 A-pek-la-hán it-seng oa̍h chi̍t-pah chhit-cha̍p gō͘ hè.
Genesis25:8 A-pek-la-hán chia̍h tn̂g-hè-siū
Genesis25:9 I ê kiáⁿ Í-sat kap Í-si̍t-má-lī chiong i an-chòng tī Bān-lī tùi-bīn ê Be̍k-pí-la tōng-hia̍t
Genesis25:10 
Genesis25:11 A-pek-la-hán sí liáu-āu

Genesis25:13 Í-si̍t-má-lī chiah-ê kiáⁿ chiàu in chhut-sì ê sūn-sū siá tī ē-bīn: Í-si̍t-má-lī ê tōa-kiáⁿ Nî-pài-iok
Genesis25:14 Bí-si-má
Genesis25:15 Hap-tāi
Genesis25:16 chiah-ê lóng sī Í-si̍t-má-lī ê kiáⁿ
Genesis25:17 Í-si̍t-má-lī oa̍h chi̍t-pah saⁿ-cha̍p chhit hè chiū kè-sin
Genesis25:18 I ê hō͘-tāi tòa tī tùi Hap-hui-la kàu Ai-ki̍p tang-pêng ê Su-ní
Genesis25:19 Ē-bīn sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ Í-sat ê hō͘-tāi: A-pek-la-hán siⁿ Í-sat;
Genesis25:20 Í-sat sì-cha̍p hè ê sî chhōa Lē-pek-ka chòe bó͘. Lē-pek-ka sī Bí-soh-put-ta̍t-bí-a ê A-lân -lâng Pí-thó͘-lī ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Genesis25:21 Í-sat in-ūi i ê bó͘ bōe siⁿ
Genesis25:22 Nn̄g ê siang-siⁿ-á tī Lē-pek-ka ê pak-tó͘ lāi sio-khoeh
Genesis25:23 Siōng Chú kā i kóng: Nn̄g kok tī lí ê pak-tó͘ lāi; nn̄g cho̍k beh tùi lí ê seng-khu chhut; chi̍t cho̍k beh pí lēng-gōa chi̍t cho̍k khah kiông; tōa--ê beh ho̍k-sāi sòe--ê.

Genesis25:25 Tāi-seng chhut--lâi-ê
Genesis25:26 Tè-āu

Genesis26:6 Í-sat tòa tī Ki-la-ní.

Genesis26:27 Í-sat tùi in kóng
Genesis26:28 In kóng
Genesis26:29 Lí m̄-thang siong-hāi goán
Genesis26:30 Í-sat pān-toh chhiáⁿ in
Genesis26:31 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
Genesis26:32 Siâng hit-ji̍t

Genesis26:34 Í-sò sì-cha̍p hè ê sî chhōa Hek -lâng Pī-lī ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Iû-tek
Genesis26:35 Chit nn̄g ê hū-jîn-lâng siông-siông hō͘ Í-sat kap Lē-pek-ka sim-lāi iu-būn chhau-hoân.
Genesis27:1 Í-sat nî-lāu
Genesis27:2 Í-sat kóng
Genesis27:3 Taⁿ gia̍h lí phah-la̍h ê ke-si
Genesis27:4 chiàu góa ài ê kháu-bī chú lâi hō͘ góa chia̍h
Genesis27:5 Lē-pek-ka ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Í-sat tùi i ê kiáⁿ Í-sò kóng ê ōe. Í-sò chhut-khì iá-tōe phah-la̍h
Genesis27:6 Lē-pek-ka tùi i ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kóng
Genesis27:7 ‘Lí khì lia̍h la̍h-bu̍t tò--lâi
Genesis27:8 Taⁿ
Genesis27:9 Lí khì iûⁿ-kûn hia
Genesis27:10 Lí phâng-khì hō͘ lín lāu-pē chia̍h
Genesis27:11 Ngá-kok tùi i ê lāu-bú Lē-pek-ka kóng
Genesis27:12 Góa ê lāu-pē nā bong-tio̍h góa
Genesis27:13 I ê lāu-bú kóng
Genesis27:14 Ngá-kok chiū khì lia̍h iûⁿ-á lâi hō͘ i ê lāu-bú; i ê lāu-bú chiū chiàu i ê lāu-pē kah-ì ê kháu-bī liāu-lí.

Genesis27:17 Jiân-āu

Genesis27:25 Í-sat kóng

Genesis34:23 Lán nā chiap-siū in ê tiâu-kiāⁿ

Genesis34:25 Kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t
Genesis34:26 In thâi-sí Hap-boat kap i ê kiáⁿ Sī-kiàm
Genesis34:27 Ngá-kok kî-tha ê kiáⁿ ūi-tio̍h in sió-bē siū bú-jio̍k
Genesis34:28 chiū-sī gû-kûn
Genesis34:29 In koh chiong só͘-ū ê châi-hù
Genesis34:30 Ngá-kok kā Se-biān kap Lī-bī kóng
Genesis34:31 In ìn kóng
Genesis35:1 Siōng-tè kā Ngá-kok kóng
Genesis35:2 Ngá-kok chiū kā ke-lāi ê lâng í-ki̍p só͘-ū kun-tè i ê lâng kóng
Genesis35:3 Lán tio̍h chhut-hoat lâi-khì Pek-te̍k-lī; góa beh tī hia khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè
Genesis35:4 Tāi-ke chiū chiong in ê hī-kau kap gōa-pang ê sîn-bêng lóng kau hō͘ Ngá-kok; Ngá-kok chiong hiah-ê tâi tī Sī-kiàm ê siōng-chhiū kha.
Genesis35:5 In chiū chhut-hoat. Siōng-tè hō͘ chiu-ûi hiah-ê siâⁿ ê lâng tio̍h-kiaⁿ khióng-hông; hiah-ê siâⁿ ê lâng chiū bô tui-jip Ngá-kok ê chèng-kiáⁿ.
Genesis35:6 Ngá-kok í-ki̍p só͘-ū kap i chòe-tīn ê lâng lâi kàu Ka-lâm -tōe ê Lō͘-su
Genesis35:7 I tī hia khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ
Genesis35:8 Lē-pek-ka ê lin-bú Tí-pho-la sí
Genesis35:9 Ngá-kok tùi Bí-soh-put-ta̍t-bí-a tò--lâi í-āu
Genesis35:10 Siōng-tè kā i kóng
Genesis35:11 Siōng-tè koh kā i kóng
Genesis35:12 Góa sù hō͘ A-pek-la-hán kap Í-sat ê tōe
Genesis35:13 Siōng-tè chiū tùi kap Ngá-kok kóng-ōe ê só͘-chāi chiūⁿ--khì.
Genesis35:14 Ngá-kok tī hia chhāi chi̍t ki chio̍h-thiāu
Genesis35:15 Ngá-kok chiū chiong Siōng-tè kap i kóng-ōe ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe Pek-te̍k-lī.
Genesis35:16 In tùi Pek-te̍k-lī chhut-hoat
Genesis35:17 Tī i siⁿ kah chin kan-khó͘ ê sî
Genesis35:18 I lîm-chiong khùi beh tn̄g ê sî
Genesis35:19 Lúi-kiat sí
Genesis35:20 Ngá-kok tī Lúi-kiat ê bōng-téng khiā bōng-pâi
Genesis35:21 Ngá-kok koh chhut-hoat
Genesis35:22 Ngá-kok tòa tī Í-tek-thah ê sî
Genesis35:23 Ngá-kok lóng-chóng ū cha̍p-jī ê kiáⁿ. Lē-a ê kiáⁿ ū Ngá-kok ê tōa-kiáⁿ Lū-piān
Genesis35:24 Lúi-kiat ê kiáⁿ ū Iok-sek kap Piān-ngá-bín;
Genesis35:25 Lúi-kiat ê lú-pī Phek-la ê kiáⁿ ū Tān kap Ná-hut-tha-lī;
Genesis35:26 Lē-a ê lú-pī Sek-phà ê kiáⁿ ū Ka-tek kap A-siat. Chiah-ê sī Ngá-kok tī Bí-soh-put-ta̍t-bí-a siⁿ ê kiáⁿ.
Genesis35:27 Ngá-kok lâi Ki-lia̍t A-pa ê Bān-lī
Genesis35:28 Í-sat it-seng oa̍h chi̍t-pah poeh-cha̍p hè.
Genesis35:29 Í-sat nî-hè lāu
Genesis36:1 Ē-bīn sī Í-sò ê hō͘-tāi; Í-sò chiū-sī Í-tong.
Genesis36:2 Í-sò chhōa Ka-lâm -tōe ê cha-bó͘ gín-á chòe bó͘; in chiū-sī Hek -lâng Í-lûn ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ A-tāi
Genesis36:3 I koh chhōa Í-si̍t-má-lī ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Genesis36:4 A-tāi kā Í-sò siⁿ Í-lī-hoat; Pa-si̍t-boat siⁿ Liû-ní;
Genesis36:5 A-hô-lī-pa-má siⁿ Iâ-o͘-si
Genesis36:6 Í-sò chhōa i ê bó͘
Genesis36:7 In-ūi in nn̄g ê lâng ê gû
Genesis36:8 Í-sò khì tòa tī Se-ní-soaⁿ. Í-sò chiū-sī Í-tong.
Genesis36:9 Ē-bīn sī Í-sò ê hō͘-tāi: Í-sò chiū-sī Se-ní soaⁿ-khu hiah-ê Í-tong -lâng ê chó͘-sian.
Genesis36:10 Í-sò ê kiáⁿ ê miâ kì tī ē-bīn: Í-sò ê bó͘ A-tāi siⁿ Í-lī-hoat
Genesis36:11 Í-lī-hoat ê kiáⁿ ū Thê-bān
Genesis36:12 Í-sò ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-hoat ê sòe-î Têng-la̍p kā Í-lī-hoat siⁿ A-má-le̍k. Chiah-ê sī Í-sò ê bó͘ A-tāi ê hō͘-tāi.
Genesis36:13 Liû-ní ê kiáⁿ ū Ná-hap
Genesis36:14 Í-sò ê bó͘ A-hô-lī-pa-má sī Chè-piān ê cha-bó͘-sun
Genesis36:15 Ē-bīn sī Í-sò ê hō͘-tāi chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê: Í-sò ê tōa-kiáⁿ Í-lī-hoat ê kiáⁿ ū Thê-bān
Genesis36:16 Khó-la
Genesis36:17 Í-sò ê kiáⁿ Liû-ní ê hō͘-tāi chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê ū Ná-hap
Genesis36:18 Í-sò ê bó͘ A-hô-lī-pa-má ê hō͘-tāi chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê ū Iâ-o͘-si
Genesis36:19 Í-siōng lóng sī Í-sò ê hō͘-tāi tiong-kan chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê; Í-sò chiū-sī Í-tong.
Genesis36:20 Í-tong tōe-khu goân-lâi ê chū-bîn Hô-lī -lâng Se-ní ê hō͘-tāi kì tī ē-bīn: Lô-tan
Genesis36:21 
Genesis36:22 Lô-tan ê kiáⁿ ū Hô-lī kap Hi-bān; Lô-tan ê sió-bē sī Têng-la̍p.
Genesis36:23 Sok-pa ê kiáⁿ ū A-le̍k-bûn
Genesis36:24 Chè-piān ê kiáⁿ ū Ài-a kap A-ná; A-ná teh chhī in lāu-pē Chè-piān ê lû-á ê sî
Genesis36:25 A-ná ê kiáⁿ sī Tí-sūn
Genesis36:26 Tí-sūn ê kiáⁿ ū Him-tān
Genesis36:27 Í-chhat ê kiáⁿ ū Phek-hán
Genesis36:28 Tí-san ê kiáⁿ ū O͘-su kap A-lân.
Genesis36:29 Ē-bīn sī Í-tong tōe-khu ê Hô-lī -lâng ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ: Lô-tan
Genesis36:30 
Genesis36:31 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng iáu-bē ū kun-ông thóng-tī ê sî
Genesis36:32 Pí-ní ê kiáⁿ Pí-la
Genesis36:33 Pí-la sí-liáu
Genesis36:34 Iok-pa sí
Genesis36:35 Hō͘-san sí
Genesis36:36 Hap-ta̍t sí
Genesis36:37 Song-la sí
Genesis36:38 Sò-lô sí
Genesis36:39 A-kek-pho ê kiáⁿ Pa-le̍k Hap-lâm sí

Genesis36:41 A-hô-lī-pa-má
Genesis36:42 Ki-la̍p-su
Genesis36:43 Má-ki-tia̍p
Genesis37:1 Ngá-kok khiā-khí tī i ê lāu-pē kià-ku ê Ka-lâm -tōe.
Genesis37:2 Ē-bīn sī Ngá-kok ê ka-têng ê kì-sū. Iok-sek cha̍p-chhit hè ê sî kap i ê hiaⁿ-ko chòe-hé khì kò͘-iûⁿ; i sī chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng
Genesis37:3 Tī só͘-ū ê kiáⁿ tiong-kan
Genesis37:4 Iok-sek ê hiaⁿ-ko khòaⁿ-tio̍h in lāu-pē khah thiàⁿ Iok-sek
Genesis37:5 Iok-sek bāng-kìⁿ chi̍t ê bāng
Genesis37:6 Iok-sek kā in kóng
Genesis37:7 Lán tī hn̂g--ni̍h hâ be̍h-khún; hut-jiân
Genesis37:8 I ê hiaⁿ-ko ìn i kóng
Genesis37:9 Āu-lâi
Genesis37:10 Iok-sek chiong chit-ê bāng kā i ê lāu-pē kap hiaⁿ-ko kóng; i ê lāu-pē chiū kā i chek-pī
Genesis37:11 I ê hiaⁿ-ko lóng oàn-tò͘ i; i ê lāu-pē chiong chit-ê sū kì tī sim-lāi.
Genesis37:12 Iok-sek ê hiaⁿ-ko khì Sī-kiàm chhī in lāu-pē ê iûⁿ.
Genesis37:13 Ngá-kok kā Iok-sek kóng
Genesis37:14 Ngá-kok kā i kóng
Genesis37:15 Ū lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sek tī iá-tōe bê-lō͘
Genesis37:16 I kóng
Genesis37:17 Hit-ê lâng kā i kóng
Genesis37:18 In tī hn̄g-hn̄g khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sek; i iáu-bē kàu in hia
Genesis37:19 In hō͘-siōng kóng
Genesis37:20 Hō͘-lâi! Lâi kā thâi--sí
Genesis37:21 Lū-piān thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Genesis37:22 Lū-piān koh kā in kóng
Genesis37:23 Iok-sek kàu i ê hiaⁿ-ko hia
Genesis37:24 kā i lia̍h--teh
Genesis37:25 In chē-teh chia̍h-piáⁿ ê sî
Genesis37:26 Iû-tāi tùi chiah-ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng
Genesis37:27 Lán lâi kā i bōe hō͘ Í-si̍t-má-lī -lâng; m̄-thang hē-chhiú hāi i
Genesis37:28 Hiah-ê Bí-tiân ê seng-lí-lâng tùi hia kè ê sî
Genesis37:29 Lū-piān tò-tńg-lâi khiⁿ hia
Genesis37:30 tò-khì i ê sió-tī hia
Genesis37:31 In chiū thâi chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Genesis37:32 phài lâng the̍h hit-niá saⁿ khì in lāu-pē hia
Genesis37:33 Ngá-kok jīn-tio̍h hit-niá saⁿ
Genesis37:34 Ngá-kok chiū thiah-li̍h gōa-saⁿ
Genesis37:35 I ê kiáⁿ kap cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ lóng kā i an-ùi; i m̄-khéng siū an-ùi
Genesis37:36 Bí-tiân -lâng tòa Iok-sek khì kàu Ai-ki̍p
Genesis38:1 Tāi-iok hit-ê sî
Genesis38:2 Iû-tāi tī hia khòaⁿ-tio̍h Ka-lâm -lâng Su-a ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Genesis38:3 I chiū hoâi-īn siⁿ-kiáⁿ; Iû-tāi kā gín-á hō-miâ kiò-chòe Ní.
Genesis38:4 I koh hoâi-īn siⁿ-kiáⁿ; eⁿ-á ê lāu-bú kā i hō-miâ kiò-chòe Gô-lâm.
Genesis38:5 I koh siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
Genesis38:6 Iû-tāi kā i ê tōa-kiáⁿ Ní chhōa Tha-má chòe bó͘.
Genesis38:7 Iû-tāi ê tōa-kiáⁿ Ní chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Genesis38:8 Iû-tāi kā Gô-lâm kóng
Genesis38:9 Gô-lâm chai
Genesis38:10 I ê só͘-chòe
Genesis38:11 Iû-tāi kiaⁿ Sī-la ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ i nn̄g ê hiaⁿ-ko kâng-khoán sí
Genesis38:12 Kè chin kú
Genesis38:13 Ū lâng kā Tha-má kóng
Genesis38:14 Tha-má khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sī-la í-keng tōa-hàn
Genesis38:15 Iû-tāi khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tha-má
Genesis38:16 Iû-tāi chiū oat-khì lō͘-piⁿ Tha-má hia
Genesis38:17 Iû-tāi kóng
Genesis38:18 Iû-tāi kóng
Genesis38:19 Tha-má chiū tńg--khì
Genesis38:20 Iû-tāi thok i ê pêng-iú A-tō͘-lân -lâng Hi-la sàng chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-á khì hō͘ hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng
Genesis38:21 Hi-la chiū mn̄g hit só͘-chāi ê lâng
Genesis38:22 I tò-khì kā Iû-tāi kóng
Genesis38:23 Iû-tāi kóng
Genesis38:24 Tāi-iok kè saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t
Genesis38:25 Tha-má hō͘ lâng thoa--chhut-lâi ê sî
Genesis38:26 Iû-tāi ōe-jīn--tit
Genesis38:27 Tha-má teh-beh siⁿ
Genesis38:28 I siⁿ ê sî
Genesis38:29 Āu-lâi i ê chhiú kiu--ji̍p-khì; i ê hiaⁿ-tī chhut-sì
Genesis38:30 Āu-lâi
Genesis39:1 Iok-sek hō͘ lâng tòa lo̍h-khì Ai-ki̍p; ū chi̍t ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng
Genesis39:2 Siōng Chú kap Iok-sek tông-chāi
Genesis39:3 I ê chú-lâng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú kap Iok-sek tông-chāi
Genesis39:4 chiū kah-ì Iok-sek
Genesis39:5 Tùi hit-sî khai-sí
Genesis39:6 Hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng chiong i it-chhè só͘ ū--ê lóng siū-koân hō͘ Iok-sek; i só͘ chia̍h ê mi̍h í-gōa
Genesis39:7 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu
Genesis39:8 Iok-sek m̄-khéng
Genesis39:9 Tī chit-ê ke

Genesis39:11 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Genesis39:12 Lú-chú-lâng khiú i ê saⁿ
Genesis39:13 Lú-chú-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sek chiong saⁿ pàng hō͘ i
Genesis39:14 chiū kiò ke-lāi ê lâng lâi
Genesis39:15 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h góa chhut-siaⁿ hoah
Genesis39:16 Hū-jîn-lâng chiong Iok-sek ê saⁿ siu tī i hia
Genesis39:17 I tùi i ê tiōng-hu kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì
Genesis39:18 góa chi̍t-ē tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Genesis39:19 Iok-sek ê chú-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h i ê bó͘ tùi i kóng “Lí ê lô͘-lē án-ni án-ni tùi-thāi góa”
Genesis39:20 Iok-sek ê chú-lâng chiong i koaiⁿ tī teh koaiⁿ ông ê hoān-lâng ê kaⁿ-ga̍k. Tùi án-ni
Genesis39:21 M̄-kú Siōng Chú kap Iok-sek tông-chāi
Genesis39:22 Kaⁿ-ga̍k-tiúⁿ chiū chiong kaⁿ-ga̍k lāi-bīn ê hoān-lâng lóng kau hō͘ Iok-sek koán-lí; kaⁿ-ga̍k lāi-bīn só͘-ū ê tāi-chì
Genesis39:23 Só͘-ū kau hō͘ Iok-sek pān-lí ê tāi-chì
Genesis40:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu
Genesis40:2 Ai-ki̍p -ông tùi chit nn̄g ê jîn-sîn hui-siông siū-khì
Genesis40:3 chiong in koaiⁿ tī sī-ōe-tiúⁿ hú-lāi ê kaⁿ
Genesis40:4 Sī-ōe-tiúⁿ chiong in kau-tài Iok-sek
Genesis40:5 Hō͘ Ai-ki̍p -ông koaiⁿ tī kaⁿ--ni̍h ê chiú-chèng-tiúⁿ kap tû-pâng-tiúⁿ
Genesis40:6 Kàu thiⁿ-kng
Genesis40:7 Iok-sek chiū mn̄g kap i chòe-hé koaiⁿ tī chú-lâng hú-lāi kaⁿ--ni̍h hit nn̄g ê jîn-sîn
Genesis40:8 In kā i kóng
Genesis40:9 Chiú-chèng-tiúⁿ chiū tùi Iok-sek kóng i ê bāng

Genesis40:12 Iok-sek kā i kóng

Genesis40:16 Tû-pâng-tiúⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sek kái-bāng kái liáu chin hó
Genesis40:17 téng-bīn hit-ê nâ-á ū tóe Ai-ki̍p -ông beh chia̍h ê ta̍k-khoán mi̍h-kiāⁿ; ū chiáu-á lâi tok góa thâu-khak téng nâ-á lāi ê chia̍h-mi̍h.”

Genesis41:5 I koh khùn
Genesis41:6 Āu-lâi
Genesis41:7 Chiah-ê phàⁿ ê be̍h-sūi kā hit chhit sūi pá-chúi koh hó-khòaⁿ ê be̍h-sūi thun--lo̍h-khì. Ai-ki̍p -ông chhíⁿ--khí-lâi

Genesis41:19 Tè-āu

Genesis41:21 thun-lo̍h pak liáu-āu
Genesis41:22 Góa koh bāng-tio̍h chi̍t châng be̍h-á
Genesis41:23 Āu-lâi
Genesis41:24 Chiah-ê phàⁿ ê be̍h-sūi kā hit chhit sūi hó ê be̍h-sūi thun--lo̍h-khì. Góa chiong chiah-ê bāng kóng hō͘ su̍t-sū thiaⁿ
Genesis41:25 Iok-sek tùi Ai-ki̍p -ông kóng
Genesis41:26 Chhit chiah súi ê gû-bú kap chhit sūi hó ê be̍h-sūi sī chí chhit nî; chit nn̄g ê bāng sī kâng chi̍t ê ì-sù.
Genesis41:27 Hiah-ê tè-āu khí--lâi ê chhit chiah sán koh pháiⁿ-khòaⁿ ê gû-bú
Genesis41:28 Che sī góa tùi ông só͘ kóng--ê: Siōng-tè chiong I beh chòe ê sū
Genesis41:29 Ai-ki̍p choân-tōe ōe ū chhit nî hó nî-tang;
Genesis41:30 āu-lâi ōe ū chhit nî pháiⁿ nî-tang
Genesis41:31 in-ūi āu-lâi ê ki-hng chin siong-tiōng
Genesis41:32 Ông nn̄g piàn ê bîn-bāng
Genesis41:33 “Só͘-í ông tio̍h kéng chi̍t ê chhong-bêng koh ū tì-hūi ê lâng
Genesis41:34 Ông koh tio̍h phài koaⁿ-oân koán-lí choân-kok; tī chhit nî hó nî-tang
Genesis41:35 Chhiáⁿ ông bēng-lēng in siu-chi̍p hó nî-tang siu-sêng ê ngó͘-kok
Genesis41:36 Chek-chū--khí-lâi ê niû-si̍t
Genesis41:37 Ai-ki̍p -ông kap i só͘-ū ê jîn-sîn lóng chàn-sêng chit-ê kè-ōe.
Genesis41:38 Ai-ki̍p -ông tùi i ê jîn-sîn kóng
Genesis41:39 Ai-ki̍p -ông tùi Iok-sek kóng
Genesis41:40 Lí thang koán-lí góa ê tiâu-têng; góa ê jîn-bîn lóng tio̍h ho̍k-chiông lí
Genesis41:41 Ai-ki̍p -ông koh kā Iok-sek kóng
Genesis41:42 Ai-ki̍p -ông chiū chiong i chòe ìn-kàm ê chhiú-chí pak--khí-lâi

Genesis49:21 “ Ná-hut-tha-lī sī tháu-pàng ê lo̍k-bú
Genesis49:22 “ Iok-sek chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi-chôaⁿ piⁿ ê iá-lû
Genesis49:23 Siā-chìⁿ ê lâng béng-lia̍t kong-kek i
Genesis49:24 m̄-kú i óa-khò Ngá-kok ê Tāi-lêng-chiá
Genesis49:25 Lí ê lāu-pē ê Siōng-tè beh pang-chān lí; Choân-lêng-chiá beh sù-hok lí. I beh siúⁿ-sù lí thiⁿ-téng ê hok-khì
Genesis49:26 Lí ê lāu-pē ê chiok-hok iâⁿ-kè éng-oán soaⁿ-niá ê hok-khì
Genesis49:27 “ Piān-ngá-bín sī hiong-béng ê chhâi-lông; chá-khí-sî thun-chia̍h i ê la̍h-bu̍t
Genesis49:28 Chiah-ê sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k; in ê lāu-pē chiàu in ta̍k-ê lâng eng-kai tit--tio̍h ê hok-hūn kā in chiok-hok.
Genesis49:29 Ngá-kok hoan-hù i ê kiáⁿ
Genesis49:30 chiū-sī tī Ka-lâm -tōe Bān-lī ê tùi-bīn
Genesis49:31 Tī hia ū bâi-chòng A-pek-la-hán kap i ê bó͘ Sa-la
Genesis49:32 Hit-khu hn̂g kap hit lāi-bīn ê tōng-hia̍t sī tùi Hek -lâng bóe--ê.”
Genesis49:33 Ngá-kok tùi i hiah-ê kiáⁿ kau-tài chheng-chhó liáu-āu
Genesis50:1 Iok-sek phak tī i ê lāu-pē Ngá-kok ê bīn thî-khàu
Genesis50:2 Iok-sek hoan-hù sū-hāu i ê i-seng
Genesis50:3 I-seng chiàu kui-tēng ēng hiuⁿ-liāu boah Ngá-kok ê sin-si sì-cha̍p ji̍t kú. Ai-ki̍p -lâng ūi Ngá-kok ai-khàu chhit-cha̍p ji̍t.
Genesis50:4 Ūi-tio̍h Ngá-kok ai-khàu ê ji̍t-kî kè-liáu
Genesis50:5 góa ê lāu-pē kiò góa chiù-chōa
Genesis50:6 Ai-ki̍p -ông kóng
Genesis50:7 Iok-sek chiū khì bâi-chòng i ê lāu-pē; kap i chòe-hé khì--ê ū Ai-ki̍p -ông ê jîn-sîn
Genesis50:8 koh ū Iok-sek choân-ke
Genesis50:9 Lēng-gōa ū chin chōe chiàn-chhia kap bé-peng chòe-hé khì. Sàng-chòng ê tiûⁿ-bīn hui-siông sēng-tāi.
Genesis50:10 In kàu Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng A-ta̍t ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
Genesis50:11 Ka-lâm -tōe ê chū-bîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-ta̍t ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ ê ai-khàu
Genesis50:12 Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ chiàu in ê lāu-pē ê hoan-hù
Genesis50:13 chiong i ūn kàu Ka-lâm -tōe
Genesis50:14 Iok-sek an-chòng i ê lāu-pē liáu-āu
Genesis50:15 Ngá-kok sí liáu-āu
Genesis50:16 In chiū pài-thok lâng khì kā Iok-sek kóng
Genesis50:17 ‘Lín tio̍h kā Iok-sek án-ni kóng: Í-chêng lí ê hiaⁿ-ko pháiⁿ khoán-thāi lí
Genesis50:18 I ê hiaⁿ-ko koh lâi phak tī i ê bīn-chêng kóng
Genesis50:19 Iok-sek tùi in kóng
Genesis50:20 Í-chêng lín tùi góa ê ì-liām sī pháiⁿ
Genesis50:21 Taⁿ lín m̄-bián kiaⁿ; góa ōe chiàu-kò͘ lín kap lín ê kiáⁿ-jî.” Iok-sek ēng jîn-chû ê ōe an-ùi in
Genesis50:22 Iok-sek kap i ê lāu-pē ê ka-koàn lóng tòa tī Ai-ki̍p. Iok-sek chia̍h pah-it hè.
Genesis50:23 Iok-sek ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Í-hoat-liân tē-saⁿ tāi ê sun
Genesis50:24 Iok-sek tùi i ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng
Genesis50:25 Iok-sek kiò Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun chiù-chōa
Genesis50:26 Iok-sek sí

Exodus8:18 Lâng kap cheng-siⁿ ê seng-khu lóng ū sat-bú. Su̍t-sū ēng in ê hoat-su̍t mā beh hō͘ thô͘-hún pìⁿ-chòe sat-bú
Exodus8:19 Su̍t-sū tùi Ai-ki̍p -ông kóng

Exodus8:21 Lí nā m̄-khéng

Exodus8:24 Siōng Chú chiū án-ni chòe. Hô͘-sîn kui-tīn pe-ji̍p Ai-ki̍p -ông ê kiong-tiān kap i ê jîn-sîn ê chhù; Ai-ki̍p choân-tōe lóng in-ūi kui-kûn ê hô͘-sîn hong-hòe.

Exodus24:15 Mô͘-se chiūⁿ-soaⁿ; soaⁿ ū hûn khàm--teh.
Exodus24:16 Siōng Chú ê êng-kng thêng tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ; hûn jia soaⁿ la̍k ji̍t kú. Tē-chhit ji̍t
Exodus24:17 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê êng-kng hián-hiān
Exodus24:18 Mô͘-se chiūⁿ-soaⁿ ji̍p hûn-tiong; i lâu tī soaⁿ-téng sì-cha̍p mî sì-cha̍p ji̍t.
Exodus25:1 Siōng Chú kā Mô͘-se kóng
Exodus25:2 “Lí tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hōng-hiàn lé-mi̍h hō͘ góa; só͘-ū kam-sim hōng-hiàn ê mi̍h
Exodus25:3 Ē-bīn sī lín thang tùi in siu ê lé-mi̍h: kim
Exodus25:4 nâ-sek chí-sek chu-âng-sek ê se
Exodus25:5 ní-chòe âng-sek ê iûⁿ-káng ê phê
Exodus25:6 tiám-teng ê iû
Exodus25:7 âng-bé-ló
Exodus25:8 In tio̍h ūi góa khí chi̍t ê sèng ê só͘-chāi
Exodus25:9 In tio̍h chiàu góa chí-sī lí ê khoán-sit
Exodus25:10 “Tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chi̍t ê kūi
Exodus25:11 Lí tio̍h ēng sûn-kim pau chit-ê kūi
Exodus25:12 Lí tio̍h chù sì ê kim-khoân
Exodus25:13 Tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe nn̄g ki kǹg
Exodus25:14 Tio̍h chiong kǹg chhng tī iok-kūi piⁿ ê khoân--ni̍h
Exodus25:15 chiah-ê kǹg tio̍h put-sî chhng tī kūi ê khoân--ni̍h
Exodus25:16 Tio̍h chiong góa beh siúⁿ-sù lí chòe kiàn-chèng ê chio̍h-pán hē tī kūi ê lāi-bīn.
Exodus25:17 “Tio̍h ēng sûn-kim chòe iok-kūi ê kòa
Exodus25:18 Tio̍h ēng kim phah nn̄g ê thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek
Exodus25:19 chi̍t thâu chi̍t ê; siang-thâu ê ki-lō͘-pek
Exodus25:20 Nn̄g ê ki-lō͘-pek tio̍h bīn sio-tùi
Exodus25:21 Tio̍h chiong kòa an tī kūi ê téng-bīn
Exodus25:22 Góa beh tī hia kap lí siong-hōe
Exodus25:23 “Lí tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chi̍t tè toh
Exodus25:24 Tio̍h ēng sûn-kim pau chit-tè toh
Exodus25:25 Toh-bīn sì ê piⁿ kok chòe chhit-tiám-gō͘ kong-hun khoah ê kîⁿ
Exodus25:26 Lí tio̍h chòe sì ê kim-khoân
Exodus25:27 An khoân ê só͘-chāi tio̍h óa-kūn hoâiⁿ-koaiⁿ
Exodus25:28 Tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe nn̄g ki kǹg
Exodus25:29 Koh tio̍h ēng sûn-kim chòe tóe hiuⁿ-liāu ê pôaⁿ kap phiat-á
Exodus25:30 Toh-téng tio̍h ū hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ
Exodus25:31 “Lí tio̍h ēng sûn-kim phah chi̍t ê teng-tâi; teng-tâi ê chō
Exodus25:32 Teng-tâi ê siang-pêng tio̍h chhun-chhut la̍k ki ki
Exodus25:33 múi chi̍t ki ū saⁿ ê poe
Exodus25:34 Teng-tâi-thiāu ū sì ê poe
Exodus25:35 Tio̍h tī saⁿ tùi saⁿ-liân ê ki ē-bīn kap thiāu sio-chiap ê só͘-chāi chòe go̍k; teng-tâi ê la̍k ki ki lóng sī án-ni.
Exodus25:36 Hiah-ê go̍k kap ki lóng kap thiāu liân-chòe chi̍t ê
Exodus25:37 Tio̍h chòe chhit ê teng-chóaⁿ
Exodus25:38 koh tio̍h chòe teng-chián kap teng-pôaⁿ
Exodus25:39 Tio̍h ēng saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ kong-kun ê sûn-kim chō teng-tâi kap chiah-ê só͘-ū ê khì-khū.
Exodus25:40 Lí tio̍h chiàu góa tī soaⁿ-téng chí-sī lí ê khoán-sit
Exodus26:1 “Lí tio̍h ēng cha̍p pak pò͘ chòe hōe-bō͘; chiah-ê pò͘ sī ēng so--kè ê iù-môa
Exodus26:2 Múi-pak pò͘ tn̂g tio̍h cha̍p-jī kong-chhioh
Exodus26:3 Tio̍h chiong gō͘ pak pò͘ chiap chòe chi̍t cho͘; lēng-gōa gō͘ pak mā tio̍h án-ni.
Exodus26:4 Koh tī ta̍k-cho͘ saⁿ-chiap ê pò͘
Exodus26:5 Tio̍h tī chit-cho͘ pò͘ chòe gō͘-cha̍p ê liú-khoân; tī tē-jī cho͘ pò͘ lō͘-bé hit-pak ê piⁿ--á
Exodus26:6 Koh tio̍h chòe gō͘-cha̍p ê kim kau-á
Exodus26:7 “Lí tio̍h ēng soaⁿ-iûⁿ-mn̂g chit cha̍p-it pak tiùⁿ
Exodus26:8 múi-pak tiùⁿ tn̂g cha̍p-saⁿ kong-chhioh
Exodus26:9 Tio̍h chiong gō͘ pak tiùⁿ liân-chòe chi̍t cho͘
Exodus26:10 Tī ta̍k-cho͘ sio-chiap ê tiùⁿ
Exodus26:11 Koh tio̍h chòe gō͘-cha̍p ê tâng ê kau-á
Exodus26:12 Pò͘-phâng ê tiùⁿ ke--chhut-lâi hit pòaⁿ-pak
Exodus26:13 Khàm hōe-bō͘ ê pò͘-phâng nn̄g pêng ke--chhut-lâi ê gō͘-cha̍p kong-hun
Exodus26:14 “Lí tio̍h ēng ní-chòe âng-sek ê iûⁿ-káng ê phê khàm pò͘-phâng
Exodus26:15 “Lí tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe hōe-bō͘ ê piah-pang.
Exodus26:16 Piah-pang tio̍h tn̂g sì kong-chhioh
Exodus26:17 Ta̍k-tè pang tio̍h ū nn̄g ê sún thang saⁿ-chiap; hōe-bō͘ só͘-ū ê pang lóng tio̍h chiàu án-ni chòe.
Exodus26:18 Lâm-pêng ê piah-pang tio̍h chòe jī-cha̍p tè.
Exodus26:19 Chit jī-cha̍p tè pang ê ē-bīn
Exodus26:20 Hōe-bō͘ ê tē-jī bīn
Exodus26:21 kap sì-cha̍p ê gûn ê chō; ta̍k-tè pang ê ē-bīn ū nn̄g ê khang.
Exodus26:22 Hōe-bō͘ ê āu-bīn
Exodus26:23 Hōe-bō͘ āu-bīn ê kak-thâu

Exodus26:25 Tio̍h ū poeh tè pang
Exodus26:26 “Lí tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe hoâiⁿ-kông; lâm-pêng kap pak-pêng kok gō͘ ki
Exodus26:27

Exodus26:29 Piah-pang tio̍h ēng kim pau--teh
Exodus26:30 Lí tio̍h chiàu góa tī soaⁿ-téng chí-sī lí ê khoán-sit kā hōe-bō͘ tah--khí-lâi.
Exodus26:31 “Lí tio̍h ēng nâ-sek

Exodus26:34 Koh tio̍h chiong si-un-chō an tī Chì-sèng-só͘ lāi-bīn ê iok-kūi téng-bīn.

Exodus27:1 “Lí tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chè-tôaⁿ

Exodus27:5 Bāng an tī chè-tôaⁿ sì-bīn ûi-io-pán ê ē-pòaⁿ-pêng

Exodus27:12 Tiâⁿ ê sai-pêng tio̍h ū ûi

Exodus28:1 “Lí tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan

Exodus28:6 “In tio̍h ēng kim-sòaⁿ

Exodus29:1 “Lí kā A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng

Exodus29:20 Lí tio̍h thâi hit-chiah iûⁿ

Exodus30:1 “Lí tio̍h ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chi̍t chō sio-hiuⁿ ê tôaⁿ

Exodus37:1 Pí-sat-lia̍t ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chi̍t ê iok-kūi

Exodus37:3 koh kā i chù sì ê kim-khoân
Exodus37:4 I ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe nn̄g ki kǹg
Exodus37:5 chiong kǹg chhng tī iok-kūi piⁿ ê khoân--ni̍h
Exodus37:6 I koh ēng sûn-kim chòe iok-kūi ê kòa
Exodus37:7 Koh ēng kim phah nn̄g ê thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek
Exodus37:8 chi̍t thâu chi̍t ê; siang-thâu ê ki-lō͘-pek kap kòa liân-chòe kui-tè.
Exodus37:9 Nn̄g ê ki-lō͘-pek bīn sio-tùi

Exodus37:15 Ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe nn̄g ki kǹg
Exodus37:16 Koh ēng sûn-kim chòe toh-téng ê khì-khū
Exodus37:17 I ēng sûn-kim phah chi̍t ê teng-tâi; teng-tâi ê chō
Exodus37:18 Teng-tâi ê siang-pêng chhun-chhut la̍k ki ki
Exodus37:19 múi chi̍t ki ū saⁿ ê poe

Exodus37:21 I tī saⁿ tùi saⁿ-liân ê ki ē-bīn kap thiāu sio-chiap ê só͘-chāi chòe go̍k; teng-tâi ê la̍k ki ki lóng sī án-ni.
Exodus37:22 Hiah-ê go̍k kap ki lóng kap thiāu liân-chòe chi̍t ê
Exodus37:23 I ēng sûn-kim chòe chhit ê teng-chóaⁿ
Exodus37:24 I ēng saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ kong-kun ê sûn-kim chō teng-tâi kap chiah-ê só͘-ū ê khì-khū.
Exodus37:25 I ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe chi̍t chō sio-hiuⁿ ê tôaⁿ
Exodus37:26 Tôaⁿ ê téng-bīn
Exodus37:27 I tī kim-sòaⁿ ê ē-bīn
Exodus37:28 I ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe kǹg
Exodus37:29 I koh chiàu chòe hiuⁿ-liāu ê hong-hoat chòe thang boah ê sèng-iû kap sûn ê phang-hiuⁿ.
Exodus38:1 Pí-sat-lia̍t ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe sio-hòa-chè ê chè-tôaⁿ; tn̂g kap khoah lóng nn̄g kong-chhioh jī-cha̍p kong-hun
Exodus38:2 Tī tôaⁿ ê sì kak-thâu chòe sì ki khiàu--khí-lâi ê kak
Exodus38:3 I koh ēng tâng chòe tôaⁿ só͘-ū ê khì-khū
Exodus38:4 I ūi chè-tôaⁿ chòe chi̍t ê tâng ê bāng
Exodus38:5 I tī tâng ê bāng ê sì kak-thâu chù sì ê tâng-khoân
Exodus38:6 I ēng kim-ha̍p-hoan-bo̍k chòe kǹg
Exodus38:7 chiong kǹg chhng tī chè-tôaⁿ siang-pêng ê khoân lāi-bīn
Exodus38:8 I ēng tâng chòe sóe-tn̄g ê phûn kap phûn-chō; sī ēng tī hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu ho̍k-sāi ê hū-jîn-lâng ê tâng-kiàⁿ chòe--ê.
Exodus38:9 I ēng so--kè ê iù-môa kā hōe-bō͘ ûi chi̍t ê tiâⁿ; lâm-pêng ê ûi tn̂g sì-cha̍p-sì kong-chhioh.
Exodus38:10 Ûi ū jī-cha̍p ki thiāu
Exodus38:11 Pak-pêng ê ûi tn̂g sì-cha̍p-sì kong-chhioh
Exodus38:12 Tiâⁿ sai-pêng ê ûi jī-cha̍p-jī kong-chhioh
Exodus38:13 Tiâⁿ tang-pêng ê ûi khoah jī-cha̍p-jī kong-chhioh.
Exodus38:14 Ji̍p-kháu ê siang-pêng
Exodus38:15 
Exodus38:16 Tiâⁿ sì-bīn ê ûi lóng sī ēng so--kè ê iù-môa chòe--ê.
Exodus38:17 Thiāu ê chō sī tâng--ê
Exodus38:18 Tiâⁿ ji̍p-kháu ê mn̂g-lî sī ēng chhiah-siù ê chhiú-lō͘
Exodus38:19 Tiàu mn̂g-lî ê thiāu ū sì ki
Exodus38:20 Hōe-bō͘ kap tiâⁿ chiu-ûi ê khi̍t-á lóng sī tâng--ê.
Exodus38:21 Ē-bīn chiah-ê sī Lī-bī -lâng chiàu Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Exodus38:22 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k
Exodus38:23 I ê tâng-kang Tān chi-cho̍k
Exodus38:24 Ūi-tio̍h sèng-só͘ só͘-ū ê kang-thêng hōng-hiàn ê kim-á
Exodus38:25 Hōe-chiòng tiong-kan tiám-sǹg--kè ê lâng só͘ hiàn ê gûn
Exodus38:26 Jī-cha̍p hè í-siōng ū teng-kì--ê
Exodus38:27 In ēng saⁿ-chheng sì-pah kong-kun ê gûn
Exodus38:28 Hiah-ê chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê saⁿ-cha̍p kong-kun ê gûn
Exodus38:29 Hōe-chiòng hōng-hiàn ê tâng ū nn̄g-chheng sì-pah jī-cha̍p-gō͘ kong-kun.
Exodus38:30 In ēng chiah-ê tâng chòe hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu ū sún-khang ê chō
Exodus38:31 í-ki̍p tiâⁿ sì-ûi ê chō kap tiâⁿ ê mn̂g ê chō
Exodus39:1 Chiah-ê sai-hū chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê hoan-hù
Exodus39:2 In ēng kim-sòaⁿ
Exodus39:3 chiū-sī chiong kim-á phah hō͘ po̍h-po̍h-po̍h
Exodus39:4 In koh chòe keng-tòa
Exodus39:5 Í-hut-tek ê io-tòa kap í-hut-tek kâng-khoán ēng kî-khá ê chhiú-lō͘
Exodus39:6 In koh tok nn̄g tè âng-bé-ló
Exodus39:7 an tī í-hut-tek ê keng-tòa
Exodus39:8 In chòe chi̍t ê phòaⁿ-toàn ê heng-tē
Exodus39:9 Heng-tē sī sù-hong--ê
Exodus39:10 Heng-tē téng-bīn siuⁿ sì chōa pó-chio̍h; tē-it chōa sī âng-pó-chio̍h
Exodus39:11 tē-jī chōa sī le̍k-pó-chio̍h
Exodus39:12 tē-saⁿ chōa sī chí-bé-ló
Exodus39:13 tē-sì chōa sī chhiⁿ-ge̍k
Exodus39:14 Chiah-ê pó-chio̍h chiàu Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ ê miâ
Exodus39:15 In ēng sûn-kim phah nn̄g tiâu liān-á
Exodus39:16 In koh chòe nn̄g ê kim ê kheng kap nn̄g ê kim-khoân
Exodus39:17 chiong hit nn̄g tiâu kim-liān-á liân tī heng-tē siang-thâu nn̄g ê khoân
Exodus39:18 ēng nn̄g tiâu liān-á ê siang-thâu liân tī nn̄g ê kheng
Exodus39:19 In chòe nn̄g ê kim-khoân
Exodus39:20 Koh chòe nn̄g ê kim-khoân
Exodus39:21 In ēng nâ-sek ê iù-tòa
Exodus39:22 In ēng chit-pò͘ ê hong-hoat chòe chhēng tī í-hut-tek lāi-bīn ê gōa-phàu
Exodus39:23 Phàu téng-bīn ê tùi-tiong
Exodus39:24 Phàu ê ē-kha-pô͘ ēng nâ-sek
Exodus39:25 Koh ēng sûn-kim chòe giang-lêng-á
Exodus39:26 phàu kui-ê ē-kha-pô͘
Exodus39:27 In ēng chit-pò͘ ê hong-hoat ūi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ chòe iù-môa ê lāi-phàu
Exodus39:28 lé-bō
Exodus39:29 Koh ēng so--kè ê iù-môa
Exodus39:30 In ēng sûn-kim chòe lé-bō ê pâi
Exodus39:31 Koh ēng chi̍t tiâu nâ-sek ê tòa
Exodus39:32 Án-ni
Exodus39:33 In chiong hōe-bō͘
Exodus39:34 khàm pò͘-phâng ní-chòe âng-sek ê iûⁿ-káng ê phê kap siōng-téng ê phê
Exodus39:35 iok-kūi kap i ê kǹg
Exodus39:36 pâi hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ ê toh kap i ê khì-khū
Exodus39:37 sûn-kim ê teng-tâi kap i ê teng-chóaⁿ
Exodus39:38 kim ê hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ
Exodus39:39 tâng ê chè-tôaⁿ kap tâng ê bāng-á
Exodus39:40 tiâⁿ sì-ûi ê ûi kap i ê thiāu
Exodus39:41 í-ki̍p iù-kang chòe ê lé-ho̍k
Exodus39:42 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se só͘ tio̍h chòe--ê
Exodus39:43 Mô͘-se khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘-ū ê kang-thêng
Exodus40:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Exodus40:2 “Chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-it
Exodus40:3 Tio̍h chiong iok-kūi hē tī hit lāi-bīn
Exodus40:4 chiong pâi hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ ê toh poaⁿ--ji̍p-khì
Exodus40:5 Tio̍h chiong sio-hiuⁿ ê kim-tôaⁿ hē tī iok-kūi ê thâu-chêng
Exodus40:6 chiong sio-hòa-chè ê chè-tôaⁿ hē tī hōe-bō͘ ê pò͘-pîⁿ mn̂g-kháu;
Exodus40:7 chiong sóe-tn̄g ê phûn hē tī hōe-bō͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ ê tiong-kan
Exodus40:8 Sèng-só͘ ê sì-ûi tio̍h ū tiâⁿ
Exodus40:9 “Lí tio̍h ēng sèng-iû boah hōe-bō͘ kap lāi-bīn só͘-ū ê khì-khū
Exodus40:10 Koh boah sio-hòa-chè ê chè-tôaⁿ kap i lóng-chóng ê khì-khū
Exodus40:11 mā tio̍h boah sóe-tn̄g ê phûn kap phûn-chō
Exodus40:12 “Lí tio̍h chhōa A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ lâi hōe-bō͘ ê ji̍p-kháu
Exodus40:13 Mā tio̍h kā A-lûn chhēng sèng ê lé-ho̍k
Exodus40:14 Koh chhōa A-lûn ê kiáⁿ lâi
Exodus40:15 kā in boah-iû
Exodus40:16 Chiah-ê
Exodus40:17 Tē-jī nî chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-it
Exodus40:18 Mô͘-se tah hōe-bō͘
Exodus40:19 I tī hōe-bō͘ ê téng-bīn khàm pò͘-phâng
Exodus40:20 I koh chiong hoat-pán hē tī iok-kūi lāi-bīn
Exodus40:21 kng iok-kūi ji̍p hōe-bō͘
Exodus40:22 Mô͘-se chiong pâi hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ ê toh poaⁿ-ji̍p hōe-bō͘
Exodus40:23 toh-téng pâi hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê piáⁿ
Exodus40:24 I koh chiong teng-tâi hē tī hōe-bō͘ lāi
Exodus40:25 tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng tiám-teng; lóng chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê hoan-hù chòe.
Exodus40:26 I koh chiong kim ê hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ hē tī hōe-bō͘ lāi-bīn
Exodus40:27 tī hit téng-bīn sio phang-phang ê hiuⁿ; lóng chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê hoan-hù chòe.
Exodus40:28 I tī hōe-bō͘ ê pò͘-pîⁿ ê ji̍p-kháu kòa mn̂g-lî
Exodus40:29 
Exodus40:30 I chiong sóe-tn̄g ê phûn hē tī hōe-bō͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ ê tiong-kan
Exodus40:31 Mô͘-se

Exodus40:33 Chòe-āu
Exodus40:34 Hit-sî

Exodus40:37 Hûn nā thêng--teh
Exodus40:38 Ji̍t--sî
Leviticus1:1 Siōng Chú tùi hōe-bō͘ kiò Mô͘-se
Leviticus1:2 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pan-pò͘ ē-bīn ê tiâu-lē: Lín nā ū lâng beh hiàn cheng-siⁿ chòe lé-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus1:3 I nā beh hiàn gû chòe sio-hòa-chè
Leviticus1:4 I tio̍h hōaⁿ-chhiú tī sio-hòa-chè ê cheng-siⁿ ê thâu-khak téng
Leviticus1:5 I tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng thâi hit-chiah gû-káng-á; A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê tio̍h hiàn hiah-ê huih
Leviticus1:6 Hit-ê lâng tio̍h chiong sio-hòa-chè ê cheng-siⁿ ê phê pak--khí-lâi
Leviticus1:7 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê tio̍h tī chè-tôaⁿ téng khí-hé
Leviticus1:8 koh chiong bah
Leviticus1:9 Hōng-hiàn ê lâng tio̍h chiong chè-mi̍h ê pak-lāi kap thúi ēng chúi sóe chheng-khì
Leviticus1:10 Lâng nā beh hiàn mî-iûⁿ á-sī soaⁿ-iûⁿ chòe sio-hòa-chè
Leviticus1:11 I tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus1:12 Hit-ê lâng tio̍h kā hit-chiah iûⁿ chhiat-chòe chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè. Āu-lâi
Leviticus1:13 Hōng-hiàn ê lâng tio̍h chiong chè-mi̍h ê pak-lāi kap thúi ēng chúi sóe chheng-khì
Leviticus1:14 Lâng nā beh hiàn chiáu-á chòe sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus1:15 Chè-si tio̍h tòa chiáu-á lâi chè-tôaⁿ chêng
Leviticus1:16 Koh tio̍h chiong chiáu-á ê kui kap lāi-bīn ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus1:17 Tio̍h kā chiáu-á nn̄g ki si̍t the̍h--teh
Leviticus2:1 Nā ū lâng beh hiàn sò͘-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus2:2 I tio̍h chiong chiah-ê tòa-khì A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê hia; chè-si tio̍h mi chi̍t tōa-pé iù mī-hún
Leviticus2:3 Sò͘-chè só͘ chhun--ê tio̍h kui hō͘ A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun; che sī chì-sèng--ê
Leviticus2:4 Lí nā beh hiàn hé-lô͘ hang--kè ê chè-mi̍h chòe sò͘-chè
Leviticus2:5 Nā beh hiàn chian-pôaⁿ chian--kè ê chè-mi̍h chòe sò͘-chè
Leviticus2:6 Tio̍h kā i peh chòe sòe-tè sòe-tè
Leviticus2:7 Nā beh hiàn tiáⁿ-á chian ê chè-mi̍h chòe sò͘-chè
Leviticus2:8 Tio̍h chiong chiah-ê sò͘-chè tòa-khì Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus2:9 Chè-si tio̍h tùi sò͘-chè ê tiong-kan the̍h chi̍t-pō͘-hūn hē tī chè-tôaⁿ téng
Leviticus2:10 Sò͘-chè só͘ chhun--ê tio̍h kui hō͘ A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun; che sī chì-sèng--ê
Leviticus2:11 Lín beh hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê sò͘-chè m̄-thang chham kàⁿ; in-ūi kàⁿ kap bi̍t lóng bōe-ēng-tit ēng hé sio chòe chè-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú.
Leviticus2:12 Chiah-ê mi̍h lín thang hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú chòe khí-thâu-se̍k ê chè-mi̍h
Leviticus2:13 Sò͘-chè tio̍h ēng iâm tiâu-hô; só͘-ū ê sò͘-chè lóng tio̍h lām iâm
Leviticus2:14 Lín nā ēng khí-thâu-se̍k ê ngó͘-kok chòe sò͘-chè hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus2:15 Tio̍h thîn iû tī hit téng-bīn
Leviticus2:16 Chè-si chiū tùi hit tiong-kan the̍h chi̍t-pō͘-hūn lún--kè sin ê ngó͘-kok

Leviticus4:1 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus4:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:3 Tōa-chè-si nā hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:4 I tio̍h kā hit-chiah gû-káng-á khan-lâi Siōng Chú ê hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Leviticus4:5 Tōa-chè-si tio̍h kā chi̍t-kóa gû-káng-á ê huih the̍h-lâi hōe-bō͘
Leviticus4:6 ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn huih
Leviticus4:7 I koh tio̍h ēng chi̍t-kóa huih
Leviticus4:8 I tio̍h tùi hit-chiah sio̍k-chōe-chè ê gû-káng-á chhú iû
Leviticus4:9 nn̄g lia̍p io-chí kap in piⁿ--á ê iû
Leviticus4:10 kap tùi pêng-an-chè ê gû-káng-á the̍h--khí-lâi ê choh-hoat kâng-khoán. I tio̍h chiong chiah-ê hē tī hiàn sio-hòa-chè ê chè-tôaⁿ téng sio.
Leviticus4:11 Gû-káng-á ê phê
Leviticus4:12 chiū-sī kui-chiah gû-káng-á
Leviticus4:13 Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé hōe-chiòng nā bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:14 kàu in chi̍t-ē chai ka-kī ū hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:15 Hōe-chiòng ê tiúⁿ-ló tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus4:16 Tōa-chè-si tio̍h kā chi̍t-kóa gû-káng-á ê huih tòa-lâi hōe-bō͘
Leviticus4:17 ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn huih
Leviticus4:18 I koh tio̍h ēng chi̍t-kóa huih
Leviticus4:19 I tio̍h chiong só͘-ū ê iû the̍h--khí-lâi
Leviticus4:20 Chit-chiah gû-káng-á chhú-lí ê hong-hoat
Leviticus4:21 Chè-si tio̍h chiong gû-káng-á tòa chhut-khì iâⁿ-gōa sio
Leviticus4:22 Nā ū koaⁿ-tiúⁿ bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:23 kàu i chi̍t-ē chai ka-kī ū hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:24 I tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus4:25 Chè-si tio̍h ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn sio̍k-chōe-chè ê huih
Leviticus4:26 Iûⁿ-káng-á só͘-ū ê iû tio̍h hē tī tôaⁿ-téng sio
Leviticus4:27 Tòa tī chit-ê tōe ê jîn-bîn nā ū lâng bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:28 kàu i chi̍t-ē chai ka-kī ū hoān-chōe
Leviticus4:29 I tio̍h hōaⁿ-chhiú tī hit-chiah sio̍k-chōe cheng-siⁿ ê thâu-khak téng
Leviticus4:30 Chè-si tio̍h ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn soaⁿ-iûⁿ-bú ê huih
Leviticus4:31 Hōng-hiàn ê lâng tio̍h chiong só͘-ū ê iû the̍h--khí-lâi
Leviticus4:32 Lâng nā beh hiàn mî-iûⁿ chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè ê chè-mi̍h

Leviticus5:1 Nā ū lâng siū iau-kiû tī kong-chiòng ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus5:2 Nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h
Leviticus5:3 Nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h jīm-hô hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h
Leviticus5:4 Nā ū lâng sûi-piān chiù-chōa
Leviticus5:5 Nā ū lâng hoān-tio̍h í-siōng chiah-ê sū ê jīm-hô chi̍t hāng
Leviticus5:6 mā tio̍h in-ūi só͘ hoān ê chōe
Leviticus5:7 I nā bô-kàu-la̍t thang hiàn iûⁿ-á
Leviticus5:8 I tio̍h chiong chiah-ê tòa-khì chè-si hia; chè-si tio̍h seng hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus5:9 Koh tio̍h chiong chiáu-á ê huih hiù tī chè-tôaⁿ piⁿ
Leviticus5:10 Sòa-chiap
Leviticus5:11 I nā bô-kàu-la̍t thang hiàn nn̄g chiah pan-kah á-sī nn̄g chiah hún-chiáu-á-kiáⁿ
Leviticus5:12 I tio̍h chiong chè-mi̍h tòa-khì chè-si hia; chè-si tio̍h mi chi̍t tōa-pé hē tī chè-tôaⁿ téng
Leviticus5:13 I tī chit kúi hāng sū ê tiong-kan ū hoān-tio̍h chi̍t hāng
Leviticus5:14 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se pan-pò͘ í-hā chiah-ê tiâu-lē:
Leviticus5:15 Nā ū lâng m̄-sī thiau-kò͘-ì
Leviticus5:16 koh in-ūi i tī beh hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê chè-mi̍h hoān-chōe
Leviticus5:17 Nā ū lâng bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Leviticus5:18 I tio̍h chiàu sèng-só͘ ê kui-tēng
Leviticus5:19 Che sī pê-chōe-chè
Leviticus6:1 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se pan-pò͘ í-hā chiah-ê tiâu-lē:
Leviticus6:2 Nā ū lâng hoān-chōe tek-chōe Siōng Chú
Leviticus6:3 á-sī khioh-tio̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus6:4 I kì-jiân hoān-tio̍h téng-bīn chiah-ê chōe
Leviticus6:5 pe̍h-chha̍t chiù-chōa tit--tio̍h-ê
Leviticus6:6 I mā tio̍h tùi iûⁿ-kûn tiong chhú chi̍t chiah bô hâ-chhû ê mî-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus6:7 Chè-si tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng thòe i sio̍k-chōe; i só͘ chòe jīm-hô chi̍t hāng kè-sit
Leviticus6:8 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus6:9 hoan-hù A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun pan-pò͘ sio-hòa-chè ê tiâu-lē: Sio-hòa-chè tio̍h tī chè-tôaⁿ téng sio; m̄-thang hō͘ tôaⁿ-téng ê hé hoa--khì
Leviticus6:10 Chè-si tio̍h chhēng iù-môa-pò͘ ê saⁿ kap khò͘
Leviticus6:11 Āu-lâi tio̍h ōaⁿ-saⁿ
Leviticus6:12 Tôaⁿ-téng ê hé tio̍h put-sî hō͘ to̍h
Leviticus6:13 Tôaⁿ-téng ê hé tio̍h put-sî hō͘ to̍h
Leviticus6:14 Ē-bīn sī sò͘-chè ê tiâu-lē: A-lûn ê kiáⁿ-sun tio̍h chiong sò͘-chè the̍h-lâi chè-tôaⁿ chêng
Leviticus6:15 I tio̍h tùi sò͘-chè mi chi̍t tōa-pé iù mī-hún
Leviticus6:16 A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun tio̍h chia̍h hiàn chhun ê sò͘-chè; m̄-thang chham kàⁿ chia̍h
Leviticus6:17 Hang-piáⁿ m̄-thang chham kàⁿ. Sò͘-chè ēng hé sio hōng-hiàn lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê chè-mi̍h
Leviticus6:18 Chiah-ê ēng hé sio hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus6:19 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus6:20 tī A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun siū boah-iû siat-li̍p chòe chè-si ê sî
Leviticus6:21 Iù mī-hún tio̍h tī chian-pôaⁿ chhiau-iû
Leviticus6:22 A-lûn ê kiáⁿ-sun sòa-chiap i siū boah-iû siat-li̍p chòe tōa-chè-si--ê
Leviticus6:23 Chè-si hōng-hiàn ê sò͘-chè tio̍h choân-pō͘ sio
Leviticus6:24 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus6:25 tio̍h hoan-hù A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun pan-pò͘ sio̍k-chōe-chè ê tiâu-lē: Tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus6:26 Hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè ê chè-si tio̍h tī sèng ê só͘-chāi
Leviticus6:27 Só͘-ū chiap-chhiok-tio̍h chiah-ê chè-mi̍h--ê
Leviticus6:28 Nā ēng chho͘-hûi chú chè-bah
Leviticus6:29 Chè-si ka-sio̍k ê ta-po͘-lâng lóng thang chia̍h chè-bah; che sī chì-sèng ê mi̍h.
Leviticus6:30 M̄-kú sio̍k-chōe-chè ê huih nā tòa-ji̍p hōe-bō͘ ê sèng-só͘ chòe sio̍k-chōe ê lō͘-ēng
Leviticus7:1 Ē-bīn sī pê-chōe-chè ê tiâu-lē: Pê-chōe-chè sī chì-sèng--ê.
Leviticus7:2 Tio̍h tī thâi sio-hòa-chè ê cheng-siⁿ ê só͘-chāi thâi pê-chōe-chè ê cheng-siⁿ; kā i ê huih hiù tī chè-tôaⁿ ê sì-chiu-ûi.
Leviticus7:3 I ê iû tio̍h lóng hiàn; kui-ki pûi ê bé
Leviticus7:4 nn̄g lia̍p io-chí kap in piⁿ--á ê iû
Leviticus7:5 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chiah-ê hē tī chè-tôaⁿ téng sio
Leviticus7:6 Chè-si ka-sio̍k ê ta-po͘-lâng lóng thang tī hōe-bō͘ ê tiâⁿ chia̍h chè-bah; che sī chì-sèng--ê.
Leviticus7:7 Pê-chōe-chè kap sio̍k-chōe-chè ê tiâu-lē siâng-khoán
Leviticus7:8 Kâng-khoán
Leviticus7:9 Só͘-ū tī hé-lô͘ hang--ê
Leviticus7:10 Ū chhiau-iû--ê
Leviticus7:11 Ē-bīn sī hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê pêng-an-chè ê tiâu-lē:
Leviticus7:12 Nā ū lâng ūi-tio̍h kám-siā beh hiàn-chè
Leviticus7:13 Koh tio̍h hiàn ū-kàⁿ ê piáⁿ
Leviticus7:14 Tio̍h tùi ta̍k-hāng beh hiàn ê piáⁿ the̍h chi̍t hūn gia̍h-koân chòe lé-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú; chiah-ê mi̍h tio̍h kui tī hiù pêng-an-chè ê huih ê chè-si.
Leviticus7:15 Ūi-tio̍h kám-siā hiàn ê pêng-an-chè ê bah
Leviticus7:16 Nā ū lâng ūi-tio̍h siā-goān á-sī kam-sim hiàn-chè
Leviticus7:17 m̄-kú chhun ê chè-bah kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t tio̍h sio-tiāu.
Leviticus7:18 Nā ū lâng kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t iáu-teh chia̍h pêng-an-chè ê bah
Leviticus7:19 Chè-bah nā kha̍p-tio̍h bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h
Leviticus7:20 Nā ū lâng pún-sin bô chheng-khì
Leviticus7:21 Nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h
Leviticus7:22 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus7:23 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Bô-lūn sī gû
Leviticus7:24 Chū-jiân sí ê cheng-siⁿ ê iû
Leviticus7:25 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng chia̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ēng hé sio ê cheng-siⁿ ê iû
Leviticus7:26 Lín bô-lūn tòa tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi
Leviticus7:27 Nā ū lâng chia̍h huih
Leviticus7:28 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus7:29 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng beh hiàn pêng-an-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus7:30 I tio̍h chhin-chhiú tòa cheng-siⁿ ê iû kap heng-khám-bah
Leviticus7:31 Chè-si tio̍h chiong iû hē tī chè-tôaⁿ téng sio; heng-khám-bah kui tī A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun.
Leviticus7:32 Lín tio̍h tùi lín ê pêng-an-chè the̍h chiàⁿ-pêng ê tōa-thúi gia̍h-koân chòe lé-mi̍h
Leviticus7:33 A-lûn ê kiáⁿ-sun tiong-kan
Leviticus7:34 Góa tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pêng-an-chè ê tiong-kan
Leviticus7:35 Chiah-ê chè-bah sī tùi ēng hé sio hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê chè-mi̍h the̍h--chhut-lâi
Leviticus7:36 Che chiū-sī lí kā in boah-iû siat-li̍p hit-ji̍t
Leviticus7:37 Í-siōng sī sio-hòa-chè
Leviticus7:38 Chiah-ê sī Mô͘-se tī Se-nāi ê khòng-iá hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hiàn chè-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng Chú ê sî
Leviticus8:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Leviticus8:2 “Lí tio̍h chhōa A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ lâi góa chia
Leviticus8:3 Koh tiàu-chi̍p choân-thé hōe-chiòng lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu.”
Leviticus8:4 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chòe
Leviticus8:5 Mô͘-se kā hōe-chiòng kóng
Leviticus8:6 Mô͘-se chhōa A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ lâi
Leviticus8:7 Mô͘-se kā A-lûn chhēng lāi-phàu
Leviticus8:8 koh kā i tha̍h heng-tē
Leviticus8:9 kā i tì lé-bō
Leviticus8:10 Mô͘-se ēng thang boah ê sèng-iû boah hōe-bō͘ kap lāi-bīn só͘-ū ê khì-khū
Leviticus8:11 koh ēng hit-ê iû hiù chè-tôaⁿ ê téng-bīn chhit piàn
Leviticus8:12 koh ēng sèng-iû tò tī A-lûn ê thâu-khak téng
Leviticus8:13 Mô͘-se chhōa A-lûn ê kiáⁿ lâi
Leviticus8:14 Mô͘-se khan sio̍k-chōe-chè ê gû-káng-á lâi; A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ hōaⁿ-chhiú tī hit-chiah gû-káng-á ê thâu-khak.
Leviticus8:15 Mô͘-se chiū thâi hit-chiah gû
Leviticus8:16 Mô͘-se koh chiong gû-káng-á pak-lāi só͘-ū ê iû
Leviticus8:17 Gû-káng-á ê phê
Leviticus8:18 Mô͘-se khan sio-hòa-chè ê mî-iûⁿ-káng lâi; A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ hōaⁿ-chhiú tī hit-chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng ê thâu-khak.
Leviticus8:19 Mô͘-se chiū thâi hit-chiah iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus8:20 kā iûⁿ chhiat chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè; chiong thâu
Leviticus8:21 I koh kā pak-lāi kap thúi ēng chúi sóe chheng-khì
Leviticus8:22 Mô͘-se koh khan tē-jī chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng lâi
Leviticus8:23 Mô͘-se chiū thâi hit-chiah iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus8:24 I koh chhōa A-lûn ê kiáⁿ lâi
Leviticus8:25 I koh chhú iû
Leviticus8:26 Koh tùi hit-kha hē tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng tóe bô-kàⁿ-piáⁿ ê nâ-á
Leviticus8:27 Mô͘-se chiong chiah-ê hē tī A-lûn kap i hiah-ê kiáⁿ ê chhiú
Leviticus8:28 Mô͘-se tùi in ê chhiú chiap--kè-lâi
Leviticus8:29 Mô͘-se the̍h iûⁿ ê heng-khám-bah
Leviticus8:30 Mô͘-se the̍h thang boah ê sèng-iû kap chi̍t-kóa tôaⁿ-téng ê huih
Leviticus8:31 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ kóng
Leviticus8:32 Chia̍h chhun ê bah kap piáⁿ
Leviticus8:33 Lín chhit ji̍t kú lóng m̄-thang lī-khui hōe-bō͘
Leviticus8:34 Lín kin-á-ji̍t só͘ chòe--ê
Leviticus8:35 Chhit ji̍t kú lín tio̍h lâu tī hōe-bō͘ ji̍p-kháu
Leviticus8:36 A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ chiū chun-hêng Siōng Chú thong-kè Mô͘-se hō͘ in ê bēng-lēng.
Leviticus9:1 Kàu tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus9:2 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kóng
Leviticus9:3 Lí mā tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Leviticus9:4 Koh tio̍h chhú chi̍t chiah gû-káng kap chi̍t chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng chòe pêng-an-chè
Leviticus9:5 Án-ni
Leviticus9:6 Mô͘-se kóng
Leviticus9:7 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kóng
Leviticus9:8 A-lûn chiū lâi kàu tôaⁿ-chêng
Leviticus9:9 A-lûn hiah-ê kiáⁿ phâng huih hō͘ i
Leviticus9:10 I koh chiàu Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se --ê
Leviticus9:11 koh chiong bah kap phê the̍h-khì iâⁿ-gōa sio.
Leviticus9:12 A-lûn koh thâi sio-hòa-chè ê cheng-siⁿ; i hiah-ê kiáⁿ phâng huih hō͘ i
Leviticus9:13 In koh chiong sio-hòa-chè cheng-siⁿ ê thâu kap chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè ê bah the̍h hō͘ A-lûn; i chiū kā chiah-ê hē tī tôaⁿ-téng sio.
Leviticus9:14 I koh sóe pak-lāi kap tōa-thúi
Leviticus9:15 A-lûn koh ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn hiàn-chè. I khan hit-chiah ūi jîn-bîn chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng lâi
Leviticus9:16 I mā chiàu kui-lē hiàn sio-hòa-chè.
Leviticus9:17 Chá-khí-sî ê sio-hòa-chè í-gōa
Leviticus9:18 I koh thâi gû-káng kap mî-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus9:19 In koh the̍h gû-káng kap mî-iûⁿ-káng ê iû
Leviticus9:20 In chiong chiah-ê iû hē tī heng-khám-bah téng-bīn
Leviticus9:21 A-lûn chiong chiah-ê heng-khám-bah kap chiàⁿ-pêng ê tōa-thúi
Leviticus9:22 A-lûn hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus9:23 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn ji̍p-khì hōe-bō͘ lāi
Leviticus9:24 Ū hé tùi Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng chhut--lâi
Leviticus10:1 A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Ná-tap kap A-pí-hō͘
Leviticus10:2 Ū hé tùi Siōng Chú hoat-chhut
Leviticus10:3 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kóng
Leviticus10:4 Mô͘-se kiò A-lûn ê a-chek O͘-siat ê kiáⁿ Bí-sa-lī kap Í-lī-sat-hoán lâi
Leviticus10:5 In nn̄g lâng chiū lâi
Leviticus10:6 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat
Leviticus10:7 Lín mā m̄-thang lī-khui hōe-bō͘
Leviticus10:8 Siōng Chú hoan-hù A-lûn kóng
Leviticus10:9 “Lí kap lí ê kiáⁿ ji̍p hōe-bō͘ ê sî
Leviticus10:10 hō͘ lín thang hun-pia̍t sèng á-sī sio̍k
Leviticus10:11 koh hō͘ lín thang chiong Siōng Chú thong-kè Mô͘-se bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng it-chhè ê kui-lē kà-sī in.”
Leviticus10:12 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kap i só͘ chhun ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat kap Í-tha-má kóng
Leviticus10:13 Lín tio̍h tī sèng ê só͘-chāi
Leviticus10:14 Iô--kè hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê heng-khám-bah kap gia̍h-koân hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê tōa-thúi
Leviticus10:15 In tio̍h chiong gia̍h-koân ê tōa-thúi
Leviticus10:16 Āu-lâi
Leviticus10:17 “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ bô tī sèng ê só͘-chāi chia̍h chit-ê sio̍k-chōe-chè? Chit-ê sī chì-sèng--ê. Siōng Chú í-keng chiong chit-ê hō͘ lín
Leviticus10:18 Kì-jiân chè-mi̍h ê huih bô tòa-ji̍p sèng-só͘
Leviticus10:19 A-lûn tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Leviticus10:20 Mô͘-se thiaⁿ-liáu
Leviticus11:1 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Leviticus11:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Tōe-chiūⁿ só͘-ū pun-tôe koh hoan-chháu ê cheng-siⁿ

Leviticus11:8 Chiah-ê tōng-bu̍t ê bah lín m̄-thang chia̍h; in ê si-thé mā m̄-thang bong; chiah-ê tùi lín sī bô chheng-khì.
Leviticus11:9 Chúi-tiong
Leviticus11:10 M̄-kú chúi-tiong
Leviticus11:11 Hiah-ê tùi lín thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ ê mi̍h
Leviticus11:12 Só͘-ū chúi-lāi bô-kî bô-lân--ê
Leviticus11:13 Ē-bīn chiah-ê chiáu-lūi lín tio̍h khòaⁿ-chòe thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ--ê
Leviticus11:14 iân
Leviticus11:15 o͘-a kap i ê lūi
Leviticus11:16 tô-chiáu
Leviticus11:17 àm-kong-chiáu
Leviticus11:18 niau-thâu-eng
Leviticus11:19 ho̍h
Leviticus11:20 Só͘-ū ū-si̍t koh ēng sì kha teh pê--ê
Leviticus11:21 M̄-kú ū-si̍t
Leviticus11:22 pau-koat chháu-meh
Leviticus11:23 M̄-kú ū-si̍t koh ēng sì kha teh pê--ê
Leviticus11:24 Ē-bīn chiah-ê lóng ōe hō͘ lín bô chheng-khì: Só͘-ū bong-tio̍h si-thé--ê
Leviticus11:25 Nā ū lâng poaⁿ-sóa si-thé
Leviticus11:26 Só͘-ū ū pun-tôe bô hoan-chháu ê cheng-siⁿ
Leviticus11:27 Só͘-ū ū sì kha
Leviticus11:28 Poaⁿ-sóa chiah-ê cháu-siù ê si-thé--ê
Leviticus11:29 Ē-bīn chiah-ê tī tōe-chiūⁿ teh pê ê tōng-bu̍t
Leviticus11:30 piah-hó͘
Leviticus11:31 Í-siōng chiah-ê teh pê ê tōng-bu̍t
Leviticus11:32 In ê si-thé nā lak tī ēng chhâ
Leviticus11:33 Chiah-ê si-thé nā lak tī chho͘-hûi lāi-bīn
Leviticus11:34 Chia̍h-mi̍h nā bak-tio̍h bô chheng-khì ê khì-khū lāi-bīn ê chúi
Leviticus11:35 Hiah-ê si-thé ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn nā lak tī sím-mi̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus11:36 Put-kò
Leviticus11:37 Si-thé ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn nā lak tī beh iā ê chéng-chí
Leviticus11:38 Nā chúi í-keng kā hiah-ê chéng-chí phah-tâm
Leviticus11:39 Lín thang chia̍h ê cheng-siⁿ nā sí
Leviticus11:40 Nā ū lâng chia̍h hit-ê bah
Leviticus11:41 Só͘-ū tī tōe-chiūⁿ teh pê ê oa̍h-mi̍h
Leviticus11:42 
Leviticus11:43 Lín m̄-thang in-ūi teh pê ê oa̍h-mi̍h
Leviticus11:44 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè

Leviticus12:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū hū-jîn-lâng hoâi-īn siⁿ hāu-siⁿ
Leviticus12:3 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus12:4 Hū-jîn-lâng iáu-teh lâu-huih
Leviticus12:5 I nā siⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Leviticus12:6 Kàu kiat-chēng ê ji̍t móa
Leviticus12:7 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chiah-ê hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
