Leviticus13:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kap A-lûn kóng:
Leviticus13:2 Lâng ê phê-hu nā chéng
Leviticus13:3 Chè-si tio̍h giām hit-ê lâng phê-hu ê chèng-thâu; ū chèng-thâu ê só͘-chāi
Leviticus13:4 Hit-ê lâng ê phê-hu nā ū pe̍h-sek ê pan
Leviticus13:5 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:6 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:7 M̄-kú i hō͘ chè-si giām--kè
Leviticus13:8 Chè-si kā i kiám-cha
Leviticus13:9 Nā ū lâng í-keng ū bâ-hong ê chèng-thâu
Leviticus13:10 Chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; phê-hu nā ū só͘-chāi chéng koh pe̍h-pe̍h
Leviticus13:11 che chiū-sī bān-sèng ê bâ-hong. Chè-si tio̍h soan-pò͘ i bô chheng-khì
Leviticus13:12 Bâ-hong nā thòaⁿ-khui
Leviticus13:13 chè-si tio̍h kā i siông-sè kiám-cha; nā hoat-kiàn i choân-sin ê phê-hu lóng pìⁿ-pe̍h
Leviticus13:14 I ê seng-khu nā chi̍t-ē chhut-hiān sin ê bah
Leviticus13:15 Chè-si nā giām-tio̍h hit-ê lâng ū sin ê bah
Leviticus13:16 M̄-kú
Leviticus13:17 Chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; nā hoat-kiàn kám-jiám ê só͘-chāi í-keng pìⁿ-pe̍h
Leviticus13:18 Lâng nā siⁿ lia̍p-á ū i-hó
Leviticus13:19 āu-lâi siⁿ lia̍p-á ê só͘-chāi chéng koh pe̍h-pe̍h
Leviticus13:20 Chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; nā hoat-kiàn chèng-thâu thòaⁿ-ji̍p bah-lāi
Leviticus13:21 Chè-si kā i kiám-cha
Leviticus13:22 Chè-si nā hoat-kiàn pīⁿ ū tī phê-hu thòaⁿ-khui
Leviticus13:23 Hún-âng-á-sek ê pan nā bô thòaⁿ-khui
Leviticus13:24 Nā ū lâng phê-hu hō͘ hé sio--tio̍h
Leviticus13:25 chè-si chiū tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; nā hoat-kiàn piàn-sek ê phê-hu ê mn̂g pìⁿ-pe̍h
Leviticus13:26 Chè-si kiám-cha liáu
Leviticus13:27 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:28 Pe̍h-sek ê pan nā iáu tī goân-lâi ê só͘-chāi
Leviticus13:29 Bô-lūn lâm-lú
Leviticus13:30 chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; chèng-thâu nā chhim ji̍p-khì bah-lāi
Leviticus13:31 Chè-si kiám-cha hit-ê sián
Leviticus13:32 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:33 hit-ê lâng tio̍h thì thâu-mn̂g á-sī chhùi-chhiu
Leviticus13:34 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:35 M̄-kú i chheng-khì í-āu
Leviticus13:36 chè-si tio̍h koh kā i kiám-cha; sián nā í-keng thòaⁿ-khui
Leviticus13:37 Chiàu chè-si ê koan-chhat
Leviticus13:38 Bô-lūn lâm-lú
Leviticus13:39 chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; pe̍h-pan nā-sī hé-hu-sek
Leviticus13:40 Nā ū lâng lak thâu-mn̂g
Leviticus13:41 
Leviticus13:42 Thuh-thâu á-sī thuh-hia̍h ê só͘-chāi nā chhut-hiān hún-âng-á-sek
Leviticus13:43 Chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha; nā hoat-kiàn i ê thâu-khak bô mn̂g ê só͘-chāi chhut-hiān hún-âng-á-sek koh chéng-chéng
Leviticus13:44 hit-ê lâng chiū-sī tì-tio̍h bâ-hong
Leviticus13:45 Tì-tio̍h bâ-hong ê lâng
Leviticus13:46 I ê seng-khu nā iáu ū chèng-thâu
Leviticus13:47 Saⁿ nā siⁿ-ko͘
Leviticus13:48 
Leviticus13:49 nā siⁿ chhiⁿ-sek á-sī âng-sek ê ko͘
Leviticus13:50 Chè-si tio̍h kā i kiám-cha
Leviticus13:51 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus13:52 Hiah-ê siⁿ-ko͘ ê saⁿ
Leviticus13:53 Chè-si koh kā i kiám-cha; ko͘ nā bô tī iûⁿ-mn̂g chhiah ê saⁿ
Leviticus13:54 chè-si tio̍h hoan-hù lâng sóe hiah-ê siⁿ-ko͘ ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus13:55 Siⁿ-ko͘ ê só͘-chāi sóe liáu-āu
Leviticus13:56 M̄-kú sóe liáu-āu
Leviticus13:57 Nā saⁿ iáu ū ko͘
Leviticus13:58 Lí sóe--kè ê saⁿ
Leviticus13:59 Í-siōng sī iú-koan ēng iûⁿ-mn̂g chhiah á-sī môa-se chit ê saⁿ
Leviticus14:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus14:2 Bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê sî
Leviticus14:3 Chè-si tio̍h chhut-khì iâⁿ-gōa kā i kiám-cha; pīⁿ-lâng ê chèng-thâu nā í-keng hó
Leviticus14:4 chè-si tio̍h hoan-hù lâng ūi-tio̍h hit-ê beh tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê lâng
Leviticus14:5 koh hoan-hù lâng tī tóe oa̍h-chúi ê chho͘-hûi khì-khū téng-bīn thâi kî-tiong ê chi̍t chiah chiáu-á.
Leviticus14:6 Jiân-āu
Leviticus14:7 I tio̍h chiong huih tī hit-ê beh tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê lâng ê seng-khu téng hiù chhit piàn
Leviticus14:8 Beh tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê lâng tio̍h sóe ka-kī ê saⁿ
Leviticus14:9 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus14:10 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus14:11 Chú-chhî kiat-chēng-lé ê chè-si tio̍h chhōa hit-ê beh tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê lâng
Leviticus14:12 Chè-si tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah iûⁿ-káng-á kap saⁿ-hūn-chi-it kong-seng ê iû chòe pê-chōe-chè
Leviticus14:13 I tio̍h tī thâi sio̍k-chōe-chè kap sio-hòa-chè cheng-siⁿ ê só͘-chāi
Leviticus14:14 Chè-si tio̍h the̍h chi̍t-kóa pê-chōe-chè ê huih
Leviticus14:15 koh tùi hit saⁿ-hūn-chi-it kong-seng ê iû tò chi̍t-kóa tī ka-kī tò-chhiú ê chhiú-sim
Leviticus14:16 ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú chi̍t ki chńg-thâu-á ùn tò-pêng chhiú-sim ê iû
Leviticus14:17 Āu-lâi
Leviticus14:18 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chhiú-sim chhun ê iû
Leviticus14:19 Chè-si tio̍h ūi-tio̍h hit-ê beh tit-tio̍h chheng-khì ê lâng hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus14:20 Chè-si tio̍h tī chè-tôaⁿ téng hiàn sio-hòa-chè kap sò͘-chè
Leviticus14:21 Nā ū lâng sàn-chhiah
Leviticus14:22 koh chiàu ka-kī ê châi-le̍k chhú nn̄g chiah pan-kah á-sī hún-chiáu-á-kiáⁿ
Leviticus14:23 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus14:24 Chè-si tio̍h the̍h pê-chōe-chè ê iûⁿ-á kap saⁿ-hūn-chi-it kong-seng ê iû
Leviticus14:25 Chè-si tio̍h thâi pê-chōe-chè ê iûⁿ-á
Leviticus14:26 koh tò chi̍t-kóa iû tī ka-kī tò-chhiú ê chhiú-sim
Leviticus14:27 ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú chi̍t ki chńg-thâu-á ùn tò-pêng chhiú-sim ê iû
Leviticus14:28 Āu-lâi
Leviticus14:29 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chhiú-sim chhun ê iû
Leviticus14:30 Hit-ê lâng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī ê châi-le̍k hiàn chi̍t chiah pan-kah á-sī hún-chiáu-á-kiáⁿ
Leviticus14:31 chiū-sī chiàu i ê khùi-la̍t
Leviticus14:32 Í-siōng sī ū lâng tì-tio̍h bâ-hong
Leviticus14:33 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Leviticus14:34 Lín khì kàu góa siúⁿ-sù lín chòe ke-gia̍p ê Ka-lâm -tōe ê sî
Leviticus14:35 chhù ê chú-lâng tio̍h khì kā chè-si pò-kò
Leviticus14:36 Chè-si ji̍p-khì hit-keng chhù kiám-cha í-chêng
Leviticus14:37 Chè-si tio̍h kiám-cha hit-keng chhù siⁿ-ko͘ ê chêng-hêng; nā hoat-kiàn hit-keng chhù ê piah ū le̍k-sek á-sī âng-sek lap--lo̍h-khì ê hûn-jiah
Leviticus14:38 i tio̍h chhut-khì mn̂g-gōa
Leviticus14:39 Tē-chhit ji̍t
Leviticus14:40 i tio̍h hoan-hù lâng chiong hiah-ê siⁿ-ko͘ ê chio̍h-thâu ó͘--khí-lâi
Leviticus14:41 koh hoan-hù lâng khau chhù-lāi sì-chiu-ûi ê piah; chiong khau--lo̍h-lâi ê he-thô͘ piàⁿ tī siâⁿ-gōa bô chheng-khì ê só͘-chāi;
Leviticus14:42 jiân-āu ēng pa̍t só͘-chāi ê chio̍h-thâu
Leviticus14:43 Hit-keng chhù tī ó͘ chio̍h-thâu
Leviticus14:44 chè-si tio̍h koh ji̍p-khì kiám-cha; siⁿ-ko͘ ê chêng-hêng nā thòaⁿ kàu kui-keng chhù
Leviticus14:45 Hit-keng chhù tio̍h thiah-tiāu
Leviticus14:46 Hit-keng chhù hong-ba̍t ê kî-kan
Leviticus14:47 Tī hit-keng chhù khùn--kè
Leviticus14:48 Hit-keng chhù boah he-thô͘ liáu-āu
Leviticus14:49 Ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ hit-keng chhù tit-tio̍h chheng-khì
Leviticus14:50 tio̍h tī tóe oa̍h-chúi ê chho͘-hûi ê khì-khū téng-bīn thâi kî-tiong ê chi̍t chiah chiáu-á.
Leviticus14:51 Jiân-āu
Leviticus14:52 I tio̍h ēng hit-chiah chiáu-á ê huih
Leviticus14:53 M̄-kú i tio̍h chiong hit-chiah oa̍h-chiáu pàng-khì siâⁿ-gōa ê iá-tōe; án-ni
Leviticus14:54 Í-siōng sī iú-koan bâ-hong-pīⁿ
Leviticus14:55 saⁿ kap chhù siⁿ-ko͘
Leviticus14:56 phê-hu chéng
Leviticus14:57 ēng lâi kàu-tō lâng chai sím-mi̍h sī chheng-khì
Leviticus15:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Leviticus15:2 tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Leviticus15:3 I in-ūi hā-siau
Leviticus15:4 Tì-tio̍h hā-siau ê lâng
Leviticus15:5 Bong-tio̍h i ê bîn-chhn̂g--ê
Leviticus15:6 Chē-tio̍h i chē--kè ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ--ê
Leviticus15:7 Bong-tio̍h i ê seng-khu--ê
Leviticus15:8 Chheng-khì ê lâng nā hō͘ i phùi-tio̍h chhùi-nōa
Leviticus15:9 I chē--kè ê oaⁿ mā-sī bô chheng-khì.
Leviticus15:10 Bong-tio̍h i chē--kè ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ--ê
Leviticus15:11 I iáu-bē sóe-chhiú í-chêng hō͘ i bong--tio̍h ê lâng
Leviticus15:12 I bong--tio̍h ê chho͘-hûi tio̍h kòng hō͘ phòa; chhâ ê khì-khū tio̍h ēng chúi sóe.
Leviticus15:13 Hā-siau ê lâng nā í-keng hó
Leviticus15:14 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus15:15 Chè-si tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus15:16 Lâng nā sia̍p-cheng
Leviticus15:17 Bak-tio̍h cheng-e̍k ê saⁿ á-sī phê ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Leviticus15:18 Nā lâm-lú ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus15:19 Lú-chú nā ge̍h-keng lâi
Leviticus15:20 Tī i bô chheng-khì ê kî-kan
Leviticus15:21 Só͘-ū bong-tio̍h i ê bîn-chhn̂g--ê
Leviticus15:22 Só͘-ū bong-tio̍h i chē--kè ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ--ê
Leviticus15:23 Bô-lūn bong-tio̍h hit-ê lú-chú ê bîn-chhn̂g á-sī i chē--kè ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ ê lâng
Leviticus15:24 Ta-po͘-lâng nā kap ge̍h-keng lâi ê lú-chú ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus15:25 Lú-chú nā tī keng-kî í-gōa lâu-huih chin chōe ji̍t
Leviticus15:26 Tī lâu-huih ê kî-kan
Leviticus15:27 Só͘-ū bong-tio̍h hiah-ê mi̍h ê lâng chiū bô chheng-khì; tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ
Leviticus15:28 Lú-chú hiat-lāu nā í-keng hó
Leviticus15:29 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Leviticus15:30 Chè-si tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus15:31 Lín tio̍h kéng-kài Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng m̄-thang ûi-hoān kiat-chēng ê tiâu-lē
Leviticus15:32 Í-siōng sī koan-hē sia̍p-lāu tì-kàu bô chheng-khì ê tiâu-lē
Leviticus15:33 ge̍h-keng lâi ê lú-chú
Leviticus16:1 A-lûn nn̄g ê kiáⁿ in-ūi bô chiàu kui-lē óa-kūn Siōng Chú
Leviticus16:2 kóng: Tio̍h kā lí ê hiaⁿ-ko A-lûn kóng
Leviticus16:3 A-lûn beh ji̍p sèng-só͘ tio̍h chiàu án-ni chòe: Tòa chi̍t chiah gû-káng-á chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus16:4 I tio̍h sóe seng-khu
Leviticus16:5 A-lûn tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng ê tiong-kan chhú nn̄g chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus16:6 I tio̍h ūi ka-kī kap i ê ka-cho̍k hiàn chi̍t chiah gû-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus16:7 koh chiong hit nn̄g chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng khan-lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Leviticus16:8 A-lûn tio̍h ūi-tio̍h hit nn̄g chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng thiu-chhiam; chi̍t ki chhiam siá “Kui hō͘ Siōng Chú”
Leviticus16:9 A-lûn tio̍h chiong hit-chiah thiu--tio̍h kui hō͘ Siōng Chú ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus16:10 Hit-chiah thiu--tio̍h kui hō͘ A-sat-sià-le̍k ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus16:11 A-lûn tio̍h chiong hit-chiah beh ūi ka-kī kap i ê ka-cho̍k hiàn chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè ê gû-káng-á khan-lâi thâi;
Leviticus16:12 koh tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú bīn-chêng ê chè-tôaⁿ the̍h tóe-móa teh to̍h ê hé-thòaⁿ ê hiuⁿ-lô͘
Leviticus16:13 jiân-āu tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng sio hiuⁿ-liāu
Leviticus16:14 I tio̍h the̍h chi̍t-kóa gû-káng-á ê huih
Leviticus16:15 A-lûn tio̍h koh thâi hit-chiah ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus16:16 Koh tio̍h in-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bô chheng-khì kap pōe-poān
Leviticus16:17 A-lûn ji̍p-khì sèng-só͘ sio̍k-chōe iáu-bē chhut--lâi í-chêng
Leviticus16:18 Jiân-āu
Leviticus16:19 koh tio̍h ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn huih tùi chè-tôaⁿ hiù chhit piàn
Leviticus16:20 A-lûn ūi-tio̍h sèng-só͘
Leviticus16:21 A-lûn tio̍h siang-chhiú hōaⁿ tī iûⁿ ê thâu-khak téng
Leviticus16:22 Hit-chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng beh tòa Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘-ū ê chōe khì kàu bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi; hit-chiah iûⁿ chiū pàng tī khòng-iá.
Leviticus16:23 Āu-lâi
Leviticus16:24 koh tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ ê tiâⁿ sóe seng-khu
Leviticus16:25 Sio̍k-chōe-chè ê iû tio̍h tī chè-tôaⁿ téng sio.
Leviticus16:26 Hit-ê pàng soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng kui hō͘ A-sat-sià-le̍k ê lâng
Leviticus16:27 Chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè ê gû-káng kap soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus16:28 Sio chiah-ê mi̍h ê lâng tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ
Leviticus16:29 Múi-nî ê chhit-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p
Leviticus16:30 Tī chit-ji̍t beh kā lín sio̍k-chōe; lín beh tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng tit-tio̍h chheng-khì
Leviticus16:31 Chit-ji̍t lín tio̍h kā i khòaⁿ-chòe oân-choân hioh-khùn ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Leviticus16:32 Hit-ê siū boah-iû siat-li̍p
Leviticus16:33 I tio̍h ūi-tio̍h Chì-sèng-só͘
Leviticus16:34 Che tio̍h chòe lín éng-oán ê kui-lē
Leviticus17:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Leviticus17:2 “Lí tio̍h tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ
Leviticus17:3 Só͘-ū Í-sek-lia̍t -ke ê lâng
Leviticus17:4 nā bô seng khan-lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Leviticus17:5 In-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bat tī iá-gōa thâi cheng-siⁿ hiàn-chè; taⁿ tio̍h chiong cheng-siⁿ tòa-lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Leviticus17:6 Chè-si tio̍h chiong huih hiù tī hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu Siōng Chú ê chè-tôaⁿ
Leviticus17:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng m̄-thang koh hiàn-chè hō͘ in kiâⁿ siâ-îm kèng-pài ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-kúi-mô͘. Che beh chòe lín sè-sè-tāi-tāi éng-oán ê kui-lē.
Leviticus17:8 “Lí tio̍h kā in hoan-hù
Leviticus17:9 nā bô tòa-lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus17:10 Siōng Chú kóng
Leviticus17:11 Tōng-bu̍t ū huih chiah ū sìⁿ-miā; góa chiong huih hō͘ lín
Leviticus17:12 Só͘-í góa tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng: Lín lóng bōe-ēng-tit chia̍h huih
Leviticus17:13 “Só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Leviticus17:14 Só͘-ū ê tōng-bu̍t
Leviticus17:15 “Nā ū lâng chia̍h chū-jiân sí á-sī hō͘ iá-siù thiah-li̍h ê tōng-bu̍t
Leviticus17:16 M̄-kú i nā bô sóe-saⁿ
Leviticus18:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus18:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè.
Leviticus18:3 Lín bat tòa-kè Ai-ki̍p
Leviticus18:4 Lín tio̍h chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa ê bēng-lēng kap kui-lē. Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè.
Leviticus18:5 Lín tio̍h chun-siú góa ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng; lâng nā chun-siú chiah-ê
Leviticus18:6 Lín lóng m̄-thang kap kūn-chhin ū sèng-koan-hē. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus18:7 M̄-thang kap lāu-bú ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus18:8 M̄-thang kap lí ê lāu-pē kî-tha ê bó͘ ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus18:9 M̄-thang kap lí ê chí-bē ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus18:10 M̄-thang kap lí ê cha-bó͘-sun
Leviticus18:11 M̄-thang kap kâng-pē bô kâng-bú ê chí-bē ū sèng-koan-hē.
Leviticus18:12 M̄-thang kap lí ê a-ko͘ ū sèng-koan-hē; i sī lí ê lāu-pē ê kut-jio̍k chì-chhin.
Leviticus18:13 M̄-thang kap lí ê a-î ū sèng-koan-hē; i sī lí ê lāu-bú ê kut-jio̍k chì-chhin.
Leviticus18:14 M̄-thang kap lí ê a-ḿ
Leviticus18:15 M̄-thang kap lí ê sin-pū ū sèng-koan-hē.
Leviticus18:16 M̄-thang kap lí ê hiaⁿ-só
Leviticus18:17 Kap lí ū sèng-koan-hē ê cha-bó͘-lâng
Leviticus18:18 Bó͘ iáu oa̍h--teh
Leviticus18:19 Hū-jîn-lâng keng-kî tiong bô chheng-khì ê sî
Leviticus18:20 M̄-thang kap pa̍t-lâng ê bó͘ ū sèng-koan-hē lâi phah lâ-sâm ka-kī.
Leviticus18:21 M̄-thang hiàn lí ê kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ Mô͘-lo̍k. M̄-thang siat-to̍k lí ê Siōng-tè ê miâ. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus18:22 M̄-thang kap ta-po͘-lâng ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus18:23 M̄-thang kap jīm-hô cheng-siⁿ kau-ha̍p lâi phah lâ-sâm ka-kī; hū-jîn-lâng mā m̄-thang kap cheng-siⁿ kau-ha̍p; che sī ûi-hoán chū-jiân ê tāi-chì.
Leviticus18:24 Lín m̄-thang chòe í-siōng kìm-chí ê sū lâi phah lâ-sâm ka-kī; in-ūi góa teh-beh tī lín bīn-chêng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng
Leviticus18:25 In án-ni chòe mā ù-jiám thó͘-tōe
Leviticus18:26 Só͘-í lín tio̍h chun-siú góa ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng; chiah-ê thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
Leviticus18:27 Tī lín í-chêng chit-ê thó͘-tōe ê chū-bîn ū chòe chiah-ê thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
Leviticus18:28 Lín m̄-thang ù-jiám hit-ê thó͘-tōe
Leviticus18:29 Nā ū lâng chòe í-siōng kìm-chí ê sū
Leviticus18:30 Lín tio̍h chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng
Leviticus19:1 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus19:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé hōe-chiòng soan-pò͘: Lín tio̍h hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng
Leviticus19:3 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tio̍h kèng-tiōng lín ê lāu-bú lín ê lāu-pē. Lín tio̍h siú góa ê An-hioh-ji̍t. Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè.
Leviticus19:4 Lín m̄-thang khì-sak góa khì pài ngó͘-siōng
Leviticus19:5 Lín thâi cheng-siⁿ hiàn chòe pêng-an-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú ê sî
Leviticus19:6 Chè-mi̍h tio̍h tī hōng-hiàn hit-ji̍t á-sī keh-ji̍t chia̍h; kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t nā iáu ū chhun
Leviticus19:7 Lâu kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t ê chè-mi̍h sī bô chheng-khì; nā ū lâng chia̍h
Leviticus19:8 Chia̍h ê lâng
Leviticus19:9 Lín siu-sêng ngó͘-kok
Leviticus19:10 Siu-sêng phû-tô
Leviticus19:11 M̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang chà-khi; m̄-thang kóng pe̍h-chha̍t.
Leviticus19:12 M̄-thang hōng góa ê miâ chiù ké-chōa lâi siat-to̍k lí ê Siōng-tè ê miâ. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus19:13 M̄-thang khi-ap lí ê tông-pau; m̄-thang chhiúⁿ-toa̍t in ê mi̍h; m̄-thang kā kang-lâng ê kang-chîⁿ lâu keh-mî.
Leviticus19:14 M̄-thang chiù-mē hī-khang bô thiaⁿ--kìⁿ ê lâng. M̄-thang hē mi̍h-kiāⁿ tī sit-bêng ê lâng ê thâu-chêng hāi i poa̍h-tó. Tio̍h kèng-ùi lí ê Siōng-tè. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus19:15 Lín sím-phòaⁿ m̄-thang bô kong-tō; m̄-thang phian-thán sàn-chhiah-lâng
Leviticus19:16 M̄-thang sì-kòe chō-iâu tiòng-siong lâng; m̄-thang chòe gūi-chèng hāi-sí lâng. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus19:17 M̄-thang sim-lāi oàn-hūn chhù-piⁿ; tio̍h sêng-khún chí-chek i ê chhò-gō͘
Leviticus19:18 M̄-thang kā lí ê tông-pau pò-ho̍k
Leviticus19:19 Tio̍h chun-siú góa ê kui-lē. M̄-thang hō͘ bô kâng-lūi ê cheng-siⁿ kau-phòe; m̄-thang chiong nn̄g khoán chéng-chí iā tī kâng chi̍t khu hn̂g; m̄-thang chhēng nn̄g khoán pò͘-liāu chit ê saⁿ.
Leviticus19:20 Lú-pī iáu-bē siū-sio̍k tit-tio̍h chū-iû
Leviticus19:21 Hit-ê ta-po͘-lâng tio̍h hiàn pê-chōe-chè
Leviticus19:22 Chè-si tio̍h ēng pê-chōe-chè ê iûⁿ-káng
Leviticus19:23 Lín chìn-ji̍p Ka-lâm -tōe liáu-āu
Leviticus19:24 Tē-sì nî só͘ kiat ê ké-chí lóng tio̍h hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng
Leviticus19:25 Kàu tē-gō͘ nî
Leviticus19:26 M̄-thang chia̍h kâⁿ-huih ê mi̍h. M̄-thang kiâⁿ hoat-su̍t
Leviticus19:27 Pìn-piⁿ ê mn̂g m̄-thang thì
Leviticus19:28 M̄-thang ūi sí-lâng koah-siong ka-kī ê seng-khu; seng-khu mā m̄-thang chhiah-jī. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus19:29 M̄-thang bú-jio̍k lí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Leviticus19:30 Lín tio̍h siú góa ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Leviticus19:31 M̄-thang khì chhē khan-bông--ê
Leviticus19:32 Tī lāu-tōa-lâng ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus19:33 M̄-thang khi-hū kià-ku tī lín ê tōe ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng;
Leviticus19:34 tio̍h tùi-thāi in chhin-chhiūⁿ tùi-thāi lín Í-sek-lia̍t tông-pau
Leviticus19:35 M̄-thang ēng bô kong-tō ê chhioh
Leviticus19:36 Tio̍h ēng kong-tō ê chhìn-á
Leviticus19:37 Lín tio̍h chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng. Góa sī Siōng Chú.
Leviticus20:1 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus20:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Bô-lūn sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Leviticus20:3 Góa mā beh tùi hit-ê lâng pìⁿ-bīn
Leviticus20:4 Hit só͘-chāi ê lâng nā khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê lâng hiàn kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ Mô͘-lo̍k
Leviticus20:5 góa beh tùi hit-ê lâng kap i ê ka-cho̍k pìⁿ-bīn
Leviticus20:6 Nā ū lâng khì chhē khan-bông--ê á-sī tâng-ki toh-thâu
Leviticus20:7 Só͘-í lín tio̍h hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng
Leviticus20:8 Lín tio̍h chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa ê kui-lē. Góa sī kā lín hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê Siōng Chú.
Leviticus20:9 Nā ū lâng chiù-chó͘ pē-bú
Leviticus20:10 Nā ū lâng kap pa̍t-lâng ê bó͘ su-thong
Leviticus20:11 Kap lāu-pē ê bó͘ su-thong
Leviticus20:12 Nā ū lâng kap sin-pū su-thong
Leviticus20:13 Nā ū ta-po͘-lâng kap ta-po͘-lâng ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus20:14 Nā ū lâng chhōa-bó͘
Leviticus20:15 Nā ū lâng kap cheng-siⁿ kau-ha̍p
Leviticus20:16 Nā ū hū-jîn-lâng kap cheng-siⁿ kau-ha̍p
Leviticus20:17 Lâng nā chhōa ka-kī ê chí-bē
Leviticus20:18 Nā ū lâng kap keng-kî tiong ê hū-jîn-lâng ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus20:19 M̄-thang kap a-î á-sī a-ko͘ ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus20:20 Nā ū lâng kap i ê a-chím á-sī a-ḿ ū sèng-koan-hē
Leviticus20:21 Nā ū lâng chhōa ka-kī hiaⁿ-tī ê bó͘
Leviticus20:22 Lín tio̍h chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa só͘-ū ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng
Leviticus20:23 Góa tī lín ê bīn-chêng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì ê jîn-bîn
Leviticus20:24 Góa bat kā lín kóng
Leviticus20:25 Só͘-í
Leviticus20:26 Lín tio̍h kui-sio̍k góa chiâⁿ-chòe sèng
Leviticus20:27 Khan-bông--ê
Leviticus21:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê soan-pò͘: Jîn-bîn ê tiong-kan nā ū lâng sí
Leviticus21:2 chí-ū thang ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê pē-bú
Leviticus21:3 
Leviticus21:4 Chè-si nā í-keng kiat-hun
Leviticus21:5 Chè-si m̄-thang thâu-khak thì-kng-kng; m̄-thang siu chhùi-chhiu; m̄-thang koah-siong ka-kī ê seng-khu.
Leviticus21:6 Tio̍h sèng-hòa kui Siōng-tè; m̄-thang siat-to̍k Siōng-tè ê miâ; in-ūi in ēng hé sio chia̍h-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè
Leviticus21:7 M̄-thang chhōa chòe ki-lú phah lâ-sâm ka-kī ê hū-jîn-lâng; m̄-thang chhōa lî-hun--kè ê hū-jîn-lâng; in-ūi chè-si í-keng sèng-hòa kui Siōng-tè.
Leviticus21:8 Jîn-bîn tio̍h khòaⁿ chè-si chòe sèng
Leviticus21:9 Chè-si ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ nā chòe ki-lú phah lâ-sâm ka-kī
Leviticus21:10 Tī hiaⁿ-tī ê tiong-kan chòe tōa-chè-si--ê
Leviticus21:11 M̄-thang óa-kūn si-thé
Leviticus21:12 M̄-thang lī-khui sèng-só͘ khì chham-ka song-lé
Leviticus21:13 I tio̍h chhōa chāi-sek-lú chòe bó͘.
Leviticus21:14 M̄-thang chhōa kóaⁿ-hū

Leviticus21:17 tùi A-lûn kóng: Lí ta̍k sè-tāi ê kiáⁿ-sun sin-thé ū khoat-hām--ê

Leviticus21:23 In-ūi i ū khoat-hām
Leviticus21:24 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu án-ni tùi A-lûn kap i hiah-ê kiáⁿ

Leviticus22:2 tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ soan-pò͘: Tio̍h kín-sīn chhú-lí Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng kui hō͘ góa ê chè-mi̍h
Leviticus22:3 Lín ta̍k sè-tāi ê kiáⁿ-sun
Leviticus22:4 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi
Leviticus22:5 á-sī bong-tio̍h teh pê bô chheng-khì ê oa̍h-mi̍h
Leviticus22:6 só͘-ū bong-tio̍h chiah-ê ê lâng
Leviticus22:7 Kàu ji̍t lo̍h

Leviticus22:11 M̄-kú
Leviticus22:12 Chè-si ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ nā kè hō͘ chè-si ka-cho̍k í-gōa ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Leviticus22:13 M̄-kú chè-si ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ nā chiú-kóaⁿ
Leviticus22:14 Nā ū lâng bô chù-ì chia̍h-tio̍h sèng ê chè-mi̍h
Leviticus22:15 M̄-thang sûi-piān hō͘ lâng chia̍h Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú sèng ê chè-mi̍h

Leviticus22:17 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Leviticus22:18 tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ

Leviticus22:21 Nā ū lâng beh kam-sim hiàn-chè
Leviticus22:22 Só͘-ū chhiⁿ-mî
Leviticus22:23 Gû-káng á-sī iûⁿ-á-kiáⁿ nā chi-thé ū ke ū kiám
Leviticus22:24 Tōng-bu̍t ê lān-hu̍t nā siū-siong

Leviticus23:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Leviticus23:2 “Lí tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘ góa ê choeh-ji̍t. Lín tī Siōng Chú ê choeh-ji̍t
Leviticus23:3 La̍k ji̍t tio̍h chòe kang
Leviticus23:4 “Ē-bīn chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú ê choeh-kî
Leviticus23:5 “Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-sì hông-hun ê sî
Leviticus23:6 Chit kò-ge̍h ê cha̍p-gō͘ sī Siōng Chú ê Tû-kàⁿ-choeh; lín tio̍h chia̍h bô-kàⁿ-piáⁿ chhit ji̍t.
Leviticus23:7 Thâu chi̍t ji̍t tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:8 Chhit ji̍t kú tio̍h ēng hé sio chè-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú; tē-chhit ji̍t tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:9 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus23:10 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Lín chìn-ji̍p góa siúⁿ-sù lín ê tōe
Leviticus23:11 Chè-si tio̍h tī An-hioh-ji̍t ê keh-ji̍t chiong chit-khún tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng iô-iô--leh
Leviticus23:12 Hiàn chit-khún ngó͘-kok hit-ji̍t
Leviticus23:13 Sòa-chiap koh hiàn sò͘-chè
Leviticus23:14 Bô-lūn sī piáⁿ
Leviticus23:15 Lín tio̍h tùi Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh An-hioh-ji̍t ê keh-ji̍t
Leviticus23:16 kàu tē-chhit ê An-hioh-ji̍t ê keh-ji̍t
Leviticus23:17 Ta̍k-ê ka-têng tio̍h the̍h nn̄g kong-kun ê iù mī-hún
Leviticus23:18 Hit nn̄g tè piáⁿ í-gōa
Leviticus23:19 Lín tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Leviticus23:20 Chè-si tio̍h chiong hit nn̄g chiah iûⁿ-á kap ēng khí-thâu-se̍k ê be̍h hang ê piáⁿ
Leviticus23:21 Siâng hit-ji̍t
Leviticus23:22 Lín siu-sêng ngó͘-kok
Leviticus23:23 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus23:24 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Chhit-ge̍h chhoe-it
Leviticus23:25 Jīm-hô ji̍t-siông ê kang-chok lóng m̄-thang chòe; tio̍h ēng hé sio chè-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú.
Leviticus23:26 Siōng Chú koh tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Leviticus23:27 “Chhit-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p sī Sio̍k-chōe-ji̍t. Lín tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:28 Hit-ji̍t
Leviticus23:29 Siâng chit-ji̍t
Leviticus23:30 Tī hit-ji̍t choh-kang--ê
Leviticus23:31 Jīm-hô kang-chok lín lóng m̄-thang chòe; lín bô-lūn tòa tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi
Leviticus23:32 Lín tio̍h kìm-chia̍h khek-khó͘ siú chit-ji̍t chòe oân-choân hioh-khùn ê An-hioh-ji̍t. Chit kò-ge̍h chhoe-káu ê hông-hun kàu keh-ji̍t ê hông-hun
Leviticus23:33 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Leviticus23:34 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Chhit-ge̍h cha̍p-gō͘ sī Tah-liâu-choeh. Lín tio̍h tùi chit-ji̍t khí liân-sòa chhit ji̍t ǹg Siōng Chú siú-choeh.
Leviticus23:35 Thâu chi̍t ji̍t tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:36 Lín tio̍h chhit ji̍t kú ēng hé sio chè-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú; tē-poeh ji̍t mā tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:37 Í-siōng sī Siōng Chú ê choeh-kî; lín tio̍h chū-chi̍p kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Leviticus23:38 Chiah-ê sī lín tī Siōng Chú ê An-hioh-ji̍t só͘ hiàn ê lé-mi̍h
Leviticus23:39 Lín siu-sêng thó͘-tōe chhut-sán ê sî
Leviticus23:40 Thâu chi̍t ji̍t tio̍h the̍h tōa-châng hó-khòaⁿ ê chhiū-á ê ké-chí
Leviticus23:41 Ta̍k-nî ê chhit--ge̍h
Leviticus23:42 Lín tio̍h tòa tī chháu-liâu-á chhit ji̍t; só͘-ū chāi-tōe ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng tio̍h tòa tī chháu-liâu-á
Leviticus23:43 thang hō͘ lín ta̍k sè-tāi ê lâng chai
Leviticus23:44 Mô͘-se chiū chiong Siōng Chú chí-tēng ê choeh-kî tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘.
Leviticus24:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng:
Leviticus24:2 Lí tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tòa sûn ê kaⁿ-ná-iû lâi kau hō͘ lí
Leviticus24:3 Tùi ē-hng kàu chá-khí
Leviticus24:4 A-lûn tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Leviticus24:5 Lí tio̍h ēng iù mī-hún hang cha̍p-jī tè piáⁿ
Leviticus24:6 Tio̍h chiong piáⁿ pâi chòe nn̄g chōa
Leviticus24:7 Koh tio̍h ēng sûn ê jú-hiuⁿ sám tī ta̍k-chōa piáⁿ ê téng-bīn
Leviticus24:8 Ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Leviticus24:9 Chiah-ê piáⁿ tio̍h kui hō͘ A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun. In tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ ê tiâⁿ chia̍h
Leviticus24:10 Ū chi̍t ê lâng
Leviticus24:11 
Leviticus24:12 In kā i koaiⁿ--khí-lâi
Leviticus24:13 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Leviticus24:14 “Tio̍h chiong hit-ê lâng tòa-khì iâⁿ-gōa
Leviticus24:15 Lí tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng chiù-chó͘ Siōng-tè
Leviticus24:16 Nā ū lâng siat-to̍k Siōng Chú ê miâ
Leviticus24:17 “Nā ū lâng phah-sí lâng
Leviticus24:18 Nā phah-sí cheng-siⁿ
Leviticus24:19 “Nā ū lâng siong-hāi tông-pau
Leviticus24:20 Ēng siong pê siong
Leviticus24:21 Phah-sí cheng-siⁿ--ê
Leviticus24:22 Bô-lūn sī gōa-cho̍k-lâng á-sī chāi-tōe-lâng
Leviticus24:23 Mô͘-se chiū kā Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Leviticus25:1 Siōng Chú tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Leviticus25:2 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Lín chìn-ji̍p góa siúⁿ-sù lín hit-ê tōe liáu-āu
Leviticus25:3 La̍k nî kú
Leviticus25:4 Tē-chhit nî
Leviticus25:5 Ka-kī hoat ê ngó͘-kok m̄-thang siu-koah
Leviticus25:6 An-hioh-nî thó͘-tōe ê chhut-sán lóng beh hō͘ lí kap lí ê po̍k-jîn
Leviticus25:7 kap cheng-siⁿ
Leviticus25:8 Lí tio̍h sǹg chhit ê chhit nî
Leviticus25:9 Hit-nî ê chhit-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p
Leviticus25:10 Lín tio̍h kā tē-gō͘-cha̍p nî hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng
Leviticus25:11 Tē-gō͘-cha̍p nî beh chòe lín Un-hūi ê Nî
Leviticus25:12 In-ūi hit-nî sī Un-hūi ê Nî
Leviticus25:13 Chit-ê Un-hūi ê Nî
Leviticus25:14 Lín tông-pau ê tiong-kan hō͘-siōng bóe-bōe thó͘-tōe
Leviticus25:15 Nā tùi tông-pau bóe
Leviticus25:16 Nî-sò͘ jú chōe kè-siàu jú koân
Leviticus25:17 Lín m̄-thang sio-phiⁿ
Leviticus25:18 Lín tio̍h chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng
Leviticus25:19 Tōe mā ōe chhut thó͘-sán
Leviticus25:20 Nā ū lâng kóng
Leviticus25:21 Góa it-tēng ōe tī tē-la̍k nî sù hok-khì hō͘ lín
Leviticus25:22 Tē-poeh nî lín tio̍h chèng-choh
Leviticus25:23 Thó͘-tōe m̄-thang éng-oán bōe-tn̄g
Leviticus25:24 Lín tit-tio̍h chòe sán-gia̍p ê choân-pō͘ thó͘-tōe
Leviticus25:25 Lí ê chhin-cho̍k nā ū lâng sàn-chhiah
Leviticus25:26 Nā bô chì-chhin thang kā thó͘-tōe sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus25:27 chiū tio̍h kè-sǹg bōe--chhut-khì ê nî-sò͘
Leviticus25:28 Hit-ê lâng nā bōe-tàng sio̍k-hôe i ka-kī ê thó͘-tōe
Leviticus25:29 Lēng-gōa
Leviticus25:30 Chi̍t nî lāi nā bô sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus25:31 M̄-kú tī bô siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ chng-siā ê chhù
Leviticus25:32 Lī-bī -lâng tī in chòe sán-gia̍p ê siâⁿ ê chhù
Leviticus25:33 Nā ū lâng bóe Lī-bī -lâng ê siâⁿ ê chhù
Leviticus25:34 M̄-kú Lī-bī -lâng ê siâⁿ chiu-ûi ê chháu-tiûⁿ m̄-thang bōe
Leviticus25:35 Lí ê tông-pau nā pìⁿ sàn-chhiah
Leviticus25:36 M̄-thang kā i the̍h lī-sek
Leviticus25:37 Lí chioh i chîⁿ m̄-thang kā i the̍h lī-sek
Leviticus25:38 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
Leviticus25:39 Lí ê tông-pau nā sàn kah chiong ka-kī bōe hō͘ lí
Leviticus25:40 I tòa lí hia
Leviticus25:41 Hit-sî i thang lī-khui
Leviticus25:42 In-ūi in sī góa ê po̍k-jîn
Leviticus25:43 M̄-thang chân-jím koán-hat i
Leviticus25:44 Lí nā su-iàu lâm lú lô͘-lē
Leviticus25:45 mā ōe-tàng bóe kià-ku tī lín tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng
Leviticus25:46 Lín thang lâu in chòe lín ê kiáⁿ-sun ê ke-gia̍p
Leviticus25:47 Tòa tī lín chia ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng nā pìⁿ hó-gia̍h
Leviticus25:48 hō͘ lâng bóe--khì chit-ê lâng ū sio̍k-hôe ê koân-lī. I ê hiaⁿ-tī ōe-tàng kā i sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus25:49 i ê a-chek a-peh
Leviticus25:50 I tio̍h kap bóe-chú sǹg-siàu
Leviticus25:51 I tio̍h chiàu só͘ chhun nî-sò͘ ê chōe-chió
Leviticus25:52 
Leviticus25:53 Bóe-chú m̄-thang chân-jím koán-hat i
Leviticus25:54 Chit-ê lâng nā bōe-tàng chiàu án-ni siū-sio̍k
Leviticus25:55 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng sī góa ê po̍k-jîn
Leviticus26:1 M̄-thang ūi ka-kī chō jīm-hô sîn-siōng
Leviticus26:2 Lín tio̍h siú góa ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Leviticus26:3 Lín nā chhiat-si̍t chun-hêng góa ê kui-lē kap kài-bēng
Leviticus26:4 Góa ōe chiàu-sî kā lín lo̍h-hō͘
Leviticus26:5 Lín siu-sêng ngó͘-kok beh siu kàu bán phû-tô ê sî
Leviticus26:6 Góa beh hō͘ lín sù-kéng-pêng-an; lín tó-teh khùn
Leviticus26:7 Lín beh kā tùi-te̍k kóaⁿ-cháu; in beh sí tī lín ê to-ē.
Leviticus26:8 Lín gō͘ ê lâng beh kóaⁿ-cháu chi̍t-pah ê
Leviticus26:9 Góa beh khòaⁿ-kò͘ lín
Leviticus26:10 Lín kū ê bí-niû chia̍h iáu-bē liáu
Leviticus26:11 Góa beh tī lín tiong-kan kiàn-li̍p góa ê hōe-bō͘
Leviticus26:12 Góa beh put-sî kap lín tông-chāi. Góa beh chòe lín ê Siōng-tè
Leviticus26:13 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
Leviticus26:14 Lín nā m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn góa ê ōe
Leviticus26:15 khì-sak góa ê kui-lē
Leviticus26:16 góa chiū beh án-ni tùi-thāi lín: Góa it-tēng beh hō͘ lín kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Leviticus26:17 Góa beh tùi lín pìⁿ-bīn
Leviticus26:18 Lín tú-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì nā iáu-kú m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn góa ê ōe
Leviticus26:19 Góa beh chiong lín khoa-kháu ê sè-le̍k phah-chhùi
Leviticus26:20 Lín ê lô-khó͘ tio̍h-bôa lóng beh lo̍k-khong
Leviticus26:21 Lín kiâⁿ-ta̍h nā kap góa choh-tùi
Leviticus26:22 Góa beh pàng iá-siù khì lín hia
Leviticus26:23 Án-ni lín nā iáu m̄ siū-kà lâi kui-ǹg góa
Leviticus26:24 góa mā beh kap lín choh-tùi
Leviticus26:25 Góa beh hō͘ lín tú-tio̍h chiàn-loān
Leviticus26:26 Góa bô beh koh kiong-kip bí-niû hō͘ lín; hit-sî cha̍p ê hū-jîn-lâng beh kong-ke ēng chi̍t ê hang-lô͘ hang-piáⁿ
Leviticus26:27 Keng-kè chiah-ê tāi-chì
Leviticus26:28 góa chiū beh hoat tōa siū-khì
Leviticus26:29 Lín ōe iau kah chia̍h lín ê kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ê bah.
Leviticus26:30 Góa beh húi-hoāi lín ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
Leviticus26:31 Góa beh hō͘ lín ê siâⁿ pha-hng
Leviticus26:32 Góa beh hō͘ lín ê tōe hong-hòe
Leviticus26:33 Góa beh chiong lín kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ khì lia̍t-kok
Leviticus26:34 Lín liû-bông khì lia̍t-kok ê sî
Leviticus26:35 Án-ni
Leviticus26:36 Lín tiong-kan só͘ chhun ê lâng
Leviticus26:37 Bô lâng kā in tui-kóaⁿ
Leviticus26:38 Lín ōe tùi lia̍t-kok ê tiong-kan siau-sit
Leviticus26:39 Lín tòa tī tùi-te̍k ê tōe chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê lâng
Leviticus26:40 M̄-kú in nā jīn ka-kī kap chó͘-sian ê chōe
Leviticus26:41 tì-kàu góa kap in choh-tùi
Leviticus26:42 góa chiū ōe siūⁿ-tio̍h góa kap A-pek-la-hán
Leviticus26:43 In pàng-sak hit-tè thó͘-tōe
Leviticus26:44 M̄-kú
Leviticus26:45 Góa beh éng-oán ōe-kì-tit góa kap in ê chó͘-sian só͘ li̍p ê iok. Ūi-tio̍h beh chòe in ê Siōng-tè
Leviticus26:46 Í-siōng chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ
Leviticus27:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Leviticus27:2 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng hē te̍k-pia̍t ê goān beh hiàn-sin hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:3 Chiàu sèng-só͘ ê kui-tēng: jī-cha̍p-hè kàu la̍k-cha̍p-hè
Leviticus27:4 
Leviticus27:5 
Leviticus27:6 
Leviticus27:7 
Leviticus27:8 Hē-goān ê lâng nā sàn-chhiah
Leviticus27:9 Nā ū lâng hiàn cheng-siⁿ chòe lé-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:10 m̄-thang ēng pa̍t-chiah thòe-ōaⁿ
Leviticus27:11 Lâng hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú chòe lé-mi̍h ê cheng-siⁿ nā bô chheng-khì
Leviticus27:12 chè-si tio̍h chiàu cheng-siⁿ ê hó bái kó͘-kè; chè-si kó͘-kè jōa-chōe chiū-sī jōa-chōe.
Leviticus27:13 Hit-ê lâng nā it-tēng beh sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus27:14 Nā ū lâng kā chhù hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:15 Kā hit-keng chhù hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê lâng nā beh sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus27:16 Nā ū lâng chiong kè-sêng ê thó͘-tōe ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:17 I nā tī Un-hūi ê Nî chiong tōe hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:18 I nā tī Un-hūi ê Nî í-āu hōng-hiàn
Leviticus27:19 Hōng-hiàn ê lâng nā it-tēng beh sio̍k-hôe
Leviticus27:20 I nā bô beh sio̍k-hôe hit-tè tōe
Leviticus27:21 Kàu Un-hūi ê Nî
Leviticus27:22 Nā-sī i hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê tōe sī bóe--lâi-ê
Leviticus27:23 chè-si tio̍h chiàu hit-nî kàu Un-hūi ê Nî ê nî-sò͘
Leviticus27:24 Kàu Un-hūi ê Nî
Leviticus27:25 Chè-si tio̍h chiàu sèng-só͘ ê kong-chhìn kó͘-kè.
Leviticus27:26 Thâu-chi̍t-the ê cheng-siⁿ
Leviticus27:27 Nā-sī thâu-chi̍t-the ê cheng-siⁿ bô chheng-khì
Leviticus27:28 Nā ū lâng chiong i só͘ ū--ê éng-oán hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Leviticus27:29 Hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú tio̍h oân-choân húi-bia̍t ê lâng
Leviticus27:30 Thó͘-tōe chhut-sán ê mi̍h
Leviticus27:31 Nā ū lâng beh sio̍k-hôe chit cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t ê mi̍h
Leviticus27:32 Gû-kûn kap iûⁿ-kûn keng-kè bo̍k-chiá koáiⁿ-á ē
Leviticus27:33 Bô-lūn hó bái
Leviticus27:34 Í-siōng chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ thong-kè Mô͘-se tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pan-pò͘ ê bēng-lēng.
Numbers1:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut Ai-ki̍p -tōe liáu-āu
Numbers1:2 “Lí kap A-lûn tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k
Numbers1:3 
Numbers1:4 Ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k tio̍h ū chi̍t ê lâng
Numbers1:5 Ē-bīn sī hia̍p-chō͘ lín ê lâng ê miâ-toaⁿ: Lū-piān chi-cho̍k
Numbers1:6 Chiah-ê sī tùi hōe-chiòng soán-chhut ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
Numbers1:7 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiū chhōa hiah-ê ū tī miâ-toaⁿ ê lâng
Numbers1:8 tī jī-ge̍h chhoe-it tiàu-chi̍p choân-thé hōe-chiòng
Numbers1:9 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers1:10 Ē-bīn sī Ngá-kok ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers2:1 Siōng Chú koh hoan-hù Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Numbers2:2 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī chi-cho̍k ê tōa-kî kap chong-cho̍k ê kì-hō
Numbers2:3 “Tang-pêng
Numbers2:4 jîn-sò͘ chhit-bān sì-chheng la̍k-pah miâ.
Numbers2:5 Tī in piⁿ--á chat-iâⁿ--ê sī Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:6 jîn-sò͘ gō͘-bān sì-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers2:7 Koh-lâi sī Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:8 jîn-sò͘ gō͘-bān chhit-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers2:9 Sio̍k Iû-tāi khu ê jîn-sò͘ chóng-kiōng cha̍p-poeh-bān la̍k-chheng sì-pah miâ. In choh-thâu chhut-hoat.
Numbers2:10 “Lâm-pêng
Numbers2:11 jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān la̍k-chheng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers2:12 Tī in piⁿ--á chat-iâⁿ--ê sī Se-biān chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:13 jîn-sò͘ kiōng gō͘-bān káu-chheng saⁿ-pah miâ.
Numbers2:14 Koh-lâi sī Ka-tek chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:15 jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān gō͘-chheng la̍k-pah gō͘-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers2:16 Sio̍k Lū-piān khu ê jîn-sò͘ chóng-kiōng cha̍p-gō͘-bān chi̍t-chheng sì-pah gō͘-cha̍p miâ. In chòe tē-jī tōa-tūi chhut-hoat.
Numbers2:17 “Hōe-bō͘ kap Lī-bī -lâng tio̍h tī chêng nn̄g tōa-tūi kap āu nn̄g tōa-tūi ê tiong-kan. In án-chóaⁿ chat-iâⁿ
Numbers2:18 “Sai-pêng
Numbers2:19 jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān khòng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers2:20 Tī in piⁿ--á-ê sī Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:21 jîn-sò͘ kiōng saⁿ-bān nn̄g-chheng nn̄g-pah miâ.
Numbers2:22 Koh-lâi sī Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:23 jîn-sò͘ kiōng saⁿ-bān gō͘-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers2:24 Sio̍k Í-hoat-liân khu
Numbers2:25 “Pak-pêng
Numbers2:26 jîn-sò͘ kiōng la̍k-bān nn̄g-chheng chhit-pah miâ.
Numbers2:27 Tī in piⁿ--á-ê sī A-siat chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:28 jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān chi̍t-chheng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers2:29 Koh-lâi sī Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k
Numbers2:30 jîn-sò͘ kiōng gō͘-bān saⁿ-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers2:31 Sio̍k Tān hit-khu
Numbers2:32 Í-siōng sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k
Numbers2:33 M̄-kú Lī-bī -lâng bô sǹg chāi-lāi
Numbers2:34 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k
Numbers3:1 Ē-bīn chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ tùi Mô͘-se kóng-ōe ê sî
Numbers3:2 A-lûn ū sì ê kiáⁿ: tōa-kiáⁿ Ná-tap
Numbers3:3 in lóng siū boah-iû siat-li̍p chòe chè-si
Numbers3:4 Ná-tap kap A-pí-hō͘ tī Se-nāi ê khòng-iá
Numbers3:5 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers3:6 “Lí kiò Lī-bī chi-cho̍k lâi góa chia
Numbers3:7 In tio̍h thòe A-lûn kap hōe-chiòng tī hōe-bō͘ chêng chip-hêng jīm-bū
Numbers3:8 In tio̍h kò͘-siú hōe-bō͘ só͘-ū ê khì-khū
Numbers3:9 Lí tio̍h chí-phài Lī-bī -lâng hia̍p-chō͘ A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ; che sī in tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tiong-kan siū chí-phài î-it ê jīm-bū.
Numbers3:10 Lí tio̍h hun-phài A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ chip-hêng chè-si ê chit-bū; kî-tha ê lâng nā kūn-óa--lâi
Numbers3:11 Siōng Chú koh hoan-hù Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers3:12 “Góa tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan kéng Lī-bī -lâng
Numbers3:13 in-ūi it-chhè ê tōa-kiáⁿ lóng sī góa ê. Góa phah-sí Ai-ki̍p -lâng só͘-ū thâu-chiūⁿ-siⁿ--ê hit-ji̍t
Numbers3:14 Siōng Chú tī Se-nāi ê khòng-iá hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers3:15 “Lí tio̍h chiàu Lī-bī -lâng ê chong-cho̍k
Numbers3:16 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú tùi i ê bēng-lēng
Numbers3:17 Lī-bī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
Numbers3:18 Kek-sūn ê kiáⁿ
Numbers3:19 Ko-hat ê kiáⁿ
Numbers3:20 Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ
Numbers3:21 Kek-sūn ê chong-cho̍k ū Li̍p-nî kap Sī-múi nn̄g ê ka-cho̍k.
Numbers3:22 In móa-ge̍h í-siōng ê ta-po͘-lâng tiám-sǹg liáu
Numbers3:23 Kek-sūn ê chong-cho̍k tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ ê sai-pêng
Numbers3:24 Kek-sūn chong-cho̍k ê siú-léng sī La-i-le̍k ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-ngá-sat.
Numbers3:25 Kek-sūn ê kiáⁿ-sun tio̍h hū-chek kò͘-siú hōe-bō͘
Numbers3:26 hōe-bō͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ chiu-ûi ê tiâⁿ ê ûi kap mn̂g-lî
Numbers3:27 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k ū Àm-lân
Numbers3:28 In tio̍h hū-chek chéng-lí sèng-só͘; móa-ge̍h í-siōng ê ta-po͘-lâng tiám-sǹg liáu
Numbers3:29 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ ê lâm-pêng chat-iâⁿ.
Numbers3:30 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k ê siú-léng sī O͘-siat ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-sat-hoán.
Numbers3:31 Ko-hat ê kiáⁿ-sun tio̍h hū-chek kò͘-siú iok-kūi
Numbers3:32 Chè-si A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat chòe Lī-bī ta̍k chong-cho̍k ê siú-léng ê thâu
Numbers3:33 Bí-la-lī chong-cho̍k ū Boat-lī kap Bō͘-sī nn̄g ê ka-cho̍k.
Numbers3:34 In móa-ge̍h í-siōng ê ta-po͘-lâng tiám-sǹg liáu
Numbers3:35 Bí-la-lī chong-cho̍k ê siú-léng sī A-pí-hâi ê kiáⁿ So͘-lia̍t; in tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ ê pak-pêng chat-iâⁿ.
Numbers3:36 Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ-sun tio̍h hū-chek kò͘-siú hōe-bō͘ ê pán
Numbers3:37 koh tio̍h kò͘-siú tiâⁿ chiu-ûi ê thiāu
Numbers3:38 Tī hōe-bō͘ ê tang-pêng
Numbers3:39 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng tiám-sǹg Lī-bī -lâng; chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k
Numbers3:40 Siōng Chú kā Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers3:41 Góa sī Siōng Chú. Lí tio̍h kéng-soán Lī-bī -lâng kui-sio̍k góa
Numbers3:42 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers3:43 Chiàu miâ-chheh
Numbers3:44 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers3:45 “Lí tio̍h kéng-soán Lī-bī -lâng tāi-thòe Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘-ū ê tōa-kiáⁿ
Numbers3:46 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tōa-kiáⁿ pí Lī-bī -lâng ke nn̄g-pah chhit-cha̍p-saⁿ ê
Numbers3:47 chiàu sèng-só͘ ê kong-chhìn
Numbers3:48 Hiah-ê ke--chhut-lâi ê lâng ê sio̍k-kim
Numbers3:49 Mô͘-se chiū tùi hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng sio̍k-hôe í-gōa hiah-ê ke--chhut-lâi ê lâng the̍h sio̍k-kim.
Numbers3:50 Tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tōa-kiáⁿ the̍h ê sio̍k-kim
Numbers3:51 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers4:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Numbers4:2 “Lín tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k kap ka-cho̍k
Numbers4:3 
Numbers4:4 Ko-hat ê hō͘-tāi tio̍h hū-chek koán-lí hōe-bō͘ lāi-bīn chì-sèng ê mi̍h.
Numbers4:5 “Beh sóa-iâⁿ ê sî
Numbers4:6 koh tio̍h ēng siōng-téng ê phê khàm tī téng-bīn
Numbers4:7 “In tio̍h ēng nâ-sek ê pò͘ chhu tī pâi hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ ê toh; chiong chiah-ê pôaⁿ
Numbers4:8 Pâi hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ ê toh tio̍h khàm chu-âng-sek ê pò͘
Numbers4:9 “In tio̍h the̍h nâ-sek ê pò͘ khàm teng-tâi
Numbers4:10 Koh tio̍h chiong teng-tâi
Numbers4:11 “In tio̍h chhu nâ-sek ê pò͘ tī kim chè-tôaⁿ téng-bīn
Numbers4:12 Mā tio̍h ēng nâ-sek ê pò͘ pau sèng-só͘ lāi-bīn só͘-ū ê khì-khū
Numbers4:13 In tio̍h chiong chè-tôaⁿ ê hé-hu chheng hō͘ chheng-khì
Numbers4:14 Koh tio̍h chiong chè-tôaⁿ teh ēng ê hé-tiáⁿ
Numbers4:15 “Beh sóa-iâⁿ ê sî
Numbers4:16 “Chè-si A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat tio̍h hū-chek koán-lí tiám-teng ê iû
Numbers4:17 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Numbers4:18 “Lín m̄-thang hō͘ Ko-hat chong-cho̍k tùi Lī-bī -lâng ê tiong-kan siū siau-bia̍t.
Numbers4:19 A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ tio̍h ji̍p-khì hōe-bō͘ chí-phài in ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h chòe ê kang-chok
Numbers4:20 In bōe-ēng-tit ji̍p-khì khòaⁿ sèng-mi̍h ūn-poaⁿ ê ū-pī kang-chok
Numbers4:21 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers4:22 “Lí tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k kap ka-cho̍k tiám-sǹg Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers4:23 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit choh-kang ê lâng ê jîn-sò͘.
Numbers4:24 Kek-sūn ê chong-cho̍k tio̍h pān-lí ê kang-chok
Numbers4:25 In tio̍h kng hōe-bō͘ hiah-ê tiùⁿ-bō͘
Numbers4:26 hōe-bō͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ chiu-ûi ê tiâⁿ ê pò͘-ûi kap mn̂g-lî
Numbers4:27 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi tio̍h chiàu A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun ê bēng-lēng kng mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Numbers4:28 Í-siōng sī Kek-sūn chong-cho̍k tī hōe-bō͘ ê chit-chek; in tio̍h siū chè-si A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-tha-má kàm-tok.”
Numbers4:29 “Lí tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k kap ka-cho̍k tiám-sǹg Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers4:30 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit choh-kang ê lâng ê jîn-sò͘.
Numbers4:31 In tī hōe-bō͘ lāi tio̍h hū-chek ê chit-bū
Numbers4:32 tiâⁿ chiu-ûi ê thiāu
Numbers4:33 Í-siōng sī Bí-la-lī chong-cho̍k tī hōe-bō͘ ê chit-chek; in tio̍h siū chè-si A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-tha-má kàm-tok.”
Numbers4:34 Mô͘-se
Numbers4:35 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit choh-kang ê lâng ê jîn-sò͘
Numbers4:36 kiōng nn̄g-chheng chhit-pah gō͘-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers4:37 Che sī Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers4:38 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers4:39 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit choh-kang ê lâng ê jîn-sò͘
Numbers4:40 kiōng nn̄g-chheng la̍k-pah saⁿ-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers4:41 Che sī Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers4:42 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers4:43 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit choh-kang ê lâng ê jîn-sò͘
Numbers4:44 kiōng saⁿ-chheng nn̄g-pah miâ.
Numbers4:45 Che sī Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers4:46 Mô͘-se
Numbers4:47 saⁿ-cha̍p hè kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè tī hōe-bō͘ tng-chit chòe kang
Numbers4:48 chóng-kiōng poeh-chheng gō͘-pah poeh-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers4:49 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chí-phài ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h pān ê sū-bū
Numbers5:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers5:2 “Lí tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers5:3 Bô-lūn lâm-lú
Numbers5:4 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū chiàu án-ni
Numbers5:5 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers5:6 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng khek-khui lâng tek-chōe Siōng Chú
Numbers5:7 I tio̍h jīn-chōe
Numbers5:8 Hit-ê siū-hāi ê lâng nā bô chhin-lâng thang chiap-siū pê-siông
Numbers5:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tòa-lâi chè-si hia hōng-hiàn ê sèng-mi̍h tiong-kan
Numbers5:10 Lâng hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê lé-mi̍h
Numbers5:11 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers5:12 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng hoâi-gî i ê bó͘ tùi i put-tiong
Numbers5:13 
Numbers5:14 
Numbers5:15 hit-ê lâng tio̍h chhōa i ê bó͘ khì chè-si hia
Numbers5:16 Chè-si tio̍h hō͘ hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng óa--lâi
Numbers5:17 Chè-si tio̍h ēng sèng ê chúi tóe tī chho͘-hûi
Numbers5:18 Chè-si tio̍h hō͘ hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng khiā tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Numbers5:19 kiò hū-jîn-lâng chiù-chōa
Numbers5:20 M̄-kú lí nā tùi lí ê tiōng-hu put-tiong
Numbers5:21 goān Siōng Chú hō͘ lí ê tōa-thúi siau-sán
Numbers5:22 Koh chit-ê chiù-chó͘ ê chúi beh ji̍p-khì lí ê seng-khu
Numbers5:23 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chiah-ê chiù-chó͘ ê ōe siá tī chheh-kǹg
Numbers5:24 Hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng nā lim chit-ê chiù-chó͘ ê khó͘-chúi
Numbers5:25 Chè-si tio̍h tùi hū-jîn-lâng ê chhiú chiap hoâi-gî oàn-tò͘ ê sò͘-chè
Numbers5:26 koh tio̍h mi chi̍t pé tōa-be̍h-hún
Numbers5:27 Hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng lim chit-ê chiù-chó͘ ê khó͘-chúi
Numbers5:28 M̄-kú i nā bô phah lâ-sâm ka-kī
Numbers5:29 Í-siōng sī hoâi-gî bó͘ put-tiong ê chhú-lí pān-hoat. Bó͘ í-keng kè hō͘ tiōng-hu
Numbers5:30 á-sī tiōng-hu oàn-tò͘ hoâi-gî i ê bó͘
Numbers5:31 Án-ni
Numbers6:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers6:2 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘: Nā ū lâng
Numbers6:3 án-ni
Numbers6:4 Tī hē-goān kî-kan
Numbers6:5 I tī hē-goān chòe Ná-sè-ní-lâng kî-kan
Numbers6:6 Tī i chòe Ná-sè-ní-lâng hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê kî-kan
Numbers6:7 Chiū-sī pē-bú
Numbers6:8 Tī i chòe Ná-sè-ní-lâng ê kî-kan
Numbers6:9 I ê sin-piⁿ nā hut-jiân ū lâng sí
Numbers6:10 Tē-poeh ji̍t
Numbers6:11 Chè-si tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Numbers6:12 I tio̍h koh soán chi̍t ji̍t
Numbers6:13 Hōng-hiàn chòe Ná-sè-ní-lâng ê kî-hān nā kàu
Numbers6:14 hiàn lé-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers6:15 koh hiàn kui-nâ ēng chhiau-iû ê iù mī-hún chòe ê bô-kàⁿ-piáⁿ
Numbers6:16 Chè-si tio̍h the̍h chiah-ê lé-mi̍h
Numbers6:17 mā tio̍h chiong hit-chiah iûⁿ-káng kap hit-nâ bô-kàⁿ-piáⁿ hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú chòe pêng-an-chè
Numbers6:18 Ná-sè-ní-lâng tio̍h tī hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu thì-thâu
Numbers6:19 Ná-sè-ní-lâng thì i hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê thâu-mn̂g liáu-āu
Numbers6:20 Chè-si tio̍h chiong chiah-ê lé-mi̍h tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng iô-iô--leh; chiah-ê kap iô--kè ê heng-khám-bah
Numbers6:21 Í-siōng sī Ná-sè-ní-lâng eng-kai chun-siú ê tiâu-lē. I nā iáu ū khùi-la̍t thang hiàn kui-tēng í-gōa ê lé-mi̍h
Numbers6:22 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers6:23 tio̍h tùi A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ soan-pò͘: Lín tio̍h án-ni kā Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiok-hok
Numbers6:24 “Goān Siōng Chú sù-hok lí
Numbers6:25 Goān Siōng Chú ê bīn ê kng chiò lí
Numbers6:26 Goān Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí ê bīn khòaⁿ lí
Numbers6:27 Án-ni
Numbers7:1 Mô͘-se khí hōe-bō͘ oân-sêng liáu-āu
Numbers7:2 Hit-ji̍t Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k
Numbers7:3 In múi nn̄g ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ hōng-hiàn chi̍t tâi ū khàm pò͘-phâng ê chhia
Numbers7:4 Siōng Chú kā Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers7:5 “Lí tio̍h kā hiah-ê siu--khí-lâi
Numbers7:6 Mô͘-se chiū siu hiah-ê chhia kap gû
Numbers7:7 Chiàu Kek-sūn ê kiáⁿ-sun sū-hōng ê chit-chek
Numbers7:8 Chiàu Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ-sun sū-hōng ê chit-chek
Numbers7:9 M̄-kú chhia kap gû bô kau hō͘ Ko-hat ê kiáⁿ-sun
Numbers7:10 Kā chè-tôaⁿ boah-iû hōng-hiàn chè-tôaⁿ ê sî
Numbers7:11 Siōng Chú kā Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers8:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers8:2 tùi A-lûn kóng
Numbers8:3 A-lûn chiū chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers8:4 Chit-ê teng-tâi lóng ēng kim phah
Numbers8:5 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers8:6 “Lí tio̍h chiong Lī-bī -lâng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan hun-pia̍t--chhut-lâi
Numbers8:7 Lí tio̍h án-ni kā in kiat-chēng: Ēng tû-khì chōe ê chúi hiù tī in ê seng-khu
Numbers8:8 Āu-lâi
Numbers8:9 Lí tio̍h chhōa Lī-bī -lâng lâi kàu hōe-bō͘ chêng
Numbers8:10 lí chhōa Lī-bī -lâng lâi Siōng Chú bīn-chêng
Numbers8:11 A-lûn tio̍h chiong Lī-bī -lâng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tiong-kan hun-pia̍t--chhut-lâi
Numbers8:12 Lī-bī -lâng tio̍h hōaⁿ-chhiú tī hiah-ê gû-káng-á ê thâu-khak téng; lí tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Numbers8:13 “Lí tio̍h hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng khiā tī A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ ê bīn-chêng
Numbers8:14 Án-ni
Numbers8:15 Lí kā in kiat-chēng
Numbers8:16 In sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan oân-choân hiàn hō͘ góa--ê; góa hō͘ in kui-sio̍k góa
Numbers8:17 In-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t tiong só͘-ū thâu-chiūⁿ-siⁿ ê lâng á-sī cheng-siⁿ
Numbers8:18 Taⁿ góa kéng Lī-bī -lâng tāi-thòe Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘-ū ê thâu-chiūⁿ-kiáⁿ.
Numbers8:19 Góa tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan chí-phài Lī-bī -lâng
Numbers8:20 Mô͘-se
Numbers8:21 Lī-bī -lâng chiū kiat-chēng ka-kī
Numbers8:22 Jiân-āu
Numbers8:23 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers8:24 “Ē-bīn sī koan-hē Lī-bī -lâng ê kui-tēng: In jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè í-siōng tio̍h lâi hōe-bō͘ sū-hōng
Numbers8:25 kàu gō͘-cha̍p hè chiū thè-hiu;
Numbers8:26 thè-hiu liáu-āu thang tī hōe-bō͘ hia̍p-chō͘ in ê hiaⁿ-tī pān-lí sū-bū
Numbers9:1 Chhut Ai-ki̍p tē-jī nî chiaⁿ--ge̍h
Numbers9:2 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tio̍h tī chí-tēng ê ji̍t-kî siú Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh;
Numbers9:3 chiū-sī tī chit kò-ge̍h ê cha̍p-sì
Numbers9:4 Mô͘-se chiū bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siú Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh.
Numbers9:5 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-sì hông-hun ê sî
Numbers9:6 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng in-ūi bong-tio̍h lâng ê si-thé chiâⁿ-chòe bô chheng-khì
Numbers9:7 kóng
Numbers9:8 Mô͘-se kā in kóng
Numbers9:9 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers9:10 tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-pò͘
Numbers9:11 In tio̍h bān chi̍t kò-ge̍h
Numbers9:12 liân chi̍t-tiám-á to m̄-thang lâu kàu keh-chá-khí
Numbers9:13 Nā ū lâng sī chheng-khì mā bô chhut-gōa
Numbers9:14 “Nā ū gōa-cho̍k-lâng kià-ku tī lín tiong-kan
Numbers9:15 Tah hōe-bō͘ hit-ji̍t
Numbers9:16 Hûn put-sî jia-khàm hōe-bō͘
Numbers9:17 Hûn sím-mi̍h sî tùi hōe-bō͘ seng-koân
Numbers9:18 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng khí-kiâⁿ
Numbers9:19 Hûn tī hōe-bō͘ téng thêng chōe-chōe ji̍t
Numbers9:20 Ū-sî hûn tī hōe-bō͘ téng thêng bô kúi ji̍t
Numbers9:21 Ū-sî hûn tùi ē-hng kàu chá-khí jia--teh
Numbers9:22 Hûn thêng tī hōe-bō͘ téng-bīn
Numbers9:23 In chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chat-iâⁿ
Numbers10:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers10:2 “Lí tio̍h ēng gûn phah nn̄g ki lat-pah
Numbers10:3 Nn̄g ki lat-pah chòe-hé pûn ê sî
Numbers10:4 Nā kan-ta pûn chi̍t ki
Numbers10:5 Pûn kín-kip té-im ê sî
Numbers10:6 Tē-jī piàn pûn kín-kip té-im ê sî
Numbers10:7 Nā beh chū-chi̍p hōe-chiòng
Numbers10:8 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê
Numbers10:9 Lín kap chhim-hoān lín ê thó͘-tōe ê tùi-te̍k kau-chiàn ê sî
Numbers10:10 Lín kú-hêng khèng-tián
Numbers10:11 Tē-jī nî jī-ge̍h jī-cha̍p
Numbers10:12 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū chiàu in ê hêng-thêng tùi Se-nāi ê khòng-iá chhut-hoat; hûn thêng tī Pa-lân ê khòng-iá.
Numbers10:13 Che sī in chiàu Siōng Chú hō͘ Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers10:14 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k ê tōa-kî chòe thâu-chêng
Numbers10:15 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī So͘-ap ê kiáⁿ Ná-thán-gia̍p.
Numbers10:16 Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Hi-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-ap.
Numbers10:17 Hōe-bō͘ chiū thiah--khí-lâi; Kek-sūn kap Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ-sun kng hōe-bō͘ chhut-hoat.
Numbers10:18 Chiàu pō͘-tūi ê sūn-sū
Numbers10:19 Se-biān chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī So͘-lī-sa-tāi ê kiáⁿ Sī-lō͘-bi̍t.
Numbers10:20 Ka-tek chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Tiu-ní ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-ngá-sat.
Numbers10:21 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k kng sèng-só͘ lāi-bīn ê sèng-mi̍h khí-kiâⁿ; hōe-bō͘ tio̍h tī in kàu-ūi í-chêng tah hó.
Numbers10:22 Chiàu pō͘-tūi ê sūn-sū
Numbers10:23 Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Pí-tāi-siok ê kiáⁿ Ka-má-lia̍t.
Numbers10:24 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Ki-to-nî ê kiáⁿ A-pí-tān.
Numbers10:25 Chòe-āu sī Tān chi-cho̍k ê tōa-kî chhōa-tūi
Numbers10:26 A-siat chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Gô-lân ê kiáⁿ Phà-kiat.
Numbers10:27 Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k pō͘-tūi ê thóng-léng sī Í-lâm ê kiáⁿ A-hi-la.
Numbers10:28 Í-siōng sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pō͘-tūi chiap pō͘-tūi hiòng-chêng kiâⁿ ê sūn-sū.
Numbers10:29 Mô͘-se tùi i ê tiūⁿ-lâng Bí-tiân -lâng Liû-ní ê kiáⁿ Hô-pa kóng
Numbers10:30 I ìn kóng
Numbers10:31 Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers10:32 Lí nā kap goán chòe-hé khì
Numbers10:33 In lī-khui Siōng Chú ê soaⁿ
Numbers10:34 In thiah in ê pò͘-pîⁿ chhut-hoat; ji̍t--sî Siōng Chú ê hûn tī in ê téng-bīn.
Numbers10:35 Iok-kūi khí-thêng ê sî
Numbers10:36 Iok-kūi thêng ê sî
Numbers11:1 Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn hoat oàn-giân
Numbers11:2 Jîn-bîn tùi Mô͘-se ai-kiû
Numbers11:3 Hit-ê só͘-chāi chiū kiò-chòe Tha-pī-la
Numbers11:4 In tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng siàu-siūⁿ beh chia̍h hó-mi̍h; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng mā thî-khàu kóng
Numbers11:5 Goán ōe-kì-tit tī Ai-ki̍p chia̍h hî bián chîⁿ
Numbers11:6 Goán í-keng bô goân-khì lah
Numbers11:7 Má-ná chhin-chhiūⁿ iân-sui-chí
Numbers11:8 Jîn-bîn sì-kòe khì khioh
Numbers11:9 Mî--sî má-ná kap lō͘-chúi chòe-hé lo̍h tī iâⁿ-lāi.
Numbers11:10 Mô͘-se thiaⁿ-tio̍h jîn-bîn ke-ke-hō͘-hō͘ tī pò͘-pîⁿ-kháu teh háu. Siōng Chú chin siū-khì
Numbers11:11 Mô͘-se tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers11:12 Chit-ê jîn-bîn kiám sī góa hoâi-īn--ê? Kiám sī góa siⁿ--ê? Lí kèng-jiân kiò góa tio̍h kā in phō tī heng-chêng
Numbers11:13 Góa beh khì tó-ūi the̍h bah lâi hō͘ só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn chia̍h? In-ūi in lóng khàu-lōa góa
Numbers11:14 Chit-ê jîn-bîn ê tàⁿ siuⁿ tāng
Numbers11:15 Lí nā án-ni tùi-thāi góa
Numbers11:16 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers11:17 Góa beh kàng-lîm tī hia kap lí kóng-ōe
Numbers11:18 Lí mā tio̍h kā jîn-bîn kóng
Numbers11:19 Lín m̄-sī kan-ta chia̍h chi̍t ji̍t
Numbers11:20 I beh hō͘ lín chia̍h kui kò-ge̍h
Numbers11:21 Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers11:22 Kiám ū kàu-gia̍h ê gû-kûn
Numbers11:23 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers11:24 Mô͘-se chhut--khì
Numbers11:25 Siōng Chú tī hûn-tiong kàng-lîm
Numbers11:26 Ū nn̄g ê tī miâ-toaⁿ lāi-bīn ê tiúⁿ-ló
Numbers11:27 Ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng cháu-lâi kā Mô͘-se pò-kò
Numbers11:28 Tùi siàu-liân chiū chòe Mô͘-se ê chō͘-chhiú
Numbers11:29 Mô͘-se kā i kóng
Numbers11:30 Āu-lâi
Numbers11:31 Siōng Chú khí chi̍t chūn hong
Numbers11:32 Jîn-bîn kui-mî kui-ji̍t kap tē-jī ji̍t kui-ji̍t
Numbers11:33 Bah iáu tī in ê chhùi-lāi teh pō͘
Numbers11:34 Hit-ê só͘-chāi chiū kiò-chòe Ki-phok-lô Hap-tha-óa
Numbers11:35 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Ki-phok-lô Hap-tha-óa khì kàu Hap-sé-lio̍k
Numbers12:1 Bí-lī-an kap A-lûn phoe-phêng Mô͘-se
Numbers12:2 “Siōng Chú kiám kan-ta thong-kè Mô͘-se kóng-ōe? Kiám bô mā thong-kè goán kóng-ōe?” Chiah-ê ōe Siōng Chú ū thiaⁿ--tio̍h.
Numbers12:3 Mô͘-se choh-lâng hui-siông khiam-pi
Numbers12:4 Hut-jiân
Numbers12:5 Siōng Chú tī hûn-thiāu tiong kàng-lîm
Numbers12:6 Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers12:7 M̄-kú góa ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se m̄-sī án-ni; góa ū chiong góa ê choân-ke kau-tài i.
Numbers12:8 Góa sī kap i bīn-tùi-bīn kóng-ōe; bêng-bêng kóng
Numbers12:9 Siōng Chú tùi in siū-khì
Numbers12:10 Hûn tùi hōe-bō͘ ê téng-bīn sóa-khui; Bí-lī-an hut-jiân khí giâm-tiōng ê phê-hu-pīⁿ
Numbers12:11 chiū tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers12:12 Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ i chhin-chhiūⁿ chhut bú-thai chiū nōa chi̍t-pòaⁿ ê sí-the.”
Numbers12:13 Mô͘-se chiū ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Numbers12:14 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers12:15 Tùi án-ni
Numbers12:16 Āu-lâi
Numbers13:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers13:2 “Lí tio̍h tùi ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k soán chi̍t ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
Numbers13:3 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers13:4 Chiah-ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ ê miâ kì tī ē-bīn: Lū-piān chi-cho̍k sī Sat-khek ê kiáⁿ Sa-bō͘-a
Numbers13:5 Se-biān chi-cho̍k sī Hô-lī ê kiáⁿ Sa-hoat
Numbers13:6 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k sī Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k
Numbers13:7 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ Í-ka
Numbers13:8 Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k sī Lūn ê kiáⁿ Hô-se-a
Numbers13:9 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k sī La-hu ê kiáⁿ Phà-thê
Numbers13:10 Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k sī So-tí ê kiáⁿ Ka-tia̍p
Numbers13:11 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k sī So͘-se ê kiáⁿ Ka-tí
Numbers13:12 Tān chi-cho̍k sī Ki-má-lī ê kiáⁿ A-bí-lī
Numbers13:13 A-siat chi-cho̍k sī Bí-ka-le̍k ê kiáⁿ Se-thiap
Numbers13:14 Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k sī Po̍k-se ê kiáⁿ Ná-pí
Numbers13:15 Ka-tek chi-cho̍k sī Má-ki ê kiáⁿ Kiū-lī
Numbers13:16 Í-siōng sī Mô͘-se phài-khì thàm-cha hit-ê tōe ê lâng ê miâ. Mô͘-se kā Lūn ê kiáⁿ Hô-se-a hō-miâ chòe Iok-su-a.
Numbers13:17 Mô͘-se phài in khì thàm-cha Ka-lâm -tōe ê sî
Numbers13:18 khòaⁿ hit-ê tōe siⁿ-chòe sím-mi̍h khoán: Hia ê chū-bîn sī kiông á-sī jio̍k
Numbers13:19 tòa ê tōe sī hó á-sī bái
Numbers13:20 Koh khòaⁿ hit-ê thó͘-tōe sī pûi á-sī sán
Numbers13:21 In chiū khì thàm-cha
Numbers13:22 In koh tùi Nî-kek-hu chiūⁿ-khì Hi-pek-lûn; chit-ê siâⁿ pí Ai-ki̍p ê Só-an -siâⁿ khah chá chhit nî khí-chō
Numbers13:23 In kàu Í-si̍t-kok Soaⁿ-kok
Numbers13:24 In-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi hia chhò chi̍t pha phû-tô
Numbers13:25 In thàm-cha hit-ê tōe sì-cha̍p ji̍t kú
Numbers13:26 In lâi kàu Pa-lân khòng-iá ê Ka-te-su
Numbers13:27 In tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers13:28 M̄-kú hit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn chin ióng
Numbers13:29 A-má-le̍k -lâng tòa tī Nî-kek-hu tōe-khu; Hek -lâng
Numbers13:30 Ka-le̍k tī Mô͘-se ê bīn-chêng hō͘ jîn-bîn an-chēng--lo̍h-lâi
Numbers13:31 M̄-kú hiah-ê kap i chòe-hé khì ê lâng kóng
Numbers13:32 Hiah-ê khì thàm-cha ê lâng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng sàn-pò͘ iâu-giân
Numbers13:33 Goán khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê A-la̍p -cho̍k ê lâng chiū-sī tōa-hàn-lâng
Numbers14:1 Choân hōe-chiòng chiū chhut-siaⁿ
Numbers14:2 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bâi-oàn Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Numbers14:3 Siōng Chú ná beh chhōa goán lâi kàu chia
Numbers14:4 In hō͘-siōng kóng-lâi-kóng-khì
Numbers14:5 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn phak-lo̍h tī Í-sek-lia̍t choân hōe-chiòng ê bīn-chêng.
Numbers14:6 Thàm-cha hit-ê tōe ê lâng tiong-kan
Numbers14:7 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t choân hōe-chiòng kóng
Numbers14:8 Siōng Chú nā ì-ài lán
Numbers14:9 M̄-kú lín m̄-thang pōe-poān Siōng Chú
Numbers14:10 Choân-thé hōe-chiòng kóng beh ēng chio̍h-thâu kā in tìm-sí hit-sî
Numbers14:11 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers14:12 Góa beh ēng un-e̍k phah in
Numbers14:13 Mô͘-se tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers14:14 Ai-ki̍p -lâng ōe tùi chit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn kóng chit-ê sū. Chit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn mā í-keng chai
Numbers14:15 Taⁿ lí nā chi̍t-ē-chhiú thâi-sí chiah-ê jîn-bîn
Numbers14:16 ‘In-ūi Siōng Chú bōe-tàng chiong chit-ê jîn-bîn chhōa ji̍p-khì I tùi in li̍p-sè èng-ún ê tōe
Numbers14:17 Taⁿ kiû góa ê Chú chiàu lí só͘ èng-ún--ê
Numbers14:18 Siōng Chú bô khoài siū-khì
Numbers14:19 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê tōa chû-ài sià-bián chit-ê jîn-bîn ê chōe-gia̍t. Chhin-chhiūⁿ lí tùi chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p kàu taⁿ
Numbers14:20 Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers14:21 M̄-kú
Numbers14:22 Chiah-ê lâng sui-jiân ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa ê êng-kng
Numbers14:23 só͘-í in it-tēng bōe-tàng khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa tùi in ê lia̍t-chó͘ li̍p-sè èng-ún ê tōe; só͘-ū biáu-sī góa--ê lóng bōe-tàng khòaⁿ--tio̍h.
Numbers14:24 M̄-kú góa ê po̍k-jîn Ka-le̍k
Numbers14:25 Bîn-á-chài lín tio̍h choán hong-hiòng
Numbers14:26 Siōng Chú koh tùi Mô͘-se kap A-lûn kóng
Numbers14:27 “Chit-ê pháiⁿ ê hōe-chiòng tùi góa hoat oàn-giân beh kàu tī-sî? Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi góa ê oàn-giân
Numbers14:28 Tio̍h kā in kóng Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers14:29 Lín ê sin-si ōe tó tī chit-ê khòng-iá. Lín tiong-kan ū teng-lio̍k
Numbers14:30 it-tēng bōe-tàng ji̍p-khì góa li̍p-sè èng-ún beh hō͘ lín khiā-khí ê tōe; chí-ū Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k kap Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a chiah ōe-tàng ji̍p--khì.
Numbers14:31 M̄-kú lín só͘ teh siūⁿ ōe hō͘ lâng lia̍h--khì ê gín-á
Numbers14:32 Lín leh
Numbers14:33 Lín ê kiáⁿ-jî ōe tī khòng-iá liû-lōng sì-cha̍p nî
Numbers14:34 Lín thàm-cha hit-ê tōe ê ji̍t-chí kiōng sì-cha̍p ji̍t
Numbers14:35 Góa Siōng Chú í-keng kóng
Numbers14:36 Mô͘-se phài-khì thàm-cha hit-ê tōe ê lâng
Numbers14:37 hiah-ê pò pháiⁿ siau-sit ê lâng lóng tú-tio̍h un-e̍k
Numbers14:38 Khì thàm-cha hit só͘-chāi ê lâng tiong-kan
Numbers14:39 Mô͘-se chiong chiah-ê ōe kā Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng kóng
Numbers14:40 In thàu-chá khí--lâi
Numbers14:41 Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers14:42 M̄-thang khì
Numbers14:43 A-má-le̍k -lâng kap Ka-lâm -lâng lóng tī lín ê thâu-chêng
Numbers14:44 In kian-chhî beh chiūⁿ soaⁿ-téng; m̄-kú Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi kap Mô͘-se bô chhut iâⁿ-tōe.
Numbers14:45 Tùi án-ni
Numbers15:1 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers15:2 tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng: Lín khì kàu góa siúⁿ-sù lín khiā-khí ê tōe
Numbers15:3 nā beh tùi gû-kûn iûⁿ-kûn tiong-kan chhú-lâi chòe phang-phang ê chè-mi̍h
Numbers15:4 ta̍k-chiah iûⁿ-á tio̍h phòe ēng chi̍t kong-kun iù mī-hún chhiau chi̍t kong-seng iû chòe ê sò͘-chè
Numbers15:5 
Numbers15:6 Hiàn mî-iûⁿ-káng
Numbers15:7 koh ēng chi̍t kong-seng-pòaⁿ ê chiú chòe tiān-chiú-chè
Numbers15:8 Lí nā hiàn gû-káng-á chòe sio-hòa-chè á-sī pa̍t-khoán ê chè
Numbers15:9 tio̍h ēng saⁿ kong-kun ê iù mī-hún chhiau nn̄g kong-seng ê iû chòe sò͘-chè
Numbers15:10 koh ēng nn̄g kong-seng ê chiú chòe tiān-chiú-chè
Numbers15:11 Hiàn múi chi̍t chiah gû-káng
Numbers15:12 Bô-lūn lí hōng-hiàn kúi chiah
Numbers15:13 Ta̍k-ê chāi-tōe chhut-sì ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers15:14 Nā ū gōa-cho̍k-lâng lâi tòa tī lín tiong-kan
Numbers15:15 Koan-hē hōe-chiòng
Numbers15:16 Lín kap tòa tī lín tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng
Numbers15:17 Siōng Chú koh bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers15:18 tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng: Lín khì kàu Siōng Chú chhōa lín ji̍p-khì hit-ê tōe
Numbers15:19 chia̍h hit só͘-chāi ê bí-niû
Numbers15:20 Lín tio̍h chiong tē-it tè hang--chhut-lâi ê piáⁿ
Numbers15:21 Lín sè-sè-tāi-tāi tio̍h chiàu án-ni chòe
Numbers15:22 Lín nā bô-ì-tiong hoān-tio̍h Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se ê jīm-hô kài-bēng
Numbers15:23 chiū-sī Siōng Chú thong-kè Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín--ê
Numbers15:24 nā ū lâng hoān--tio̍h
Numbers15:25 Chè-si tio̍h ūi Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé hōe-chiòng sio̍k-chōe
Numbers15:26 Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng kap tòa tī in tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng
Numbers15:27 Nā ū lâng bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe
Numbers15:28 Chè-si tio̍h ūi bô-ì-tiong hoān-chōe hit-ê lâng tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng sio̍k-chōe
Numbers15:29 Chāi-tōe ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap tòa tī in tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng
Numbers15:30 Nā ū lâng kò͘-ì hoān-chōe siat-to̍k Siōng Chú
Numbers15:31 Hit-ê lâng biáu-sī Siōng Chú ê ōe
Numbers15:32 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī khòng-iá ê sî
Numbers15:33 Hiah-ê hoat-kiàn i khioh-chhâ ê lâng
Numbers15:34 In kā i koaiⁿ--khí-lâi
Numbers15:35 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers15:36 Hōe-chiòng kā hit-ê lâng chhōa-khì iâⁿ-gōa
Numbers15:37 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers15:38 tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng: In tio̍h sè-sè-tāi-tāi tī saⁿ-á-kîⁿ chòe chhiu
Numbers15:39 Chiah-ê chhiu sī beh hō͘ lín khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Numbers15:40 Án-ni
Numbers15:41 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
Numbers16:1 Lī-bī ê cheng-sun
Numbers16:2 in khí-lâi hoán-khòng Mô͘-se
Numbers16:3 In liân-ha̍p kong-kek Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Numbers16:4 Mô͘-se thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe chiū phak tī thô͘-kha
Numbers16:5 tùi Khó-la kap in hit-tīn lâng kóng
Numbers16:6 Lín tio̍h án-ni chòe: Khó-la kap lín chit-tīn lâng
Numbers16:7 bîn-á-chài lín tio̍h tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng
Numbers16:8 Mô͘-se koh tùi Khó-la kóng
Numbers16:9 Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè kā lín tùi Í-sek-lia̍t ê hōe-chiòng hun-pia̍t--chhut-lâi
Numbers16:10 Siōng-tè koh hō͘ lí
Numbers16:11 Lí kap lín chit-tīn lâng liân-ha̍p
Numbers16:12 Mô͘-se chhe lâng khì kiò Í-lī-ap ê kiáⁿ Tāi-tan kap A-pí-lân; in kóng
Numbers16:13 Lí kā goán tùi lâu lin kap bi̍t ê Ai-ki̍p -tōe chhōa--chhut-lâi
Numbers16:14 Lí m̄-nā bô chhōa goán khì kàu lí só͘ kóng lâu lin kap bi̍t ê tōe
Numbers16:15 Mô͘-se chiū hui-siông siū-khì
Numbers16:16 Mô͘-se tùi Khó-la kóng
Numbers16:17 Lín nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p lâng ta̍k-ê tio̍h tòa hiuⁿ-lô͘
Numbers16:18 In ta̍k-ê lâng chiū the̍h hiuⁿ-lô͘
Numbers16:19 Khó-la chio-chi̍p choân-thé hōe-chiòng lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Numbers16:20 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se kap A-lûn kóng
Numbers16:21 “Lín tio̍h lī chiah-ê hōe-chiòng khah hn̄g leh
Numbers16:22 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiū phak tī thô͘-kha
Numbers16:23 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se khì kā hōe-chiòng kóng
Numbers16:24 
Numbers16:25 Mô͘-se khì Tāi-tan
Numbers16:26 I hoan-hù hōe-chiòng kóng
Numbers16:27 Hōe-chiòng chiū lī-khui Khó-la
Numbers16:28 Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers16:29 Chiah-ê lâng nā kap it-poaⁿ-lâng kâng-khoán chū-jiân sí
Numbers16:30 Siōng Chú nā chòe chi̍t hāng sin ê sū
Numbers16:31 Mô͘-se ōe tú-á kóng soah
Numbers16:32 Tōe li̍h--khui
Numbers16:33 Hiah-ê lâng kap só͘-ū sio̍k in--ê lóng oa̍h-oa̍h lo̍h Im-kan; tōe tī in ê téng-bīn koh ha̍p-óa
Numbers16:34 Tī in sì-chiu-ûi ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h in âu-kiò
Numbers16:35 Koh ū hé tùi Siōng Chú hia hoat-chhut
Numbers16:36 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers16:37 hoan-hù chè-si A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers16:38 Hiah-ê hiuⁿ-lô͘ í-keng hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers16:39 Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat chiū kā hiah-ê lâng só͘ hiàn tâng ê hiuⁿ-lô͘ the̍h--lâi
Numbers16:40 hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe kàm-kài; chiah bián m̄-sī sio̍k A-lûn hō͘-tāi ê gōa-lâng tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng sio-hiuⁿ
Numbers16:41 Keh-ji̍t
Numbers16:42 Hōe-chiòng chū-chi̍p kong-kek Mô͘-se kap A-lûn ê sî
Numbers16:43 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chiū lâi hōe-bō͘ thâu-chêng
Numbers16:44 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers16:45 “Lín tio̍h lī-khui chit-ê hōe-chiòng
Numbers16:46 Mô͘-se tùi A-lûn kóng
Numbers16:47 A-lûn chiàu Mô͘-se ê hoan-hù
Numbers16:48 I khiā tī oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê tiong-kan
Numbers16:49 Tû-liáu in-ūi Khó-la ê sū-kiāⁿ sí--ê í-gōa
Numbers16:50 Un-e̍k thêng-chí liáu-āu
Numbers17:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers17:2 “Lí tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers17:3 Lī-bī chi-cho̍k hit-ki koáiⁿ-á tio̍h siá A-lûn ê miâ; in-ūi ta̍k chi-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ lóng ū chi̍t ki koáiⁿ-á.
Numbers17:4 Lí tio̍h chiong hiah-ê koáiⁿ-á the̍h-lâi hōe-bō͘
Numbers17:5 Góa só͘ kéng hit-ê lâng
Numbers17:6 Mô͘-se chiong chiah-ê ōe kā Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Numbers17:7 Mô͘-se chiū chiong hiah-ê koáiⁿ-á the̍h ji̍p-khì khǹg iok-kūi ê tiùⁿ-bō͘ lāi-bīn
Numbers17:8 Keh-ji̍t
Numbers17:9 Mô͘-se tùi Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng gia̍h hiah-ê koáiⁿ-á chhut--lâi
Numbers17:10 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers17:11 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chòe.
Numbers17:12 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers17:13 Só͘-ū óa-kūn Siōng Chú ê hōe-bō͘--ê lóng ōe sí. Án-ni
Numbers18:1 Siōng Chú tùi A-lûn kóng
Numbers18:2 Lí tio̍h chhōa Lī-bī chi-cho̍k ê lâng lâi
Numbers18:3 In tio̍h chòe lí ê chō͘-chhiú
Numbers18:4 In tio̍h kap lí chòe-hé tī hōe-bō͘ ho̍k-sāi
Numbers18:5 Lín tio̍h hū-chek chip-hêng sèng-só͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ ê kang-chok
Numbers18:6 Góa ū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan kéng lín ê chhin-cho̍k Lī-bī -lâng siúⁿ-sù lín
Numbers18:7 Lí kap lí ê kiáⁿ-jî tio̍h tī chè-tôaⁿ kap hōe-bō͘ lāi-bīn
Numbers18:8 Siōng Chú koh kā A-lûn kóng
Numbers18:9 Jîn-bîn hiàn hō͘ góa chì-sèng ê sò͘-chè
Numbers18:10 Chiah-ê sī chì-sèng ê mi̍h
Numbers18:11 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘ hiàn gia̍h-koân á-sī iô--kè ê chè-mi̍h
Numbers18:12 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hiàn hō͘ góa Siōng Chú chho͘-se̍k ê mi̍h
Numbers18:13 Chiah-ê lóng kui hō͘ lí; lí chhù-lāi só͘-ū lé-gî-siōng chheng-khì ê lâng lóng thang chia̍h.
Numbers18:14 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng éng-oán hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê mi̍h
Numbers18:15 “Só͘-ū hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú thâu-chiūⁿ-siⁿ--ê
Numbers18:16 Beh sio̍k-hôe móa-ge̍h í-siōng--ê
Numbers18:17 M̄-kú thâu-chiūⁿ-siⁿ ê gû
Numbers18:18 Hiah-ê bah
Numbers18:19 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng gia̍h-koân hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú sèng ê chè-mi̍h
Numbers18:20 Siōng Chú tùi A-lûn kóng
Numbers18:21 Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers18:22 Kî-tha ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng m̄-thang koh óa-kūn hōe-bō͘
Numbers18:23 Lī-bī -lâng chòe hōe-bō͘ ê kang-chok
Numbers18:24 In-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiong chhut-sán ê cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t chòe te̍k-pia̍t ê lé-mi̍h hōng-hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers18:25 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers18:26 hoan-hù Lī-bī -lâng: Siōng Chú ū chiong Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hiàn hō͘ I cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t ê hōng-hiàn
Numbers18:27 Chit-ê te̍k-pia̍t ê lé-mi̍h tú chhin-chhiūⁿ choh-sit-lâng só͘ hiàn chho͘-se̍k ê be̍h-á
Numbers18:28 Án-ni
Numbers18:29 Lín tio̍h tùi só͘ tit--tio̍h it-chhè ê lé-mi̍h
Numbers18:30 Lí tio̍h tùi Lī-bī -lâng kóng: Lín í-keng tùi hit tiong-kan hōng-hiàn siōng-hó ê lé-mi̍h
Numbers18:31 Lín kap lín ê ka-koàn thang tī ta̍k só͘-chāi chia̍h lín hōng-hiàn só͘ chhun--ê; che sī lín eng-kai tit--tio̍h-ê
Numbers18:32 Lín nā hōng-hiàn siōng-hó ê lé-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers19:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kap A-lûn kóng
Numbers19:2 “Siōng Chú só͘ bēng-lēng ê lu̍t-hoat ū chi̍t tiâu án-ni kóng: Lí tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khan chi̍t chiah kiān-khong
Numbers19:3 Tio̍h chiong i kau hō͘ chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers19:4 Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat tio̍h ēng chńg-thâu-á ùn huih
Numbers19:5 Tio̍h ū chi̍t ê lâng tī chè-si ê ba̍k-chiu chêng sio chit-chiah gû-bú
Numbers19:6 Chè-si tio̍h chiong pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ
Numbers19:7 Āu-lâi chè-si tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ
Numbers19:8 Sio gû-bú ê lâng mā tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ
Numbers19:9 Tio̍h ū chi̍t ê chheng-khì ê lâng siu-si̍p gû-bú ê hu
Numbers19:10 Siu-si̍p gû-bú ê hu ê lâng tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ; kàu ji̍t lo̍h í-āu chiah chheng-khì. Che beh chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap kià-ku tī in tiong-kan ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng éng-oán ê kui-lē.”
Numbers19:11 Nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h lâng ê si-thé
Numbers19:12 Hit-ê lâng kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t
Numbers19:13 Nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h lâng ê si-thé
Numbers19:14 Ē-bīn sī iú-koan lâng sí tī pò͘-pîⁿ lāi kiat-chēng ê tiâu-lē: Ji̍p-khì hit-ê pò͘-pîⁿ
Numbers19:15 Pò͘-pîⁿ lāi bô khàm-kòa ê khì-khū mā-sī bô chheng-khì.
Numbers19:16 Nā ū lâng tī iá-gōa bong-tio̍h hō͘ lâng thâi-sí á-sī chū-jiân sí ê si-thé
Numbers19:17 Tio̍h ūi bô chheng-khì ê lâng the̍h chi̍t-kóa chhiah-sek gû-bú ê hu
Numbers19:18 Tio̍h ū chi̍t ê lé-gî-siōng chheng-khì ê lâng the̍h gû-chhek-chháu ùn chit-ê chúi
Numbers19:19 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t kap tē-chhit ji̍t
Numbers19:20 Hit-ê bô chheng-khì koh bô khì kiat-chēng ka-kī ê lâng
Numbers19:21 Che beh chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng éng-oán ê kui-lē. Hit-ê kā lâng hiù kiat-chēng ê chúi ê lâng tio̍h sóe i ê saⁿ; nā ū lâng bong-tio̍h kiat-chēng ê chúi
Numbers19:22 Hō͘ bô chheng-khì ê lâng bong--tio̍h ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ sī bô chheng-khì; bong-tio̍h hiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ ê lâng
Numbers20:1 Chiaⁿ--ge̍h
Numbers20:2 Hōe-chiòng bô chúi thang lim
Numbers20:3 In khì kā Mô͘-se chhá
Numbers20:4 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ kā Siōng Chú ê hōe-chiòng chhōa-lâi chit-ê khòng-iá
Numbers20:5 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ chhōa goán chhut Ai-ki̍p
Numbers20:6 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn lī-khui hōe-chiòng
Numbers20:7 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers20:8 “Lí khì kā iok-kūi thâu-chêng hit-ki koáiⁿ-á gia̍h--lâi
Numbers20:9 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers20:10 Mô͘-se kap A-lûn chio hōe-chiòng khì chio̍h-pôaⁿ hia; Mô͘-se tùi in kóng
Numbers20:11 Mô͘-se gia̍h chhiú--ni̍h ê koáiⁿ-á
Numbers20:12 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kap A-lûn kóng
Numbers20:13 Chiah-ê chúi chiū kiò-chòe Bí-lī-pa chúi-chôaⁿ; in-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā Siōng Chú chhá; Siōng Chú chiū tùi in hián-bêng ka-kī sī sèng.
Numbers20:14 Mô͘-se tùi Ka-te-su chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Í-tong -ông
Numbers20:15 Goán ê chó͘-sian lo̍h-khì Ai-ki̍p
Numbers20:16 Goán ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Numbers20:17 Taⁿ
Numbers20:18 Í-tong -ông kóng
Numbers20:19 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā i kóng
Numbers20:20 Í-tong -ông kóng
Numbers20:21 Án-ni
Numbers20:22 Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé hōe-chiòng tùi Ka-te-su chhut-hoat khì kàu Hô-ní-soaⁿ.
Numbers20:23 Tī Í-tong pian-kài ê Hô-ní-soaⁿ
Numbers20:24 “ A-lûn liâm-piⁿ ōe sí; i bōe-tàng ji̍p-khì góa beh sù hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tōe
Numbers20:25 Lí tio̍h chhōa A-lûn kap i ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat chiūⁿ Hô-ní-soaⁿ
Numbers20:26 kā A-lûn ê saⁿ thǹg khí-lâi hō͘ i ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat chhēng; A-lûn ōe sí tī hia.”
Numbers20:27 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chòe. In saⁿ ê lâng tī hōe-chiòng ê ba̍k-chiu chêng chiūⁿ Hô-ní-soaⁿ.
Numbers20:28 Mô͘-se chiong A-lûn ê saⁿ thǹg--khí-lâi
Numbers20:29 Í-sek-lia̍t choân-ke chai A-lûn í-keng sí
Numbers21:1 Tòa tī Nî-kek-hu ê Ka-lâm -lâng A-la-tek -ông
Numbers21:2 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Siōng Chú hē-goān kóng
Numbers21:3 Siōng Chú thiaⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê khún-kiû
Numbers21:4 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Hô-ní-soaⁿ chhut-hoat
Numbers21:5 chiū bâi-oàn Siōng-tè kap Mô͘-se
Numbers21:6 Siōng Chú chiū phài hé-chôa ji̍p-khì jîn-bîn ê tiong-kan
Numbers21:7 Jîn-bîn chiū khì kā Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers21:8 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers21:9 Mô͘-se chiū chù chi̍t bé tâng-chôa
Numbers21:10 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut-hoat
Numbers21:11 Koh tùi O-pek chhut-hoat
Numbers21:12 Tùi hia chhut-hoat
Numbers21:13 Tùi hia chhut-hoat
Numbers21:14 Só͘-í
Numbers21:15 í-ki̍p hiah-ê khoe-kok ê kiā
Numbers21:16 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi hia khì Pí-ní; Siōng Chú bat tùi Mô͘-se kóng “Lí chū-chi̍p jîn-bîn
Numbers21:17 Hit-sî Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhiùⁿ-koa kóng: Chíⁿ ah
Numbers21:18 Che sī kùi-cho̍k ēng chàu-pán khui--ê
Numbers21:19 koh tùi Má-tha-ná khì Ná-hap-lia̍t
Numbers21:20 tùi Pa-boa̍t kàu Mô͘-ap tōe-khu ê soaⁿ-kok; tùi chia khòaⁿ--lo̍h-khì
Numbers21:21 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng phài sù-chiá khì kìⁿ A-mô͘-lī -lâng ê ông Se-hông
Numbers21:22 “Chhiáⁿ ún-chún goán keng-kè lí ê tōe. Goán bōe oat ji̍p-khì chhân-hn̂g kap phû-tô-hn̂g
Numbers21:23 Se-hông m̄-chún Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng keng-kè i ê tōe
Numbers21:24 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ēng to thâi in
Numbers21:25 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàm-léng A-mô͘-lī -lâng só͘-ū ê siâⁿ
Numbers21:26 Hi-si̍t-pún sī A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông ê siâⁿ; Se-hông bat kong-táⁿ í-chêng ê Mô͘-ap -ông
Numbers21:27 Só͘-í si-jîn liām-si
Numbers21:28 Ū hé tùi Hi-si̍t-pún hoat
Numbers21:29 Mô͘-ap ah
Numbers21:30 Goán tùi Hi-si̍t-pún kàu Tí-pún kā in oân-choân siau-bia̍t; goán hō͘ tōe hong-hòe
Numbers21:31 Án-ni
Numbers21:32 Mô͘-se phài lâng khì thàm-cha Ngá-siā; in chiàm hiah-ê chng-siā
Numbers21:33 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū oat tùi ǹg Pa-san ê hong-hiòng khì; Pa-san -ông Go̍k kap i ê kun-peng chhut-lâi tī Í-tek-lâi kap in kau-chiàn.
Numbers21:34 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers21:35 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū thâi-sí Go̍k kap i ê kiáⁿ-jî
Numbers22:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chhut-hoat
Numbers22:2 Se-phoat ê kiáⁿ Pa-le̍k thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi A-mô͘-lī -lâng só͘ chòe it-chhè ê sū.
Numbers22:3 Mô͘-ap -lâng chai Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chin chōe
Numbers22:4 Mô͘-ap -lâng kā Bí-tiân ê tiúⁿ-ló kóng
Numbers22:5 I phài sù-chiá khì Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô ê Pí-toa̍t
Numbers22:6 In pí goán khah kiông
Numbers22:7 Mô͘-ap ê tiúⁿ-ló kap Bí-tiân ê tiúⁿ-ló chiū tòa pok-kòa ê lé-kim chhut-hoat
Numbers22:8 Pa-lân tùi in kóng
Numbers22:9 Siōng-tè lâi Pa-lân hia
Numbers22:10 Pa-lân ìn Siōng-tè kóng
Numbers22:11 ‘Ū jîn-bîn tùi Ai-ki̍p chhut--lâi
Numbers22:12 Siōng-tè tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers22:13 Keh-chá-khí Pa-lân khí--lâi
Numbers22:14 Mô͘-ap ê koaⁿ-oân chiū chhut-hoat
