Numbers22:15 Pa-le̍k koh phài khah-chōe
Numbers22:16 In kàu Pa-lân hia
Numbers22:17 Góa beh hō͘ lí kàu-gia̍h ê pò-siúⁿ; bô-lūn lí iau-kiû sím-mi̍h
Numbers22:18 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k ê koaⁿ-oân kóng
Numbers22:19 Chhiáⁿ lín ē-hng-àm koh hioh tiàm chia
Numbers22:20 Hit-mî Siōng-tè lâi Pa-lân hia
Numbers22:21 Pa-lân thàu-chá khí--lâi
Numbers22:22 Siōng-tè in-ūi Pa-lân kap Pa-le̍k ê koaⁿ-oân chòe-hé khì chiū siū-khì. Pa-lân khiâ-lû
Numbers22:23 Lû khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá khiā tī lō͘--ni̍h
Numbers22:24 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá lâi khiā tī phû-tô-hn̂g ê oe̍h-lō͘
Numbers22:25 Lû khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá
Numbers22:26 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kiâⁿ chìn-chêng
Numbers22:27 Lû khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá
Numbers22:28 Siōng Chú khui lû ê chhùi
Numbers22:29 Pa-lân tùi lû kóng
Numbers22:30 Lû tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers22:31 Hit-sî Siōng Chú khui Pa-lân ê ba̍k-chiu
Numbers22:32 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi i kóng
Numbers22:33 Lû khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa
Numbers22:34 Pa-lân tùi Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kóng
Numbers22:35 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers22:36 Pa-le̍k thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pa-lân lâi
Numbers22:37 Pa-le̍k tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers22:38 Pa-lân ìn Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers22:39 Pa-le̍k chhōa Pa-lân khì Ô͘-só -siâⁿ.
Numbers22:40 Pa-le̍k thâi gû iûⁿ hiàn-chè
Numbers22:41 Keh-chá-khí
Numbers23:1 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers23:2 Pa-le̍k chiū chiàu Pa-lân ê ōe chòe; Pa-le̍k kap Pa-lân tī ta̍k-chō tôaⁿ hiàn chi̍t chiah gû-káng kap chi̍t chiah iûⁿ-káng.
Numbers23:3 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers23:4 Siōng-tè tùi Pa-lân hián-hiān
Numbers23:5 Siōng Chú chiong Pa-lân eng-kai kóng ê ōe kau-tài i
Numbers23:6 I chiū tò-khì Pa-le̍k hia; khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pa-le̍k kap Mô͘-ap ê koaⁿ-oân iáu khiā tī sio-hòa-chè ê piⁿ--á.
Numbers23:7 Pa-lân chiū liām-si
Numbers23:8 Siōng-tè bô chiù-chó͘--ê
Numbers23:9 Góa tùi soaⁿ-giâm khòaⁿ
Numbers23:10 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kè-sǹg Ngá-kok ê thô͘-soa? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng tiám-sǹg Í-sek-lia̍t ê thô͘-hún? Goān góa ê sí chhin-chhiūⁿ gī-lâng ê sí
Numbers23:11 Pa-le̍k tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers23:12 I ìn kóng
Numbers23:13 Pa-le̍k tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers23:14 I chiū chhōa Pa-lân khì Só-hui ê iá-tōe
Numbers23:15 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers23:16 Siōng Chú tùi Pa-lân hián-hiān
Numbers23:17 Pa-lân chiū tò-khì Pa-le̍k hia; khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pa-le̍k kap Mô͘-ap ê koaⁿ-oân iáu khiā tī sio-hòa-chè ê piⁿ--á. Pa-le̍k mn̄g i kóng
Numbers23:18 Pa-lân chiū liām-si
Numbers23:19 Siōng-tè bōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng kóng pe̍h-chha̍t
Numbers23:20 Góa hōng-bēng chiok-hok; Siōng Chú ê chiok-hok
Numbers23:21 Tī Ngá-kok khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h chai-lān
Numbers23:22 Siōng-tè chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p; ūi-tio̍h in
Numbers23:23 Ngá-kok bô su-iàu khòaⁿ tiāu-thâu
Numbers23:24 Chit-ê bîn-cho̍k heng-khí chhin-chhiūⁿ sai-bú
Numbers23:25 Pa-le̍k tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers23:26 Pa-lân ìn Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers23:27 Pa-le̍k tùi Pa-lân kóng
Numbers23:28 Pa-le̍k chiū chhōa Pa-lân khì Pí-ní-soaⁿ ê soaⁿ-chiam
Numbers23:29 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers23:30 Pa-le̍k chiū chiàu Pa-lân ê ōe chòe
Numbers24:1 Pa-lân chai Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí sù-hok hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t
Numbers24:2 khòaⁿ-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu chi-cho̍k chat-iâⁿ
Numbers24:3 I chiū liām-si
Numbers24:4 ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe
Numbers24:5 Ngá-kok ah
Numbers24:6 In chhin-chhiūⁿ sio-liân-sòa ê chang-chhiū
Numbers24:7 Chúi beh tùi in ê chúi-tháng móa-chhut; in ê chéng-chí beh iā tī chúi-goân chhiong-chiok ê thó͘-tōe. In ê ông beh pí Ko-kek khah úi-tāi; i ê kok beh heng-khí.
Numbers24:8 Siōng-tè chhōa i chhut Ai-ki̍p; ūi-tio̍h i
Numbers24:9 I chhin-chhiūⁿ phak--teh ê sai-kang
Numbers24:10 Pa-le̍k khì-phut-phut
Numbers24:11 Lí sûi-sî kā góa tńg--khì! Góa pún-lâi siūⁿ-beh hō͘ lí kàu-gia̍h ê pò-siúⁿ
Numbers24:12 Pa-lân tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers24:13 ‘ Pa-le̍k chiū-sī kui chhù-keng ê kim-gûn hō͘ góa
Numbers24:14 Pa-lân koh tùi Pa-le̍k kóng
Numbers24:15 I chiū liām-si
Numbers24:16 ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe
Numbers24:17 Góa khòaⁿ--kìⁿ-ê
Numbers24:18 I beh cheng-ho̍k tùi-te̍k Í-tong
Numbers24:19 Ū chi̍t ê thóng-tī-chiá ōe tùi Ngá-kok chhut--lâi; i beh châu-bia̍t siâⁿ-lāi só͘ chhun--ê.
Numbers24:20 Pa-lân koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ A-má-le̍k -lâng
Numbers24:21 Pa-lân koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Ki-nî -lâng
Numbers24:22 M̄-kú Ki-nî ōe soe-bî
Numbers24:23 Pa-lân koh liām-si
Numbers24:24 Ū chiàn-chûn tùi Ki-thê lâi
Numbers24:25 Pa-lân chiū khí-sin
Numbers25:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Si̍p-têng chat-iâⁿ ê sî
Numbers25:2 Mô͘-ap ê lú-chú hiàn-chè hō͘ in ê sîn-bêng ê sî
Numbers25:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pài Pí-ní ê sîn-bêng Pa-le̍k; Siōng Chú chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat siū-khì.
Numbers25:4 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers25:5 Mô͘-se chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ kóng
Numbers25:6 Mô͘-se kap Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng tú-á tī hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu teh khàu ê sî
Numbers25:7 Chè-si A-lûn ê sun
Numbers25:8 tè hit-ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ji̍p pò͘-pîⁿ
Numbers25:9 Hit-sî
Numbers25:10 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers25:11 “Chè-si A-lûn ê sun
Numbers25:12 Só͘-í lí tio̍h soan-pò͘: Góa beh kap i li̍p pêng-an ê iok
Numbers25:13 hō͘ i kap i ê hō͘-tāi éng-oán chòe chè-si
Numbers25:14 Hit-ê kap Bí-tiân ê lú-chú chòe-hé siū thâi-sí ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiò-chòe Sim-lī
Numbers25:15 Hit-ê hō͘ lâng thâi-sí ê Bí-tiân lú-chú kiò-chòe Ko-su-pí
Numbers25:16 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers25:17 “Lí tio̍h khì kong-kek Bí-tiân -lâng
Numbers25:18 in-ūi in tī Pí-ní ê sū-kiāⁿ kap in ê tông-pau Ko-su-pí ê tāi-chì
Numbers26:1 Un-e̍k kè-liáu
Numbers26:2 “Tio̍h chiong Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé hōe-chiòng tiong-kan
Numbers26:3 Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers26:4 
Numbers26:5 Í-sek-lia̍t ê tōa-kiáⁿ sī Lū-piān; Lū-piān ê hō͘-tāi ū Í-lo̍k
Numbers26:6 Hi-su-lûn
Numbers26:7 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ ū sì-bān saⁿ-chheng chhit-pah saⁿ-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers26:8 Hoat-lō͘ ê hō͘-tāi ū Í-lī-ap;
Numbers26:9 Í-lī-ap siⁿ Nî-bō͘-lī
Numbers26:10 Hit-sî tōe li̍h--khui
Numbers26:11 M̄-kú Khó-la hiah-ê kiáⁿ bô sí.
Numbers26:12 Se-biān ê hō͘-tāi ū Nî-bō͘-lī
Numbers26:13 Siā-la
Numbers26:14 kiōng nn̄g-bān nn̄g-chheng nn̄g-pah miâ.
Numbers26:15 Ka-tek ê hō͘-tāi ū Sé-hun
Numbers26:16 A-su-nî
Numbers26:17 A-lu̍t
Numbers26:18 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān khòng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers26:19 Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ tiong-kan
Numbers26:20 Iû-tāi kî-tha ê hō͘-tāi ū Sī-la
Numbers26:21 Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi ū Hi-su-lûn kap Hap-bō͘-le̍k chiah-ê ka-cho̍k.
Numbers26:22 Chiah-ê sī Iû-tāi ê chong-cho̍k; in keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng chhit-bān la̍k-chheng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers26:23 Í-sat-ka ê hō͘-tāi ū Tô-la
Numbers26:24 Ngá-su̍t
Numbers26:25 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng la̍k-bān sì-chheng saⁿ-pah miâ.
Numbers26:26 Se-pò͘-lûn ê hō͘-tāi ū Se-lia̍t
Numbers26:27 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng la̍k-bān khòng gō͘-pah miâ.
Numbers26:28 Iok-sek ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ Má-ná-se kap Í-hoat-liân
Numbers26:29 Má-ná-se ê kiáⁿ sī Má-kiat; Má-kiat ê kiáⁿ sī Ki-lia̍t;
Numbers26:30 Ki-lia̍t ê hō͘-tāi ū I-í-siā
Numbers26:31 A-su-lia̍t
Numbers26:32 Sī-bí-tāi
Numbers26:33 Hi-hut ê kiáⁿ Se-lô-hui-hap bô kiáⁿ
Numbers26:34 Chiah-ê sī Má-ná-se ê ka-cho̍k. In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng gō͘-bān nn̄g-chheng chhit-pah miâ.
Numbers26:35 Í-hoat-liân ê hō͘-tāi ū Su-thê-la
Numbers26:36 Su-thê-la ê hō͘-tāi ū Í-lân ka-cho̍k.
Numbers26:37 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng saⁿ-bān nn̄g-chheng gō͘-pah miâ. Chit nn̄g ê chi-cho̍k sī Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi.
Numbers26:38 Piān-ngá-bín ê hō͘-tāi ū Pí-la
Numbers26:39 Su-hoán
Numbers26:40 Pí-la ê hō͘-tāi ū A-le̍k kap Nái-bān nn̄g ê chong-cho̍k.
Numbers26:41 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān gō͘-chheng la̍k-pah miâ.
Numbers26:42 Tān ê hō͘-tāi ū Su-hâm chong-cho̍k.
Numbers26:43 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng la̍k-bān sì-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers26:44 A-siat ê hō͘-tāi ū Im-ná
Numbers26:45 Pí-lī-a ê hō͘-tāi ū Hi-pek kap Má-kiat chiah-ê chong-cho̍k.
Numbers26:46 A-siat ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kiò-chòe Se-la.
Numbers26:47 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng gō͘-bān saⁿ-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers26:48 Ná-hut-tha-lī ê hō͘-tāi ū Ngá-sih
Numbers26:49 Iâ-sek
Numbers26:50 In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng sì-bān gō͘-chheng sì-pah miâ.
Numbers26:51 Í-siōng chiah-ê lóng sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê hō͘-tāi. In keng-kè tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ kiōng la̍k-cha̍p-bān chi̍t-chheng chhit-pah saⁿ-cha̍p miâ.
Numbers26:52 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers26:53 “Lí tio̍h chiàu kok chi-cho̍k ê jîn-sò͘ pun thó͘-tōe hō͘ in chòe sán-gia̍p.
Numbers26:54 Lâng chōe ê chi-cho̍k
Numbers26:55 
Numbers26:56 
Numbers26:57 Lī-bī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Kek-sūn
Numbers26:58 Lī-bī ê hō͘-tāi ū Li̍p-nî
Numbers26:59 Àm-lân ê bó͘ kiò-chòe Iok-ki-pia̍t
Numbers26:60 A-lûn siⁿ Ná-tap
Numbers26:61 Ná-tap kap A-pí-hō͘ tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng hiàn bô sîn-sèng ê hé ê sî
Numbers26:62 Lī-bī -lâng móa-ge̍h í-siōng
Numbers26:63 Í-siōng sī Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat tī Iâ-lī-ko tùi-bīn
Numbers26:64 Mô͘-se kap chè-si A-lûn tī Se-nāi khòng-iá tē-it piàn tiám-sǹg ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers26:65 Koan-hē hiah-ê lâng
Numbers27:1 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k tiong-kan
Numbers27:2 in lâi hōe-bō͘ mn̂g-kháu
Numbers27:3 “Goán lāu-pē sí tī khòng-iá
Numbers27:4 Sī-án-chóaⁿ in-ūi goán lāu-pē bô hāu-siⁿ
Numbers27:5 Mô͘-se chiū chiong in ê àn-kiāⁿ the̍h kàu Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng.
Numbers27:6 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se
Numbers27:7 “ Se-lô-hui-hap ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kóng-liáu ū-lí; lí it-tēng tio̍h tùi in lāu-pē ê hiaⁿ-tī pun thó͘-tōe hō͘ in chòe sán-gia̍p
Numbers27:8 Lí mā tio̍h hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers27:9 I nā koh bô cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Numbers27:10 I nā koh bô hiaⁿ-tī
Numbers27:11 I ê lāu-pē nā koh bô hiaⁿ-tī
Numbers27:12 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers27:13 Lí khòaⁿ-liáu
Numbers27:14 In-ūi tī Sîm ê khòng-iá
Numbers27:15 Mô͘-se tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Numbers27:16 “Siōng Chú
Numbers27:17 tī in tiong-kan chhut-ji̍p
Numbers27:18 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers27:19 hō͘ i khiā tī chè-si Í-lī-a-sat kap choân-thé hōe-chiòng ê bīn-chêng
Numbers27:20 Koh chiong lí ê chun-êng koân-pèng pun hō͘ i
Numbers27:21 I tio̍h khiā tī chè-si Í-lī-a-sat ê bīn-chêng
Numbers27:22 Mô͘-se chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng chhōa Iok-su-a lâi
Numbers27:23 koh chiàu Siōng Chú tùi i ê bēng-lēng
Numbers28:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se
Numbers28:2 bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers28:3 Lí koh tio̍h kā in kóng
Numbers28:4 chá-khí-sî kap hông-hun ê sî kok hiàn chi̍t chiah.
Numbers28:5 Koh tio̍h chiong chi̍t kong-kun ê iù mī-hún kap chiⁿ--chhut-lâi chi̍t kong-seng ê kaⁿ-ná-iû chhiau chòe-hé
Numbers28:6 Che sī tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ chè-tēng
Numbers28:7 Hiàn tē-it chiah iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers28:8 Hông-hun hiàn lēng-gōa hit-chiah iûⁿ-á ê sî
Numbers28:9 “An-hioh-ji̍t tio̍h hiàn nn̄g chiah chi̍t hè bô hâ-chhû ê iûⁿ-káng-á
Numbers28:10 Che sī ta̍k-ji̍t tio̍h hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè kap tiān-chiú-chè í-gōa
Numbers28:11 “Ta̍k kò-ge̍h chhoe-it
Numbers28:12 Hiàn gû-káng ê sî
Numbers28:13 Hiàn ta̍k-chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers28:14 Hiàn sio-hòa-chè ê sî
Numbers28:15 Tû-liáu ta̍k-ji̍t tio̍h hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè kap tiān-chiú-chè í-gōa
Numbers28:16 “Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-sì sī Siōng Chú ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh.
Numbers28:17 Chit kò-ge̍h ê cha̍p-gō͘ khí sī choeh-kî
Numbers28:18 Thâu chi̍t ji̍t tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Numbers28:19 Lí tio̍h hiàn bô hâ-chhû ê nn̄g chiah gû-káng-á
Numbers28:20 Hiàn ta̍k-chiah gû-káng ê sî
Numbers28:21 Hiàn chhit chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers28:22 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Numbers28:23 Lín ta̍k chá-khí hiàn sio-hòa-chè í-gōa
Numbers28:24 Kâng-khoán
Numbers28:25 Tē-chhit ji̍t tio̍h kú-hêng sèng-hōe
Numbers28:26 “Chhit-chhit Siu-koah-choeh
Numbers28:27 Lín tio̍h hiàn phang-phang ê sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers28:28 Lín hiàn ta̍k-chiah gû-káng ê sî
Numbers28:29 hiàn hit chhit chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers28:30 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
Numbers28:31 Ta̍k-ji̍t tio̍h hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè kap sò͘-chè í-gōa
Numbers29:1 “Chhit-ge̍h chhoe-it
Numbers29:2 Lín tio̍h hiàn phang-phang ê sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers29:3 Hiàn sò͘-chè ê sî
Numbers29:4 hit chhit chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á
Numbers29:5 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè
Numbers29:6 Tû-liáu ta̍k kò-ge̍h chhoe-it ê sio-hòa-chè kap chòe-hé hiàn ê sò͘-chè
Numbers29:7 “Chhit-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p
Numbers29:8 Lín tio̍h hiàn phang-phang ê sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
Numbers29:9 Hiàn sò͘-chè ê sî
Numbers29:10 hiàn hit chhit chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers29:11 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī sio̍k-chōe-chè
Numbers29:12 “Chhit-ge̍h cha̍p-gō͘
Numbers29:13 Lín tio̍h hiàn sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:14 Hiàn cha̍p-saⁿ chiah gû-káng-á ê sî
Numbers29:15 hiàn cha̍p-sì chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng-á ê sî
Numbers29:16 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:17 “Tē-jī ji̍t
Numbers29:18 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:19 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:20 “Tē-saⁿ ji̍t
Numbers29:21 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:22 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:23 “Tē-sì ji̍t
Numbers29:24 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:25 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:26 “Tē-gō͘ ji̍t
Numbers29:27 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:28 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:29 “Tē-la̍k ji̍t
Numbers29:30 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:31 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:32 “Tē-chhit ji̍t
Numbers29:33 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:34 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:35 “Tē-poeh ji̍t
Numbers29:36 Lín tio̍h hiàn bô hâ-chhû ê chi̍t chiah gû-káng-á
Numbers29:37 Hiàn gû-káng-á
Numbers29:38 Koh tio̍h hiàn chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè. Chiah-ê sī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:39 “Í-siōng chiah-ê sio-hòa-chè
Numbers29:40 Mô͘-se chiū lóng chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng.
Numbers30:1 Mô͘-se hoan-hù Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
Numbers30:2 Lâng nā tùi Siōng Chú hē-goān
Numbers30:3 “Iáu tòa tī lāu-pē ê chhù ê siàu-lú
Numbers30:4 i ê lāu-pē thiaⁿ-tio̍h i hē ê goān kap iok-sok ka-kī ê ōe
Numbers30:5 I ê lāu-pē thiaⁿ--tio̍h hit-ji̍t
Numbers30:6 “Siàu-lú chhut-kè
Numbers30:7 i ê tiōng-hu thiaⁿ--tio̍h ê sî
Numbers30:8 I ê tiōng-hu thiaⁿ--tio̍h ê sî
Numbers30:9 “Kóaⁿ-hū á-sī lî-hun ê hū-jîn-lâng só͘ hē ê goān kap iok-sok ka-kī ê ōe
Numbers30:10 “Hū-jîn-lâng tī tiōng-hu ê chhù hē-goān
Numbers30:11 tiōng-hu thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Numbers30:12 M̄-kú
Numbers30:13 I nā hē-goān á-sī chiù-chōa beh khek-khó͘ ka-kī
Numbers30:14 I ê tiōng-hu thiaⁿ--tio̍h liáu-āu
Numbers30:15 Āu-lâi
Numbers30:16 Í-siōng chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se koan-hē tiōng-hu kap i ê bó͘
Numbers31:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers31:2 “Lí tio̍h khì kong-táⁿ Bí-tiân -lâng
Numbers31:3 Mô͘-se chiū bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers31:4 Lín ta̍k chi-cho̍k tio̍h phài chi̍t-chheng lâng chhut-khì kau-chiàn.”
Numbers31:5 Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k chiū soán chi̍t-chheng lâng
Numbers31:6 Mô͘-se phài chè-si Í-lī-a-sat ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap tòa sèng-só͘ ê khì-khū kap lat-pah
Numbers31:7 In chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Numbers31:8 pau-koat Í-bī
Numbers31:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lia̍h Bí-tiân ê hū-lú kap gín-á
Numbers31:10 pàng-hé sio in khiā-khí ê siâⁿ-tìn kap iâⁿ-tōe.
Numbers31:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiong in lia̍h--tio̍h ê lâng
Numbers31:12 tòa-lâi Iok-tàn hô-piⁿ
Numbers31:13 Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers31:14 Mô͘-se tùi kau-chiàn tńg--lâi ê kun-koaⁿ
Numbers31:15 kā in kóng
Numbers31:16 Lín kiám bōe-kì--tit
Numbers31:17 Hiān-chāi
Numbers31:18 Hiah-ê m̄-bat kap ta-po͘-lâng ū sèng-koan-hē ê cha-bó͘ gín-á
Numbers31:19 Lín kap hiah-ê hu-ló͘ tio̍h lâu tī iâⁿ-gōa chhit ji̍t. Nā ū lâng thâi-sí lâng
Numbers31:20 Lín koh tio̍h kiat-chēng ta̍k-niá saⁿ
Numbers31:21 Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat tùi kau-chiàn tò--lâi ê kun-peng kóng
Numbers31:22 Ōe-kham-tit hé sio ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Numbers31:23 
Numbers31:24 Tē-chhit ji̍t
Numbers31:25 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers31:26 “Lí kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers31:27 Kā lia̍h--lâi-ê pun-chòe nn̄g hūn
Numbers31:28 Koh tùi beh pun hō͘ kun-peng ê hu-ló͘
Numbers31:29 chiong chiah-ê kau hō͘ chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers31:30 Koh tio̍h tùi beh pun hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hit chi̍t-pòaⁿ ê hu-ló͘
Numbers31:31 Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat chiū chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng chòe.
Numbers31:32 Kun-peng ka-kī lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê chiàn-lī-phín í-gōa
Numbers31:33 gû chhit-bān nn̄g-chheng chiah
Numbers31:34 lû la̍k-bān chi̍t-chheng chiah
Numbers31:35 m̄-bat kap ta-po͘-lâng ū sèng-koan-hē ê lú-chú saⁿ-bān nn̄g-chheng lâng.
Numbers31:36 Chhut-khì kau-chiàn hiah-ê kun-peng tit-tio̍h hit chi̍t-pòaⁿ
Numbers31:37 tùi hit tiong-kan chhú-lâi hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê
Numbers31:38 gû ū saⁿ-bān la̍k-chheng chiah
Numbers31:39 lû ū saⁿ-bān khòng gō͘-pah chiah
Numbers31:40 lâng ū chi̍t-bān la̍k-chheng ê
Numbers31:41 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú tùi i ê bēng-lēng
Numbers31:42 Mô͘-se chiong hiah-ê kun-peng chhiúⁿ--lâi ê chiàn-lī-phín pun hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê hit chi̍t-pòaⁿ
Numbers31:43 ū iûⁿ saⁿ-cha̍p-saⁿ-bān chhit-chheng gō͘-pah chiah
Numbers31:44 gû saⁿ-bān la̍k-chheng chiah
Numbers31:45 lû saⁿ-bān khòng gō͘-pah chiah
Numbers31:46 kap lâng chi̍t-bān la̍k-chheng ê.
Numbers31:47 Bô-lūn lâng á-sī cheng-siⁿ
Numbers31:48 Chhōa chi̍t-chheng ê kap chhōa chi̍t-pah ê kun-peng ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ lâi kìⁿ Mô͘-se
Numbers31:49 tùi i kóng
Numbers31:50 Taⁿ
Numbers31:51 Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat chiū chiap-siū in phah-chòe ta̍k-khoán chong-sek-phín ê kim-á.
Numbers31:52 Chiah-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú chòe te̍k-pia̍t lé-mi̍h ê kim-á
Numbers31:53 Ta̍k-ê kun-peng chhiúⁿ--tio̍h ê chiàn-lī-phín
Numbers31:54 Mô͘-se kap chè-si Í-lī-a-sat chiong chiah-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ hōng-hiàn ê kim-á tòa-ji̍p hōe-bō͘
Numbers32:1 Lū-piān kap Ka-tek nn̄g chi-cho̍k ê cheng-siⁿ hui-siông chōe. In khòaⁿ-tio̍h Ngá-siā kap Ki-lia̍t nn̄g ê tōe-khu sek-ha̍p chhī in ê cheng-siⁿ
Numbers32:2 chiū khì kìⁿ Mô͘-se
Numbers32:3 “Siōng Chú hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kong-chiàm ê A-tha-lio̍k
Numbers32:4 
Numbers32:5 In koh kóng
Numbers32:6 Mô͘-se ìn Ka-tek kap Lū-piān ê kiáⁿ-sun kóng
Numbers32:7 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ beh hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoe-sim sit-chì
Numbers32:8 Tī Ka-te-su Pa-nî-a ê sî
Numbers32:9 In khì kàu Í-si̍t-kok Soaⁿ-kok
Numbers32:10 Hit-sî
Numbers32:11 ‘Só͘-ū tùi Ai-ki̍p chhut--lâi
Numbers32:12 chí-ū Ki-nî-sé chong-cho̍k Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k kap Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a ōe-tàng ji̍p--khì
Numbers32:13 Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat siū-khì
Numbers32:14 Taⁿ
Numbers32:15 Lín nā oa̍t-cháu bô beh sūn-thàn Siōng Chú
Numbers32:16 Chit nn̄g ê chi-cho̍k ê lâng kiâⁿ-óa Mô͘-se
Numbers32:17 goán ōe gia̍h kun-khì
Numbers32:18 Tī só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng tit-tio̍h in ê sán-gia̍p í-chêng
Numbers32:19 Koh goán kap in kè Iok-tàn-hô
Numbers32:20 Mô͘-se chiū tùi in kóng
Numbers32:21 lín só͘-ū tòa kun-khì ê lâng tio̍h tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng kè Iok-tàn-hô
Numbers32:22 kàu I cheng-ho̍k hit-ê tōe
Numbers32:23 Lín nā bô án-ni chòe
Numbers32:24 Taⁿ
Numbers32:25 Ka-tek kap Lū-piān nn̄g chi-cho̍k ê lâng tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers32:26 Goán ê bó͘
Numbers32:27 Lí ê po̍k-jîn
Numbers32:28 Mô͘-se chiū ūi-tio̍h in hoan-hù chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Numbers32:29 kóng
Numbers32:30 M̄-kú
Numbers32:31 Ka-tek kap Lū-piān nn̄g chi-cho̍k ê lâng ìn kóng
Numbers32:32 Goán beh tòa kun-khì tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng kè-hô ji̍p-khì Ka-lâm -tōe
Numbers32:33 Mô͘-se chiong A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông kap Pa-san -ông Go̍k ê kok
Numbers32:34 Ka-tek ê hō͘-tāi tiông-kiàn Tí-pún
Numbers32:35 A-tha-lio̍k Sok-hoán
Numbers32:36 Pek Lêng-la
Numbers32:37 Lū-piān ê hō͘-tāi tiông-kiàn Hi-si̍t-pún
Numbers32:38 Nî-pho
Numbers32:39 Má-ná-se ê kiáⁿ Má-kiat ê hō͘-tāi khì Ki-lia̍t
Numbers32:40 Mô͘-se chiū chiong Ki-lia̍t hō͘ Má-ná-se ê hō͘-tāi Má-kiat chong-cho̍k; in chiū tī hia khiā-khí.
Numbers32:41 Má-ná-se ê hō͘-tāi Gâi-ní khì kong-chhú Ki-lia̍t tōe-khu ê chng-siā
Numbers32:42 Ná-pa kong-chiàm Ki-la̍p kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā; ēng ka-kī ê miâ kā hit-ê só͘-chāi hō-chòe Ná-pa.
Numbers33:1 Ē-bīn sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Mô͘-se kap A-lûn ê léng-tō hā
Numbers33:2 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Numbers33:3 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-gō͘
Numbers33:4 Hit-sî Ai-ki̍p -lâng tú-teh bâi-chòng in hō͘ Siōng Chú phah-sí ê tōa-kiáⁿ; Siōng Chú mā sím-phòaⁿ Ai-ki̍p ê sîn-bêng.
Numbers33:5 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Lân-sài chhut-hoat
Numbers33:6 Tùi So͘-kat chhut-hoat
Numbers33:7 Tùi Í-thóng chhut-hoat
Numbers33:8 In tùi Pí Hap-hi-lio̍k khí-thêng
Numbers33:9 In tùi Má-la chhut-hoat
Numbers33:10 In lī-khui Í-lîm í-āu
Numbers33:11 In tùi Âng-hái hù-kūn chhut-hoat
Numbers33:12 In tùi Sìn ê khòng-iá chhut-hoat
Numbers33:13 In tùi Thoat-ka chhut-hoat
Numbers33:14 In tùi A-lio̍k chhut-hoat
Numbers33:15 In tùi Lī-hui-tèng chhut-hoat
Numbers33:16 In tùi Se-nāi khòng-iá chhut-hoat
Numbers33:17 In tùi Ki-phok-lô Hap-tha-óa chhut-hoat
Numbers33:18 In tùi Hap-sé-lio̍k chhut-hoat
Numbers33:19 In tùi Lī-thê-má chhut-hoat
Numbers33:20 In tùi Lîm-bûn Phà-lia̍t chhut-hoat
Numbers33:21 In tùi Li̍p-ná chhut-hoat
Numbers33:22 In tùi Le̍k-sat chhut-hoat
Numbers33:23 In tùi Ki-hi-la-tha chhut-hoat
Numbers33:24 In tùi Sa-húi-soaⁿ chhut-hoat
Numbers33:25 In tùi Hap-la-tāi chhut-hoat
Numbers33:26 In tùi Má-kiat-hi-lio̍k chhut-hoat
Numbers33:27 In tùi Tha-hap chhut-hoat
Numbers33:28 In tùi Tha-la chhut-hoat
Numbers33:29 In tùi Bi̍t-ka chhut-hoat
Numbers33:30 In tùi Hap-mô͘-ná chhut-hoat
Numbers33:31 In tùi Mô͘-se-lio̍k chhut-hoat
Numbers33:32 In tùi Pí-nî A-kan chhut-hoat
Numbers33:33 In tùi Hat Hap-ki̍p-kah chhut-hoat
Numbers33:34 In tùi Iok-pa-tha chhut-hoat
Numbers33:35 In tùi A-phok-ná chhut-hoat
Numbers33:36 In tùi Í-sûn Ka-pia̍t chhut-hoat
Numbers33:37 In tùi Ka-te-su chhut-hoat
Numbers33:38 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut Ai-ki̍p liáu-āu tē-sì-cha̍p nî gō͘-ge̍h chhoe-it
Numbers33:39 A-lûn sí tī Hô-ní-soaⁿ ê sî
Numbers33:40 Tòa tī Ka-lâm -tōe Nî-kek-hu ê Ka-lâm -lâng A-la-tek -ông thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lâi lah.
Numbers33:41 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Hô-ní-soaⁿ chhut-hoat
Numbers33:42 In tùi Sat-mô͘-ná chhut-hoat
Numbers33:43 In tùi Phó͘-lūn chhut-hoat
Numbers33:44 In tùi O-pek chhut-hoat
Numbers33:45 In tùi Í-iâ A-pa-lîm chhut-hoat
Numbers33:46 In tùi Tí-pún Ka-tek chhut-hoat
Numbers33:47 In tùi A-bûn Te-pí-la-thài-im chhut-hoat
Numbers33:48 In tùi A-pa-lîm-soaⁿ chhut-hoat
Numbers33:49 In tī Mô͘-ap pêng-goân
Numbers33:50 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Iok-tàn hô-piⁿ
Numbers33:51 “Lí tio̍h bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng: Lín kè Iok-tàn-hô chìn-ji̍p Ka-lâm -tōe ê sî
Numbers33:52 tio̍h chiong hit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn lóng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì
Numbers33:53 Lín tio̍h chiàm-léng hit-ê tōe
Numbers33:54 Lín tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k thiu-chhiam hun-phòe thó͘-tōe chòe sán-gia̍p; lâng chōe--ê chiū pun khah chōe
Numbers33:55 Lín nā bô chiong hit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn kóaⁿ--chhut-khì
Numbers33:56 góa án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi in
Numbers34:1 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers34:2 “Lí tio̍h bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers34:3 Lín lâm-pêng ê tōe-kài sī tùi Sîm ê khòng-iá
Numbers34:4 se̍h-kè A-khek-la-pin -kiā ê lâm-pêng
Numbers34:5 tùi Ap-bûn choán-ǹg Ai-ki̍p pian-kài ê khoe-kok kàu Tōe-tiong-hái ûi-chí.
Numbers34:6 “Sai-pêng ê tōe-kài sī Tōe-tiong-hái.
Numbers34:7 “Pak-pêng ê tōe-kài tùi Tōe-tiong-hái khai-sí ōe kài-sòaⁿ
Numbers34:8 koh kàu Hap-má ài-kháu
Numbers34:9 kap Se-húi-lûn
Numbers34:10 “Tang-pêng ê tōe-kài tùi Hap-sat Í-lân khai-sí
Numbers34:11 jiân-āu lo̍h-khì kàu A-in tang-pêng ê Lī-pí-la
Numbers34:12 sūn Iok-tàn-hô
Numbers34:13 Mô͘-se koh bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Numbers34:14 Lū-piān kap Ka-tek nn̄g ê chi-cho̍k
Numbers34:15 
Numbers34:16 Siōng Chú koh tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers34:17 “Chiah-ê sī beh kā lín pun thó͘-tōe chòe sán-gia̍p ê lâng: Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat kap Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a;
Numbers34:18 lēng-gōa
Numbers34:19 Chiah-ê léng-siù sī: Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k
Numbers34:20 Se-biān chi-cho̍k A-bí-hut ê kiáⁿ Sat-bó-ní
Numbers34:21 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k Ki-su-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-ta̍t
Numbers34:22 Tān chi-cho̍k Iok-lī ê kiáⁿ Pò͘-ki
Numbers34:23 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k Í-hut ê kiáⁿ Hàn-nî-gia̍p
Numbers34:24 Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k Si̍p-hut-tān ê kiáⁿ Ki-bō͘-lī
Numbers34:25 Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k Phà-la̍p ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-sat-hoán
Numbers34:26 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k A-sàn ê kiáⁿ Phà-thiat
Numbers34:27 A-siat chi-cho̍k Sī-lô-bí ê kiáⁿ A-hi-hut
Numbers34:28 Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k A-bí-hut ê kiáⁿ Pí-tāi-hek.”
Numbers34:29 Í-siōng chiah-ê sī Siōng Chú jīm-bēng chiong Ka-lâm -tōe pun hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe sán-gia̍p ê léng-siù.
Numbers35:1 Siōng Chú tī Iok-tàn hô-piⁿ
Numbers35:2 “Lí tio̍h bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers35:3 Hiah-ê siâⁿ-tìn beh hō͘ in khiā-khí
Numbers35:4 Lín hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng ê chháu-po͘
Numbers35:5 chiū-sī ēng siâⁿ chòe tiong-sim
Numbers35:6 Lín hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng ê siâⁿ-tìn tiong-kan
Numbers35:7 Lín tio̍h hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng sì-cha̍p-poeh ê siâⁿ-tìn
Numbers35:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi sán-gia̍p ê tiong-kan pun hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng ê siâⁿ-tìn
Numbers35:9 Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se kóng
Numbers35:10 “Lí tio̍h án-ni bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng: Lín kè Iok-tàn-hô
Numbers35:11 tio̍h chí-tēng kúi ê siâⁿ chòe pī-lān-siâⁿ
Numbers35:12 Chiah-ê siâⁿ thang chòe lín tô-pī pò oan-siû ê lâng ê siâⁿ
Numbers35:13 Lín tio̍h chí-tēng la̍k chō siâⁿ chòe pī-lān-siâⁿ;
Numbers35:14 Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng saⁿ chō
Numbers35:15 Chit la̍k chō siâⁿ beh hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Numbers35:16 “Nā ū lâng ēng thih-khì kā lâng phah-sí
Numbers35:17 Nā ū lâng ēng ōe hō͘ lâng sí ê chio̍h-thâu phah-sí lâng
Numbers35:18 Nā the̍h ōe hō͘ lâng sí ê chhâ-khì kā lâng phah-sí
Numbers35:19 Hō͘ lâng phah--sí hit-ê lâng ê chì-chhin tio̍h chhin-sin kā hiong-siú thâi--sí; chi̍t-ē tú-tio̍h i
Numbers35:20 “Nā ū lâng in-ūi oàn-hūn lâng kā lâng chhia-tó
Numbers35:21 á-sī in-ūi khioh-hūn ēng chhiú kā lâng phah-sí
Numbers35:22 “M̄-kú
Numbers35:23 á-sī tī bô khòaⁿ--kìⁿ ê sî
Numbers35:24 hōe-chiòng tio̍h chiàu kui-lē
Numbers35:25 Hōe-chiòng tio̍h kiù hit-ê gō͘-sat-lâng--ê thoat-lī sí-chiá ê chì-chhin
Numbers35:26 M̄-kú gō͘-sat-lâng--ê it-tàn lī-khui pī-lān-siâⁿ
Numbers35:27 hō͘ lâng phah--sí hit-ê lâng ê chì-chhin nā tī siâⁿ-gōa tú-tio̍h i
Numbers35:28 In-ūi hit-ê gō͘-sat-lâng--ê tio̍h tī tōa-chè-si sí í-chêng
Numbers35:29 Bô-lūn lín tòa tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi
Numbers35:30 “Nā ū lâng siū khòng-kò thâi-sí lâng
Numbers35:31 Phòaⁿ sí-chōe ê hiong-siú bōe-ēng-tit ēng sio̍k-kim sio̍k-hôe sìⁿ-miā; it-tēng tio̍h kā i chhú-sí.
Numbers35:32 Nā ū lâng cháu-khì pī-lān-siâⁿ
Numbers35:33 Lín m̄-thang phah lâ-sâm lín khiā-khí ê tōe; in-ūi lâu lâng ê huih chiū-sī phah lâ-sâm thó͘-tōe. Nā ū lâng thâi-sí lâng
Numbers35:34 Lín m̄-thang phah lâ-sâm lín khiā-khí ê thó͘-tōe
Numbers36:1 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers36:2 kóng
Numbers36:3 M̄-kú in nā kè hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t pa̍t chi-cho̍k ê lâng
Numbers36:4 Kàu Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng Un-hūi ê Nî
Numbers36:5 Mô͘-se chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Numbers36:6 Koan-hē Se-lô-hui-hap ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Numbers36:7 Án-ni
Numbers36:8 Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k só͘-ū kè-sêng sán-gia̍p ê lú-chú
Numbers36:9 Án-ni
Numbers36:10 Se-lô-hui-hap gō͘ ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Numbers36:11 
Numbers36:12 In lóng kè hō͘ Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi
Numbers36:13 Í-siōng sī Siōng Chú tī Iok-tàn hô-piⁿ
Deuteronomy1:1 Ē-bīn sī Mô͘-se tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng ê khòng-iá
Deuteronomy1:2 Tùi Hô-lia̍t-soaⁿ keng-kè Se-ní-soaⁿ kàu Ka-te-su Pa-nî-a
Deuteronomy1:3 Tī chhut Ai-ki̍p liáu-āu tē-sì-cha̍p nî
Deuteronomy1:4 Hit-sî
Deuteronomy1:5 Mô͘-se tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng ê Mô͘-ap -tōe
Deuteronomy1:6 Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè tī Hô-lia̍t-soaⁿ kā lán hoan-hù kóng
Deuteronomy1:7 tio̍h khí-sin oat-khì A-mô͘-lī ê soaⁿ-tōe
Deuteronomy1:8 Taⁿ
Deuteronomy1:9 Hit-sî
Deuteronomy1:10 Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè hō͘ lín jîn-kháu ke-thiⁿ
Deuteronomy1:11 Goān Siōng Chú — lín lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè chiàu I tùi lín ê èng-ún sù-hok lín
Deuteronomy1:12 Koán-lí lín ê tāng-tàⁿ kap chek-jīm
Deuteronomy1:13 Lín tio̍h tùi ta̍k chi-cho̍k kéng ū tì-hūi
Deuteronomy1:14 Lín ìn góa kóng
Deuteronomy1:15 Góa chiū chiong lín ta̍k chi-cho̍k soán--chhut-lâi ū tì-hūi
Deuteronomy1:16 Tng-sî góa hoan-hù lín ê sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ
Deuteronomy1:17 Lín chhâi-koat ê sî
Deuteronomy1:18 Hit-sî
Deuteronomy1:19 Lán chiàu Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng
Deuteronomy1:20 góa kā lín kóng
Deuteronomy1:21 Taⁿ
Deuteronomy1:22 Hit-sî lín lóng lâi góa chia
Deuteronomy1:23 Góa khòaⁿ án-ni chòe chin hó
Deuteronomy1:24 In chiū chhut-hoat chiūⁿ soaⁿ-khu
Deuteronomy1:25 In tòa hit só͘-chāi ê ké-chí tńg-lâi lán chia
Deuteronomy1:26 M̄-kú lín ûi-pōe Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng
Deuteronomy1:27 koh tī lín ê pò͘-pîⁿ lāi bâi-oàn kóng
Deuteronomy1:28 Taⁿ lán sī beh khì sím-mi̍h khoán só͘-chāi? Lán ê hiaⁿ-tī hō͘ lán sit-chì; in kā lán kóng
Deuteronomy1:29 Góa chiū kā lín kóng
Deuteronomy1:30 Kiâⁿ tī lín thâu-chêng ê Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè ōe ūi lín kau-chiàn
Deuteronomy1:31 Lín tī khòng-iá teh kiâⁿ ê sî
Deuteronomy1:32 Sui-jiân án-ni
Deuteronomy1:33 I chi̍t-lō͘ kiâⁿ tī lín ê thâu-chêng
Deuteronomy1:34 Siōng Chú thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín bâi-oàn ê siaⁿ chiū siū-khì
Deuteronomy1:35 “Chit-ê pháiⁿ sè-tāi ê lâng choa̍t-tùi bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa só͘ li̍p-sè èng-ún siúⁿ-sù lín lia̍t-chó͘ chit-tè súi ê tōe;
Deuteronomy1:36 chí-ū Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k ōe-tàng khòaⁿ--tio̍h; koh góa beh chiong i ta̍h--kè ê tōe sù hō͘ i kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun
Deuteronomy1:37 Siōng Chú mā in-ūi lín ê iân-kò͘ tùi góa siū-khì
Deuteronomy1:38 kun-sûi lí ê Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a ōe ji̍p--khì; lí tio̍h kā i kó͘-lē
Deuteronomy1:39 Siōng Chú koh kóng
Deuteronomy1:40 Lín leh
Deuteronomy1:41 Lín hôe-tap góa
Deuteronomy1:42 Siōng Chú kā góa kóng
Deuteronomy1:43 Góa chiū kā lín kóng

Deuteronomy1:45 Lín chiū koh tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng thî-khàu

Deuteronomy17:1 Só͘-ū phòa-siùⁿ
Deuteronomy17:2 Tī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè siúⁿ-sù lín ê siâⁿ
Deuteronomy17:3 khì ho̍k-sāi kèng-pài Siōng Chú só͘ kìm-chí hiah-ê sîn-bêng
Deuteronomy17:4 nā ū lâng kā lín kóng ū lâng chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì
Deuteronomy17:5 lín tio̍h chiong hit-ê lâng thoa-khì kóng-tiûⁿ
Deuteronomy17:6 Nā ū nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê lâng chhut-lâi choh-chèng
Deuteronomy17:7 Chèng-jîn tio̍h seng chhut-chhiú tìm i
Deuteronomy17:8 Lín siâⁿ-lāi nā ū oh-tit phòaⁿ-toàn ê àn-kiāⁿ
Deuteronomy17:9 chhéng-būn Lī-bī -lâng chòe chè-si--ê
Deuteronomy17:10 In tī Siōng Chú kéng-soán ê só͘-chāi chí-tō lín--ê
Deuteronomy17:11 In tùi lín ê chí-tō
Deuteronomy17:12 Nā ū lâng kiau-ngō͘ m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú ê chè-si

Deuteronomy33:19 In beh tiàu-chi̍p bān-cho̍k lâi soaⁿ--ni̍h
Deuteronomy33:20 Koan-hē Ka-tek
Deuteronomy33:21 I ūi ka-kī soán-te̍k siōng-hó ê thó͘-tōe
Deuteronomy33:22 Koan-hē Tān
Deuteronomy33:23 Koan-hē Ná-hut-tha-lī
Deuteronomy33:24 Koan-hē A-siat
Deuteronomy33:25 Lí siâⁿ-mn̂g ê chhòaⁿ sī thih--ê
Deuteronomy33:26 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Deuteronomy33:27 Tùi kó͘-chá chiū ū ê Siōng-tè sī pī-lān-só͘
Deuteronomy33:28 Í-sek-lia̍t thang hióng-siū thài-pêng
Deuteronomy33:29 Í-sek-lia̍t
Deuteronomy34:1 Mô͘-se tùi Mô͘-ap pêng-goân chiūⁿ Nî-pho-soaⁿ
Deuteronomy34:2 Ná-hut-tha-lī tōe-khu
Deuteronomy34:3 lâm-pêng ê Nî-kek-hu
Deuteronomy34:4 Siōng Chú kā i kóng
Deuteronomy34:5 Chiàu Siōng Chú só͘ kóng
Deuteronomy34:6 Siōng Chú chiong i bâi-chòng tī Mô͘-ap tōe-khu
Deuteronomy34:7 Mô͘-se sí ê sî chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p hè
Deuteronomy34:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Mô͘-ap pêng-goân ūi-tio̍h Mô͘-se pi-siong ai-khàu móa saⁿ-cha̍p ji̍t.
Deuteronomy34:9 Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a tit-tio̍h tì-hūi ê sîn chhiong-móa
Deuteronomy34:10 Āu-lâi
Deuteronomy34:11 Siōng Chú chhe i tī Ai-ki̍p -tōe
Deuteronomy34:12 koh tī Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng ê ba̍k-chiu chêng
Joshua1:1 Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se sí liáu-āu
Joshua1:2 “Góa ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se í-keng sí; taⁿ lí kap só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn tio̍h chún-pī hó-sè
Joshua1:3 Chiàu góa tùi Mô͘-se ê èng-ún
Joshua1:4 Lín ê léng-thó͘ beh tùi lâm-pêng ê khòng-iá kàu pak-pêng ê Lê-pa-lūn
Joshua1:5 Lí chi̍t-sì-lâng bô lâng ōe-tàng iâⁿ-kè lí; góa án-chóaⁿ kap Mô͘-se tông-chāi
Joshua1:6 Lí tio̍h ióng-kám chòng-táⁿ
Joshua1:7 Lí it-tēng tio̍h ióng-kám chòng-táⁿ
Joshua1:8 Lí tio̍h siông-siông tha̍k chit-ê lu̍t-hoat ê chheh
Joshua1:9 Góa bēng-lēng lí: Tio̍h ióng-kám chòng-táⁿ
Joshua1:10 Tùi án-ni
Joshua1:11 khì iâⁿ-tiong ta̍k só͘-chāi hoan-hù jîn-bîn
Joshua1:12 Iok-su-a hoan-hù Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua1:13 “Lín tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín ê ōe: Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè beh chiong lín tī chia an-ún khiā-khí ê tōe siúⁿ-sù lín.
Joshua1:14 Lín ê bó͘
Joshua1:15 ti̍t-kàu Siōng Chú hō͘ lín ê tông-pau kap lín siâng-khoán
Joshua1:16 In ìn Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua1:17 goán í-chêng án-chóaⁿ sūn-thàn Mô͘-se
Joshua1:18 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng ûi-pōe lí ê bēng-lēng
Joshua2:1 Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a tùi Si̍p-têng àm-tiong phài nn̄g ê cheng-thàm
Joshua2:2 Ū lâng khì kā Iâ-lī-ko -ông thong-pò kóng
Joshua2:3 Iâ-lī-ko -ông chiū phài lâng khì Lat-ha̍p hia
Joshua2:4 Lat-ha̍p chiong hit nn̄g ê lâng chhàng--khí-lâi
Joshua2:5 ji̍t àm beh koaiⁿ siâⁿ-mn̂g ê sî
Joshua2:6 M̄-kú
Joshua2:7 Hiah-ê lâng chiū tùi beh khì Iok-tàn-hô hit-tiâu lō͘ jip in
Joshua2:8 Hit nn̄g ê lâng iáu-bē khì khùn
Joshua2:9 tùi in kóng
Joshua2:10 In-ūi goán ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín chhut Ai-ki̍p ê sî
Joshua2:11 Goán chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì chiū sit-táⁿ
Joshua2:12 Taⁿ
Joshua2:13 thang pó-hō͘ góa ê lāu-pē lāu-bú
Joshua2:14 Hit nn̄g ê lâng ìn i kóng
Joshua2:15 Lat-ha̍p chiū ēng soh-á kā in tùi thang-á lūi--lo̍h-khì; in-ūi i ê chhù khí tī siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ
Joshua2:16 I tùi in kóng
Joshua2:17 Hit nn̄g ê lâng tùi i kóng
Joshua2:18 Goán lâi kong-kek chit só͘-chāi ê sî
Joshua2:19 Nā ū lâng tùi lí ê chhù chhut-khì koe-lō͘
Joshua2:20 Chóng-sī lí nā lāu-sia̍p goán ê hêng-chong
Joshua2:21 Lat-ha̍p tah-èng in
Joshua2:22 Hit nn̄g ê lâng khì kàu soaⁿ--ni̍h
Joshua2:23 Hit nn̄g ê lâng lo̍h-soaⁿ
Joshua2:24 In koh tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua3:1 Keh-ji̍t
Joshua3:2 Kè saⁿ ji̍t
Joshua3:3 hoan-hù jîn-bîn
Joshua3:4 hō͘ lín chai tio̍h kiâⁿ tó chi̍t tiâu lō͘
Joshua3:5 Iok-su-a tùi jîn-bîn kóng

Joshua3:7 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua3:8 Lí tio̍h hoan-hù kng iok-kūi ê chè-si
Joshua3:9 Iok-su-a tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Joshua3:10 Iok-su-a koh kóng
Joshua3:11 Choân-tōe ê Chú ê iok-kūi beh tī lín ê thâu-chêng kiâⁿ-ji̍p Iok-tàn-hô.
Joshua3:12 Hiān-chāi lín tio̍h tùi Í-sek-lia̍t chi-cho̍k tiong kéng cha̍p-jī lâng
Joshua3:13 Kng Choân-tōe ê Chú — Siōng Chú iok-kūi ê chè-si ê kha chi̍t-ē ta̍h-tio̍h Iok-tàn-hô ê chúi
Joshua3:14 Jîn-bîn lī-khui pò͘-pîⁿ
Joshua3:15 Hit-sî sī siu-sêng ê kî
Joshua3:16 siōng-liû ê chúi chiū bô koh lâu--lo̍h-lâi
Joshua3:17 Kng Siōng Chú iok-kūi ê chè-si tī Iok-tàn-hô ê ta-tōe khiā-tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ; Í-sek-lia̍t choân-thé jîn-bîn lóng kiâⁿ ta-tōe kè Iok-tàn-hô.
Joshua4:1 Choân-thé jîn-bîn í-keng kè Iok-tàn-hô
Joshua4:2 “Tio̍h tùi jîn-bîn ê tiong-kan kéng cha̍p-jī lâng
Joshua4:3 bēng-lēng in tùi Iok-tàn hô-tiong
Joshua4:4 Iok-su-a chiū chiong i tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘ soán-chhut hit cha̍p-jī lâng
Joshua4:5 Iok-su-a kā in kóng
Joshua4:6 chiah-ê chio̍h-thâu thang tī lín tiong-kan chòe kì-hō; chiong-lâi lín ê kiáⁿ-sun nā mn̄g lín
Joshua4:7 Lín thang tùi in kóng
Joshua4:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiaⁿ Iok-su-a ê bēng-lēng
Joshua4:9 Iok-su-a lēng-gōa ēng cha̍p-jī tè chio̍h-thâu thia̍p tī Iok-tàn hô-tiong
Joshua4:10 Kng iok-kūi ê chè-si khiā tī Iok-tàn hô-tiong
Joshua4:11 Choân-thé jîn-bîn chi̍t-ē kè-hô
Joshua4:12 Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua4:13 in iok-lio̍k ū sì-bān lâng tòa kun-khì tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng kè--khì
Joshua4:14 Hit-ji̍t
Joshua4:15 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Iok-su-a
Joshua4:16 “Lí bēng-lēng kng iok-kūi ê chè-si tùi Iok-tàn-hô khí--lâi.”
Joshua4:17 Iok-su-a chiū án-ni bēng-lēng chè-si.
Joshua4:18 Kng Siōng Chú iok-kūi ê chè-si tùi Iok-tàn-hô khí--lâi; chè-si ê kha chi̍t-ē ta̍h chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ
Joshua4:19 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p
Joshua4:20 Iok-su-a chiong in tùi Iok-tàn-hô chhú--lâi hit cha̍p-jī tè chio̍h-thâu
Joshua4:21 jiân-āu tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Joshua4:22 Hit-sî tio̍h hō͘ lín ê kiáⁿ-sun chai
Joshua4:23 Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè tī lín ê thâu-chêng hō͘ Iok-tàn-hô ê chúi ta--khì
Joshua4:24 beh hō͘ choân jîn-lūi lóng chai
Joshua5:1 Iok-tàn-hô sai-pêng ê A-mô͘-lī chu-ông kap óa Tōe-tiong-hái ê Ka-lâm chu-ông
Joshua5:2 Hit-sî
Joshua5:3 Iok-su-a chiū chè-chō hé-chio̍h-to
Joshua5:4 Iok-su-a kā in kiâⁿ kat-lé ê goân-in sī án-ni: Tùi Ai-ki̍p chhut--lâi hiah-ê ōe kau-chiàn ê ta-po͘-lâng lóng sí tī khòng-iá ê lō͘--ni̍h
Joshua5:5 in lóng ū siū kat-lé; m̄-kú chhut Ai-ki̍p í-āu tī khòng-iá chhut-sì ê jîn-bîn lóng iáu-bē siū kat-lé.
Joshua5:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī khòng-iá kiâⁿ sì-cha̍p nî
Joshua5:7 In ê kiáⁿ-sun
Joshua5:8 Só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng siū kat-lé liáu-āu

Joshua5:10 Hit-sî
Joshua5:11 Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh keh-ji̍t

Joshua5:14 I ìn kóng
Joshua5:15 Siōng Chú kun-tūi ê thóng-sòe tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua6:1 Iâ-lī-ko ê siâⁿ-mn̂g
Joshua6:2 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua6:3 Lín só͘-ū ê chiàn-sū tio̍h se̍h chit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua6:4 chhit ê chè-si tio̍h gia̍h chhit ki iûⁿ-kak ê sàu-kak kiâⁿ tī iok-kūi ê thâu-chêng; kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Joshua6:5 Lín chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h sàu-kak thoa-tn̂g ê siaⁿ
Joshua6:6 Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a tiàu-chi̍p chè-si
Joshua6:7 I koh kā jîn-bîn kóng
Joshua6:8 Iok-su-a tùi jîn-bîn kóng soah
Joshua6:9 Tòa kun-khì ê sian-hong-tūi kiâⁿ tī pûn sàu-kak ê chè-si thâu-chêng
Joshua6:10 Iok-su-a bēng-lēng jîn-bîn
Joshua6:11 Án-ni
Joshua6:12 Iok-su-a thàu-chá khí--lâi
Joshua6:13 Gia̍h iûⁿ-kak ê sàu-kak ê chhit ê chè-si
Joshua6:14 Tē-jī ji̍t in mā se̍h siâⁿ se̍h chi̍t lìn
Joshua6:15 Tē-chhit ji̍t thiⁿ phú-kng ê sî
Joshua6:16 Kàu tē-chhit piàn
Joshua6:17 Chit-ê siâⁿ kap lāi-bīn só͘-ū--ê
Joshua6:18 Lín tio̍h kín-sīn
Joshua6:19 M̄-kú kim
Joshua6:20 Jîn-bîn chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Joshua6:21 Jîn-bîn chiong siâⁿ-lāi só͘-ū--ê
Joshua6:22 Iok-su-a kā hit nn̄g ê thàm-cha hit-ê tōe ê lâng kóng
Joshua6:23 Hit nn̄g ê chòe cheng-thàm ê siàu-liân-lâng chiū ji̍p--khì
Joshua6:24 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū ēng hé sio hit-ê siâⁿ kap lāi-bīn só͘-ū--ê; m̄-kú kim
Joshua6:25 Iok-su-a pó-choân chhiong-ki Lat-ha̍p
Joshua6:26 Hit-sî
Joshua6:27 Siōng Chú kap Iok-su-a tông-chāi; Iok-su-a ê miâ-siaⁿ thoân-piàn choân-tōe.
Joshua7:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī eng-kai húi-bia̍t hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú ê mi̍h ū hoān-chōe. Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k tiong
Joshua7:2 Iok-su-a tùi Iâ-lī-ko phài lâng khì Pek-te̍k-lī tang-pêng
Joshua7:3 In tò-lâi Iok-su-a hia
Joshua7:4 Só͘-í tāi-iok ū saⁿ-chheng lâng khì kong-táⁿ
Joshua7:5 Ai -siâⁿ ê lâng tùi siâⁿ-mn̂g chêng tui-jip in
Joshua7:6 Iok-su-a chiū thiah-li̍h saⁿ; i kap Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló tī Siōng Chú iok-kūi ê thâu-chêng phak tī thô͘-kha
Joshua7:7 Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua7:8 Chú ah
Joshua7:9 Ka-lâm -lâng kap chit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn nā thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Joshua7:10 Siōng Chú kā Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua7:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoān-chōe
Joshua7:12 In-ūi án-ni
Joshua7:13 Khí--lâi! Tio̍h hō͘ jîn-bîn hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng
Joshua7:14 Bîn-á-chá-khí
Joshua7:15 Siōng Chú hō͘ i thiu-tio̍h chhiam ê lâng
Joshua7:16 Keh-ji̍t
Joshua7:17 chiū hō͘ Iû-tāi chiàu chong-cho̍k lâi i hia
Joshua7:18 chiū hō͘ Sat-tí ka-cho̍k ê ta-po͘-lâng chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê lâi i hia
Joshua7:19 Iok-su-a tùi A-kan kóng
Joshua7:20 A-kan ìn Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua7:21 Góa tī chhiúⁿ--lâi ê châi-bu̍t tiong khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t niá Pa-pí-lûn ê súi-saⁿ
Joshua7:22 Iok-su-a chiū phài lâng cháu-khì A-kan ê pò͘-pîⁿ; hiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ kó-jiân chhàng tī i ê pò͘-pîⁿ lāi
Joshua7:23 In chiū chiong hiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ tùi pò͘-pîⁿ the̍h--chhut-lâi
Joshua7:24 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn chiong Siā-la ê cheng-sun A-kan
Joshua7:25 Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua7:26 Chèng-lâng tī A-kan si-thé ê téng-bīn thia̍p chi̍t-tōa-tui chio̍h-thâu
Joshua8:1 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua8:2 Lí án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi Iâ-lī-ko kap i ê ông
Joshua8:3 Tùi án-ni
Joshua8:4 hoan-hù in
Joshua8:5 Góa kap góa chhōa ê chiàn-sū beh ǹg siâⁿ chìn-kong; in ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ téng-piàn chhut-lâi kong-kek goán
Joshua8:6 In ōe chhut-lâi tui-jip goán
Joshua8:7 Hit-sî lín tio̍h tùi bâi-ho̍k ê só͘-chāi khí--lâi
Joshua8:8 Lín chiàm-léng chit-ê siâⁿ liáu-āu
Joshua8:9 Iok-su-a phài in khì
Joshua8:10 Keh-ji̍t
Joshua8:11 Kap i chòe-hé ê chiàn-sū
Joshua8:12 I ū kéng tāi-iok gō͘-chheng lâng bâi-ho̍k tī Ai -siâⁿ ê sai-pêng
Joshua8:13 Iok-su-a pò͘-tì chiàn-sū
Joshua8:14 Ai -siâⁿ ê ông khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Joshua8:15 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t ê chiàn-sū tī in ê thâu-chêng ké thâi-su
Joshua8:16 Ai -siâⁿ só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn lóng tiàu-chi̍p óa-lâi tui-jip in. In tui-jip Iok-su-a
Joshua8:17 Ai -siâⁿ kap Pek-te̍k-lī -siâⁿ choân-pō͘ ê lâng lóng chhut-khì tui-jip Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; siâⁿ-mn̂g pàng-khui-khui
Joshua8:18 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua8:19 I chi̍t-ē chhun-chhiú
Joshua8:20 Ai -siâⁿ ê lâng oa̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ; khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâⁿ-lāi hé-ian chhèng-chiūⁿ thiⁿ
Joshua8:21 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t ê chiàn-sū khòaⁿ-tio̍h bâi-ho̍k ê peng í-keng chhú siâⁿ
Joshua8:22 Bâi-ho̍k ê peng mā chhut-lâi kong-kek in; in siū Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pau-ûi
Joshua8:23 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng oa̍h-lia̍h Ai -siâⁿ ê ông
Joshua8:24 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī chhân-iá
Joshua8:25 Hit-ji̍t Ai -siâⁿ só͘-ū ê lâng lóng hō͘ in thâi-sí
Joshua8:26 Ai -siâⁿ só͘-ū ê lâng lóng siū châu-bia̍t
Joshua8:27 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū chiàu Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Iok-su-a ê ōe
Joshua8:28 Iok-su-a chiong Ai -siâⁿ pàng-hé sio
Joshua8:29 I koh chiong Ai -siâⁿ ê ông tiàu tī chhiū-téng
Joshua8:30 Hit-sî
Joshua8:31 sī chiàu Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bēng-lēng
Joshua8:32 Iok-su-a tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bīn-chêng chiong Mô͘-se ê lu̍t-hoat chhau-siá tī chio̍h-thâu téng.
Joshua8:33 Só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Joshua8:34 Jiân-āu
Joshua8:35 Mô͘-se só͘ bēng-lēng it-chhè ê ōe
Joshua9:1 Tòa tī Iok-tàn-hô sai-pêng ê soaⁿ-khu
Joshua9:2 chiū lóng chū-chi̍p
Joshua9:3 Ki-piàn ê chū-bîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-su-a án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi Iâ-lī-ko kap Ai -siâⁿ
Joshua9:4 chiū siat kè-bô͘
Joshua9:5 chhēng pó͘--kè ê kū-ôe kap kū-saⁿ
Joshua9:6 In lâi kàu Kiat-kah ê iâⁿ-tōe kìⁿ Iok-su-a
Joshua9:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi chiah-ê Hi-bī -lâng kóng
Joshua9:8 Ki-piàn -lâng tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua9:9 In tùi i kóng
Joshua9:10 í-ki̍p I tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng tùi A-mô͘-lī nn̄g ê ông
Joshua9:11 Goán ê léng-siù kap goán hia ê lâng lóng kā goán kóng
Joshua9:12 Goán chhut-hoat beh lâi lín chia ê sî
Joshua9:13 in-ūi lō͘ chin hn̄g
Joshua9:14 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiám-cha in ê chia̍h-mi̍h
Joshua9:15 Iok-su-a chiū kap in tēng hô-pêng tiâu-iok
Joshua9:16 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap in li̍p-iok liáu-āu
Joshua9:17 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut-hoat
Joshua9:18 In-ūi hōe-chiòng ê léng-siù í-keng chí Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè tùi in chiù-chōa
Joshua9:19 Hiah-ê léng-siù tùi bîn-chiòng kóng
Joshua9:20 Lán tio̍h lâu in ê sìⁿ-miā
Joshua9:21 Léng-siù koh tùi in kóng
Joshua9:22 Iok-su-a kiò in lâi
Joshua9:23 Só͘-í lín tio̍h siū Siōng Chú chek-hoa̍t
Joshua9:24 In ìn Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua9:25 Taⁿ goán tī lí ê chhiú-thâu; lí thang chiàu lí khòaⁿ-chòe hó
Joshua9:26 Iok-su-a chiū án-ni tùi-thāi in
Joshua9:27 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
Joshua10:1 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -ông A-to-nî Sé-tek thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-su-a kong-chhú Ai -siâⁿ
Joshua10:2 chiū chin kiaⁿ; in-ūi Ki-piàn pí Ai -siâⁿ khah tōa
Joshua10:3 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -ông A-to-nî Sé-tek chiū phài lâng khì kìⁿ Hi-pek-lûn -ông Hô-hâm
Joshua10:4 “Chhiáⁿ lín lâi oān-chō͘ góa; lán tàu-tīn lâi-khì kong-táⁿ Ki-piàn
Joshua10:5 Tùi án-ni
Joshua10:6 Ki-piàn -lâng chiū phài lâng khì Kiat-kah iâⁿ-tōe kìⁿ Iok-su-a
Joshua10:7 Iok-su-a chiū kap i só͘-ū ê chiàn-sū
Joshua10:8 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua10:9 Iok-su-a tùi Kiat-kah thàu-mî chiūⁿ--khì
Joshua10:10 Siōng Chú hō͘ in tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bīn-chêng khí hūn-loān
Joshua10:11 In tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bīn-chêng tô-cháu; tī Pek Hô-lûn lo̍h-kiā ê só͘-chāi
Joshua10:12 Siōng Chú chiong A-mô͘-lī -lâng kau hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hit-ji̍t
Joshua10:13 Ji̍t-thâu chiū tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ
Joshua10:14 Hit chi̍t ji̍t Siōng Chú thiaⁿ lâng ê kî-tó
Joshua10:15 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tò-lâi Kiat-kah ê iâⁿ-tōe.
Joshua10:16 Hit gō͘ ê ông tô-cháu
Joshua10:17 Ū lâng khì kā Iok-su-a pò-kò
Joshua10:18 Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua10:19 m̄-kú lín tio̍h kè-sio̍k tui-jip lín ê tùi-te̍k
Joshua10:20 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā in phah-pāi
Joshua10:21 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng an-choân tò-lâi Má-ki-tāi ê iâⁿ-tōe
Joshua10:22 Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua10:23 In chiū chiong hit gō͘ ê ông: Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -ông
Joshua10:24 In lia̍h hiah-ê ông chhut-lâi kàu Iok-su-a hia ê sî
Joshua10:25 Iok-su-a tùi in kóng
Joshua10:26 Āu-lâi Iok-su-a thâi-sí hit gō͘ ê ông
Joshua10:27 Ji̍t lo̍h ê sî
Joshua10:28 Siâng hit-ji̍t
Joshua10:29 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tùi Má-ki-tāi khì kong-táⁿ Li̍p-ná.
Joshua10:30 Siōng Chú chiong chit-ê siâⁿ kap i ê ông kau tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chhiú. Iok-su-a ēng to thâi-sí hit-ê ông kap siâⁿ-lāi só͘-ū ê chū-bîn
Joshua10:31 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tùi Li̍p-ná khì La-kiat
Joshua10:32 Siōng Chú chiong La-kiat kau tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chhiú; keh-ji̍t in kong-chhú chit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua10:33 Hit-sî
Joshua10:34 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tùi La-kiat khì I-ki-lûn
Joshua10:35 Kâng hit-ji̍t
Joshua10:36 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tùi I-ki-lûn khì kong-táⁿ Hi-pek-lûn.
Joshua10:37 In kong-chhú chit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua10:38 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tò-lâi kong-táⁿ Tí-phek.
Joshua10:39 In kong-chhú chit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua10:40 Án-ni
Joshua10:41 Tùi Ka-te-su Pa-nî-a kàu Ka-sat
Joshua10:42 Hiah-ê ông kap in ê thó͘-tōe
Joshua10:43 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng chiū tò-lâi Kiat-kah ê iâⁿ-tōe.
Joshua11:1 Hā-só -ông Iâ-pin thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì
Joshua11:2 koh kàu pak-pêng ê soaⁿ-khu
Joshua11:3 I koh khì kìⁿ Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng kap sai-pêng ê Ka-lâm -lâng
Joshua11:4 Chiah-ê ông kap in ê kun-peng lóng chhut--lâi
Joshua11:5 In lóng lâi Bí-lûn khoe-piⁿ chū-chi̍p
Joshua11:6 Siōng Chú kā Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua11:7 Iok-su-a kap lóng-chóng ê chiàn-sū lâi kàu Bí-lûn khoe-piⁿ
Joshua11:8 Siōng Chú chiong in kau tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chhiú. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kong-kek in
Joshua11:9 Iok-su-a chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng tùi-thāi in
Joshua11:10 Āu-lâi
Joshua11:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ēng to thâi-sí hit siâⁿ-lāi ê chū-bîn
Joshua11:12 Iok-su-a cheng-ho̍k só͘-ū ê siâⁿ
Joshua11:13 Hiah-ê khí tī soaⁿ-lûn-á téng ê siâⁿ
Joshua11:14 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi hiah-ê siâⁿ chhiúⁿ ê mi̍h kap cheng-siⁿ
Joshua11:15 Siōng Chú án-chóaⁿ bēng-lēng I ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se
Joshua11:16 Án-ni
Joshua11:17 tùi Se-ní ê Hap-la-soaⁿ
Joshua11:18 Iok-su-a kap chiah-ê ông kau-chiàn chin kú;
Joshua11:19 Ki-piàn ê Hi-bī -lâng í-gōa
Joshua11:20 In-ūi Siōng Chú hō͘ hiah-ê siâⁿ ê lâng sim ngī
Joshua11:21 Āu-lâi
Joshua11:22 Tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi
Joshua11:23 Án-ni
Joshua12:1 Tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng
Joshua12:2 Chi̍t ê sī tòa tī Hi-si̍t-pún ê A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông
Joshua12:3 koh pau-koat tang-pêng ê A-la-pa kàu Ka-lī-lī-ô͘
Joshua12:4 Koh ū Pa-san -ông Go̍k; i sī chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê Lī-hoa̍t-im -lâng
Joshua12:5 I koán-hat ê tōe-khu sī Hek-bûn-soaⁿ
Joshua12:6 Chit nn̄g ê ông lóng hō͘ Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng phah-pāi. Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se chiong in ê tōe hō͘ Lū-piān chi-cho̍k
Joshua12:7 Iok-su-a kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng phah-pāi Iok-tàn-hô sai-pêng ê ông
Joshua12:8 chiū-sī Hek -lâng
Joshua12:9 Iâ-lī-ko -ông
Joshua12:10 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -ông
Joshua12:11 Iâ-boa̍t -ông
Joshua12:12 I-ki-lûn -ông
Joshua12:13 Tí-phek -ông
Joshua12:14 Hô-ní-má -ông
Joshua12:15 Li̍p-ná -ông
Joshua12:16 Má-ki-tāi -ông
Joshua12:17 Tha-phó͘-a -ông
Joshua12:18 A-hut -ông
Joshua12:19 Má-tùn -ông
Joshua12:20 Sin-lûn Bí-lûn -ông
Joshua12:21 Tha-la̍p -ông
Joshua12:22 Ki-te-su -ông
Joshua12:23 To-ní soaⁿ-thâu ê To-ní -ông
Joshua12:24 Tek-sat -ông
Joshua13:1 Iok-su-a í-keng chin lāu
Joshua13:2 chiū-sī Hui-lī-sū -lâng kap Ki-su̍t -lâng ê choân tōe-khu;
Joshua13:3 tùi Ai-ki̍p pian-kài ê Se-hat-hô
Joshua13:4 Ka-lâm -lâng ê choân-tōe
Joshua13:5 koh ū Ka-pa-le̍k -lâng ê tōe
Joshua13:6 tùi Lê-pa-lūn-soaⁿ kàu Bí-su-lī-hut Má-im só͘-ū tòa tī soaⁿ-khu ê Se-tùn -lâng
Joshua13:7 Taⁿ lí tio̍h chiong chit-ê tōe pun hō͘ kî-tha káu ê chi-cho̍k kap Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k chòe ke-gia̍p.”
Joshua13:8 Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se í-keng chiong Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng ê thó͘-tōe pun hō͘ Lū-piān kap Ka-tek nn̄g chi-cho̍k
Joshua13:9 Chiah-ê tōe chiū-sī tùi A-lūn Soaⁿ-kok piⁿ ê A-lô-ní
Joshua13:10 koh ū tī Hi-si̍t-pún chòe ông ê A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông koán-hat ê siâⁿ-chhī
Joshua13:11 koh ū Ki-lia̍t tōe-khu
Joshua13:12 koh ū tī A-su-tha-lio̍k kap Í-tek-lâi chòe ông ê Pa-san -ông Go̍k choân-kok; Go̍k sī chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê Lī-hoa̍t-im -lâng. Chiah-ê lóng hō͘ Mô͘-se phah-pāi
Joshua13:13 M̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bô chiong Ki-su̍t -lâng kap Má-ka -lâng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì; kàu kin-á-ji̍t in iáu tòa tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan.
Joshua13:14 Mô͘-se bô pun ke-gia̍p hō͘ Lī-bī chi-cho̍k; chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se só͘ kóng--ê
Joshua13:15 Mô͘-se chiàu Lū-piān chi-cho̍k ê ta̍k chong-cho̍k pun ke-gia̍p hō͘ in.
Joshua13:16 In ê kéng-kài sī A-lūn Soaⁿ-kok piⁿ ê A-lô-ní kap soaⁿ-kok tiong ê siâⁿ-chhī
Joshua13:17 koh ū Hi-si̍t-pún kap só͘ sio̍k ê pêng-goân hiah-ê siâⁿ-chhī
Joshua13:18 Ngá-cha̍p
Joshua13:19 Ki-lia̍t-têng
Joshua13:20 Pek Pí-ní
Joshua13:21 koh ū pêng-goân hiah-ê siâⁿ
Joshua13:22 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thâi hiah-ê lâng ê sî
Joshua13:23 Lū-piān chi-cho̍k ê sai-pêng ēng Iok-tàn-hô chòe pian-kài. Í-siōng ê siâⁿ-chhī kap chng-siā sī Lū-piān -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k só͘ tit--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p.
Joshua13:24 Mô͘-se chiàu Ka-tek chi-cho̍k ê ta̍k chong-cho̍k pun ke-gia̍p hō͘ in.
Joshua13:25 In ê kéng-kài sī Ngá-siā kap Ki-lia̍t só͘-ū ê siâⁿ-chhī
Joshua13:26 tùi Hi-si̍t-pún kàu La-boa̍t Bí-su-pa kap Pí-to-lêng
Joshua13:27 kap Hi-si̍t-pún -ông Se-hông kok-lāi só͘ chhun soaⁿ-kok tiong ê Pek Hap-lân
Joshua13:28 Í-siōng ê siâⁿ-chhī kap chng-siā sī Ka-tek -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k só͘ tit--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p.
Joshua13:29 Mô͘-se chiàu Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k ê ta̍k chong-cho̍k pun ke-gia̍p hō͘ in.
Joshua13:30 In ê kéng-kài sī tùi Má-hap-liām khí
Joshua13:31 koh chiong Ki-lia̍t ê chi̍t-pòaⁿ
Joshua13:32 Í-siōng sī Mô͘-se tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng
Joshua13:33 M̄-kú
Joshua14:1 Ē-bīn sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Ka-lâm -tōe
Joshua14:2 In chiàu Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
Joshua14:3 Mô͘-se tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng
Joshua14:4 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi hun-chòe Má-ná-se kap Í-hoat-liân nn̄g ê chi-cho̍k. Sui-jiân Mô͘-se bô chiong thó͘-tōe pun hō͘ Lī-bī -lâng chòe ke-gia̍p
Joshua14:5 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu Siōng Chú bēng-lēng Mô͘-se ê ōe hun-phòe hit-ê tōe.
Joshua14:6 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Joshua14:7 Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se tùi Ka-te-su Pa-nî-a phài góa lâi thàm-cha chit-ê tōe ê sî
Joshua14:8 M̄-kú kap góa chòe-hé khì thàm-cha ê hiaⁿ-tī ê pò-kò hō͘ jîn-bîn kiaⁿ kah sîn-put-hū-thé
Joshua14:9 Hit-ji̍t
Joshua14:10 Tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī khòng-iá phiau-liû
Joshua14:11 Kin-á-ji̍t góa iáu ióng-kiāⁿ
Joshua14:12 Chhiáⁿ lí chiong Siōng Chú hit-ji̍t só͘ èng-ún ê soaⁿ-khu hō͘ góa. Hit-ji̍t lí mā ū thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Joshua14:13 Iok-su-a chiū kā Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k chiok-hok
Joshua14:14 Só͘-í
Joshua14:15 Hi-pek-lûn í-chêng kiò-chòe Ki-lia̍t A-pa. A-pa sī A-la̍p -cho̍k siōng úi-tāi ê lâng. Tùi án-ni
Joshua15:1 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-chhiam tit--tio̍h ê tōe-khu
Joshua15:2 In lâm-pêng ê kéng-kài
Joshua15:3 thàng kàu A-khek-la-pin soaⁿ-phiâⁿ ê lâm-pêng
Joshua15:4 keng-kè Ap-bûn
Joshua15:5 Tang-pêng ê pian-kài sī Iâm-hái
Joshua15:6 chiūⁿ kàu Pek Hat-la
Joshua15:7 hit-ê pian-kài koh tùi A-kat Soaⁿ-kok chiūⁿ kàu Tí-phek
Joshua15:8 chit-ê pian-kài koh keng-kè Him-lūn-chú Soaⁿ-kok
Joshua15:9 hit-ê pian-kài koh tùi soaⁿ-téng kàu Nî-hut-to-a ê chúi-chôaⁿ
Joshua15:10 hit-ê pian-kài koh tùi Pa-la ǹg sai-pêng se̍h-kè Í-tong-soaⁿ
Joshua15:11 hit-ê pian-kài koh thàng kàu Í-kek-lûn soaⁿ-phiâⁿ ê pak-pêng
Joshua15:12 Tōe-tiong-hái chiū-sī Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k sai-pêng ê pian-kài. Che sī Iû-tāi -lâng
Joshua15:13 Iok-su-a chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Joshua15:14 Ka-le̍k tùi hia kóaⁿ-chhut A-la̍p saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
Joshua15:15 Koh tùi hia khì kong-kek Tí-phek ê chū-bîn. Tí-phek í-chêng kiò-chòe Ki-lia̍t Se-hut.
Joshua15:16 Ka-le̍k kóng
Joshua15:17 Ka-le̍k ê sió-tī Ki-la̍p-su ê kiáⁿ Gô-tô-liap kong-chhú chit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua15:18 Ap-sat chhut-kè hit-ji̍t
Joshua15:19 Ap-sat kóng
Joshua15:20 Ē-bīn sī Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k ta̍k-ê chong-cho̍k só͘ tit--tio̍h ê sán-gia̍p:
Joshua15:21 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k siōng lâm-pêng óa-kūn Í-tong pian-kài ê siâⁿ-tìn
Joshua15:22 Ki-ná
Joshua15:23 Ki-te-su
Joshua15:24 Se-hut

Joshua15:26 A-bān

Joshua15:30 I-le̍k-to-la̍h
Joshua15:31 Sé-kek-la
Joshua15:32 Lī-pa-bu̍t
Joshua15:33 Tī soaⁿ-po͘ ū Í-si̍t-tô
Joshua15:34 Sat-ná-a
Joshua15:35 Iâ-boa̍t
Joshua15:36 Sa-la-im
Joshua15:37 Koh ū Sé-lâm
Joshua15:38 Tí-liân
Joshua15:39 La-kiat
Joshua15:40 Ka-pún
Joshua15:41 Ki-te-lô
Joshua15:42 Koh ū Li̍p-ná
Joshua15:43 Iâ-hut-tha
Joshua15:44 Ki-i-la
Joshua15:45 Koh ū Í-kek-lûn í-ki̍p chiu-ûi ê hiong-tìn kap chng-siā
Joshua15:46 Í-kek-lûn ǹg sai só͘-ū óa-kūn A-si̍t-tu̍t ê tōe-khu
Joshua15:47 Koh ū A-si̍t-tu̍t kap chiu-ûi ê hiong-tìn í-ki̍p chng-siā
Joshua15:48 Tī soaⁿ-khu ū Sa-bi̍t
Joshua15:49 Tāi-ná
Joshua15:50 A-ná-pek
Joshua15:51 Ko-san
Joshua15:52 Koh ū A-la
Joshua15:53 Ngá-lông
Joshua15:54 Hông-tha
Joshua15:55 Koh ū Má-hûn
Joshua15:56 Iâ-su-lia̍t
Joshua15:57 Kai-ún
Joshua15:58 Koh ū Hap-hut
Joshua15:59 Má-la̍h
Joshua15:60 Koh ū Ki-lia̍t Pa-le̍k (chiū-sī Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm)
Joshua15:61 Tī khòng-iá ū Pek A-la-pa
Joshua15:62 Le̍k-san
Joshua15:63 Tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Iâ-pò͘-su -lâng
Joshua16:1 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi thiu-chhiam só͘ tit--tio̍h ê tōe
Joshua16:2 koh tùi Pek-te̍k-lī kàu Lō͘-su
Joshua16:3 koh ǹg sai lo̍h-khì kàu Ap-lī-thê -lâng ê kéng-kài
Joshua16:4 Chiah-ê chiū-sī Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi Má-ná-se kap Í-hoat-liân só͘ tit--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p.
Joshua16:5 Ē-bīn sī Í-hoat-liân ê hō͘-tāi chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k só͘ tit--tio̍h thó͘-tōe ê pian-kài: Tang-pêng tùi A-tha-lio̍k A-ta̍t-ní kàu Téng Pek Hô-lûn;
Joshua16:6 chit-ê pian-kài ǹg sai thàng kàu Tōe-tiong-hái. Pak-pêng tùi Bi̍t-bí-tha ǹg tang se̍h kàu Tha-la̍p Sī-lô
Joshua16:7 tùi A-ná ǹg lâm lo̍h-khì kàu A-tha-lio̍k
Joshua16:8 Chit-ê pian-kài tùi Tha-phó͘-a ǹg sai
Joshua16:9 Lēng-gōa tī Má-ná-se -lâng ê kéng-lāi
Joshua16:10 Í-hoat-liân -lâng bô hoat-tō͘ chiong tòa tī Ki-sek ê Ka-lâm -lâng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì; Ka-lâm -lâng tòa tī Í-hoat-liân -lâng ê tiong-kan chòe khó͘-kang ho̍k-sāi in
Joshua17:1 Ē-bīn sī Iok-sek ê tōa-kiáⁿ Má-ná-se ê hō͘-tāi thiu-chhiam tit--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p: Má-kiat sī Má-ná-se ê tōa-kiáⁿ
Joshua17:2 Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ Má-ná-se kî-tha ê hāu-siⁿ
Joshua17:3 Má-ná-se ê goân-sun
Joshua17:4 In lâi kàu chè-si Í-lī-a-sat kap Lūn ê kiáⁿ Iok-su-a
Joshua17:5 Tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng ê Ki-lia̍t kap Pa-san tōe-khu í-gōa
Joshua17:6 in-ūi Má-ná-se hiah-ê cha-bó͘-sun
Joshua17:7 Má-ná-se ê tōe-kài
Joshua17:8 Tha-phó͘-a tōe-khu kui Má-ná-se; m̄-kú Má-ná-se pian-kài ê Tha-phó͘-a -siâⁿ sio̍k Í-hoat-liân ê hō͘-tāi.
Joshua17:9 Chit-ê tōe-kài tùi hia lo̍h-khì kàu Ka-ná-khoe; khoe lâm-pêng ê siâⁿ-tìn sui-jiân tī Má-ná-se kéng-lāi
Joshua17:10 Í-hoat-liân tī lâm-pêng
Joshua17:11 Má-ná-se tī Í-sat-ka kap A-siat ê kéng-lāi ū Pek Siān
Joshua17:12 M̄-kú Má-ná-se -lâng bô hoat-tō͘ chiong hiah-ê siâⁿ ê chū-bîn kóaⁿ--chhut-khì; Ka-lâm -lâng kian-chhî beh tòa tī hia.
Joshua17:13 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiông-sēng ê sî
Joshua17:14 Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ-sun tùi Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua17:15 Iok-su-a ìn in kóng
Joshua17:16 Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi kóng
Joshua17:17 Iok-su-a tùi Iok-sek -ke
Joshua17:18 Kui-ê soaⁿ-khu lóng sī lín ê; hit-ê tōe-khu sui-jiân ū chhiū-nâ
Joshua18:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng í-keng cheng-ho̍k choân-tōe
Joshua18:2 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan ū chhit ê chi-cho̍k iáu-bē pun-tio̍h in ê ke-gia̍p.
Joshua18:3 Iok-su-a chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Joshua18:4 Lín ta̍k chi-cho̍k tio̍h kéng saⁿ ê lâng
Joshua18:5 In tio̍h chiong choân-tōe pun-chòe chhit hūn; Iû-tāi iû-goân tòa tī lâm-pêng ê kéng-lāi
Joshua18:6 Lín chiong hit chhit hūn thó͘-tōe oân-sêng chè-tô͘ liáu-āu
Joshua18:7 Lī-bī -lâng tī lín tiong-kan bô pun thó͘-tōe
Joshua18:8 Hiah-ê lâng beh chhut-hoat ê sî
Joshua18:9 In chiū khì
Joshua18:10 Iok-su-a chiū tī Sī-lô Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Joshua18:11 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-chhiam tit--tio̍h ê tōe
Joshua18:12 In pak-pêng ê tōe-kài
Joshua18:13 koh tùi hia ǹg lâm keng-kè Lō͘-su hù-kūn (Lō͘-su chiū-sī Pek-te̍k-lī)
Joshua18:14 Chit-ê pian-kài tùi hia ǹg sai chhun--khì
Joshua18:15 Lâm-pêng tùi Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm ê pian-kài khí
Joshua18:16 koh lo̍h-khì kàu Him-lūn-chú Soaⁿ-kok tùi-bīn ê soaⁿ-kha
Joshua18:17 koh ǹg pak keng-kè Ún Sī-be̍k
Joshua18:18 Koh ǹg pak keng-kè A-la-pa ê pian-kài
Joshua18:19 koh keng-kè Pek Hat-la pak-pêng ê kau-kài
Joshua18:20 tang-pêng ê pian-kài kàu Iok-tàn-hô. Che sī Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k
Joshua18:21 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k pun--tio̍h ê siâⁿ
Joshua18:22 Pek A-la-pa
Joshua18:23 A-ōe
Joshua18:24 Ki-hoat A-mô͘-nî
Joshua18:25 Koh ū Ki-piàn
Joshua18:26 Bí-su-pa
Joshua18:27 Lī-kim
Joshua18:28 Sé-la
Joshua19:1 Se-biān chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-jī chhiam
Joshua19:2 In tit--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p chiū-sī: Pia̍t-sī-pa (á-sī Sī-pa)
Joshua19:3 Hap-sat Su-a
Joshua19:4 I-le̍k-to-la̍h
Joshua19:5 Sé-kek-la
Joshua19:6 Pek Lī-pa-bu̍t
Joshua19:7 koh ū A-in
Joshua19:8 í-ki̍p chiah-ê siâⁿ sì-ûi it-chhè ê chng-siā
Joshua19:9 Se-biān -lâng ê ke-gia̍p sī tùi Iû-tāi -lâng ê ke-gia̍p pun--chhut-lâi--ê; in-ūi Iû-tāi -lâng pun--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p siuⁿ chōe
Joshua19:10 Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-saⁿ chhiam. In ê ke-gia̍p ê pian-kài sī tùi Sat-li̍p
Joshua19:11 ǹg sai kàu Má-la-la
Joshua19:12 koh tùi Sat-li̍p ǹg tang
Joshua19:13 Tùi hia koh ǹg tang khì kàu Ka-te̍k Hi-hut
Joshua19:14 Hit-ê pian-kài tùi Nî-a koh ǹg pak-pêng se̍h-kè Hap-ná-tùn
Joshua19:15 iáu ū Ka-tha
Joshua19:16 Chiah-ê siâⁿ kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
Joshua19:17 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-sì chhiam.
Joshua19:18 In ê tōe-kài pau-koat Iâ-su-lia̍t
Joshua19:19 Hap-hut-liân
Joshua19:20 La-phek
Joshua19:21 Lī-bia̍t
Joshua19:22 hit-ê pian-kài kàu Tha-po̍k
Joshua19:23 Chiah-ê siâⁿ kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
Joshua19:24 A-siat chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-gō͘ chhiam.
Joshua19:25 In ê tōe-kài sī Hek-kah
Joshua19:26 A-la-bí-le̍k
Joshua19:27 ǹg tang keng-kè Pek Tāi-kún
Joshua19:28 koh kàu Gī-pek-lûn
Joshua19:29 Hit-ê pian-kài oat tùi La-má
Joshua19:30 Koh ū O͘-má
Joshua19:31 Chiah-ê siâⁿ kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
Joshua19:32 Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-la̍k chhiam.
Joshua19:33 In ê pian-kài tùi Hi-lī-hut
Joshua19:34 ǹg sai
Joshua19:35 Kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ ū Se-teng
Joshua19:36 A-tāi-má
Joshua19:37 Ki-te-su

Joshua19:39 Chiah-ê siâⁿ kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
Joshua19:40 Tān chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h tē-chhit chhiam.
Joshua19:41 In pun--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p pau-koat Só-la
Joshua19:42 Sa-la-pin
Joshua19:43 Í-lûn
Joshua19:44 I-lī-thê-ki
Joshua19:45 I-ô͘-tek
Joshua19:46 Bí Iâ-khun

Joshua19:48 Chiah-ê siâⁿ kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
Joshua19:49 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàu tōe-kài hun-phòe thó͘-tōe oân-sêng liáu-āu
Joshua19:50 In chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Joshua19:51 Í-siōng chiah-ê chiū-sī chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Joshua20:1 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua20:2 “Tio̍h bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Joshua20:3 hō͘ bô-ì-tiong gō͘-sat-lâng--ê thang cháu-khì hia. Hiah-ê siâⁿ thang chòe lín siám-pī pò oan-siû ê lâng ê só͘-chāi.
Joshua20:4 Gō͘-sat-lâng--ê thang cháu-khì hiah-ê siâⁿ
Joshua20:5 Pò oan-siû ê lâng nā jip kàu hit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua20:6 I tio̍h tòa tī hit-ê siâⁿ
Joshua20:7 In chiū koat-tēng siat-li̍p pī-lān-siâⁿ tī Ná-hut-tha-lī soaⁿ-khu Ka-lī-lī ê Ki-te-su
Joshua20:8 Koh tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng siat-li̍p pī-lān-siâⁿ
Joshua20:9 Chiah-ê sī ūi-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng
Joshua21:1 Lī-bī -lâng ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ lâi kìⁿ chè-si Í-lī-a-sat
Joshua21:2 tī Ka-lâm -tōe ê Sī-lô tùi in kóng
Joshua21:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
Joshua21:4 Lī-bī chi-cho̍k ê Ko-hat chong-cho̍k thiu-tio̍h thâu chi̍t ki chhiam; chè-si A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi tùi Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k
Joshua21:5 Ko-hat kî-tha ê hō͘-tāi tùi Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k
Joshua21:6 Kek-sūn chong-cho̍k tùi Í-sat-ka
Joshua21:7 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k

Joshua21:10 pun hō͘ Lī-bī chi-cho̍k

Joshua21:12 M̄-kú hit-ê siâⁿ ê chhân-hn̂g kap chng-siā
Joshua21:13 Chè-si A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi koh pun-tio̍h ūi gō͘-sat-lâng--ê siat ê pī-lān-siâⁿ Hi-pek-lûn
Joshua21:14 Ngá-thê-ní
Joshua21:15 Hô-lûn
Joshua21:16 A-in

Joshua21:18 A-ná-tu̍t
Joshua21:19 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi chòe chè-si--ê lóng-chóng pun-tio̍h cha̍p-saⁿ chō siâⁿ-tìn
Joshua21:20 Lī-bī -lâng Ko-hat ê chong-cho̍k kî-tha ê kiáⁿ-sun
Joshua21:21 chiū-sī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ūi gō͘-sat-lâng--ê siat ê pī-lān-siâⁿ Sī-kiàm

Joshua21:23 Koh tùi Tān chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h I-lī-thê-ki
Joshua21:24 A-ngá-lûn
Joshua21:25 Koh tùi Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Tha-la̍p kap Ka-te̍k Lîm-bûn nn̄g chō siâⁿ-tìn
Joshua21:26 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k kî-tha ê kiáⁿ-sun
Joshua21:27 Lī-bī -lâng Kek-sūn ê chong-cho̍k tùi Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h ūi gō͘-sat-lâng--ê siat ê pī-lān-siâⁿ Pa-san ê Ko-lân
Joshua21:28 Koh tùi Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Ki-siān
Joshua21:29 Iâ-boa̍t
Joshua21:30 Koh tùi A-siat chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Bí-sa-le̍k
Joshua21:31 Hek-kah
Joshua21:32 Koh tùi Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h ūi gō͘-sat-lâng--ê siat ê pī-lān-siâⁿ Ka-lī-lī ê Ki-te-su
Joshua21:33 Kek-sūn -lâng chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k
Joshua21:34 Kî-tha ê Lī-bī -lâng

Joshua21:37 Ki-tí-bo̍k

Joshua21:39 Hi-si̍t-pún
Joshua21:40 Lī-bī -lâng Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k

Joshua21:42 Chiah-ê siâⁿ-tìn chiu-ûi lóng ū chháu-po͘
Joshua21:43 Án-ni

Joshua22:1 Hit-sî
Joshua22:2 tùi in kóng
Joshua22:3 It-ti̍t kàu kin-á-ji̍t
Joshua22:4 Taⁿ Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè ū chiàu I ê èng-ún
Joshua22:5 M̄-kú lín it-tēng tio̍h kín-sīn
Joshua22:6 Iok-su-a kā in chiok-hok
Joshua22:7 Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k í-keng tī Pa-san tùi Mô͘-se pun-tio̍h ke-gia̍p; lēng-gōa pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k
Joshua22:8 hoan-hù in kóng
Joshua22:9 Tùi án-ni
Joshua22:10 Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:12 Í-sek-lia̍t choân hōe-chiòng chiū tī Sī-lô chū-chi̍p
Joshua22:13 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng phài chè-si Í-lī-a-sat ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap khì Ki-lia̍t -tōe Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:14 kap i chòe-hé khì--ê ū cha̍p ê chi-cho̍k ê léng-siù
Joshua22:15 In kàu Ki-lia̍t -tōe

Joshua22:18 Lín kèng-jiân oa̍t-thâu bô tè Siōng Chú! Lín kin-á-ji̍t pōe-ge̍k I
Joshua22:19 Lín nā siūⁿ-kóng só͘ tit--tio̍h chòe ke-gia̍p ê tōe bô chheng-khì
Joshua22:20 Í-chêng Siā-la ê kan-á-sun A-kan kiám m̄-sī tī hit-ê eng-kai húi-bia̍t ê mi̍h hoān-chōe
Joshua22:21 Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:22 “Tōa koân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè! Tōa koân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè! I chai
Joshua22:23 Goán nā ūi ka-kī khí chè-tôaⁿ
Joshua22:24 M̄-kú m̄-sī án-ni! Goán chòe chit-ê tāi-chì sī kiaⁿ-liáu ū chi̍t ji̍t
Joshua22:25 Siōng Chú siat chit-ê Iok-tàn-hô chòe lín kap goán tiong-kan ê keh-kài; Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:26 Só͘-í
Joshua22:27 sī ūi-tio̍h beh tī lín kap goán
Joshua22:28 Só͘-í goán kóng
Joshua22:29 Kin-á-ji̍t
Joshua22:30 Chè-si Hui-nî-hap kap hōe-chiòng ê léng-siù
Joshua22:31 Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap tùi Lū-piān -lâng
Joshua22:32 Chè-si Í-lī-a-sat ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap kap hiah-ê léng-siù
Joshua22:33 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng chin boán-ì
Joshua22:34 Lū-piān -lâng kap Ka-tek -lâng chiū kā chit-ê chè-tôaⁿ kiò-chòe “Kiàn-chèng ê tôaⁿ”
Joshua23:1 Siōng Chú hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hióng-siū thài-pêng
Joshua23:2 i tiàu-chi̍p choân Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló
Joshua23:3 Lín ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h lín tùi hiah-ê kok só͘ chòe it-chhè ê sū; in-ūi Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè ūi lín kau-chiàn.
Joshua23:4 Góa só͘ siau-bia̍t hiah-ê kok-ka ê thó͘-tōe
Joshua23:5 Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè beh ūi-tio̍h lín chiong in kóaⁿ-cháu lī-khui lín; lín chiū ōe chiàu Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè tùi lín ê èng-ún
Joshua23:6 Só͘-í lín tio̍h ka-pē ióng-kám
Joshua23:7 Lín tiong-kan iáu-bē hō͘ lín cheng-ho̍k ê kok
Joshua23:8 Lín tio̍h tiong-sêng bô lī-khui Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
Joshua23:9 In-ūi Siōng Chú í-keng chiong tōa koh kiông ê kok tùi lín ê bīn-chêng kóaⁿ-cháu; kàu kin-á-ji̍t bô chi̍t ê lâng ōe-tàng tùi-khòng lín.
Joshua23:10 Lín chi̍t ê lâng ōe-tàng kóaⁿ-cháu chi̍t-chheng lâng
Joshua23:11 Lín tio̍h kín-sīn
Joshua23:12 Lín nā oa̍t-cháu lī-khui Siōng Chú
Joshua23:13 lín tio̍h khak-si̍t chai
Joshua23:14 “Taⁿ
