Joshua23:16 Lín nā ûi-pōe Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè só͘ bēng-lēng lín ê iok
Joshua24:1 Iok-su-a chū-chi̍p Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k kàu Sī-kiàm. I tiàu Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló
Joshua24:2 Iok-su-a tùi só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn kóng
Joshua24:3 Góa chhōa lín ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán tùi Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô hit-pêng chhut--lâi
Joshua24:4 koh ēng Ngá-kok kap Í-sò siúⁿ-sù Í-sat. Góa chiong Í-tong soaⁿ-khu siúⁿ-sù Í-sò chòe ke-gia̍p
Joshua24:5 Góa chhe-phài Mô͘-se kap A-lûn
Joshua24:6 Góa chhōa lín ê lia̍t-chó͘ chhut Ai-ki̍p
Joshua24:7 Lín ê lia̍t-chó͘ kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Joshua24:8 Góa chhōa lín kàu Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng A-mô͘-lī -lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi khiā-khí; in kap lín kau-chiàn
Joshua24:9 Hit-sî
Joshua24:10 Góa m̄ thiaⁿ Pa-lân ê ōe
Joshua24:11 Lín kè Iok-tàn-hô
Joshua24:12 Góa kàng un-e̍k tī in tiong-kan
Joshua24:13 Góa siúⁿ-sù lín ê thó͘-tōe
Joshua24:14 “Taⁿ
Joshua24:15 Nā-sī lín bô ài ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú
Joshua24:16 Jîn-bîn hôe-tap kóng
Joshua24:17 In-ūi Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè ū chhōa goán kap goán ê lia̍t-chó͘ tùi Ai-ki̍p chòe lô͘-châi ê ke chhut--lâi
Joshua24:18 Siōng Chú koh ūi-tio̍h goán kóaⁿ-chhut tòa tī chit só͘-chāi ê A-mô͘-lī -lâng kap lia̍t-kok ê lâng
Joshua24:19 M̄-kú
Joshua24:20 Lín nā lī-khui Siōng Chú khì ho̍k-sāi gōa-pang ê sîn-bêng
Joshua24:21 Jîn-bîn ìn Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua24:22 Iok-su-a tùi jîn-bîn kóng
Joshua24:23 Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua24:24 Jîn-bîn ìn Iok-su-a kóng
Joshua24:25 Hit-ji̍t Iok-su-a chiū chhōa jîn-bîn kap Siōng Chú li̍p-iok
Joshua24:26 Iok-su-a chiong chiah-ê ōe lóng siá tī Siōng-tè lu̍t-hoat ê chheh
Joshua24:27 Iok-su-a tùi só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn kóng
Joshua24:28 Iok-su-a kái-sàn jîn-bîn
Joshua24:29 Chiah-ê sū í-āu
Joshua24:30 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā i an-chòng tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu
Joshua24:31 Iok-su-a oa̍h--teh ê sî
Joshua24:32 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiong in tùi Ai-ki̍p tòa--tò-lâi Iok-sek ê kut-hâi an-chòng tī Sī-kiàm
Joshua24:33 A-lûn ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat mā sí; in chiong i an-chòng tī i ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap só͘ tit--tio̍h Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ê soaⁿ-lûn-á téng.
Judges1:1 Iok-su-a sí liáu-āu
Judges1:2 Siōng Chú kóng
Judges1:3 Iû-tāi -lâng tùi in ê chhin-cho̍k Se-biān -lâng kóng
Judges1:4 Iû-tāi -lâng chiū chhut-chiàn; Siōng Chú chiong Ka-lâm -lâng kap Pí-lī-sé -lâng kau tī in ê chhiú; in tī Pí-sek thâi-sí chi̍t-bān lâng.
Judges1:5 In tī Pí-sek tú-tio̍h A-to-nî Pí-sek
Judges1:6 A-to-nî Pí-sek tô-cháu
Judges1:7 A-to-nî Pí-sek kóng
Judges1:8 Iû-tāi -lâng kong-chhú Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Judges1:9 Āu-lâi
Judges1:10 Iû-tāi -lâng koh kong-táⁿ hiah-ê tòa tī Hi-pek-lûn ê Ka-lâm -lâng
Judges1:11 Iû-tāi -lâng tùi hia khì kong-kek Tí-phek ê chū-bîn. Tí-phek í-chêng kiò-chòe Ki-lia̍t Se-hut.
Judges1:12 Ka-le̍k kóng
Judges1:13 Ka-le̍k ê sió-tī Ki-la̍p-su ê kiáⁿ Gô-tô-liap kong-chhú chit-ê siâⁿ
Judges1:14 Ap-sat chhut-kè hit-ji̍t
Judges1:15 Ap-sat kóng
Judges1:16 Mô͘-se ê tiūⁿ-lâng sī Ki-nî -lâng
Judges1:17 Iû-tāi -lâng kap in ê chhin-cho̍k Se-biān -lâng chòe-hé phah-pāi tòa tī Sé-hoat ê Ka-lâm -lâng
Judges1:18 Iû-tāi -lâng koh kong-chhú Ka-sat
Judges1:19 Siōng Chú kap Iû-tāi -lâng tông-chāi
Judges1:20 In chiàu Mô͘-se ê hoan-hù
Judges1:21 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng bô chiong Iâ-pò͘-su -lâng tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì; in chiū kap Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chòe-hé tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Judges1:22 Iok-sek -ke
Judges1:23 In phài lâng khì thàm-cha Pek-te̍k-lī; hit-ê siâⁿ í-chêng kiò-chòe Lō͘-su.
Judges1:24 Cheng-thàm khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng tùi siâⁿ-lāi chhut--lâi
Judges1:25 Hit-ê lâng chiū pò in ji̍p-siâⁿ ê lō͘. In thâi-sí siâⁿ-lāi ê chū-bîn
Judges1:26 Hit-ê lâng khì Hek -lâng ê tōe-khu
Judges1:27 Má-ná-se -lâng bô kóaⁿ-chhut Pek Siān
Judges1:28 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiông-sēng ê sî
Judges1:29 Í-hoat-liân -lâng bô kā tòa tī Ki-sek ê Ka-lâm -lâng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì; Ka-lâm -lâng kè-sio̍k kap in tòa tī Ki-sek.
Judges1:30 Se-pò͘-lûn -lâng bô kā tòa tī Ki-lûn kap Ná-hap-la ê lâng kóaⁿ--chhut-khì. Ka-lâm -lâng kè-sio̍k kap in chòe-hé tòa
Judges1:31 A-siat -lâng bô kóaⁿ-chhut A-kho
Judges1:32 A-siat -lâng kap Ka-lâm -lâng chòe-hé tòa
Judges1:33 Ná-hut-tha-lī -lâng bô kóaⁿ-chhut Pek Sī-be̍k kap Pek A-la̍p ê chū-bîn. In kap hit só͘-chāi ê Ka-lâm -lâng chòe-hé tòa; m̄-kú Pek Sī-be̍k kap Pek A-la̍p ê chū-bîn lóng ūi in chòe khó͘-kang.
Judges1:34 A-mô͘-lī -lâng kiông-pek Tān ê lâng tòa tī soaⁿ-khu
Judges1:35 A-mô͘-lī -lâng kè-sio̍k tòa tī Hi-lia̍t-su-soaⁿ
Judges1:36 A-mô͘-lī -lâng ê tōe-kài
Judges2:1 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi Kiat-kah lâi kàu Pho-kim
Judges2:2 lín mā m̄-thang kap chit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn li̍p-iok; tio̍h thiah-húi in ê chè-tôaⁿ.’ Lín kèng-jiân m̄ thiaⁿ góa ê ōe! Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ án-ni chòe?
Judges2:3 In-ūi án-ni
Judges2:4 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
Judges2:5 In kā hit só͘-chāi hō-miâ kiò-chòe Pho-kim; in tī hia hiàn-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú.
Judges2:6 Iok-su-a kái-sàn Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; in chiū tò-khì ka-kī pun--tio̍h ê ke-gia̍p
Judges2:7 Iok-su-a oa̍h--teh ê sî
Judges2:8 Siōng Chú ê po̍k-jîn
Judges2:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā i an-chòng tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu
Judges2:10 Hit-tāi ê lâng lóng sí-liáu; āu chi̍t tāi ê lâng khí--lâi
Judges2:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Judges2:12 In khì-sak chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p ê Siōng Chú — in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè
Judges2:13 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khì-sak Siōng Chú
Judges2:14 Siōng Chú tùi in hoat tōa siū-khì
Judges2:15 In ta̍k-piàn chhut-chiàn
Judges2:16 Siōng Chú heng-khí sū-su
Judges2:17 M̄-kú in bô thiaⁿ-thàn in ê sū-su
Judges2:18 Siōng Chú ta̍k-piàn ūi-tio̍h in heng-khí sū-su
Judges2:19 Sū-su sí liáu-āu
Judges2:20 Siōng Chú chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siū-khì
Judges2:21 só͘-í
Judges2:22 ēng chiah-ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng lâi chhì-giām Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Judges2:23 Só͘-í
Judges3:1 Siōng Chú lâu chiah-ê cho̍k
Judges3:2 beh hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t ê hō͘-tāi
Judges3:3 Lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê cho̍k
Judges3:4 Lâu chiah-ê sī beh ēng in lâi chhì-giām Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Judges3:5 Tùi án-ni
Judges3:6 chhōa in ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ choh-bó͘; mā chiong cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kè hō͘ in ê kiáⁿ
Judges3:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Judges3:8 Siōng Chú chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat tōa siū-khì
Judges3:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Judges3:10 Siōng Chú ê sîn lîm-kàu i
Judges3:11 Hit-ê tōe-khu chiū thài-pêng sì-cha̍p nî. Āu-lâi
Judges3:12 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū. In-ūi in án-ni chòe
Judges3:13 I-ki-lûn tiàu-chi̍p A-bûn -lâng kap A-má-le̍k -lâng lâi i hia
Judges3:14 Tùi án-ni
Judges3:15 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Judges3:16 Í-hut phah chi̍t ki siang-bīn-lāi ê kiàm
Judges3:17 I tòa lé-mi̍h khì kìⁿ Mô͘-ap -ông I-ki-lûn; I-ki-lûn chin tōa-kho͘.
Judges3:18 Í-hut hiàn lé-mi̍h liáu-āu
Judges3:19 I ka-kī tùi óa-kūn Kiat-kah phah chio̍h-siōng ê só͘-chāi oa̍t tò-tńg lâi tùi ông kóng
Judges3:20 Hit-sî ông ka-kī chi̍t ê chē tī chheng-liâng ê lâu-téng; Í-hut kiâⁿ óa--khì
Judges3:21 Í-hut chiū chhun tò-chhiú
Judges3:22 liân kiàm ê pìⁿ mā sòa chha̍k--ji̍p-khì; kiàm hō͘ iû kā-tiâu. Í-hut bô chiong kiàm tùi ông ê pak-tó͘ pu̍ih--chhut-lâi
Judges3:23 Í-hut chhut-lâi cháu-lông
Judges3:24 I chhut-khì liáu
Judges3:25 In thèng-hāu kàu sim tio̍h-kip
Judges3:26 Tī in thoa-iân ê sî
Judges3:27 Í-hut kàu Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ê Se-i-la
Judges3:28 I tùi in kóng
Judges3:29 Hit-ji̍t
Judges3:30 Tùi án-ni
Judges3:31 Í-hut í-āu
Judges4:1 Í-hut sí liáu-āu
Judges4:2 Siōng Chú chiong in kau hō͘ thóng-tī Hā-só ê Ka-lâm -ông Iâ-pin; i ê goân-sòe sī Se-se-la
Judges4:3 Iâ-pin -ông ū thih ê chiàn-chhia káu-pah tâi; i chân-jím khi-ap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng jī-cha̍p nî. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ai-kiû Siōng Chú kái-kiù.
Judges4:4 Hit-sî ū chi̍t ê lú sian-ti Tí-pho-la
Judges4:5 I tòa tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu
Judges4:6 Tí-pho-la phài lâng khì Ná-hut-tha-lī ê Ki-te-su kiò A-pí-lô-am ê kiáⁿ Pa-la lâi
Judges4:7 Góa beh hō͘ Iâ-pin ê goân-sòe Se-se-la kap i ê chiàn-chhia
Judges4:8 Pa-la kā i kóng
Judges4:9 I kóng
Judges4:10 Pa-la tiàu-chi̍p Se-pò͘-lûn -lâng kap Ná-hut-tha-lī -lâng kàu Ki-te-su; tè i khì--ê ū chi̍t-bān lâng. Tí-pho-la mā kap i chòe-hé khì.
Judges4:11 Hit-sî
Judges4:12 Ū lâng kā Se-se-la kóng
Judges4:13 Se-se-la chiū tiàu-chi̍p i lóng-chóng thih ê chiàn-chhia káu-pah tâi kap choân-kun
Judges4:14 Tí-pho-la tùi Pa-la kóng
Judges4:15 Siōng Chú hō͘ Se-se-la
Judges4:16 Pa-la tui-jip hiah-ê chiàn-chhia kap kun-tūi
Judges4:17 Se-se-la khí-kha tô-cháu
Judges4:18 Ngá-ek chhut-lâi gêng-chiap Se-se-la
Judges4:19 Se-se-la kā i kóng
Judges4:20 Se-se-la koh kā i kóng
Judges4:21 Se-se-la ià-siān khùn tāng-bîn; Hi-pek ê bó͘ Ngá-ek the̍h pò͘-pîⁿ ê khi̍t-á
Judges4:22 Hit-sî
Judges4:23 Tùi án-ni
Judges4:24 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng jú lâi jú kiông-sēng
Judges5:1 Hit-ji̍t
Judges5:2 Í-sek-lia̍t tiong ū léng-siù chhōa-thâu
Judges5:3 Kun-ông ah
Judges5:4 Siōng Chú lí tùi Se-ní chhut-hoat
Judges5:5 Chèng-soaⁿ tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ ê Siōng Chú bīn-chêng tōng-iâu
Judges5:6 Tī A-ná ê kiáⁿ San-ka ê sî
Judges5:7 Í-sek-lia̍t lông-chhoan pha-hng
Judges5:8 Í-sek-lia̍t kéng sin ê sîn-bêng
Judges5:9 Góa ê sim ì-hiòng Í-sek-lia̍t ê léng-siù
Judges5:10 Khiâ pe̍h-sek lû-bú--ê
Judges5:11 Chhiūⁿ-chúi ê só͘-chāi
Judges5:12 Tí-pho-la
Judges5:13 Hit-sî
Judges5:14 Tùi Í-hoat-liân lâi--ê
Judges5:15 Í-sat-ka ê léng-siù kap Tí-pho-la chòe-hé lâi; Í-sat-ka tè tī Pa-la āu-bīn
Judges5:16 In sī-án-chóaⁿ lâu tī iûⁿ-tiâu
Judges5:17 Ka-tek tòa tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng; Tān sī-án-chóaⁿ lâu tī chûn-téng? A-siat thêng-liû tī hái-piⁿ
Judges5:18 Se-pò͘-lûn sī piàⁿ-miā m̄ kiaⁿ sí ê jîn-bîn; Ná-hut-tha-lī tī chiàn-tiûⁿ mā-sī án-ni.
Judges5:19 Kun-ông lóng lâi chham-chiàn; hit-sî Ka-lâm chu-ông tī Bí-kiat-to chúi-piⁿ ê Tha-la̍p kau-chiàn
Judges5:20 Chhiⁿ-sîn mā tùi thiⁿ chham-chiàn
Judges5:21 Ki-sūn-hô kā in chhiong-cháu; Ki-sūn-hô ê chúi kiông koh tōa. Góa ê sim ah
Judges5:22 Ióng-chòng ê bé phun-pháu chhin-chhiūⁿ teh pe; bé-tôe ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ lûi hiah-ni̍h hiáng.
Judges5:23 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kóng
Judges5:24 Ki-nî -lâng Hi-pek ê bó͘ Ngá-ek pí só͘-ū ê hū-jîn-lâng khah thang o-ló
Judges5:25 Se-se-la thó chúi
Judges5:26 Ngá-ek chhiú the̍h khi̍t-á
Judges5:27 Tī i ê kha-chêng
Judges5:28 Se-se-la ê lāu-bú tùi thang-á khòaⁿ--chhut-khì
Judges5:29 I chhong-bêng ê kiong-lú hôe-tap i
Judges5:30 “In it-tēng sī teh pun chiàn-lī-phín; ta̍k-ê ióng-sū pun-tio̍h chi̍t nn̄g ê cha-bó͘ gín-á. Se-se-la it-tēng pun-tio̍h chhái-sek ê saⁿ
Judges5:31 Siōng Chú ah
Judges6:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Judges6:2 Bí-tiân -lâng pí Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khah kiông; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ūi-tio̍h beh tô-pī Bí-tiân -lâng
Judges6:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ta̍k-piàn iā-chéng liáu-āu
Judges6:4 tī hia chat-iâⁿ
Judges6:5 In tòa cheng-siⁿ kap pò͘-pîⁿ lâi
Judges6:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng in-ūi Bí-tiân -lâng ê iân-kò͘
Judges6:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng in-ūi Bí-tiân -lâng ê iân-kò͘ kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Judges6:8 Siōng Chú chiū chhe sian-ti khì in hia
Judges6:9 Góa kiù lín thoat-lī Ai-ki̍p -lâng kap só͘-ū ap-chè lín ê lâng ê chhiú
Judges6:10 Góa mā bat tùi lín kóng: Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
Judges6:11 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kàu Gô-hut-la
Judges6:12 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi Ki-tiân hián-hiān
Judges6:13 Ki-tiân tùi i kóng
Judges6:14 Siōng Chú tùi Ki-tiân kóng
Judges6:15 Ki-tiân ìn I kóng
Judges6:16 Siōng Chú tùi i kóng
Judges6:17 Ki-tiân kóng
Judges6:18 Chhiáⁿ lí m̄-thang lī-khui chia
Judges6:19 Ki-tiân chiū khì chún-pī chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-á
Judges6:20 Siōng-tè ê sù-chiá tùi i kóng
Judges6:21 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá chhun-chhut chhiú--ni̍h gia̍h ê koáiⁿ-á
Judges6:22 Ki-tiân chai i sī Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá
Judges6:23 Siōng Chú tùi i kóng
Judges6:24 Ki-tiân chiū tī hia kā Siōng Chú khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ
Judges6:25 Hit-mî
Judges6:26 tī chit-ê iàu-sài téng-bīn
Judges6:27 Ki-tiân chiū chhōa cha̍p ê po̍k-jîn
Judges6:28 Siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng thàu-chá khí--lâi
Judges6:29 In kóng-lâi-kóng-khì
Judges6:30 Siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng tùi Iok-a-si kóng
Judges6:31 Iok-a-si kā só͘-ū kong-kek i ê lâng kóng
Judges6:32 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
Judges6:33 Hit-sî Bí-tiân -lâng
Judges6:34 Siōng Chú ê sîn lîm-kàu Ki-tiân
Judges6:35 I phài sù-chiá khì Má-ná-se choân tōe-khu
Judges6:36 Ki-tiân tùi Siōng-tè kóng
Judges6:37 góa ōe hē kui-niá iûⁿ-mn̂g tī ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ; nā kan-ta iûⁿ-mn̂g ū lō͘-chúi
Judges6:38 Tāi-chì kó-jiân án-ni hoat-seng. Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
Judges6:39 Ki-tiân koh tùi Siōng-tè kóng

Judges8:1 Í-hoat-liân -lâng tùi Ki-tiân kóng

Judges8:4 Ki-tiân kap tè i ê saⁿ-pah lâng kè Iok-tàn-hô; sui-jiân chin thiám
Judges8:5 Ki-tiân tùi So͘-kat -lâng kóng
Judges8:6 So͘-kat hiah-ê léng-siù ìn kóng
Judges8:7 Ki-tiân kóng
Judges8:8 I tùi hia khì kàu Pí-ló͘-i-le̍k
Judges8:9 I tùi Pí-ló͘-i-le̍k -lâng kóng
Judges8:10 Hit-sî
Judges8:11 Ki-tiân tùi Ná-pa kap Iok-pí-hap tang-pêng
Judges8:12 Se-pa kap Sat-bō͘-ná chit nn̄g ê ông tô-cháu
Judges8:13 Iok-a-si ê kiáⁿ Ki-tiân tùi chiàn-tiûⁿ
Judges8:14 lia̍h-tio̍h chi̍t ê So͘-kat ê siàu-liân-lâng
Judges8:15 Ki-tiân kàu So͘-kat
Judges8:16 I chiū lia̍h siâⁿ-lāi ê tiúⁿ-ló
Judges8:17 koh thiah Pí-ló͘-i-le̍k ê siâⁿ-lâu
Judges8:18 Ki-tiân mn̄g Se-pa kap Sat-bō͘-ná kóng
Judges8:19 Ki-tiân kóng
Judges8:20 I chiū kā i ê tōa-kiáⁿ Ek-thiap kóng
Judges8:21 Se-pa kap Sat-bō͘-ná kā Ki-tiân kóng
Judges8:22 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Ki-tiân kóng
Judges8:23 Ki-tiân kóng
Judges8:24 Ki-tiân koh tùi in kóng
Judges8:25 In kóng
Judges8:26 Jîn-bîn hō͘ Ki-tiân ê kim hī-khoân
Judges8:27 Ki-tiân ēng chiah-ê kim-á chè-chō chi̍t ê í-hut-tek
Judges8:28 Án-ni
Judges8:29 Iok-a-si ê kiáⁿ Ki-tiân tò-khì tòa tī i ka-kī ê chhù.
Judges8:30 Ki-tiân chhōa chin chōe bó͘
Judges8:31 I tī Sī-kiàm ê sòe-î mā kā i siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
Judges8:32 Iok-a-si ê kiáⁿ Ki-tiân nî-lāu hè-siū chōe
Judges8:33 Ki-tiân sí liáu-āu
Judges8:34 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bōe-kì-tit kái-kiù in thoat-lī sì-ûi tùi-te̍k ê Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè
Judges8:35 mā bô in-ūi Iâ-lō͘-pa-le̍k
Judges9:1 Iâ-lō͘-pa-le̍k ê kiáⁿ A-pí-bí-le̍k khì Sī-kiàm i ê bú-kū hia
Judges9:2 “Chhiáⁿ lín mn̄g Sī-kiàm ê chèng-lâng
Judges9:3 I hiah-ê bú-kū chiū chiong chiah-ê ōe kóng hō͘ Sī-kiàm ê lâng thiaⁿ; in chiū ióng-hō͘ A-pí-bí-le̍k
Judges9:4 In tùi Pa-le̍k Pí-lī-thó͘ ê biō the̍h chhit-cha̍p ê gûn-á hō͘ A-pí-bí-le̍k; i chiū ēng chiah-ê gûn-á chhiàⁿ chi̍t-kóa húi-lūi lâi tè i.
Judges9:5 I khì Gô-hut-la in lāu-pē ê chhù
Judges9:6 Sī-kiàm -lâng kap Pek Bí-lô -lâng lóng chū-chi̍p
Judges9:7 Iok-thán chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì
Judges9:8 Ū chi̍t piàn
Judges9:9 Kaⁿ-ná-chhiū ìn in kóng
Judges9:10 Chiah-ê chhiū khì kā bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kóng
Judges9:11 Bû-hoa-kó-chhiū ìn in kóng
Judges9:12 Chiah-ê chhiū khì kā phû-tô-chhiū kóng
Judges9:13 Phû-tô-chhiū ìn in kóng
Judges9:14 Chiah-ê chhiū tùi chhì-phè kóng
Judges9:15 Chhì-phè ìn in kóng
Judges9:16 “Lín nā sêng-sim-si̍t-ì siat-li̍p A-pí-bí-le̍k choh-ông
Judges9:17 góa ê lāu-pē bat bô kò͘ sìⁿ-miā ūi-tio̍h lín kau-chiàn
Judges9:18 lín kin-á-ji̍t kèng-jiân kong-kek goán lāu-pē ê ke
Judges9:19 lín kin-á-ji̍t nā chin-sêng kong-tō tùi-thāi Iâ-lō͘-pa-le̍k kap i ê ke
Judges9:20 nā bô
Judges9:21 Iok-thán in-ūi kiaⁿ i ê hiaⁿ-tī A-pí-bí-le̍k
Judges9:22 A-pí-bí-le̍k thóng-tī Í-sek-lia̍t saⁿ nî.
Judges9:23 Siōng-tè phài pháiⁿ-sîn khì tī A-pí-bí-le̍k kap Sī-kiàm -lâng ê tiong-kan
Judges9:24 lâi pò-èng A-pí-bí-le̍k
Judges9:25 Sī-kiàm -lâng hoán-tùi A-pí-bí-le̍k
Judges9:26 Í-pia̍t ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī lâi kàu Sī-kiàm; Sī-kiàm -lâng lóng sìn-jīm i.
Judges9:27 In chhut-khì hn̂g--ni̍h siu phû-tô
Judges9:28 Í-pia̍t ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k kóng
Judges9:29 Chiah-ê jîn-bîn nā hō͘ góa chí-hui
Judges9:30 Chhī-tiúⁿ Se-pò͘-le̍k thiaⁿ-tio̍h Í-pia̍t ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k ê ōe
Judges9:31 chiū àm-tiong phài lâng khì kā A-pí-bí-le̍k pò-kò
Judges9:32 só͘-í
Judges9:33 ji̍t tú-á chhut ê sî
Judges9:34 A-pí-bí-le̍k kap i ê pō͘-hā mî--sî chhut-hoat
Judges9:35 Í-pia̍t ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k chhut--khì
Judges9:36 Ka-le̍k khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê lâng
Judges9:37 Ka-le̍k koh kóng
Judges9:38 Se-pò͘-le̍k tùi i kóng
Judges9:39 Ka-le̍k chiū chhōa Sī-kiàm -lâng chhut--khì
Judges9:40 A-pí-bí-le̍k tui-jip Ka-le̍k
Judges9:41 A-pí-bí-le̍k tòa tī A-ló͘-má; Se-pò͘-le̍k kóaⁿ Ka-le̍k kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī
Judges9:42 Keh-ji̍t
Judges9:43 I chiū chiong i ê pō͘-hā pun-chòe saⁿ tūi
Judges9:44 A-pí-bí-le̍k kap tè i hit-tūi chhiong chìn-chêng
Judges9:45 A-pí-bí-le̍k kui-ji̍t kong-siâⁿ. I kong-chhú hit-ê siâⁿ liáu-āu
Judges9:46 Tòa tī Sī-kiàm siâⁿ-lâu ê lâng thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Judges9:47 Ū lâng kā A-pí-bí-le̍k kóng
Judges9:48 A-pí-bí-le̍k kap tè i ê lâng chiū lóng chiūⁿ Sat-bûn-soaⁿ; A-pí-bí-le̍k chhiú gia̍h pó͘-thâu
Judges9:49 Só͘-ū ê lâng chiū lóng chhò chhiū-oe
Judges9:50 A-pí-bí-le̍k khì kàu Thê-pī-su
Judges9:51 Siâⁿ-lāi ū chi̍t chō kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ-lâu; siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng
Judges9:52 A-pí-bí-le̍k lâi kàu siâⁿ-lâu ê mn̂g-chêng
Judges9:53 Ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng chiong chio̍h-bō ê téng-bīn-chō tàn--lo̍h-khì
Judges9:54 I kóaⁿ-kín kiò thòe i gia̍h kun-khì ê siàu-liân-lâng
Judges9:55 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-pí-bí-le̍k sí
Judges9:56 Án-ni
Judges9:57 Siōng-tè mā pò-èng Sī-kiàm -lâng só͘ chòe lóng-chóng ê pháiⁿ-sū. Iâ-lō͘-pa-le̍k ê kiáⁿ Iok-thán chiù-chó͘ ê ōe lóng chiàu án-ni hoat-seng.
Judges10:1 A-pí-bí-le̍k sí liáu-āu
Judges10:2 I chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê sū-su jī-cha̍p-saⁿ nî. I sí
Judges10:3 Tô-la sí liáu-āu
Judges10:4 I ū saⁿ-cha̍p ê kiáⁿ
Judges10:5 Gâi-ní sí
Judges10:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Judges10:7 Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat siū-khì
Judges10:8 In jiáu-loān koh ap-chè tòa tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng
Judges10:9 A-bûn -lâng koh kè Iok-tàn-hô
Judges10:10 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Judges10:11 Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Judges10:12 Se-tùn -lâng
Judges10:13 Taⁿ lín kèng-jiân pàng-sak góa
Judges10:14 Lín khì ai-kiû lín só͘ kéng ê sîn-bêng
Judges10:15 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Judges10:16 In chiū chiong in tiong-kan ê gōa-pang sîn-bêng tû--khì
Judges10:17 A-bûn -lâng koh chū-chi̍p
Judges10:18 Ki-lia̍t ê kun-peng kap koaⁿ-tiúⁿ chham-siông koat-tēng
Judges11:1 Ki-lia̍t -lâng Iâ-hut-tha sī kiông-béng ê ióng-sū; i ê lāu-bú sī ki-lú
Judges11:2 Ki-lia̍t ê bó͘ mā kā i siⁿ kúi-nā ê kiáⁿ; chiah-ê kiáⁿ tōa-hàn
Judges11:3 Iâ-hut-tha chiū cháu-siám i ê hiaⁿ-tī
Judges11:4 Kè chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan
Judges11:5 A-bûn -lâng kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kau-chiàn ê sî
Judges11:6 In tùi Iâ-hut-tha kóng
Judges11:7 Iâ-hut-tha ìn Ki-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló kóng
Judges11:8 Ki-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló tùi Iâ-hut-tha kóng
Judges11:9 Iâ-hut-tha tùi Ki-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló kóng
Judges11:10 Ki-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló ìn Iâ-hut-tha kóng
Judges11:11 Iâ-hut-tha kap Ki-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló tò--khì
Judges11:12 Iâ-hut-tha chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ A-bûn -lâng ê ông kóng
Judges11:13 A-bûn -lâng ê ông ìn Iâ-hut-tha ê sù-chiá kóng
Judges11:14 Iâ-hut-tha koh chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ A-bûn -lâng ê ông
Judges11:15 kā i kóng
Judges11:16 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Ai-ki̍p chiūⁿ--lâi ê sî
Judges11:17 hit-sî Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Í-tong -ông
Judges11:18 In koh keng-kè khòng-iá
Judges11:19 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chhe lâng khì kìⁿ A-mô͘-lī -lâng Hi-si̍t-pún ê ông Se-hông
Judges11:20 M̄-kú Se-hông bô sìn-jīm Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Judges11:21 Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè chiong Se-hông kap i ê jîn-bîn kau tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chhiú
Judges11:22 In tit-tio̍h A-mô͘-lī -lâng só͘-ū ê thó͘-tōe
Judges11:23 “‘Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h I ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t chiong A-mô͘-lī -lâng kóaⁿ-cháu
Judges11:24 Lí eng-kai khì chiàm-léng lí ê sîn-bêng Ki-boat sù hō͘ lí ê tōe. Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè siúⁿ-sù goán ê tōe
Judges11:25 Lí kiám pí Mô͘-ap -ông Se-phoat ê kiáⁿ Pa-le̍k khah kiông? I m̄-káⁿ kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kè-kàu
Judges11:26 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tòa tī Hi-si̍t-pún
Judges11:27 Góa bô tek-chōe lí
Judges11:28 M̄-kú A-bûn -lâng ê ông m̄-khéng thiaⁿ Iâ-hut-tha phài--khì ê lâng tùi i kóng ê ōe.
Judges11:29 Siōng Chú ê sîn lîm-kàu Iâ-hut-tha
Judges11:30 Iâ-hut-tha tùi Siōng Chú hē-goān
Judges11:31 góa tùi A-bûn -lâng hia pêng-an tò--lâi ê sî
Judges11:32 Iâ-hut-tha khì kap A-bûn -lâng kau-chiàn
Judges11:33 I chiong A-bûn -lâng thiat-tóe phah-pāi
Judges11:34 Iâ-hut-tha tò-lâi Bí-su-pa kàu ka-kī ê chhù
Judges11:35 Iâ-hut-tha khòaⁿ-tio̍h i
Judges11:36 I ìn kóng
Judges11:37 I koh tùi i ê lāu-pē kóng
Judges11:38 Iâ-hut-tha kóng
Judges11:39 Nn̄g ge̍h-ji̍t āu
Judges11:40 Ta̍k-nî ū sì ji̍t
Judges12:1 Í-hoat-liân -lâng tī Sat-hun chū-chi̍p
Judges12:2 Iâ-hut-tha kā in kóng
Judges12:3 góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín bô lâi kiù góa
Judges12:4 Iâ-hut-tha chiū tiàu-chi̍p Ki-lia̍t ê kun-peng kap Í-hoat-liân -lâng kau-chiàn. Ki-lia̍t -lâng phah-pāi Í-hoat-liân -lâng. Í-hoat-liân -lâng bat kóng
Judges12:5 Ki-lia̍t -lâng kò͘-siú Iok-tàn-hô ê tō͘-kháu
Judges12:6 I nā kóng
Judges12:7 Iâ-hut-tha chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê sū-su la̍k nî. Ki-lia̍t -lâng Iâ-hut-tha sí
Judges12:8 Iâ-hut-tha sí liáu-āu
Judges12:9 I ū saⁿ-cha̍p ê kiáⁿ
Judges12:10 Í-pí-chàn sí
Judges12:11 Í-pí-chàn sí liáu-āu
Judges12:12 Í-lûn sí
Judges12:13 Í-lûn sí liáu-āu
Judges12:14 I ū sì-cha̍p ê kiáⁿ
Judges12:15 Pí-la-tùn -lâng Hi-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ A-pek-tùn sí
Judges13:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū; Siōng Chú kā in kau tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê chhiú sì-cha̍p nî.
Judges13:2 Hit-sî
Judges13:3 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng hián-hiān
Judges13:4 Só͘-í lí tio̍h sòe-jī
Judges13:5 Lí beh hoâi-īn siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
Judges13:6 Hū-jîn-lâng khì kā i ê tiōng-hu kóng
Judges13:7 m̄-kú i tùi góa kóng
Judges13:8 Má-ná-a chiū kiû Siōng Chú kóng
Judges13:9 Siōng-tè thiaⁿ Má-ná-a ê khún-kiû. Hū-jîn-lâng chē tī hn̂g--ni̍h ê sî
Judges13:10 Hū-jîn-lâng kóaⁿ-kín cháu-khì pò i ê tiōng-hu
Judges13:11 Má-ná-a kóaⁿ-kín tè i ê bó͘ khì hit-ê lâng hia
Judges13:12 Má-ná-a kóng
Judges13:13 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tùi Má-ná-a kóng
Judges13:14 só͘-ū phû-tô-chhiū chhut ê mi̍h m̄-thang chia̍h
Judges13:15 Má-ná-a tùi Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kóng
Judges13:16 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kā Má-ná-a kóng
Judges13:17 Má-ná-a tùi Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kóng
Judges13:18 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá kā i kóng
Judges13:19 Má-ná-a chiong chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-á kap sò͘-chè
Judges13:20 Hé-iām tùi tôaⁿ-téng chhèng-chiūⁿ thiⁿ ê sî
Judges13:21 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá bô koh chhut-hiān hō͘ Má-ná-a kap i ê bó͘ khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Judges13:22 Má-ná-a kā i ê bó͘ kóng
Judges13:23 I ê bó͘ kā i kóng
Judges13:24 Āu-lâi
Judges13:25 Tī Só-la kap Í-si̍t-tô tiong-kan ê Má-hap-nî Tān
Judges14:1 Chham-sun lo̍h-khì Têng-ná
Judges14:2 Chham-sun tò-khì kā in lāu-pē lāu-bú kóng
Judges14:3 I ê pē-bú kā i kóng
Judges14:4 I ê pē-bú m̄ chai chit-ê tāi-chì chhut tī Siōng Chú
Judges14:5 Chham-sun kap i ê pē-bú lo̍h-khì Têng-ná. Chham-sun kàu Têng-ná ê phû-tô-hn̂g ê sî
Judges14:6 Siōng Chú ê sîn tōa-tōa chhiong-móa Chham-sun; i khang-chhiú kā sai thiah-li̍h
Judges14:7 Chham-sun lo̍h-khì kap hit-ê lú-chú kóng-ōe
Judges14:8 Kè chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan
Judges14:9 I óe bi̍t hē tī chhiú--ni̍h
Judges14:10 I ê lāu-pē lo̍h-khì hit-ê lú-chú hia. Chham-sun chiàu hit só͘-chāi choh sin-lông ê koàn-lē
Judges14:11 Hui-lī-sū -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chham-sun lâi
Judges14:12 Chham-sun kā in kóng
Judges14:13 lín nā ioh bōe chhut--lâi
Judges14:14 Chham-sun chiū kóng
Judges14:15 Kàu tē-sì ji̍t
Judges14:16 Chham-sun ê bó͘ phak tī i ê keng-thâu téng thî-khàu kóng
Judges14:17 Chham-sun ê bó͘ tī i ê bīn-chêng thî-thî-khàu-khàu kàu iàn-se̍k ê tē-chhit ji̍t
Judges14:18 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Judges14:19 Siōng Chú ê sîn tōa-tōa chhiong-móa Chham-sun
Judges14:20 Chham-sun ê bó͘ soah kè hō͘ i ê phōaⁿ-chhōa--ê tiong-kan ê chi̍t ê.
Judges15:1 Kè chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan
Judges15:2 Tiūⁿ-lâng kóng
Judges15:3 Chham-sun kā in kóng
Judges15:4 Chham-sun chiū khì lia̍h saⁿ-pah chiah hô͘-lî
Judges15:5 I chiong hé-pé tiám-to̍h
Judges15:6 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kóng
Judges15:7 Chham-sun tùi Hui-lī-sū -lâng kóng
Judges15:8 Chham-sun chiū chhut tāng-chhiú kong-kek in
Judges15:9 Hui-lī-sū -lâng khì chat-iâⁿ tī Iû-tāi
Judges15:10 Iû-tāi -lâng kóng
Judges15:11 Tùi án-ni
Judges15:12 Iû-tāi -lâng kā i kóng
Judges15:13 In tùi i kóng
