Judges16:1 Chham-sun lâi Ka-sat
Judges16:2 Ū lâng kā Ka-sat -lâng kóng
Judges16:3 Chham-sun khùn kàu pòaⁿ-mî
Judges16:4 Āu-lâi
Judges16:5 Hui-lī-sū -lâng hiah-ê siú-léng khì chhē hit-ê lú-chú
Judges16:6 Tāi-lī-la chiū kā Chham-sun kóng
Judges16:7 Chham-sun ìn kóng
Judges16:8 Hui-lī-sū -lâng hiah-ê siú-léng chiū the̍h chhit tiâu iáu-bē ta ê soh-á hō͘ Tāi-lī-la
Judges16:9 Hit-sî í-keng ū lâng tī i ê lāi-pâng teh tng-tán; i hoah kóng
Judges16:10 Tāi-lī-la kā Chham-sun kóng
Judges16:11 Chham-sun ìn kóng
Judges16:12 Tāi-lī-la chiū ēng sin ê soh-á kā i pa̍k--khí-lâi
Judges16:13 Tāi-lī-la kā Chham-sun kóng
Judges16:14 Tāi-lī-la thàn Chham-sun teh khùn ê sî
Judges16:15 Tāi-lī-la kā i kóng
Judges16:16 Tāi-lī-la ta̍k-ji̍t ēng ōe kā chhui kā pek
Judges16:17 Chham-sun chiū chiong sim-lāi ê pì-bi̍t lóng kā i kóng
Judges16:18 Tāi-lī-la chai-iáⁿ Chham-sun chiong sim-lāi ê pì-bi̍t lóng kā i kóng
Judges16:19 Tāi-lī-la hō͘ Chham-sun khùn tī i ê kha-thâu-u
Judges16:20 Tāi-lī-la hoah kóng
Judges16:21 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kā i lia̍h--khí-lâi
Judges16:22 Chóng-sī i ê thâu-mn̂g thì--khí-lâi liáu-āu
Judges16:23 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê siú-léng chū-chi̍p
Judges16:24 Jîn-bîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chham-sun
Judges16:25 In hui-siông khoài-lo̍k ê sî
Judges16:26 Chham-sun kā khan i ê chhiú ê gín-á kóng
Judges16:27 Hit-sî biō-lāi lâm-lú khoeh kah móa-móa
Judges16:28 Chham-sun tùi Siōng Chú kiû-kiò
Judges16:29 Chham-sun chiū lám thìⁿ biō ê nn̄g ki tiong-thiāu
Judges16:30 Chham-sun kóng
Judges16:31 Chham-sun ê hiaⁿ-tī kap i lāu-pē ê chhin-cho̍k
Judges17:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Bí-ka
Judges17:2 I tùi lāu-bú kóng
Judges17:3 I chiū chiong hit chheng-it tè gûn hêng i ê lāu-bú. Āu-lâi i ê lāu-bú kóng
Judges17:4 Bí-ka koh chiong hiah-ê gûn hêng i ê lāu-bú. I ê lāu-bú chiū ēng nn̄g-pah tè gûn hō͘ phah-kim sai-hū
Judges17:5 Bí-ka ū chi̍t keng sîn-biō
Judges17:6 Hit-sî
Judges17:7 Iû-tāi ê Pek-lī-hêng ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng; i sī Lī-bī -lâng
Judges17:8 I lī-khui Iû-tāi ê Pek-lī-hêng -siâⁿ
Judges17:9 Bí-ka mn̄g i kóng
Judges17:10 Bí-ka kā i kóng
Judges17:11 Lī-bī -lâng tah-èng kap Bí-ka chòe-hé tòa. Bí-ka chiong chit-ê siàu-liân-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe ka-kī ê kiáⁿ.
Judges17:12 Bí-ka kā Lī-bī -lâng siat-li̍p chòe chè-si
Judges17:13 Bí-ka kóng
Judges18:1 Hit-sî
Judges18:2 Tān ê lâng tùi Só-la kap Í-si̍t-tô
Judges18:3 In tī Bí-ka ê chhù hù-kūn jīn-tio̍h hit-ê siàu-liân Lī-bī -lâng ê kháu-im
Judges18:4 I kóng
Judges18:5 In kā i kóng
Judges18:6 Chè-si kā in kóng
Judges18:7 Hit gō͘ ê lâng chiū chhut-hoat
Judges18:8 In tò-lâi kàu tī Só-la kap Í-si̍t-tô tiong-kan kâng chi-cho̍k ê lâng hia; hiah-ê lâng mn̄g in kóng
Judges18:9 In ìn kóng
Judges18:10 Lín kàu hia
Judges18:11 Tùi án-ni
Judges18:12 In tī Iû-tāi ê Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm sai-pêng chat-iâⁿ; só͘-í hit-ê só͘-chāi kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu kiò-chòe Má-hap-nî Tān.
Judges18:13 In tùi hia keng-kè Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu lâi kàu Bí-ka in tau.
Judges18:14 Hit gō͘ ê khì cheng-thàm La-ek tōe-khu ê lâng
Judges18:15 In chiū oat-khì Bí-ka ê chhù
Judges18:16 Tān chi-cho̍k hit la̍k-pah ê tòa kun-khì ê lâng lóng khiā tī mn̂g-kháu.
Judges18:17 Cheng-thàm hit-ê tōe ê gō͘ ê lâng ji̍p--khì
Judges18:18 Hit gō͘ ê lâng ji̍p-khì Bí-ka ê chhù
Judges18:19 In kā i kóng
Judges18:20 Chè-si chin hoaⁿ-hí
Judges18:21 In chiū chhut-hoat lī-khui hia
Judges18:22 Lī-khui Bí-ka ê chhù í-keng chin hn̄g
Judges18:23 In tōa-siaⁿ hoah Tān ê lâng. Tān ê lâng oa̍t-thâu
Judges18:24 I kóng
Judges18:25 Tān ê lâng kā Bí-ka kóng
Judges18:26 Tān ê lâng chiū chòe in khì. Bí-ka khòaⁿ-tio̍h in pí i khah kiông
Judges18:27 Tān ê lâng tòa Bí-ka chō ê sîn-siōng kap i ê chè-si lâi kàu La-ek
Judges18:28 Chit-ê siâⁿ tī Pek Lī-ha̍p Soaⁿ-kok hù-kūn
Judges18:29 Tān ê lâng chiū tiông-kiàn chit-ê siâⁿ
Judges18:30 Tān ê lâng chiū tī hia ūi ka-kī chhāi hit-ê tiau-khek ê sîn-siōng. Mô͘-se ê sun
Judges18:31 Siōng-tè ê hōe-bō͘ tī Sī-lô hit-tōaⁿ kî-kan
Judges19:1 Í-sek-lia̍t bô ông ê sî
Judges19:2 Chit-ê sòe-î siū-khì i ê tiōng-hu
Judges19:3 I ê tiōng-hu tòa chi̍t ê lô͘-po̍k kap nn̄g chiah lû chhut-hoat khì chhē i
Judges19:4 Hit-ê tiūⁿ-lâng kā i lâu--lo̍h-lâi; i chiū tī hia tòa saⁿ ji̍t
Judges19:5 Kàu tē-sì ji̍t
Judges19:6 Nn̄g ê lâng chiū chē--lo̍h-lâi
Judges19:7 Hit-ê lâng khí-lâi beh chhut-hoat
Judges19:8 Kàu tē-gō͘ ji̍t
Judges19:9 Hit-ê lâng kap i ê sòe-î
Judges19:10 Hit-ê lâng m̄-ài koh hioh chi̍t mî
Judges19:11 In kiâⁿ kūn Iâ-pò͘-su ê sî
Judges19:12 I ê chú-lâng kóng
Judges19:13 I koh kā lô͘-po̍k kóng
Judges19:14 In chiū kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ; beh kàu Piān-ngá-bín ê Ki-pí-a ê sî
Judges19:15 In chiū oat--ji̍p-khì
Judges19:16 Ji̍t àm
Judges19:17 Hit-ê lāu-lâng gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chhut-gōa-lâng tī siâⁿ-lāi ê kóng-tiûⁿ
Judges19:18 I ìn kóng
Judges19:19 Góa ū chháu-liāu hō͘ lû
Judges19:20 Lāu-lâng kóng
Judges19:21 I chiū chhōa in khì i ê chhù
Judges19:22 In tú-teh hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k ê sî
Judges19:23 Hit-ê chhù-chú chhut--lâi
Judges19:24 Góa ū chi̍t ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Judges19:25 M̄-kú hiah-ê lâng m̄ thiaⁿ hit-ê lāu-lâng ê ōe; hit-ê Lī-bī -lâng chiū lia̍h i ê sòe-î kā i sak chhut-khì gōa-bīn hō͘ in. In chiū kā i kiông-kan
Judges19:26 Thiⁿ phú-kng ê sî
Judges19:27 I ê tiōng-hu thàu-chá khí--lâi
Judges19:28 I tùi i ê sòe-î kóng
Judges19:29 Tńg-khì kàu in chhù
Judges19:30 Só͘-ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê lâng lóng kóng
Judges20:1 Tùi án-ni
Judges20:2 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k ê léng-siù lóng lâi khiā tī Siōng-tè chú-bîn ê hōe-tiong; gia̍h-to ê pō͘-peng ū sì-cha̍p-bān lâng.
Judges20:3 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng lâi tī Bí-su-pa. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng mn̄g
Judges20:4 Hit-ê Lī-bī -lâng
Judges20:5 Ki-pí-a -lâng khí-lâi kong-kek góa
Judges20:6 Góa chiū chiong góa ê sòe-î chhiat-chòe chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè
Judges20:7 Lín só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tio̍h chham-siông
Judges20:8 Só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn lóng khí--lâi
Judges20:9 Taⁿ
Judges20:10 Goán beh tī Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k ê tiong-kan
Judges20:11 Tùi án-ni
Judges20:12 Í-sek-lia̍t só͘-ū ê chi-cho̍k phài lâng khì Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k khiā-khí ê ta̍k só͘-chāi
Judges20:13 Taⁿ lín tio̍h chiong Ki-pí-a hiah-ê húi-lūi kau--chhut-lâi
Judges20:14 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng lóng tùi in ka-kī ê siâⁿ chhut--lâi
Judges20:15 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng tùi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ tiàu-chi̍p nn̄g-bān la̍k-chheng ê gia̍h-to ê peng-sū
Judges20:16 Choân-pō͘ ê kun-tūi tiong-kan ū chhit-pah ê te̍k-soán ê cheng-peng; in koàn-sì ēng tò-chhiú
Judges20:17 Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k
Judges20:18 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū khí--lâi
Judges20:19 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thàu-chá khí--lâi
Judges20:20 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut--lâi
Judges20:21 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng mā tùi Ki-pí-a chhut--lâi; hit-ji̍t
Judges20:22 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khì kàu Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Tē-jī ji̍t
Judges20:25 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng mā tī hit-ji̍t tùi Ki-pí-a chhut-lâi gêng-chiàn
Judges20:26 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Judges20:27 Hit-sî
Judges20:28 
Judges20:29 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū phài peng tī Ki-pí-a ê sì-ûi bâi-ho̍k.
Judges20:30 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t
Judges20:31 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chhut-khì gêng-chiàn
Judges20:32 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng kóng
Judges20:33 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chú-le̍k-kun lâi Pa-le̍k Tha-má têng-sin pâi-tīn; Í-sek-lia̍t bâi-ho̍k ê peng-sū tùi Ki-pí-a ê sai-pêng chhiong--chhut-lâi.
Judges20:34 Choân-pō͘ ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ū chi̍t-bān ê cheng-peng
Judges20:35 Siōng Chú hō͘ Piān-ngá-bín -lâng thâi-su; hit-ji̍t
Judges20:36 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chai in í-keng thâi-su. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiat-thè
Judges20:37 Bâi-ho̍k ê peng chin kín chhiong-ji̍p Ki-pí-a
Judges20:38 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê chú-le̍k-kun kap bâi-ho̍k ê peng ū iok-tēng chi̍t ê sìn-hō
Judges20:39 in tio̍h oa̍t-tńg-sin hoán-kong. Tāi-seng
Judges20:40 Ian-thiāu tùi siâⁿ-lāi chhèng koân ê sî
Judges20:41 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh oa̍t-tńg-sin hoán-kong
Judges20:42 In tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê bīn-chêng oa̍t-tńg-sin ǹg khòng-iá ê lō͘ tô-cháu; m̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tui-jip in chin óa
Judges20:43 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng pau-ûi Piān-ngá-bín -lâng
Judges20:44 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng sí chi̍t-bān poeh-chheng ê ióng-sū.
Judges20:45 Kî-tha ê lâng oa̍t-tńg-sin ǹg khòng-iá tô-cháu
Judges20:46 Hit-ji̍t
Judges20:47 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng iáu chhun la̍k-pah ê chiàn-sū
Judges20:48 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng koh oa̍t-tńg kong-kek Piān-ngá-bín -lâng
Judges21:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Bí-su-pa bat chiù-chōa kóng
Judges21:2 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lâi kàu Pek-te̍k-lī
Judges21:3 kóng
Judges21:4 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
Judges21:5 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
Judges21:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ūi-tio̍h in ê tông-pau Piān-ngá-bín -lâng sim kan-khó͘
Judges21:7 Lán í-keng kí Siōng Chú chiù-chōa
Judges21:8 In koh kóng
Judges21:9 In-ūi in tiám-sǹg ê sî
Judges21:10 Hōe-chiòng chiū chhe chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng ê ióng-sū
Judges21:11 Lín tio̍h án-ni chòe: Tio̍h chiong só͘-ū ê ta-po͘-lâng
Judges21:12 In tī Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí -lâng tiong-kan tú-tio̍h sì-pah ê iáu-bē kiat-hun ê chāi-sek-lú
Judges21:13 Choân-thé hōe-chiòng chiū phài lâng khì kap Lîm-bûn-giâm ê Piān-ngá-bín -lâng kóng-hô.
Judges21:14 Hit-sî
Judges21:15 Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn ūi-tio̍h Piān-ngá-bín -lâng sim kan-khó͘; in-ūi Siōng Chú hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t ê chi-cho̍k khih chi̍t kak.
Judges21:16 Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló kóng
Judges21:17 Koh kóng
Judges21:18 M̄-kú lán bōe-ēng-tit chiong ka-kī ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ in chòe bó͘
Judges21:19 In koh kóng
Judges21:20 In chiū kà Piān-ngá-bín -lâng
Judges21:21 nā khòaⁿ-tio̍h in ê cha-bó͘ gín-á chhut-lâi thiàu-bú
Judges21:22 In ê lāu-pē á-sī hiaⁿ-tī nā lâi kā goán khòng-gī
Judges21:23 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chiū chiàu án-ni chòe
Judges21:24 Siâng-sî
Judges21:25 Hit-sî
Ruth1:1 Sū-su tī-lí Í-sek-lia̍t ê sî-tāi
Ruth1:2 Chit-ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Í-lī-bí-le̍k
Ruth1:3 Ná-o-bí ê tiōng-hu Í-lī-bí-le̍k sí--khì
Ruth1:4 Hit nn̄g ê kiáⁿ chhōa Mô͘-ap lú-chú chòe bó͘
Ruth1:5 Má-lûn kap Ki-liân nn̄g ê lâng mā sí--khì
Ruth1:6 Ná-o-bí iáu tī Mô͘-ap ê sî
Ruth1:7 I chiū tùi i tòa ê só͘-chāi chhut-hoat
Ruth1:8 Tī lō͘-tiong Ná-o-bí tùi nn̄g ê sin-pū kóng
Ruth1:9 Goān Siōng Chú sù-hok lín
Ruth1:10 tùi i kóng
Ruth1:11 Ná-o-bí kóng
Ruth1:12 Cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ah
Ruth1:13 lín kiám ōe-tàng tán in tōa-hàn
Ruth1:14 In koh tōa-siaⁿ háu. Ngô͘-ní-pa chiū kā i ê ta-ke chim
Ruth1:15 Ná-o-bí chiū kóng
Ruth1:16 Lō͘-tek ìn kóng
Ruth1:17 Lí sí tī tó-ūi
Ruth1:18 Ná-o-bí khòaⁿ Lō͘-tek kian-koat beh tè i
Ruth1:19 In nn̄g lâng chiū kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ
Ruth1:20 I kā in kóng
Ruth1:21 Góa móa-móa chhut--khì
Ruth1:22 Che chiū-sī Ná-o-bí kap i ê Mô͘-ap sin-pū Lō͘-tek tùi Mô͘-ap -tōe tńg--lâi ê keng-kè. In tī khai-sí siu-koah tōa-be̍h ê sî lâi kàu Pek-lī-hêng.
Ruth2:1 Ná-o-bí ū chi̍t ê chhin-chiâⁿ
Ruth2:2 Mô͘-ap ê lú-chú Lō͘-tek tùi Ná-o-bí kóng
Ruth2:3 I chiū khì hn̂g--ni̍h
Ruth2:4 Tú hit-sî
Ruth2:5 Pho-a-su mn̄g siu-koah ê kang-thâu kóng
Ruth2:6 Siu-koah ê kang-thâu ìn kóng
Ruth2:7 I ū kóng
Ruth2:8 Pho-a-su chiū tùi Lō͘-tek kóng
Ruth2:9 Khòaⁿ kang-lâng tī tó chi̍t khu hn̂g teh siu-koah
Ruth2:10 Lō͘-tek chiū phak--lo̍h-khì
Ruth2:11 Pho-a-su ìn i kóng
Ruth2:12 Goān Siōng Chú chiàu lí só͘ chòe--ê pò-tap lí. Lí lâi Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè si̍t-kó͘-ē pī-lān
Ruth2:13 Lō͘-tek ìn kóng
Ruth2:14 Chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî
Ruth2:15 I peh--khí-lâi
Ruth2:16 Lín sīm-chì tio̍h tùi be̍h-khún tiong thiu chi̍t-kóa chhut-lâi hō͘ i khioh
Ruth2:17 Lō͘-tek chiū tī hn̂g--ni̍h khioh be̍h-sūi
Ruth2:18 I chiū phāiⁿ ji̍p-siâⁿ
Ruth2:19 I ê ta-ke tùi i kóng
Ruth2:20 Ná-o-bí tùi sin-pū kóng
Ruth2:21 Mô͘-ap ê lú-chú Lō͘-tek kóng
Ruth2:22 Ná-o-bí chiū tùi i ê sin-pū Lō͘-tek kóng
Ruth2:23 Lō͘-tek chiū tè Pho-a-su ê lú-kang chòe-hé khioh ngó͘-kok
Ruth3:1 Lō͘-tek ê ta-ke Ná-o-bí kā i kóng
Ruth3:2 Lí ōe-kì--tit-bô
Ruth3:3 Lí tio̍h sóe seng-khu
Ruth3:4 I tó lo̍h-khì khùn ê sî
Ruth3:5 Lō͘-tek ìn i kóng
Ruth3:6 I chiū lo̍h-khì ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
Ruth3:7 Pho-a-su chia̍h pá lim soah
Ruth3:8 Pòaⁿ-mî
Ruth3:9 I mn̄g kóng
Ruth3:10 I kóng
Ruth3:11 Taⁿ
Ruth3:12 Góa khak-si̍t sī lí ê chì-chhin
Ruth3:13 Kim-mî lí lâu tiàm chia
Ruth3:14 Lō͘-tek chiū tī i ê kha-piⁿ khùn
Ruth3:15 Pho-a-su kóng
Ruth3:16 Lō͘-tek lâi kàu i ê ta-ke hia. Ná-o-bí mn̄g i kóng
Ruth3:17 Lō͘-tek kóng
Ruth3:18 Ná-o-bí chiū kóng
Ruth4:1 Pho-a-su lâi siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu
Ruth4:2 Pho-a-su koh chhiáⁿ siâⁿ-lāi cha̍p ê tiúⁿ-ló lâi
Ruth4:3 Pho-a-su chiū tùi chit-ê chì-chhin kóng
Ruth4:4 Góa siūⁿ góa tio̍h kā lí kóng
Ruth4:5 Pho-a-su kóng
Ruth4:6 Chit-ê chì-chhin chiū kóng
Ruth4:7 Chiàu Í-sek-lia̍t kó͘-chá ê hong-sio̍k
Ruth4:8 Hit-ê chì-chhin chiū kā Pho-a-su kóng
Ruth4:9 Jiân-āu
Ruth4:10 Góa mā beh chhōa Má-lûn ê bó͘ Mô͘-ap lú-chú Lō͘-tek chòe bó͘
Ruth4:11 Só͘-ū tī siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu ê lâng kap chèng tiúⁿ-ló lóng kóng
Ruth4:12 Goān lí ê ke
Ruth4:13 Pho-a-su chiū chhōa Lō͘-tek chòe bó͘. Pho-a-su kap i tâng-pâng; Siōng Chú hō͘ i hoâi-īn
Ruth4:14 Hū-jîn-lâng lóng lâi kā Ná-o-bí kóng
Ruth4:15 Goān i hôe-ho̍k lí ê goân-khì
Ruth4:16 Ná-o-bí chiū phō chit-ê gín-á tī heng-chêng
Ruth4:17 Chhù-piⁿ ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng
Ruth4:18 Che sī Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi: Hoat-le̍k-su siⁿ Hi-su-lûn
Ruth4:19 Hi-su-lûn siⁿ Lân
Ruth4:20 A-bí-ná-ta̍t siⁿ Ná-sūn
Ruth4:21 Sat-bûn siⁿ Pho-a-su
Ruth4:22 Gô-pī-tek siⁿ Iâ-se
1Samuel1:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Í-lī-ka-ná; i tòa tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu
1Samuel1:2 Í-lī-ka-ná ū nn̄g ê bó͘
1Samuel1:3 Í-lī-ka-ná ta̍k-nî tùi i ê pún-siâⁿ chiūⁿ-khì Sī-lô kèng-pài Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
1Samuel1:4 Í-lī-ka-ná ta̍k-piàn hiàn-chè
1Samuel1:5 M̄-kú Í-lī-ka-ná hō͘ Hap-ná khah hó-hūn
1Samuel1:6 In-ūi Siōng Chú hō͘ i bô siⁿ-kiáⁿ
1Samuel1:7 Chit-khoán tāi-chì ta̍k-nî teh hoat-seng. Ta̍k-piàn Hap-ná chiūⁿ-khì Siōng Chú ê chhù ê sî
1Samuel1:8 I ê tiōng-hu Í-lī-ka-ná kā i kóng
1Samuel1:9 In tī Sī-lô lim-chia̍h liáu-āu
1Samuel1:10 Hap-ná ê sim kan-khó͘
1Samuel1:11 Hap-ná hē-goān kóng
1Samuel1:12 Hap-ná tùi Siōng Chú kî-tó bô-thêng
1Samuel1:13 Hap-ná chēng-chēng kî-kiû
1Samuel1:14 Í-lī kā i kóng
1Samuel1:15 Hap-ná ìn kóng
1Samuel1:16 M̄-thang khòaⁿ lí ê lú-pī chòe pháiⁿ cha-bó͘. Góa kî-tó bô-thêng
1Samuel1:17 Í-lī ìn i kóng
1Samuel1:18 Hap-ná kóng
1Samuel1:19 Keh-ji̍t in chin chá khí--lâi
1Samuel1:20 Hap-ná chiū hoâi-īn
1Samuel1:21 Í-lī-ka-ná kap in choân-ke lóng chiūⁿ-khì Sī-lô
1Samuel1:22 M̄-kú Hap-ná bô chiūⁿ--khì
1Samuel1:23 I ê tiōng-hu Í-lī-ka-ná kā i kóng
1Samuel1:24 Gín-á tn̄g-lin liáu-āu
1Samuel1:25 In chiū thâi hit-chiah gû-káng
1Samuel1:26 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
1Samuel1:27 Góa tùi Siōng Chú kiû chit-ê gín-á
1Samuel1:28 só͘-í góa chiong chit-ê gín-á hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú
1Samuel2:1 Hap-ná kî-tó kóng: Góa ê sim in-ūi Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí; góa ê thâu in-ūi Siōng Chú gia̍h-koân-koân; góa ê chhùi káⁿ ǹg tùi-te̍k khoa-iāu
1Samuel2:2 Chí-ū Siōng Chú chì-sèng
1Samuel2:3 Lâng m̄-thang chū-ko kóng kiau-ngō͘ ê ōe; m̄-thang chū-khoa kóng tōa-ōe
1Samuel2:4 Ióng-sū ê keng í-keng siū at-chi̍h; loán-jio̍k ê lâng tit-tio̍h khùi-la̍t.
1Samuel2:5 Hù-chiok--ê tio̍h hō͘ lâng chhiàⁿ chiah ū thang chia̍h; iau-gō--ê bô koh iau. Bōe seng-io̍k--ê siⁿ chhit ê; ū chin chōe kiáⁿ--ê kàu-bé bô chhun pòaⁿ-ê.
1Samuel2:6 Siōng Chú hō͘ lâng sí
1Samuel2:7 Siōng Chú hō͘ lâng sàn-chhiah
1Samuel2:8 I tùi tîn-ai thê-poa̍t khùn-khó͘ ê lâng
1Samuel2:9 I pó-siú I tiong-sìn chú-bîn ê kha-pō͘
1Samuel2:10 Te̍k-tùi Siōng Chú ê lâng ōe siū phah-chhùi; I beh tùi thiⁿ ēng lûi kòng in. Siōng Chú beh sím-phòaⁿ choân sè-kài. I beh sù khùi-la̍t hō͘ I ê kun-ông
1Samuel2:11 Í-lī-ka-ná tò-khì i tī La-má ê chhù. Gín-á Sat-bó-ní siū chè-si Í-lī chí-tō
1Samuel2:12 Í-lī nn̄g ê kiáⁿ sī húi-lūi
1Samuel2:13 bô siú chè-si chhú hiàn-chè ê bah ê kui-tēng. Lâng hiàn chè-bah teh chú ê sî
1Samuel2:14 chhah-ji̍p e-á tiáⁿ-á
1Samuel2:15 M̄-nā án-ni
1Samuel2:16 Hiàn-chè ê lâng nā kóng
1Samuel2:17 Í-lī nn̄g ê kiáⁿ ê chōe tī Siōng Chú gán-tiong hui-siông giâm-tiōng
1Samuel2:18 Hit-sî Sat-bó-ní iáu sòe-hàn
1Samuel2:19 I ê lāu-bú ta̍k-nî kā i chòe chi̍t niá sòe-niá gōa-phàu
1Samuel2:20 Í-lī kā Í-lī-ka-ná kap i ê bó͘ chiok-hok
1Samuel2:21 Siōng Chú sù-hok Hap-ná
1Samuel2:22 Í-lī í-keng chin lāu
1Samuel2:23 Í-lī kā in kóng
1Samuel2:24 Góa ê kiáⁿ ah
1Samuel2:25 Lâng tek-chōe lâng
1Samuel2:26 Gín-á Sat-bó-ní ji̍t-ji̍t tōa-hàn
1Samuel2:27 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel2:28 Góa tùi Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k kéng A-lûn ê ke chòe góa ê chè-si
1Samuel2:29 Góa só͘ bēng-lēng tī góa ê chhù hiàn ê seng-lé chè-mi̍h
1Samuel2:30 “Só͘-í Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè kóng
1Samuel2:31 Khòaⁿ
1Samuel2:32 Tī góa sù-hok hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê sî
1Samuel2:33 Góa ōe kā lí lâu chi̍t ê hō͘-tāi tī góa ê chè-tôaⁿ ho̍k-sāi
1Samuel2:34 Lí nn̄g ê kiáⁿ Hô-hut-nî kap Hui-nî-hap ōe kâng chi̍t ji̍t sí
1Samuel2:35 Góa ōe ūi ka-kī siat-li̍p chi̍t ê tiong-si̍t ê chè-si
1Samuel2:36 Lí ê hō͘-tāi só͘ chhun ê lâng lóng ōe tùi i kiû-khit thó-chia̍h
1Samuel3:1 Gín-á Sat-bó-ní siū Í-lī kàu-tō ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú. Tng-sî chin hán-tit ū tùi Siōng Chú lâi ê sìn-sit
1Samuel3:2 Ū chi̍t mî
1Samuel3:3 Sat-bó-ní tī khǹg Siōng-tè iok-kūi ê tiān-lāi mā teh khùn; thiⁿ iáu-bē kng
1Samuel3:4 Siōng Chú kiò Sat-bó-ní; Sat-bó-ní ìn kóng
1Samuel3:5 I chiū cháu-khì Í-lī hia
1Samuel3:6 Siōng Chú koh kiò Sat-bó-ní; Sat-bó-ní khí--lâi
1Samuel3:7 Hit-chūn Sat-bó-ní m̄ bat Siōng Chú; Siōng Chú ê ōe iáu-bē tùi i khé-sī.
1Samuel3:8 Siōng Chú tē-saⁿ piàn kiò Sat-bó-ní. Sat-bó-ní khí--lâi
1Samuel3:9 Í-lī chiū kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel3:10 Siōng Chú koh lâi khiā--teh
1Samuel3:11 Siōng Chú kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel3:12 Tī hit-ji̍t
1Samuel3:13 Góa ū kā i kóng
1Samuel3:14 Só͘-í góa tùi Í-lī ê ke chiù-chōa
1Samuel3:15 Sat-bó-ní khùn kàu thiⁿ-kng
1Samuel3:16 Í-lī kiò Sat-bó-ní
1Samuel3:17 Í-lī kóng
1Samuel3:18 Sat-bó-ní chiū chiong hiah-ê ōe lóng kā Í-lī kóng
1Samuel3:19 Sat-bó-ní chiām-chiām tōa-hàn; Siōng Chú kap i tông-chāi
1Samuel3:20 Tùi Tān kàu Pia̍t-sī-pa
1Samuel3:21 Siōng Chú kè-sio̍k tī Sī-lô hián-hiān. Siōng Chú tī Sī-lô ēng I ê ōe khé-sī Sat-bó-ní.
1Samuel4:1 Sat-bó-ní ê ōe thoân-piàn Í-sek-lia̍t. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut-khì beh kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng kau-chiàn; in tī Í-piān Í-siā hù-kūn chat-iâⁿ
1Samuel4:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng pâi-tīn kong-kek Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Samuel4:3 Í-sek-lia̍t kun-tūi tò-lâi iâⁿ-lāi
1Samuel4:4 In chiū phài lâng khì Sī-lô
1Samuel4:5 Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi lâi kàu iâⁿ-tiong ê sî
1Samuel4:6 Hui-lī-sū -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h hán-hoah ê siaⁿ
1Samuel4:7 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
1Samuel4:8 Lán chhám ah
1Samuel4:9 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ah
1Samuel4:10 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chiū chhut-chiàn
1Samuel4:11 Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi hō͘ Hui-lī-sū -lâng chhiúⁿ--khì; Í-lī nn̄g ê kiáⁿ Hô-hut-nî kap Hui-nî-hap mā lóng sí.
1Samuel4:12 Kâng hit-ji̍t
1Samuel4:13 I kàu ê sî
1Samuel4:14 Í-lī thiaⁿ-tio̍h âu-kiò ê siaⁿ
1Samuel4:15 Hit-sî Í-lī í-keng káu-cha̍p-poeh hè
1Samuel4:16 Hit-ê lâng kā Í-lī kóng
1Samuel4:17 Pò siau-sit--ê ìn kóng
1Samuel4:18 Hit-ê lâng chi̍t-ē kóng-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi
1Samuel4:19 Í-lī ê sin-pū
1Samuel4:20 I teh-beh sí ê sî
1Samuel4:21 I kā gín-á hō-miâ kiò “ Í-ka-phok ”
1Samuel4:22 I koh kóng
1Samuel5:1 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kā Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi chhiúⁿ--khì
1Samuel5:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kā Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi ūn-khì Tāi-kún ê biō
1Samuel5:3 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá A-si̍t-tu̍t -lâng khí--lâi
1Samuel5:4 Koh keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
1Samuel5:5 In-ūi án-ni
1Samuel5:6 Siōng Chú ê chhiú tāng-tāng phah A-si̍t-tu̍t -lâng kap chiu-ûi ê jîn-bîn
1Samuel5:7 A-si̍t-tu̍t -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h án-ni chiū kóng
1Samuel5:8 A-si̍t-tu̍t -lâng chiū phài lâng chhiáⁿ Hui-lī-sū ê siú-léng lâi
1Samuel5:9 Iok-kūi chi̍t-ē ūn kàu hia
1Samuel5:10 In chiū chiong Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi sàng-khì Í-kek-lûn. Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi chi̍t-ē kàu Í-kek-lûn
1Samuel5:11 In chiū phài lâng khì chhiáⁿ Hui-lī-sū lóng-chóng ê siú-léng lâi
1Samuel5:12 Bô sí ê lâng lóng siⁿ to̍k-chhng; choân-siâⁿ thî-khàu ê siaⁿ thàu kàu thiⁿ-téng.
1Samuel6:1 Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi thêng-liû tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê tōe chhit ge̍h-ji̍t kú.
1Samuel6:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kiò hiah-ê chè-si kap pok-kòa--ê lâi mn̄g
1Samuel6:3 In kóng
1Samuel6:4 Hui-lī-sū -lâng mn̄g
1Samuel6:5 Lín tio̍h chō to̍k-chhng ê bô͘-hêng
1Samuel6:6 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ beh chhin-chhiūⁿ Ai-ki̍p -lâng kap Ai-ki̍p -ông hiah-ni̍h ngī-sim? Siōng-tè kiám m̄-sī giâm-giâm tùi-hù in
1Samuel6:7 Hiān-chāi
1Samuel6:8 koh chiong Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi hē tī chhia-téng
1Samuel6:9 Lín tio̍h chù-ì khòaⁿ
1Samuel6:10 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chiū chiàu án-ni chòe. In chiong nn̄g chiah iáu-teh chhī-lin ê gû-bú thò tī hit-tâi chhia
1Samuel6:11 koh kā Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi
1Samuel6:12 Gû-bú ǹg Pek Sī-be̍k ê tōa-lō͘ ti̍t-ti̍t kiâⁿ--lo̍h-khì
1Samuel6:13 Hit-sî Pek Sī-be̍k -lâng tī soaⁿ-kok teh siu-koah be̍h-á; in gia̍h-thâu chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ
1Samuel6:14 Chhia kàu Pek Sī-be̍k -lâng Iok-su-a ê hn̂g
1Samuel6:15 Lī-bī -lâng chiong Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi
1Samuel6:16 Hui-lī-sū -lâng gō͘ ê siú-léng lóng ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
1Samuel6:17 Hui-lī-sū -lâng tòa gō͘ ê kim to̍k-chhng chòe pê-chōe-chè hêng hō͘ Siōng Chú; chi̍t ê ūi-tio̍h A-si̍t-tu̍t -siâⁿ
1Samuel6:18 Kim niáu-chhú ê sò͘-bo̍k chiàu Hui-lī-sū gō͘ ê siú-léng só͘ koán siat-hông ê siâⁿ kap bô siat-hông ê chng-siā lâi tēng. In hē Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi hit-tè tōa chio̍h
1Samuel6:19 Siōng Chú phah-sí chhit-cha̍p ê Pek Sī-be̍k -lâng
1Samuel6:20 Pek Sī-be̍k -lâng kóng
1Samuel6:21 In chiū chhe lâng khì kìⁿ Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm -lâng
1Samuel7:1 Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm -lâng chiū lâi
1Samuel7:2 Iok-kūi lâu tī Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm ū jī-cha̍p nî kú; Í-sek-lia̍t choân-ke thòng-hóe kui-ǹg Siōng Chú.
1Samuel7:3 Sat-bó-ní tùi Í-sek-lia̍t choân-ke kóng
1Samuel7:4 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiū tû-khì ta̍k só͘-chāi ê Pa-le̍k kap A-su-tha-lio̍k lú-sîn
1Samuel7:5 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel7:6 In chiū chū-chi̍p tī Bí-su-pa
1Samuel7:7 Hui-lī-sū -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Bí-su-pa chū-chi̍p
1Samuel7:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel7:9 Sat-bó-ní chiū ēng chi̍t chiah chia̍h-lin ê iûⁿ-á chòe sio-hòa-chè hiàn hō͘ Siōng Chú; Sat-bó-ní thòe Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiû-kiò Siōng Chú; Siōng Chú ū thiaⁿ i ê kî-tó.
1Samuel7:10 Sat-bó-ní teh hiàn sio-hòa-chè ê sî
1Samuel7:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi Bí-su-pa chhut--lâi
1Samuel7:12 Sat-bó-ní tī Bí-su-pa kap Siān ê tiong-kan chhāi chi̍t tè chio̍h
1Samuel7:13 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
1Samuel7:14 Tùi Í-kek-lûn kàu Ka-te̍k
1Samuel7:15 Sat-bó-ní it-seng chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê sū-su.
1Samuel7:16 Ta̍k-nî i sûn-sī Pek-te̍k-lī
1Samuel7:17 I sûn-sī liáu-āu lóng ōe tò-khì i ê kò͘-hiong La-má
1Samuel8:1 Sat-bó-ní í-keng lāu
1Samuel8:2 Tōa-kiáⁿ Iok-ní kap tē-jī kiáⁿ A-pí-ngá lóng tī Pia̍t-sī-pa chòe sū-su.
1Samuel8:3 M̄-kú in bô o̍h in lāu-pē ê bô͘-iūⁿ; in tham put-gī-chi-châi
1Samuel8:4 Tùi án-ni
1Samuel8:5 kā i kóng
1Samuel8:6 Sat-bó-ní tùi in iau-kiû chi̍t ê ông ê sū bô hoaⁿ-hí. I chiū tùi Siōng Chú kî-tó.
1Samuel8:7 Siōng Chú tùi Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel8:8 Tùi góa chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p kàu kin-á-ji̍t
1Samuel8:9 Taⁿ in ê iau-kiû lí tio̍h chiap-siū
1Samuel8:10 Sat-bó-ní chiong Siōng Chú ê ōe lóng kā hiah-ê tùi i iau-kiû chi̍t ê ông ê jîn-bîn kóng
1Samuel8:11 “Chiong-lâi lín ê ông ōe án-ni koán-hat lín: I ōe tiàu lín ê kiáⁿ khì choh-peng
1Samuel8:12 I ōe phài lâng chòe koaⁿ-tiúⁿ
1Samuel8:13 I ōe tiàu lín ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kā i chè-chō phang-iû
1Samuel8:14 I ōe kā lín siōng-hó ê chhân-hn̂g
1Samuel8:15 Lín ê ngó͘-kok kap phû-tô
1Samuel8:16 I ōe lia̍h lín ê lô͘-po̍k
1Samuel8:17 Lín ê iûⁿ-kûn
1Samuel8:18 Hit-sî
1Samuel8:19 M̄-kú jîn-bîn m̄ thiaⁿ Sat-bó-ní ê ōe
1Samuel8:20 Án-ni goán chiah ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ pa̍t-kok ū ka-kī ê ông kā goán tī-lí
1Samuel8:21 Sat-bó-ní thiaⁿ-tio̍h jîn-bîn ê ōe liáu-āu
1Samuel8:22 Siōng Chú tùi Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel9:1 Ū chi̍t ê Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k ê lâng
1Samuel9:2 I ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
1Samuel9:3 Sò-lô ê lāu-pē Ki-sū phah-m̄-kìⁿ kúi-nā chiah lû-bú. Ki-sū kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel9:4 In kiâⁿ-thàu Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu
1Samuel9:5 In kàu So͘-hut tōe-khu ê sî
1Samuel9:6 Po̍k-jîn kóng
1Samuel9:7 Sò-lô kā po̍k-jîn kóng
1Samuel9:8 Po̍k-jîn koh ìn Sò-lô
1Samuel9:9 (Í-chêng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng beh kiû-mn̄g Siōng-tè
1Samuel9:10 Sò-lô kā po̍k-jîn kóng
1Samuel9:11 In chiūⁿ soaⁿ-phiâⁿ beh ji̍p-siâⁿ ê sî
1Samuel9:12 Cha-bó͘ gín-á ìn kóng
1Samuel9:13 Lín chi̍t-ē ji̍p-siâⁿ
1Samuel9:14 Sò-lô kap i ê po̍k-jîn chiū kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ. In beh ji̍p-siâⁿ ê sî
1Samuel9:15 Sò-lô iáu-bē kàu ê chêng chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel9:16 “Bîn-á-chài chit-ê sî-chūn
1Samuel9:17 Sat-bó-ní chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sò-lô
1Samuel9:18 Sò-lô tī siâⁿ-mn̂g lāi kiâⁿ-óa Sat-bó-ní
1Samuel9:19 Sat-bó-ní ìn Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel9:20 Lí saⁿ ji̍t chêng phah-m̄-kìⁿ hiah-ê lû-á
1Samuel9:21 Sò-lô ìn kóng
1Samuel9:22 Sat-bó-ní chhōa Sò-lô kap i ê po̍k-jîn ji̍p-khì kheh-thiaⁿ
1Samuel9:23 Sat-bó-ní kā chú-chia̍h--ê kóng
1Samuel9:24 Chú-chia̍h--ê chiū chiong te̍k-soán ê tōa-thúi phâng--chhut-lâi
1Samuel9:25 In tùi soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ lo̍h--lâi
1Samuel9:26 Thàu-chá thiⁿ phú-kng ê sî
1Samuel9:27 In kiâⁿ kàu siâⁿ ê kak-thâu
1Samuel10:1 Sat-bó-ní the̍h chi̍t koàn iû
1Samuel10:2 Kin-á-ji̍t lí lī-khui góa liáu-āu
1Samuel10:3 Lí kè-sio̍k tùi hia khì
1Samuel10:4 In ōe kā lí chhéng-an
1Samuel10:5 Āu-lâi lí tio̍h khì Siōng-tè ê soaⁿ Ki-pí-a
1Samuel10:6 Siōng Chú ê sîn ōe tōa-tōa chhiong-móa lí
1Samuel10:7 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî
1Samuel10:8 Lí lo̍h-khì Kiat-kah
1Samuel10:9 Sò-lô oa̍t-tńg-sin lī-khui Sat-bó-ní ê sî
1Samuel10:10 Sò-lô kap i ê po̍k-jîn lâi kàu Ki-pí-a
1Samuel10:11 Chêng-kàu-taⁿ bat i ê lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h i tī sian-ti tiong ji̍p-sîn kóng-ōe
1Samuel10:12 Ū chi̍t ê hit só͘-chāi ê lâng kóng
1Samuel10:13 Sò-lô ji̍p-sîn kóng-ōe liáu chiū chiūⁿ-khì soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kèng-pài.
1Samuel10:14 Sò-lô ê a-chek mn̄g Sò-lô kap i ê po̍k-jîn kóng
1Samuel10:15 Sò-lô ê a-chek kóng
1Samuel10:16 Sò-lô tùi i ê a-chek kóng
1Samuel10:17 Sat-bó-ní tiàu-chi̍p jîn-bîn kàu Bí-su-pa lâi kìⁿ Siōng Chú.
1Samuel10:18 I tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
1Samuel10:19 M̄-kú kin-á-ji̍t lín khì-sak chit-ūi kiù lín thoat-lī só͘-ū hoān-lān chai-hō ê Siōng-tè
1Samuel10:20 Sat-bó-ní kiò Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k chìn-chêng lâi
1Samuel10:21 koh kiò Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k chìn-chêng lâi
1Samuel10:22 In chiū koh mn̄g Siōng Chú
1Samuel10:23 In chiū cháu--khì
1Samuel10:24 Sat-bó-ní tùi bîn-chiòng kóng
1Samuel10:25 Sat-bó-ní chiong ông ê chek-jīm kap koân-lī tùi jîn-bîn soat-bêng
1Samuel10:26 Sò-lô mā tò-khì Ki-pí-a i ka-kī ê chhù; ū chi̍t tīn sim siū Siōng-tè kám-tōng ê ióng-sū mā tè i khì.
1Samuel10:27 M̄-kú ū chi̍t-kóa húi-lūi kóng
1Samuel11:1 A-bûn -lâng Ná-hat chiūⁿ-khì ûi-kong Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí. Ngá-pí -lâng kā Ná-hat kóng
1Samuel11:2 A-bûn -lâng Ná-hat ìn kóng
1Samuel11:3 Ngá-pí ê tiúⁿ-ló kā i kóng
1Samuel11:4 Só͘ phài ê lâng kàu Sò-lô tòa ê Ki-pí-a
1Samuel11:5 Sò-lô tú tùi hn̂g--ni̍h kóaⁿ gû tò--lâi; Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel11:6 Sò-lô thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siau-sit
1Samuel11:7 I chiū chiong chi̍t tùi gû chhiat-chòe chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè
1Samuel11:8 Sò-lô tī Pí-sek tiám-sǹg jîn-sò͘
1Samuel11:9 In kā phài--lâi ê lâng kóng
1Samuel11:10 Ngá-pí -lâng chiū kā A-bûn -lâng kóng
1Samuel11:11 Keh-ji̍t
1Samuel11:12 Jîn-bîn kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel11:13 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel11:14 Sat-bó-ní kā jîn-bîn kóng
1Samuel11:15 Choân-pō͘ ê jîn-bîn chiū khì Kiat-kah
1Samuel12:1 Sat-bó-ní kā só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng
1Samuel12:2 Hiān-chāi lín ū chi̍t ê ông lâi léng-tō lín. Góa í-keng nî-lāu
1Samuel12:3 Góa tī chia. Lín tio̍h tī Siōng Chú kap I só͘ soán-li̍p ê ông bīn-chêng choh-chèng. Góa kiám bat chhiúⁿ lâng ê gû
1Samuel12:4 In ìn kóng
1Samuel12:5 I kā in kóng
1Samuel12:6 Sat-bó-ní kā jîn-bîn kóng
1Samuel12:7 Taⁿ lín tio̍h khiā hó-sè. Góa beh tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng kā lín khòng-kò
1Samuel12:8 Chá-chêng
1Samuel12:9 M̄-kú in bōe-kì-tit Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè
1Samuel12:10 In kiû-kiò Siōng Chú kóng
1Samuel12:11 Siōng Chú chiū chhe Ki-tiân
1Samuel12:12 M̄-kú
1Samuel12:13 Taⁿ khòaⁿ leh
1Samuel12:14 Lín nā kèng-ùi Siōng Chú
1Samuel12:15 Lín nā m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú ê ōe
1Samuel12:16 Taⁿ khiā hó-sè
1Samuel12:17 Kin-á-ji̍t kiám m̄-sī koah sió-be̍h bô hō͘-chúi ê sî? Góa beh kiû Siōng Chú
1Samuel12:18 Sat-bó-ní kî-kiû Siōng Chú
1Samuel12:19 In kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel12:20 Sat-bó-ní kā jîn-bîn kóng
1Samuel12:21 m̄-thang phian-lī Siōng Chú khì tè hu-ké ê sîn-bêng
1Samuel12:22 Kì-jiân Siōng Chú kéng-soán lín chòe I ê chú-bîn
1Samuel12:23 Góa leh
1Samuel12:24 Lín chí-ū tio̍h kèng-ùi Siōng Chú
1Samuel12:25 Lín nā kè-sio̍k chòe pháiⁿ
1Samuel13:1 Sò-lô chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông nn̄g nî āu
1Samuel13:2 tùi Í-sek-lia̍t tiong kéng saⁿ-chheng lâng; nn̄g-chheng ê tè Sò-lô chū-chāi tī Bi̍t-boat kap Pek-te̍k-lī soaⁿ-khu
1Samuel13:3 Iok-ná-tan kong-kek tī Ka-pa ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê kun-iâⁿ; chit-ê siau-sit tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê tiong-kan thoân-khui. Sò-lô hoan-hù lâng tī choân-tōe pûn sàu-kak
1Samuel13:4 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Sò-lô kong-kek Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê kun-iâⁿ
1Samuel13:5 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chū-chi̍p beh kong-kek Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; ū chiàn-chhia saⁿ-bān tâi
1Samuel13:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h kun-tūi siū pau-ûi
1Samuel13:7 Koh ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kè Iok-tàn-hô kàu Ka-tek kap Ki-lia̍t tōe-khu. Sò-lô iáu tī Kiat-kah; tè i ê lâng lóng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah.
1Samuel13:8 Sò-lô chiàu Sat-bó-ní koat-tēng ê ji̍t-kî
1Samuel13:9 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel13:10 I hiàn sio-hòa-chè tú-á beh oân-sêng
1Samuel13:11 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel13:12 só͘-í góa siūⁿ-kóng Hui-lī-sū -lâng teh-beh lâi kàu Kiat-kah kong-kek góa
1Samuel13:13 Sat-bó-ní tùi Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel13:14 Taⁿ lí ê ông-ūi bōe kú-tn̂g; Siōng Chú í-keng chhē-tio̍h chi̍t ê ha̍p I sim-ì ê lâng
1Samuel13:15 Sat-bó-ní chiū chhut-hoat
1Samuel13:16 Sò-lô kap i ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan
1Samuel13:17 Ū tu̍t-kek-tūi tùi Hui-lī-sū kun-iâⁿ chhut--lâi
1Samuel13:18 chi̍t tūi tùi Pek Hô-lûn ê lō͘ khì; koh chi̍t tūi tùi khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h Sé-pho-im Soaⁿ-kok
1Samuel13:19 Hit-sî Í-sek-lia̍t choân-tōe bô phah-thih sai-hū
1Samuel13:20 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng beh bôa tî-thâu
1Samuel13:21 nā beh bôa tî-thâu
1Samuel13:22 só͘-í kàu kau-chiàn ê sî
1Samuel13:23 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ū phài peng chhut-khì hông-siú Bi̍t-boat ê ài-kháu.
1Samuel14:1 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel14:2 Sò-lô tī Ki-pí-a ê kau-gōa
1Samuel14:3 Koh ū A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ A-hi-ngá tòa í-hut-tek lâi tī hia. I sī Í-ka-phok ê hiaⁿ-ko
1Samuel14:4 Iok-ná-tan beh khì Hui-lī-sū ê kun-iâⁿ tio̍h keng-kè ê ài-kháu
1Samuel14:5 pak-pêng ê chio̍h-piah kap Bi̍t-boat sio-tùi
1Samuel14:6 Iok-ná-tan kā gia̍h i ê kun-khì ê siàu-liân-lâng kóng
1Samuel14:7 Gia̍h kun-khì--ê kā i kóng
1Samuel14:8 Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel14:9 in nā kā lán kóng ‘Khiā leh! Tán goán kè--khì’
1Samuel14:10 M̄-kú in nā kóng ‘Lâi goán chia’
1Samuel14:11 In nn̄g lâng chiū thiau-kò͘-ì hō͘ Hui-lī-sū hông-siú ê peng khòaⁿ--tio̍h; Hui-lī-sū -lâng kóng
1Samuel14:12 Hông-siú ê peng kā Iok-ná-tan kap gia̍h kun-khì ê lâng kóng
1Samuel14:13 Iok-ná-tan chiū chhiú-khîⁿ-kha-lèng peh--khí-khì
1Samuel14:14 Tē-it piàn tu̍t-kek
1Samuel14:15 Só͘-ū ê Hui-lī-sū kun-peng
1Samuel14:16 Tī Piān-ngá-bín tōe-khu ê Ki-pí-a
1Samuel14:17 Sò-lô kā tè i ê kun-peng kóng
1Samuel14:18 Sò-lô kā A-hi-ngá kóng
1Samuel14:19 Sò-lô kap chè-si kóng-ōe ê sî
1Samuel14:20 Sò-lô kap tè i ê kun-peng lóng chū-chi̍p lâi kàu chiàn-tiûⁿ
1Samuel14:21 Í-chêng óa Hui-lī-sū -lâng
1Samuel14:22 Hiah-ê bih tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-lī-sū -lâng tô-cháu
1Samuel14:23 Hit-ji̍t Siōng Chú hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t tek-sèng; chiàn-cheng iân-sio̍k kàu Pek A-bûn hit-pêng.
1Samuel14:24 Hit-ji̍t Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng iau kah chin kan-khó͘
1Samuel14:25 In ji̍p chhiū-nâ
1Samuel14:26 Kun-peng ji̍p chhiū-nâ
1Samuel14:27 Iok-ná-tan bô thiaⁿ-tio̍h in lāu-pē ê chiù-chōa
1Samuel14:28 Ū chi̍t ê kun-peng tùi i kóng
1Samuel14:29 Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel14:30 kin-á-ji̍t nā chhut-chāi kun-peng chia̍h in kā tùi-te̍k chhiúⁿ--lâi ê chia̍h-mi̍h
1Samuel14:31 Hit-ji̍t
1Samuel14:32 Kun-peng chông-khì lia̍h só͘ chhiúⁿ ê gû
1Samuel14:33 Ū lâng kā Sò-lô pò-kò
1Samuel14:34 Sò-lô koh kóng
1Samuel14:35 Sò-lô kā Siōng Chú khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ; che sī i thâu chi̍t piàn kā Siōng Chú khí ê tôaⁿ.
1Samuel14:36 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel14:37 Sò-lô chiū mn̄g Siōng-tè
1Samuel14:38 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel14:39 Góa kí hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t sèng-lī ê éng-oa̍h ê Siōng Chú chiù-chōa
1Samuel14:40 I chiū kā Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng kóng
1Samuel14:41 Sò-lô tùi Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè kóng
1Samuel14:42 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel14:43 Sò-lô kā Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel14:44 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel14:45 Kun-peng kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel14:46 Sò-lô bô koh tui-jip Hui-lī-sū -lâng; Hui-lī-sū -lâng chiū tńg-khì in pún só͘-chāi.
1Samuel14:47 Sò-lô khak-li̍p Í-sek-lia̍t ông-koân liáu-āu
1Samuel14:48 Sò-lô hùn-ióng phah-pāi A-má-le̍k -lâng
1Samuel14:49 Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ ū Iok-ná-tan
1Samuel14:50 Sò-lô ê bó͘ kiò-chòe A-hi-loán
1Samuel14:51 Sò-lô ê lāu-pē Ki-sū
1Samuel14:52 Sò-lô it-seng siông-siông kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng ū ke̍k-lia̍t ê kau-chiàn; i khòaⁿ-tio̍h kiông-béng ê lâng kap ióng-sū
1Samuel15:1 Sat-bó-ní kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel15:2 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe án-ni kóng
1Samuel15:3 Taⁿ lí tio̍h khì phah A-má-le̍k -lâng
1Samuel15:4 Sò-lô chiū tiàu-chi̍p kun-peng tī Thê-liān
1Samuel15:5 Sò-lô lâi kàu A-má-le̍k ê siâⁿ
1Samuel15:6 Sò-lô kā Ki-nî -lâng kóng
1Samuel15:7 Sò-lô kong-kek A-má-le̍k -lâng
1Samuel15:8 I oa̍h-lia̍h A-má-le̍k -ông A-kah
1Samuel15:9 M̄-kú Sò-lô kap kun-peng lâu A-kah
1Samuel15:10 Siōng Chú tùi Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:11 “Góa hō͘-hóe soán-li̍p Sò-lô choh-ông
1Samuel15:12 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
1Samuel15:13 Sat-bó-ní kàu Sò-lô hia
1Samuel15:14 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:15 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel15:16 Sat-bó-ní kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel15:17 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:18 Siōng Chú koh phài lí khì
1Samuel15:19 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ bô thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú ê ōe
1Samuel15:20 Sò-lô kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:21 M̄-kú góa ê kun-peng tùi eng-kai tio̍h húi-bia̍t ê chiàn-lī-phín tiong-kan
1Samuel15:22 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:23 Pōe-poān chhin-chhiūⁿ kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t sī hoān-chōe; chū-ko chhin-chhiūⁿ pài ngó͘-siōng sī siâ-ok. In-ūi lí khì-sak Siōng Chú ê ōe
1Samuel15:24 Sò-lô tùi Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:25 Taⁿ
1Samuel15:26 Sat-bó-ní kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel15:27 Sat-bó-ní oa̍t-tńg-sin beh lī-khui
1Samuel15:28 Sat-bó-ní kā i kóng
1Samuel15:29 Í-sek-lia̍t ê Tāi-lêng-chiá
1Samuel15:30 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel15:31 Sat-bó-ní chiū oa̍t-tńg-sin tè Sò-lô tò--khì; Sò-lô chiū kèng-pài Siōng Chú.
1Samuel15:32 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:33 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel15:34 Sat-bó-ní tò-khì La-má; Sò-lô tńg-khì Ki-pí-a i ê chhù.
1Samuel15:35 Sat-bó-ní sí í-chêng
1Samuel16:1 Siōng Chú kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel16:2 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel16:3 Lí tio̍h chhiáⁿ Iâ-se lâi hù chit-ê chè-sū; góa beh chí-sī lí eng-kai chòe ê sū; góa kā lí chí-sī hit-ê lâng
1Samuel16:4 Sat-bó-ní chiàu Siōng Chú ê ōe khì chòe
1Samuel16:5 I kóng
1Samuel16:6 In lâi ê sî
1Samuel16:7 M̄-kú Siōng Chú kā Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel16:8 Āu-lâi Iâ-se kiò A-pí-ná-ta̍t tùi Sat-bó-ní bīn-chêng kiâⁿ--kè; Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel16:9 Iâ-se koh kiò Sa-má keng-kè; Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel16:10 Iâ-se hō͘ i chhit ê kiáⁿ lóng tùi Sat-bó-ní bīn-chêng kiâⁿ--kè. Sat-bó-ní kā Iâ-se kóng
1Samuel16:11 Sat-bó-ní koh kā Iâ-se kóng
1Samuel16:12 Iâ-se phài lâng khì kiò i lâi. I âng-ko-chhiah-chhi̍h
1Samuel16:13 Sat-bó-ní chiū tī Tāi-pi̍t hiah-ê hiaⁿ-ko bīn-chêng ēng kak-lāi ê iû kā i boah. Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
1Samuel16:14 Siōng Chú ê sîn lī-khui Sò-lô
1Samuel16:15 Sò-lô ê jîn-sîn tùi i kóng
1Samuel16:16 Chhiáⁿ ông bēng-lēng kun-sûi lí ê pō͘-hā chhē chi̍t ê gâu tôaⁿ-khîm ê lâng lâi
1Samuel16:17 Sò-lô kā i ê jîn-sîn kóng
1Samuel16:18 Ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng kóng
1Samuel16:19 Sò-lô chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Iâ-se
1Samuel16:20 Iâ-se chiū kiò i ê kiáⁿ Tāi-pi̍t ēng lû-á chài chin chōe piáⁿ
1Samuel16:21 Tāi-pi̍t kàu Sò-lô hia
1Samuel16:22 Sò-lô chhe lâng khì kā Iâ-se kóng
1Samuel16:23 Ta̍k-piàn
1Samuel17:1 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chū-chi̍p kun-tūi beh kau-chiàn; in tī Iû-tāi ê So-ko chi̍p-ha̍p
1Samuel17:2 Sò-lô kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng mā chū-chi̍p
1Samuel17:3 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hun-pia̍t tī nn̄g pêng ê soaⁿ pâi-tīn
1Samuel17:4 Ū chi̍t ê Hui-lī-sū ióng-sū Ka-te̍k -lâng Ko-lī-a tùi iâⁿ-lāi kiâⁿ--chhut-lâi
1Samuel17:5 thâu-khak tì tâng ê thâu-khoe
1Samuel17:6 tōa-thúi ēng tâng ê kah pó-hō͘
1Samuel17:7 chhiuⁿ ê pìⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-pò͘-ki ê chhia-sim hiah chho͘; kan-ta chhiuⁿ ê thâu ê thih chiū ū chhit kong-kun tāng; i ê thâu-chêng ū chi̍t ê lâng kā i giâ tún-pâi.
1Samuel17:8 I khiā--teh
1Samuel17:9 i nā ū châi-tiāu kap góa tàu su-iâⁿ
1Samuel17:10 Hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng koh kóng
1Samuel17:11 Sò-lô kap Í-sek-lia̍t kun-peng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-lī-sū -lâng chiah-ê ōe
1Samuel17:12 Tāi-pi̍t sī Iû-tāi Pek-lī-hêng ê Í-hoat-tha -lâng Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ. Iâ-se ū poeh ê kiáⁿ. Sò-lô choh-ông ê sî
1Samuel17:13 Iâ-se saⁿ ê khah tōa-hàn ê kiáⁿ lóng tè Sò-lô chhut-cheng; siōng-tōa--ê kiò-chòe Í-lī-ap
1Samuel17:14 Tāi-pi̍t sī soah-bé-kiáⁿ; hit saⁿ ê hiaⁿ-ko kun-tè Sò-lô ê sî
1Samuel17:15 Tāi-pi̍t ūi-tio̍h beh chhī in lāu-pē ê iûⁿ-kûn
1Samuel17:16 Hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng chá-àm chhut-lâi thiau-chiàn
1Samuel17:17 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel17:18 koh tòa cha̍p tè chhì-jù
1Samuel17:19 Sò-lô kap lín saⁿ ê hiaⁿ-ko
1Samuel17:20 Tē-jī ji̍t thàu-chá
1Samuel17:21 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng lóng pâi-tīn sio-tùi.
1Samuel17:22 Tāi-pi̍t kā mi̍h-kiāⁿ kau-tài kò͘-siú ê lâng
1Samuel17:23 I kap in kóng-ōe ê sî
1Samuel17:24 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê lâng chiū kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ tô-cháu.
1Samuel17:25 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng-lâi-kóng-khì
1Samuel17:26 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g khiā tī i sin-piⁿ hiah-ê lâng
1Samuel17:27 Kun-peng chiū chiàu chêng ê ōe kā Tāi-pi̍t hôe-tap
1Samuel17:28 Tāi-pi̍t ê tōa-hiaⁿ Í-lī-ap thiaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t kap lâng kóng-ōe
1Samuel17:29 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel17:30 Tāi-pi̍t chiū lī-khui khì chhē pa̍t-lâng
1Samuel17:31 Ū lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t kóng ê ōe
1Samuel17:32 Tāi-pi̍t kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel17:33 Sò-lô tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel17:34 Tāi-pi̍t kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel17:35 góa chiū kā jip
1Samuel17:36 Góa bat phah-sí sai kap hîm; chit-ê bô siū kat-lé ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng
1Samuel17:37 Tāi-pi̍t koh kóng
1Samuel17:38 Sò-lô chiū ēng ka-kī ê kun-ho̍k hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t chhēng
1Samuel17:39 Tāi-pi̍t kā to hâ--teh. In-ūi i bô koàn-sì chhēng chiah-ê
1Samuel17:40 Tāi-pi̍t chhiú gia̍h koáiⁿ-á
1Samuel17:41 Siâng-sî
1Samuel17:42 Hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel17:43 Hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel17:44 Hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng koh kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel17:45 Tāi-pi̍t tùi hit-ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng kóng
1Samuel17:46 Kin-á-ji̍t Siōng Chú beh chiong lí kau tī góa ê chhiú; góa beh kā lí thâi-sí
1Samuel17:47 koh hō͘ só͘-ū chū-chi̍p tī chia ê lâng lóng chai
1Samuel17:48 Ko-lī-a kiâⁿ chìn-chêng beh kong-kek Tāi-pi̍t. Tāi-pi̍t kóaⁿ-kín cháu chìn-chêng khì gêng-chiàn.
1Samuel17:49 Tāi-pi̍t tùi tē-á lāi the̍h chi̍t lia̍p chio̍h-thâu chhut--lâi
1Samuel17:50 Án-ni
1Samuel17:51 Tāi-pi̍t cháu--khì
1Samuel17:52 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Iû-tāi -lâng chiū ná hoah-hiàm ná tui-sat Hui-lī-sū -lâng
1Samuel17:53 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tui-sat Hui-lī-sū -lâng liáu-āu
1Samuel17:54 Tāi-pi̍t chiong Ko-lī-a ê thâu tòa kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
1Samuel17:55 Sò-lô khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t khì gêng-chiàn Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê sî
1Samuel17:56 Ông kóng
1Samuel17:57 Tāi-pi̍t phah-sí Ko-lī-a tò--lâi
1Samuel17:58 Sò-lô mn̄g i kóng
1Samuel18:1 Tāi-pi̍t kap Sò-lô ōe kóng soah. Iok-ná-tan kap Tāi-pi̍t sim kat saⁿ-liân; Iok-ná-tan thiàⁿ i chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā.
1Samuel18:2 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
1Samuel18:3 Iok-ná-tan kap Tāi-pi̍t nn̄g lâng kiat-iok
1Samuel18:4 Iok-ná-tan thǹg i ê gōa-saⁿ hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel18:5 Sò-lô bô-lūn phài Tāi-pi̍t khì tó-ūi
1Samuel18:6 Tāi-pi̍t phah-sí Ko-lī-a tò--lâi ê sî
1Samuel18:7 Hiah-ê hū-lú thiàu-bú
1Samuel18:8 Sò-lô hui-siông siū-khì
1Samuel18:9 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
1Samuel18:10 Keh-ji̍t
1Samuel18:11 chiū kā hit-ki chhiuⁿ siā--khì
1Samuel18:12 Sò-lô kiaⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel18:13 In-ūi án-ni
1Samuel18:14 Tāi-pi̍t só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lóng sêng-kong
1Samuel18:15 Sò-lô khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lóng sêng-kong
1Samuel18:16 M̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi ê jîn-bîn lóng ióng-hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel18:17 Sò-lô kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel18:18 Tāi-pi̍t kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel18:19 Sò-lô ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Bí-la eng-kai kap Tāi-pi̍t sêng-chhin ê sî kàu
1Samuel18:20 Sò-lô lēng-gōa chi̍t ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Bí-kah ài Tāi-pi̍t; ū lâng kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel18:21 Sò-lô sim-lāi kóng
1Samuel18:22 Sò-lô chiū hoan-hù jîn-sîn kóng
1Samuel18:23 Sò-lô ê jîn-sîn chiong chiah-ê ōe kóng hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ; Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel18:24 Sò-lô ê jîn-sîn chiong Tāi-pi̍t só͘ kóng--ê kā i hôe-ho̍k.
1Samuel18:25 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel18:26 Sò-lô ê jîn-sîn chiong chiah-ê ōe kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel18:27 Tāi-pi̍t chhōa pō͘-hā khì thâi-sí nn̄g-pah ê Hui-lī-sū -lâng. Tāi-pi̍t chiong hiah-ê pau-phê choân-sò͘ hiàn hō͘ ông
1Samuel18:28 Sò-lô khòaⁿ-chhut Siōng Chú kap Tāi-pi̍t tông-chāi
1Samuel18:29 Sò-lô chiū koh-khah kiaⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel18:30 Hui-lī-sū ê siú-léng siông-siông chhut-lâi kong-kek Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; ta̍k-piàn kau-chiàn
1Samuel19:1 Sò-lô iau-kiû i ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan kap só͘-ū ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ tio̍h thâi-sí Tāi-pi̍t. M̄-kú Iok-ná-tan chin ì-ài Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel19:2 chiū kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel19:3 Góa ōe khì iá-gōa lí bih ê só͘-chāi
1Samuel19:4 Iok-ná-tan tùi i ê lāu-pē thòe Tāi-pi̍t kóng hó-ōe
1Samuel19:5 I bat mō͘ sìⁿ-miā ê gûi-hiám
1Samuel19:6 Sò-lô thiaⁿ Iok-ná-tan ê ōe
1Samuel19:7 Iok-ná-tan kiò Tāi-pi̍t lâi
1Samuel19:8 Chiàn-cheng koh po̍k-hoat; Tāi-pi̍t chhut-khì kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng kau-chiàn
1Samuel19:9 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel19:10 Sò-lô ēng chhiuⁿ siā Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel19:11 Sò-lô phài lâng khì Tāi-pi̍t ê chhù kàm-sī
1Samuel19:12 Bí-kah chiū tùi thang-á kā Tāi-pi̍t lūi--lo̍h-khì; i chiū tô-cháu khì bih.
1Samuel19:13 Bí-kah ēng ka-cho̍k-sîn-siōng hē tī bîn-chhn̂g
1Samuel19:14 Sò-lô phài lâng khì lia̍h Tāi-pi̍t; Bí-kah kā in kóng
1Samuel19:15 Sò-lô koh phài lâng khì
1Samuel19:16 Sù-chiá ji̍p--khì
1Samuel19:17 Sò-lô tùi Bí-kah kóng
1Samuel19:18 Tāi-pi̍t tô-cháu
1Samuel19:19 Ū lâng kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel19:20 Sò-lô phài sù-chiá khì lia̍h Tāi-pi̍t; in khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sat-bó-ní chòe thâu chhōa chi̍t tīn sian-ti ji̍p-sîn kóng-ōe
1Samuel19:21 Ū lâng chiong chit-ê tāi-chì kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel19:22 Āu-lâi i pún-sin mā khì La-má
1Samuel19:23 Sò-lô chiū khì Ná-iok; Siōng-tè ê sîn mā lîm-kàu i; i ná kiâⁿ ná ji̍p-sîn kóng-ōe
1Samuel19:24 I sīm-chì thǹg-saⁿ
1Samuel20:1 Tāi-pi̍t tùi La-má ê Ná-iok tô-cháu
1Samuel20:2 Iok-ná-tan kā i kóng
1Samuel20:3 Tāi-pi̍t koh chiù-chōa kóng
1Samuel20:4 Iok-ná-tan kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel20:5 Tāi-pi̍t kā Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel20:6 Lí ê lāu-pē nā hoat-kiàn góa bô tī hia
1Samuel20:7 I nā kóng ‘Hó’
1Samuel20:8 Taⁿ lí tio̍h sêng-sim tùi-thāi lí ê po̍k-jîn; chhiáⁿ lí siú lí kap góa tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng só͘ li̍p ê iok. Góa nā ū chōe
1Samuel20:9 Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel20:10 Tāi-pi̍t kā Iok-ná-tan kóng
1Samuel20:11 Iok-ná-tan kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel20:12 Iok-ná-tan kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel20:13 Góa ê lāu-pē nā chûn-sim beh hāi lí
1Samuel20:14 Góa nā iáu oa̍h--teh
1Samuel20:15 koh Siōng Chú châu-bia̍t lí ê tùi-te̍k ê sî
1Samuel20:16 Iok-ná-tan chiū kap Tāi-pi̍t ê ke li̍p-iok
1Samuel20:17 Iok-ná-tan in-ūi ài Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel20:18 Iok-ná-tan kā i kóng
1Samuel20:19 Só͘-í
1Samuel20:20 góa ōe ēng chio̍h-pôaⁿ chòe bo̍k-phiau siā saⁿ ki chìⁿ.
1Samuel20:21 Góa ōe chhe chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng khì chhē chìⁿ. Góa nā kā hit-ê siàu-liân-lâng kóng ‘Chìⁿ tī lí ê āu-bīn
1Samuel20:22 Góa nā kā siàu-liân-lâng kóng ‘Chìⁿ tī lí ê thâu-chêng’
1Samuel20:23 Lán nn̄g ê ê iok-tēng
1Samuel20:24 Tāi-pi̍t chiū khì bih tī iá-gōa. Chhoe-it hit-ji̍t
1Samuel20:25 Ông chiàu-siông chē i óa piah hit-ê ūi
1Samuel20:26 M̄-kú hit-ji̍t Sò-lô bô kóng sím-mi̍h; i siūⁿ-kóng Tāi-pi̍t tú-tio̍h tāi-chì hō͘ i bô chheng-khì
1Samuel20:27 Keh-ji̍t
1Samuel20:28 Iok-ná-tan ìn Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel20:29 I kóng
1Samuel20:30 Sò-lô tùi Iok-ná-tan hoat sèng-tē
1Samuel20:31 Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ nā oa̍h--teh
1Samuel20:32 Iok-ná-tan ìn kóng
1Samuel20:33 Sò-lô gia̍h chhiuⁿ siā Iok-ná-tan
1Samuel20:34 Iok-ná-tan chin siū-khì
1Samuel20:35 Keh-chá-khí
1Samuel20:36 Iok-ná-tan kā siàu-liân-lâng kóng
1Samuel20:37 Hit-ê siàu-liân-lâng cháu kàu Iok-ná-tan chìⁿ lak--lo̍h-khì ê só͘-chāi
1Samuel20:38 Iok-ná-tan koh hoah
1Samuel20:39 m̄-kú i m̄ chai che sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù
1Samuel20:40 Iok-ná-tan chiong keng kap chìⁿ kau hō͘ siàu-liân-lâng
1Samuel20:41 Siàu-liân-lâng lī-khui liáu-āu
1Samuel20:42 Iok-ná-tan kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel21:1 Tāi-pi̍t khì Ná-pek kìⁿ chè-si A-hi-bí-le̍k. A-hi-bí-le̍k kiaⁿ-kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ-hiâⁿ chhut-lâi kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel21:2 Tāi-pi̍t ìn kóng
1Samuel21:3 Taⁿ lí ū sím-mi̍h thang chia̍h
1Samuel21:4 Chè-si ìn kóng
1Samuel21:5 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel21:6 Chè-si chiū the̍h hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê piáⁿ hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel21:7 Hit-ji̍t
1Samuel21:8 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g A-hi-bí-le̍k kóng
1Samuel21:9 Chè-si ìn
1Samuel21:10 Hit-ji̍t Tāi-pi̍t lī-khui
1Samuel21:11 A-kiat hiah-ê jîn-sîn tùi i kóng
1Samuel21:12 Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe sim-lāi put-an
1Samuel21:13 só͘-í tī chèng-lâng bīn-chêng ké khí-siáu
1Samuel21:14 A-kiat kā i ê jîn-sîn kóng
1Samuel21:15 Góa chia kiám ū khiàm siáu-lâng? Lín ná kā chhōa--lâi? M̄-thang hō͘ chit-ê lâng ji̍p góa ê chhù.”
1Samuel22:1 Tāi-pi̍t lī-khui Ka-te̍k
1Samuel22:2 Só͘-ū siū ap-pek--ê
1Samuel22:3 Tāi-pi̍t tùi hia khì Mô͘-ap ê Bí-su-pa
1Samuel22:4 Tāi-pi̍t chhōa in kàu Mô͘-ap -ông hia. Tāi-pi̍t tòa tī iàu-sài hit-tōaⁿ sî-kan
1Samuel22:5 Āu-lâi
1Samuel22:6 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel22:7 chiū kā i ê sī-ōe kóng
1Samuel22:8 Lín kèng-jiân kiōng-bô͘ beh pōe-poān góa. Góa ka-kī ê kiáⁿ kap Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ kiat-bêng
1Samuel22:9 Hit-sî Í-tong -lâng To-ek khiā tī Sò-lô sī-ōe ê tiong-kan
1Samuel22:10 A-hi-bí-le̍k thòe Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng Chú
1Samuel22:11 Ông chiū phài lâng tiàu A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ chè-si A-hi-bí-le̍k
1Samuel22:12 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel22:13 Sò-lô kā i kóng
1Samuel22:14 A-hi-bí-le̍k ìn ông kóng
1Samuel22:15 Góa kiám kin-á-ji̍t chiah thòe i kiû-mn̄g Siōng-tè? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī. Chhiáⁿ ông m̄-thang kā chōe kui hō͘ lí ê po̍k-jîn kap góa ê lāu-pē choân-ke; in-ūi pōe-poān ông chiah-ê tāi-chì
1Samuel22:16 Ông kóng
1Samuel22:17 Ông chiū bēng-lēng chó-iū ê sī-ōe kóng
1Samuel22:18 Ông kā To-ek kóng
1Samuel22:19 I koh ēng to thâi chè-si ê siâⁿ Ná-pek siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng
1Samuel22:20 A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ A-hi-bí-le̍k ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ kiò-chòe A-pí-a-tha
1Samuel22:21 A-pí-a-tha chiong Sò-lô thâi-sí Siōng Chú ê chè-si ê tāi-chì kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng.
1Samuel22:22 Tāi-pi̍t kā A-pí-a-tha kóng
1Samuel22:23 Lí lâi kap góa tòa
1Samuel23:1 Ū lâng kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel23:2 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng Chú
1Samuel23:3 Kun-tè Tāi-pi̍t ê lâng kā i kóng
1Samuel23:4 Tāi-pi̍t koh mn̄g Siōng Chú; Siōng Chú ìn kóng
1Samuel23:5 Tāi-pi̍t kap kun-tè i ê lâng khì Ki-i-la
1Samuel23:6 A-hi-bí-le̍k ê kiáⁿ A-pí-a-tha tô-cháu khì Ki-i-la kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t ê sî
1Samuel23:7 Ū lâng kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel23:8 Sò-lô chiū tiàu-chi̍p só͘-ū ê kun-peng beh khì kong-táⁿ Ki-i-la
1Samuel23:9 Tāi-pi̍t chai Sò-lô siat kè-bô͘ beh hāi i
1Samuel23:10 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel23:11 Ki-i-la -lâng ōe chiong góa kau tī i ê chhiú bōe? Sò-lô ōe chiàu lí ê po̍k-jîn só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê lo̍h--lâi á bōe? Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ah
1Samuel23:12 Tāi-pi̍t koh kóng
1Samuel23:13 Tāi-pi̍t kap kun-tè i ê lâng iok ū la̍k-pah
1Samuel23:14 Tāi-pi̍t bih tī Se-hut khòng-iá soaⁿ-khu ê iàu-sài. Sò-lô ta̍k-ji̍t tui-chhē Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel23:15 Tāi-pi̍t chai Sò-lô í-keng chhut-lâi beh thâi i
1Samuel23:16 Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan chhut-hoat khì Ha-lia̍t kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel23:17 kā i kóng
1Samuel23:18 In nn̄g lâng chiū tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng li̍p-iok kiat-bêng. Tāi-pi̍t lâu tī Ha-lia̍t
1Samuel23:19 Ū chi̍t-kóa Se-hut -lâng chiūⁿ-khì Ki-pí-a kìⁿ Sò-lô
1Samuel23:20 Ông ah
1Samuel23:21 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel23:22 Lín tò--khì
1Samuel23:23 Lín khì
1Samuel23:24 Hiah-ê lâng chiū chhut-hoat
1Samuel23:25 Sò-lô chhōa i ê pō͘-hā khì tui-chhē Tāi-pi̍t; ū lâng kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel23:26 Sò-lô kap i ê pō͘-hā tī soaⁿ ê chit-pêng
1Samuel23:27 Hit-sî
1Samuel23:28 Sò-lô chiū tò-khì tùi-khòng Hui-lī-sū -lâng
1Samuel23:29 Tāi-pi̍t lī-khui hia
1Samuel24:1 Sò-lô tui-jip Hui-lī-sū -lâng tò--lâi ê sî
1Samuel24:2 Sò-lô chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t tiong chhōa te̍k-soán ê peng saⁿ-chheng
1Samuel24:3 Sò-lô lâi kàu lō͘-piⁿ iûⁿ-tiâu hù-kūn ê soaⁿ-tōng
1Samuel24:4 Kun-tè Tāi-pi̍t ê lâng tùi i kóng
1Samuel24:5 Āu-lâi
1Samuel24:6 tùi kun-tè i ê lâng kóng
1Samuel24:7 Tāi-pi̍t ēng chiah-ê ōe chó͘-tòng kun-tè i ê lâng
1Samuel24:8 Tāi-pi̍t mā tùi tōng-lāi chhut--khì
1Samuel24:9 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel24:10 Kin-á-ji̍t lí ū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ--tio̍h
1Samuel24:11 Góa ê pē ah
1Samuel24:12 Goān Siōng Chú tī lí góa ê tiong-kan chhâi-koat. Goān Siōng Chú in-ūi lí ê só͘-chòe thòe góa pò-ho̍k; góa bōe chhut-chhiú hāi lí.
1Samuel24:13 Kó͘-chá-lâng án-ni kóng
1Samuel24:14 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chhut-lâi beh lia̍h siáⁿ-lâng
1Samuel24:15 Goān Siōng Chú chòe phòaⁿ-koaⁿ
1Samuel24:16 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Sò-lô kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
1Samuel24:17 I kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel24:18 Kin-á-ji̍t lí ê só͘-chòe piáu-bêng lí ēng hó tùi-thāi góa
1Samuel24:19 Lâng nā chhē-tio̍h i ê tùi-te̍k
1Samuel24:20 Taⁿ góa chai lí it-tēng ōe choh-ông
1Samuel24:21 Só͘-í lí tio̍h kí Siōng Chú tùi góa chiù-chōa
1Samuel24:22 Tāi-pi̍t chiū tùi Sò-lô chiù-chōa. Jiân-āu
1Samuel25:1 Sat-bó-ní sí
1Samuel25:2 Tī Má-hûn ū chi̍t ê tōa hó-gia̍h-lâng
1Samuel25:3 Hit-ê lâng sio̍k Ka-le̍k chong-cho̍k
1Samuel25:4 Tāi-pi̍t tī khòng-iá thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ná-pà teh chián iûⁿ-mn̂g
1Samuel25:5 chiū phài cha̍p ê siàu-liân-lâng
1Samuel25:6 kóng
1Samuel25:7 Tāi-pi̍t ū thiaⁿ-kóng lí tī chia teh chián iûⁿ-mn̂g; lí ê kò͘-iûⁿ--ê kap goán chòe-hé tī Ka-bi̍t ê sî
1Samuel25:8 Lí thang mn̄g lí ê kang-lâng
1Samuel25:9 Tāi-pi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng kàu-ūi
1Samuel25:10 Ná-pà ìn Tāi-pi̍t ê pō͘-hā kóng
1Samuel25:11 Góa ê piáⁿ
1Samuel25:12 Tāi-pi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng oa̍t-tńg-sin tùi goân-lō͘ tò--khì
1Samuel25:13 Tāi-pi̍t tùi kun-tè i ê lâng kóng
1Samuel25:14 Ná-pà ê kang-lâng ū chi̍t ê lâi kā Ná-pà ê bó͘ Ài-pí-kai kóng
1Samuel25:15 M̄-kú hiah-ê lâng tùi goán chin hó
1Samuel25:16 Goán tī in hia chhī iûⁿ ê sî
1Samuel25:17 Chhiáⁿ lí siông-sè siūⁿ
1Samuel25:18 Ài-pí-kai chiū kóaⁿ-kín chiong nn̄g-pah ê piáⁿ
1Samuel25:19 Jiân-āu i kā hiah-ê kang-lâng kóng
1Samuel25:20 Ài-pí-kai chiū khiâ-lû lo̍h-soaⁿ
1Samuel25:21 Tāi-pi̍t tú-á teh kóng
1Samuel25:22 Bîn-á-chài thiⁿ-kng í-chêng
1Samuel25:23 Ài-pí-kai khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel25:24 Ài-pí-kai phak tī i ê kha-chêng
1Samuel25:25 Góa ê chú
1Samuel25:26 Góa ê chú ah
1Samuel25:27 Taⁿ lí ê lú-pī tòa-lâi hō͘ góa ê chú ê lé-mi̍h
1Samuel25:28 Kiû lí khoan-sià lí lú-pī ê chōe-kò. Siōng Chú it-tēng ōe kā góa ê chú kiàn-li̍p ún-kò͘ ê ông-tiâu
1Samuel25:29 Sui-jiân ū lâng khí-lâi tui-jip lí
1Samuel25:30 Chiong-lâi Siōng Chú chiàu I tùi góa ê chú ê èng-ún sêng-chiū it-chhè hó-sū
1Samuel25:31 góa ê chú chiū m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h bô-iân-bô-kò͘ thâi-lâng
1Samuel25:32 Tāi-pi̍t kā Ài-pí-kai kóng
1Samuel25:33 Lí kap lí ê kiàn-sek lóng chin thang o-ló
1Samuel25:34 Siōng Chú ū chó͘-chí góa bô siong-hāi lí. Tī Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè bīn-chêng
1Samuel25:35 Jiân-āu
1Samuel25:36 Ài-pí-kai tńg-khì Ná-pà hia
1Samuel25:37 Keh-chá-khí
1Samuel25:38 Tāi-iok cha̍p ji̍t āu
1Samuel25:39 Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ná-pà í-keng sí
1Samuel25:40 Tāi-pi̍t ê po̍k-jîn khì Ka-bi̍t kìⁿ Ài-pí-kai
1Samuel25:41 Ài-pí-kai chiū khí--lâi
1Samuel25:42 Ài-pí-kai sûi-sî khí--lâi
1Samuel25:43 Tāi-pi̍t í-keng ū chhōa Iâ-su-lia̍t -lâng A-hi-loán; in nn̄g ê lâng lóng chòe i ê bó͘.
1Samuel25:44 Sò-lô í-keng chiong i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Bí-kah
1Samuel26:1 Se-hut -lâng koh khì Ki-pí-a kā Sò-lô pò-kò
1Samuel26:2 Sò-lô chiū khí--lâi
1Samuel26:3 Sò-lô tī Iok-su-bûn tang-pêng ê Hap-ki-la-soaⁿ lō͘-piⁿ chat-iâⁿ. Tāi-pi̍t tiàm tī khòng-iá
1Samuel26:4 chiū chhe kúi-nā ê cheng-thàm khì thàm
1Samuel26:5 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chhut-hoat
1Samuel26:6 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Hek -lâng A-hi-bí-le̍k kap Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ
1Samuel26:7 Tāi-pi̍t kap A-pí-su thàu-mî kàu pō͘-tūi hia
1Samuel26:8 A-pí-su tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel26:9 Tāi-pi̍t kā A-pí-su kóng
1Samuel26:10 Tāi-pi̍t koh kóng
1Samuel26:11 Góa choa̍t-tùi m̄-káⁿ hē-chhiú phah Siōng Chú soán-li̍p ê ông; kan-ta the̍h i thâu-khak piⁿ ê chhiuⁿ kap chúi-pân
1Samuel26:12 Tāi-pi̍t chiū khì the̍h Sò-lô thâu-khak piⁿ ê chhiuⁿ kap chúi-pân. Nn̄g lâng lī-khui
1Samuel26:13 Āu-lâi
1Samuel26:14 Tāi-pi̍t tùi kun-tūi kap Nî-ní ê kiáⁿ Ap-nî-ní hoah kóng
1Samuel26:15 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Ap-nî-ní kóng
1Samuel26:16 Lí bô chīn chek-jīm. Góa kí éng-oa̍h ê Siōng Chú chiù-chōa
1Samuel26:17 Sò-lô jīn-chhut sī Tāi-pi̍t ê siaⁿ
1Samuel26:18 I koh kóng
1Samuel26:19 Ông
1Samuel26:20 Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ góa sí tī gōa-kok
1Samuel26:21 Sò-lô ìn kóng
1Samuel26:22 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel26:23 Siōng Chú ōe chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê chèng-gī sìn-si̍t kā i pò-tap; kin-á-ji̍t Siōng Chú ū chiong lí kau tī góa ê chhiú
1Samuel26:24 Góa kin-á-ji̍t khòaⁿ-tāng lí ê sìⁿ-miā
1Samuel26:25 Sò-lô kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel27:1 Tāi-pi̍t sim-lāi siūⁿ
1Samuel27:2 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chhōa la̍k-pah ê pō͘-hā
1Samuel27:3 Tāi-pi̍t kap i nn̄g ê bó͘
1Samuel27:4 Ū lâng kā Sò-lô kóng Tāi-pi̍t í-keng cháu-khì Ka-te̍k
1Samuel27:5 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Samuel27:6 Hit-ji̍t
1Samuel27:7 Tāi-pi̍t tiàm tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê tōe
1Samuel27:8 Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê pō͘-hā chiūⁿ-khì kong-táⁿ Ki-su̍t -lâng
1Samuel27:9 Tāi-pi̍t bô-lūn kong-chiàm sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi
1Samuel27:10 A-kiat -ông ta̍k-piàn lóng ōe mn̄g i
1Samuel27:11 Tāi-pi̍t ta̍k-piàn chiong lâm-lú lóng thâi-sí
1Samuel27:12 A-kiat sìn-jīm Tāi-pi̍t
1Samuel28:1 Kè bô jōa kú
1Samuel28:2 Tāi-pi̍t ìn kóng
1Samuel28:3 Hit-sî Sat-bó-ní í-keng sí
1Samuel28:4 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chū-chi̍p
1Samuel28:5 Sò-lô khòaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-lī-sū ê kun-peng
1Samuel28:6 Sò-lô mn̄g Siōng Chú; Siōng Chú lóng bô ēng bîn-bāng
1Samuel28:7 Sò-lô hoan-hù i ê po̍k-jîn kóng
1Samuel28:8 Sò-lô chiū piàn-chong
1Samuel28:9 Ang-î tùi i kóng
1Samuel28:10 Sò-lô kí Siōng Chú tùi i chiù-chōa
1Samuel28:11 Ang-î kóng
1Samuel28:12 Ang-î khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sat-bó-ní chiū tōa-siaⁿ ki--chhut-lâi
1Samuel28:13 Ông tùi i kóng
1Samuel28:14 Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel28:15 Sat-bó-ní kā Sò-lô kóng
1Samuel28:16 Sat-bó-ní kóng
1Samuel28:17 Siōng Chú ōe chiàu I kau-tài góa tùi lí kóng--ê si̍t-hiān; I í-keng chiong lí ê ông-koân pak khí-lâi kau hō͘ lí ê tâng-phōaⁿ Tāi-pi̍t.
1Samuel28:18 In-ūi lí ûi-pōe Siōng Chú ê ōe
1Samuel28:19 Siōng Chú beh chiong lí kap Í-sek-lia̍t kau tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê chhiú. Bîn-á-chài lí kap lí ê kiáⁿ-jî ōe kap góa chòe-hé; Siōng Chú mā beh chiong Í-sek-lia̍t ê kun-tūi kau tī Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê chhiú.”
1Samuel28:20 Sò-lô in-ūi Sat-bó-ní ê ōe hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
1Samuel28:21 Hit-ê ang-î kiâⁿ óa-khì Sò-lô hia
1Samuel28:22 Taⁿ
1Samuel28:23 Sò-lô kū-choa̍t
1Samuel28:24 Ang-î kóaⁿ-kín khan chhù--ni̍h hit-chiah pûi gû-á khì thâi
1Samuel28:25 pâi tī Sò-lô kap i ê po̍k-jîn bīn-chêng
1Samuel29:1 Hui-lī-sū -lâng tiàu-chi̍p in só͘-ū ê kun-tūi kàu A-hut. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Iâ-su-lia̍t ê chúi-chôaⁿ piⁿ chat-iâⁿ.
1Samuel29:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê siú-léng tòa-peng chhut-tīn
1Samuel29:3 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê chiòng-léng kóng
1Samuel29:4 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê chiòng-léng tùi A-kiat siū-khì
1Samuel29:5 Í-chêng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiàu-bú ê sî
1Samuel29:6 A-kiat kiò Tāi-pi̍t lâi
1Samuel29:7 Taⁿ lí pêng-an tńg--khì

1Samuel29:11 Keh-chá-khí
1Samuel30:1 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t
1Samuel30:2 lia̍h hū-lú kap siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng
1Samuel30:3 Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê pō͘-hā kàu hit-ê siâⁿ
1Samuel30:4 Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng chiū khui-siaⁿ háu
1Samuel30:5 Tāi-pi̍t nn̄g ê bó͘
1Samuel30:6 Tāi-pi̍t hui-siông tio̍h-kip
1Samuel30:7 Tāi-pi̍t kā A-hi-bí-le̍k ê kiáⁿ chè-si A-pí-a-tha kóng
1Samuel30:8 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng Chú kóng
1Samuel30:9 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chhōa i ê pō͘-hā la̍k-pah lâng chhut-hoat
1Samuel30:10 
1Samuel30:11 In tī iá-gōa tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng
1Samuel30:12 koh hō͘ i chi̍t lia̍p bû-hoa-kó-koaⁿ-oân
1Samuel30:13 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g i kóng
1Samuel30:14 Goán chhim-hoān Iû-tāi lâm-pō͘ ê Ki-lī-thê kap Ka-le̍k tōe-khu
1Samuel30:15 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g i kóng
1Samuel30:16 I chhōa Tāi-pi̍t lo̍h--khì ê sî
1Samuel30:17 Tāi-pi̍t tùi thiⁿ-bē-kng kong-kek in kàu hông-hun-àm; chí-ū sì-pah ê khiâ lo̍k-tô ê siàu-liân-lâng cháu ū khì
1Samuel30:18 A-má-le̍k -lâng kiap--khì ê châi-bu̍t
1Samuel30:19 A-má-le̍k -lâng chhiúⁿ--khì-ê
1Samuel30:20 Tāi-pi̍t ê pō͘-hā chiong só͘-ū chhiúⁿ--lâi ê gû-kûn iûⁿ-kûn
1Samuel30:21 Tāi-pi̍t tńg-lâi kàu hiah-ê in-ūi ià-siān bô tè i khì
1Samuel30:22 Kap Tāi-pi̍t khì ê lâng tiong-kan ū chi̍t-kóa pháiⁿ-lâng húi-lūi án-ni kóng
1Samuel30:23 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Samuel30:24 Lín chit-khoán chòe-hoat siáⁿ-lâng ōe tông-ì? Chhut-tīn ê lâng pun-tio̍h jōa-chōe
1Samuel30:25 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
1Samuel30:26 Tāi-pi̍t kàu Sé-kek-la ê sî
1Samuel30:27 I chiong lé-mi̍h sàng hō͘ tiàm tī Pek-te̍k-lī
1Samuel30:28 A-lô-ní
1Samuel30:29 La-hap-le̍k
1Samuel30:30 Hô-ní-má
1Samuel30:31 Hi-pek-lûn
1Samuel31:1 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kong-kek Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiàn-pāi tô-cháu
1Samuel31:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng tui-jip Sò-lô kap i hiah-ê kiáⁿ
1Samuel31:3 Sò-lô siū-tio̍h béng-lia̍t ê kong-kek; i hō͘ siā-chìⁿ ê lâng hoat-kiàn
1Samuel31:4 Sò-lô kā thòe i gia̍h kun-khì ê sī-ōe kóng
1Samuel31:5 Hit-ê sī-ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sò-lô í-keng sí
1Samuel31:6 Sò-lô kap i saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
1Samuel31:7 Tī Iâ-su-lia̍t Soaⁿ-kok hit-pêng kap tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Samuel31:8 Keh-ji̍t
1Samuel31:9 chiū chām i ê thâu
1Samuel31:10 In chiong Sò-lô ê chiàn-kah hē tī A-su-tha-lio̍k ê biō-lāi
1Samuel31:11 Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí ê chū-bîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-lī-sū -lâng tùi Sò-lô só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì
1Samuel31:12 in ê ióng-sū lóng khí--lâi
1Samuel31:13 chiong in ê kut-hâi chòng tī Ngá-pí ê liú-chhiū kha
2Samuel1:1 Sò-lô sí liáu-āu
2Samuel1:2 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t
2Samuel1:3 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g i kóng
2Samuel1:4 Tāi-pi̍t koh mn̄g i
2Samuel1:5 Tāi-pi̍t kā hit-ê siàu-liân-lâng kóng
2Samuel1:6 Kā i pò-kò ê siàu-liân-lâng kóng
2Samuel1:7 I oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa
2Samuel1:8 I mn̄g góa
2Samuel1:9 I koh kā góa kóng
2Samuel1:10 Góa chiū óa--khì
2Samuel1:11 Tāi-pi̍t chiū thiah-li̍h saⁿ
2Samuel1:12 In ūi-tio̍h Sò-lô kap i ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan
2Samuel1:13 Tāi-pi̍t kā tùi i pò-kò ê siàu-liân-lâng mn̄g kóng
2Samuel1:14 Tāi-pi̍t tùi i kóng
2Samuel1:15 Tāi-pi̍t kiò chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng
2Samuel1:16 Tāi-pi̍t kā i kóng
2Samuel1:17 Tāi-pi̍t choh ai-ko
2Samuel1:18 I bēng-lēng lâng chiong chit-siú kiò-chòe “Keng-ko” ê si kà Iû-tāi -lâng chhiùⁿ. Chit-siú si ū kì-chài tī Ngá-soah-ní-kì:
2Samuel1:19 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
2Samuel1:20 M̄-thang tī Ka-te̍k soan-pò͘
2Samuel1:21 Ki-lī-pho-soaⁿ ah
2Samuel1:22 Iok-ná-tan ê keng bô suh-tio̍h tùi-te̍k ê huih bōe siu-hôe; Sò-lô ê to bô chia̍h-tio̍h ióng-sū ê iû bōe ji̍p-siù.
2Samuel1:23 Sò-lô kap Iok-ná-tan lâng-lâng ì-ài
2Samuel1:24 Í-sek-lia̍t ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ah
2Samuel1:25 Ióng-sū kèng-jiân tó tī chiàn-tiûⁿ! Iok-ná-tan siū-thâi tī lí ê soaⁿ-thâu!
2Samuel1:26 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī Iok-ná-tan ah
2Samuel1:27 Ióng-sū kèng-jiân tó--lo̍h-khì! Bú-khì mā lóng húi-hoāi!
2Samuel2:1 Āu-lâi
2Samuel2:2 Tāi-pi̍t chiū kap i nn̄g ê bó͘
2Samuel2:3 Tāi-pi̍t mā chhōa kun-tè i ê lâng kap in ê ka-koàn chòe-hé chiūⁿ--khì; in chiū tòa tī Hi-pek-lûn hiah-ê siâⁿ.
2Samuel2:4 Iû-tāi -lâng lâi hia
2Samuel2:5 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí -lâng
2Samuel2:6 Goān Siōng Chú ēng jîn-chû sêng-si̍t khoán-thāi lín; góa mā beh tap-siā lín
2Samuel2:7 Lín tio̍h kian-kiông ióng-kám
2Samuel2:8 Sò-lô ê goân-sòe
2Samuel2:9 siat-li̍p i choh-ông tī-lí Ki-lia̍t
2Samuel2:10 Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ I-si Pho-siat sì-cha̍p hè chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
2Samuel2:11 Tāi-pi̍t tī Hi-pek-lûn chòe Iû-tāi -ke ê ông
2Samuel2:12 Nî-ní ê kiáⁿ Ap-nî-ní kap Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ I-si Pho-siat ê jîn-sîn
2Samuel2:13 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap kap Tāi-pi̍t ê jîn-sîn mā chhut--khì
2Samuel2:14 Ap-nî-ní tùi Iok-ap kóng
2Samuel2:15 In chiū tiám jîn-sò͘
2Samuel2:16 In ta̍k-ê khiú tùi-hong ê thâu-khak
2Samuel2:17 Hit-ji̍t ê kau-chiàn chin ke̍k-lia̍t; Ap-nî-ní kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t ê pō͘-hā phah-pāi.
2Samuel2:18 Tī hia ū Sé-lō͘-ngá saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
2Samuel2:19 A-sat-hek tui-jip Ap-nî-ní; ti̍t-ti̍t jip
2Samuel2:20 Ap-nî-ní oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ
2Samuel2:21 Ap-nî-ní kā i kóng
2Samuel2:22 Ap-nî-ní koh kā i kóng
2Samuel2:23 A-sat-hek m̄-khéng oa̍t-cháu; Ap-nî-ní chiū ēng chhiuⁿ tò-chhah i ê pak-tó͘
2Samuel2:24 Iok-ap kap A-pí-su tui Ap-nî-ní. Ji̍t lo̍h ê sî
2Samuel2:25 Piān-ngá-bín -lâng chū-chi̍p tè Ap-nî-ní
2Samuel2:26 Ap-nî-ní kiò Iok-ap kóng
2Samuel2:27 Iok-ap kóng
2Samuel2:28 Tùi án-ni
2Samuel2:29 Ap-nî-ní kap tè i ê lâng kui-mî hêng-kun
2Samuel2:30 Iok-ap bô koh jip Ap-nî-ní
2Samuel2:31 M̄-kú Tāi-pi̍t ê peng phah-sí Piān-ngá-bín -lâng kap tè Ap-nî-ní ê lâng
2Samuel2:32 In kng A-sat-hek khì Pek-lī-hêng
2Samuel3:1 Sò-lô ê ke kap Tāi-pi̍t ê ke kau-chiàn chin kú; Tāi-pi̍t ná kiông-sēng
2Samuel3:2 Tāi-pi̍t tī Hi-pek-lûn siⁿ la̍k ê kiáⁿ: tōa-kiáⁿ Àm-lūn
2Samuel3:3 tē-jī ê Ki-lī-ap
2Samuel3:4 tē-sì ê A-to-nî-ngá
2Samuel3:5 tē-la̍k ê Í-te̍k-liām
2Samuel3:6 Sò-lô ê ke kap Tāi-pi̍t ê ke kè-sio̍k teh kau-chiàn
2Samuel3:7 Sò-lô ū chi̍t ê hui
2Samuel3:8 Ap-nî-ní in-ūi I-si Pho-siat ê ōe chiū chin siū-khì
2Samuel3:9 Góa nā bô chiàu Siōng Chú só͘ li̍p-sè tùi Tāi-pi̍t ê èng-ún lâi chòe
2Samuel3:10 
2Samuel3:11 I-si Pho-siat in-ūi kiaⁿ Ap-nî-ní
2Samuel3:12 Ap-nî-ní chhe sù-chiá tāi-piáu i khì kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
2Samuel3:13 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel3:14 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ I-si Pho-siat
2Samuel3:15 I-si Pho-siat chiū phài lâng tùi Bí-kah ê tiōng-hu
2Samuel3:16 I ê tiōng-hu tè tī i ê āu-bīn
2Samuel3:17 Ap-nî-ní kap Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló chham-siông
2Samuel3:18 taⁿ tio̍h chhái-chhú hêng-tōng. In-ūi Siōng Chú ū èng-ún kóng
2Samuel3:19 Ap-nî-ní mā chiong chiah-ê ōe kóng hō͘ Piān-ngá-bín -lâng thiaⁿ. Āu-lâi i khì Hi-pek-lûn
2Samuel3:20 Ap-nî-ní chhōa jī-cha̍p ê lâng lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t. Tāi-pi̍t siat iàn-se̍k hoan-gêng in.
2Samuel3:21 Ap-nî-ní kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel3:22 Hit-sî
2Samuel3:23 Iok-ap kap tè i ê choân-kun í-keng kàu
2Samuel3:24 Iok-ap khì kìⁿ ông kóng
2Samuel3:25 Lí chai Nî-ní ê kiáⁿ Ap-nî-ní lâi sī beh phiàn lí
2Samuel3:26 Iok-ap tùi Tāi-pi̍t hia chhut--lâi
2Samuel3:27 Ap-nî-ní tńg-lâi kàu Hi-pek-lûn ê sî
2Samuel3:28 Āu-lâi Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ--tio̍h
2Samuel3:29 Goān hit-ê chōe Iok-ap kap in lāu-pē choân-ke ka-kī taⁿ; koh goān Iok-ap ê ke put-toān ū lâng tì-tio̍h hā-siau á-sī bâ-hong
2Samuel3:30 Iok-ap kap i ê sió-tī A-pí-su thâi-sí Ap-nî-ní
2Samuel3:31 Tāi-pi̍t bēng-lēng Iok-ap kap tè i ê lâng kóng
2Samuel3:32 In kā Ap-nî-ní bâi-chòng tī Hi-pek-lûn. Ông óa Ap-nî-ní ê bōng thî-khàu
2Samuel3:33 Ông ūi-tio̍h Ap-nî-ní chhiùⁿ ai-ko
2Samuel3:34 Lí ê chhiú bô siū khún-pa̍k
2Samuel3:35 Ji̍t-thâu iáu-bē lo̍h-soaⁿ í-chêng
2Samuel3:36 Chèng-lâng chai-iáⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì
2Samuel3:37 Hit-ji̍t
2Samuel3:38 Ông tùi i ê pō͘-hā kóng
2Samuel3:39 Góa sui-jiân siū boah-iû soán-li̍p choh-ông
2Samuel4:1 Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ I-si Pho-siat thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ap-nî-ní sí tī Hi-pek-lûn
2Samuel4:2 I-si Pho-siat ū nn̄g ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ
2Samuel4:3 Pí-lio̍k -lâng chá-chêng cháu kàu Ki-tha-im
2Samuel4:4 Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ nn̄g kha lóng pái
2Samuel4:5 Pí-lio̍k -lâng Lîm-bûn ê kiáⁿ Lī-kah kap Pa-ná chhut--khì
2Samuel4:6 In ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi ké-iáⁿ beh put be̍h-á
2Samuel4:7 In ji̍p pâng-lāi ê sî
2Samuel4:8 In tòa I-si Pho-siat ê thâu-khak khì Hi-pek-lûn Tāi-pi̍t hia
2Samuel4:9 Tāi-pi̍t ìn Pí-lio̍k -lâng Lîm-bûn ê kiáⁿ Lī-kah kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī Pa-ná
2Samuel4:10 í-chêng ū lâng lâi Sé-kek-la pò góa kóng
2Samuel4:11 Hô-hòng lín chiah-ê pháiⁿ-lâng! Lín thàn bû-ko͘ ê lâng teh khùn ê sî
2Samuel4:12 Tāi-pi̍t bēng-lēng pō͘-hā kā in thâi-sí
2Samuel5:1 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
2Samuel5:2 Khah-chá Sò-lô chòe goán ê ông ê sî
2Samuel5:3 Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló lóng lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t -ông
2Samuel5:4 Tāi-pi̍t chē-ūi ê sî saⁿ-cha̍p hè
2Samuel5:5 I tī Hi-pek-lûn chòe Iû-tāi -ông chhit nî la̍k kò-ge̍h; tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chòe choân Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi ê ông saⁿ-cha̍p-saⁿ nî.
2Samuel5:6 Ông kap tè i ê lâng khì kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Samuel5:7 M̄-kú Tāi-pi̍t ū kong-chhú Sek-an ê pó-lúi
2Samuel5:8 Hit-ji̍t
2Samuel5:9 Tāi-pi̍t tòa tī pó-lúi
2Samuel5:10 Tāi-pi̍t jú lâi jú kiông-sēng
2Samuel5:11 Thài-ní -ông Hi-lân phài sù-chiá tòa pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ
2Samuel5:12 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chai Siōng Chú kian-li̍p i chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
2Samuel5:13 Tāi-pi̍t lī-khui Hi-pek-lûn liáu-āu
2Samuel5:14 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siⁿ ê kiáⁿ sī Sa-bō͘-a
2Samuel5:15 Ek-hat
2Samuel5:16 Í-lī-sa-má
2Samuel5:17 Hui-lī-sū -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t siū boah-iû soán-li̍p chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
2Samuel5:18 Hui-lī-sū -lâng lâi
2Samuel5:19 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng Chú kóng
2Samuel5:20 Tāi-pi̍t lâi kàu Pa-le̍k Pí-la-sim
2Samuel5:21 Hui-lī-sū -lâng tô-cháu ê sî kā in ê ngó͘-siōng tàn tī hia; Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng kā hiah-ê ngó͘-siōng khioh--khì.
2Samuel5:22 Hui-lī-sū -lâng koh lâi
2Samuel5:23 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng Chú. Siōng Chú kóng
2Samuel5:24 Lí thiaⁿ-tio̍h chhiū-bé ū hêng-kun ê siaⁿ
2Samuel5:25 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chiàu Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng khì chòe
2Samuel6:1 Tāi-pi̍t koh chū-chi̍p Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tiong-kan te̍k-soán ê saⁿ-bān lâng.
2Samuel6:2 Tāi-pi̍t chhōa chiah-ê lâng chhut-hoat
2Samuel6:3 In chiong Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi hē tī sin ê chhia
2Samuel6:4 In chiong chhia kap Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi tùi soaⁿ-téng A-pí-ná-ta̍t ê chhù chài--chhut-lâi. A-hi-iok kiâⁿ tī kūi ê thâu-chêng.
2Samuel6:5 Tāi-pi̍t kap Í-sek-lia̍t choân-ke
2Samuel6:6 In kàu Ná-khong ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
2Samuel6:7 Siōng Chú tùi O͘-sat hoat tōa siū-khì; in-ūi i ê sit-chhò
2Samuel6:8 Tāi-pi̍t in-ūi Siōng Chú phah O͘-sat
2Samuel6:9 Hit-ji̍t
2Samuel6:10 Tùi án-ni
2Samuel6:11 Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi thêng tī Ka-te̍k -lâng Gô-pia̍t Í-tong ê chhù saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú
2Samuel6:12 Ū lâng kā Tāi-pi̍t -ông pò-kò
2Samuel6:13 Kng Siōng Chú iok-kūi ê lâng kiâⁿ la̍k pō͘
2Samuel6:14 Tāi-pi̍t chhēng iù-môa-pò͘ ê í-hut-tek tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng chīn-la̍t thiàu-bú.
2Samuel6:15 Án-ni
2Samuel6:16 Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi ji̍p Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ ê sî
2Samuel6:17 In kng Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi ji̍p--khì
2Samuel6:18 Tāi-pi̍t hiàn chiah-ê chè liáu-āu
2Samuel6:19 I koh pun mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng
2Samuel6:20 Tāi-pi̍t tò-khì beh kā i ê ka-sio̍k chiok-hok
2Samuel6:21 Tāi-pi̍t kā Bí-kah kóng
2Samuel6:22 Góa beh pí kin-á-ji̍t án-ni koh-khah chho͘-sio̍k. Sui-jiân lí khòaⁿ góa chòe pi-chiān
2Samuel6:23 Tùi án-ni

2Samuel7:2 Ông tùi sian-ti Ná-tan kóng

2Samuel7:4 Hit-mî Siōng Chú ê ōe lîm-kàu Ná-tan
2Samuel7:5 “Lí khì kā góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t kóng

2Samuel7:7 Góa kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tâng-kiâⁿ ê sî
2Samuel7:8 “Taⁿ lí tio̍h kā góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel7:9 Lí bô-lūn khì tó-ūi
2Samuel7:10 Góa beh ūi-tio̍h góa ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t chún-pī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi
2Samuel7:11 
2Samuel7:12 Kàu lí ê hè-siū móa
2Samuel7:13 I beh ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ khí sèng-tiān; góa beh kian-kò͘ i ê ông-ūi ti̍t-kàu éng-oán.
2Samuel7:14 Góa beh chòe i ê pē
2Samuel7:15 M̄-kú góa ê chû-ài bōe lī-khui i
2Samuel7:16 Lí ê ke kap lí ê kok
2Samuel7:17 Ná-tan chiū chiàu Siōng-tè khé-sī ê ōe lóng kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng.
2Samuel7:18 Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiū ji̍p-khì hōe-bō͘
2Samuel7:19 M̄-nā án-ni
2Samuel7:20 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
2Samuel7:21 Lí ū chòe chiah-ê tōa-sū
2Samuel7:22 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
2Samuel7:23 Sè-kan kiám ū chi̍t ê kok chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t? Siōng-tè lí ū kiù-sio̍k in
2Samuel7:24 Lí ū kiàn-li̍p Í-sek-lia̍t éng-oán chòe lí ka-kī ê chú-bîn; Siōng Chú ah

2Samuel7:28 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú
2Samuel7:29 Taⁿ
2Samuel8:1 Āu-lâi
2Samuel8:2 Tāi-pi̍t koh phah-pāi Mô͘-ap -lâng
2Samuel8:3 Lī-ha̍p ê kiáⁿ Só-pa -ông Hap-tāi-tí-siā khì Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô
2Samuel8:4 lia̍h i ê bé-peng chi̍t-chheng chhit-pah
2Samuel8:5 Tāi-má-sū-kek ê Sū-lī-a -lâng lâi pang-chān Só-pa -ông Hap-tāi-tí-siā
2Samuel8:6 Tùi án-ni
2Samuel8:7 Tāi-pi̍t chiong Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê pō͘-hā só͘ ēng kim ê tún-pâi lóng tòa-lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
2Samuel8:8 Tāi-pi̍t -ông koh tùi Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê siâⁿ Pí-tha kap Pí-lô-tha
2Samuel8:9 Hap-má -ông Tô-í thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t phah-iâⁿ Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê choân-kun
2Samuel8:10 chiū chhe i ê kiáⁿ Iok-lân tòa kim-khì
2Samuel8:11 Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiū chiong chiah-ê mi̍h
2Samuel8:12 
2Samuel8:13 Tāi-pi̍t tī Iâm ê Soaⁿ-kok phah-sí Í-tong -lâng chi̍t-bān poeh-chheng; tò--lâi ê sî
2Samuel8:14 Tāi-pi̍t tī Í-tong choân-tōe siat kun-iâⁿ; Í-tong -lâng lóng kui-sūn i. Tāi-pi̍t bô-lūn khì tó-ūi
2Samuel8:15 Tāi-pi̍t chòe choân Í-sek-lia̍t ê ông
2Samuel8:16 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap chòe goân-sòe
2Samuel8:17 A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha ê kiáⁿ A-hi-bí-le̍k chòe chè-si; Se-lâi-ngá chòe su-kì;
2Samuel8:18 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá choh-thâu chí-hui Ki-lī-thê -lâng kap Pí-lī-thê -lâng. Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ lóng chòe chè-si.
2Samuel9:1 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g kóng

2Samuel10:1 Āu-lâi
2Samuel10:2 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel10:3 A-bûn -lâng ê léng-siù kā in ê chú-lâng Hap-lūn kóng
2Samuel10:4 Hap-lūn chiū lia̍h Tāi-pi̍t ê jîn-sîn
2Samuel10:5 Ū lâng tùi Tāi-pi̍t pò-kò
2Samuel10:6 A-bûn -lâng chai in jiá Tāi-pi̍t siū-khì
2Samuel10:7 Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
2Samuel10:8 A-bûn -lâng chhut-lâi tī siâⁿ-mn̂g ê thâu-chêng pâi-tīn; Só-pa kap Lī-ha̍p ê Sū-lī-a -lâng
2Samuel10:9 Iok-ap khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i ê chêng-āu lóng ū tùi-te̍k pâi-tīn
2Samuel10:10 Iok-ap chiong kî-tha ê peng-sū kau hō͘ i ê sió-tī A-pí-su
2Samuel10:11 Iok-ap tùi A-pí-su kóng
2Samuel10:12 Tio̍h kian-kiông! Tio̍h ūi lán ê tông-pau kap lán Siōng-tè ê siâⁿ ióng-kám chhut-chiàn. Siōng Chú ōe chiàu I khòaⁿ-chòe hó--ê khì chòe.”
2Samuel10:13 Iok-ap chhōa i ê kun-tūi chìn-chêng kap Sū-lī-a -lâng kau-chiàn; Sū-lī-a -lâng chiàn-pāi
2Samuel10:14 A-bûn -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sū-lī-a -lâng tô-cháu
2Samuel10:15 Sū-lī-a -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
2Samuel10:16 Só-pa -ông Hap-tāi-tí-siā phài lâng khì Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô hit-pêng tiàu Sū-lī-a ê kun-tūi lâi; in chiū lâi kàu Hi-lân. Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê chiong-kun Sok-hoat chhōa kun-tūi lâi.
2Samuel10:17 Ū lâng pò-kò Tāi-pi̍t
2Samuel10:18 Sū-lī-a -lâng thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; Tāi-pi̍t thâi-sí Sū-lī-a ê chiàn-chhia-peng chhit-pah lâng
2Samuel10:19 Hap-tāi-tí-siā sio̍k-hā hiah-ê ông khòaⁿ-tio̍h in thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng

2Samuel11:2 Ū chi̍t ji̍t hông-hun ê sî

2Samuel11:16 Iok-ap ûi siâⁿ ê sî

2Samuel11:20 ông nā siū-khì

2Samuel11:22 Sù-chiá khì
2Samuel11:23 Sù-chiá tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel11:24 Siā-chìⁿ ê lâng tùi chhiûⁿ-téng siā lí ê pō͘-hā; ông ê pō͘-hā sí kúi-nā lâng

2Samuel11:27 Song-sū kiat-sok
2Samuel12:1 Siōng Chú chhe Ná-tan khì kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t; Ná-tan kàu i hia
2Samuel12:2 Hó-gia̍h--ê ū gû iûⁿ chin chōe;
2Samuel12:3 sàn-chhiah--ê sím-mi̍h to bô
2Samuel12:4 Ū chi̍t ê chhut-gōa-lâng lâi hó-gia̍h-lâng hia; hó-gia̍h-lâng m̄-kam tùi ka-kī ê iûⁿ-kûn gû-kûn tiong lia̍h chi̍t chiah lâi chiau-thāi lâng-kheh
2Samuel12:5 Tāi-pi̍t tùi hit-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng hoat tōa siū-khì
2Samuel12:6 i tio̍h pê sì pē ê iûⁿ-á
2Samuel12:7 Ná-tan tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel12:8 Góa ēng lí chú-lâng ê chhù-the̍h hō͘ lí
2Samuel12:9 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ biáu-sī Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
2Samuel12:10 Taⁿ to-kiàm beh éng-oán bô lī-khui lí ê ke
2Samuel12:11 Siōng Chú koh án-ni kóng
2Samuel12:12 Lí tī àm-tiong chòe ê tāi-chì
2Samuel12:13 Tāi-pi̍t kā Ná-tan kóng
2Samuel12:14 Chóng-sī in-ūi lí chòe chit-ê tāi-chì
2Samuel12:15 Ná-tan chiū tò-khì in tau. Siōng Chú phah Tāi-pi̍t kap O͘-lī-a ê bó͘ siⁿ ê eⁿ-á
2Samuel12:16 Tāi-pi̍t chiū ūi-tio̍h hit-ê kiáⁿ tùi Siōng-tè kî-tó. Tāi-pi̍t koh kìm-chia̍h
2Samuel12:17 I kiong-lāi hiah-ê tiúⁿ-ló khì kàu i ê sin-piⁿ
2Samuel12:18 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t gín-á sí; Tāi-pi̍t ê jîn-sîn m̄-káⁿ kā i kóng gín-á sí lah; in-ūi in kóng
2Samuel12:19 Tāi-pi̍t khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê jîn-sîn teh chhi-bú-chhi-chhū
2Samuel12:20 Tāi-pi̍t chiū tùi thô͘-kha khí--lâi
2Samuel12:21 Jîn-sîn mn̄g i
2Samuel12:22 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel12:23 Taⁿ gín-á í-keng sí
2Samuel12:24 Tāi-pi̍t an-ùi i ê bó͘ Poa̍t-sī-pa
2Samuel12:25 chiū thok sian-ti Ná-tan kā i hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-tí-tí-a.
2Samuel12:26 Iok-ap kong-táⁿ A-bûn -lâng ê kiaⁿ-siâⁿ La-pa.
2Samuel12:27 Iok-ap chhe sù-chiá khì kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel12:28 Taⁿ lí tio̍h chū-chi̍p kî-tha ê kun-peng lâi ûi-kong chit-ê siâⁿ
2Samuel12:29 Tāi-pi̍t chiū tiàu-chi̍p só͘-ū kun-peng khì La-pa
