2Samuel13:1 Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ Ap-sa-liông ū chi̍t ê chin súi ê sió-bē
2Samuel13:2 Àm-lūn ài i ê sió-bē Tha-má ài kah phòa-pīⁿ; in-ūi i sī chāi-sek-lú
2Samuel13:3 Àm-lūn ū chi̍t ê pêng-iú
2Samuel13:4 I tùi Àm-lūn kóng
2Samuel13:5 Iok-ná-ta̍t chiū tùi i kóng
2Samuel13:6 Àm-lūn chiū tó--teh
2Samuel13:7 Tāi-pi̍t chiū phài lâng khì Tha-má ê chhù
2Samuel13:8 Tha-má chiū khì i ê hiaⁿ-ko Àm-lūn ê chhù; hit-sî Àm-lūn tó tī bîn-chhn̂g. Tha-má tī i khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h ê só͘-chāi nóa mī-hún
2Samuel13:9 Tha-má chiong kui-pôaⁿ ê piáⁿ hē tī Àm-lūn ê bīn-chêng
2Samuel13:10 I kā Tha-má kóng
2Samuel13:11 I phâng-khì hō͘ Àm-lūn chia̍h ê sî
2Samuel13:12 I ìn kóng
2Samuel13:13 Góa
2Samuel13:14 Chóng-sī Àm-lūn m̄-khéng thiaⁿ i ê ōe; Àm-lūn pí i khah ū la̍t
2Samuel13:15 Liáu-āu
2Samuel13:16 I kā Àm-lūn kóng
2Samuel13:17 kiò sū-hāu i ê po̍k-jîn lâi
2Samuel13:18 Àm-lūn ê lô͘-po̍k chiū kā i thoa--chhut-khì; chhut-khì liáu
2Samuel13:19 Tha-má sám hé-hu tī thâu-khak
2Samuel13:20 I ê chhin hiaⁿ-ko Ap-sa-liông mn̄g i kóng
2Samuel13:21 Tāi-pi̍t -ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê sū
2Samuel13:22 Ap-sa-liông in-ūi Àm-lūn bú-jio̍k i ê sió-bē Tha-má
2Samuel13:23 Nn̄g nî āu
2Samuel13:24 Ap-sa-liông lâi kìⁿ ông
2Samuel13:25 Ông kā Ap-sa-liông kóng
2Samuel13:26 Ap-sa-liông kóng
2Samuel13:27 Ap-sa-liông chài-saⁿ chhéng-kiû. Ông chiū ún-chún Àm-lūn kap ông só͘-ū ê kiáⁿ lóng khì.
2Samuel13:28 Ap-sa-liông hoan-hù i ê pō͘-hā kóng
2Samuel13:29 Ap-sa-liông ê pō͘-hā chiàu Ap-sa-liông ê bēng-lēng thâi Àm-lūn; ông ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng peh--khí-lâi
2Samuel13:30 In iáu tī lō͘--ni̍h
2Samuel13:31 Ông chiū khí--lâi thiah-li̍h saⁿ
2Samuel13:32 Tāi-pi̍t ê hiaⁿ-ko Sī-bí-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-ta̍t kā ông kóng
2Samuel13:33 Taⁿ góa ê chú góa ê ông
2Samuel13:34 Hit-sî Ap-sa-liông í-keng tô-cháu. Siú-bōng ê lâng gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ
2Samuel13:35 Iok-ná-ta̍t kā ông kóng
2Samuel13:36 Ōe tú-á kóng soah
2Samuel13:37 Ap-sa-liông cháu-khì A-bí-hut ê kiáⁿ Ki-su̍t -ông Ta̍t-mái hia. Tāi-pi̍t ta̍k-ji̍t ūi-tio̍h i ê kiáⁿ siong-sim.
2Samuel13:38 Ap-sa-liông cháu-khì Ki-su̍t
2Samuel13:39 Tùi Àm-lūn ê sí
2Samuel14:1 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap chai ông ê sim iáu-teh siūⁿ Ap-sa-liông
2Samuel14:2 chiū phài lâng khì Thê-ko-a
2Samuel14:3 Jiân-āu lí ji̍p-khì kìⁿ ông
2Samuel14:4 Thê-ko-a ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi kìⁿ ông
2Samuel14:5 Ông mn̄g i kóng
2Samuel14:6 Lú-pī ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ
2Samuel14:7 Hiān-chāi choân ka-cho̍k lóng teh kong-kek lí ê lú-pī
2Samuel14:8 Ông kā hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel14:9 Thê-ko-a ê hū-jîn-lâng koh tùi ông kóng
2Samuel14:10 Ông kóng
2Samuel14:11 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel14:12 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel14:13 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel14:14 Lán lóng it-tēng ōe sí
2Samuel14:15 Góa chiong chiah-ê ōe kā góa ê chú góa ê ông kóng
2Samuel14:16 Ū lâng beh chiong góa kap góa ê kiáⁿ tùi Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê sán-gia̍p chòe-chi̍t-ē tû-bia̍t. M̄-kú ông ōe thiaⁿ
2Samuel14:17 Lú-pī siūⁿ
2Samuel14:18 Ông ìn hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel14:19 Ông kóng
2Samuel14:20 Lí ê po̍k-jîn Iok-ap án-ni chòe
2Samuel14:21 Āu-lâi
2Samuel14:22 Iok-ap phak tī thô͘-kha pài
2Samuel14:23 Tùi án-ni Iok-ap chhut-hoat khì Ki-su̍t
2Samuel14:24 Ông kóng
2Samuel14:25 Tī Í-sek-lia̍t tiong
2Samuel14:26 Ap-sa-liông ta̍k-nî tio̍h chián chi̍t piàn thâu-mn̂g
2Samuel14:27 Ap-sa-liông siⁿ saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
2Samuel14:28 Ap-sa-liông tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng móa nn̄g nî
2Samuel14:29 Ap-sa-liông phài lâng khì kiò Iok-ap
2Samuel14:30 Ap-sa-liông tùi i ê pō͘-hā kóng
2Samuel14:31 Iok-ap khì Ap-sa-liông ê chhù
2Samuel14:32 Ap-sa-liông kā Iok-ap kóng

2Samuel15:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
2Samuel15:2 Ap-sa-liông siông-siông chá-chá khí--lâi
2Samuel15:3 Ap-sa-liông kā i kóng
2Samuel15:4 Ap-sa-liông koh kóng
2Samuel15:5 Nā ū lâng lâi pài i
2Samuel15:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan
2Samuel15:7 Sì nî āu
2Samuel15:8 In-ūi po̍k-jîn tòa tī Sū-lī-a ê Ki-su̍t ê sî ū hē-goān kóng
2Samuel15:9 Ông kā i kóng
2Samuel15:10 Ap-sa-liông àm-tiong phài sù-chiá khì Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k
2Samuel15:11 M̄-kú Ap-sa-liông tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘ chhiáⁿ kap i khì hit nn̄g-pah ê lâng
2Samuel15:12 Ap-sa-liông hiàn-chè ê sî
2Samuel15:13 Ū lâng lâi kā Tāi-pi̍t pò-kò kóng
2Samuel15:14 Tāi-pi̍t tùi hiah-ê kap i tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê jîn-sîn kóng
2Samuel15:15 Ông ê jîn-sîn kā ông kóng
2Samuel15:16 Ông chhut-siâⁿ
2Samuel15:17 Siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng mā tè ông lī-khui; in kiâⁿ kàu siâⁿ ê chòe-āu chi̍t keng chhù thêng--teh.
2Samuel15:18 Ông ê jîn-sîn lóng tī i ê bīn-chêng kiâⁿ--kè-khì; só͘-ū ê Ki-lī-thê -lâng
2Samuel15:19 Ông kā Ka-te̍k -lâng Í-thài kóng
2Samuel15:20 Lí chā-hng chiah lâi
2Samuel15:21 Í-thài ìn ông kóng
2Samuel15:22 Tāi-pi̍t kā Í-thài kóng
2Samuel15:23 Kun-tè ông ê lâng kè--khì ê sî
2Samuel15:24 Khòaⁿ leh
2Samuel15:25 Ông kā Sat-tok kóng
2Samuel15:26 Siōng Chú nā kóng
2Samuel15:27 Ông koh kā Sat-tok kóng
2Samuel15:28 Góa ōe tī khòng-iá ê tō͘-kháu thèng-hāu lín pò siau-sit hō͘ góa.”
2Samuel15:29 Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha chiū kng Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; in chiū lâu tī hia.
2Samuel15:30 Tāi-pi̍t tùi ǹg Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ ê lō͘ chiūⁿ--khì
2Samuel15:31 Ū lâng pò Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel15:32 Tāi-pi̍t chiūⁿ kàu soaⁿ-téng kèng-pài Siōng-tè ê só͘-chāi ê sî
2Samuel15:33 Tāi-pi̍t kā i kóng
2Samuel15:34 lí nā tò-khì siâⁿ-lāi
2Samuel15:35 Chè-si Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha mā ōe kap lí tī hia. Lí tī ông-kiong só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê
2Samuel15:36 Sat-tok ê kiáⁿ A-hi-má-su
2Samuel15:37 Tùi án-ni
2Samuel16:1 Tāi-pi̍t kè soaⁿ-téng bô jōa hn̄g
2Samuel16:2 Ông mn̄g Sé-pa kóng
2Samuel16:3 Ông mn̄g kóng
2Samuel16:4 Ông kā Sé-pa kóng
2Samuel16:5 Tāi-pi̍t -ông kàu Pa-hō͘-lîm ê sî
2Samuel16:6 koh khioh chio̍h-thâu tìm Tāi-pi̍t -ông kap i ê jîn-sîn; hit-sî kun-tè ông ê lâng kap ióng-sū lóng tī ông ê chó-iū.
2Samuel16:7 Sī-múi chiù-chó͘ kóng
2Samuel16:8 Lí chhiúⁿ Sò-lô ê ông-ūi
2Samuel16:9 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ A-pí-su kā ông kóng
2Samuel16:10 Ông kóng
2Samuel16:11 Tāi-pi̍t koh kā A-pí-su kap ông ê jîn-sîn kóng
2Samuel16:12 Kiám-chhái Siōng Chú tài-liām góa ê khó͘-kéng
2Samuel16:13 Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ. Sī-múi kiâⁿ tī tùi-bīn ê soaⁿ-phiâⁿ
2Samuel16:14 Ông kap tè i ê lâng kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi; in lóng chin ià-siān
2Samuel16:15 Ap-sa-liông kap tè i ê Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Samuel16:16 Tāi-pi̍t ê pêng-iú A-ki -lâng Hō͘-su lâi Ap-sa-liông hia

2Samuel16:23 Hit-sî A-hi-to-hut só͘ thê-chhut ê kè-chhek
2Samuel17:1 A-hi-to-hut tùi Ap-sa-liông kóng
2Samuel17:2 Góa thàn i ià-siān sit-chì
2Samuel17:3 hō͘ jîn-bîn lóng kui-sūn lí. Lí só͘ beh thâi hit-ê lâng í-gōa
2Samuel17:4 Ap-sa-liông kap Í-sek-lia̍t só͘-ū ê tiúⁿ-ló lóng chàn-sêng chit-ê thê-gī.
2Samuel17:5 Ap-sa-liông kóng
2Samuel17:6 Hō͘-su kàu Ap-sa-liông hia
2Samuel17:7 Hō͘-su tùi Ap-sa-liông kóng

2Samuel17:9 Hiān-chāi i it-tēng bih tī soaⁿ-tōng á-sī pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi. Nā ū lâng tāi-seng hō͘ i thâi-sí
2Samuel17:10 Hit-sî

2Samuel17:12 Án-ni
2Samuel17:13 I nā thiat-thè ji̍p chi̍t ê siâⁿ

2Samuel17:21 In lī-khui liáu

2Samuel17:23 A-hi-to-hut chai i ê kè-chhek bô siū chhái-la̍p
2Samuel17:24 Tāi-pi̍t kàu Má-hap-liām ê sî
2Samuel17:25 Ap-sa-liông siat-li̍p A-má-sat chòe goân-sòe tāi-thòe Iok-ap. A-má-sat sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng Í-te̍k-la ê kiáⁿ; Í-te̍k-la bat kap Ná-hat ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Ài-pí-kai tâng-pâng. Chit-ê Ài-pí-kai kap Iok-ap ê lāu-bú Sé-lō͘-ngá sī chí-bē.

2Samuel18:1 Tāi-pi̍t tiàu-chi̍p tè i ê kun-peng

2Samuel18:4 Ông kā in kóng
2Samuel18:5 Ông bēng-lēng Iok-ap

2Samuel18:7 Tī hia
2Samuel18:8 Kau-chiàn thòaⁿ kàu choân tōe-khu; hit-ji̍t tī chhiū-nâ lāi sí--ê
2Samuel18:9 Ap-sa-liông khiâ lô
2Samuel18:10 Ū chi̍t ê peng-sū khòaⁿ--tio̍h

2Samuel18:23 I ìn kóng

2Samuel19:4 Ông tà i ê bīn
2Samuel19:5 Iok-ap ji̍p ông tòa ê só͘-chāi khì kìⁿ ông

2Samuel19:7 Taⁿ lí tio̍h khí--lâi chhut-khì an-ùi lí ê pō͘-hā. Góa kí Siōng Chú chiù-chōa
2Samuel19:8 Ông chiū khí--lâi
2Samuel19:9 Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k chi-cho̍k ê lâng hun-hun gī-lūn

2Samuel19:19 tùi ông kóng

2Samuel19:26 I ìn kóng

2Samuel19:28 Góa ê pē choân-ke
2Samuel19:29 Ông kā i kóng

2Samuel19:32 Pa-se-lâi sī poeh-cha̍p-hè ê lāu-lâng. I chin hó-gia̍h; ông tòa tī Má-hap-liām ê sî
2Samuel19:33 Ông tùi Pa-se-lâi kóng
2Samuel19:34 Pa-se-lâi tùi ông kóng

2Samuel19:37 Kiû lí chún lí ê po̍k-jîn tò--khì
2Samuel19:38 Ông kóng

2Samuel19:40 Ông kè hô

2Samuel20:1 Hit-sî ū chi̍t ê húi-lūi
2Samuel20:2 Tùi án-ni
2Samuel20:3 Tāi-pi̍t kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Samuel20:4 Ông tùi A-má-sat kóng
2Samuel20:5 A-má-sat chiū khì chio-chi̍p Iû-tāi -lâng
2Samuel20:6 Tāi-pi̍t kā A-pí-su kóng
2Samuel20:7 Iok-ap ê pō͘-hā
2Samuel20:8 In kàu Ki-piàn ê tōa chio̍h-pôaⁿ hia
2Samuel20:9 Iok-ap kā A-má-sat kóng
2Samuel20:10 A-má-sat bô chù-ì Iok-ap tò-chhiú gia̍h kiàm; Iok-ap ēng hit-ki kiàm chha̍k-ji̍p A-má-sat ê pak-tó͘
2Samuel20:11 Ū chi̍t ê Iok-ap ê pō͘-hā khiā tī A-má-sat ê si-thé piⁿ--á
2Samuel20:12 A-má-sat ê si-thé kō kah choân huih tó tī lō͘-tiong
2Samuel20:13 Sin-si tùi lō͘-tiong sóa-cháu í-āu
2Samuel20:14 Sī-pa kiâⁿ-thàu Í-sek-lia̍t só͘-ū ê chi-cho̍k
2Samuel20:15 Iok-ap kap i ê kun-peng kàu Pek Má-ka ê A-pek
2Samuel20:16 Ū chi̍t ê chhong-bêng ê hū-jîn-lâng tùi siâⁿ-téng kiò kóng
2Samuel20:17 Iok-ap chiū kiâⁿ óa--khì. Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel20:18 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Samuel20:19 Goán tī Í-sek-lia̍t tiong sī siōng hô-pêng siōng tiong-sêng ê chi̍t chō siâⁿ. Lí sī siūⁿ-beh húi-bia̍t Í-sek-lia̍t tiong chit-ê chiah-ni̍h iàu-kín ê siâⁿ
2Samuel20:20 Iok-ap ìn kóng
2Samuel20:21 Tāi-chì m̄-sī án-ni
2Samuel20:22 Hū-jîn-lâng chiū ēng i ê tì-hūi sòe-ho̍k chèng-lâng. In chám Pí-ki-lī ê kiáⁿ Sī-pa ê thâu-khak
2Samuel20:23 Iok-ap chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê goân-sòe; Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá koán-hat Ki-lī-thê -lâng kap Pí-lī-thê -lâng.
2Samuel20:24 A-to-lân koán-lí lô-ia̍h; A-hi-lu̍t ê kiáⁿ Iok-sa-hoat chòe sú-koaⁿ;
2Samuel20:25 Sī-hoat chòe su-kì. Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha chòe chè-si;
2Samuel20:26 Gâi-ní -lâng Í-la mā chòe Tāi-pi̍t ê chè-si.
2Samuel21:1 Tāi-pi̍t chāi-ūi ê sî ū ki-hng liân-sòa saⁿ nî. Tāi-pi̍t chhéng-būn Siōng Chú. Siōng Chú kóng
2Samuel21:2 Ông chiū tiàu Ki-piàn -lâng lâi
2Samuel21:3 Tāi-pi̍t kā Ki-piàn -lâng kóng
2Samuel21:4 Ki-piàn -lâng kóng
2Samuel21:5 In tùi ông kóng
2Samuel21:6 Chhiáⁿ chiong i chhit ê ta-po͘ ê kiáⁿ-sun kau hō͘ goán
2Samuel21:7 Tāi-pi̍t -ông in-ūi bat kap Sò-lô ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan kí Siōng Chú ê miâ chiù-chōa
2Samuel21:8 Ông chiū chiong Ài-a ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Lī-su-pa kā Sò-lô siⁿ ê nn̄g ê kiáⁿ A-mô͘-nî kap Bí-hui-pho-siat
2Samuel21:9 lóng kau hō͘ Ki-piàn -lâng. Ki-piàn -lâng chiū tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng kā in tiàu tī soaⁿ-téng. Chit chhit ê lâng lóng chòe-hé sí
2Samuel21:10 Ài-a ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Lī-su-pa the̍h chho͘-môa-pò͘
2Samuel21:11 Ū lâng chiong Ài-a ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
2Samuel21:12 Tāi-pi̍t chiū khì Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí -lâng hia
2Samuel21:13 Tāi-pi̍t tùi hia tòa Sò-lô kap i ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan ê kut-hâi tò--lâi
2Samuel21:14 Lâng chiū chiong Sò-lô kap i ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan ê kut-hâi bâi-chòng tī Piān-ngá-bín tōe-khu ê Sé-la
2Samuel21:15 Hui-lī-sū -lâng koh kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kau-chiàn. Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê kun-peng chòe-hé lo̍h-khì kong-táⁿ Hui-lī-sū -lâng
2Samuel21:16 Ū chi̍t ê tōa-hàn-cho̍k ê lâng
2Samuel21:17 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ A-pí-su pó-hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t
2Samuel21:18 Āu-lâi
2Samuel21:19 In koh tī Ko-pek kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng kau-chiàn; Pek-lī-hêng -lâng Gâi-ní ê kiáⁿ I-le̍k-hap-lân thâi-sí Ka-te̍k -lâng Ko-lī-a; i ê chhiuⁿ-pìⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-pò͘-ki ê chhia-sim hiah chho͘.
2Samuel21:20 In koh tī Ka-te̍k kau-chiàn; tī hia ū chi̍t ê tōa-hàn-lâng
2Samuel21:21 Chit-ê lâng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t ê kun-tūi chhiàng-siaⁿ ê sî
2Samuel21:22 Chit sì ê lâng sī Ka-te̍k tōa-hàn-cho̍k ê hō͘-tāi; in lóng hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê kun-peng thâi-sí.
2Samuel22:1 Siōng Chú kiù Tāi-pi̍t thoat-lī só͘-ū ê tùi-te̍k kap Sò-lô ê chhiú liáu-āu
2Samuel22:2 Siōng Chú sī góa ê soaⁿ-giâm
2Samuel22:3 sī góa ê Siōng-tè
2Samuel22:4 Góa kiû-kiò eng-kai siū chheng-chàn ê Siōng Chú
2Samuel22:5 Sí-bông ê tōa-éng ûi-khùn góa; húi-bia̍t ê tōa-chúi hō͘ góa kiaⁿ.
2Samuel22:6 Im-hú ê soh khún-pa̍k góa; Sí-bông ê lô-bāng bāng-tio̍h góa.
2Samuel22:7 Góa tī khó͘-lān tiong kî-kiû Siōng Chú
2Samuel22:8 I siū-khì
2Samuel22:9 Tùi I ê phīⁿ-khang ū ian chhèng-chhut; tùi I ê chhùi ū hé hoat-chhut
2Samuel22:10 I thí-khui thiⁿ
2Samuel22:11 I khiâ thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek teh pe; I chē hong ê si̍t hián-hiān.
2Samuel22:12 I ēng o͘-àm chòe I ún-ba̍t ê só͘-chāi
2Samuel22:13 I hoat-chhut ê kng
2Samuel22:14 Siōng Chú tùi thiⁿ-téng tân-lûi
2Samuel22:15 I siā-chìⁿ
2Samuel22:16 Siōng Chú chi̍t-ē chek-pī
2Samuel22:17 I tùi téng-bīn chhun-chhiú khiú góa
2Samuel22:18 I kiù góa thoat-lī hiong-béng ê tùi-te̍k
2Samuel22:19 Góa tú-tio̍h chai-lān ê sî
2Samuel22:20 I chhōa góa kàu khui-khoah an-choân ê só͘-chāi; I kiù góa
2Samuel22:21 Siōng Chú in-ūi góa chèng-ti̍t pò-tap góa
2Samuel22:22 Góa chun-siú Siōng Chú ê tō-lō͘
2Samuel22:23 I só͘-ū ê bēng-lēng góa ū chun-siú; I ê kui-lē góa m̄-bat pàng-sak.
2Samuel22:24 Góa tī I ê bīn-chêng bô thang chí-chek; góa pó-siú ka-kī lī-khui chōe-ok.
2Samuel22:25 In-ūi góa chèng-ti̍t
2Samuel22:26 Chû-ài ê lâng
2Samuel22:27 chheng-khì ê lâng
2Samuel22:28 Khùn-khó͘ ê lâng
2Samuel22:29 Siōng Chú
2Samuel22:30 Góa in-ūi óa-khò lí
2Samuel22:31 Chit-ūi Siōng-tè
2Samuel22:32 Siōng Chú í-gōa
2Samuel22:33 Chit-ūi Siōng-tè sī góa kian-kò͘ ê iàu-sài; I ín-chhōa góa kiâⁿ an-choân ê lō͘.
2Samuel22:34 I hō͘ góa ê kha chhin-chhiūⁿ lo̍k gâu cháu
2Samuel22:35 I hùn-liān góa ê chhiú gâu kau-chiàn
2Samuel22:36 Lí ēng tún-pâi kái-kiù góa; lí ê pang-chān hō͘ góa kian-kiông.
2Samuel22:37 Lí hō͘ góa ta̍h ê tōe khui-khoah an-choân; góa ê kha m̄-bat ta̍h-thu̍t.
2Samuel22:38 Góa tui góa ê tùi-te̍k kàu jip--tio̍h in; in bô bia̍t-bông
2Samuel22:39 Góa phah in thiám-thiám
2Samuel22:40 Lí sù góa khùi-la̍t hō͘ góa gâu kau-chiàn; lí hō͘ kong-kek góa ê lâng lóng hâng-ho̍k tī góa ē-bīn.
2Samuel22:41 Lí hō͘ góa ê tùi-te̍k oa̍t-tńg-sin tô-cháu
2Samuel22:42 In kiû-kiò
2Samuel22:43 Góa kā in tûi kàu chhùi-chhùi
2Samuel22:44 Lí kiù góa thoat-lī hoán-poān góa ê jîn-bîn; lí pó-hō͘ góa
2Samuel22:45 gōa-pang ê lâng khut-sin tâu-hâng
2Samuel22:46 Gōa-pang ê lâng sit-táⁿ
2Samuel22:47 Siōng Chú éng-oán oa̍h--teh! Goān góa óa-khò ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ siū chheng-chàn; goān kiù góa ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ — Siōng-tè siū ko-kú.
2Samuel22:48 I chiū-sī ūi góa sin-oan hit-ūi Siōng-tè; I hō͘ chèng-lâng hâng-ho̍k tī góa kha-ē.
2Samuel22:49 I kiù góa thoat-lī góa ê tùi-te̍k. Lí thê-poa̍t góa koân-kè kong-kek góa ê lâng; lí kiù góa thoat-lī kiông-pō ê lâng.
2Samuel22:50 Siōng Chú ah
2Samuel22:51 Siōng Chú sù ke̍k-tōa ê kiù-un hō͘ I siat-li̍p ê ông
2Samuel23:1 Ē-bīn sī Tāi-pi̍t ê ûi-giân. Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
2Samuel23:2 Siōng Chú ê sîn thong-kè góa thoân-ta̍t
2Samuel23:3 Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ū kóng
2Samuel23:4 ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ bô hûn ê chheng-chá tú-á chhut ê ji̍t-kng
2Samuel23:5 Góa ê ke tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng kiám m̄-sī án-ni? I ū kap góa li̍p éng-oán ê iok
2Samuel23:6 M̄-kú húi-lūi lóng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ lâng hiat-ka̍k ê chhì-á
2Samuel23:7 beh kha̍p in ê lâng
2Samuel23:8 Tāi-pi̍t ê ióng-sū ê miâ-toaⁿ kì tī ē-bīn: Hap-kek-mô͘-nî -lâng Iok-siat Pa-siat
2Samuel23:9 Tē-jī ê sī A-hô-a -lâng Tó-to ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat
2Samuel23:10 Í-lī-a-sat khí-lâi phah Hui-lī-sū -lâng
2Samuel23:11 Tē-saⁿ ê sī Hap-la -lâng A-ki ê kiáⁿ Sa-má. Ū chi̍t ji̍t
2Samuel23:12 Sa-má khiā tī hn̂g-tiong hông-siú hit-khu hn̂g
2Samuel23:13 Siu-koah ê sî
2Samuel23:14 Hit-sî
2Samuel23:15 Tāi-pi̍t ēng chin khat-bō͘ ê kháu-khì kóng
2Samuel23:16 Chit saⁿ ê ióng-sū chiū chhiong-kè Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê iâⁿ-tōe
2Samuel23:17 kóng
2Samuel23:18 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ
2Samuel23:19 I sī saⁿ ê ióng-sū tiong tē-it chhut-miâ--ê
2Samuel23:20 Koh ū Kah-sih -lâng Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá; i sī ióng-sū
2Samuel23:21 koh thâi-sí chi̍t ê koân-tōa ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng. Hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng chhiú gia̍h chhiuⁿ
2Samuel23:22 Che sī Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá só͘ chòe ê sū
2Samuel23:23 I pí saⁿ-cha̍p ê ióng-sū khah ū bêng-bōng
2Samuel23:24 Saⁿ-cha̍p ê ióng-sū tiong ū: Iok-ap ê sió-tī A-sat-hek Pek-lī-hêng -lâng Tó-to ê kiáⁿ I-le̍k-hap-lân
2Samuel23:25 Hap-lu̍t -lâng Sa-má kap Í-lī-ka
2Samuel23:26 Phà-le̍k-thê -lâng Hi-lī-su Thê-ko-a -lâng Ek-kiat ê kiáⁿ Í-la
2Samuel23:27 A-ná-tu̍t -lâng A-pí-í-siā Hō͘-sa -lâng Bí-pún-nái
2Samuel23:28 A-hô-a -lâng Sat-bûn Nî-tô-hoat -lâng Má-hap-lâi
2Samuel23:29 Nî-tô-hoat -lâng Pa-ná ê kiáⁿ Hi-li̍p Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k Ki-pí-a -lâng Lī-pài ê kiáⁿ Í-thài
2Samuel23:30 Pí-la-tùn -lâng Pí-ná-ngá Ka-si̍t-khoe -lâng Hi-thài
2Samuel23:31 A-la-pa -lâng A-pí A-pún Pa-ló͘-bí -lâng A-su-má-ui
2Samuel23:32 Sa-pún -lâng Í-lī-ngá-hap-pa Ngá-siān ê chi̍t ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan
2Samuel23:33 Hap-la -lâng Sa-má kap Sa-la ê kiáⁿ A-hi-àm
2Samuel23:34 Má-ka -lâng A-hap-pài ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-hoat-lia̍t Ki-lô -lâng A-hi-to-hut ê kiáⁿ Í-liân
2Samuel23:35 Ka-bi̍t -lâng Hi-su-lô A-pa -lâng Phà-lâi
2Samuel23:36 Só-pa -lâng Ná-tan ê kiáⁿ Í-kah Ka-tek -lâng Pa-nî
2Samuel23:37 A-bûn -lâng Sé-le̍k kā Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap gia̍h kun-khì ê Pí-lio̍k -lâng Ná-hap-lâi
2Samuel23:38 Í-thiap -lâng Í-la kap Ka-li̍p
2Samuel23:39 Hek -lâng O͘-lī-a kiōng saⁿ-cha̍p-chhit lâng.
2Samuel24:1 Siōng Chú koh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siū-khì
2Samuel24:2 Ông hoan-hù i sin-piⁿ ê goân-sòe Iok-ap kóng
2Samuel24:3 Iok-ap tùi ông kóng
2Samuel24:4 Ông kian-chhî i ê bēng-lēng. Iok-ap kap hiah-ê kun-tiúⁿ chiū hōng-bēng chhut--khì
2Samuel24:5 In kè Iok-tàn-hô
2Samuel24:6 keng-kè Ki-lia̍t
2Samuel24:7 koh kàu Thài-ní kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ
2Samuel24:8 In kiâⁿ-thàu choân-kok
2Samuel24:9 Iok-ap chiong tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ pò-kò hō͘ ông chai. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng gia̍h-to ê chiàn-sū ū poeh-cha̍p-bān
2Samuel24:10 Tāi-pi̍t tiám-sǹg jîn-bîn ê sò͘-bo̍k liáu-āu
2Samuel24:11 Tāi-pi̍t thàu-chá khí--lâi
2Samuel24:12 “Lí khì kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel24:13 Ka-tek lâi kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel24:14 Tāi-pi̍t kā Ka-tek kóng
2Samuel24:15 Siōng Chú chiū kàng un-e̍k tī Í-sek-lia̍t
2Samuel24:16 Tng thiⁿ-sài chhun-chhiú beh bia̍t Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
2Samuel24:17 Tāi-pi̍t khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sat-hāi jîn-bîn ê thiⁿ-sài
2Samuel24:18 Kâng hit-ji̍t
2Samuel24:19 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chiàu Siōng Chú hoan-hù Ka-tek ê ōe chiūⁿ--khì.
2Samuel24:20 A-lô-ná khòaⁿ-tio̍h tùi-bīn ū ông kap i ê jîn-sîn teh lâi
2Samuel24:21 A-lô-ná kóng
2Samuel24:22 A-lô-ná tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
2Samuel24:23 Ông ah
2Samuel24:24 Ông tùi A-lô-ná kóng
2Samuel24:25 Tāi-pi̍t tī hia ūi Siōng Chú khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ
1Kings1:1 Tāi-pi̍t -ông nî-lāu hè-sò͘ chōe
1Kings1:2 I ê jîn-sîn tùi i kóng
1Kings1:3 In chiū tī Í-sek-lia̍t choân-kok chhē súi ê cha-bó͘ gín-á; chhē-tio̍h Su-liām chi̍t ê lú-chú
1Kings1:4 Chit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á chin súi; i hōng-thāi sū-hāu ông
1Kings1:5 Hit-sî
1Kings1:6 I ê lāu-pē m̄-bat kā i chek-pī kóng
1Kings1:7 A-to-nî-ngá kap Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap
1Kings1:8 M̄-kú chè-si Sat-tok
1Kings1:9 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
1Kings1:10 M̄-kú i bô chhiáⁿ sian-ti Ná-tan
1Kings1:11 Ná-tan kā Só͘-lô-bûn ê lāu-bú Poa̍t-sī-pa kóng
1Kings1:12 Taⁿ lí lâi
1Kings1:13 Lí ji̍p-khì kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t -ông
1Kings1:14 Lí tī hia kap ông kóng-ōe ê sî
1Kings1:15 Poa̍t-sī-pa ji̍p-khì pâng-keng kìⁿ ông; ông chin lāu
1Kings1:16 Poa̍t-sī-pa kiok-kiong pài ông; ông kóng
1Kings1:17 I kā ông kóng
1Kings1:18 Taⁿ A-to-nî-ngá í-keng chū-chheng choh-ông
1Kings1:19 I ū thâi chin chōe chiah gû
1Kings1:20 Góa ê chú góa ê ông ah
1Kings1:21 Nā bô
1Kings1:22 Poa̍t-sī-pa iáu-teh kap ông kóng-ōe ê sî
1Kings1:23 Ū lâng kā ông pò-kò
1Kings1:24 Ná-tan kóng
1Kings1:25 I kin-á-ji̍t lo̍h--khì
1Kings1:26 M̄-kú i bô chhiáⁿ góa
1Kings1:27 Che kiám sī góa ê chú góa ê ông ê ì-sù? Ông lí iáu m̄-bat tùi lí ê chèng jîn-sîn soan-pò͘
1Kings1:28 Tāi-pi̍t -ông ìn kóng
1Kings1:29 Ông chiù-chōa kóng
1Kings1:30 ‘Góa kì-jiân ū kí Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè tùi lí chiù-chōa
1Kings1:31 Poa̍t-sī-pa chiū kiok-kiong phak lo̍h-khì pài ông
1Kings1:32 Tāi-pi̍t -ông koh kóng
1Kings1:33 Ông kā in kóng
1Kings1:34 Tī hia
1Kings1:35 Jiân-āu lín tè i chiūⁿ--lâi
1Kings1:36 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá ìn ông kóng
1Kings1:37 Siōng Chú án-chóaⁿ kap góa ê chú góa ê ông tông-chāi
1Kings1:38 Chè-si Sat-tok
1Kings1:39 Chè-si Sat-tok chiū tùi hōe-bō͘ the̍h tóe-iû ê kak
1Kings1:40 Jîn-bîn tè i chiūⁿ--lâi
1Kings1:41 A-to-nî-ngá í-ki̍p kap i chòe-hé ê lâng-kheh tú-á chia̍h-toh soah
1Kings1:42 I iáu-teh kóng ê sî
1Kings1:43 Iok-ná-tan ìn A-to-nî-ngá kóng
1Kings1:44 Ông phài chè-si Sat-tok
1Kings1:45 Chè-si Sat-tok kap sian-ti Ná-tan
1Kings1:46 Koh Só͘-lô-bûn mā í-keng chē ông-ūi.
1Kings1:47 Ông ê jîn-sîn lóng lâi kā lán ê chú Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiok-hok
1Kings1:48 kî-tó kóng
1Kings1:49 Só͘-ū kap A-to-nî-ngá chòe-hé ê lâng-kheh lóng kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah
1Kings1:50 A-to-nî-ngá in-ūi hui-siông kiaⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn
1Kings1:51 Ū lâng kā Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Kings1:52 Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Kings1:53 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông chiū chhe lâng tùi chè-tôaⁿ kā i chhōa--lo̍h-lâi
1Kings2:1 Tāi-pi̍t lîm-chiong ê sî
1Kings2:2 “Góa teh-beh kiâⁿ sè-kan-lâng lóng tio̍h kiâⁿ ê lō͘; lí tio̍h kian-kiông
1Kings2:3 Lí tio̍h chun-siú Siōng Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè só͘ hoan-hù--ê
1Kings2:4 Siōng Chú mā ōe si̍t-hiān I tùi góa ê èng-ún
1Kings2:5 “Lí mā chai Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi góa. I ū thâi-sí Nî-ní ê kiáⁿ Ap-nî-ní kap Ek-thiap ê kiáⁿ A-má-sat chit nn̄g ê Í-sek-lia̍t ê goân-sòe; i tī thài-pêng ê sî ēng kau-chiàn ê chhiú-tōaⁿ thâi-sí in
1Kings2:6 Só͘-í lí eng-kai chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ chòe
1Kings2:7 Lí tio̍h hó khoán-thāi Ki-lia̍t -lâng Pa-se-lâi hiah-ê kiáⁿ
1Kings2:8 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Pa-hō͘-lîm ê Piān-ngá-bín -lâng Ki-la ê kiáⁿ Sī-múi; góa khì Má-hap-liām ê sî
1Kings2:9 Taⁿ lí m̄-thang pàng i soah. Lí sī chhong-bêng ê lâng
1Kings2:10 Tāi-pi̍t tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
1Kings2:11 Tāi-pi̍t choh-ông thóng-tī Í-sek-lia̍t kiōng sì-cha̍p nî: tī Hi-pek-lûn chhit nî
1Kings2:12 Só͘-lô-bûn chē i lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t ê ông-ūi; i ê kok hui-siông ún-kò͘.
1Kings2:13 Hap-ki̍p ê kiáⁿ A-to-nî-ngá khì kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê lāu-bú Poa̍t-sī-pa; Poa̍t-sī-pa mn̄g i kóng
1Kings2:14 Koh kóng
1Kings2:15 A-to-nî-ngá kóng
1Kings2:16 Taⁿ góa ū chi̍t kiāⁿ sū chhéng-kiû lí
1Kings2:17 I kóng
1Kings2:18 Poa̍t-sī-pa kóng
1Kings2:19 Poa̍t-sī-pa chiū khì kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn -ông
1Kings2:20 kóng
1Kings2:21 I kóng
1Kings2:22 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ìn i ê lāu-bú kóng
1Kings2:23 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông chiū kí Siōng Chú chiù-chōa kóng
1Kings2:24 Siōng Chú soán-li̍p góa
1Kings2:25 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông chiū phài Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá khì kā A-to-nî-ngá thâi-sí.
1Kings2:26 Ông kā chè-si A-pí-a-tha kóng
1Kings2:27 Só͘-lô-bûn chiū pak A-pí-a-tha ê chit-ūi
1Kings2:28 Chit-ê siau-sit thoân kàu Iok-ap
1Kings2:29 Ū lâng kā Só͘-lô-bûn -ông pò-kò
1Kings2:30 Pí-ná-ngá kàu Siōng Chú ê hōe-bō͘
1Kings2:31 Ông kā i kóng
1Kings2:32 Siōng Chú beh hō͘ i ka-kī taⁿ bô͘-sat lâng ê chōe
1Kings2:33 Goān Iok-ap bô͘-sat lâng ê chōe éng-oán kui tī i kap i ê hō͘-tāi; m̄-kú Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê hō͘-tāi
1Kings2:34 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá chiū chiūⁿ--khì
1Kings2:35 Ông chiū siat-li̍p Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá tāi-thòe Iok-ap chòe goân-sòe; koh siat-li̍p chè-si Sat-tok tāi-thòe A-pí-a-tha.
1Kings2:36 Ông phài lâng kiò Sī-múi lâi
1Kings2:37 Lí tio̍h ōe-kì--tit
1Kings2:38 Sī-múi ìn ông kóng
1Kings2:39 Kè saⁿ nî
1Kings2:40 Sī-múi chiū chún-pī lû
1Kings2:41 Ū lâng kā Só͘-lô-bûn pò-kò
1Kings2:42 Ông chiū phài lâng kiò Sī-múi lâi
1Kings2:43 Taⁿ lí sī-án-chóaⁿ bô chun-siú tùi Siōng Chú só͘ chiù ê chōa
1Kings2:44 Ông koh kā Sī-múi kóng
1Kings2:45 M̄-kú Siōng Chú beh chiok-hok góa
1Kings2:46 Ông hā-lēng
1Kings3:1 Só͘-lô-bûn kap Ai-ki̍p -ông Hoat-ló kiat-chhin
1Kings3:2 Tng-sî iáu-bē ūi-tio̍h Siōng Chú ê miâ khí sèng-tiān
1Kings3:3 Só͘-lô-bûn thiàⁿ Siōng Chú
1Kings3:4 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông khì Ki-piàn hiàn-chè
1Kings3:5 Tī Ki-piàn
1Kings3:6 Só͘-lô-bûn ìn kóng
1Kings3:7 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè
1Kings3:8 Lí ê po̍k-jîn tòa tī lí só͘ kéng-soán ê chú-bîn tiong-kan
1Kings3:9 Só͘-í
1Kings3:10 Chú chin hoaⁿ-hí Só͘-lô-bûn án-ni kiû.

1Kings3:28 Choân Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h ông ê phòaⁿ-koat
1Kings4:1 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông chòe choân Í-sek-lia̍t ê ông.
1Kings4:2 I ê jîn-sîn kì tī ē-bīn: Sat-tok ê kiáⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá chòe chè-si;
1Kings4:3 Sī-sa nn̄g ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-hô-lia̍t kap A-hi-ngá chòe su-kì; A-hi-lu̍t ê kiáⁿ Iok-sa-hoat chòe sú-koaⁿ;
1Kings4:4 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá chòe goân-sòe; Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha chòe chè-si;
1Kings4:5 Ná-tan ê kiáⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá chòe chóng-tok-tiúⁿ; Ná-tan ê kiáⁿ Sat-pò͘-tek chòe chè-si
1Kings4:6 A-hi-soah chòe kiong-têng chóng-koán; Ap-tāi ê kiáⁿ A-to-nî-lân chòe kiông-chè-lô-kang ê kam-tok.
1Kings4:7 Só͘-lô-bûn tī Í-sek-lia̍t choân-tōe siat-li̍p cha̍p-jī ê chóng-tok
1Kings4:8 In ê miâ kì tī ē-bīn: Piān Hō͘-ní tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu;
1Kings4:9 Piān Tí-kah tī Má-ka-su
1Kings4:10 Piān Hi-sek tī A-ló͘-po̍k
1Kings4:11 Piān A-pí-ná-ta̍t tī To-ní ê choân soaⁿ-tōe; i chhōa Só͘-lô-bûn ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Tha-hoat chòe bó͘;
1Kings4:12 A-hi-lu̍t ê kiáⁿ Pa-ná tī Tha-la̍p
1Kings4:13 Piān Ki-pia̍t tī Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t -siâⁿ
1Kings4:14 E̍k-to ê kiáⁿ A-hi-ná-ta̍t tī Má-hap-liām;
1Kings4:15 A-hi-má-su tī Ná-hut-tha-lī; i chhōa Só͘-lô-bûn lēng-gōa chi̍t ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Pa-si̍t-boat chòe bó͘;
1Kings4:16 Hō͘-su ê kiáⁿ Pa-ná tī A-siat kap Pí-a-lio̍k;
1Kings4:17 Phà-lō͘-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-sa-hoat tī Í-sat-ka;
1Kings4:18 Í-la ê kiáⁿ Sī-múi tī Piān-ngá-bín;
1Kings4:19 O͘-lī ê kiáⁿ Ki-pia̍t tī Ki-lia̍t -tōe; chiū-sī í-chêng A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông kap Pa-san -ông Go̍k ê tōe. Lēng-gōa ū chi̍t ê chóng-tok-tiúⁿ koán-lí só͘-ū ê tōe-khu.
1Kings4:20 Iû-tāi kap Í-sek-lia̍t ê jîn-kháu chōe kah chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-piⁿ ê soa; in niû-si̍t chhiong-chiok
1Kings4:21 Só͘-lô-bûn koán-hat tùi Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô kàu Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê tōe
1Kings4:22 Só͘-lô-bûn ta̍k-ji̍t su-iàu ê niû-si̍t: Iù mī-hún gō͘-chheng kong-seng
1Kings4:23 gû-tiâu lāi chhī ê pûi-gû cha̍p chiah
1Kings4:24 I thóng-tī Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô sai-pêng só͘-ū tōe-khu
1Kings4:25 Só͘-lô-bûn oa̍h--teh ê ji̍t
1Kings4:26 Só͘-lô-bûn ū sì-bān keng thoa chiàn-chhia ê bé ê bé-tiâu
1Kings4:27 Hiah-ê chóng-tok
1Kings4:28 In koh chiàu in ê chit-chek
1Kings4:29 Siōng-tè siúⁿ-sù Só͘-lô-bûn ke̍k-tōa ê tì-hūi chhong-bêng
1Kings4:30 Só͘-lô-bûn ê tì-hūi chhiau-kè só͘-ū tang-hng-lâng ê tì-hūi kap Ai-ki̍p -lâng it-chhè ê tì-hūi.
1Kings4:31 I ê tì-hūi iâⁿ-kè só͘-ū ê lâng
1Kings4:32 I chòe chim-giân saⁿ-chheng kù
1Kings4:33 I káng-lūn chháu-ba̍k
1Kings4:34 Lia̍t-kok ê ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ê tì-hūi
1Kings5:1 Thài-ní -ông Hi-lân thiaⁿ-tio̍h Só͘-lô-bûn sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t
1Kings5:2 Só͘-lô-bûn mā phài lâng khì kìⁿ Hi-lân
1Kings5:3 “Lí chai góa ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t bōe-tàng ūi-tio̍h Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè ê miâ khí sèng-tiān
1Kings5:4 Taⁿ Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè í-keng sù góa thian-hā thài-pêng
1Kings5:5 Só͘-í
1Kings5:6 Só͘-í chhiáⁿ lí bēng-lēng lâng
1Kings5:7 Hi-lân thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê ōe
1Kings5:8 Hi-lân phài lâng khì kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn
1Kings5:9 Góa ê kang-lâng ōe tùi Lê-pa-lūn ūn bo̍k-châi lo̍h-hái
1Kings5:10 Hi-lân chiū chiàu Só͘-lô-bûn ê su-iàu kiong-kip pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū kap siông-chhiū ê chhâ-liāu hō͘ i.
1Kings5:11 Só͘-lô-bûn hō͘ Hi-lân nn̄g-chheng kong-tùn ê sió-be̍h
1Kings5:12 Siōng Chú chiàu I ê èng-ún sù tì-hūi hō͘ Só͘-lô-bûn. Hi-lân kap Só͘-lô-bûn pí-chhú li̍p-iok
1Kings5:13 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông tùi Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn kiông-chè tiàu lâng-kang saⁿ-bān.
1Kings5:14 Ta̍k ge̍h-ji̍t lûn-liû phài chi̍t-bān lâng khì Lê-pa-lūn; in chi̍t kò-ge̍h tī Lê-pa-lūn
1Kings5:15 Só͘-lô-bûn ū ūn-poaⁿ ê kang-lâng chhit-bān
1Kings5:16 Lēng-gōa
1Kings5:17 In chiàu ông ê bēng-lēng
1Kings5:18 Só͘-lô-bûn ê sai-hū kap Hi-lân ê sai-hū
1Kings6:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut Ai-ki̍p liáu-āu sì-pah poeh-cha̍p nî
1Kings6:2 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ūi Siōng Chú khí ê tiān
1Kings6:3 Tiān-chêng ê cháu-lông chhim sì kong-chhioh-pòaⁿ
1Kings6:4 I ūi-tio̍h sèng-tiān chòe lāi-bīn khoah gōa-bīn oe̍h ê thang-á.
1Kings6:5 I tī óa sèng-tiān
1Kings6:6 tē-it chàn khoah nn̄g kong-chhioh jī-cha̍p kong-hun
1Kings6:7 Khí-chō sèng-tiān ê chio̍h-châi í-keng lóng tī chio̍h-tiûⁿ phah hó
1Kings6:8 Siuⁿ-pâng tē-it chàn ê ji̍p-kháu tī sèng-tiān ê lâm-pêng; tùi tē-it chàn ū kńg-lê-thui chiūⁿ tē-jī chàn
1Kings6:9 I ēng pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ chòe niû
1Kings6:10 Óa sèng-tiān ê piah khí ê siuⁿ-pâng
1Kings6:11 Siōng Chú tùi Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Kings6:12 “Koan-hē lí só͘ khí chit-keng sèng-tiān
1Kings6:13 Góa beh tiàm tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan
1Kings6:14 Só͘-lô-bûn oân-sêng khí-chō sèng-tiān ê kang-chok.
1Kings6:15 I ēng pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ-pán tah sèng-tiān lāi-bīn ê piah
1Kings6:16 Koh tī tiān lāi-bīn ê āu-pêng keh chi̍t keng lōe-tiān chòe Chì-sèng-só͘
1Kings6:17 Chêng-tiān tn̂g cha̍p-poeh kong-chhioh.
1Kings6:18 Sèng-tiān lāi-bīn ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ-pán lóng ū khek pû-á kap hoe-lúi; tiān-lāi lóng ēng pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ pau--teh
1Kings6:19 Lōe-tiān chún-pī beh an-tì Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi.
1Kings6:20 Lōe-tiān
1Kings6:21 Só͘-lô-bûn ēng sûn-kim tah sèng-tiān ê lōe-pō͘
1Kings6:22 Sèng-tiān ê lōe-pō͘ kap lōe-tiān chêng ê hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ lóng tah kim
1Kings6:23 Tī lōe-tiān ê lāi-bīn
1Kings6:24 
1Kings6:25 
1Kings6:26 
1Kings6:27 I chiong ki-lō͘-pek hē tī lōe-tiān ê lāi-bīn; ki-lō͘-pek ê si̍t thí-khui
1Kings6:28 I koh ēng kim tah hiah-ê ki-lō͘-pek.
1Kings6:29 Sèng-tiān ê chêng-tiān kap lōe-tiān sì-ûi ê piah
1Kings6:30 Chêng-tiān kap lōe-tiān ê tōe-pán lóng tah kim.
1Kings6:31 Só͘-lô-bûn koh ēng kaⁿ-ná-chhâ chòe ji̍p lōe-tiān ê mn̂g; mn̂g-bâi kap mn̂g-khiā lóng sī gō͘-kak-hêng ê thiāu.
1Kings6:32 Tī ēng kaⁿ-ná-chhâ chō ê nn̄g ê mn̂g-sìⁿ khek ki-lō͘-pek
1Kings6:33 Koh tī chêng-tiān ê ji̍p-kháu ēng kaⁿ-ná-chhâ chòe sì-kak-hêng ê mn̂g-khiā.
1Kings6:34 Ēng siông-chhiū-chhâ chòe siang-pêng ê mn̂g-sìⁿ; nn̄g pêng ê mn̂g-sìⁿ kok ū nn̄g phìⁿ
1Kings6:35 téng-bīn khek ki-lō͘-pek
1Kings6:36 I koh ēng phah-hó ê chio̍h saⁿ pâi kap pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ chi̍t pâi lâi khí lāi-tiâⁿ.
1Kings6:37 Só͘-lô-bûn choh-ông tē-sì nî jī--ge̍h
1Kings6:38 Kàu cha̍p-it nî poeh--ge̍h
1Kings7:1 Só͘-lô-bûn khí ka-kī ê kiong-tiān
1Kings7:2 I koh khí Lê-pa-lūn Lîm-kiong
1Kings7:3 Lāi-bīn ū sì-cha̍p-gō͘ ki thiāu
1Kings7:4 Koh ū thang-á-mn̂g saⁿ chōa
1Kings7:5 Só͘-ū ê mn̂g kap mn̂g-khiā lóng sī sù-hong; ū thang-á-mn̂g saⁿ chōa
1Kings7:6 I koh khí ū thiāu ê tōa-thiaⁿ
1Kings7:7 Koh khí ông-ūi ê thiaⁿ
1Kings7:8 Só͘-lô-bûn tī thiaⁿ āu-bīn ê tiâⁿ khí chi̍t keng ka-kī tòa ê kiong-tiān
1Kings7:9 Chiah-ê kiong-tiān
1Kings7:10 Tōe-ki sī ēng tōa tè kùi-tiōng ê chio̍h
1Kings7:11 Téng-bīn ū chiàu chhùn-chhioh phah-hó kùi-tiōng ê chio̍h
1Kings7:12 Tōa-tiâⁿ chiu-ûi ū phah-hó ê chio̍h saⁿ chàn
1Kings7:13 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông phài lâng tùi Thài-ní chhiáⁿ Hō͘-lân lâi.
1Kings7:14 I sī Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k chi̍t ê kóaⁿ-hū ê kiáⁿ; i ê lāu-pē sī Thài-ní -lâng
1Kings7:15 Hō͘-lân chù-chō nn̄g ki tâng-thiāu
1Kings7:16 Koh ēng tâng chù nn̄g ê thiāu-táu hē tī thiāu-téng; ta̍k-ê thiāu-táu koân nn̄g kong-chhioh jī-cha̍p kong-hun.
1Kings7:17 Nn̄g ki tâng-thiāu téng-bīn ê thiāu-táu
1Kings7:18 Koh chō nn̄g chōa sia̍h-liû ûi tī bāng-á ê chiu-ûi
1Kings7:19 Cháu-lông thiāu-téng ê thiāu-táu koân chi̍t kong-chhioh poeh-cha̍p kong-hun
1Kings7:20 Nn̄g pêng tâng-thiāu ê thiāu-táu
1Kings7:21 I khiā nn̄g ki thiāu tī sèng-tiān ê cháu-lông; chiàⁿ-pêng hit-ki kiò-chòe Ngá-kun
1Kings7:22 Thiāu-téng ū khek pek-ha̍p-hoe; án-ni
1Kings7:23 Hō͘-lân koh chù chi̍t ê îⁿ-hêng ê tâng-hái
1Kings7:24 Tâng-hái ê tûn ē-bīn ū pû-á ûi--teh
1Kings7:25 Tâng-hái an tī cha̍p-jī chiah tâng-gû ê téng-bīn; saⁿ chiah ǹg pak
1Kings7:26 Tâng-hái ê kāu-tō͘ chhit kong-hun-pòaⁿ; i ê tûn chhin-chhiūⁿ poe ê tûn
1Kings7:27 Hō͘-lân koh ēng tâng chè-chō cha̍p ê phûn-chō; ta̍k-ê chō tn̂g chi̍t kong-chhioh poeh-cha̍p kong-hun
1Kings7:28 Ta̍k-ê chō sì-ûi lóng ū tó͘-pang tàu tī kè--ni̍h.
1Kings7:29 Tó͘-pang ū sai
1Kings7:30 Ta̍k-ê chō ū sì ê tâng-lián kap tâng ê chhia-lián-sim; chō ê sì kha lóng ū kè; kè chù tī phûn ê ē-bīn
1Kings7:31 Chō tùi lāi-bīn kàu téng-bīn chhim sì-cha̍p-gō͘ kong-hun; i ê chhùi sī îⁿ--ê
1Kings7:32 Sì ê lián tī tó͘ ê ē-bīn; chhia-lián-sim kap chō saⁿ-liân; ta̍k-ê lián koân la̍k-cha̍p-la̍k kong-hun.
1Kings7:33 Lián ê hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ chiàn-chhia-lián; i ê chhia-lián-sim
1Kings7:34 Chō ê sì kak ū sì ê kè
1Kings7:35 Chō ê téng-bīn ū îⁿ ê kho͘
1Kings7:36 thuh-koáiⁿ kap tó͘-pang téng-bīn ê khang-ūi
1Kings7:37 I chiàu kâng-khoán ê choh-hoat chù cha̍p ê chō; chhùn-chhioh
1Kings7:38 Hō͘-lân koh chō cha̍p ê tâng-phûn
1Kings7:39 Hiah-ê chō
1Kings7:40 Hō͘-lân koh chō phûn
1Kings7:41 Nn̄g ki thiāu
1Kings7:42 sì-pah lia̍p sia̍h-liû
1Kings7:43 cha̍p ê phûn-chō kap chō-téng cha̍p ê phûn;
1Kings7:44 chi̍t chō tâng-hái
1Kings7:45 phûn
1Kings7:46 Chiah-ê khì-khū sī ông tī Iok-tàn pêng-goân
1Kings7:47 In-ūi tâng chòe ê khì-khū siuⁿ chōe
1Kings7:48 Só͘-lô-bûn koh chō Siōng Chú tiān-lāi só͘-ū ê khì-khū: Kim-tôaⁿ
1Kings7:49 lōe-tiān thâu-chêng ê teng-tâi
1Kings7:50 teng-tâi ê poe
1Kings7:51 Án-ni

1Kings8:2 Í-tha-liām-ge̍h
1Kings8:3 Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló lóng lâi
1Kings8:4 Chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng chiong Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi
1Kings8:5 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông kap chū-chi̍p tī i hia ê Í-sek-lia̍t choân hōe-chiòng
1Kings8:6 Chè-si kng Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi ji̍p lōe-tiān
1Kings8:7 Ki-lō͘-pek tī hē iok-kūi só͘-chāi ê téng-bīn thí-khui in ê si̍t

1Kings8:12 Hit-sî Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Kings8:13 Góa í-keng khí chi̍t keng tông-hông ê tiān
1Kings8:14 Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng lóng khiā--teh
1Kings8:15 I kóng
1Kings8:16 Siōng Chú ū kóng
1Kings8:17 “Góa ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t sim-lāi ū ì-sù beh ūi Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ê miâ khí sèng-tiān.
1Kings8:18 Chóng-sī Siōng Chú tùi góa ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Kings8:19 m̄-kú lí m̄-thang khí
1Kings8:20 “Taⁿ Siōng Chú si̍t-hiān I só͘ kóng ê ōe; góa chiàu Siōng Chú ê ōe khí-lâi sòa-chiap góa ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t chē Í-sek-lia̍t ê ông-ūi
1Kings8:21 Góa mā tī hia ūi iok-kūi chún-pī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi; kūi-lāi ū Siōng Chú ê iok
1Kings8:22 Só͘-lô-bûn tng Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng ê bīn-chêng
1Kings8:23 “Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
1Kings8:24 Lí ū chip-siú tùi lí ê po̍k-jîn góa ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t ê èng-ún; lí chhin-chhùi èng-ún--ê
1Kings8:25 Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
1Kings8:26 Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
1Kings8:27 “Siōng-tè ah
1Kings8:28 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè
1Kings8:29 Goān lí mî-ji̍t khòaⁿ-kò͘ chit-ê sèng-tiān
1Kings8:30 Lí ê po̍k-jîn kap lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t ǹg chit só͘-chāi kî-tó ê sî
1Kings8:31 “Lâng nā tek-chōe chhù-piⁿ
1Kings8:32 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng àⁿ-lo̍h thiaⁿ lâi pān-lí
1Kings8:33 “Lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t nā tek-chōe lí
1Kings8:34 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng àⁿ-lo̍h thiaⁿ
1Kings8:35 “In nā tek-chōe lí
1Kings8:36 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng àⁿ-lo̍h thiaⁿ in ê kî-tó
1Kings8:37 “Chit-ê tōe nā ū ki-hng
1Kings8:38 lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t tiong nā ū lâng ūi ka-kī ê chai-hō sim kan-khó͘
1Kings8:39 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng
1Kings8:40 hō͘ in tī lí siúⁿ-sù goán lia̍t-chó͘ ê tōe
1Kings8:41 “Nā ū gōa-kok-lâng
1Kings8:42 
1Kings8:43 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng
1Kings8:44 “Lí ê chú-bîn hōng lí ê bēng-lēng
1Kings8:45 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng thiaⁿ in ê kî-tó khún-kiû
1Kings8:46 “Sè-kan bô chi̍t ê lâng bô hoān-chōe
1Kings8:47 in nā tī hō͘ lâng lia̍h--khì ê tōe hôe-sim-tńg-ì
1Kings8:48 In nā tī tùi-te̍k lia̍h in khì ê tōe
1Kings8:49 kiû lí tī thiⁿ-téng
1Kings8:50 koh sià-bián hiah-ê tek-chōe lí ê chú-bîn
1Kings8:51 In-ūi in sī lí ê chú-bîn
1Kings8:52 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
1Kings8:53 
1Kings8:54 Só͘-lô-bûn siang-kha kūi tī Siōng Chú ê tôaⁿ-chêng
1Kings8:55 I khiā--teh
1Kings8:56 “Siōng Chú eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! I ū chiàu èng-ún sù thài-pêng hō͘ I ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t; I thong-kè I ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se só͘ èng-ún un-tián ê ōe
1Kings8:57 Goān Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè kap lán tông-chāi
1Kings8:58 hō͘ lán ê sim kui-ǹg I
1Kings8:59 Goān góa tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng só͘ kî-kiû chiah-ê ōe
1Kings8:60 Hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn chai Siōng Chú í-gōa bô pa̍t-ê Siōng-tè.
1Kings8:61 Só͘-í lín tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè chûn sûn-choân ê sim
1Kings8:62 Ông kap Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn chòe-hé tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng hiàn-chè.
1Kings8:63 Só͘-lô-bûn ǹg Siōng Chú hiàn pêng-an-chè
1Kings8:64 Hit-ji̍t
1Kings8:65 Hit-sî
1Kings8:66 Choeh-kî soah keh-ji̍t
1Kings9:1 Só͘-lô-bûn oân-sêng Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
1Kings9:2 Siōng Chú tē-jī piàn tùi Só͘-lô-bûn hián-hiān
1Kings9:3 Siōng Chú tùi i kóng
1Kings9:4 Lí nā chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t
1Kings9:5 góa chiū beh kian-kò͘ lí tī Í-sek-lia̍t -kok ê ông-ūi kàu éng-oán; chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ū èng-ún lí ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Kings9:6 Lín kap lín ê kiáⁿ-sun nā oa̍t-cháu lī-khui góa
1Kings9:7 góa chiū beh chiong Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi góa siúⁿ-sù in ê tōe kā in siau-bia̍t
1Kings9:8 Chit-keng sèng-tiān hiān-chāi sui-jiân tông-hông
1Kings9:9 Ū lâng ōe ìn kóng
1Kings9:10 Só͘-lô-bûn ēng jī-cha̍p nî khí Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong
1Kings9:11 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông chiong Ka-lī-lī -tōe jī-cha̍p ê siâⁿ hō͘ Thài-ní -ông Hi-lân; in-ūi Hi-lân ū chiàu Só͘-lô-bûn ê chhéng-kiû
1Kings9:12 Hi-lân tùi Thài-ní chhut--lâi
1Kings9:13 chiū kóng
1Kings9:14 Hi-lân bat sàng kim tāi-iok sì-chheng kong-kun hō͘ Só͘-lô-bûn -ông.
1Kings9:15 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông phài kiông-chè-lô-kang khí-chō Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
1Kings9:16 (Chá-chêng Ai-ki̍p -ông Hoat-ló chiūⁿ-lâi kong-chhú Ki-sek
1Kings9:17 Só͘-lô-bûn tiông-kiàn Ki-sek
1Kings9:18 Pa-la
1Kings9:19 Só͘-lô-bûn mā khí-chō chin chōe siâⁿ
1Kings9:20 Só͘-ū tòa tī kéng-lāi ê A-mô͘-lī -lâng
1Kings9:21 bô hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siau-bia̍t--ê
1Kings9:22 M̄-kú Só͘-lô-bûn bô hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe lô͘-lē; hō͘ in chòe i ê chiàn-sū
1Kings9:23 Só͘-lô-bûn ê tok-kang ū gō͘-pah gō͘-cha̍p lâng
1Kings9:24 Hoat-ló ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tùi Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ poaⁿ ji̍p-khì Só͘-lô-bûn ūi-tio̍h i khí ê kiong-tiān. Só͘-lô-bûn koh khí Bí-lô.
1Kings9:25 Só͘-lô-bûn ta̍k-nî saⁿ piàn tī i ūi Siōng Chú khí ê chè-tôaⁿ hiàn sio-hòa-chè kap pêng-an-chè; koh tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng sio-hiuⁿ. Án-ni
1Kings9:26 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông tī Í-tong tōe-khu ê Âng-hái hái-piⁿ
1Kings9:27 Hi-lân phài i ê pō͘-hā
1Kings9:28 In khì Gô-hui
1Kings10:1 Sī-pa ê lú-ông thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn in-ūi Siōng Chú ê miâ só͘ tit--tio̍h ê miâ-siaⁿ
1Kings10:2 I chhōa chin chōe jîn-sîn lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
1Kings10:3 Só͘-lô-bûn chiàu i só͘ mn̄g--ê it-it kā i hôe-tap
1Kings10:4 Sī-pa lú-ông kiàn-sek-tio̍h Só͘-lô-bûn só͘-ū ê tì-hūi
1Kings10:5 toh-téng ê chia̍h-mi̍h
1Kings10:6 Sī-pa lú-ông chiū tùi ông kóng
1Kings10:7 Pún-lâi góa m̄ sìn hiah-ê ōe
1Kings10:8 Lí ê pō͘-sio̍k chin ū hok-khì! Lí ê jîn-sîn chin ū hok-khì! In put-sî tī lí ê bīn-chêng thiaⁿ lí tì-hūi ê ōe.
1Kings10:9 Siōng Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! I ì-ài lí
1Kings10:10 Sī-pa lú-ông chiong tāi-iok sì-chheng kong-kun ê kim
1Kings10:11 Hi-lân ê chûn tùi Gô-hui ūn kim lâi
1Kings10:12 Ông ēng chiah-ê tôaⁿ-hiuⁿ-chhâ chòe Siōng Chú ê tiān kap ông-kiong ê lân-kan
1Kings10:13 Só͘-lô-bûn ēng chin chōe lé-mi̍h sàng Sī-pa lú-ông; í-gōa koh chiàu lú-ông só͘ ì-ài
1Kings10:14 Só͘-lô-bûn ta̍k-nî siu--tio̍h ê kim kiōng nn̄g-bān saⁿ-chheng kong-kun
1Kings10:15 í-gōa iáu ū tùi seng-lí-lâng kap bō͘-e̍k-siong siu ê sè-kim
1Kings10:16 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông phah tōa tún-pâi nn̄g-pah bīn
1Kings10:17 koh phah sió tún-pâi saⁿ-pah bīn
1Kings10:18 Ông koh ēng chhiūⁿ-gê chòe chi̍t ê tōa pó-chō
1Kings10:19 Pó-chō chêng ū la̍k chàn kiā-á; chō-ūi-the ê téng-bīn sī îⁿ--ê
1Kings10:20 koh ū cha̍p-jī chō sai khiā tī la̍k chàn kiā-á ta̍k-chàn ê siang-pêng-piⁿ; pa̍t-ê ông-kok lóng m̄-bat án-ni chòe.
1Kings10:21 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông só͘-ū lim ê khì-khū lóng sī kim--ê; Lê-pa-lūn Lîm-kiong it-chhè ê khì-khū mā-sī sûn-kim--ê; tī Só͘-lô-bûn ê sî-tāi
1Kings10:22 Ông ū Tha-si ê chûn-tūi
1Kings10:23 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ê châi-hù kap tì-hūi iâⁿ-kè thian-hā chu-ông.
1Kings10:24 Choân sè-kài ê lâng lóng siūⁿ-beh lâi kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê bīn
1Kings10:25 In ta̍k-ê tòa chìn-kòng ê lé-mi̍h
1Kings10:26 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ū kiàn-li̍p kun-tūi
1Kings10:27 Ông thóng-tī ê kî-kan
1Kings10:28 Só͘-lô-bûn ê bé lóng tùi Ai-ki̍p kap Kho-ui chìn-kháu
1Kings10:29 Tùi Ai-ki̍p chìn-kháu ê chiàn-chhia
1Kings11:1 Hoat-ló ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ í-gōa
1Kings11:2 Siōng Chú bat bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Kings11:3 I ū chhōa chhit-pah ê kong-chú chòe bó͘
1Kings11:4 Só͘-lô-bûn nî-lāu ê sî
1Kings11:5 Só͘-lô-bûn khì tè Se-tùn -lâng ê lú-sîn A-su-tha-lio̍k
1Kings11:6 Só͘-lô-bûn chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
1Kings11:7 Hit-sî
1Kings11:8 Hiah-ê gōa-pang ê bó͘ lóng tùi in ê sîn-bêng sio-hiuⁿ hiàn-chè; Só͘-lô-bûn mā ūi-tio̍h in án-ni chòe.
1Kings11:9 Siōng Chú tùi Só͘-lô-bûn siū-khì
1Kings11:10 Siōng Chú bat bēng-lēng i m̄-thang pài pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng. M̄-kú Só͘-lô-bûn bô chun-siú Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng.
1Kings11:11 Siōng Chú chiū tùi Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Kings11:12 M̄-kú in-ūi lí ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t ê iân-kò͘
1Kings11:13 Chóng-sī góa bô beh chiong choân-kok thiah-li̍h
1Kings11:14 Siōng Chú heng-khí chi̍t ê tùi-te̍k kong-kek Só͘-lô-bûn
1Kings11:15 Chá-chêng Tāi-pi̍t phah Í-tong ê sî
1Kings11:16 
1Kings11:17 Hit-sî Hap-ta̍t iáu koh sī gín-á. Hap-ta̍t kap i ê lāu-pē jîn-sîn tiong kúi-nā ê Í-tong -lâng
1Kings11:18 In tùi Bí-tiân chhut-hoat khì Pa-lân; tùi Pa-lân tòa kúi-nā lâng kap in khì Ai-ki̍p
1Kings11:19 Hap-ta̍t tī Hoat-ló bīn-chêng tit-tio̍h chin tōa ê un-hūi; Hoat-ló koh ēng ông-hō͘ Tap-pí-nî ê sió-bē hō͘ i chòe bó͘.
1Kings11:20 Tap-pí-nî ê sió-bē kā i siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
1Kings11:21 Hap-ta̍t tī Ai-ki̍p thiaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
1Kings11:22 Hoat-ló kā i kóng
1Kings11:23 Siōng-tè koh heng-khí chi̍t ê tùi-te̍k kong-kek Só͘-lô-bûn
1Kings11:24 Tāi-pi̍t thâi Só-pa -lâng ê sî
1Kings11:25 Só͘-lô-bûn oa̍h--teh ê sî
1Kings11:26 Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lô-pho-an mā khí-lâi hoán-poān ông; i sī Só͘-lô-bûn ê jîn-sîn
1Kings11:27 I chhut-chhiú kong-kek ông ê goân-in sī án-ni: Só͘-lô-bûn khí-chō Bí-lô
1Kings11:28 Iâ-lô-pho-an chin ū châi-lêng. Só͘-lô-bûn khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siàu-liân-lâng un-khûn
1Kings11:29 Ū chi̍t ji̍t Iâ-lô-pho-an lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
1Kings11:30 A-hi-ngá the̍h i chhēng ê sin-saⁿ
1Kings11:31 kā Iâ-lô-pho-an kóng
1Kings11:32 M̄-kú in-ūi góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t
1Kings11:33 In-ūi in khì-sak góa
1Kings11:34 M̄-kú
1Kings11:35 Chóng-sī góa beh tùi i ê kiáⁿ siu-hôe ông-kok
1Kings11:36 lâu chi̍t chi-cho̍k hō͘ i ê kiáⁿ
1Kings11:37 Góa kéng-soán lí
1Kings11:38 Lí nā chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t
1Kings11:39 Góa beh in-ūi án-ni hêng-hoa̍t Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi
1Kings11:40 Só͘-lô-bûn ài-beh thâi-sí Iâ-lô-pho-an
1Kings11:41 Só͘-lô-bûn kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê tì-hūi
1Kings11:42 Só͘-lô-bûn tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chòe Í-sek-lia̍t choân-kok ê ông
1Kings11:43 Só͘-lô-bûn tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
1Kings12:1 Lô-pho-an khì Sī-kiàm
1Kings12:2 Í-chêng Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lô-pho-an ūi-tio̍h siám-pī Só͘-lô-bûn -ông
1Kings12:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhe lâng khì chhiáⁿ i tò--lâi; Iâ-lô-pho-an chiū kap Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng lâi kìⁿ Lô-pho-an
1Kings12:4 “Lí ê lāu-pē hō͘ goán pē tāng ê tàⁿ; kiû lí kiám-khin lí ê lāu-pē hē tī goán keng-thâu téng ê tāng-tàⁿ
1Kings12:5 Lô-pho-an kā in kóng
1Kings12:6 Lô-pho-an ê lāu-pē Só͘-lô-bûn iáu oa̍h--teh ê sî
1Kings12:7 In ìn i kóng
1Kings12:8 M̄-kú Lô-pho-an kū-choa̍t chiah-ê goân-ló hō͘ i ê kè-chhek
1Kings12:9 i kā in kóng
1Kings12:10 Hiah-ê kap i chòe-hé tōa-hàn ê siàu-liân-lâng kā i kóng
1Kings12:11 Góa ê lāu-pē hō͘ lín pē tāng ê tàⁿ
1Kings12:12 Iâ-lô-pho-an kap chèng jîn-bîn chiàu Lô-pho-an -ông ê ōe
1Kings12:13 Ông ēng pháiⁿ siaⁿ-sàu ìn jîn-bîn; i m̄ thiaⁿ goân-ló hō͘ i ê kiàn-gī
1Kings12:14 chiàu siàu-liân-lâng ê ì-kiàn tùi jîn-bîn kóng
1Kings12:15 Ông m̄-khéng thiaⁿ jîn-bîn ê chhéng-kiû
1Kings12:16 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng jîn-bîn chi̍t-ē chai ông m̄-khéng thiaⁿ in ê chhéng-kiû
1Kings12:17 M̄-kú Lô-pho-an iû-goân chòe tòa tī lâm-pō͘ Iû-tāi tōe-khu ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê ông.
1Kings12:18 Lô-pho-an -ông phài kàm-tok kiông-chè-lô-kang ê A-to-lân khì Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hia; Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn ēng chio̍h-thâu kā i tìm-sí. Lô-pho-an -ông chiū kóaⁿ-kín chiūⁿ chiàn-chhia cháu tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
1Kings12:19 Tùi án-ni
1Kings12:20 Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-lô-pho-an tò--lâi
1Kings12:21 Lô-pho-an kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
1Kings12:22 M̄-kú Siōng-tè ê ōe lîm-kàu Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng Sī-má-ngá
1Kings12:23 “Lí khì kā Só͘-lô-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi -ông Lô-pho-an
1Kings12:24 ‘Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Lín m̄-thang khì kap lín ê hiaⁿ-tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kau-chiàn; ta̍k-ê lâng tò-khì ka-kī ê chhù
1Kings12:25 Iâ-lô-pho-an tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu tiông-kiàn Sī-kiàm
1Kings12:26 Iâ-lô-pho-an sim-lāi kóng
1Kings12:27 chiah-ê jîn-bîn nā chiūⁿ-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tī Siōng Chú ê tiān hiàn-chè
1Kings12:28 Ông kap lâng chham-siông liáu-āu
1Kings12:29 I hē chi̍t chiah tī Pek-te̍k-lī
1Kings12:30 Chit-ê tāi-chì hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn hām-lo̍h chōe
1Kings12:31 Ông tī soaⁿ-thâu khí tiān; siat-li̍p m̄-sī Lī-bī chi-cho̍k ê lâng chòe chè-si.
1Kings12:32 Iâ-lô-pho-an o̍h Iû-tāi tēng choeh-kî siú choeh
1Kings12:33 I tī poeh-ge̍h cha̍p-gō͘
1Kings13:1 Hit-sî
1Kings13:2 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng chiàu Siōng Chú ê ōe
1Kings13:3 Siâng hit-ji̍t
1Kings13:4 Iâ-lô-pho-an -ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng tùi Pek-te̍k-lī ê chè-tôaⁿ só͘ kóng ê ōe
1Kings13:5 tôaⁿ chiū phòa-li̍h
1Kings13:6 Ông tùi Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
1Kings13:7 Ông kā Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
1Kings13:8 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng tùi ông kóng
1Kings13:9 In-ūi Siōng Chú ū kā góa hoan-hù kóng
1Kings13:10 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng chiū kiâⁿ pa̍t-tiâu lō͘
1Kings13:11 Pek-te̍k-lī ū chi̍t ê lāu sian-ti
1Kings13:12 Lāu-pē tùi in kóng
1Kings13:13 I chiū hoan-hù i ê kiáⁿ kóng
1Kings13:14 khì jip Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng
1Kings13:15 Lāu sian-ti kā i kóng
1Kings13:16 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng chiū kóng
1Kings13:17 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê ōe hoan-hù góa kóng
1Kings13:18 Lāu sian-ti chiū kā i kóng
1Kings13:19 I chiū kap i tò--khì
1Kings13:20 In nn̄g ê lâng chòe-hé chia̍h ê sî
1Kings13:21 I chiū kā hit-ê tùi Iû-tāi lâi Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
1Kings13:22 tò-lâi I kìm-chí lí m̄-thang chia̍h-pn̄g lim-chúi ê só͘-chāi lim-chia̍h
1Kings13:23 Chia̍h-pn̄g lim-chúi liáu-āu
1Kings13:24 Hit-ê sian-ti khiâ-lû lī-khui liáu-āu
1Kings13:25 Ū lâng tùi hia keng-kè
1Kings13:26 Hit-ê chhōa Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng tùi lō͘--ni̍h tò--lâi ê lāu sian-ti thiaⁿ--tio̍h chiū kóng
1Kings13:27 Lāu sian-ti chiū hoan-hù i ê kiáⁿ kóng
1Kings13:28 I khiâ lû-á chhut--khì
1Kings13:29 Lāu sian-ti chiū chiong Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng ê sin-si hē tī lû ê téng-bīn
1Kings13:30 Lāu sian-ti chiong Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng ê sin-si chòng tī i ka-kī ê bōng
1Kings13:31 Bâi-chòng liáu-āu
1Kings13:32 In-ūi i hōng Siōng Chú ê bēng-lēng
1Kings13:33 Chit-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
1Kings13:34 Chit-ê tāi-chì hō͘ Iâ-lô-pho-an ông-tiâu hām-lo̍h chōe
1Kings14:1 Hit-sî
1Kings14:2 Iâ-lô-pho-an kā i ê bó͘ kóng
1Kings14:3 Taⁿ lí tio̍h tòa cha̍p tè mī-pau
1Kings14:4 Iâ-lô-pho-an ê bó͘ chiū chiàu án-ni chhut-hoat khì Sī-lô
1Kings14:5 Siōng Chú kā A-hi-ngá kóng
1Kings14:6 I tú-á ji̍p mn̂g
1Kings14:7 Lí tò-khì kā Iâ-lô-pho-an kóng
1Kings14:8 tùi Tāi-pi̍t -ke chiong ông-kok hun-lia̍t siúⁿ-sù hō͘ lí; m̄-kú lí bô chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t chun-siú góa ê kài-bēng
1Kings14:9 Lí kèng-jiân chòe pháiⁿ chhiau-kè só͘-ū lí í-chêng ê lâng
1Kings14:10 In-ūi án-ni
1Kings14:11 Só͘-ū sio̍k Iâ-lô-pho-an ê lâng
1Kings14:12 “Taⁿ lí tò-khì lín tau; lí ê kha chi̍t-ē ta̍h ji̍p-siâⁿ
1Kings14:13 Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn ōe ūi-tio̍h i thî-khàu
1Kings14:14 Siōng Chú beh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī heng-khí chi̍t ê ông
1Kings14:15 Siōng Chú beh phah Í-sek-lia̍t
1Kings14:16 Iâ-lô-pho-an pún-sin hoān-chōe
1Kings14:17 Iâ-lô-pho-an ê bó͘ khí-sin tò-khì Tek-sat; tú-á kàu chhù ê hō͘-tēng
1Kings14:18 Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn ūi-tio̍h i thî-khàu
1Kings14:19 Iâ-lô-pho-an kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings14:20 Iâ-lô-pho-an choh-ông kiōng jī-cha̍p-jī nî
1Kings14:21 Só͘-lô-bûn ê kiáⁿ Lô-pho-an tī Iû-tāi choh-ông. Lô-pho-an chē-ūi ê sî sì-cha̍p-it hè. I tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông cha̍p-chhit nî; Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sī Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k tiong kéng-soán hō͘ lâng lâi kèng-pài I ê siâⁿ. Lô-pho-an ê lāu-bú kiò-chòe Ná-má
1Kings14:22 Iû-tāi jîn-bîn chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
1Kings14:23 In-ūi in tī ta̍k-ê koân ê soaⁿ-lûn-á
1Kings14:24 Kok-lāi koh ū loân-tông; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng o̍h Siōng Chú tī in bīn-chêng kóaⁿ-chhut ê gōa-cho̍k-lâng só͘ chòe khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū.
1Kings14:25 Lô-pho-an -ông tē-gō͘ nî
1Kings14:26 chiong Siōng Chú sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong ê pó-mi̍h lóng chhiúⁿ--khì
1Kings14:27 Lô-pho-an -ông chòe tâng ê tún-pâi tāi-thòe hiah-ê kim tún-pâi
1Kings14:28 Ông ta̍k-piàn ji̍p Siōng Chú ê tiān
1Kings14:29 Lô-pho-an kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings14:30 Lô-pho-an kap Iâ-lô-pho-an siông-siông kau-chiàn.
1Kings14:31 Lô-pho-an tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
1Kings15:1 Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iâ-lô-pho-an tē-cha̍p-poeh nî
1Kings15:2 tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông saⁿ nî; i ê lāu-bú kiò-chòe Má-ka
1Kings15:3 A-pí-ngá chòe i ê lāu-pē í-chêng só͘ chòe it-chhè ê chōe-ok; i ê sim bô chhin-chhiūⁿ i ê a-chó͘ Tāi-pi̍t ê sim oân-choân sūn-ho̍k Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè.
1Kings15:4 M̄-kú Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè in-ūi Tāi-pi̍t ê iân-kò͘
1Kings15:5 Tāi-pi̍t tī Hek -lâng O͘-lī-a hit-kiāⁿ sū í-gōa

1Kings15:7 A-pí-ngá kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings15:8 A-pí-ngá tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
1Kings15:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iâ-lô-pho-an tē-jī-cha̍p nî
1Kings15:10 I tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông sì-cha̍p-it nî; i ê a-má kiò-chòe Má-ka
1Kings15:11 A-sat chhin-chhiūⁿ i ê chó͘ Tāi-pi̍t chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
1Kings15:12 tùi kok-lāi tû-khì loân-tông
1Kings15:13 koh hòe-tû i ê a-má Má-ka thài-hō͘ ê ūi
1Kings15:14 Sui-jiân hiah-ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē tû--khì
1Kings15:15 I chiong i ê lāu-pē kap i pún-sin hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê kim
1Kings15:16 A-sat kap Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Pa-sa siông-siông kau-chiàn.
1Kings15:17 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Pa-sa lâi kong-kek Iû-tāi
1Kings15:18 A-sat chiū chiong Siōng Chú sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong ê hú-khò͘ chhun ê kim gûn
1Kings15:19 “Lán lâi kiat-bêng
1Kings15:20 Piān Hap-ta̍t tông-ì A-sat -ông ê ōe

1Kings15:22 Tùi án-ni
1Kings15:23 A-sat kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings15:24 A-sat tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
1Kings15:25 Iû-tāi -ông A-sat tē-jī nî
1Kings15:26 Ná-tap chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
1Kings15:27 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k A-hi-ngá ê kiáⁿ Pa-sa pōe-poān Ná-tap. Ná-tap kap Í-sek-lia̍t kun-peng ûi-khùn Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê Ki-pí-tùn -siâⁿ ê sî
1Kings15:28 Iû-tāi -ông A-sat tē-saⁿ nî

1Kings18:5 A-hap kā Gô-pa-tí-a kóng
1Kings18:6 In chiū pun khu-he̍k khì chhē. A-hap kiâⁿ chi̍t tiâu lō͘
1Kings18:7 Gô-pa-tí-a tī lō͘--ni̍h tú-tio̍h Í-lī-a; Gô-pa-tí-a jīn-tio̍h i

1Kings20:1 Sū-lī-a -ông Piān Hap-ta̍t tiàu-chi̍p i ê choân-kun
1Kings20:2 Koh phài sù-chiá ji̍p-siâⁿ khì kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap
1Kings20:3 ‘Lí ê kim gûn lóng tio̍h kau hō͘ góa
1Kings20:4 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông ìn kóng
1Kings20:5 Sù-chiá koh lâi kóng
1Kings20:6 Bîn-á-chài chit-ê sî
1Kings20:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tiàu-chi̍p kok-lāi ê tiúⁿ-ló

1Kings20:14 A-hap kóng
1Kings20:15 A-hap chiū tiám-sǹg séng-tiúⁿ ê siàu-liân kun-peng
1Kings20:16 Ji̍t tiong-tàu
1Kings20:17 Hiah-ê séng-tiúⁿ ê siàu-liân kun-peng chòe thâu chhut--khì. Piān Hap-ta̍t phài lâng khì thàm-cha
1Kings20:18 I kóng
1Kings20:19 Hiah-ê séng-tiúⁿ ê siàu-liân kun-peng chhut-siâⁿ
1Kings20:20 ta̍k-ê lâng thâi-sí i ê tùi-te̍k. Sū-lī-a -lâng tô-cháu
1Kings20:21 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chhut-siâⁿ
1Kings20:22 Hit-ê sian-ti lâi kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
1Kings20:23 Sū-lī-a -ông ê jîn-sîn tùi i kóng
1Kings20:24 Chhiáⁿ lí án-ni chòe; kái-tû hiah-ê ông ê chit-bū
1Kings20:25 Koh chiàu lí sún-sit ê sò͘-bo̍k chio-bō͘ chi̍t tūi kun-peng
1Kings20:26 Keh-nî chhun-thiⁿ
1Kings20:27 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng mā tiàu-chi̍p kun-peng
1Kings20:28 Ū chi̍t ê Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng lâi kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
1Kings20:29 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Sū-lī-a -lâng sio-tùi chat-iâⁿ chhit ji̍t; kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
1Kings20:30 Kî-tha ê kun-peng tô-cháu ji̍p-khì A-hut -siâⁿ; hit-ê siâⁿ ê siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ tó
1Kings20:31 I ê jîn-sîn kā i kóng
1Kings20:32 In chiū io hâ môa-pò͘
1Kings20:33 Hiah-ê lâng chim-chiok thiaⁿ i ê kháu-khì
1Kings20:34 Piān Hap-ta̍t tùi A-hap kóng
1Kings20:35 Ū chi̍t ê lâng
1Kings20:36 I chiū kā i ê tâng-phōaⁿ kóng
1Kings20:37 I koh tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng
1Kings20:38 Sian-ti chiū chiong thâu-kun khàm kàu ba̍k-chiu
1Kings20:39 Ông tùi hia keng-kè ê sî
1Kings20:40 Lí ê po̍k-jîn bô-êng chit-hāng hit-hāng ê sî
1Kings20:41 I kóaⁿ-kín chiong khàm ba̍k-chiu ê thâu-kun the̍h-tiāu; Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū jīn-chhut i sī chi̍t ê sian-ti.
1Kings20:42 I kā ông kóng
1Kings20:43 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū ut-chut bô hoaⁿ-hí
1Kings21:1 Āu-lâi koh ū tāi-chì hoat-seng. Iâ-su-lia̍t -lâng Ná-pek tī Iâ-su-lia̍t ū chi̍t khu phû-tô-hn̂g
1Kings21:2 A-hap kā Ná-pek kóng
1Kings21:3 Ná-pek kā A-hap kóng
1Kings21:4 A-hap in-ūi Iâ-su-lia̍t -lâng Ná-pek kóng ê ōe
1Kings21:5 Ông-hō͘ Iâ-sé-phek lâi i hia
1Kings21:6 I ìn kóng
1Kings21:7 Ông-hō͘ Iâ-sé-phek kā i kóng

1Kings21:9 Phoe-lāi siá kóng
1Kings21:10 koh kiò nn̄g ê húi-lūi chē tī i ê tùi-bīn
1Kings21:11 Hiah-ê kap Ná-pek tòa kâng-siâⁿ ê tiúⁿ-ló kap kùi-cho̍k
1Kings21:12 In soan-pò͘ kìm-chia̍h
1Kings21:13 Koh kiò nn̄g ê húi-lūi lâi chē tī Ná-pek ê tùi-bīn
1Kings21:14 Tiúⁿ-ló kap kùi-cho̍k chiū chhe lâng khì kā Iâ-sé-phek kóng
1Kings21:15 Iâ-sé-phek thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ná-pek hō͘ chio̍h-thâu tìm-sí
1Kings21:16 A-hap thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ná-pek í-keng sí
1Kings21:17 Siōng Chú ê ōe lîm-kàu Thê-su-pí -lâng Í-lī-a

1Kings22:1 Í-sek-lia̍t kap Sū-lī-a saⁿ nî kú bô kau-chiàn.
1Kings22:2 Kàu tē-saⁿ nî
1Kings22:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi i ê jîn-sîn kóng
1Kings22:4 A-hap tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:5 Iok-sa-hoat koh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kóng
1Kings22:6 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū tiàu-chi̍p sian-ti tāi-iok sì-pah lâng
1Kings22:7 Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kā Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū tiàu chi̍t ê koaⁿ-oân lâi
1Kings22:10 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kap Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat tī Sat-má-lī-a siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
1Kings22:11 Ki-ná-ná ê kiáⁿ Se-tí-ka chòe thih ê kak
1Kings22:12 Só͘-ū ê sian-ti lóng án-ni ū-giân kóng

1Kings22:14 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
1Kings22:15 Bí-kai-ngá lâi kàu ông ê bīn-chêng
1Kings22:16 Ông tùi i kóng
1Kings22:17 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
1Kings22:18 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:19 Bí-kai-ngá kè-sio̍k kóng
1Kings22:20 Siōng Chú kóng
1Kings22:21 Āu-lâi ū chi̍t ê sîn chhut--lâi
1Kings22:22 Siōng Chú mn̄g i kóng
1Kings22:23 Hiān-chāi Siōng Chú ū hō͘ pe̍h-chha̍t ê sîn ji̍p tī lí chiah-ê sian-ti ê chhùi; Siōng Chú soan-pò͘ beh kàng chai-hō hō͘ lí.”
1Kings22:24 Ki-ná-ná ê kiáⁿ Se-tí-ka kiâⁿ chìn-chêng
1Kings22:25 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
1Kings22:26 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kóng
1Kings22:27 kā in kóng
1Kings22:28 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
1Kings22:29 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap kap Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat khì chìn-kong Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t.
1Kings22:30 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:31 Sū-lī-a -ông ū hoan-hù i saⁿ-cha̍p-jī ê chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ
1Kings22:32 Chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sa-hoat chiū kóng
1Kings22:33 Chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h i m̄-sī Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
1Kings22:34 Ū chi̍t ê Sū-lī-a ê peng-á khui keng
1Kings22:35 Hit-ji̍t
1Kings22:36 Ji̍t beh lo̍h ê sî
1Kings22:37 Ông sí
1Kings22:38 Ū lâng tī Sat-má-lī-a ê chúi-tî piⁿ sóe i ê chhia (chhiong-ki mā tī hia sóe seng-khu)
1Kings22:39 A-hap kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings22:40 A-hap tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia; i ê kiáⁿ A-hap-siā sòa-chiap i choh-ông.
1Kings22:41 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap tē-sì nî
1Kings22:42 Iok-sa-hoat chē-ūi ê sî saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
1Kings22:43 Iok-sa-hoat kiâⁿ i lāu-pē A-sat ê lō͘
1Kings22:44 Iok-sa-hoat kap Í-sek-lia̍t -ông hô-pêng siong-chhù.
1Kings22:45 Iok-sa-hoat kî-tha ê sū-chek
1Kings22:46 I ê lāu-pē A-sat lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê loân-tông
1Kings22:47 Hit-sî Í-tong bô ông
1Kings22:48 Iok-sa-hoat chō Tha-si ê chûn-tūi beh khì Gô-hui ūn kim lâi; m̄-kú khì bô sêng
1Kings22:49 A-hap ê kiáⁿ A-hap-siā tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
1Kings22:50 Iok-sa-hoat tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
1Kings22:51 Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat cha̍p-chhit nî
1Kings22:52 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
1Kings22:53 I kap i ê lāu-pē kâng-khoán ho̍k-sāi kèng-pài Pa-le̍k
