2Kings5:23 Nái-bān kóng
2Kings5:24 In kàu soaⁿ-lûn-á
2Kings5:25 I ji̍p-khì khiā tī chú-lâng ê bīn-chêng. Í-lī-sa mn̄g i kóng
2Kings5:26 Í-lī-sa kā i kóng
2Kings5:27 In-ūi án-ni Nái-bān ê bâ-hong-pīⁿ beh thoân hō͘ lí kap lí ê hō͘-tāi
2Kings6:1 Sian-ti ê ha̍k-seng tùi Í-lī-sa kóng
2Kings6:2 Chhiáⁿ ún-chún goán khì Iok-tàn-hô
2Kings6:3 Ū chi̍t ê kóng
2Kings6:4 I chiū kap in chòe-hé khì. In kàu Iok-tàn-hô
2Kings6:5 Ū chi̍t ê lâng teh chhò ê sî
2Kings6:6 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
2Kings6:7 I kóng
2Kings6:8 Sū-lī-a -ông kap Í-sek-lia̍t kau-chiàn. I kap i ê jîn-sîn thó-lūn kóng
2Kings6:9 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng chhe lâng khì kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
2Kings6:10 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông phài lâng khì kéng-kò Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng só͘ kóng hit só͘-chāi ê chū-bîn
2Kings6:11 Sū-lī-a -ông in-ūi chit-ê sū sim-lāi chin siū-khì
2Kings6:12 Ū chi̍t ê jîn-sîn kóng
2Kings6:13 Ông kóng
2Kings6:14 Ông chiū phài bé
2Kings6:15 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng ê po̍k-jîn thàu-chá khí--lâi
2Kings6:16 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
2Kings6:17 Í-lī-sa kî-tó kóng
2Kings6:18 Sū-lī-a -lâng lo̍h-khì kàu Í-lī-sa hia
2Kings6:19 Í-lī-sa tùi in kóng
2Kings6:20 In ji̍p-khì Sat-má-lī-a
2Kings6:21 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông khòaⁿ-tio̍h in
2Kings6:22 Í-lī-sa ìn kóng
2Kings6:23 Ông ūi-tio̍h in chún-pī hong-sēng ê iàn-se̍k. In chia̍h-pá
2Kings6:24 Āu-lâi
2Kings6:25 Sat-má-lī-a ū tōa ki-hng; Sū-lī-a -lâng kè-sio̍k ûi-khùn siâⁿ
2Kings6:26 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ téng keng-kè ê sî
2Kings6:27 Ông kóng
2Kings6:28 Ông koh kóng
2Kings6:29 Goán chiū chú góa ê kiáⁿ lâi chia̍h. Keh-ji̍t góa tùi i kóng
2Kings6:30 Ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h hū-jîn-lâng ê ōe
2Kings6:31 Ông kóng
2Kings6:32 Hit-sî
2Kings6:33 Í-lī-sa iáu-teh kap in kóng-ōe ê sî
2Kings7:1 Í-lī-sa kóng
2Kings7:2 Ū chi̍t ê ông ê sī-ōe-koaⁿ ìn Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
2Kings7:3 Tī siâⁿ-mn̂g gōa ū sì ê bâ-hong-pīⁿ-lâng
2Kings7:4 Lán nā ji̍p-siâⁿ
2Kings7:5 Hông-hun ê sî
2Kings7:6 In-ūi Chú hō͘ Sū-lī-a ê kun-tūi thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chiàn-chhia kap chiàn-bé ê siaⁿ
2Kings7:7 Só͘-í tī hông-hun ê sî in chiū pàng-sak in ê pò͘-pîⁿ
2Kings7:8 Hiah-ê bâ-hong-pīⁿ-lâng lâi kàu kun-iâⁿ piⁿ
2Kings7:9 Hit-sî
2Kings7:10 In chiū khì kiò kò͘ siâⁿ-mn̂g ê lâng
2Kings7:11 Hiah-ê kò͘ siâⁿ-mn̂g ê lâng tōa-siaⁿ hoah
2Kings7:12 Ông thàu-mî khí--lâi
2Kings7:13 Ū chi̍t ê jîn-sîn tùi ông kóng
2Kings7:14 In soán nn̄g tâi chiàn-chhia kap bé
2Kings7:15 In tui-chong Sū-lī-a ê kun-tūi kàu Iok-tàn-hô
2Kings7:16 Sat-má-lī-a ê chū-bîn chhut-khì chhiúⁿ Sū-lī-a -lâng ê kun-iâⁿ; án-ni
2Kings7:17 Ông phài hit-ê sī-ōe-koaⁿ tī siâⁿ-mn̂g chí-hui
2Kings7:18 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng ū tùi ông kóng
2Kings7:19 Hit-ê sī-ōe-koaⁿ tùi Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
2Kings7:20 Chit-kù ōe kó-jiân hoat-seng tī hit-ê sī-ōe-koaⁿ sin-chiūⁿ
2Kings8:1 Í-lī-sa bat hō͘ chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng ê kiáⁿ koh-oa̍h; i tùi chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng
2Kings8:2 Hū-jîn-lâng chiū chiàu Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng ê ōe
2Kings8:3 Chhit nî móa
2Kings8:4 Hit-sî
2Kings8:5 Ki-hap-se teh kā ông kóng Í-lī-sa án-chóaⁿ hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sî
2Kings8:6 Ông mn̄g hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng
2Kings8:7 Í-lī-sa lâi kàu Tāi-má-sū-kek
2Kings8:8 Ông chiū tùi Hap-sih kóng
2Kings8:9 Hap-sih chiū khì kìⁿ Í-lī-sa. I ēng sì-cha̍p chiah lo̍k-tô chài Tāi-má-sū-kek ta̍k-khoán ê hó-mi̍h chòe lé-mi̍h
2Kings8:10 Í-lī-sa kā i kóng
2Kings8:11 Í-lī-sa ti̍t-ti̍t khòaⁿ Hap-sih
2Kings8:12 Hap-sih kóng
2Kings8:13 Hap-sih kóng
2Kings8:14 Hap-sih lī-khui Í-lī-sa
2Kings8:15 Keh-ji̍t Hap-sih the̍h kāu ê pò͘ ùn chúi
2Kings8:16 A-hap ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hô-lân tē-gō͘ nî
2Kings8:17 Iok-lân chē-ūi ê sî saⁿ-cha̍p-jī hè
2Kings8:18 I kiâⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t chu-ông ê lō͘
2Kings8:19 M̄-kú Siōng Chú in-ūi I ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t ê iân-kò͘
2Kings8:20 Iok-lân choh-ông ê sî
2Kings8:21 Iok-lân tòa só͘-ū ê chiàn-chhia kè-khì Sat-ek
2Kings8:22 Án-ni
2Kings8:23 Iok-lân kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings8:24 Iok-lân tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings8:25 A-hap ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hô-lân cha̍p-jī nî
2Kings8:26 A-hap-siā chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-jī hè
2Kings8:27 I kiâⁿ A-hap -ke ê lō͘
2Kings8:28 A-hap-siā kap A-hap ê kiáⁿ Iok-hô-lân chòe-hé khì Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t
2Kings8:29 Iok-hô-lân -ông tò-khì Iâ-su-lia̍t
2Kings9:1 Sian-ti Í-lī-sa kiò chi̍t ê sian-ti ê ha̍k-seng lâi
2Kings9:2 Kàu hia
2Kings9:3 chiong pân-lāi ê iû tò tī i ê thâu-khak
2Kings9:4 Chit-ê siàu-liân ê sian-ti chiū khì Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t.
2Kings9:5 I kàu hia
2Kings9:6 Iâ-hō͘ chiū khí--lâi
2Kings9:7 Lí tio̍h thâi-sí lí ê chú-lâng A-hap choân-ke
2Kings9:8 A-hap choân-ke lóng tio̍h bia̍t-bông; só͘-ū tī Í-sek-lia̍t tiong sio̍k A-hap ê ta-po͘-lâng
2Kings9:9 Góa beh hō͘ A-hap ê ke kap Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lô-pho-an ê ke kâng-khoán
2Kings9:10 Káu beh tī Iâ-su-lia̍t ê chhân-hn̂g chia̍h Iâ-sé-phek
2Kings9:11 Iâ-hō͘ chhut--khì
2Kings9:12 In kóng
2Kings9:13 In ta̍k-ê lâng kóaⁿ-kín ēng ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ pho͘ tī kiā-á ê téng-chàn
2Kings9:14 Án-ni Lêng-sī ê sun
2Kings9:15 Āu-lâi
2Kings9:16 Iâ-hō͘ chiū sái chiàn-chhia khì Iâ-su-lia̍t
2Kings9:17 Ū chi̍t ê siú-bōng--ê khiā tī Iâ-su-lia̍t siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ téng ê siú-bōng-tâi
2Kings9:18 Hit-ê bé-peng khì gêng-chiap Iâ-hō͘
2Kings9:19 Ông koh phài chi̍t ê bé-peng khì. I kàu in hia
2Kings9:20 Siú-bōng--ê pò-kò ông kóng
2Kings9:21 Iok-hô-lân chiū kóng
2Kings9:22 Iok-hô-lân khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-hō͘ chiū kóng
2Kings9:23 Iok-hô-lân chiū kā chhia se̍h hoan-thâu tô-cháu
2Kings9:24 Iâ-hō͘ chhut-la̍t khui keng
2Kings9:25 Iâ-hō͘ tùi i ê kun-koaⁿ Pit-kah kóng
2Kings9:26 Siōng Chú ū kóng
2Kings9:27 Iû-tāi -ông A-hap-siā khòaⁿ-tio̍h án-ni
2Kings9:28 I ê jîn-sîn ēng chhia kā i ê si-thé chài-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Kings9:29 A-hap-siā chòe Iû-tāi -ông ê sî
2Kings9:30 Iâ-hō͘ kàu Iâ-su-lia̍t
2Kings9:31 Iâ-hō͘ ji̍p-siâⁿ ê sî
2Kings9:32 Iâ-hō͘ gia̍h-thâu ǹg thang-á khòaⁿ
2Kings9:33 Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings9:34 Iâ-hō͘ ji̍p--khì
2Kings9:35 M̄-kú in khì beh kā i bâi-chòng
2Kings9:36 In tò-lâi kā Iâ-hō͘ pò-kò
2Kings9:37 Iâ-sé-phek ê sin-si tī Iâ-su-lia̍t ê chhân-hn̂g ōe kap pùn siâng-khoán
2Kings10:1 A-hap ū chhit-cha̍p ê kiáⁿ-sun tī Sat-má-lī-a. Iâ-hō͘ siá-phoe khì Sat-má-lī-a
2Kings10:2 kóng
2Kings10:3 lín tio̍h tī lín chú-lâng kiáⁿ-sun ê tiong-kan
2Kings10:4 In hui-siông kiaⁿ
2Kings10:5 Ông-kiong chóng-koán
2Kings10:6 Iâ-hō͘ koh siá-phoe hō͘ in
2Kings10:7 Iâ-hō͘ ê phoe chi̍t-ē kàu
2Kings10:8 Ū chi̍t ê sù-chiá lâi kā Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings10:9 Keh-chá-khí
2Kings10:10 Tùi án-ni thang chai
2Kings10:11 Sio̍k A-hap -ke tī Iâ-su-lia̍t chhun ê lâng
2Kings10:12 Iâ-hō͘ chhut-hoat
2Kings10:13 tú-tio̍h Iû-tāi -ông A-hap-siā ê chhin-sio̍k
2Kings10:14 Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings10:15 Iâ-hō͘ kè-sio̍k chìn-chêng
2Kings10:16 Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings10:17 Kàu Sat-má-lī-a
2Kings10:18 Iâ-hō͘ tiàu-chi̍p chèng jîn-bîn
2Kings10:19 Só͘-í tio̍h tiàu-chi̍p Pa-le̍k só͘-ū ê sian-ti
2Kings10:20 Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings10:21 Iâ-hō͘ phài lâng khì Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k só͘-chāi soan-kò chit-ê siau-sit; pài Pa-le̍k ê lâng lóng chiâu kàu
2Kings10:22 Iâ-hō͘ hoan-hù koán-lí lé-ho̍k ê lâng kóng
2Kings10:23 Iâ-hō͘ kap Lī-kah ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-ta̍t ji̍p Pa-le̍k ê biō
2Kings10:24 In chiū ji̍p-khì beh hiàn chè-sū kap sio-hòa-chè. Iâ-hō͘ í-keng ū an-pâi poeh-cha̍p ê lâng tī biō ê gōa-bīn
2Kings10:25 Iâ-hō͘ hiàn sio-hòa-chè liáu-āu
2Kings10:26 chiong thiāu-siōng lóng the̍h chhut-lâi sio.
2Kings10:27 In húi-hoāi Pa-le̍k ê thiāu-siōng
2Kings10:28 Án-ni
2Kings10:29 M̄-kú Iâ-hō͘ kap Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lô-pho-an kâng-khoán
2Kings10:30 Siōng Chú kā Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings10:31 M̄-kú Iâ-hō͘ bô choan-sim chun-siú Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ê lu̍t-hoat
2Kings10:32 Hit-sî
2Kings10:33 chiàm-léng Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng Ki-lia̍t choân-tōe
2Kings10:34 Iâ-hō͘ kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings10:35 Iâ-hō͘ tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Kings10:36 Iâ-hō͘ tī Sat-má-lī-a chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chóng-kiōng jī-cha̍p-poeh nî.
2Kings11:1 A-hap-siā ê lāu-bú A-tha-lī-ngá chi̍t-ē chai i ê kiáⁿ siū sat-hāi
2Kings11:2 M̄-kú Iok-lân -ông ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
2Kings11:3 A-tha-lī-ngá tī-lí Iû-tāi -kok ê sî
2Kings11:4 Kàu tē-chhit nî
2Kings11:5 Koh hoan-hù in kóng
2Kings11:6 saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t kò͘-siú So͘-ní-mn̂g
2Kings11:7 Lín tī An-hioh-ji̍t bô ti̍t-pan ê nn̄g tūi jîn-oân tio̍h kò͘-siú Siōng Chú ê tiān
2Kings11:8 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h tòa kun-khì
2Kings11:9 Só͘-ū ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ lóng chiàu chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê bēng-lēng khì chòe; ta̍k-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ lóng tòa in ê pō͘-hā
2Kings11:10 Chè-si chiū chiong khǹg tī Siōng Chú tiān-lāi Tāi-pi̍t -ông ê chhiuⁿ kap tún-pâi kau hō͘ hiah-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ.
2Kings11:11 Hō͘-ōe-peng chhiú gia̍h bú-khì
2Kings11:12 Chè-si chhōa Iok-a-si chhut--lâi
2Kings11:13 A-tha-lī-ngá thiaⁿ-tio̍h hō͘-ōe-peng kap jîn-bîn ê siaⁿ
2Kings11:14 khòaⁿ-tio̍h ông chiàu kui-lē khiā tī sèng-tiān ji̍p-kháu ê thiāu-piⁿ
2Kings11:15 In-ūi chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi m̄-ài ū lâng tī Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān hō͘ lâng thâi-sí
2Kings11:16 In siám-khui siang-pêng hō͘ A-tha-lī-ngá kè--khì; i kàu chìn-ji̍p ông-kiong ê Bé-mn̂g
2Kings11:17 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi hō͘ ông í-ki̍p jîn-bîn kap Siōng Chú li̍p-iok
2Kings11:18 Tùi án-ni
2Kings11:19 I kap koaⁿ-tiúⁿ
2Kings11:20 Choân-kok jîn-bîn lóng hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k
2Kings11:21 Iok-a-si chē-ūi ê sî chiah chhit hè.
2Kings12:1 Iâ-hō͘ tē-chhit nî
2Kings12:2 Iok-a-si in-ūi chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kàu-tō
2Kings12:3 M̄-kú soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē hòe-tû
2Kings12:4 Iok-a-si tùi chèng chè-si kóng
2Kings12:5 á-sī ta̍k-ê chè-si tùi i só͘ bat ê lâng siu-chi̍p ê hōng-hiàn
2Kings12:6 M̄-kú kàu Iok-a-si -ông tē-jī-cha̍p-saⁿ nî
2Kings12:7 Só͘-í Iok-a-si -ông tiàu-chi̍p chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi kap kî-tha ê chè-si
2Kings12:8 Chèng chè-si tah-èng bô beh koh tùi jîn-bîn siu chîⁿ
2Kings12:9 Chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi the̍h chi̍t ê kūi
2Kings12:10 Chè-si khòaⁿ-tio̍h kūi-lāi ê chîⁿ ū-kàu chōe ê sî
2Kings12:11 In chiū chiong tiám-sǹg--kè ê chîⁿ kau hō͘ kàm-tok chéng-siu Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê lâng. Kàm-tok ê lâng chiong chîⁿ hoat hō͘ siu-lí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê choh-ba̍k sai-hū kap kiàn-tio̍k kang-lâng
2Kings12:12 thô͘-chúi sai-hū kap phah-chio̍h sai-hū; koh bóe chhâ-liāu kap phah-hó ê chio̍h
2Kings12:13 M̄-kú hōng-hiàn tī Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê chîⁿ bô ēng lâi chòe Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê gûn-poe
2Kings12:14 In chiong chîⁿ lóng kau hō͘ choh-kang ê lâng siu-lí Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān.
2Kings12:15 In m̄-bián kap hoat kang-chîⁿ ê lâng tùi-siàu
2Kings12:16 M̄-kú pê-chōe-chè kap sio̍k-chōe-chè ê chîⁿ
2Kings12:17 Hit-sî
2Kings12:18 Iû-tāi -ông Iok-a-si chiong i ê chó͘-sian Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat
2Kings12:19 Iok-a-si kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings12:20 Iok-a-si ê jîn-sîn khí-lâi pōe-poān
2Kings12:21 Hiah-ê thâi-sí Iok-a-si ê jîn-sîn sī Sī-bí-ap ê kiáⁿ Iok-sat-kah
2Kings13:1 Iû-tāi -ông A-hap-siā ê kiáⁿ Iok-a-si choh-ông tē-jī-cha̍p-saⁿ nî
2Kings13:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings13:3 Siōng Chú chiū tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat siū-khì
2Kings13:4 Iok-hap-su khún-kiû Siōng Chú
2Kings13:5 Siōng Chú siúⁿ-sù Í-sek-lia̍t chi̍t ê chín-kiù-chiá
2Kings13:6 M̄-kú in bô lī-khui Iâ-lô-pho-an ê ke só͘ kiâⁿ ê lō͘
2Kings13:7 Sū-lī-a -ông phah-pāi Í-sek-lia̍t
2Kings13:8 Iok-hap-su kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings13:9 Iok-hap-su tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Kings13:10 Iû-tāi -ông Iok-a-si saⁿ-cha̍p-chhit nî
2Kings13:11 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings13:12 Iok-hôa-si kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings13:13 Iok-hôa-si tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings13:14 Í-lī-sa hoān-tio̍h tì-miā ê pīⁿ. Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si lo̍h-lâi khòaⁿ i
2Kings13:15 Í-lī-sa tùi i kóng
2Kings13:16 Í-lī-sa koh kā Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kóng
2Kings13:17 “Lí phah-khui tang-pêng ê thang-á.” I chiū phah-khui. Í-lī-sa kóng
2Kings13:18 Í-lī-sa koh kóng
2Kings13:19 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng tùi i siū-khì kóng
2Kings13:20 Í-lī-sa sí
2Kings13:21 Ū chi̍t piàn
2Kings13:22 Iok-hôa-si ê lāu-pē Iok-hap-su chāi-ūi ê sî
2Kings13:23 M̄-kú Siōng Chú in-ūi I kap A-pek-la-hán
2Kings13:24 Sū-lī-a -ông Hap-sih sí
2Kings13:25 Í-chêng Hap-sih kap Iok-hap-su kau-chiàn
2Kings14:1 Iok-hap-su ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si tē-jī nî
2Kings14:2 I chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Kings14:3 A-má-siā chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Kings14:4 bô thiah-húi soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ; jîn-bîn kè-sio̍k tī hia hiàn-chè sio-hiuⁿ.
2Kings14:5 A-má-siā ê ông-koân chi̍t-ē kian-kò͘
2Kings14:6 M̄-kú i bô thâi-sí hiah-ê jîn-sîn ê kiáⁿ-jî
2Kings14:7 A-má-siā tī Iâm ê Soaⁿ-kok thâi-sí Í-tong -lâng chi̍t-bān
2Kings14:8 Hit-sî
2Kings14:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si phài sù-chiá khì kā Iû-tāi -ông A-má-siā kóng
2Kings14:10 Lí í-keng thâi-iâⁿ Í-tong
2Kings14:11 M̄-kú A-má-siā thiaⁿ bōe lo̍h--khì. Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si chiū chiūⁿ--lâi
2Kings14:12 Iû-tāi hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t phah-pāi
2Kings14:13 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si tī hia lia̍h-tio̍h Iû-tāi -ông A-má-siā
2Kings14:14 Iok-hôa-si chiong Siōng Chú sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong ê hú-khò͘ só͘-ū ê kim-gûn kap khì-khū lóng the̍h--khì
2Kings14:15 Iok-hôa-si kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings14:16 Iok-hôa-si tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings14:17 Iok-hap-su ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si sí-liáu
2Kings14:18 A-má-siā kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings14:19 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ū lâng kè-bô͘ beh hāi A-má-siā
2Kings14:20 Lâng ēng bé chiong i ê si-thé chài tò-lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Kings14:21 Iû-tāi ê jîn-bîn siat-li̍p O͘-se-a sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē A-má-siā choh-ông
2Kings14:22 A-má-siā -ông tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Kings14:23 Iok-a-si ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi -ông A-má-siā tē-cha̍p-gō͘ nî
2Kings14:24 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings14:25 I siu-hôe Í-sek-lia̍t pian-kài ê tōe
2Kings14:26 Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
2Kings14:27 Siōng Chú koat-ì bô beh tùi thiⁿ-ē chhat-siau Í-sek-lia̍t ê miâ
2Kings14:28 Iâ-lô-pho-an Jī-sè kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings14:29 Iâ-lô-pho-an Jī-sè tńg-khì i ê chó͘-sian Í-sek-lia̍t hiah-ê ông hia
2Kings15:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iâ-lô-pho-an Jī-sè tē-jī-cha̍p-chhit nî
2Kings15:2 I chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-la̍k hè
2Kings15:3 O͘-se-a chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Kings15:4 M̄-kú soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē hòe-tû
2Kings15:5 Siōng Chú kàng chai-hō
2Kings15:6 O͘-se-a kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe lóng kì tī Iû-tāi Lia̍t-ông-sú.
2Kings15:7 O͘-se-a tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings15:8 Iû-tāi -ông O͘-se-a tē-saⁿ-cha̍p-poeh nî
2Kings15:9 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings15:10 Ngá-pí ê kiáⁿ Sa-liông pōe-poān Sat-ka-lī-a
2Kings15:11 Sat-ka-lī-a kî-tha ê sū-chek lóng kì-chài tī Í-sek-lia̍t Lia̍t-ông-sú.
2Kings15:12 Siōng Chú bat tùi Iâ-hō͘ kóng
2Kings15:13 Iû-tāi -ông O͘-se-a tē-saⁿ-cha̍p-káu nî
2Kings15:14 Ka-tí ê kiáⁿ Bí-ná-hiān tùi Tek-sat chiūⁿ-khì Sat-má-lī-a
2Kings15:15 Sa-liông kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Kings15:16 Hit-sî
2Kings15:17 Iû-tāi -ông O͘-se-a tē-saⁿ-cha̍p-káu nî
2Kings15:18 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings15:19 A-su̍t -ông Thê-kek-la Pí-lia̍t-sek lâi chhim-hoān Í-sek-lia̍t. Bí-ná-hiān sàng gûn saⁿ-bān sì-chheng kong-kun hō͘ A-su̍t -ông
2Kings15:20 Bí-ná-hiān kiông-pek Í-sek-lia̍t ê hó-gia̍h-lâng hū-tam chiah-ê gûn
2Kings15:21 Bí-ná-hiān kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings15:22 Bí-ná-hiān tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings15:23 Iû-tāi -ông O͘-se-a tē-gō͘-cha̍p nî
2Kings15:24 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings15:25 I ê sī-ōe-koaⁿ
2Kings15:26 Pí-ka-hat kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings15:27 Iû-tāi -ông O͘-se-a tē-gō͘-cha̍p-jī nî
2Kings15:28 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings15:29 Pí-ka chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông ê sî
2Kings15:30 O͘-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-thán tē-jī-cha̍p nî
2Kings15:31 Pí-ka kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings15:32 Lī-má-lī ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Pí-ka tē-jī nî
2Kings15:33 I chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Kings15:34 Iok-thán chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Kings15:35 M̄-kú soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē hòe-tû
2Kings15:36 Iok-thán kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings15:37 Hit-sî
2Kings15:38 Iok-thán tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings16:1 Lī-má-lī ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Pí-ka tē-cha̍p-chhit nî
2Kings16:2 A-hap-su chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p hè
2Kings16:3 tian-tò khì kiâⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t hiah-ê ông ê lō͘
2Kings16:4 koh tī soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Kings16:5 Hit-sî
2Kings16:6 Tng-sî Sū-lī-a -ông Lī-sìn siu-hôe Í-la-tha kui-sio̍k Sū-lī-a
2Kings16:7 A-hap-su phài sù-chiá khì kìⁿ A-su̍t -ông Thê-kek-la Pí-lia̍t-sek
2Kings16:8 A-hap-su chiong Siōng Chú tiān-lāi kap ông-kiong hú-khò͘ só͘-ū ê kim gûn
2Kings16:9 A-su̍t -ông tah-èng
2Kings16:10 A-hap-su -ông khì Tāi-má-sū-kek beh gêng-chiap A-su̍t -ông Thê-kek-la Pí-lia̍t-sek; i tī Tāi-má-sū-kek khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chō tôaⁿ. A-hap-su -ông chiong hit-ê tôaⁿ ê khoán-sit
2Kings16:11 Chè-si O͘-lī-a chiū tī A-hap-su -ông iáu-bē tùi Tāi-má-sū-kek tńg-lâi í-chêng
2Kings16:12 Ông tùi Tāi-má-sū-kek tò--lâi
2Kings16:13 I hiàn sio-hòa-chè
2Kings16:14 I koh chiong Siōng Chú bīn-chêng ê tâng-tôaⁿ
2Kings16:15 A-hap-su -ông bēng-lēng chè-si O͘-lī-a kóng
2Kings16:16 Chè-si O͘-lī-a chiū chiàu A-hap-su -ông ê bēng-lēng khì chòe.
2Kings16:17 A-hap-su -ông thiah hiah-ê phûn-chō ê tó͘-pang
2Kings16:18 I koh in-ūi A-su̍t -ông ê iân-kò͘
2Kings16:19 A-hap-su kî-tha ê só͘-chòe lóng kì-chài tī Iû-tāi Lia̍t-ông-sú.
2Kings16:20 A-hap-su tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings17:1 Iû-tāi -ông A-hap-su tē-cha̍p-jī nî
2Kings17:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings17:3 A-su̍t -ông Sat-bān-í-sek chiūⁿ-lâi kong-kek. Hô-sè-a tâu-hâng
2Kings17:4 Āu-lâi
2Kings17:5 A-su̍t -ông chiūⁿ-lâi kong-táⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t
2Kings17:6 Hô-sè-a tē-káu nî
2Kings17:7 Che sī in-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tek-chōe Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè; I ū chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p -tōe
2Kings17:8 khì tè hō͘ Siōng Chú tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bīn-chêng kóaⁿ-chhut ê lia̍t-kok kap Í-sek-lia̍t lia̍t-ông só͘ siat ê hong-sio̍k kui-lē.
2Kings17:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng àm-tiong chòe m̄-tio̍h ê sū
2Kings17:10 In tī ta̍k-ê koân ê soaⁿ-lûn-á
2Kings17:11 koh tī ta̍k-ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ sio-hiuⁿ
2Kings17:12 koh pài Siōng Chú kìm-chí in pài ê ngó͘-siōng.
2Kings17:13 Siōng Chú bat chhe-khián chèng sian-ti kap sian-kiàn kéng-kài Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi
2Kings17:14 M̄-kú in m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn
2Kings17:15 In khì-sak Siōng Chú ê kui-lē
2Kings17:16 In khì-sak Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè só͘-ū ê kài-bēng
2Kings17:17 In sio in ê kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hiàn-chòe chè
2Kings17:18 Só͘-í Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoat tōa siū-khì
2Kings17:19 Iû-tāi mā bô chun-thàn Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng
2Kings17:20 Siōng Chú khì-sak Í-sek-lia̍t só͘-ū ê hō͘-tāi
2Kings17:21 Í-sek-lia̍t tùi Tāi-pi̍t -ke hun-lia̍t chhut--khì
2Kings17:22 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kè-sio̍k hoān Iâ-lô-pho-an lóng-chóng ê chōe.
2Kings17:23 Chòe-āu
2Kings17:24 A-su̍t -ông tùi Pa-pí-lûn
2Kings17:25 In tú-á tòa tī hia ê sî
2Kings17:26 Ū lâng tùi A-su̍t -ông kóng
2Kings17:27 A-su̍t -ông chiū bēng-lēng kóng
2Kings17:28 Án-ni
2Kings17:29 M̄-kú ta̍k-cho̍k ê lâng tī in khiā-khí ê siâⁿ chō in ka-hiong ê sîn-bêng
2Kings17:30 Pa-pí-lûn -lâng chō So͘-kat Pí-la̍p ê siōng
2Kings17:31 A-óa -lâng chō Le̍k-hap kap Tha-ní-tha ê siōng
2Kings17:32 In pài Siōng Chú
2Kings17:33 In pài Siōng Chú
2Kings17:34 Kàu kin-á-ji̍t
2Kings17:35 Siōng Chú bat kap in li̍p-iok
2Kings17:36 Chí-ū hit-ūi chhun-chhut tōa koân-lêng ê chhiú chhōa lín chhut Ai-ki̍p ê Siōng Chú
2Kings17:37 Góa siá hō͘ lín ê kui-lē
2Kings17:38 Góa kap lín li̍p ê iok
2Kings17:39 Chí-ū tio̍h kèng-ùi Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
2Kings17:40 M̄-kú in m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn
2Kings17:41 Án-ni
2Kings18:1 Tng Í-la ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Hô-sè-a tē-saⁿ nî
2Kings18:2 I chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Kings18:3 Hi-se-ka chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Kings18:4 I hòe-tû soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Kings18:5 Hi-se-ka óa-khò Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè; tī i í-chêng kap í-āu ê Iû-tāi lia̍t-ông
2Kings18:6 Hi-se-ka tùi Siōng Chú tiong-sêng
2Kings18:7 Siōng Chú kap i tông-chāi
2Kings18:8 I phah-pāi Hui-lī-sū -lâng
2Kings18:9 Hi-se-ka -ông tē-sì nî
2Kings18:10 Kàu tē-saⁿ nî nî-bé
2Kings18:11 A-su̍t -ông chiong Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lia̍h-khì A-su̍t
2Kings18:12 In-ūi in m̄ thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè ê ōe
2Kings18:13 Hi-se-ka -ông tē-cha̍p-sì nî
2Kings18:14 Iû-tāi -ông Hi-se-ka phài lâng khì La-kiat kìⁿ A-su̍t -ông
2Kings18:15 Hi-se-ka chiū chiong Siōng Chú sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong ê hú-khò͘ só͘-ū ê gûn lóng hō͘ i.
2Kings18:16 Hi-se-ka koh chiong Siōng Chú sèng-tiān mn̂g-téng ê kim kap i ka-kī pau tī thiāu-téng ê kim pak--lo̍h-lâi
2Kings18:17 A-su̍t -ông tùi La-kiat phài goân-sòe
2Kings18:18 In tōa-siaⁿ kiò ông
2Kings18:19 Chóng-su-lēng tùi in kóng
2Kings18:20 Lí siūⁿ-kóng ū chhek-lio̍k kap kun-le̍k
2Kings18:21 Lí só͘ óa-khò ê Ai-ki̍p sī chi̍t ki tn̄g--khì ê lô͘-tek-á-koáiⁿ; lâng nā khò i
2Kings18:22 Lín nā tùi góa kóng: Goán óa-khò Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè; Hi-se-ka kiám m̄-sī ū hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kap chè-tôaⁿ
2Kings18:23 Taⁿ lâi
2Kings18:24 Nā bô hoat-tō͘
2Kings18:25 Hiān-chāi
2Kings18:26 Hi-le̍k-ka ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-kèng
2Kings18:27 Chóng-su-lēng tùi in kóng
2Kings18:28 Chóng-su-lēng koh khiā khí-lâi tōa-siaⁿ ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe hoah kóng
2Kings18:29 Ông án-ni kóng
2Kings18:30 I kiò lín sìn-khò Siōng Chú
2Kings18:31 M̄-thang thiaⁿ Hi-se-ka ê ōe. A-su̍t -ông án-ni kóng
2Kings18:32 thèng-hāu góa chhōa lín kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi
2Kings18:33 Bān-kok ê chèng sîn-bêng
2Kings18:34 Hap-má kap A-ní-poa̍t ê sîn-bêng tī tó-ūi? Se-hoat-óa-im
2Kings18:35 Chiah-ê kok-ka ê sîn-bêng ū tó chi̍t ê bat tùi góa ê chhiú kiù-chhut i ka-kī ê kok-ka? Án-ni
2Kings18:36 M̄-kú jîn-bîn lóng chēng-chēng
2Kings18:37 Hit-sî
2Kings19:1 Hi-se-ka -ông chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h in ê pò-kò
2Kings19:2 I phài kiong-têng chóng-koán Í-lī-a-kèng
2Kings19:3 In kā Í-sài-a kóng
2Kings19:4 A-su̍t -ông ū phài i ê pō͘-hā chóng-su-lēng lâi siat-to̍k éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè
2Kings19:5 Hi-se-ka -ông ê tāi-sîn lâi kìⁿ Í-sài-a ê sî
2Kings19:6 Í-sài-a tùi in kóng
2Kings19:7 Khòaⁿ leh
2Kings19:8 Chóng-su-lēng thiaⁿ-tio̍h A-su̍t -ông í-keng lī-khui La-kiat khì kong-kek Li̍p-ná
2Kings19:9 A-su̍t -ông thiaⁿ-kìⁿ I-soh-phit-a -ông Te̍k-hap-ka beh lâi kong-kek in
2Kings19:10 tùi Iû-tāi -ông Hi-se-ka kóng
2Kings19:11 Lín it-tēng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h A-su̍t chu-ông tùi lia̍t-kok só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì; in kā lia̍t-kok lóng châu-bia̍t. Lín kiám ū hoat-tō͘ pī-bián?
2Kings19:12 Góa ê chó͘-sian húi-bia̍t ê kok-ka
2Kings19:13 Hap-má ê ông
2Kings19:14 Hi-se-ka tùi sù-chiá ê chhiú chiap-tio̍h phoe
2Kings19:15 Hi-se-ka ǹg Siōng Chú kî-tó kóng
2Kings19:16 Siōng Chú ah
2Kings19:17 Siōng Chú ah
2Kings19:18 kā in ê sîn-bêng lóng hiat hō͘ hé sio-bia̍t
2Kings19:19 Taⁿ
2Kings19:20 A-mô͘-su ê kiáⁿ Í-sài-a chhe lâng khì kìⁿ Hi-se-ka
2Kings19:21 Koan-hē Se-ná-ki-li̍p
2Kings19:22 Lí teh bú-jio̍k siáⁿ-lâng
2Kings19:23 Lí ū thong-kè lí ê sù-chiá bú-bān Chú. Lí kóng: Góa sái chin chōe chiàn-chhia peh-chiūⁿ koân-soaⁿ
2Kings19:24 Góa tī gōa-pang ó͘ chíⁿ
2Kings19:25 “‘Lín kiám m̄-bat thiaⁿ--kìⁿ? Chin chá góa chòe chit-ê kè-ōe
2Kings19:26 Hia ê chū-bîn lóng bô-la̍t; in kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
2Kings19:27 “‘Lí tòa tó-ūi
2Kings19:28 In-ūi lí ū tùi góa hoat siū-khì
2Kings19:29 “ Hi-se-ka
2Kings19:30 Iû-tāi -ke tô-thoat só͘ chhun ê chú-bîn ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ si̍t-bu̍t
2Kings19:31 Tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh ū chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê chú-bîn chhut--lâi
2Kings19:32 “Só͘-í
2Kings19:33 I tùi tó chi̍t tiâu lō͘ lâi
2Kings19:34 Góa ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘
2Kings19:35 Hit-mî
2Kings19:36 A-su̍t -ông Se-ná-ki-li̍p chiū thiat-iâⁿ
2Kings19:37 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
2Kings20:1 Hit-ê sî-chūn
2Kings20:2 Hi-se-ka chiū oa̍t-tńg-sin ǹg piah
2Kings20:3 “Siōng Chú ah
2Kings20:4 Í-sài-a chhut--khì
2Kings20:5 “Lí oa̍t tò-tńg
2Kings20:6 Góa beh hō͘ lí ê hè-siū ke-thiⁿ cha̍p-gō͘ nî. Góa beh kái-kiù lí kap chit-ê siâⁿ thoat-lī A-su̍t -ông ê chhiú; góa ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê iân-kò͘
2Kings20:7 Í-sài-a kóng
2Kings20:8 Hi-se-ka mn̄g Í-sài-a kóng
2Kings20:9 Í-sài-a kóng
2Kings20:10 Hi-se-ka ìn kóng
2Kings20:11 Sian-ti Í-sài-a kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
2Kings20:12 Hit-sî
2Kings20:13 Hi-se-ka sūn sù-chiá ê iau-kiû
2Kings20:14 Jiân-āu sian-ti Í-sài-a lâi kìⁿ Hi-se-ka -ông
2Kings20:15 Í-sài-a kóng
2Kings20:16 Í-sài-a kā Hi-se-ka kóng
2Kings20:17 Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu
2Kings20:18 Koh lí chhin-siⁿ ê kiáⁿ-sun
2Kings20:19 Hi-se-ka sim-lāi siūⁿ-kóng “Góa chāi-siⁿ ê sî ū thài-pêng an-choân chiū hó”
2Kings20:20 Hi-se-ka kî-tha ê sū-chek kap sêng-chiū
2Kings20:21 Hi-se-ka tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings21:1 Má-ná-se chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-jī hè
2Kings21:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings21:3 I tiông-kiàn i ê lāu-pē Hi-se-ka só͘ húi-hoāi ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ; chiàu Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap ê só͘-chòe
2Kings21:4 I tī Siōng Chú ê tiān-lāi ūi-tio̍h hiah-ê sîn-bêng khí kúi-nā ê tôaⁿ; Siōng Chú bat kí chit-ê sèng-tiān
2Kings21:5 Má-ná-se tī Siōng Chú ê tiān nn̄g ê tiâⁿ lāi-bīn
2Kings21:6 I sio i ê kiáⁿ hiàn-chòe chè
2Kings21:7 Má-ná-se koh tī tiān-lāi chhāi i tiau-khek ê A-sià-la ê siōng. Koan-hē chit-keng sèng-tiān
2Kings21:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng nā thiaⁿ-thàn góa só͘-ū ê bēng-lēng
2Kings21:9 M̄-kú in bô thiaⁿ-thàn; Má-ná-se chhōa in chòe pháiⁿ
2Kings21:10 Siōng Chú thok I ê po̍k-jîn chèng sian-ti kóng
2Kings21:11 “In-ūi Iû-tāi -ông Má-ná-se chòe chiah-ê khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
2Kings21:12 só͘-í Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè án-ni kóng
2Kings21:13 Góa beh ēng niû Sat-má-lī-a ê chîn-sòaⁿ kap A-hap -ke ê tūi-chîn
2Kings21:14 Góa beh khì-sak góa só͘ chhun ê chú-bîn
2Kings21:15 In-ūi in tùi in ê lia̍t-chó͘ chhut Ai-ki̍p hit-ji̍t kàu kin-á-ji̍t
2Kings21:16 Má-ná-se hō͘ Iû-tāi -lâng hoān-chōe
2Kings21:17 Má-ná-se kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings21:18 Má-ná-se tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Kings21:19 A-bûn chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-jī hè
2Kings21:20 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings21:21 I kiâⁿ i ê lāu-pē só͘ kiâⁿ ê lō͘
2Kings21:22 khì-sak Siōng Chú — i ê chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè
2Kings21:23 A-bûn ê jîn-sîn pōe-poān i
2Kings21:24 M̄-kú kok-lāi ê jîn-bîn chiong hiah-ê pōe-poān A-bûn -ông ê lâng thâi-sí
2Kings21:25 A-bûn kî-tha ê sū-chek lóng kì-chài tī Iû-tāi Lia̍t-ông-sú.
2Kings21:26 Lâng kā i an-chòng tī O͘-sat ê hn̂g lāi-bīn i ka-kī ê bōng. I ê kiáⁿ Iok-se-a sòa-chiap i choh-ông.
2Kings22:1 Iok-se-a chē-ūi ê sî poeh hè
2Kings22:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Kings22:3 Iok-se-a -ông tē-cha̍p-poeh nî
2Kings22:4 “Lí khì kìⁿ tōa-chè-si Hi-le̍k-ka
2Kings22:5 kau hō͘ koán-lí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê lâng
2Kings22:6 
2Kings22:7 M̄-kú m̄-bián kap hoat kang-chîⁿ ê lâng tùi-siàu
2Kings22:8 Tōa-chè-si Hi-le̍k-ka tùi su-kì Sa-hoan kóng
2Kings22:9 Su-kì Sa-hoan khì kìⁿ ông
2Kings22:10 Su-kì Sa-hoan koh tùi ông kóng
2Kings22:11 Ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat-su ê ōe
2Kings22:12 Ông hoan-hù tōa-chè-si Hi-le̍k-ka
2Kings22:13 “Lín khì
2Kings22:14 Tùi án-ni
2Kings22:15 I tùi in kóng
2Kings22:16 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa beh chiàu Iû-tāi -ông só͘ tha̍k hit-kńg chheh ê ōe
2Kings22:17 In-ūi in khì-sak góa
2Kings22:18 M̄-kú chhe lín lâi chhéng-būn Siōng Chú ê Iû-tāi -ông
2Kings22:19 góa beh hō͘ chit-ê só͘-chāi pha-hng
2Kings22:20 Só͘-í góa beh hō͘ lí pêng-an lī-khui sè-kan
2Kings23:1 Iok-se-a -ông phài lâng tiàu-chi̍p Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chèng tiúⁿ-ló.
2Kings23:2 Ông chiūⁿ-khì Siōng Chú ê tiān; Iû-tāi chèng-lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn
2Kings23:3 Ông khiā tī thiāu-piⁿ
2Kings23:4 Ông bēng-lēng tōa-chè-si Hi-le̍k-ka
2Kings23:5 Í-chêng Iû-tāi lia̍t-ông só͘ siat-li̍p ê chè-si
2Kings23:6 I koh kā A-sià-la lú-sîn ê thiāu-siōng tùi Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān poaⁿ--chhut-khì
2Kings23:7 Koh thiah-húi Siōng Chú tiān-lāi lâm-chhiong ê chhù
2Kings23:8 Iok-se-a tùi Ka-pa kàu Pia̍t-sī-pa
2Kings23:9 M̄-kú soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ ê chè-si bô tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng Chú ê tôaⁿ ho̍k-sāi
2Kings23:10 Iok-se-a koh phò-hoāi tī Him-lūn-chú Soaⁿ-kok ê Tô-hui-te̍k -biō
2Kings23:11 I koh chiong Iû-tāi lia̍t-ông hiàn hō͘ ji̍t-thâu hiah-ê bé sóa-cháu
2Kings23:12 Iû-tāi lia̍t-ông tī A-hap-su ông-kiong chhù-téng só͘ khí ê chè-tôaⁿ
2Kings23:13 Í-chêng Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Só͘-lô-bûn tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê tang-pêng
2Kings23:14 I koh húi-hoāi chio̍h-thiāu
2Kings23:15 Iok-se-a húi-hoāi Pek-te̍k-lī ê chè-tôaⁿ
2Kings23:16 I oa̍t-thâu
2Kings23:17 Iok-se-a mn̄g
2Kings23:18 I kóng
2Kings23:19 Í-chêng Í-sek-lia̍t ê lia̍t-ông tī Sat-má-lī-a ta̍k-ê siâⁿ khí soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kek Siōng Chú siū-khì
2Kings23:20 koh tī tôaⁿ-téng thâi-sí só͘-ū soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ ê chè-si; tī tôaⁿ-téng sio lâng ê kut-thâu. Āu-lâi i tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
2Kings23:21 Ông bēng-lēng choân-kok jîn-bîn
2Kings23:22 Tùi sū-su tī-lí Í-sek-lia̍t
2Kings23:23 Chí-ū kàu Iok-se-a -ông tē-cha̍p-poeh nî chiah tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ǹg Siōng Chú siú chit-ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh.
2Kings23:24 Iû-tāi -tōe kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘-ū khan-bông--ê kap tâng-ki toh-thâu
2Kings23:25 Tī Iok-se-a í-chêng bô ông chhin-chhiūⁿ i choân-sim choân-ì choân-le̍k kui-ǹg Siōng Chú
2Kings23:26 M̄-kú
2Kings23:27 Siōng Chú kóng
2Kings23:28 Iok-se-a kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings23:29 Iok-se-a chāi-ūi ê sî
2Kings23:30 I ê jîn-sîn ēng chhia chài i ê si-thé
2Kings23:31 Iok-hap-su chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-saⁿ hè
2Kings23:32 Iok-hap-su chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings23:33 Hoat-ló Nî-ko chiong i koaiⁿ tī Hap-má -tōe ê Lī-pí-la
2Kings23:34 Ai-ki̍p -ông Nî-ko siat-li̍p Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-kèng sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē Iok-se-a choh-ông
2Kings23:35 Iok-ngá-kèng chiàu Ai-ki̍p -ông ê bēng-lēng
2Kings23:36 Iok-ngá-kèng chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Kings23:37 Iok-ngá-kèng chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings24:1 Iok-ngá-kèng chāi-ūi ê sî
2Kings24:2 Siōng Chú phài Pa-pí-lûn
2Kings24:3 Chit-ê sū lîm-kàu Iû-tāi
2Kings24:4 i thâi bû-ko͘ ê lâng
2Kings24:5 Iok-ngá-kèng kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Kings24:6 Iok-ngá-kèng tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Kings24:7 Ai-ki̍p -ông bô koh chhut-peng kong-kek gōa-kok
2Kings24:8 Iok-ngá-kun chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-poeh hè
2Kings24:9 Iok-ngá-kun chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings24:10 Hit-sî
2Kings24:11 Tng i ê jîn-sîn ûi-khùn siâⁿ ê sî
2Kings24:12 Iû-tāi -ông Iok-ngá-kun kap i ê lāu-bú
2Kings24:13 Pa-pí-lûn -ông koh chiong Siōng Chú tiān-lāi kap ông-kiong ê pó-mi̍h lóng tùi hia the̍h--khì
2Kings24:14 I chiong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê jîn-bîn
2Kings24:15 I chiong Iok-ngá-kun kap i ê lāu-bú
2Kings24:16 I koh chiong chhit-chheng ê ōe kau-chiàn ê ióng-sū
2Kings24:17 Pa-pí-lûn -ông siat-li̍p Iok-ngá-kun ê a-chek Má-tha-nî sòa-chiap choh-ông
2Kings24:18 Se-tí-ka chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-it hè
2Kings24:19 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Kings24:20 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kap Iû-tāi hoat-seng chiah-ê sū
2Kings25:1 Se-tí-ka thóng-tī tē-káu nî
2Kings25:2 Siâⁿ siū ûi-khùn
2Kings25:3 Sì-ge̍h chhoe-káu
2Kings25:4 siâⁿ siū kong-phòa; só͘-ū ê peng-sū thàu-mî tùi ông-kiong hoe-hn̂g hù-kūn
2Kings25:5 Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-peng tui-jip Se-tí-ka -ông
2Kings25:6 Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-peng lia̍h-tio̍h Se-tí-ka
2Kings25:7 In thâi-sí Se-tí-ka ê kiáⁿ
2Kings25:8 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tē-cha̍p-káu nî
2Kings25:9 ēng hé sio Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
2Kings25:10 Só͘-ū tè sī-ōe-tiúⁿ ê Pa-pí-lûn kun-peng
2Kings25:11 Hit-sî
2Kings25:12 M̄-kú sī-ōe-tiúⁿ ū lâu chi̍t-kóa siōng sòng-hiong--ê
2Kings25:13 Pa-pí-lûn -lâng chiong Siōng Chú tiān-lāi ê tâng-thiāu
2Kings25:14 In mā chiong tiáⁿ
2Kings25:15 khǹg hé-thòaⁿ ê phûn
2Kings25:16 Koh chiong Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ūi Siōng Chú ê tiān só͘ chō nn̄g ki thiāu
2Kings25:17 Chit nn̄g ki thiāu siâng-khoán
2Kings25:18 Sī-ōe-tiúⁿ Nî-pò͘-sat-la-tàn lia̍h tōa-chè-si Se-lâi-ngá
2Kings25:19 koh tùi siâⁿ-lāi lia̍h chi̍t ê koán-peng ê koaⁿ-oân
2Kings25:20 Sī-ōe-tiúⁿ chiong chiah-ê lâng tòa-khì tī Lī-pí-la ê Pa-pí-lûn -ông hia.
2Kings25:21 Pa-pí-lûn -ông tī Hap-má tōe-khu ê Lī-pí-la lóng kā in thâi-sí. Án-ni
2Kings25:22 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat siat-li̍p Sa-hoan ê sun
2Kings25:23 Chèng kun-koaⁿ kap sio̍k in ê peng-sū
2Kings25:24 Ki-tāi-lī tùi in kap sio̍k in ê peng-sū chiù-chōa
2Kings25:25 Hit-nî ê chhit--ge̍h
2Kings25:26 Tùi án-ni
2Kings25:27 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Í-bī Bí-lô-ta̍t tī i chē-ūi hit-nî
2Kings25:28 koh ēng hó-ōe an-ùi i
2Kings25:29 Iok-ngá-kun thǹg-khì kaⁿ-lāi só͘ chhēng ê saⁿ
2Kings25:30 Iok-ngá-kun oa̍h--teh ê sî

1Chronicles1:6 Ko-bia̍t ê hō͘-tāi ū A-si̍t-ki-ná
1Chronicles1:7 Ngá-oân ê hō͘-tāi ū Í-lī-sa
1Chronicles1:8 Hâm ê hō͘-tāi ū Kó͘-si̍t
1Chronicles1:9 Kó͘-si̍t ê hō͘-tāi ū Se-pa
1Chronicles1:10 Kó͘-si̍t koh siⁿ Lêng-lio̍k; i sī sè-kan tē-it ê ióng-sū.

1Chronicles1:30 Bí-si-má
1Chronicles1:31 I-tu̍t
1Chronicles1:32 A-pek-la-hán ê sòe-î Ki-thó͘-la só͘ siⁿ ê kiáⁿ ū Sim-lân
1Chronicles1:33 Bí-tiân ê kiáⁿ ū Í-hoat
1Chronicles1:34 A-pek-la-hán siⁿ Í-sat. Í-sat ê kiáⁿ ū Í-sò kap Í-sek-lia̍t.
1Chronicles1:35 Í-sò ê kiáⁿ ū Í-lī-hoat
1Chronicles1:36 Í-lī-hoat ê kiáⁿ ū Thê-bān
1Chronicles1:37 Liû-ní ê kiáⁿ ū Ná-hap
1Chronicles1:38 Se-ní ê kiáⁿ ū Lô-tan
1Chronicles1:39 Lô-tan ê kiáⁿ ū Hô-lī
1Chronicles1:40 Sok-pa ê kiáⁿ ū A-le̍k-bûn
1Chronicles1:41 A-ná ê kiáⁿ ū Tí-sūn. Tí-sūn ê kiáⁿ ū Him-tān
1Chronicles1:42 Í-chhat ê kiáⁿ ū Phek-hán
1Chronicles1:43 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng iáu-bē ū kun-ông thóng-tī ê sî

1Chronicles1:53 Ki-la̍p-su
1Chronicles1:54 Má-ki-tia̍p
1Chronicles2:1 Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ ū Lū-piān
1Chronicles2:2 Tān
1Chronicles2:3 Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ ū Ní
1Chronicles2:4 Iû-tāi ê sin-pū Tha-má kā i siⁿ Hoat-le̍k-su kap Siā-la. Chit gō͘ ê sī Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ.
1Chronicles2:5 Hoat-le̍k-su ê kiáⁿ ū Hi-su-lûn kap Hap-bō͘-le̍k.
1Chronicles2:6 Siā-la ū gō͘ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles2:7 Ka-bí ê kiáⁿ A-kan the̍h eng-kai tio̍h húi-bia̍t ê chiàn-lī-phín
1Chronicles2:8 Í-thàm ê kiáⁿ sī A-sat-lī-ngá.
1Chronicles2:9 Hi-su-lûn só͘ siⁿ ê kiáⁿ ū Iâ-la-bia̍t
1Chronicles2:10 Lân siⁿ A-bí-ná-ta̍t; A-bí-ná-ta̍t siⁿ Ná-sūn
1Chronicles2:11 Ná-sūn siⁿ Sat-bûn
1Chronicles2:12 Pho-a-su siⁿ Gô-pī-tek; Gô-pī-tek siⁿ Iâ-se;
1Chronicles2:13 Iâ-se siⁿ tōa-kiáⁿ Í-lī-ap
1Chronicles2:14 tē-sì kiáⁿ Ná-thán-gia̍p
1Chronicles2:15 tē-la̍k kiáⁿ O-sián
1Chronicles2:16 In ê chí-bē sī Sé-lō͘-ngá kap Ài-pí-kai. Sé-lō͘-ngá ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles2:17 Ài-pí-kai siⁿ A-má-sat; A-má-sat ê lāu-pē sī Í-si̍t-má-lī -lâng Ek-thiap.
1Chronicles2:18 Hi-su-lûn ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k chhōa A-so͘-pa
1Chronicles2:19 A-so͘-pa sí liáu-āu
1Chronicles2:20 Hō͘-ní siⁿ O͘-lī
1Chronicles2:21 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles2:22 Se-kat siⁿ Gâi-ní. Gâi-ní tī Ki-lia̍t -tōe ū jī-cha̍p-saⁿ ê siâⁿ.
1Chronicles2:23 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles2:24 Hi-su-lûn tī Ka-le̍k Í-hoat-tha sí liáu-āu
1Chronicles2:25 Hi-su-lûn ê tōa-kiáⁿ Iâ-la-bia̍t siⁿ tōa-kiáⁿ Lân
1Chronicles2:26 Iâ-la-bia̍t koh chhōa A-tha-la chòe bó͘
1Chronicles2:27 Iâ-la-bia̍t ê tōa-kiáⁿ Lân ê kiáⁿ ū Má-su
1Chronicles2:28 O-lâm ê kiáⁿ ū Sa-mái kap Ngá-tāi; Sa-mái ê kiáⁿ ū Ná-tap kap A-pí-su̍t.
1Chronicles2:29 A-pí-su̍t chhōa A-pí-hâi chòe bó͘
1Chronicles2:30 Ná-tap ê kiáⁿ ū Se-lia̍t kap A-piàn; Se-lia̍t bô kiáⁿ chiū sí.
1Chronicles2:31 A-piàn ê kiáⁿ sī Í-sī
1Chronicles2:32 Sa-mái ê sió-tī Ngá-tāi ê kiáⁿ ū Ek-thiap kap Iok-ná-tan; Ek-thiap bô kiáⁿ chiū sí.
1Chronicles2:33 Iok-ná-tan ê kiáⁿ ū Pí-le̍k kap Sat-sat. Chiah-ê lóng sī Iâ-la-bia̍t ê hō͘-tāi.
1Chronicles2:34 Sī-san bô hāu-siⁿ
1Chronicles2:35 Sī-san chiong i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ po̍k-jîn Iâ-hap chòe bó͘; in siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ kiò-chòe A-thài.
1Chronicles2:36 A-thài siⁿ Ná-tan
1Chronicles2:37 Sat-poa̍t siⁿ Í-hut-la
1Chronicles2:38 Gô-pī-tek siⁿ Iâ-hō͘
1Chronicles2:39 A-sat-lī-ngá siⁿ Hi-lī-su
1Chronicles2:40 Í-lī-a-sat siⁿ Se-su-mái
1Chronicles2:41 Sa-liông siⁿ Iâ-ka-bí-ngá
1Chronicles2:42 Iâ-la-bia̍t ê sió-tī Ka-le̍k ê tōa-kiáⁿ kiò-chòe Bí-sa
1Chronicles2:43 Hi-pek-lûn ê kiáⁿ ū Khó-la
1Chronicles2:44 Sī-má sī La-hâm ê lāu-pē
1Chronicles2:45 Sa-mái siⁿ Má-hûn; Má-hûn sī Pek Siok ê lāu-pē.
1Chronicles2:46 Ka-le̍k ê sòe-î Í-hoat siⁿ Hap-lân
1Chronicles2:47 Ngá-tāi ê kiáⁿ ū Lī-kiān
1Chronicles2:48 Ka-le̍k lēng-gōa chi̍t ê sòe-î Má-ka siⁿ Sī-pia̍t
1Chronicles2:49 Má-ka koh siⁿ Sa-a-hut kap Sī-hoat; Sa-a-hut sī Be̍k-má-ná -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá
1Chronicles2:50 Ē-bīn chiah-ê mā-sī Ka-le̍k ê hō͘-tāi: Hō͘-ní ê kiáⁿ ū Sok-pa
1Chronicles2:51 
1Chronicles2:52 Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá Sok-pa siⁿ Hap-lô-í; Hap-lô-í chiū-sī Bí-ló͘-hap tōe-khu chi̍t-pòaⁿ chū-bîn ê chó͘-sian
1Chronicles2:53 mā-sī tòa tī Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm hiah-ê chong-cho̍k — Í-thiap -lâng
1Chronicles2:54 Pek-lī-hêng -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá Sat-má sī Nî-tô-hoat -lâng kap A-tha-lio̍k Pek Iok-ap -lâng ê chó͘-sian
1Chronicles2:55 Te̍k-la -lâng
1Chronicles3:1 Tāi-pi̍t tī Hi-pek-lûn siⁿ ê kiáⁿ kì tī ē-bīn: tōa-kiáⁿ Àm-lūn
1Chronicles3:2 tē-saⁿ kiáⁿ Ap-sa-liông
1Chronicles3:3 tē-gō͘ kiáⁿ Sī-hoat-thê-ngá
1Chronicles3:4 Chit la̍k ê lóng sī Tāi-pi̍t tī Hi-pek-lûn siⁿ--ê; i tī hia choh-ông chhit nî la̍k ge̍h-ji̍t kú; tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông saⁿ-cha̍p-saⁿ nî.
1Chronicles3:5 Tāi-pi̍t tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ū siⁿ Sa-bō͘-a
1Chronicles3:6 koh ū Ek-hat
1Chronicles3:7 Ná-ka
1Chronicles3:8 Í-lī-sa-má
1Chronicles3:9 Chiah-ê lóng sī Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:10 Só͘-lô-bûn ê kiáⁿ sī Lô-pho-an
1Chronicles3:11 Iok-sa-hoat ê kiáⁿ sī Iok-lân
1Chronicles3:12 Iok-a-si ê kiáⁿ sī A-má-siā
1Chronicles3:13 Iok-thán ê kiáⁿ sī A-hap-su
1Chronicles3:14 Má-ná-se ê kiáⁿ sī A-bûn
1Chronicles3:15 Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:16 Iok-ngá-kèng ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:17 Ē-bīn sī siū-lia̍h khì Pa-pí-lûn ê Iok-ngá-kun ê hō͘-tāi. I ê kiáⁿ ū Sat-la-thiat
1Chronicles3:18 Má-ki-lân
1Chronicles3:19 Pí-tāi-ngá ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:20 lēng-gōa koh ū gō͘ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:21 Hap-ná-nî-ngá ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:22 Sī-ka-nî siⁿ Sī-má-ngá; Sī-má-ngá ū gō͘ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:23 Nî-lī-ngá ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles3:24 Í-lī-iok-nái ū chhit ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles4:1 Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ sī Hoat-le̍k-su
1Chronicles4:2 Sok-pa ê kiáⁿ Lī-a-ngá siⁿ Ngá-hap
1Chronicles4:3 Hō͘-ní sī Ka-le̍k kap Í-hoat-tha ê tōa-kiáⁿ; i ê hō͘-tāi sī Pek-lī-hêng -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá. Hō͘-ní ê hō͘-tāi ū Í-thán
1Chronicles4:4 
1Chronicles4:5 Thê-ko-a -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá A-si-hō͘ ū nn̄g ê bó͘
1Chronicles4:6 Ná-la kā i siⁿ sì ê kiáⁿ: A-hō͘-sat
1Chronicles4:7 Hi-la kā i siⁿ saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Sé-lia̍t
1Chronicles4:8 Ko-su siⁿ A-lo̍k
1Chronicles4:9 Ngá-pí-su pí i ê hiaⁿ-tī khah siū lâng kèng-tiōng; i ê lāu-bú kā i hō-miâ Ngá-pí-su
1Chronicles4:10 Ngá-pí-su kiû Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
1Chronicles4:11 Su-hap ê hiaⁿ-tī Ki-lio̍k siⁿ Bí-hek
1Chronicles4:12 I-si-tun siⁿ Pek La-pa
1Chronicles4:13 Ki-la̍p-su ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Gô-tô-liap kap Se-lâi-ngá; Gô-tô-liap mā ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Hap-thah kap Bín-ná-thài.
1Chronicles4:14 Bín-ná-thài siⁿ Gô-hut-la. Se-lâi-ngá siⁿ Hā-la̍p-him Soaⁿ-kok ê khai-thok-chiá Iok-ap; in lóng sī sai-hū.
1Chronicles4:15 Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Í-lō͘
1Chronicles4:16 Iâ-hap-lī-le̍k ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Se-hut
1Chronicles4:17 Í-su-la ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Ek-thiap
1Chronicles4:18 
1Chronicles4:19 Hô-tē-ngá chhōa Ná-hâm ê sió-bē
1Chronicles4:20 Sī-bûn ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Àm-lūn
1Chronicles4:21 Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ Sī-la ê hō͘-tāi ū Lī-ka -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá Ní
1Chronicles4:22 iáu ū Iok-kèng
1Chronicles4:23 Chiah-ê lâng lóng sī sio-hûi sai-hū
1Chronicles4:24 Se-biān ū gō͘ ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles4:25 Sò-lô siⁿ Sa-liông
1Chronicles4:26 Bí-si-má ê kiáⁿ sī Hap-bō͘-lī
1Chronicles4:27 Sī-múi ū cha̍p-la̍k ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles4:28 Se-biān ê hō͘-tāi tòa tī Pia̍t-sī-pa
1Chronicles4:29 Phek-la
1Chronicles4:30 Pí-thó͘-lī
1Chronicles4:31 Pek Má-ka-phok
1Chronicles4:32 In iáu ū Í-thán
1Chronicles4:33 kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
1Chronicles4:34 Ē-bīn só͘ kì-chài chiah-ê miâ lóng sī in chong-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ: Bí-só͘-pa
1Chronicles4:35 
1Chronicles4:36 
1Chronicles4:37 
1Chronicles4:38 
1Chronicles4:39 chiū khì Ki-to ê ji̍p-kháu
1Chronicles4:40 In chhē-tio̍h pûi koh súi ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles4:41 Téng-bīn só͘ kì hiah-ê lâng
1Chronicles4:42 Se-biān chi-cho̍k ū gō͘-pah lâng khì kàu Í-tong; in ê siú-léng sī Í-sī ê kiáⁿ Pí-la-thê
1Chronicles4:43 In thâi-sí tô-cháu bōe lī chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê A-má-le̍k -lâng
1Chronicles5:1 Ngá-kok ê tōa-kiáⁿ Lū-piān
1Chronicles5:2 Iû-tāi pí i ê hiaⁿ-tī khah kiông-sēng
1Chronicles5:3 Ngá-kok ê tōa-kiáⁿ Lū-piān ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Í-lo̍k
1Chronicles5:4 Iok-ní siⁿ Sī-má-ngá
1Chronicles5:5 Sī-múi siⁿ Bí-ka
1Chronicles5:6 Pa-le̍k siⁿ Pī-la; Pī-la chòe Lū-piān chi-cho̍k ê léng-siù
1Chronicles5:7 Pī-la ê hiaⁿ-tī
1Chronicles5:8 kap Pí-la; Pí-la sī A-sat ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles5:9 in tī Ki-lia̍t tōe-khu ê cheng-siⁿ chin chōe
1Chronicles5:10 Sò-lô ê sî
1Chronicles5:11 Ka-tek ê kiáⁿ-sun tòa tī Lū-piān ê tùi-bīn Pa-san tōe-khu it-ti̍t kàu Sat-ka;
1Chronicles5:12 Iok-ní chòe in ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
1Chronicles5:13 Ka-tek chi-cho̍k kî-tha ê lâng lóng sio̍k ē-bīn chhit ê chong-cho̍k: Bí-ka-le̍k
1Chronicles5:14 Í-siōng chiah-ê lóng sī Hō͘-lī ê kiáⁿ A-pí-hâi ê hō͘-tāi; A-pí-hâi ê chó͘-sian tùi a-kong sǹg chiūⁿ--khì sī Iâ-lô-a
1Chronicles5:15 Ko͘-nî ê sun
1Chronicles5:16 In tòa tī Ki-lia̍t
1Chronicles5:17 Chiah-ê lâng tī Iû-tāi -ông Iok-thán kap Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iâ-lô-pho-an Jī-sè ê sî
1Chronicles5:18 Lū-piān -lâng
1Chronicles5:19 In kap Hā-kah -lâng
1Chronicles5:20 In sìn-khò Siōng-tè
1Chronicles5:21 In chhiúⁿ Hā-kah -lâng ê cheng-siⁿ
1Chronicles5:22 In thâi-sí chin chōe te̍k-jîn
1Chronicles5:23 Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k ê lâng khiā-khí tī chit-ê tōe-khu
1Chronicles5:24 In ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ chiū-sī Í-hut
1Chronicles5:25 Lū-piān
1Chronicles5:26 Só͘-í Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè kek-tōng A-su̍t -ông Phó͘-le̍k
1Chronicles6:1 Lī-bī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Kek-sūn
1Chronicles6:2 Ko-hat ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Àm-lân
1Chronicles6:3 Àm-lân ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: A-lûn kap Mô͘-se
1Chronicles6:4 Í-lī-a-sat siⁿ Hui-nî-hap
1Chronicles6:5 A-pí-su siⁿ Pò͘-ki
1Chronicles6:6 O͘-se siⁿ Se-la-hi-ngá
1Chronicles6:7 Bí-la-iok siⁿ A-má-lī-ngá
1Chronicles6:8 A-hi-tu̍t siⁿ Sat-tok
1Chronicles6:9 A-hi-má-su siⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá
1Chronicles6:10 Iok-hap-lân siⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá
1Chronicles6:11 A-sat-lī-ngá siⁿ A-má-lī-ngá
1Chronicles6:12 A-hi-tu̍t siⁿ Sat-tok
1Chronicles6:13 Sa-liông siⁿ Hi-le̍k-ka
1Chronicles6:14 A-sat-lī-ngá siⁿ Se-lâi-ngá
1Chronicles6:15 Siōng Chú ēng Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat ê chhiú lia̍h Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê jîn-bîn ê sî
1Chronicles6:16 Lī-bī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Kek-sūn
1Chronicles6:17 Kek-sūn ê kiáⁿ kiò-chòe Li̍p-nî kap Sī-múi.
1Chronicles6:18 Ko-hat ê kiáⁿ sī Àm-lân
1Chronicles6:19 Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ sī Boat-lī kap Bō͘-sī. Chiah-ê sī Lī-bī -lâng kok chong-cho̍k ê ka-phó͘.
1Chronicles6:20 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi: Kek-sūn siⁿ Li̍p-nî
1Chronicles6:21 Sin-má siⁿ Iok-a
1Chronicles6:22 Ko-hat ê hō͘-tāi: Ko-hat siⁿ A-bí-ná-ta̍t
1Chronicles6:23 A-sioh siⁿ Í-lī-ka-ná
1Chronicles6:24 A-sioh siⁿ Tha-hap
1Chronicles6:25 Í-lī-ka-ná ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: A-má-sài kap A-hi-mô͘.
1Chronicles6:26 A-hi-mô͘ siⁿ Í-lī-ka-ná
1Chronicles6:27 Ná-hap siⁿ Í-lī-ap
1Chronicles6:28 Sat-bó-ní ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Tōa-kiáⁿ Iok-ní
1Chronicles6:29 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi: Bí-la-lī siⁿ Boat-lī
1Chronicles6:30 O͘-sat siⁿ Sī-bí-a
1Chronicles6:31 Iok-kūi an-tì hó-sè liáu-āu
1Chronicles6:32 In tī hōe-bō͘ ê thâu-chêng lûn-pan tam-jīm chhiùⁿ-koa ê sū-hōng
1Chronicles6:33 Hū-chek hiàn-si ê lâng kap in ê kiáⁿ-sun kì tī ē-bīn: Ko-hat ê kiáⁿ-sun tiong ū hiàn-si ê Hi-bān; Hi-bān sī Iok-ní ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:34 Sat-bó-ní sī Í-lī-ka-ná ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:35 Tô-a sī So͘-hut ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:36 A-má-sài sī Í-lī-ka-ná ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:37 Se-hoan-ngá sī Tha-hap ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:38 Khó-la sī Í-su-hap ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:39 Hi-bān ê chhin-chiâⁿ A-sat
1Chronicles6:40 Sī-bí-a sī Bí-ka-le̍k ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:41 Má-ki-ngá sī I-te̍k-nî ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:42 A-tāi-ngá sī Í-thàm ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:43 Sī-múi sī Ngá-hap ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:44 Tī tò-pêng sū-hōng--ê sī in ê hiaⁿ-tī Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ-sun
1Chronicles6:45 Má-lo̍k sī Hap-sa-pí-ngá ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:46 Hi-le̍k-ka sī Àm-se ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:47 Sa-be̍k sī Boat-lī ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles6:48 In ê hiaⁿ-tī Lī-bī -lâng mā siū-phài chòe Siōng-tè ê chhù — hōe-bō͘ só͘-ū ê chit-bū.
1Chronicles6:49 A-lûn kap i ê hō͘-tāi tī chè-tôaⁿ hiàn sio-hòa-chè
1Chronicles6:50 A-lûn ê kiáⁿ-sun kì tī ē-bīn: I ê kiáⁿ sī Í-lī-a-sat
1Chronicles6:51 A-pí-su ê kiáⁿ sī Pò͘-ki
1Chronicles6:52 Se-la-hi-ngá ê kiáⁿ sī Bí-la-iok
1Chronicles6:53 A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ sī Sat-tok
1Chronicles6:54 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi khiā-khí ê tōe-khu kì tī ē-bīn: Ko-hat chong-cho̍k thiu-chhiam pun-tio̍h tē-it hūn
1Chronicles6:55 chiū-sī Iû-tāi -tōe Hi-pek-lûn kap chiu-ûi ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:56 m̄-kú sio̍k Hi-pek-lûn ê chhân-hn̂g kap chng-siā lóng pun hō͘ Iâ-hu-nî ê kiáⁿ Ka-le̍k.
1Chronicles6:57 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi koh pun-tio̍h pī-lān-siâⁿ Hi-pek-lûn
1Chronicles6:58 Hi-lûn kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:59 A-san kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:60 koh tùi Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k ê tōe-khu pun-tio̍h Ka-pa kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:61 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k kî-tha ê ka-cho̍k thiu-chhiam pun-tio̍h Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k tōe-khu ê cha̍p ê siâⁿ.
1Chronicles6:62 Kek-sūn chong-cho̍k chiah-ê ka-cho̍k tùi Í-sat-ka
1Chronicles6:63 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k thiu-chhiam tùi Lū-piān
1Chronicles6:64 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiong chiah-ê siâⁿ kap chiu-ûi ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:65 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thiu-chhiam
1Chronicles6:66 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k tiong ū-ê ka-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k tōe-khu ê siâⁿ
1Chronicles6:67 chiū-sī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ê pī-lān-siâⁿ Sī-kiàm kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:68 Iok-bián kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:69 A-ngá-lûn kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:70 Ko-hat chong-cho̍k kî-tha ê ka-cho̍k tùi Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k tit-tio̍h A-nái kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:71 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi pun-tio̍h Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k tī Pa-san ê Ko-lân kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:72 tùi Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Ki-te-su kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:73 La-boa̍t kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:74 tùi A-siat chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Má-sa kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:75 Hō͘-kat kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:76 tùi Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Ka-lī-lī ê Ki-te-su kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:77 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi tùi Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Lîm-mô͘-ná kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:78 koh tī óa-kūn Iâ-lī-ko ê Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ
1Chronicles6:79 Ki-tí-bo̍k kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:80 koh tùi Ka-tek chi-cho̍k pun-tio̍h Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles6:81 Hi-si̍t-pún kap i ê chháu-po͘
1Chronicles7:1 Í-sat-ka ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Tô-la
1Chronicles7:2 Tô-la ū la̍k ê kiáⁿ: O͘-se
1Chronicles7:3 O͘-se ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ I-su-la-hi; I-su-la-hi kap i sì ê kiáⁿ Bí-ka-le̍k
1Chronicles7:4 In léng-tō ê lâng
1Chronicles7:5 In kâng Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k ê hiaⁿ-tī
1Chronicles7:6 Piān-ngá-bín ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Pí-la
1Chronicles7:7 Pí-la ū gō͘ ê kiáⁿ: Í-su-pún
1Chronicles7:8 Pí-kiat ū káu ê kiáⁿ: Sòe-bí-la
1Chronicles7:9 in lóng sī cho̍k-tiúⁿ; chiàu in ê chong-cho̍k sè-hē
1Chronicles7:10 Iâ-thia̍p ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ Phek-hán
1Chronicles7:11 In lóng sī Iâ-thia̍p ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles7:12 Iáu ū Í-ní ê kiáⁿ Su-pêng kap Hō͘-pêng
1Chronicles7:13 Ná-hut-tha-lī ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Ngá-sih
1Chronicles7:14 Má-ná-se ê sòe-î A-lân ê lú-chú kā i siⁿ A-su-lia̍t
1Chronicles7:15 Má-kiat kā Hō͘-pêng kap Su-pêng kok chhōa chi̍t ê bó͘; i ê sió-bē kiò-chòe Má-ka. Tē-jī ê kiáⁿ kiò-chòe Se-lô-hui-hap; Se-lô-hui-hap chí-ū siⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ.
1Chronicles7:16 Má-kiat ê bó͘ Má-ka siⁿ chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles7:17 O͘-lân ê kiáⁿ sī Pí-tān. Chiah-ê lóng sī Ki-lia̍t ê hō͘-tāi. Ki-lia̍t sī Má-kiat ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles7:18 Ki-lia̍t ê sió-bē Hap-mô͘-lī-kiat siⁿ saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: I-si-hô
1Chronicles7:19 Sī-bí-tāi ū sì ê kiáⁿ: A-hiān
1Chronicles7:20 Í-hoat-liân ê hō͘-tāi: Su-thê-la siⁿ Pa-lia̍t
1Chronicles7:21 Tha-hap siⁿ Sat-poa̍t
1Chronicles7:22 In lāu-pē Í-hoat-liân ūi-tio̍h in ai-siong chin chōe ji̍t
1Chronicles7:23 Í-hoat-liân kap i ê bó͘ tâng-pâng
1Chronicles7:24 I ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Sià-i-la khí-chō Téng Pek Hô-lûn
1Chronicles7:25 Í-hoat-liân koh siⁿ Lī-hoat
1Chronicles7:26 Tha-hán siⁿ La-tān
1Chronicles7:27 Í-lī-sa-má siⁿ Lūn
1Chronicles7:28 Í-hoat-liân -lâng ê só͘-iú-tōe kap khiā-khí ê tōe-khu sī Pek-te̍k-lī kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
1Chronicles7:29 Koh ū óa-kūn Má-ná-se -lâng pian-kài ê Pek Siān kap hù-kūn ê chng-siā
1Chronicles7:30 A-siat ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Im-ná
1Chronicles7:31 Pí-lī-a ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Hi-pek kap Má-kiat; Má-kiat sī Pí-sat-ui -siâⁿ ê khai-thok-chiá.
1Chronicles7:32 Hi-pek ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Ngá-hut-le̍k
1Chronicles7:33 Ngá-hut-le̍k ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Pa-sat
1Chronicles7:34 Sok-be̍k ū sì ê kiáⁿ: A-hi

1Chronicles8:38 A-sek ū la̍k ê kiáⁿ: A-su-lī-kan

1Chronicles9:1 Só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Chronicles9:2 Tāi-seng tńg-lâi ka-kī ê siâⁿ
1Chronicles9:3 Iû-tāi
1Chronicles9:4 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k ū la̍k-pah káu-cha̍p ê ka-cho̍k tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi ū O͘-thài; O͘-thài sī A-bí-hut ê kiáⁿ

1Chronicles9:7 Piān-ngá-bín ê hō͘-tāi ū Sat-lō͘; Sat-lō͘ sī Bí-su-lân ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles9:8 Koh ū I-pí-nî-ngá
1Chronicles9:9 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k ū káu-pah gō͘-cha̍p-la̍k ê lâng
1Chronicles9:10 Chè-si tiong ū Iâ-tāi-ngá
1Chronicles9:11 iáu ū Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê chóng-koán A-sat-lī-ngá; A-sat-lī-ngá sī Hi-le̍k-ka ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles9:12 Koh ū Iâ-lô-hán ê kiáⁿ A-tāi-ngá
1Chronicles9:13 Í-siōng chiah-ê lâng lóng chòe in ka-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
1Chronicles9:14 Lī-bī -lâng Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi ū Hap-sa-pí-ngá ê kan-á-sun
1Chronicles9:15 Koh ū Poa̍t-pa-kah
1Chronicles9:16 Koh ū Iâ-tō͘-tùn ê kan-á-sun
1Chronicles9:17 Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe ū: Sa-liông
1Chronicles9:18 In í-chêng kò͘-siú tang-pêng ông ê mn̂g; in khah-chá sī Lī-bī -cho̍k iâⁿ-tiong ê siú-ōe.
1Chronicles9:19 Khó-la ê kan-á-sun
1Chronicles9:20 Í-chêng Í-lī-a-sat ê kiáⁿ Hui-nî-hap bat chòe in ê chóng-koán
1Chronicles9:21 Bí-si-lī-bí-ngá ê kiáⁿ Sat-ka-lī-a mā-sī hōe-bō͘ ji̍p-kháu ê siú-ōe.
1Chronicles9:22 Siū kéng-soán chòe hōe-bō͘ ji̍p-kháu siú-ōe ê lâng ū nn̄g-pah cha̍p-jī ê. In tī ka-kī ê chng-siā
1Chronicles9:23 In kap in ê hō͘-tāi kè-sio̍k kò͘-siú Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê mn̂g
1Chronicles9:24 Tang sai lâm pak sì pêng ê ji̍p-kháu lóng ū siú-ōe.
1Chronicles9:25 In tiàm tī ta̍k chng-siā ê hiaⁿ-tī
1Chronicles9:26 Chit sì ê ji̍p-kháu ê siú-ōe-tiúⁿ sī Lī-bī -lâng
1Chronicles9:27 In tī Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê chiu-ûi kè-mî
1Chronicles9:28 Lī-bī -lâng tiong-kan ū lâng koán-lí kèng-pài ēng ê khì-khū
1Chronicles9:29 Koh ū lâng siū phài koán-lí sèng-só͘ kî-tha só͘-ū ê khì-khū
1Chronicles9:30 Chè-si ê hō͘-tāi koh ū lâng hū-chek tiâu-hô phang-liāu.
1Chronicles9:31 Lī-bī -lâng Má-tha-thê-ngá sī Khó-la -cho̍k Sa-liông ê tōa-kiáⁿ
1Chronicles9:32 In kâng-cho̍k ê hiaⁿ-tī Ko-hat ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles9:33 Hū-chek chhiùⁿ-koa ê lâng sī Lī-bī -lâng ka-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ

1Chronicles10:1 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Ki-lī-pho-soaⁿ kau-chiàn; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng sí chin chōe
1Chronicles10:2 Hui-lī-sū -lâng tui-jip Sò-lô kap i hiah-ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles10:3 Sò-lô siū-tio̍h béng-lia̍t ê kong-kek; i hō͘ siā-chìⁿ ê lâng hoat-kiàn
1Chronicles10:4 Sò-lô kā thòe i gia̍h kun-khì ê sī-ōe kóng
1Chronicles10:5 Hit-ê sī-ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sò-lô í-keng sí
1Chronicles10:6 Án-ni
1Chronicles10:7 Tī Iâ-su-lia̍t Soaⁿ-kok hit-pêng ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h in ê kun-tūi í-keng tô-cháu
1Chronicles10:8 Keh-ji̍t
1Chronicles10:9 chiū pak Sò-lô ê kun-ho̍k
1Chronicles10:10 In chiong Sò-lô ê chiàn-kah hē tī in sîn-bêng ê biō-lāi
1Chronicles10:11 Ki-lia̍t ê Ngá-pí -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-lī-sū -lâng tùi Sò-lô só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì
1Chronicles10:12 in ê ióng-sū lóng khí--lâi
1Chronicles10:13 Án-ni Sò-lô sí
