1Chronicles11:1 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng chū-chi̍p lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Chronicles11:2 Khah-chá Sò-lô chòe goán ê ông ê sî
1Chronicles11:3 Í-sek-lia̍t ê tiúⁿ-ló lóng lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t -ông
1Chronicles11:4 Tāi-pi̍t kap só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng khì kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tng-sî kiò-chòe Iâ-pò͘-su
1Chronicles11:5 Khiā-khí tī Iâ-pò͘-su ê lâng kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles11:6 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles11:7 Tāi-pi̍t tòa tī pó-lúi
1Chronicles11:8 I tùi Bí-lô khai-sí
1Chronicles11:9 Tāi-pi̍t jú lâi jú kiông-sēng
1Chronicles11:10 Ē-bīn chiah-ê sī Tāi-pi̍t ê ióng-sū ê léng-siù; in choân-le̍k ióng-hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t tit-tio̍h ông-koân
1Chronicles11:11 Hiah-ê léng-siù ê miâ-toaⁿ kì tī ē-bīn: Hap-kek-mô͘-nî ê kiáⁿ Ngá-sok-pan sī chèng kun-koaⁿ ê siú-léng
1Chronicles11:12 Tē-jī ê sī A-hô-a -lâng Tó-to ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat
1Chronicles11:13 I bat kap Tāi-pi̍t tī Pa-su Tāi-bín; Hui-lī-sū -lâng chū-chi̍p tī hia beh kau-chiàn. Hia ū chi̍t khu hn̂g
1Chronicles11:14 I khiā tī hn̂g-tiong hông-siú hit-khu hn̂g
1Chronicles11:15 Saⁿ-cha̍p ê siú-léng tiong ū saⁿ ê lo̍h-khì A-tō͘-lân-tōng hù-kūn ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ hia kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t. Hui-lī-sū ê kun-tūi tī Lī-hoa̍t-im Soaⁿ-kok chat-iâⁿ.
1Chronicles11:16 Hit-sî
1Chronicles11:17 Tāi-pi̍t ēng chin khat-bō͘ ê kháu-khì kóng
1Chronicles11:18 Chit saⁿ ê lâng chiū chhiong-kè Hui-lī-sū -lâng ê iâⁿ-tōe
1Chronicles11:19 kóng
1Chronicles11:20 Iok-ap ê sió-tī A-pí-su sī lēng-gōa saⁿ ê ióng-sū ê siú-léng; i bat gia̍h chhiuⁿ thâi-sí saⁿ-pah ê lâng
1Chronicles11:21 I pí kî-tha nn̄g ê khah ū bêng-bōng
1Chronicles11:22 Koh ū Kah-sih -lâng Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá; i sī ióng-sū
1Chronicles11:23 koh thâi-sí chi̍t ê nn̄g-pah gōa kong-hun koân-tōa ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng. Hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng chhiú gia̍h chhiuⁿ
1Chronicles11:24 Che sī Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá só͘ chòe ê sū
1Chronicles11:25 I pí saⁿ-cha̍p ê ióng-sū khah ū bêng-bōng
1Chronicles11:26 Kun-tiong ê ióng-sū ū: Iok-ap ê sió-tī A-sat-hek Pek-lī-hêng -lâng Tó-to ê kiáⁿ I-le̍k-hap-lân
1Chronicles11:27 Hap-lu̍t -lâng Sa-má Pí-lûn -lâng Hi-lī-su
1Chronicles11:28 Thê-ko-a -lâng Ek-kiat ê kiáⁿ Í-la A-ná-tu̍t -lâng A-pí-í-siā
1Chronicles11:29 Hō͘-sa -lâng Se-pí-kai A-hô-a -lâng Í-lâi
1Chronicles11:30 Nî-tô-hoat -lâng Má-hap-lâi kap Pa-ná ê kiáⁿ Hi-li̍p
1Chronicles11:31 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k Ki-pí-a -lâng Lī-pài ê kiáⁿ Í-thài Pí-la-tùn -lâng Pí-ná-ngá
1Chronicles11:32 Ka-si̍t-khoe -lâng Hō͘-lâi A-la-pa -lâng A-pia̍t
1Chronicles11:33 Pa-ló͘-bí -lâng A-su-má-ui Sa-pún -lâng Í-lī-ngá-hap-pa
1Chronicles11:34 Ki-sun -lâng Hap-chhim ê chèng-kiáⁿ Hap-la -lâng Sa-ki ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-tan
1Chronicles11:35 Hap-la -lâng Sa-kah ê kiáⁿ A-hi-àm Ngô͘-ní ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-hoat-le̍k
1Chronicles11:36 Bí-ki-la -lâng Hi-hut Pí-lûn -lâng A-hi-ngá
1Chronicles11:37 Ka-bi̍t -lâng Hi-su-lô I-su-pài ê kiáⁿ Ná-lâi
1Chronicles11:38 Ná-tan ê hiaⁿ-tī Iok-ní Hap-ki-lī ê kiáⁿ Bí-pek-hap
1Chronicles11:39 A-bûn -lâng Sé-le̍k kā Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap gia̍h kun-khì ê Pí-lio̍k -lâng Ná-hap-lâi
1Chronicles11:40 Í-thiap -lâng Í-la kap Ka-li̍p
1Chronicles11:41 Hek -lâng O͘-lī-a A-lâi ê kiáⁿ Sat-poa̍t
1Chronicles11:42 Lū-piān -lâng Sī-sat ê kiáⁿ A-tē-ná (i sī Lū-piān chi-cho̍k tiong chi̍t ê léng-siù
1Chronicles11:43 Má-ka ê kiáⁿ Hap-lân Bî-te̍k-nî -lâng Iok-sa-hoat
1Chronicles11:44 A-si-tha-la -lâng O͘-se-a A-lô-ní -lâng Hô-thán ê kiáⁿ Sa-má kap Iâ-lī
1Chronicles11:45 Thê-sé -lâng Sin-lī ê kiáⁿ Iâ-thia̍p kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī Iok-hap
1Chronicles11:46 Má-hap-bī -lâng Í-lī-gia̍p I-lī-ná-an ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lī-pài kap Iok-sa-bī-ngá Mô͘-ap -lâng I-te̍k-má
1Chronicles11:47 Í-lī-gia̍p
1Chronicles12:1 Tāi-pi̍t ūi-tio̍h siám-pī Ki-sū ê kiáⁿ Sò-lô
1Chronicles12:2 In ōe ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú tò-chhiú siā-chìⁿ
1Chronicles12:3 Chhōa-thâu--ê sī A-hi-í-siā
1Chronicles12:4 Ki-piàn -lâng I-si-má-ngá (saⁿ-cha̍p lâng tiong ê chi̍t ê ióng-sū
1Chronicles12:5 I-lī-o͘-sài
1Chronicles12:6 Khó-la -lâng Í-lī-ka-ná
1Chronicles12:7 Ki-to -lâng Iâ-lô-hán ê kiáⁿ Iû-la kap Se-pa-tē-ngá.
1Chronicles12:8 Ka-tek chi-cho̍k ū kúi-nā lâng lâi kàu khòng-iá ê iàu-sài
1Chronicles12:9 Thâu chi̍t ê Í-siā-ní
1Chronicles12:10 tē-sì Bî-si-má-ná
1Chronicles12:11 tē-la̍k A-thài
1Chronicles12:12 tē-poeh Iok-hap-lân
1Chronicles12:13 tē-cha̍p Iâ-lī-bí
1Chronicles12:14 Chiah-ê lóng sī Ka-tek chi-cho̍k ê kun-koaⁿ; siōng-sòe--ê chi̍t ê tú chi̍t-pah
1Chronicles12:15 Chiaⁿ--ge̍h Iok-tàn-hô ê chúi tiòng-móa siang-pêng hōaⁿ ê sî
1Chronicles12:16 Koh ū Piān-ngá-bín -lâng kap Iû-tāi -lâng lâi Tāi-pi̍t ê iàu-sài.
1Chronicles12:17 Tāi-pi̍t chhut-khì gêng-chiap in
1Chronicles12:18 Hit-sî Siōng-tè ê sîn lîm-kàu chèng kun-koaⁿ ê siú-léng A-má-sài
1Chronicles12:19 Tāi-pi̍t kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng chòe-hé beh kong-kek Sò-lô ê sî
1Chronicles12:20 Tāi-pi̍t khì Sé-kek-la ê sî
1Chronicles12:21 Chiah-ê lâng pang-chān Tāi-pi̍t tùi-khòng iû-kek-tūi
1Chronicles12:22 Hit-sî
1Chronicles12:23 Ū bú-chong hó-sè ê chiàn-sū lâi Hi-pek-lûn kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t
1Chronicles12:24 Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k: Giâ tún-pâi
1Chronicles12:25 Se-biān chi-cho̍k: Ōe chhut-chiàn ê ióng-sū
1Chronicles12:26 Lī-bī chi-cho̍k: Sì-chheng la̍k-pah lâng;
1Chronicles12:27 A-lûn hō͘-tāi ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi kap tè-i--ê ū saⁿ-chheng chhit-pah lâng;
1Chronicles12:28 Ióng-béng ê chiàn-sū siàu-liân-lâng Sat-tok kap i ka-cho̍k ê léng-siù jī-cha̍p-jī lâng.
1Chronicles12:29 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k: Sò-lô ê chhin-cho̍k ū saⁿ-chheng lâng; chêng-kàu-taⁿ
1Chronicles12:30 Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k: Chhut-miâ ê ióng-béng chiàn-sū
1Chronicles12:31 Iok-tàn-hô sai-pêng ê Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k: Ū kì-lio̍k tī ka-phó͘--ê
1Chronicles12:32 Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k: Ū tì-sek
1Chronicles12:33 Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k: Ōe ēng ta̍k-chióng kun-khì chhut-tīn kau-chiàn
1Chronicles12:34 Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k: Ū chi̍t-chheng ê léng-siù; gia̍h chhiuⁿ
1Chronicles12:35 Tān chi-cho̍k: Ōe chhut-chiàn--ê
1Chronicles12:36 A-siat chi-cho̍k: Ōe chhut-tīn kau-chiàn--ê
1Chronicles12:37 Tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-pêng
1Chronicles12:38 Chiah-ê chiàn-sū lóng sûi-sî ōe-tàng chhut-chiàn
1Chronicles12:39 In tī hia kap Tāi-pi̍t chòe-hé saⁿ ji̍t
1Chronicles12:40 In hù-kūn ê lâng
1Chronicles13:1 Tāi-pi̍t kap chí-hui-koaⁿ
1Chronicles13:2 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Í-sek-lia̍t choân hōe-chiòng kóng
1Chronicles13:3 Lán chiū thang chiong lán ê Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi chhian-lâi chia; in-ūi tī Sò-lô choh-ông ê sî
1Chronicles13:4 Choân hōe-chiòng lóng tông-ì án-ni chòe; jîn-bîn mā khòaⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì chòe tio̍h.
1Chronicles13:5 Tāi-pi̍t chiū tùi Ai-ki̍p pian-kài ê Se-hat-hô
1Chronicles13:6 Tāi-pi̍t kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng chiū khì Pa-la
1Chronicles13:7 In chiong Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi hē tī sin ê chhia
1Chronicles13:8 Tāi-pi̍t kap Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng chīn-la̍t chhiùⁿ-koa
1Chronicles13:9 In kàu Ki-tùn ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
1Chronicles13:10 Siōng Chú tùi O͘-sat hoat tōa siū-khì
1Chronicles13:11 Tāi-pi̍t in-ūi Siōng Chú phah O͘-sat
1Chronicles13:12 Hit-ji̍t
1Chronicles13:13 Tùi án-ni
1Chronicles13:14 Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi thêng tī Gô-pia̍t Í-tong ê chhù saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú. Siōng Chú sù-hok Gô-pia̍t Í-tong ê ke kap i it-chhè só͘ ū--ê.
1Chronicles14:1 Thài-ní -ông Hi-lân phài sù-chiá tòa pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ
1Chronicles14:2 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chai Siōng Chú kian-li̍p i chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
1Chronicles14:3 Tāi-pi̍t tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng koh chhōa kúi-nā ê bó͘. Tāi-pi̍t koh siⁿ hāu-siⁿ kap cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ.
1Chronicles14:4 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siⁿ ê kiáⁿ sī Sa-bō͘-a
1Chronicles14:5 Ek-hat
1Chronicles14:6 Ná-ka
1Chronicles14:7 Í-lī-sa-má
1Chronicles14:8 Hui-lī-sū -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t siū boah-iû soán-li̍p chòe choân Í-sek-lia̍t ê ông
1Chronicles14:9 Hui-lī-sū -lâng lâi chhim-hoān Lī-hoa̍t-im Soaⁿ-kok.
1Chronicles14:10 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng-tè kóng
1Chronicles14:11 Hui-lī-sū -lâng chiūⁿ-lâi Pa-le̍k Pí-la-sim
1Chronicles14:12 Hui-lī-sū -lâng kā in ê ngó͘-siōng tàn tī hia; Tāi-pi̍t bēng-lēng lâng kā hiah-ê ngó͘-siōng pàng-hé sio.
1Chronicles14:13 Hui-lī-sū -lâng koh lâi chhim-hoān Lī-hoa̍t-im Soaⁿ-kok.
1Chronicles14:14 Tāi-pi̍t mn̄g Siōng-tè. Siōng-tè kā i kóng
1Chronicles14:15 Lí thiaⁿ-tio̍h chhiū-bé ū hêng-kun ê siaⁿ
1Chronicles14:16 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chiàu Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng khì chòe
1Chronicles14:17 Tāi-pi̍t ê miâ-siaⁿ thoân kàu bān-kok; Siōng Chú hō͘ lia̍t-kok lóng kiaⁿ i.
1Chronicles15:1 Tāi-pi̍t tī Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ ūi ka-kī khí kúi-nā keng kiong-tiān
1Chronicles15:2 Hit-sî Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles15:3 Tāi-pi̍t tiàu-chi̍p Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
1Chronicles15:4 Tāi-pi̍t koh tiàu-chi̍p A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi kap Lī-bī -lâng:
1Chronicles15:5 Ko-hat ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng O͘-lia̍t kap i ê chhin-cho̍k chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p lâng.
1Chronicles15:6 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng A-sat-ngá kap i ê chhin-cho̍k nn̄g-pah jī-cha̍p lâng.
1Chronicles15:7 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng Iok-ní kap i ê chhin-cho̍k chi̍t-pah saⁿ-cha̍p lâng.
1Chronicles15:8 Í-lī-sat-hoán ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng Sī-má-ngá kap i ê chhin-cho̍k nn̄g-pah lâng.
1Chronicles15:9 Hi-pek-lûn ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng Í-lī-gia̍p kap i ê chhin-cho̍k poeh-cha̍p lâng.
1Chronicles15:10 O͘-siat ê hō͘-tāi ū siú-léng A-bí-ná-ta̍t kap i ê chhin-cho̍k chi̍t-pah cha̍p-jī lâng.
1Chronicles15:11 Tāi-pi̍t tiàu chè-si Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha
1Chronicles15:12 Tùi in kóng
1Chronicles15:13 In-ūi lín chêng hit-piàn bô kng iok-kūi
1Chronicles15:14 Tùi án-ni chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng ūi-tio̍h beh chiong Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi kng--lâi
1Chronicles15:15 Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ-sun chiàu Siōng Chú hoan-hù Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
1Chronicles15:16 Tāi-pi̍t hoan-hù Lī-bī ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ hun-phài in ê chhin-cho̍k hū-chek chhiùⁿ-koa
1Chronicles15:17 Lī-bī -lâng chiū phài Iok-ní ê kiáⁿ Hi-bān
1Chronicles15:18 Tē-jī pan ū in ê chhin-cho̍k Sat-ka-lī-a
1Chronicles15:19 Án-ni phài chhiùⁿ-koa ê Hi-bān
1Chronicles15:20 Koh phài Sat-ka-lī-a
1Chronicles15:21 Koh phài Má-tha-thê-ngá
1Chronicles15:22 Lī-bī -lâng ê siú-léng Ki-ná-nî-ngá hū-chek im-ga̍k; i cheng-thong im-ga̍k
1Chronicles15:23 Pí-lī-ka kap Í-lī-ka-ná sī iok-kūi ê siú-ōe.
1Chronicles15:24 Chè-si Sī-pa-nî
1Chronicles15:25 Tùi án-ni
1Chronicles15:26 Siōng-tè pang-chān kng iok-kūi ê Lī-bī -lâng
1Chronicles15:27 Tāi-pi̍t kap kng iok-kūi ê Lī-bī -lâng
1Chronicles15:28 Án-ni
1Chronicles15:29 Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi ji̍p Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ ê sî
1Chronicles16:1 Chiah-ê Lī-bī -lâng kng Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi ji̍p--khì
1Chronicles16:2 Tāi-pi̍t hiàn sio-hòa-chè kap pêng-an-chè liáu-āu
1Chronicles16:3 I koh pun mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng
1Chronicles16:4 Tāi-pi̍t phài kúi-nā ê Lī-bī -lâng tī Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi chêng ho̍k-sāi
1Chronicles16:5 Tūi-tiúⁿ sī A-sat
1Chronicles16:6 Chè-si Pí-ná-ngá kap Ngá-hap-sek tī Siōng-tè ê iok-kūi chêng chiàu-sî pûn lat-pah.
1Chronicles16:7 Hit-ji̍t
1Chronicles16:8 Lín tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
1Chronicles16:9 Tio̍h tùi I gîm-si
1Chronicles16:10 Tio̍h khoa-iāu I ê sèng-miâ. Goān chhē-kiû Siōng Chú ê lâng sim-lāi hoaⁿ-hí.
1Chronicles16:11 Tio̍h óa-khò Siōng Chú kap I ê koân-lêng
1Chronicles16:12 I ê po̍k-jîn Í-sek-lia̍t ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles16:13 
1Chronicles16:14 I sī Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè; I ê sím-phòaⁿ phó͘-ki̍p choân-tōe.
1Chronicles16:15 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit I ê iok ti̍t-kàu éng-oán
1Chronicles16:16 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit I kap A-pek-la-hán li̍p ê iok
1Chronicles16:17 I chiong chit-ê iok hō͘ Ngá-kok chòe kui-lē
1Chronicles16:18 I kóng
1Chronicles16:19 Tng-sî in ê jîn-kháu iú-hān
1Chronicles16:20 In tùi chit-cho̍k kiâⁿ kàu hit-cho̍k
1Chronicles16:21 I bô iông-ún lâng ap-pek in; ūi-tio̍h in ê iân-kò͘
1Chronicles16:22 I kóng
1Chronicles16:23 Choân-tōe lóng tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ-koa! Tio̍h ji̍t-ji̍t soan-pò͘ I chín-kiù ê hó siau-sit!
1Chronicles16:24 Tio̍h tùi bān-kok soan-iông I ê êng-iāu! Tio̍h tùi bān-bîn kóng-khí I úi-tāi ê chok-ûi!
1Chronicles16:25 In-ūi Siōng Chú chì-tōa
1Chronicles16:26 In-ūi gōa-pang ê sîn-bêng put-kò sī ngó͘-siōng; m̄-kú Siōng Chú chhòng-chō chiah-ê thiⁿ.
1Chronicles16:27 Chun-kùi kap ui-giâm pau-ûi I; koân-lêng kap hí-lo̍k chhiong-móa I ê só͘-chāi.
1Chronicles16:28 Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! Tio̍h chiong êng-iāu kap koân-lêng kui hō͘ I!
1Chronicles16:29 Tio̍h chiong Siōng Chú èng-tit ê êng-iāu kui hō͘ I! Tio̍h tòa chè-mi̍h lâi kàu I ê bīn-chêng! Tio̍h chhēng sèng-kiat chòe lé-ho̍k kèng-pài Siōng Chú!
1Chronicles16:30 Choân-tōe tio̍h tī I bīn-chêng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah! Sè-kài kian-kò͘ bōe tōng-iâu;
1Chronicles16:31 thiⁿ tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí
1Chronicles16:32 Hái kap hit lāi-bīn ê oa̍h-mi̍h lóng tio̍h chhut tōa-siaⁿ! Chhân-hn̂g kap kî-tiong só͘-ū--ê lóng tio̍h khoài-lo̍k!
1Chronicles16:33 Hit-sî
1Chronicles16:34 Tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
1Chronicles16:35 Tio̍h kóng
1Chronicles16:36 Goān chheng-chàn kui hō͘ Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
1Chronicles16:37 Tāi-pi̍t lâu A-sat kap i ê chhin-cho̍k tī Siōng Chú ê iok-kūi chêng
1Chronicles16:38 Koh lâu Gô-pia̍t Í-tong kap i ê chhin-cho̍k la̍k-cha̍p-poeh lâng
1Chronicles16:39 Koh lâu chè-si Sat-tok kap i ê chhin-cho̍k chèng chè-si
1Chronicles16:40 ta̍k-ji̍t chá-àm tī chè-tôaⁿ téng hiàn sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Siōng Chú
1Chronicles16:41 Iáu ū Hi-bān
1Chronicles16:42 Hi-bān
1Chronicles16:43 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles17:1 Tāi-pi̍t tòa tī ông-kiong
1Chronicles17:2 Ná-tan tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles17:3 Hit-mî Siōng-tè ê ōe lîm-kàu Ná-tan
1Chronicles17:4 “Lí khì kā Tāi-pi̍t góa ê po̍k-jîn kóng
1Chronicles17:5 Tùi góa chhōa Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiūⁿ-lâi chia kàu hiān-chāi
1Chronicles17:6 Góa kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tâng-kiâⁿ ê sî
1Chronicles17:7 “Taⁿ lí tio̍h kā góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles17:8 Lí bô-lūn khì tó-ūi
1Chronicles17:9 Góa beh ūi-tio̍h góa ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t chún-pī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi
1Chronicles17:10 
1Chronicles17:11 Kàu lí ê hè-siū móa
1Chronicles17:12 I beh ūi-tio̍h góa khí sèng-tiān; góa beh kian-kò͘ i ê ông-ūi ti̍t-kàu éng-oán.
1Chronicles17:13 Góa beh chòe i ê pē
1Chronicles17:14 Góa mā beh hō͘ i éng-oán tī-lí góa ê chú-bîn kap góa ê kok; i ê ông-ūi ōe kian-kò͘ kàu éng-oán.’”
1Chronicles17:15 Ná-tan chiū chiàu Siōng-tè khé-sī ê ōe lóng kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng.
1Chronicles17:16 Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiū ji̍p-khì hōe-bō͘
1Chronicles17:17 M̄-nā án-ni
1Chronicles17:18 Lí chin chheng-chhó lí ê lô͘-po̍k
1Chronicles17:19 Siōng Chú ah
1Chronicles17:20 Siōng Chú ah
1Chronicles17:21 Sè-kan kiám ū chi̍t ê kok chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t? Siōng-tè lí ū kiù-sio̍k in
1Chronicles17:22 Lí hō͘ lí ê jîn-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t éng-oán chòe lí ka-kī ê chú-bîn; Siōng Chú ah
1Chronicles17:23 “Siōng Chú
1Chronicles17:24 Goān lí ê miâ éng-oán kian-kò͘
1Chronicles17:25 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
1Chronicles17:26 “Siōng Chú
1Chronicles17:27 Taⁿ
1Chronicles18:1 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles18:2 Tāi-pi̍t koh phah-pāi Mô͘-ap -lâng
1Chronicles18:3 Só-pa -ông Hap-tāi-tí-siā khì Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô
1Chronicles18:4 Tāi-pi̍t chhiúⁿ i ê chiàn-chhia chi̍t-chheng tâi
1Chronicles18:5 Tāi-má-sū-kek ê Sū-lī-a -lâng lâi pang-chān Só-pa -ông Hap-tāi-tí-siā
1Chronicles18:6 Tùi án-ni
1Chronicles18:7 Tāi-pi̍t chiong Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê pō͘-hā só͘ ēng kim ê tún-pâi lóng tòa-lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
1Chronicles18:8 Tāi-pi̍t -ông koh tùi Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê siâⁿ Thê-pa kap Kun
1Chronicles18:9 Hap-má -ông Tô-í thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Tāi-pi̍t phah-iâⁿ Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê choân-kun
1Chronicles18:10 chiū chhe i ê kiáⁿ Iok-lân tòa kim-khì
1Chronicles18:11 Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiū chiong chiah-ê mi̍h
1Chronicles18:12 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ A-pí-su tī Iâm ê Soaⁿ-kok phah-sí Í-tong -lâng chi̍t-bān poeh-chheng.
1Chronicles18:13 Tāi-pi̍t tī Í-tong choân-tōe siat kun-iâⁿ; Í-tong -lâng lóng kui-sūn i. Tāi-pi̍t bô-lūn khì tó-ūi
1Chronicles18:14 Tāi-pi̍t chòe choân Í-sek-lia̍t ê ông
1Chronicles18:15 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap chòe goân-sòe
1Chronicles18:16 A-hi-tu̍t ê kiáⁿ Sat-tok kap A-pí-a-tha ê kiáⁿ A-hi-bí-le̍k chòe chè-si; Se-lâi-ngá chòe su-kì.
1Chronicles18:17 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Pí-ná-ngá choh-thâu chí-hui Ki-lī-thê -lâng kap Pí-lī-thê -lâng. Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ lóng chòe ông-sek chham-bô͘.
1Chronicles19:1 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles19:2 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles19:3 M̄-kú A-bûn -lâng ê léng-siù tùi Hap-lūn kóng
1Chronicles19:4 Hap-lūn chiū lia̍h Tāi-pi̍t ê jîn-sîn
1Chronicles19:5 Ū lâng chiong chiah-ê lâng só͘ tú--tio̍h-ê tùi Tāi-pi̍t pò-kò
1Chronicles19:6 A-bûn -lâng chai in jiá Tāi-pi̍t siū-khì; Hap-lūn kap A-bûn -lâng chiū phài lâng tòa saⁿ-bān sì-chheng kong-kun ê gûn
1Chronicles19:7 In chhiàⁿ saⁿ-bān nn̄g-chheng tâi ê chiàn-chhia
1Chronicles19:8 Tāi-pi̍t thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
1Chronicles19:9 A-bûn -lâng chhut-lâi tī siâⁿ-mn̂g ê thâu-chêng pâi-tīn; kî-tha hiah-ê ông lēng-gōa tī iá-gōa pâi-tīn.
1Chronicles19:10 Iok-ap khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i ê chêng-āu lóng ū tùi-te̍k pâi-tīn
1Chronicles19:11 Iok-ap chiong kî-tha ê peng-sū kau hō͘ i ê sió-tī A-pí-su
1Chronicles19:12 Iok-ap tùi A-pí-su kóng
1Chronicles19:13 Tio̍h kian-kiông! Tio̍h ūi lán ê tông-pau kap lán Siōng-tè ê siâⁿ ióng-kám chhut-chiàn. Siōng Chú ōe chiàu I khòaⁿ-chòe hó--ê khì chòe.”
1Chronicles19:14 Iok-ap chhōa i ê kun-tūi chìn-chêng kap Sū-lī-a -lâng kau-chiàn; Sū-lī-a -lâng chiàn-pāi
1Chronicles19:15 A-bûn -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sū-lī-a -lâng tô-cháu
1Chronicles19:16 Sū-lī-a -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Chronicles19:17 Ū lâng pò-kò Tāi-pi̍t
1Chronicles19:18 Sū-lī-a -lâng thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; Tāi-pi̍t thâi-sí Sū-lī-a ê chiàn-chhia-peng chhit-chheng lâng
1Chronicles19:19 Hap-tāi-tí-siā ê jîn-sîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h in thâi-su Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Chronicles20:1 Keh-nî chhun-thiⁿ
1Chronicles20:2 Tāi-pi̍t the̍h-tio̍h Bí-le̍k-kong thâu-khak téng ê ông-koan
1Chronicles20:3 koh kā siâⁿ-lāi ê jîn-bîn lia̍h--chhut-lâi
1Chronicles20:4 Āu-lâi
1Chronicles20:5 In koh kap Hui-lī-sū -lâng kau-chiàn
1Chronicles20:6 In koh tī Ka-te̍k kau-chiàn. Tī hia ū chi̍t ê tōa-hàn-lâng
1Chronicles20:7 Chit-ê lâng tùi Í-sek-lia̍t ê kun-tūi chhiàng-siaⁿ ê sî
1Chronicles20:8 Chiah-ê lâng lóng sī Ka-te̍k tōa-hàn-cho̍k ê hō͘-tāi; lóng hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê kun-peng thâi-sí.
1Chronicles21:1 Sat-tàn khí-lâi kong-kek Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
1Chronicles21:2 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Iok-ap kap kun-tūi ê léng-siù kóng
1Chronicles21:3 Iok-ap kóng
1Chronicles21:4 Ông kian-chhî i ê bēng-lēng. Iok-ap chiū kiâⁿ-thàu Í-sek-lia̍t choân-kok tiâu-cha
1Chronicles21:5 Iok-ap chiong tiám-sǹg ê jîn-sò͘ pò-kò Tāi-pi̍t. Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng gia̍h-to ê chiàn-sū ū chi̍t-pah-cha̍p-bān
1Chronicles21:6 M̄-kú Iok-ap bô tiám-sǹg Lī-bī chi-cho̍k kap Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k ê jîn-sò͘
1Chronicles21:7 Tāi-pi̍t chòe ê chit-hāng tāi-chì Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ
1Chronicles21:8 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Siōng-tè kóng
1Chronicles21:9 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Tāi-pi̍t ê sian-kiàn Ka-tek
1Chronicles21:10 “Lí khì kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles21:11 Ka-tek lâi kā Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles21:12 Saⁿ nî ê ki-hng; á-sī thâi-su tùi-te̍k
1Chronicles21:13 Tāi-pi̍t kā Ka-tek kóng
1Chronicles21:14 Siōng Chú chiū kàng un-e̍k tī Í-sek-lia̍t; Í-sek-lia̍t sí chhit-bān lâng.
1Chronicles21:15 Siōng-tè chhe chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh kā i húi-bia̍t. Tng thiⁿ-sài beh húi-bia̍t ê sî
1Chronicles21:16 Tāi-pi̍t gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá khiā tī pòaⁿ-khong-tiong
1Chronicles21:17 Tāi-pi̍t tùi Siōng-tè kóng
1Chronicles21:18 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá hoan-hù Ka-tek
1Chronicles21:19 Tāi-pi̍t chiū chiàu Ka-tek hōng Siōng Chú ê miâ só͘ kóng ê ōe chiūⁿ--khì.
1Chronicles21:20 Hit-sî A-lô-ná teh phah-be̍h
1Chronicles21:21 Tāi-pi̍t khì kàu A-lô-ná hia; A-lô-ná khòaⁿ-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t
1Chronicles21:22 Tāi-pi̍t tùi A-lô-ná kóng
1Chronicles21:23 A-lô-ná tùi Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles21:24 Tāi-pi̍t -ông tùi A-lô-ná kóng
1Chronicles21:25 Tāi-pi̍t chiū ēng la̍k-chheng poeh-pah kong-khek ê n̂g-kim kā A-lô-ná bóe hit-tè tōe.
1Chronicles21:26 Tāi-pi̍t tī hia ūi Siōng Chú khí chi̍t chō chè-tôaⁿ
1Chronicles21:27 Siōng Chú bēng-lēng hit-ê sù-chiá
1Chronicles21:28 Tāi-pi̍t khòaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng Chú ū tī Iâ-pò͘-su -lâng A-lô-ná ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ thiaⁿ i ê kî-tó
1Chronicles21:29 Mô͘-se tī khòng-iá só͘ chō Siōng Chú ê hōe-bō͘ kap sio-hòa-chè ê chè-tôaⁿ
1Chronicles21:30 M̄-kú Tāi-pi̍t m̄-káⁿ khì Ki-piàn kiû-mn̄g Siōng-tè
1Chronicles22:1 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles22:2 Tāi-pi̍t hā-lēng tiàu-chi̍p tòa tī Í-sek-lia̍t -tōe ê gōa-kok-lâng
1Chronicles22:3 Tāi-pi̍t chún-pī chin chōe thih
1Chronicles22:4 I mā ū sǹg bōe liáu ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhâ
1Chronicles22:5 Tāi-pi̍t siūⁿ
1Chronicles22:6 Tāi-pi̍t kiò i ê kiáⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn lâi
1Chronicles22:7 Tāi-pi̍t kā Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
1Chronicles22:8 m̄-kú Siōng Chú kā góa kóng
1Chronicles22:9 M̄-kú
1Chronicles22:10 I beh ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ khí sèng-tiān. I beh chòe góa ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles22:11 Tāi-pi̍t koh kóng
1Chronicles22:12 Goān Siōng Chú sù lí chhong-bêng tì-hūi
1Chronicles22:13 Lí nā kín-sīn chun-thàn Siōng Chú thong-kè Mô͘-se kà-sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê kui-lē kap bēng-lēng
1Chronicles22:14 Góa sin-sin-khó͘-khó͘ ūi Siōng Chú ê tiān chún-pī kim saⁿ-chheng sì-pah kong-tùn
1Chronicles22:15 Lí mā ū chin chōe sai-hū: Phah-chio̍h--ê
1Chronicles22:16 
1Chronicles22:17 Tāi-pi̍t koh bēng-lēng Í-sek-lia̍t só͘-ū ê koaⁿ-oân pang-chān i ê kiáⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn
1Chronicles22:18 “Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè kiám bô kap lín tông-chāi? Kiám bô hō͘ lín kok-kéng pêng-an? Siōng Chú í-keng chiong chit-ê tōe ê chū-bîn kau hō͘ góa tī-lí
1Chronicles22:19 Taⁿ lín tio̍h choân-sim choân-chêng chhē-kiû Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè
1Chronicles23:1 Tāi-pi̍t nî-lāu
1Chronicles23:2 Tāi-pi̍t tiàu-chi̍p Í-sek-lia̍t ê chèng léng-siù
1Chronicles23:3 Lī-bī -lâng saⁿ-cha̍p hè í-siōng ê ta-po͘-lâng
1Chronicles23:4 Tāi-pi̍t hun-phòe kî-tiong nn̄g-bān sì-chheng lâng koán-lí Siōng Chú ê tiān ê sū-bū
1Chronicles23:5 sì-chheng lâng chòe sèng-tiān mn̂g-kháu ê siú-ōe
1Chronicles23:6 Tāi-pi̍t chiong Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles23:7 Kek-sūn ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: La-tān kap Sī-múi.
1Chronicles23:8 La-tān ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Tōa--ê sī Iâ-hiat
1Chronicles23:9 In lóng chòe La-tān ka-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ. Sī-múi ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Sī-lô-bi̍t
1Chronicles23:10 Sī-múi ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Ngá-hap
1Chronicles23:11 Ngá-hap sī tōa-kiáⁿ
1Chronicles23:12 Ko-hat ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Àm-lân
1Chronicles23:13 Àm-lân ê kiáⁿ ū A-lûn kap Mô͘-se. A-lûn kap i ê hō͘-tāi siū soán-phài lâi sèng-hòa chì-sèng ê mi̍h
1Chronicles23:14 Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng Mô͘-se
1Chronicles23:15 Mô͘-se ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Kek-sūn kap Í-lī-í-siā.
1Chronicles23:16 Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi Sè-pò͘-gia̍p sī léng-siù.
1Chronicles23:17 Í-lī-í-siā chí-ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ Lī-hap-pí-ngá
1Chronicles23:18 Í-su-hap ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles23:19 Hi-pek-lûn ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles23:20 O͘-siat ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles23:21 Bí-la-lī ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Boat-lī kap Bō͘-sī; Boat-lī ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ: Í-lī-a-sat kap Ki-sū.
1Chronicles23:22 Í-lī-a-sat sí
1Chronicles23:23 Bō͘-sī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Boat-lī
1Chronicles23:24 Téng-bīn chiah-ê lâng chiàu in ê ka-cho̍k lóng sī Lī-bī ê hō͘-tāi; ta̍k-ê lâng chiàu in ê miâ teng-lio̍k chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ; jī-cha̍p hè í-siōng ê lâng tī Siōng Chú ê tiān chham-ú ho̍k-sāi ê kang-chok.
1Chronicles23:25 Tāi-pi̍t kóng
1Chronicles23:26 Lī-bī -lâng m̄-bián koh kng hōe-bō͘ kap ho̍k-sāi ēng ê khì-khū.”
1Chronicles23:27 Chiàu Tāi-pi̍t chòe-āu ê hoan-hù
1Chronicles23:28 In ê chit-bū sī chòe A-lûn hō͘-tāi ê chō͘-chhiú
1Chronicles23:29 koán-lí hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ
1Chronicles23:30 In ta̍k-ji̍t chá àm lóng tio̍h kám-siā chheng-chàn Siōng Chú.
1Chronicles23:31 Koh tī An-hioh-ji̍t
1Chronicles23:32 Koh kau-tài in kò͘-siú hōe-bō͘ kap sèng-só͘; hia̍p-chō͘ in ê chhin-chiâⁿ A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi koán-lí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê sū-bū.
1Chronicles24:1 A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi pun-chòe kúi-nā ê pan-chhù. A-lûn ū sì ê kiáⁿ: Ná-tap
1Chronicles24:2 Ná-tap kap A-pí-hō͘ pí in lāu-pē khah chá sí
1Chronicles24:3 Tāi-pi̍t kap Í-lī-a-sat ê hō͘-tāi Sat-tok
1Chronicles24:4 Í-lī-a-sat ê hō͘-tāi chòe léng-siù--ê
1Chronicles24:5 In lóng chiàu thiu-chhiam kong-pêng hun-phài; Í-lī-a-sat ê hō͘-tāi kap Í-tha-má ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles24:6 Í-lī-a-sat kap Í-tha-má ê kiáⁿ-sun lûn-liû thiu-chhiam. Lī-bī -lâng Ná-thán-gia̍p ê kiáⁿ Sī-má-ngá chòe su-kì
1Chronicles24:7 Thiu-tio̍h tē-it--ê
1Chronicles24:8 tē-saⁿ Hap-lîm
1Chronicles24:9 tē-gō͘ Má-ki-ngá
1Chronicles24:10 tē-chhit Hap-ko-su
1Chronicles24:11 tē-káu Iâ-su-a
1Chronicles24:12 tē-cha̍p-it Í-lī-a-si̍t
1Chronicles24:13 tē-cha̍p-saⁿ Ô͘-pa
1Chronicles24:14 tē-cha̍p-gō͘ Phek-ka
1Chronicles24:15 tē-cha̍p-chhit Hi-sek
1Chronicles24:16 tē-cha̍p-káu Pí-tha-hi-ngá
1Chronicles24:17 tē-jī-cha̍p-it Ngá-kun
1Chronicles24:18 tē-jī-cha̍p-saⁿ Tē-lâi-ngá
1Chronicles24:19 Chiah-ê lâng lóng chiàu in tī Siōng Chú ê tiān chip-hêng ê chit-bū teng-lio̍k; chiah-ê chit-bū sī in ê chó͘-sian A-lûn chiàu Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè hoan-hù ê kui-lē chè-tēng--ê.
1Chronicles24:20 Lī-bī kî-tha ê hō͘-tāi kì tī ē-bīn: Àm-lân ê hō͘-tāi ū Sè-pò͘-gia̍p
1Chronicles24:21 Lī-hap-pí-ngá ê kiáⁿ-sun tiong
1Chronicles24:22 Í-su-hap ê hō͘-tāi ū Sī-lô-mô͘; Sī-lô-mô͘ ê hō͘-tāi ū Ngá-hap.
1Chronicles24:23 Hi-pek-lûn ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles24:24 O͘-siat ê hō͘-tāi ū Bí-ka; Bí-ka ê hō͘-tāi ū Sa-bi̍t.
1Chronicles24:25 Bí-ka ê hiaⁿ-tī sī I-sī-ngá; I-sī-ngá ê hō͘-tāi ū Sat-ka-lī-a.
1Chronicles24:26 Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ sī Boat-lī kap Bō͘-sī; Ngá-se-ngá ê kiáⁿ ū Pí-ná.
1Chronicles24:27 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi Ngá-se-ngá ê kiáⁿ-sun ū Pí-ná
1Chronicles24:28 Boat-lī ê kiáⁿ sī Í-lī-a-sat kap Ki-sū; Í-lī-a-sat bô kiáⁿ
1Chronicles24:29 Ki-sū ê hō͘-tāi ū Iâ-la-bia̍t.
1Chronicles24:30 Bō͘-sī ū saⁿ ê kiáⁿ: Boat-lī
1Chronicles24:31 In kap in ê chhin-cho̍k A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi siâng-khoán
1Chronicles25:1 Tāi-pi̍t kap ho̍k-sāi thoân-tūi ê léng-siù tùi A-sat
1Chronicles25:2 A-sat ê sì ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles25:3 Iâ-tō͘-tùn ê la̍k ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles25:4 Hi-bān ê kiáⁿ ū Pò͘-ki-ngá
1Chronicles25:5 in lóng sī Hi-bān ê kiáⁿ. Hi-bān tùi Siōng-tè ê èng-ún tit-tio̍h ko-kú
1Chronicles25:6 In lóng siū in lāu-pē chí-tō
1Chronicles25:7 in kap in ê chhin-cho̍k siū kè hùn-liān
1Chronicles25:8 In bô-lūn lāu á-sī siàu-liân
1Chronicles25:9 Thiu-tio̍h thâu-ki chhiam--ê
1Chronicles25:10 tē-saⁿ sī Sat-khek
1Chronicles25:11 tē-sì sī Se-lī
1Chronicles25:12 tē-gō͘ sī Nî-thàm-ngá
1Chronicles25:13 tē-la̍k sī Pò͘-ki-ngá
1Chronicles25:14 tē-chhit sī A-sat-lī-la
1Chronicles25:15 tē-poeh sī Í-sài-a
1Chronicles25:16 tē-káu sī Má-tha-nî
1Chronicles25:17 tē-cha̍p sī Sī-múi
1Chronicles25:18 tē-cha̍p-it sī O͘-siat
1Chronicles25:19 tē-cha̍p-jī sī Hap-sa-pí-ngá
1Chronicles25:20 tē-cha̍p-saⁿ sī Sè-pò͘-gia̍p
1Chronicles25:21 tē-cha̍p-sì sī Má-tha-thê-ngá
1Chronicles25:22 tē-cha̍p-gō͘ sī Iâ-lī-mô͘
1Chronicles25:23 tē-cha̍p-la̍k sī Hap-ná-nî-ngá
1Chronicles25:24 tē-cha̍p-chhit sī Iok-si-pí-ka-sa
1Chronicles25:25 tē-cha̍p-poeh sī Hap-ná-nî
1Chronicles25:26 tē-cha̍p-káu sī Má-lô-thê
1Chronicles25:27 tē-jī-cha̍p sī Í-lī-a-tha
1Chronicles25:28 tē-jī-cha̍p-it sī Hô-thê
1Chronicles25:29 tē-jī-cha̍p-jī sī Ki-tāi-lī-thê
1Chronicles25:30 tē-jī-cha̍p-saⁿ sī Má-hap-siù
1Chronicles25:31 tē-jī-cha̍p-sì sī Lô-bān-thê Í-siā
1Chronicles26:1 Kò͘-mn̂g ê pan-chhù kì tī ē-bīn: Khó-la -cho̍k A-sat ê kiáⁿ-sun tiong
1Chronicles26:2 Bí-si-lī-bí-ngá ū chhit ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles26:3 tē-gō͘ Í-lân
1Chronicles26:4 Gô-pia̍t Í-tong ū poeh ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles26:5 tē-la̍k A-bí-lī
1Chronicles26:6 I ê kiáⁿ Sī-má-ngá mā ū siⁿ kúi-nā ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles26:7 Sī-má-ngá ū la̍k ê kiáⁿ: Gô-tek-nî
1Chronicles26:8 Chiah-ê sī Gô-pia̍t Í-tong ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles26:9 Bí-si-lī-bí-ngá ê kiáⁿ kap hiaⁿ-tī lóng chin ū châi-lêng
1Chronicles26:10 Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi Hô-sat ū kúi-nā ê kiáⁿ
1Chronicles26:11 tē-jī Hi-le̍k-ka
1Chronicles26:12 Chiah-ê sī sèng-tiān siú-ōe ê pan-chhù
1Chronicles26:13 In bô-lūn lāu á-sī siàu-liân
1Chronicles26:14 Thiu-tio̍h kò͘-siú tang-mn̂g--ê sī Sī-lī-bí-ngá; i ê kiáⁿ Sat-ka-lī-a sī chin ū châi-lêng ê kò͘-būn
1Chronicles26:15 Gô-pia̍t Í-tong siú lâm-mn̂g; i ê kiáⁿ siú chhng-khò͘.
1Chronicles26:16 Su-pêng kap Hô-sat kò͘-siú sai-mn̂g kap tī chiūⁿ-kiā ê lō͘ ê Sa-lī-ki-mn̂g. Siú-ōe kap siú-ōe sio-tùi.
1Chronicles26:17 Tang-mn̂g ū la̍k ê Lī-bī -lâng
1Chronicles26:18 Sai-pêng cháu-lông ū sì ê lâng tī tōa-lō͘
1Chronicles26:19 Chiah-ê sī Khó-la hō͘-tāi kap Bí-la-lī hō͘-tāi siú-ōe ê pan-chhù.
1Chronicles26:20 Lī-bī -lâng ê tiong-kan
1Chronicles26:21 La-tān ê hō͘-tāi: Kek-sūn -cho̍k sio̍k La-tān chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê ū Iâ-hi-i-lī.
1Chronicles26:22 Iâ-hi-i-lī ê kiáⁿ Se-thán kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī Iok-ní
1Chronicles26:23 Àm-lân ka-cho̍k
1Chronicles26:24 Koh ū Mô͘-se ê kiáⁿ Kek-sūn ê hō͘-tāi Sè-pò͘-gia̍p koán-lí hú-khò͘.
1Chronicles26:25 Iáu ū i ê chhin-cho̍k Í-lī-í-siā: Í-lī-í-siā ê kiáⁿ Lī-hap-pí-ngá
1Chronicles26:26 Sī-lô-bi̍t kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī koán-lí hú-khò͘ lāi sèng ê khì-khū
1Chronicles26:27 In chiong chiàn-lī-phín sèng-hòa kui Siōng Chú
1Chronicles26:28 Sian-kiàn Sat-bó-ní
1Chronicles26:29 Í-su-hap ka-cho̍k ū Ki-ná-nî-ngá kap i ê kiáⁿ-jî chòe koaⁿ-tiúⁿ kap sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ
1Chronicles26:30 Hi-pek-lûn ka-cho̍k ū Hap-sa-pí-ngá kap i ê chhin-cho̍k
1Chronicles26:31 Hi-pek-lûn ka-cho̍k chiàu in ê cho̍k-phó͘
1Chronicles26:32 Iâ-lī-ngá ê chhin-cho̍k ū nn̄g-chheng chhit-pah lâng
1Chronicles27:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
1Chronicles27:2 Chiaⁿ--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:3 i sī Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi
1Chronicles27:4 Jī--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:5 Saⁿ--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:6 Pí-ná-ngá sī hit saⁿ-cha̍p ê ióng-sū tiong ê chi̍t ê
1Chronicles27:7 Sì--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:8 Gō͘--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:9 La̍k--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:10 Chhit--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:11 Poeh--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:12 Káu--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:13 Cha̍p--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:14 Cha̍p-it--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:15 Cha̍p-jī--ge̍h
1Chronicles27:16 Koán-lí Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ kì tī ē-bīn: Koán Lū-piān chi-cho̍k--ê sī Sè-ki-lī ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-í-siā; koán Se-biān chi-cho̍k--ê sī Má-ka ê kiáⁿ Sī-hoat-thê-ngá;
1Chronicles27:17 koán Lī-bī chi-cho̍k--ê sī Ki-bō͘-lī ê kiáⁿ Hap-sa-pí-ngá; koán A-lûn hō͘-tāi--ê sī Sat-tok;
1Chronicles27:18 koán Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k--ê sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hiaⁿ-ko Í-lī-hō͘; koán Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k--ê sī Bí-ka-le̍k ê kiáⁿ Àm-lī;
1Chronicles27:19 koán Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k--ê sī Gô-pa-tí-a ê kiáⁿ I-si-má-ngá; koán Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k--ê sī A-su-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lī-mô͘;
1Chronicles27:20 koán Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k--ê sī A-sat-se-ngá ê kiáⁿ Hô-sè-a; koán Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k--ê sī Pí-tāi-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ní;
1Chronicles27:21 koán Ki-lia̍t tōe-khu Má-ná-se pòaⁿ chi-cho̍k--ê sī Sat-ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ E̍k-to; koán Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k--ê sī Ap-nî-ní ê kiáⁿ Ngá-se-gia̍p;
1Chronicles27:22 koán Tān chi-cho̍k--ê sī Iâ-lô-hán ê kiáⁿ A-sat-lia̍t. Chiah-ê sī Í-sek-lia̍t chèng chi-cho̍k ê hêng-chèng koaⁿ-tiúⁿ.
1Chronicles27:23 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng jī-cha̍p hè í-hā--ê
1Chronicles27:24 Sé-lō͘-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iok-ap khai-sí tiám-sǹg; m̄-kú bô oân-sêng. In-ūi tiám-sǹg jîn-kháu chit-ê sū Siōng-tè ê siū-khì lîm-kàu Í-sek-lia̍t
1Chronicles27:25 Koán-lí ông hú-khò͘--ê sī A-tí-gia̍p ê kiáⁿ A-su-má-ui; koán-lí chhân-iá
1Chronicles27:26 Koán-lí keng-choh chhân-hn̂g--ê sī Ki-lio̍k ê kiáⁿ Í-su-lī.
1Chronicles27:27 Koán-lí phû-tô-hn̂g--ê sī La-má -lâng Sī-múi; koán-lí phû-tô-hn̂g ê chiú-tî--ê
1Chronicles27:28 Koán-lí soaⁿ-po͘ ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū kap sng-châi-chhiū--ê sī Ki-tē-lī -lâng Pa-le̍k Hap-lâm; koán-lí kaⁿ-ná-iû-khò͘--ê sī Iok-a-si.
1Chronicles27:29 Koán-lí Sa-lûn pêng-goân ê gû-kûn--ê sī Sa-lûn -lâng Si-thê-lâi; koán-lí soaⁿ-kok tiong ê gû-kûn--ê sī A-tē-lâi ê kiáⁿ Sa-hoat.
1Chronicles27:30 Koán-lí lo̍k-tô--ê sī Í-si̍t-má-lī -lâng A-pí-le̍k; koán-lí lû-kûn--ê sī Bí-lûn -lâng Iâ-hi-tí-a.
1Chronicles27:31 Koán-lí iûⁿ-kûn--ê sī Hā-kah -lâng Ngá-sek. Chiah-ê lóng sī koán-lí Tāi-pi̍t -ông sán-gia̍p ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ.
1Chronicles27:32 Tāi-pi̍t ê a-chek Iok-ná-tan chòe chham-bô͘
1Chronicles27:33 A-hi-to-hut mā chòe ông ê chham-bô͘; A-ki -lâng Hō͘-su chòe ông ê kò͘-būn.
1Chronicles27:34 Sòa-chiap A-hi-to-hut ê lâng sī Pí-ná-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi kap A-pí-a-tha; Iok-ap chòe ông ê goân-sòe.
1Chronicles28:1 Tāi-pi̍t tiàu-chi̍p Í-sek-lia̍t ê léng-siù
1Chronicles28:2 Tāi-pi̍t -ông chiū khiā--khí-lâi
1Chronicles28:3 M̄-kú Siōng-tè tùi góa kóng
1Chronicles28:4 M̄-kú
1Chronicles28:5 Siōng Chú siúⁿ-sù góa chin chōe kiáⁿ
1Chronicles28:6 “Siōng Chú koh tùi góa kóng

2Chronicles8:3 Só͘-lô-bûn kong-chhú Hap-má Só-pa
2Chronicles8:4 koh tiông-kiàn tī khòng-iá ê Ta̍t-bo̍k
2Chronicles8:5 koh tiông-kiàn Téng Pek Hô-lûn kap Ē Pek Hô-lûn
2Chronicles8:6 Só͘-lô-bûn koh khí-chō Pa-la -siâⁿ kap chin chōe tún-chek kun-iōng-phín ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles8:7 Só͘-ū tòa tī kéng-lāi ê Hek -lâng
2Chronicles8:8 bô hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siau-bia̍t--ê
2Chronicles8:9 M̄-kú Só͘-lô-bûn bô hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe lô͘-lē chòe khó͘-kang; i hō͘ in chòe i ê chiàn-sū
2Chronicles8:10 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ê tok-kang ū nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p lâng.
2Chronicles8:11 Só͘-lô-bûn chiong Ai-ki̍p -ông ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tùi Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ poaⁿ ji̍p-khì ūi-tio̍h i khí ê kiong-tiān; in-ūi Só͘-lô-bûn kóng
2Chronicles8:12 Só͘-lô-bûn tī sèng-tiān cháu-lông thâu-chêng só͘ khí Siōng Chú ê chè-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles8:13 chiàu Mô͘-se ê bēng-lēng
2Chronicles8:14 Koh chiàu i ê lāu-pē Tāi-pi̍t ê kui-lē
2Chronicles8:15 Bô-lūn koán-lí hú-khò͘
2Chronicles8:16 Só͘-lô-bûn khí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê kang-sū
2Chronicles8:17 Hit-sî
2Chronicles8:18 Hi-lân phài i ê koaⁿ-oân
2Chronicles9:1 Sī-pa ê lú-ông thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê miâ-siaⁿ
2Chronicles9:2 Só͘-lô-bûn chiàu i só͘ mn̄g--ê it-it kā i hôe-tap
2Chronicles9:3 Sī-pa lú-ông kiàn-sek-tio̍h Só͘-lô-bûn ê tì-hūi
2Chronicles9:4 toh-téng ê chia̍h-mi̍h
2Chronicles9:5 Sī-pa lú-ông chiū tùi ông kóng
2Chronicles9:6 Pún-lâi góa m̄ sìn in ê ōe
2Chronicles9:7 Lí ê pō͘-sio̍k chin ū hok-khì! Lí ê jîn-sîn chin ū hok-khì! In put-sî tī lí ê bīn-chêng thiaⁿ lí tì-hūi ê ōe.
2Chronicles9:8 Siōng Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! I ì-ài lí
2Chronicles9:9 Sī-pa lú-ông chiong tāi-iok sì-chheng kong-kun ê kim
2Chronicles9:10 Hi-lân ê chûn-oân kap Só͘-lô-bûn ê chûn-oân tùi Gô-hui ūn kim lâi
2Chronicles9:11 Ông ēng chiah-ê tôaⁿ-hiuⁿ-chhâ ūi Siōng Chú ê tiān kap ông-kiong chòe gîm-á
2Chronicles9:12 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông sàng hō͘ Sī-pa lú-ông ê hôe-lé
2Chronicles9:13 Só͘-lô-bûn ta̍k-nî siu--tio̍h ê kim kiōng nn̄g-bān saⁿ-chheng kong-kun.
2Chronicles9:14 Í-gōa
2Chronicles9:15 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông phah tōa tún-pâi nn̄g-pah bīn
2Chronicles9:16 koh phah sió tún-pâi saⁿ-pah bīn
2Chronicles9:17 Ông koh ēng chhiūⁿ-gê chòe chi̍t ê tōa pó-chō
2Chronicles9:18 Pó-chō chêng ū la̍k chàn kiā-á
2Chronicles9:19 koh ū cha̍p-jī chō sai khiā tī la̍k chàn kiā-á ta̍k-chàn ê siang-pêng-piⁿ; pa̍t-ê ông-kok lóng m̄-bat án-ni chòe.
2Chronicles9:20 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông só͘-ū lim ê khì-khū lóng sī kim--ê; Lê-pa-lūn Lîm-kiong it-chhè ê khì-khū mā-sī sûn-kim--ê; tī Só͘-lô-bûn ê sî-tāi
2Chronicles9:21 Ông ê chûn-tūi kap Hi-lân ê chûn-oân chòe-hé khì Tha-si; chiah-ê Tha-si ê chûn-tūi ūn kim
2Chronicles9:22 Só͘-lô-bûn -ông ê châi-hù kap tì-hūi iâⁿ-kè thian-hā chu-ông.
2Chronicles9:23 Thian-hā chu-ông lóng siūⁿ-beh lâi kìⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê bīn
2Chronicles9:24 In ta̍k-ê tòa chìn-kòng ê lé-mi̍h
2Chronicles9:25 Só͘-lô-bûn ū bé-tiâu sì-chheng keng
2Chronicles9:26 Só͘-lô-bûn koán-hat só͘-ū ê ông
2Chronicles9:27 Ông thóng-tī ê kî-kan
2Chronicles9:28 Ū lâng tùi Ai-ki̍p
2Chronicles9:29 Só͘-lô-bûn kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles9:30 Só͘-lô-bûn tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chòe Í-sek-lia̍t choân-kok ê ông
2Chronicles9:31 Só͘-lô-bûn tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Chronicles10:1 Lô-pho-an khì Sī-kiàm
2Chronicles10:2 Í-chêng Nî-pat ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lô-pho-an ūi-tio̍h siám-pī Só͘-lô-bûn -ông
2Chronicles10:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhe lâng khì chhiáⁿ i lâi; Iâ-lô-pho-an chiū kap Í-sek-lia̍t hōe-chiòng lâi kìⁿ Lô-pho-an
2Chronicles10:4 “Lí ê lāu-pē hō͘ goán pē tāng ê tàⁿ; kiû lí kiám-khin lí ê lāu-pē hē tī goán keng-thâu téng ê tāng-tàⁿ
2Chronicles10:5 Lô-pho-an kā in kóng
2Chronicles10:6 Lô-pho-an ê lāu-pē Só͘-lô-bûn iáu oa̍h--teh ê sî
2Chronicles10:7 In ìn i kóng
2Chronicles10:8 M̄-kú Lô-pho-an kū-choa̍t chiah-ê goân-ló hō͘ i ê kè-chhek
2Chronicles10:9 i kā in kóng
2Chronicles10:10 Hiah-ê kap i chòe-hé tōa-hàn ê siàu-liân-lâng kā i kóng
2Chronicles10:11 Góa ê lāu-pē hō͘ lín pē tāng ê tàⁿ
2Chronicles10:12 Iâ-lô-pho-an kap chèng jîn-bîn chiàu Lô-pho-an -ông ê ōe
2Chronicles10:13 Ông ēng pháiⁿ siaⁿ-sàu ìn jîn-bîn; i m̄ thiaⁿ goân-ló hō͘ i ê kiàn-gī
2Chronicles10:14 tian-tò chiàu siàu-liân-lâng ê ì-kiàn tùi jîn-bîn kóng
2Chronicles10:15 Ông m̄-khéng thiaⁿ jîn-bîn ê chhéng-kiû
2Chronicles10:16 Í-sek-lia̍t chèng jîn-bîn chi̍t-ē chai ông m̄-khéng thiaⁿ in ê chhéng-kiû
2Chronicles10:17 M̄-kú Lô-pho-an iû-goân chòe tòa tī lâm-pō͘ Iû-tāi tōe-khu ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê ông.
2Chronicles10:18 Lô-pho-an -ông phài kàm-tok kiông-chè-lô-kang ê A-to-lân khì Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hia; Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn ēng chio̍h-thâu kā i tìm-sí. Lô-pho-an -ông chiū kóaⁿ-kín chiūⁿ chiàn-chhia cháu tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
2Chronicles10:19 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles11:1 Lô-pho-an kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Chronicles11:2 M̄-kú Siōng Chú ê ōe lîm-kàu Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng Sī-má-ngá
2Chronicles11:3 “Lí khì kā Só͘-lô-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi -ông Lô-pho-an
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Lín m̄-thang khì kap lín ê hiaⁿ-tī kau-chiàn; ta̍k-ê lâng tò-khì ka-kī ê chhù
2Chronicles11:5 Lô-pho-an tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. I tī Iû-tāi -tōe khí kúi-nā ê kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ

2Chronicles11:9 A-to-lâi-im
2Chronicles11:10 Só-la

2Chronicles11:12 koh chún-pī tún-pâi kap chhiuⁿ
2Chronicles11:13 Í-sek-lia̍t choân-tōe ê chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng lóng tùi ta̍k só͘-chāi lâi kui-sūn Lô-pho-an.
2Chronicles11:14 Lī-bī -lâng hòng-khì in ê chháu-po͘ kap sán-gia̍p
2Chronicles11:15 Iâ-lô-pho-an ūi soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles11:16 Í-sek-lia̍t kok chi-cho̍k

2Chronicles11:18 Lô-pho-an chhōa Má-hap-la chòe bó͘; Má-hap-la ê lāu-pē sī Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ Iâ-lī-mô͘
2Chronicles11:19 Má-hap-la siⁿ saⁿ ê kiáⁿ
2Chronicles11:20 Āu-lâi Lô-pho-an koh chhōa Ap-sa-liông ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Má-ka chòe bó͘; i siⁿ sì ê kiáⁿ

2Chronicles11:23 Lô-pho-an chòe sū cheng-bêng
2Chronicles12:1 Lô-pho-an ê ông-kok chi̍t-ē ún-kò͘ kiông-sēng

2Chronicles12:3 Sī-sat ū chiàn-chhia chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah tâi
2Chronicles12:4 I kong-chhú Iû-tāi kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles12:5 Hit-sî
2Chronicles12:6 Í-sek-lia̍t hiah-ê léng-siù kap ông chiū khiam-pi jīn-chōe
2Chronicles12:7 Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-kìⁿ in ka-kī khiam-pi
2Chronicles12:8 M̄-kú in ōe chòe Sī-sat ê lô͘-po̍k
2Chronicles12:9 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles12:10 Lô-pho-an -ông chòe tâng ê tún-pâi tāi-thòe hiah-ê kim ê tún-pâi
2Chronicles12:11 Ông ta̍k-piàn ji̍p Siōng Chú ê tiān
2Chronicles12:12 Ông ka-kī khiam-pi ê sî
2Chronicles12:13 Lô-pho-an tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông
2Chronicles12:14 Lô-pho-an chòe siâ-ok ê sū; i bô kian-koat chhē-kiû Siōng Chú.
2Chronicles12:15 Lô-pho-an ê sū-chek
2Chronicles12:16 Lô-pho-an tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles13:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iâ-lô-pho-an tē-cha̍p-poeh nî
2Chronicles13:2 tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông saⁿ nî; i ê lāu-bú kiò-chòe Bí-kai-a
2Chronicles13:3 A-pí-ngá chhōa sì-cha̍p-bān cheng-peng chhut-chiàn. Iâ-lô-pho-an mā chhōa poeh-cha̍p-bān te̍k-soán ê peng gêng-chiàn.
2Chronicles13:4 A-pí-ngá khiā tī Í-hoat-liân soaⁿ-khu ê Sé-má-lián-soaⁿ
2Chronicles13:5 Lín eng-kai chai
2Chronicles13:6 M̄-kú Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê jîn-sîn
2Chronicles13:7 I chio-chi̍p chi̍t-kóa bô lō͘-ēng ê húi-lūi
2Chronicles13:8 Taⁿ lín khò lín lâng chōe
2Chronicles13:9 Lín kiám m̄-sī chiong Siōng Chú ê chè-si
2Chronicles13:10 “M̄-kú goán leh
2Chronicles13:11 Ta̍k-ji̍t chá-àm
2Chronicles13:12 Khòaⁿ leh
2Chronicles13:13 Iâ-lô-pho-an tiàu chi̍t-pō͘-hūn ê peng tī Iû-tāi -lâng ê āu-bīn bâi-ho̍k
2Chronicles13:14 Iû-tāi -lâng oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ
2Chronicles13:15 Iû-tāi -lâng chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah chìn-kong. In tōa-siaⁿ hoah ê sî
2Chronicles13:16 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Iû-tāi -lâng ê bīn-chêng tô-cháu; Siōng-tè chiong in kau tī Iû-tāi -lâng ê chhiú.
2Chronicles13:17 A-pí-ngá kap i ê kun-peng tōa sèng-lī; Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng te̍k-soán ê peng siū thâi-sí--ê ū gō͘-cha̍p-bān.
2Chronicles13:18 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siū chè-ho̍k; Iû-tāi -lâng tek-sèng
2Chronicles13:19 A-pí-ngá tui-jip Iâ-lô-pho-an
2Chronicles13:20 A-pí-ngá chāi-ūi ê sî
2Chronicles13:21 A-pí-ngá chiām-chiām kiông-sēng. I ū bó͘ cha̍p-sì ê
2Chronicles13:22 A-pí-ngá kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe
2Chronicles14:1 A-pí-ngá tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles14:2 A-sat chòe Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe hó
2Chronicles14:3 I hòe-tû gōa-pang sîn-bêng ê tôaⁿ kap soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles14:4 koh bēng-lēng Iû-tāi -lâng chhē-kiû Siōng Chú — in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè
2Chronicles14:5 koh tī Iû-tāi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ hòe-tû soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kap hiuⁿ-tâi. Tī A-sat tī-lí ê sî
2Chronicles14:6 I tī Iû-tāi khí kúi-nā chō kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles14:7 I tùi Iû-tāi -lâng kóng
2Chronicles14:8 A-sat ê kun-peng
2Chronicles14:9 Kó͘-si̍t -ông Siā-la chhōa kun-peng chi̍t-pah-bān
2Chronicles14:10 A-sat chhut-khì gêng-chiàn
2Chronicles14:11 A-sat kiû-kiò Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè kóng
2Chronicles14:12 Siōng Chú chiū phah Kó͘-si̍t -lâng
2Chronicles14:13 A-sat kap i ê kun-peng tui-jip in
2Chronicles14:14 In koh kong-táⁿ Ki-la-ní chiu-ûi ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles14:15 In phò-hoāi cheng-siⁿ ê tiâu
2Chronicles15:1 Siōng-tè ê sîn lîm-kàu Gô-tek ê kiáⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá.
2Chronicles15:2 I chiū khì kìⁿ A-sat
2Chronicles15:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng í-keng chin kú bô sìn chin Sîn

2Chronicles15:9 I koh chū-chi̍p Iû-tāi -lâng

2Chronicles15:11 Hit-ji̍t
2Chronicles15:12 In li̍p-iok
2Chronicles15:13 só͘-ū bô chhē-kiû Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè ê lâng
2Chronicles15:14 In chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoan-ho͘
2Chronicles15:15 Iû-tāi jîn-bîn lóng chin hoaⁿ-hí
2Chronicles15:16 A-sat -ông hòe-tû i ê a-má Má-ka thài-hō͘ ê ūi
2Chronicles15:17 Sui-jiân hiah-ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē tùi Í-sek-lia̍t tiong tû--khì
2Chronicles15:18 I chiong i ê lāu-pē kap i pún-sin hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê kim
2Chronicles15:19 Tùi hit-sî kàu A-sat choh-ông tē-saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ nî
2Chronicles16:1 A-sat choh-ông tē-saⁿ-cha̍p-la̍k nî
2Chronicles16:2 A-sat chiū tùi Siōng Chú sèng-tiān kap ông-kiong ê hú-khò͘ the̍h kim gûn
2Chronicles16:3 “Lán lâi kiat-bêng
2Chronicles16:4 Piān Hap-ta̍t tông-ì A-sat -ông ê ōe

2Chronicles16:7 Hit-sî
2Chronicles16:8 Kó͘-si̍t -lâng kap Lī-pí-a -lâng ê kun-tūi kiám m̄-sī chin kiông-tāi? In ê chiàn-chhia kap bé-peng kiám m̄-sī chin chōe? M̄-kú in-ūi lí óa-khò Siōng Chú
2Chronicles16:9 Siōng Chú ê ba̍k-chiu teh sûn-sī choân-tōe; só͘-ū choan-sim kui-ǹg I--ê
2Chronicles16:10 A-sat thiaⁿ-liáu hui-siông siū-khì
2Chronicles16:11 A-sat ê sū-chek

2Chronicles16:13 A-sat choh-ông sì-cha̍p-it nî chiū sí
2Chronicles16:14 an-chòng tī Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ
2Chronicles17:1 Iok-sa-hoat sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē A-sat chòe Iû-tāi -ông
2Chronicles17:2 I phài kun-tūi chū-chāi tī Iû-tāi hiah-ê kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles17:3 Siōng Chú kap Iok-sa-hoat tông-chāi
2Chronicles17:4 chí-ū ho̍k-sāi i ê lāu-pē ê Siōng-tè
2Chronicles17:5 Só͘-í Siōng Chú kian-kò͘ Iok-sa-hoat ê thóng-tī; Iû-tāi jîn-bîn hiàn lé-mi̍h hō͘ i. I chiū ū chin chōe châi-hù koh chin siū lâng chun-kèng.
2Chronicles17:6 I ióng-kám kiâⁿ Siōng Chú ê tō-lō͘; koh tùi Iû-tāi hòe-tû soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kap A-sià-la lú-sîn ê thiāu-siōng.
2Chronicles17:7 I choh-ông tē-saⁿ nî phài i ê jîn-sîn Piān Hâi-i-le̍k
2Chronicles17:8 Kap in chòe-hé khì--ê ū Lī-bī -lâng Sī-má-ngá
2Chronicles17:9 In tòa Siōng Chú lu̍t-hoat ê chheh
2Chronicles17:10 Iû-tāi chiu-ûi lia̍t-kok lóng chin kiaⁿ Siōng Chú
2Chronicles17:11 Hui-lī-sū -lâng ū-ê chìn-kòng gûn hō͘ Iok-sa-hoat; A-la-pek -lâng koh sàng mî-iûⁿ-káng kap soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng kok chhit-chheng chhit-pah chiah.
2Chronicles17:12 Iok-sa-hoat jú lâi jú kiông-sēng
2Chronicles17:13 I tī Iû-tāi ê siâⁿ ū chòe chin chōe kang-thêng; koh tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ū ióng-béng ê chiàn-sū.
2Chronicles17:14 In ê sò͘-bo̍k
2Chronicles17:15 tē-jī ê sī Iok-hap-lân
2Chronicles17:16 tē-saⁿ ê sī Sè-ki-lī ê kiáⁿ A-má-su-ngá
2Chronicles17:17 Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k ê ióng-béng chiàn-sū Í-lī-ngá-tāi
2Chronicles17:18 tē-jī ê sī Iok-sat-poa̍t
2Chronicles17:19 Chiah-ê lóng teh sū-hāu ông; lēng-gōa iáu ū ông phài-chū tī Iû-tāi kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ ê kun-tūi.
2Chronicles18:1 Iok-sa-hoat ū chin chōe châi-hù koh chin siū chun-kèng; i kap Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap kiat-chhin.
2Chronicles18:2 Kè kúi-nā nî
2Chronicles18:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap tùi Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat kóng
2Chronicles18:4 Iok-sa-hoat koh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kóng
2Chronicles18:5 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū tiàu-chi̍p sian-ti sì-pah lâng
2Chronicles18:6 Iok-sa-hoat kóng
2Chronicles18:7 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kā Iok-sa-hoat kóng
2Chronicles18:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông chiū tiàu chi̍t ê koaⁿ-oân lâi
2Chronicles18:9 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kap Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat tī Sat-má-lī-a siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu ê ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ
2Chronicles18:10 Ki-ná-ná ê kiáⁿ Se-tí-ka chòe thih ê kak
2Chronicles18:11 Só͘-ū ê sian-ti lóng án-ni ū-giân kóng
2Chronicles18:12 Hit-ê khì kiò Bí-kai-ngá ê sù-chiá kā i kóng
2Chronicles18:13 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
2Chronicles18:14 Bí-kai-ngá lâi kàu ông ê bīn-chêng
2Chronicles18:15 Ông tùi i kóng
2Chronicles18:16 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
2Chronicles18:17 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
2Chronicles18:18 Bí-kai-ngá kè-sio̍k kóng
2Chronicles18:19 Siōng Chú kóng
2Chronicles18:20 Āu-lâi ū chi̍t ê sîn chhut--lâi
2Chronicles18:21 I ìn kóng
2Chronicles18:22 Hiān-chāi Siōng Chú ū hō͘ pe̍h-chha̍t ê sîn ji̍p tī lí chiah-ê sian-ti ê chhùi; Siōng Chú soan-pò͘ beh kàng chai-hō hō͘ lí.”
2Chronicles18:23 Ki-ná-ná ê kiáⁿ Se-tí-ka kiâⁿ chìn-chêng
2Chronicles18:24 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
2Chronicles18:25 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông kóng
2Chronicles18:26 kā in kóng
2Chronicles18:27 Bí-kai-ngá kóng
2Chronicles18:28 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông A-hap kap Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat khì chìn-kong Ki-lia̍t ê La-boa̍t.
2Chronicles18:29 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông tùi Iok-sa-hoat kóng
2Chronicles18:30 Sū-lī-a -ông ū hoan-hù i ê chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ kóng
2Chronicles18:31 Chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-sa-hoat chiū kóng
2Chronicles18:32 Chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h i m̄-sī Í-sek-lia̍t -ông
2Chronicles18:33 Ū chi̍t ê Sū-lī-a ê peng-á khui keng
2Chronicles18:34 Hit-ji̍t
2Chronicles19:1 Iû-tāi -ông Iok-sa-hoat pêng-an tò-khì kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê ông-kiong.
2Chronicles19:2 Hap-ná-nî ê kiáⁿ sian-kiàn Iâ-hō͘ chhut-lâi gêng-chiap Iok-sa-hoat -ông
2Chronicles19:3 M̄-kú lí iáu ū hó ê piáu-hiān; lí ū tùi chit-ê kok-ka hòe-tû A-sià-la lú-sîn ê thiāu-siōng
2Chronicles19:4 Iok-sa-hoat tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; āu-lâi koh khì bîn-kan sûn-sī
2Chronicles19:5 I tī Iû-tāi choân-tōe ta̍k-ê kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ siat-li̍p sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ.
2Chronicles19:6 I tùi hiah-ê sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ kóng
2Chronicles19:7 Taⁿ lín tio̍h kiaⁿ-ùi Siōng Chú
2Chronicles19:8 Iok-sa-hoat tùi Lī-bī -lâng
2Chronicles19:9 I koh bēng-lēng in kóng
2Chronicles19:10 Tòa tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ ê tông-pau nā ū hun-cheng lâi chhē lín
2Chronicles19:11 Taⁿ
2Chronicles20:1 Kè bô jōa kú

2Chronicles20:4 Iû-tāi -lâng chiū chū-chi̍p

2Chronicles20:18 Iok-sa-hoat àⁿ-thâu phak tī thô͘-kha; Iû-tāi chèng-lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn mā phak tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng

2Chronicles20:21 I kap jîn-bîn chham-siông liáu-āu
2Chronicles20:22 In chi̍t-ē chhiùⁿ-koa hoan-ho͘ ê sî

2Chronicles20:24 Iû-tāi -lâng kàu khòng-iá ê siú-bōng-tâi
2Chronicles20:25 Iok-sa-hoat kap i ê kun-peng lâi chhiau chiàn-lī-phín
2Chronicles20:26 Tē-sì ji̍t
2Chronicles20:27 Iok-sa-hoat chhōa Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Chronicles20:28 In tôaⁿ-khîm

2Chronicles20:30 Án-ni Iok-sa-hoat ê kok thài-pêng

2Chronicles20:32 Iok-sa-hoat kiâⁿ i lāu-pē A-sat ê lō͘
2Chronicles20:33 M̄-kú soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ iáu-bē hòe-tû
2Chronicles20:34 Iok-sa-hoat kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles20:35 Āu-lâi
