2Chronicles20:37 Hit-sî
2Chronicles21:1 Iok-sa-hoat tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles21:2 Iok-lân ū kúi-nā ê sió-tī
2Chronicles21:3 In ê lāu-pē ēng chin chōe kim
2Chronicles21:4 Iok-lân chi̍t-ē khí-lâi tī-lí i lāu-pē ê kok
2Chronicles21:5 Iok-lân chē-ūi ê sî saⁿ-cha̍p-jī hè
2Chronicles21:6 I kiâⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t chu-ông ê lō͘
2Chronicles21:7 M̄-kú Siōng Chú in-ūi I kap Tāi-pi̍t só͘ li̍p ê iok
2Chronicles21:8 Iok-lân choh-ông ê sî
2Chronicles21:9 Iok-lân chiū chhōa i ê kun-koaⁿ kap só͘-ū ê chiàn-chhia kè--khì. Í-tong -lâng kā in pau-ûi. Mî--sî Iok-lân kap chiàn-chhia-tiúⁿ khí-lâi hoán-kek.
2Chronicles21:10 Án-ni Í-tong -lâng pōe-poān Iû-tāi
2Chronicles21:11 I koh tī Iû-tāi ê soaⁿ khí soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles21:12 Sian-ti Í-lī-a siá-phoe hō͘ Iok-lân
2Chronicles21:13 tian-tò khì kiâⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t chu-ông ê lō͘
2Chronicles21:14 Só͘-í Siōng Chú beh kàng tōa chai-hō phah lí ê jîn-bîn
2Chronicles21:15 Lí ê tn̂g-á beh hoān-tio̍h tāng-pīⁿ
2Chronicles21:16 Siōng Chú kek-tōng Hui-lī-sū -lâng kap óa-kūn Kó͘-si̍t ê A-la-pek -lâng
2Chronicles21:17 In chiūⁿ-lâi kong-kek Iû-tāi
2Chronicles21:18 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu Siōng Chú phah Iok-lân
2Chronicles21:19 Án-ni thoa nn̄g nî
2Chronicles21:20 Iok-lân chē-ūi ê sî saⁿ-cha̍p-jī hè
2Chronicles22:1 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn siat-li̍p Iok-lân ê soah-bé-kiáⁿ A-hap-siā sòa-chiap i choh-ông; in-ūi kap A-la-pek -lâng chòe-hé lâi kong-siâⁿ ê kun-tūi
2Chronicles22:2 A-hap-siā chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-jī hè
2Chronicles22:3 I mā kiâⁿ A-hap -ke ê lō͘; in-ūi i ê lāu-bú kà i chòe pháiⁿ.
2Chronicles22:4 I chhin-chhiūⁿ A-hap -ke chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū; in-ūi i ê lāu-pē sí liáu-āu
2Chronicles22:5 I chiap-siū in ê kè-chhek
2Chronicles22:6 Iok-hô-lân tò-khì Iâ-su-lia̍t
2Chronicles22:7 A-hap-siā lâi khòaⁿ Iok-hô-lân
2Chronicles22:8 Iâ-hō͘ teh chip-hêng Siōng-tè ê sím-phòaⁿ
2Chronicles22:9 A-hap-siā bih tī Sat-má-lī-a
2Chronicles22:10 A-hap-siā ê lāu-bú A-tha-lī-ngá chi̍t-ē chai i ê kiáⁿ siū sat-hāi
2Chronicles22:11 M̄-kú Iok-lân -ông ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ Iok-sī-pa
2Chronicles22:12 A-tha-lī-ngá tī-lí Iû-tāi -kok ê sî
2Chronicles23:1 Tē-chhit nî
2Chronicles23:2 In kiâⁿ-thàu Iû-tāi
2Chronicles23:3 Só͘-ū ê hōe-chiòng tī Siōng-tè ê tiān kap ông li̍p-iok. Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi tùi in kóng
2Chronicles23:4 Taⁿ
2Chronicles23:5 saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t kò͘-siú ông-kiong
2Chronicles23:6 Só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn lóng m̄-thang chìn-ji̍p Siōng Chú ê tiān; chí-ū chè-si kap teh ho̍k-sāi ê Lī-bī -lâng thang ji̍p--khì
2Chronicles23:7 Lī-bī -lâng tio̍h tòa kun-khì
2Chronicles23:8 Lī-bī -lâng kap Iû-tāi chèng-lâng
2Chronicles23:9 Chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi chiū chiong khǹg tī Siōng-tè sèng-tiān lāi-bīn Tāi-pi̍t -ông ê chhiuⁿ kap tōa sòe tún-pâi
2Chronicles23:10 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi koh chiong kun-khì pun hō͘ jîn-bîn; in tī chè-tôaⁿ kap sèng-tiān hia
2Chronicles23:11 In chiū chhōa Iok-a-si chhut--lâi
2Chronicles23:12 A-tha-lī-ngá thiaⁿ-tio̍h jîn-bîn ná cháu ná o-ló ông ê siaⁿ
2Chronicles23:13 khòaⁿ-tio̍h ông khiā tī sèng-tiān ji̍p-kháu ê thiāu-piⁿ
2Chronicles23:14 Chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi chhōa hiah-ê koán chi̍t-pah ê peng ê kun-koaⁿ chhut--lâi
2Chronicles23:15 In siám-khui siang-pêng hō͘ A-tha-lī-ngá kè--khì; i kàu chìn-ji̍p ông-kiong ê Bé-mn̂g
2Chronicles23:16 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi kap ông í-ki̍p jîn-bîn chòe-hé li̍p-iok
2Chronicles23:17 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles23:18 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi phài Lī-bī -lâng chòe chè-si--ê hū-chek kò͘-siú Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān. Chiah-ê chè-si sī chiàu Tāi-pi̍t í-chêng ê kui-tēng
2Chronicles23:19 I mā phài lâng kò͘-siú Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ta̍k-ê mn̂g; bô-lūn sím-mi̍h iân-kò͘
2Chronicles23:20 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi koh chhōa kun-koaⁿ kap kùi-cho̍k
2Chronicles23:21 Choân-kok jîn-bîn lóng hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k
2Chronicles24:1 Iok-a-si choh-ông ê sî chiah chhit hè
2Chronicles24:2 Chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi oa̍h--teh ê sî
2Chronicles24:3 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi kā i chhōa nn̄g ê bó͘
2Chronicles24:4 Āu-lâi Iok-a-si koat-tēng beh chéng-siu Siōng Chú ê tiān
2Chronicles24:5 chiū tiàu-chi̍p chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng
2Chronicles24:6 Ông tiàu in ê léng-siù Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi lâi
2Chronicles24:7 In-ūi hit-ê pháiⁿ hū-jîn-lâng A-tha-lī-ngá kap tè-i--ê bat chhim-ji̍p Siōng-tè ê tiān
2Chronicles24:8 Ông chiū bēng-lēng lâng chòe chi̍t ê hōng-hiàn-kūi
2Chronicles24:9 I koh tùi Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê jîn-bîn soan-pò͘
2Chronicles24:10 Só͘-ū ê siú-léng kap jîn-bîn lóng hoaⁿ-hí tòa-lâi lok tī hōng-hiàn-kūi
2Chronicles24:11 Lī-bī -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h hōng-hiàn-kūi í-keng tīⁿ
2Chronicles24:12 Ông kap Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi chiong chîⁿ kau hō͘ kàm-tok chéng-siu Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê lâng; in chiū chhiàⁿ phah-chio̍h
2Chronicles24:13 Chòe-kang ê lâng lóng jīn-chin chòe-kang
2Chronicles24:14 Oân-kang liáu-āu
2Chronicles24:15 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi nî-lāu
2Chronicles24:16 Lâng chiong i kap lia̍t-ông chòe-hé an-chòng tī Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ; in-ūi i tī Í-sek-lia̍t tiong ūi Siōng-tè kap Siōng-tè ê tiān ū chin tōa ê kòng-hiàn.
2Chronicles24:17 Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi sí-liáu
2Chronicles24:18 Ông kap chèng siú-léng pàng-sak Siōng Chú — in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè ê tiān
2Chronicles24:19 Sui-jiân Siōng Chú chhe sian-ti khì in hia beh chhōa in kui-ǹg Siōng Chú; sian-ti kā in kéng-kò
2Chronicles24:20 Hit-sî Siōng-tè ê sîn lîm-kàu chè-si Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi ê kiáⁿ Sat-ka-lī-a; i khiā tī koân ê só͘-chāi tùi jîn-bîn kóng
2Chronicles24:21 In kiōng-bô͘ beh hāi Sat-ka-lī-a
2Chronicles24:22 Iok-a-si -ông bô tài-liām Sat-ka-lī-a ê lāu-pē Iâ-hô-iâ-tāi tùi i ê un-chêng
2Chronicles24:23 Nî-bé
2Chronicles24:24 Sū-lī-a ê kun-peng chí-ū chi̍t sió-tūi ê lâng
2Chronicles24:25 Iok-a-si siū tāng-siong. Sū-lī-a ê kun-peng thiat-thè liáu-āu
2Chronicles24:26 Pōe-poān i--ê sī A-bûn ê hū-jîn-lâng Sī-bí-ap ê kiáⁿ Sat-poa̍t
2Chronicles24:27 Iú-koan Iok-a-si hiah-ê kiáⁿ
2Chronicles25:1 A-má-siā chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Chronicles25:2 A-má-siā chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Chronicles25:3 I ê ông-koân chi̍t-ē kian-kò͘
2Chronicles25:4 M̄-kú i bô thâi-sí hiah-ê jîn-sîn ê kiáⁿ-jî
2Chronicles25:5 A-má-siā tiàu-chi̍p Iû-tāi jîn-bîn
2Chronicles25:6 I koh ēng saⁿ-chheng sì-pah kong-kun ê gûn
2Chronicles25:7 Ū chi̍t ê Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng lâi kìⁿ i kóng
2Chronicles25:8 Lí nā it-tēng beh án-ni chòe
2Chronicles25:9 A-má-siā mn̄g Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng kóng
2Chronicles25:10 A-má-siā chiū kái-sàn tùi pak-kok Í-sek-lia̍t lâi ê kun-peng
2Chronicles25:11 A-má-siā kian-kiông--khí-lâi
2Chronicles25:12 Iû-tāi -lâng koh oa̍h-lia̍h chi̍t-bān lâng
2Chronicles25:13 Hiah-ê hō͘ A-má-siā kái-sàn ê Í-sek-lia̍t kun-peng
2Chronicles25:14 A-má-siā thâi-iâⁿ Í-tong -lâng tò--lâi
2Chronicles25:15 In-ūi án-ni
2Chronicles25:16 I kap ông kóng-ōe ê sî
2Chronicles25:17 Hit-sî
2Chronicles25:18 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si phài sù-chiá khì kā Iû-tāi -ông A-má-siā kóng
2Chronicles25:19 Lí í-keng thâi-iâⁿ Í-tong
2Chronicles25:20 M̄-kú A-má-siā thiaⁿ bōe lo̍h--khì; chit-ê tāi-chì sī chhut tī Siōng-tè
2Chronicles25:21 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles25:22 Iû-tāi hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t phah-pāi
2Chronicles25:23 Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si tī hia lia̍h-tio̍h Iû-tāi -ông A-má-siā
2Chronicles25:24 Iok-hôa-si chiong ông-kiong ê châi-pó
2Chronicles25:25 Iok-hap-su ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Iok-hôa-si sí-liáu
2Chronicles25:26 A-má-siā kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles25:27 Tùi A-má-siā phian-lī bô tè Siōng Chú liáu-āu
2Chronicles25:28 Lâng ēng bé chài i ê si-thé tò--lâi
2Chronicles26:1 Iû-tāi ê jîn-bîn siat-li̍p O͘-se-a sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē A-má-siā choh-ông
2Chronicles26:2 A-má-siā -ông tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia liáu-āu
2Chronicles26:3 O͘-se-a chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-la̍k hè
2Chronicles26:4 O͘-se-a chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Chronicles26:5 Kàu-tō lâng kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê Sat-ka-lī-a chāi-sè ê sî
2Chronicles26:6 I chhut-khì kong-kek Hui-lī-sū -lâng
2Chronicles26:7 Siōng-tè pang-chān i phah-pāi Hui-lī-sū -lâng
2Chronicles26:8 A-bûn -lâng kā O͘-se-a chìn-kòng; O͘-se-a ê miâ-siaⁿ thàu kàu Ai-ki̍p
2Chronicles26:9 O͘-se-a tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Kak-mn̂g
2Chronicles26:10 I tī khòng-iá khí siú-bōng-tâi
2Chronicles26:11 O͘-se-a ū chin chōe hùn-liān-iú-sò͘ ê kun-tūi; in lóng keng-kè su-kì Iâ-lī kap hù-koaⁿ Má-se-ngá tiám-sǹg
2Chronicles26:12 Chiah-ê ióng-béng chiàn-sū ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ ū nn̄g-chheng la̍k-pah lâng.
2Chronicles26:13 Tī in ê chhiú-ē ū kun-peng saⁿ-cha̍p-bān chhit-chheng gō͘-pah lâng
2Chronicles26:14 O͘-se-a ūi-tio̍h choân-kun chún-pī tún-pâi
2Chronicles26:15 I koh tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chhiáⁿ gâu ê sai-hū siat-kè ki-khì
2Chronicles26:16 O͘-se-a kiông-sēng liáu-āu sim chiū kiau-ngō͘
2Chronicles26:17 Chè-si A-sat-lī-ngá chhōa Siōng Chú ióng-kám ê chè-si poeh-cha̍p lâng tè O͘-se-a ji̍p--khì
2Chronicles26:18 chó͘-tòng ông
2Chronicles26:19 O͘-se-a chhiú the̍h hiuⁿ-lô͘ beh sio-hiuⁿ
2Chronicles26:20 Tōa-chè-si A-sat-lī-ngá kap só͘-ū ê chè-si khòaⁿ-tio̍h i thâu-hia̍h khí bâ-hong
2Chronicles26:21 O͘-se-a -ông tì-tio̍h bâ-hong kàu i sí ê ji̍t
2Chronicles26:22 O͘-se-a kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles26:23 O͘-se-a tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia; lâng kóng “I tì-tio̍h bâ-hong”
2Chronicles27:1 Iok-thán chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Chronicles27:2 Iok-thán chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Chronicles27:3 Iok-thán khí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê Siōng-mn̂g
2Chronicles27:4 koh tī Iû-tāi soaⁿ-tōe khí siâⁿ
2Chronicles27:5 I kap A-bûn -lâng ê ông kau-chiàn
2Chronicles27:6 Iok-thán chiām-chiām kiông-sēng
2Chronicles27:7 Iok-thán kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles27:8 I chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Chronicles27:9 Iok-thán tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles28:1 A-hap-su chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p hè
2Chronicles28:2 tian-tò khì kiâⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t hiah-ê ông ê lō͘
2Chronicles28:3 tī Him-lūn-chú Soaⁿ-kok sio-hiuⁿ
2Chronicles28:4 koh tī soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles28:5 A-hap-su hoān-chōe
2Chronicles28:6 Lī-má-lī ê kiáⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Pí-ka chi̍t ji̍t ê tiong-kan thâi-sí cha̍p-jī-bān ê Iû-tāi cheng-peng; in-ūi in khì-sak Siōng Chú — in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè.
2Chronicles28:7 Ū chi̍t ê Í-sek-lia̍t ê ióng-sū Sè-ki-lī
2Chronicles28:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lia̍h in ê hiaⁿ-tī Iû-tāi -lâng
2Chronicles28:9 Tī Sat-má-lī-a
2Chronicles28:10 Taⁿ lín siūⁿ-beh kiông-pek chiah-ê Iû-tāi -lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -lâng
2Chronicles28:11 Tio̍h thiaⁿ góa kóng
2Chronicles28:12 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles28:13 tùi in kóng
2Chronicles28:14 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles28:15 Téng-bīn hit sì ê léng-siù chiū khí--lâi
2Chronicles28:16 Hit-sî
2Chronicles28:17 in-ūi Í-tong -lâng koh lâi phah Iû-tāi
2Chronicles28:18 Hui-lī-sū -lâng mā lâi chhim-hoān sai-pêng soaⁿ-po͘ kap Iû-tāi lâm-pêng ê siâⁿ-tìn
2Chronicles28:19 Siōng Chú ūi-tio̍h Iû-tāi -ông A-hap-su ê iân-kò͘
2Chronicles28:20 A-su̍t -ông Thê-kek-la Pí-lia̍t-sek chiūⁿ--lâi
2Chronicles28:21 A-hap-su tùi Siōng Chú ê tiān
2Chronicles28:22 A-hap-su chit-ê ông tī gûi-kip ê sî
2Chronicles28:23 I hiàn-chè hō͘ phah i ê Tāi-má-sū-kek ê sîn-bêng; i kóng
2Chronicles28:24 A-hap-su chiong Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê khì-khū lóng chi̍p óa--lâi
2Chronicles28:25 I koh tī Iû-tāi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ khí soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles28:26 A-hap-su kî-tha ê sū-chek kap i ê só͘-chòe
2Chronicles28:27 A-hap-su tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles29:1 Hi-se-ka chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Chronicles29:2 Hi-se-ka chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Chronicles29:3 Hi-se-ka choh-ông hit-nî ê chiaⁿ--ge̍h
2Chronicles29:4 I tiàu-chi̍p hiah-ê chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng lâi sèng-tiān tang-pêng ê kóng-tiûⁿ
2Chronicles29:5 tùi in kóng
2Chronicles29:6 In-ūi lán ê chó͘-sian ū hoān-chōe
2Chronicles29:7 In koh koaiⁿ sèng-tiān cháu-lông ê mn̂g
2Chronicles29:8 Só͘-í Siōng Chú ê tōa siū-khì lîm-kàu Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
2Chronicles29:9 Só͘-í
2Chronicles29:10 Hiān-chāi
2Chronicles29:11 Góa ê kiáⁿ ah
2Chronicles29:12 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles29:13 Í-lī-sat-hoán chong-cho̍k: Sin-lī kap Iâ-lī A-sat chong-cho̍k: Sat-ka-lī-a kap Má-tha-nî
2Chronicles29:14 Hi-bān chong-cho̍k: Iâ-hiat kap Sī-múi Iâ-tō͘-tùn chong-cho̍k: Sī-má-ngá kap O͘-siat
2Chronicles29:15 In chio-chi̍p in ê chhin-cho̍k kiat-chēng ka-kī
2Chronicles29:16 Chè-si chiū ji̍p-khì kiat-chēng Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
2Chronicles29:17 Kiat-chēng sèng-tiān ê kang-chok tùi chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-it khai-sí
2Chronicles29:18 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles29:19 A-hap-su choh-ông hoān-chōe ê sî só͘ khì-sak ê khì-khū
2Chronicles29:20 Hi-se-ka -ông thàu-chá khí--lâi
2Chronicles29:21 In khan chhit chiah gû-káng
2Chronicles29:22 Chè-si seng thâi gû-káng
2Chronicles29:23 Chòe-āu
2Chronicles29:24 Chè-si thâi hiah-ê soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng
2Chronicles29:25 Hi-se-ka chiàu Siōng Chú thong-kè Tāi-pi̍t -ông
2Chronicles29:26 Lī-bī -lâng the̍h Tāi-pi̍t ê ga̍k-khì
2Chronicles29:27 Hi-se-ka bēng-lēng tī chè-tôaⁿ hiàn sio-hòa-chè. Sio-hòa-chè chi̍t-ē hiàn
2Chronicles29:28 Hōe-chiòng lóng kèng-pài
2Chronicles29:29 Hiàn-chè kiat-sok
2Chronicles29:30 Hi-se-ka -ông kap hiah-ê léng-siù koh bēng-lēng Lī-bī -lâng
2Chronicles29:31 Hi-se-ka tùi hōe-chiòng kóng
2Chronicles29:32 Hōe-chiòng só͘ hiàn ê sio-hòa-chè ū gû-káng chhit-cha̍p chiah
2Chronicles29:33 Koh ū hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng ê mi̍h
2Chronicles29:34 M̄-kú chè-si siuⁿ chió
2Chronicles29:35 Sio-hòa-chè kap pêng-an-chè ê iû
2Chronicles29:36 Hi-se-ka kap choân-thé jîn-bîn lóng chin hoaⁿ-hí
2Chronicles30:1 Hi-se-ka phài lâng khì Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi ta̍k só͘-chāi
2Chronicles30:2 In-ūi ông kap i ê koaⁿ-oân
2Chronicles30:3 Chiaⁿ--ge̍h in bōe-tàng siú-choeh
2Chronicles30:4 Ông kap hōe-chiòng lóng chàn-sêng chit-ê kè-ōe
2Chronicles30:5 chiū tī Í-sek-lia̍t choân-tōe
2Chronicles30:6 Sàng-phoe ê lâng tòa ông kap i hiah-ê koaⁿ-oân ê phoe
2Chronicles30:7 Lín m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê lia̍t-chó͘ kap lín ê tông-pau. Chiàu lín só͘ chai
2Chronicles30:8 Taⁿ m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê lia̍t-chó͘ ngī-sim kò͘-chip; tio̍h kui-sūn Siōng Chú
2Chronicles30:9 Lín nā kui-ǹg Siōng Chú
2Chronicles30:10 Sàng-phoe ê lâng chi̍t-siâⁿ kè chi̍t-siâⁿ
2Chronicles30:11 A-siat
2Chronicles30:12 Siōng-tè mā kám-tōng Iû-tāi -lâng
2Chronicles30:13 Jī--ge̍h
2Chronicles30:14 In chiong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hiàn-chè sio-hiuⁿ ê tôaⁿ lóng sóa-cháu
2Chronicles30:15 Jī-ge̍h cha̍p-sì
2Chronicles30:16 In chiàu Siōng-tè tiōng-iōng ê lâng Mô͘-se ê lu̍t-hoat ê kui-tēng
2Chronicles30:17 Hōe-tiong ū chin chōe lâng lé-gî-siōng bô chheng-khì
2Chronicles30:18 Tùi Í-hoat-liân
2Chronicles30:19 só͘-ū bô chiàu kui-tēng kiat-chēng ka-kī ê lâng
2Chronicles30:20 Siōng Chú thiaⁿ Hi-se-ka ê kî-tó
2Chronicles30:21 Tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí
2Chronicles30:22 Hi-se-ka kó͘-lē só͘-ū gâu ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú ê Lī-bī -lâng. Chèng-lâng chia̍h iàn-se̍k chhit ji̍t
2Chronicles30:23 Tāi-hōe choân-thé hōe-chiòng koat-tēng beh koh siú-choeh chhit ji̍t. In chiū hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí koh khèng-chiok chhit ji̍t.
2Chronicles30:24 Iû-tāi -ông Hi-se-ka sàng tāi-hōe gû-káng chi̍t-chheng chiah
2Chronicles30:25 Iû-tāi hōe-chiòng
2Chronicles30:26 Án-ni
2Chronicles30:27 Chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng khí-lâi kā jîn-bîn chiok-hok; in ê siaⁿ Siōng-tè ū thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
2Chronicles31:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì kiat-sok liáu
2Chronicles31:2 Hi-se-ka chiàu ta̍k-ê chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng ê chit-bū têng-sin cho͘-chit in ê pan-chhù
2Chronicles31:3 Ông koh tùi i ê sán-gia̍p hōng-hiàn gû iûⁿ chòe sio-hòa-chè; chiū-sī tī ta̍k-ji̍t chá-àm
2Chronicles31:4 Hi-se-ka bēng-lēng Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn kiong-kip chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng eng-kai tit--tio̍h ê hūn-gia̍h
2Chronicles31:5 Bēng-lēng chi̍t-ē chhut
2Chronicles31:6 Tòa tī Iû-tāi ê siâⁿ ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Iû-tāi -lâng
2Chronicles31:7 Tùi saⁿ--ge̍h khí
2Chronicles31:8 Hi-se-ka kap chèng siú-léng khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê tún-chek ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
2Chronicles31:9 Hi-se-ka tùi chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng chhâ-mn̄g koan-hē hiah-ê tún-chek ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ ê tāi-chì.
2Chronicles31:10 Sat-tok ê hō͘-tāi tōa-chè-si A-sat-lī-ngá ìn kóng
2Chronicles31:11 Hi-se-ka bēng-lēng tio̍h tī Siōng Chú ê tiān-lāi chún-pī chhng-khò͘
2Chronicles31:12 In sêng-si̍t chiong lé-mi̍h kap cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t ê hōng-hiàn
2Chronicles31:13 Hi-se-ka -ông kap koán-lí Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê A-sat-lī-ngá phài Iâ-hiat
2Chronicles31:14 Sèng-tiān Tang-mn̂g ê siú-ōe Lī-bī -lâng Im-ná ê kiáⁿ Khó-lī
2Chronicles31:15 Tī chè-si ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles31:16 Ū teng-lio̍k tī ka-phó͘ saⁿ-cha̍p hè í-siōng ê ta-po͘-lâng
2Chronicles31:17 In koh pun hō͘ chiàu chong-cho̍k teng-lio̍k tī ka-phó͘ ê chè-si
2Chronicles31:18 In koh pun hō͘ choân-thé hōe-chiòng tiong-kan teng-lio̍k tī ka-phó͘
2Chronicles31:19 Koh ūi-tio̍h tòa tī siâⁿ-gōa chháu-po͘ ê A-lûn hō͘-tāi ê chè-si
2Chronicles31:20 Hi-se-ka tī Iû-tāi choân-tōe lóng án-ni pān-lí; i chòe Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe hó
2Chronicles31:21 I só͘ chòe--ê
2Chronicles32:1 Hi-se-ka tiong-sêng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu
2Chronicles32:2 Hi-se-ka khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Se-ná-ki-li̍p í-keng lâi
2Chronicles32:3 chiū kap hiah-ê siú-léng í-ki̍p ióng-sū chham-siông
2Chronicles32:4 Chin chōe jîn-bîn chū-chi̍p
2Chronicles32:5 Hi-se-ka hùn-hoat
2Chronicles32:6 Hi-se-ka ū siat-li̍p kun-sū chiòng-léng koán-lí jîn-bîn; i tiàu-chi̍p in lâi siâⁿ-mn̂g ê kóng-tiûⁿ
2Chronicles32:7 “Tio̍h kian-kiông ióng-kám
2Chronicles32:8 kap in tông-chāi--ê sī jio̍k-thé ê chhiú-kut
2Chronicles32:9 Āu-lâi
2Chronicles32:10 “ A-su̍t -ông Se-ná-ki-li̍p án-ni kóng
2Chronicles32:11 Hi-se-ka kóng
2Chronicles32:12 Chit-ê Hi-se-ka kiám m̄-sī ū hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kap chè-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles32:13 Lín kiám m̄ chai góa kap góa ê lia̍t-chó͘ án-chóaⁿ tùi-hù lia̍t-kok ê jîn-bîn? Bān-kok ê chèng sîn-bêng kiám bat kiù ka-kī ê kok thoat-lī góa ê chhiú?
2Chronicles32:14 Góa ê lia̍t-chó͘ siau-bia̍t ê kok-ka
2Chronicles32:15 Só͘-í
2Chronicles32:16 Se-ná-ki-li̍p ê jîn-sîn kóng chin chōe siat-to̍k Chú Siōng-tè kap I ê po̍k-jîn Hi-se-ka ê ōe.
2Chronicles32:17 Se-ná-ki-li̍p koh siá-phoe pòng-to̍k Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
2Chronicles32:18 Se-ná-ki-li̍p ê jîn-sîn ēng Iû-tāi-ōe
2Chronicles32:19 In tâm-lūn Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Siōng-tè
2Chronicles32:20 Hi-se-ka -ông kap A-mô͘-su ê kiáⁿ sian-ti Í-sài-a ūi-tio̍h chit-ê sū kî-tó
2Chronicles32:21 Siōng Chú chiū chhe chi̍t ê sù-chiá ji̍p A-su̍t -ông ê iâⁿ-tiong
2Chronicles32:22 Án-ni
2Chronicles32:23 Chit-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
2Chronicles32:24 Hit-ê sî-chūn
2Chronicles32:25 M̄-kú Hi-se-ka in-ūi kiau-ngō͘
2Chronicles32:26 Āu-lâi
2Chronicles32:27 Hi-se-ka ū chin chōe châi-hù
2Chronicles32:28 i koh khí chhng-khò͘ siu-khǹg ngó͘-kok
2Chronicles32:29 I koh khí kúi-nā ê siâⁿ
2Chronicles32:30 Hi-se-ka tī Ki-hùn-chôaⁿ ê chhut-kháu cha̍h-chúi
2Chronicles32:31 M̄-kú
2Chronicles32:32 Hi-se-ka kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles32:33 Hi-se-ka tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles33:1 Má-ná-se chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-jī hè
2Chronicles33:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Chronicles33:3 I tiông-kiàn i ê lāu-pē Hi-se-ka só͘ húi-hoāi ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles33:4 I tī Siōng Chú ê tiān-lāi ūi-tio̍h hiah-ê sîn-bêng khí kúi-nā ê tôaⁿ; Siōng Chú bat kí chit-ê sèng-tiān
2Chronicles33:5 Má-ná-se tī Siōng Chú ê tiān nn̄g ê tiâⁿ lāi-bīn
2Chronicles33:6 I tī Him-lūn-chú Soaⁿ-kok sio i ê kiáⁿ hiàn-chòe chè
2Chronicles33:7 Má-ná-se koh tī Siōng-tè ê tiān-lāi chhāi tiau-khek ê ngó͘-siōng. Koan-hē chit-keng sèng-tiān
2Chronicles33:8 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng nā thiaⁿ-thàn góa só͘-ū ê bēng-lēng
2Chronicles33:9 M̄-kú Má-ná-se chhōa Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn chòe pháiⁿ
2Chronicles33:10 Siōng Chú kéng-kài Má-ná-se kap i ê jîn-bîn
2Chronicles33:11 Só͘-í Siōng Chú hō͘ A-su̍t -ông ê kun-tiúⁿ lâi kong-kek in
2Chronicles33:12 I tī khùn-khó͘ ê sî chiū khún-kiû Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè
2Chronicles33:13 I kiû-kiò Siōng-tè
2Chronicles33:14 Āu-lâi
2Chronicles33:15 I hòe-tû Siōng Chú sèng-tiān lāi-bīn hiah-ê gōa-cho̍k ê sîn-bêng kap ngó͘-siōng
2Chronicles33:16 I koh siu-kiàn Siōng Chú ê chè-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles33:17 Jîn-bîn iû-goân tī soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ hiàn-chè
2Chronicles33:18 Má-ná-se kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles33:19 I ê kî-tó
2Chronicles33:20 Má-ná-se tńg-khì i ê lia̍t-chó͘ hia
2Chronicles33:21 A-bûn chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-jī hè
2Chronicles33:22 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
2Chronicles33:23 I bô chhin-chhiūⁿ i ê lāu-pē Má-ná-se tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng ka-kī khiam-pi. Chit-ê A-bûn hoān-chōe jú lâi jú giâm-tiōng.
2Chronicles33:24 I ê jîn-sîn pōe-poān i
2Chronicles33:25 M̄-kú kok-lāi ê jîn-bîn chiong hiah-ê pōe-poān A-bûn -ông ê lâng thâi-sí
2Chronicles34:1 Iok-se-a chē-ūi ê sî poeh hè
2Chronicles34:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū
2Chronicles34:3 Iok-se-a choh-ông tē-poeh nî
2Chronicles34:4 Jîn-bîn chiàu i ê bēng-lēng húi-hoāi Pa-le̍k ê tôaⁿ
2Chronicles34:5 chiong gōa-pang sîn-bêng ê chè-si ê kut-thâu hē tī in ê chè-tôaⁿ téng sio
2Chronicles34:6 Iok-se-a koh tī Má-ná-se
2Chronicles34:7 thiah-húi chè-tôaⁿ
2Chronicles34:8 Iok-se-a choh-ông tē-cha̍p-poeh nî
2Chronicles34:9 In chiū khì kìⁿ tōa-chè-si Hi-le̍k-ka
2Chronicles34:10 In chiong hiah-ê gûn kau hō͘ koán-lí Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê lâng
2Chronicles34:11 
2Chronicles34:12 Hiah-ê lâng chòe tāi-chì sêng-si̍t; kàm-kang--ê sī Lī-bī -lâng Bí-la-lī ê kiáⁿ-sun Ngá-hap kap Gô-pa-tí-a
2Chronicles34:13 In koán-lí hiah-ê ūn-poaⁿ ê kang-lâng
2Chronicles34:14 In chiong hiàn tī Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê gûn poaⁿ--chhut-khì ê sî
2Chronicles34:15 Hi-le̍k-ka tùi su-kì Sa-hoan kóng
2Chronicles34:16 Sa-hoan chiū tòa chit-kńg chheh khì ông hia
2Chronicles34:17 Hōng-hiàn tī Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê gûn lóng piàⁿ--chhut-lâi
2Chronicles34:18 Su-kì Sa-hoan koh tùi ông kóng
2Chronicles34:19 Ông thiaⁿ-tio̍h lu̍t-hoat ê ōe
2Chronicles34:20 Ông hoan-hù Hi-le̍k-ka
2Chronicles34:21 “Lín khì
2Chronicles34:22 Tùi án-ni
2Chronicles34:23 I tùi in kóng
2Chronicles34:24 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa beh chiàu tī Iû-tāi -ông bīn-chêng tha̍k ê chheh só͘ kì-chài ê chiù-chó͘
2Chronicles34:25 In-ūi in khì-sak góa
2Chronicles34:26 M̄-kú chhe lín lâi chhéng-būn Siōng Chú ê Iû-tāi -ông
2Chronicles34:27 góa tùi chit-ê só͘-chāi kap chia ê chū-bîn kéng-kò ê ōe
2Chronicles34:28 Góa beh hō͘ lí pêng-an lī-khui sè-kan
2Chronicles34:29 Iok-se-a -ông phài lâng tiàu-chi̍p Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chèng tiúⁿ-ló.
2Chronicles34:30 Ông chiūⁿ-khì Siōng Chú ê tiān; Iû-tāi chèng-lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘-ū ê chū-bîn
2Chronicles34:31 Ông khiā tī i ê ūi
2Chronicles34:32 I hō͘ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kap Piān-ngá-bín só͘-ū ê jîn-bîn lóng tah-èng chun-siú chit-ê iok; Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn chiū chun-hêng in kap in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè só͘ li̍p ê iok.
2Chronicles34:33 Iok-se-a chiong kok-lāi it-chhè khó-ò͘ⁿ ê ngó͘-siōng tû--khì
2Chronicles35:1 Iok-se-a tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siú Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú. Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-sì
2Chronicles35:2 Ông phài chè-si chip-hêng in ê chit-bū
2Chronicles35:3 Koh tùi hiah-ê sèng-hòa kui Siōng Chú
2Chronicles35:4 Tio̍h chiàu Í-sek-lia̍t -ông Tāi-pi̍t kap i ê kiáⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn ê kui-tēng
2Chronicles35:5 Lín Lī-bī -lâng tio̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k ê pâng-thâu
2Chronicles35:6 Tio̍h chiàu Siōng Chú thong-kè Mô͘-se só͘ thoân ê ōe
2Chronicles35:7 Iok-se-a -ông tùi i ê sán-gia̍p the̍h-chhut mî-iûⁿ-á kap soaⁿ-iûⁿ-á kiōng saⁿ-bān chiah
2Chronicles35:8 Ông ê tāi-sîn mā hoaⁿ-hí thê-kiong chè-mi̍h hō͘ jîn-bîn
2Chronicles35:9 Lī-bī -lâng ê léng-siù Ko-lâm-ngá
2Chronicles35:10 Án-ni
2Chronicles35:11 Lī-bī -lâng thâi Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê iûⁿ-á
2Chronicles35:12 chiong sio-hòa-chè ê chè-mi̍h chiàu chong-cho̍k ê pâng-thâu pun hō͘ jîn-bîn
2Chronicles35:13 In chiàu kui-tēng
2Chronicles35:14 Í-āu
2Chronicles35:15 A-sat ê hō͘-tāi hū-chek chhiùⁿ-koa ê lâng
2Chronicles35:16 Hit-ji̍t
2Chronicles35:17 Hit-sî
2Chronicles35:18 Tùi sian-ti Sat-bó-ní ê sî-tāi í-lâi
2Chronicles35:19 Chit-piàn ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh tī Iok-se-a choh-ông tē-cha̍p-poeh nî kú-hêng.
2Chronicles35:20 Iok-se-a chéng-siu sèng-tiān liáu-āu
2Chronicles35:21 Nî-ko phài sù-chiá lâi kìⁿ Iok-se-a
2Chronicles35:22 M̄-kú Iok-se-a m̄ thiaⁿ Siōng-tè thong-kè Nî-ko só͘ kóng ê ōe
2Chronicles35:23 Siā-chìⁿ ê lâng siā-tio̍h Iok-se-a -ông; ông tùi i ê jîn-sîn kóng
2Chronicles35:24 I ê jîn-sîn hû i chhut hit-tâi chhia
2Chronicles35:25 Iâ-lī-bí ūi-tio̍h Iok-se-a choh ai-ko; só͘-ū chhiùⁿ-koa ê lâm-lú kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu-teh chhiùⁿ chiah-ê ai-ko kì-liām Iok-se-a; chit-ê mā chiâⁿ-chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê koàn-lē. Chiah-ê ai-ko lóng siu-chi̍p tī Ai-ko-chi̍p.
2Chronicles35:26 Iok-se-a kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles35:27 kap i it-seng só͘-chòe ê sū
2Chronicles36:1 Iû-tāi jîn-bîn tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siat-li̍p Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-su choh-ông
2Chronicles36:2 Iok-hap-su chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-saⁿ hè
2Chronicles36:3 Ai-ki̍p -ông tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hòe-tû i ê ông-ūi
2Chronicles36:4 Ai-ki̍p -ông siat-li̍p Iok-hap-su ê hiaⁿ-ko Í-lī-a-kèng chòe Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê ông
2Chronicles36:5 Iok-ngá-kèng chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-gō͘ hè
2Chronicles36:6 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat chiūⁿ-lâi kong-táⁿ i
2Chronicles36:7 Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat koh chiong Siōng Chú tiān-lāi ê khì-khū ūn-khì Pa-pí-lûn
2Chronicles36:8 Iok-ngá-kèng kî-tha ê sū-chek
2Chronicles36:9 Iok-ngá-kun chē-ūi ê sî cha̍p-poeh hè
2Chronicles36:10 Keh-tńg-nî
2Chronicles36:11 Se-tí-ka chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-it hè
2Chronicles36:12 I chòe Siōng Chú — i ê Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū; i bô khiam-pi thiaⁿ-thàn sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí só͘ thoân-ta̍t Siōng Chú ê ōe.
2Chronicles36:13 Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat -ông bat kiông-pek Se-tí-ka kí Siōng-tè chiù-chōa tùi i tiong-sêng
2Chronicles36:14 Koh hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap jîn-bîn mā hoān tōa-chōe
2Chronicles36:15 Siōng Chú — in lia̍t-chó͘ ê Siōng-tè lîn-bín I ê chú-bîn kap I khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi
2Chronicles36:16 m̄-kú in thí-chhiò Siōng-tè ê sù-chiá
2Chronicles36:17 Só͘-í
2Chronicles36:18 Pa-pí-lûn -ông koh chiong Siōng-tè tiān-lāi tōa-sòe ê khì-khū kap châi-pó
2Chronicles36:19 In koh sio Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān
2Chronicles36:20 Só͘-ū bô hō͘ lâng thâi--sí-ê
2Chronicles36:21 Chit-ê sū teh si̍t-hiān Siōng Chú thong-kè Iâ-lī-bí só͘ kóng ê ōe
2Chronicles36:22 Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū goân-nî
2Chronicles36:23 “ Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū án-ni kóng
Ezra1:1 Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū goân-nî
Ezra1:2 “ Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū án-ni kóng
Ezra1:3 Lín tiong-kan só͘-ū chòe I chú-bîn--ê
Ezra1:4 Só͘-ū chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê lâng
Ezra1:5 Tùi án-ni
Ezra1:6 In ê chhù-piⁿ chiū ēng gûn-khì
Ezra1:7 Sài-ló͘-sū -ông mā chiong í-chêng Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chhiúⁿ--lâi
Ezra1:8 Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū chí-phài koán-lí hú-khò͘ ê Bí-thê-lī-ta̍t chiong chiah-ê khì-khū the̍h--chhut-lâi
Ezra1:9 In ê sò͘-bo̍k kì tī ē-bīn: kim-pôaⁿ saⁿ-cha̍p tè gûn-pôaⁿ chi̍t-chheng tè to jī-cha̍p-káu ki
Ezra1:10 kim-óaⁿ saⁿ-cha̍p tè gûn-óaⁿ nn̄g-chheng sì-pah cha̍p tè kî-tha ê khì-khū chi̍t-chheng kiāⁿ
Ezra1:11 kim gûn ê khì-khū kiōng gō͘-chheng sì-pah kiāⁿ. Siū-lia̍h ê lâng tùi Pa-pí-lûn chiūⁿ-lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
Ezra2:1 Í-chêng tùi Iû-tāi -tōe hō͘ Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat -ông lia̍h-khì Pa-pí-lûn ê jîn-bîn
Ezra2:2 in kap Só͘-lô-pa-pek
Ezra2:3 Pa-lio̍k ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-chheng chi̍t-pah chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:4 Sī-hoat-thê-ngá ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:5 A-la ê hō͘-tāi chhit-pah chhit-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Ezra2:6 Pa-hap Mô͘-ap ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:7 Í-lân ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p-sì lâng
Ezra2:8 Sat-thó͘ ê hō͘-tāi káu-pah sì-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Ezra2:9 Sat-kái ê hō͘-tāi chhit-pah la̍k-cha̍p lâng
Ezra2:10 Pa-nî ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah sì-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:11 Pí-pài ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:12 Ap-kah ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah jī-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:13 A-to-nî-kan ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah la̍k-cha̍p-la̍k lâng
Ezra2:14 Pí-kek-óa-i ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-chheng khòng gō͘-cha̍p-la̍k lâng
Ezra2:15 A-teng ê hō͘-tāi sì-pah gō͘-cha̍p-sì lâng
Ezra2:16 A-te̍k ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:17 Pí-sài ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:18 Iok-la ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-pah cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:19 Hap-sūn ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:20 Kiat-pā-ní -lâng káu-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Ezra2:21 Pek-lī-hêng -lâng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:22 Nî-tô-hoat -lâng gō͘-cha̍p-la̍k lâng
Ezra2:23 A-ná-tu̍t -lâng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-poeh lâng
Ezra2:24 A-su-má-ui -lâng sì-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:25 Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm -lâng
Ezra2:26 La-má -lâng kap Ka-pa -lâng kiōng la̍k-pah jī-cha̍p-it lâng
Ezra2:27 Be̍k-má -lâng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:28 Pek-te̍k-lī -lâng kap Ai -lâng kiōng nn̄g-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:29 Nî-pho ê hō͘-tāi gō͘-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:30 Boa̍t-pit -lâng chi̍t-pah gō͘-cha̍p-la̍k lâng
Ezra2:31 lēng-gōa chi̍t ê Í-lân ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p-sì lâng
Ezra2:32 Hap-lîm ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p lâng
Ezra2:33 Lô-tek -lâng
Ezra2:34 Iâ-lī-ko -lâng saⁿ-pah sì-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Ezra2:35 Se-ná -lâng saⁿ-chheng la̍k-pah saⁿ-cha̍p lâng.
Ezra2:36 Chè-si: Iâ-su-a ê ke Iâ-tāi-ngá ê hō͘-tāi káu-pah chhit-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Ezra2:37 Im-be̍k ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng khòng gō͘-cha̍p-jī lâng
Ezra2:38 Pa-si-hō͘-ní ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah sì-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Ezra2:39 Hap-lîm ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng khòng cha̍p-chhit lâng.
Ezra2:40 Lī-bī -lâng: Hô-ta̍t-ui-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:41 hū-chek hiàn-si--ê
Ezra2:42 sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe
Ezra2:43 Sèng-tiān ê kang-lâng: Se-hap ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:44 Ki-lio̍k ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:45 Lī-pa-ná ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:46 Hap-kah ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:47 Kiat-tek ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:48 Lī-sìn ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:49 O͘-sat ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:50 Ap-ná ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:51 Pa-pok ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:52 Pa-sé-lu̍t ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:53 Pa-kho ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:54 Nî-sè-a ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:55 Só͘-lô-bûn ê po̍k-jîn ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:56 Ngá-la ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:57 Sī-hoat-thê-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:58 Sèng-tiān ê kang-lâng kap Só͘-lô-bûn po̍k-jîn ê hō͘-tāi kiōng saⁿ-pah káu-cha̍p-jī lâng.
Ezra2:59 Tùi Te̍k Bí-la
Ezra2:60 Tē-lâi-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Ezra2:61 Chè-si ê hō͘-tāi tiong chhē bô sè-hē--ê
Ezra2:62 
Ezra2:63 Séng-tiúⁿ kā in kóng
Ezra2:64 Tāi-hōe ê hōe-chiòng lóng-chóng ū sì-bān nn̄g-chheng saⁿ-pah la̍k-cha̍p lâng;
Ezra2:65 í-gōa iáu ū in ê lâm-po̍k lú-pī chhit-chheng saⁿ-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Ezra2:66 In ū bé chhit-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-la̍k chiah
Ezra2:67 lo̍k-tô sì-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ chiah
Ezra2:68 Ū-ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
Ezra2:69 In chiàu ka-kī ê lêng-le̍k hōng-hiàn kang-thêng su-iàu ê keng-hùi: kim gō͘-pah kong-kun; gûn nn̄g-chheng poeh-pah kong-kun
Ezra2:70 Tùi án-ni
Ezra3:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong lóng an-tùn hó-sè. Chhit--ge̍h
Ezra3:2 Iok-sat-ta̍t ê kiáⁿ Iâ-su-a kap i ê chè-si tâng-phōaⁿ
Ezra3:3 Sui-jiân in kiaⁿ tong-tōe ê chū-bîn
Ezra3:4 In mā chiàu lu̍t-hoat ê kì-chài siú Tah-liâu-choeh
Ezra3:5 Lēng-gōa
Ezra3:6 Sui-jiân Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān iáu-bē tiông-kiàn
Ezra3:7 In ēng gûn hō͘ phah-chio̍h sai-hū kap choh-ba̍k sai-hū
Ezra3:8 In kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê tē-jī nî jī--ge̍h
Ezra3:9 Tùi án-ni
Ezra3:10 Khí-chhù sai-hū hē Siōng Chú sèng-tiān ê tōe-ki ê sî
Ezra3:11 In ū-ê chhiùⁿ ū-ê hô
Ezra3:12 Ū chin chōe chè-si
Ezra3:13 Jîn-bîn hun bōe chheng sī hoan-ho͘ ê siaⁿ á-sī thî-khàu ê siaⁿ; jîn-bîn tōa-siaⁿ hoah ê siaⁿ chin hn̄g lóng thiaⁿ ōe tio̍h.
Ezra4:1 Iû-tāi kap Piān-ngá-bín ê tùi-te̍k thiaⁿ-kìⁿ hiah-ê liû-hòng--tò-lâi ê lâng
Ezra4:2 chiū lâi kìⁿ Só͘-lô-pa-pek kap ta̍k-cho̍k ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ
Ezra4:3 M̄-kú Só͘-lô-pa-pek
Ezra4:4 Tùi án-ni
Ezra4:5 Chiah-ê lâng tùi Pho-su hông-tè Sài-ló͘-sū nî-kan
Ezra4:6 A-hap-sûi-ló͘ hông-tè khai-sí chip-chèng ê sî
Ezra4:7 Tī Pho-su hông-tè A-ta̍t-sih-se thóng-tī ê sî
Ezra4:8 Chóng-tok Lī-hông
Ezra4:9 “Chóng-tok Lī-hông
Ezra4:10 í-ki̍p hō͘ úi-tāi chun-kùi ê A-su-ná-pa chhian-sóa lâi tòa tī Sat-má-lī-a -siâⁿ kap Hô-se -séng ê jîn-bîn
Ezra4:11 Chàu-pún ê lōe-iông sī
Ezra4:12 “Goān hông-siōng cha-bêng
Ezra4:13 Goān hông-siōng cha-bêng
Ezra4:14 Goán siū hông-siōng ê kiong-kip
Ezra4:15 Chhiáⁿ chhâ-khó sian-hông ê kì-lio̍k
Ezra4:16 Goán kín-sīn khé-chàu hông-siōng
Ezra4:17 Hit-sî
Ezra4:18 Lín ê siōng-chàu-bûn
Ezra4:19 Góa í-keng hā-lēng chhâ-khó
Ezra4:20 Í-chêng bat ū úi-tāi ê kun-ông thóng-tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Ezra4:21 Taⁿ lín tio̍h bēng-lēng hiah-ê lâng thêng-kang
Ezra4:22 Lín tio̍h sûi-sî pān-lí chit-ê sū
Ezra4:23 A-ta̍t-sih-se hông-tè ê phoe soan-tho̍k hō͘ chóng-tok Lī-hông
Ezra4:24 Tùi án-ni Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng-tè sèng-tiān tiông-kiàn ê kang-thêng chiū thêng-chí
Ezra5:1 Hit-sî ū sian-ti Hap-kai
Ezra5:2 Sat-la-thiat ê kiáⁿ Só͘-lô-pa-pek
Ezra5:3 Siâng hit-sî
Ezra5:4 In koh thó khí-chō sèng-tiān ê lâng ê miâ-toaⁿ.
Ezra5:5 M̄-kú Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-kò͘ Iû-tāi ê tiúⁿ-ló
Ezra5:6 Hô-se -séng ê chóng-tok Ta̍t-nái
Ezra5:7 Goān hông-tè Tāi-liû-sū bān-sū sūn-lī.
Ezra5:8 Goān hông-siōng cha-bêng. Goán khì Iû-tāi -séng
Ezra5:9 Hit-sî
Ezra5:10 Koh mn̄g in ê siú-léng ê miâ
Ezra5:11 In án-ni ìn goán kóng
Ezra5:12 M̄-kú goán ê lia̍t-chó͘ jiá thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè siū-khì
Ezra5:13 Sài-ló͘-sū chòe Pa-pí-lûn hông-tè tē-it nî
Ezra5:14 Í-chêng Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān chhiúⁿ-khì hē tī Pa-pí-lûn sîn-biō ê kim gûn khì-khū
Ezra5:15 tùi i kóng
Ezra5:16 Tùi án-ni
Ezra5:17 “Taⁿ
Ezra6:1 Tāi-liû-sū -ông chiū kàng-chí
Ezra6:2 Tī Bí-tí-a -séng A-má-tha -siâⁿ ê kiong-lāi
Ezra6:3 Sài-ló͘-sū -ông goân-nî
Ezra6:4 ēng tōa chio̍h saⁿ chàn
Ezra6:5 Í-chêng Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān chhiúⁿ--khì
Ezra6:6 Tùi án-ni
Ezra6:7 m̄-thang chó͘-tòng Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê kang-thêng
Ezra6:8 Góa bēng-lēng lín tio̍h pang-chān Iû-tāi ê tiúⁿ-ló tiông-kiàn Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān; tùi ông ê hú-khò͘
Ezra6:9 In ǹg thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè hiàn sio-hòa-chè só͘ su-iàu ê gû-káng-á
Ezra6:10 thang hō͘ in hiàn phang-phang ê chè-mi̍h hō͘ thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè; koh ūi-tio̍h ông kap ông ê kiáⁿ-jî-sun tn̂g-hè-siū kî-tó.
Ezra6:11 Góa koh kàng-chí
Ezra6:12 Nā ū kun-ông kap jîn-bîn kái-piàn chit-ê bēng-lēng
Ezra6:13 Tùi án-ni
Ezra6:14 Iû-tāi ê tiúⁿ-ló in-ūi sian-ti Hap-kai kap E̍k-to ê sun Sat-ka-lī-a só͘ thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè ê ōe
Ezra6:15 Tāi-liû-sū -ông chē-ūi tē-la̍k nî
Ezra6:16 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Ezra6:17 Ūi-tio̍h hōng-hiàn Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān
Ezra6:18 In chiàu Mô͘-se ê chheh ê kì-chài
Ezra6:19 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-sì
Ezra6:20 Chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng lóng kiat-chēng ka-kī; ta̍k-ê lâng tī lé-gî-siōng lóng chheng-khì
Ezra6:21 Liû-bông tò--lâi ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Ezra6:22 In hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí siú Tû-kàⁿ-choeh chhit ji̍t; in chiah-ni̍h hoaⁿ-hí
Ezra7:1 Chiah-ê sū í-āu
Ezra7:2 Hi-le̍k-ka sī Sa-liông ê kiáⁿ
Ezra7:3 A-hi-tu̍t sī A-má-lī-ngá ê kiáⁿ
Ezra7:4 Bí-la-iok sī Se-la-hi-ngá ê kiáⁿ
Ezra7:5 Pò͘-ki sī A-pí-su ê kiáⁿ
Ezra7:6 Í-su-la tùi Pa-pí-lûn chiūⁿ--lâi; i sī keng-ha̍k-kàu-su
Ezra7:7 A-ta̍t-sih-se choh-ông tē-chhit nî
Ezra7:8 Hit-nî ê gō͘--ge̍h
Ezra7:9 chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-it
Ezra7:10 Í-su-la choan-sim gián-kiù koh si̍t-hêng Siōng Chú ê lu̍t-hoat
Ezra7:11 Chè-si Í-su-la sī keng-ha̍k-kàu-su
Ezra7:12 Lia̍t-ông ê ông A-ta̍t-sih-se siá hō͘ chè-si Í-su-la
Ezra7:13 Góa kok-lāi ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Ezra7:14 Góa kap chhit ê chham-bô͘ chí-phài lí
Ezra7:15 Lí tio̍h tòa góa kap góa ê chham-bô͘ kam-sim hiàn hō͘ tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Í-sek-lia̍t Siōng-tè ê kim-gûn;
Ezra7:16 koh tòa lí tī Pa-pí-lûn choân-séng só͘ tit--tio̍h ê kim-gûn
Ezra7:17 Lí tio̍h siān-iōng chiah-ê kim-gûn
Ezra7:18 Chhun ê kim-gûn
Ezra7:19 Só͘-ū kau hō͘ lí
Ezra7:20 Lí ê Siōng-tè ê tiān nā iáu khiàm-ēng sím-mi̍h
Ezra7:21 Góa A-ta̍t-sih-se koh hā-lēng Hô-se -séng só͘-ū koán hú-khò͘ ê koaⁿ-oân: Cheng-thong thiⁿ-téng Siōng-tè lu̍t-hoat ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su
Ezra7:22 sò͘-liōng chòe ko thang kàu gûn saⁿ-chheng sì-pah kong-kun
Ezra7:23 Thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè só͘ bēng-lēng--ê
Ezra7:24 Góa koh bēng-lēng lín
Ezra7:25 Í-su-la
Ezra7:26 Nā ū lâng bô beh chun-siú lí ê Siōng-tè ê lu̍t-hoat kap ông ê bēng-lēng ê lâng
Ezra7:27 Í-su-la kóng
Ezra7:28 I koh hō͘ góa tùi ông
Ezra8:1 Ē-bīn sī A-ta̍t-sih-se -ông chāi-ūi ê sî
Ezra8:2 Hui-nî-hap ê hō͘-tāi ū Kek-sūn
Ezra8:3 Sī-ka-nî ê hō͘-tāi; Pa-lio̍k ê hō͘-tāi ū Sat-ka-lī-a; kap i chòe-hé tńg--lâi
Ezra8:4 Pa-hap Mô͘-ap ê hō͘-tāi ū Se-la-hi-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-iok-nái; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:5 Sat-thó͘ ê hō͘-tāi ū Ngá-hap-sek ê kiáⁿ Sī-ka-nî; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:6 A-teng ê hō͘-tāi ū Iok-ná-tan ê kiáⁿ Í-pia̍t; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:7 Í-lân ê hō͘-tāi ū A-tha-lī-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-sài-a; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:8 Sī-hoat-thê-ngá ê hō͘-tāi ū Bí-ka-le̍k ê kiáⁿ Se-pa-tē-ngá; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:9 Iok-ap ê hō͘-tāi ū Iâ-hiat ê kiáⁿ Gô-pa-tí-a; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:10 Pa-nî ê hō͘-tāi ū Iok-sè-húi ê kiáⁿ Sī-lô-bi̍t; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:11 Pí-pài ê hō͘-tāi ū Pí-pài ê kiáⁿ Sat-ka-lī-a; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:12 Ap-kah ê hō͘-tāi ū Hap-ka-thán ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân; kap i chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:13 A-to-nî-kan ê hō͘-tāi khah bān tńg--lâi-ê ū Í-lī-hoat-lia̍t
Ezra8:14 Pí-kek-óa-i ê hō͘-tāi ū O͘-thài kap Sat-khek; kap in chòe-hé--ê
Ezra8:15 Góa tiàu-chi̍p chiah-ê lâng lâi kàu hit-tiâu lâu-ji̍p A-hap-óa -siâⁿ ê hô ê hô-piⁿ; goán tī hia chat-iâⁿ saⁿ ji̍t kú. Góa sûn-sī jîn-bîn kap chè-si
Ezra8:16 Góa chiū chhe lâng khì tiàu hiah-ê léng-siù
Ezra8:17 Góa chhe in khì Ka-se-húi-ngá tōe-khu kìⁿ hit só͘-chāi ê léng-siù E̍k-to
Ezra8:18 Lán ê Siōng-tè si-un pang-chān goán
Ezra8:19 Koh tòa Hap-sa-pí-ngá; kap i chòe-hé--ê ū Bí-la-lī ê hō͘-tāi Í-sài-a
Ezra8:20 Koh tòa nn̄g-pah jī-cha̍p ê sèng-tiān ê kang-lâng; in ê miâ lóng ū teng-lio̍k
Ezra8:21 Hit-sî
Ezra8:22 Góa kám-kak chhéng-kiû hông-tè phài pō͘-peng bé-peng chi̍t-lō͘ pó-hō͘ goán
Ezra8:23 Só͘-í
Ezra8:24 Tùi án-ni
Ezra8:25 chiong hông-tè kap i ê chham-bô͘
Ezra8:26 Góa chhìn--kè kau hō͘ in--ê
Ezra8:27 í-ki̍p kim-óaⁿ jī-cha̍p tè
Ezra8:28 Góa tùi in kóng
Ezra8:29 Lín tio̍h kéng-séng kò͘-siú
Ezra8:30 Tùi án-ni
Ezra8:31 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h cha̍p-jī
Ezra8:32 Goán kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Ezra8:33 Tē-sì ji̍t
Ezra8:34 Ta̍k-hāng mi̍h-kiāⁿ lóng sǹg--kè
Ezra8:35 Só͘-ū liû-hòng tò-tńg--lâi ê lâng lóng hiàn sio-hòa-chè hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè; in ūi-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t chèng-lâng hiàn gû-káng cha̍p-jī chiah
Ezra8:36 In chiong hông-tè ê chiàu-su kau hō͘ i ê jîn-sîn kap Hô-se -séng ê chóng-tok; hiah-ê koaⁿ-oân chiū pang-chān jîn-bîn
Ezra9:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì oân-sêng liáu-āu
Ezra9:2 In ūi-tio̍h ka-kī kap in ê kiáⁿ

Ezra9:5 Hiàn ē-hng-chè ê sî

Ezra9:8 Hiān-chāi
Ezra9:9 Goán sī lô͘-lē
Ezra9:10 “Goán ê Siōng-tè

Ezra10:1 Í-su-la kî-tó

Ezra10:17 Kàu chiaⁿ-ge̍h chhoe-it

Nehemiah1:1 Ē-bīn sī Hap-ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Nî-hi-bí ê ōe: A-ta̍t-sih-se choh Pho-su hông-tè tē-jī-cha̍p nî Ki-su-liû-ge̍h
Nehemiah1:2 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Nehemiah1:3 In kā góa kóng
Nehemiah1:4 Góa thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū chē--lo̍h-lâi
Nehemiah1:5 “Siōng Chú
Nehemiah1:6 Khún-kiû lí àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ
Nehemiah1:7 Goán ok-ì hoán-khòng lí
Nehemiah1:8 Kiû lí ōe-kì-tit lí tùi lí ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se èng-ún ê ōe

Nehemiah4:1 Chham-pa-la thiaⁿ-kìⁿ goán teh tiông-kiàn siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ
Nehemiah4:2 tī i ê tâng-phōaⁿ kap Sat-má-lī-a ê kun-peng bīn-chêng kóng
Nehemiah4:3 A-bûn -lâng To-pí-ngá khiā tī i ê sin-piⁿ kóng
Nehemiah4:4 Góa kî-tó kóng
Nehemiah4:5 kiû lí m̄-thang jia-khàm in ê chōe

Nehemiah6:17 Tī hit-tōaⁿ kî-kan
Nehemiah6:18 Tī Iû-tāi ū chin chōe lâng kap To-pí-ngá kiat-bêng
Nehemiah6:19 In siông-siông tī góa ê bīn-chêng kóng To-pí-ngá ê hó-ōe
Nehemiah7:1 Siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ tiông-kiàn oân-sêng
Nehemiah7:2 Góa phài góa ê hiaⁿ-tī Hap-ná-nî kap pó-lúi ê chí-hui-koaⁿ Hap-ná-nî-ngá
Nehemiah7:3 Góa kā in hoan-hù kóng
Nehemiah7:4 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -siâⁿ khoah koh tōa
Nehemiah7:5 Góa ê Siōng-tè kám-tōng góa
Nehemiah7:6 Í-chêng tùi Iû-tāi -tōe hō͘ Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat lia̍h--khì ê jîn-bîn
Nehemiah7:7 in kap Só͘-lô-pa-pek
Nehemiah7:8 Pa-lio̍k ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-chheng chi̍t-pah chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:9 Sī-hoat-thê-ngá ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:10 A-la ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah gō͘-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:11 Pa-hap Mô͘-ap ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:12 Í-lân ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p-sì lâng
Nehemiah7:13 Sat-thó͘ ê hō͘-tāi poeh-pah sì-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Nehemiah7:14 Sat-kái ê hō͘-tāi chhit-pah la̍k-cha̍p lâng
Nehemiah7:15 Pin-lōe ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah sì-cha̍p-poeh lâng
Nehemiah7:16 Pí-pài ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah jī-cha̍p-poeh lâng
Nehemiah7:17 Ap-kah ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-chheng saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:18 A-to-nî-kan ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah la̍k-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Nehemiah7:19 Pí-kek-óa-i ê hō͘-tāi nn̄g-chheng khòng la̍k-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Nehemiah7:20 A-teng ê hō͘-tāi la̍k-pah gō͘-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Nehemiah7:21 A-te̍k ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:22 Hap-sūn ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p-poeh lâng
Nehemiah7:23 Pí-sài ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p-sì lâng
Nehemiah7:24 Hap-la ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-pah cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:25 Ki-piàn ê hō͘-tāi káu-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Nehemiah7:26 Pek-lī-hêng -lâng kap Nî-tô-hoat -lâng
Nehemiah7:27 A-ná-tu̍t -lâng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-poeh lâng
Nehemiah7:28 Pek A-su-má-ui -lâng sì-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:29 Ki-lia̍t Iâ-lîm -lâng
Nehemiah7:30 La-má -lâng kap Ka-pa -lâng kiōng la̍k-pah jī-cha̍p-it lâng
Nehemiah7:31 Be̍k-má -lâng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:32 Pek-te̍k-lī -lâng kap Ai -lâng kiōng chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Nehemiah7:33 lēng-gōa chi̍t ê Nî-pho ê hō͘-tāi gō͘-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:34 lēng-gōa chi̍t ê Í-lân ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah gō͘-cha̍p-sì lâng
Nehemiah7:35 Hap-lîm ê hō͘-tāi saⁿ-pah jī-cha̍p lâng
Nehemiah7:36 Iâ-lī-ko -lâng saⁿ-pah sì-cha̍p-gō͘ lâng
Nehemiah7:37 Lô-tek -lâng
Nehemiah7:38 Se-ná -lâng saⁿ-chheng káu-pah saⁿ-cha̍p lâng.
Nehemiah7:39 Chè-si: Iâ-su-a ê ke Iâ-tāi-ngá ê hō͘-tāi káu-pah chhit-cha̍p-saⁿ lâng
Nehemiah7:40 Im-be̍k ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng khòng gō͘-cha̍p-jī lâng
Nehemiah7:41 Pa-si-hō͘-ní ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah sì-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Nehemiah7:42 Hap-lîm ê hō͘-tāi chi̍t-chheng khòng cha̍p-chhit lâng.
Nehemiah7:43 Lī-bī -lâng: Hô-ta̍t-ui-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:44 hū-chek hiàn-si--ê
Nehemiah7:45 sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe
Nehemiah7:46 Sèng-tiān ê kang-lâng: Se-hap ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:47 Ki-lio̍k ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:48 Lī-pa-ná ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:49 Hap-lân ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:50 Lī-a-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:51 Ka-sàn ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:52 Pí-sài ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:53 Pa-pok ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:54 Pa-sé-lu̍t ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:55 Pa-kho ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:56 Nî-sè-a ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:57 Só͘-lô-bûn ê po̍k-jîn ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:58 Ngá-la ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:59 Sī-hoat-thê-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:60 Sèng-tiān ê kang-lâng kap Só͘-lô-bûn po̍k-jîn ê hō͘-tāi kiōng saⁿ-pah káu-cha̍p-jī lâng.
Nehemiah7:61 Tùi Te̍k Bí-la
Nehemiah7:62 Tē-lâi-ngá ê hō͘-tāi
Nehemiah7:63 Chè-si tiong chhē bô sè-hē--ê
Nehemiah7:64 
Nehemiah7:65 Séng-tiúⁿ kā in kóng
Nehemiah7:66 Tāi-hōe ê hōe-chiòng lóng-chóng ū sì-bān nn̄g-chheng saⁿ-pah la̍k-cha̍p lâng;
Nehemiah7:67 í-gōa iáu ū in ê lâm-po̍k lú-pī chhit-chheng saⁿ-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-chhit lâng
Nehemiah7:68 In ū bé chhit-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-la̍k chiah
Nehemiah7:69 
Nehemiah7:70 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ūi-tio̍h kang-thêng chàn-chō͘: Séng-tiúⁿ koan poeh kong-kun ê kim hē tī hú-khò͘
Nehemiah7:71 ū ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ koan chi̍t-pah la̍k-cha̍p-poeh kong-kun ê kim
Nehemiah7:72 ū chin chōe jîn-bîn koan chi̍t-pah la̍k-cha̍p-poeh kong-kun ê kim
Nehemiah7:73 Tùi án-ni
Nehemiah8:1 Hit-sî
Nehemiah8:2 Chhit-ge̍h chhoe-it
Nehemiah8:3 Í-su-la tī Chúi-mn̂g chêng ê kóng-tiûⁿ
Nehemiah8:4 Keng-ha̍k-kàu-su Í-su-la khiā tī in ūi-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì ēng chhâ te̍k-pia̍t chòe ê tâi-á téng; khiā tī i chiàⁿ-pêng--ê ū Má-tha-thê-ngá
Nehemiah8:5 Í-su-la khiā tī tâi-téng
Nehemiah8:6 Í-su-la chheng-chàn Siōng Chú — chì-tōa ê Siōng-tè; chèng jîn-bîn lóng gia̍h-chhiú

Nehemiah9:1 Kâng hit-ge̍h jī-sì ji̍t

Nehemiah9:23 Lí hō͘ in ê kiáⁿ-sun chhin-chhiūⁿ thiⁿ-téng ê chhiⁿ hiah-ni̍h chōe
Nehemiah9:24 In ê kiáⁿ-sun ji̍p-khì sêng-chiap hit-ê tōe

Nehemiah9:29 Lí khoàn-kài in

Nehemiah9:38 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu

Nehemiah11:1 Jîn-bîn ê léng-siù lóng tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; kî-tha ê jîn-bîn thiu-chhiam

Nehemiah11:3 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Nehemiah11:4 Ū chi̍t-kóa Iû-tāi kap Piān-ngá-bín ê hō͘-tāi tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. Sio̍k Iû-tāi --ê ū: Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi A-tha-ngá
Nehemiah11:5 koh ū Má-se-ngá
Nehemiah11:6 Hoat-le̍k-su ê hō͘-tāi tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng --ê
Nehemiah11:7 Sio̍k Piān-ngá-bín ê hō͘-tāi ū Sat-lō͘
Nehemiah11:8 koh ū Sat-lō͘ ê chhin-cho̍k Ka-pài
Nehemiah11:9 Sè-ki-lī ê kiáⁿ Iok-ní sī in ê tiúⁿ-koaⁿ; Hap-se-ló͘-a ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi chòe hit-ê siâⁿ ê hù-chhī-tiúⁿ.
Nehemiah11:10 Chòe chè-si--ê ū Iok-ngá-li̍p ê kiáⁿ Iâ-tāi-ngá kap Ngá-kun;
Nehemiah11:11 iáu ū koán-lí Siōng-tè ê tiān ê Se-lâi-ngá
Nehemiah11:12 iáu ū in ê chhin-cho̍k tī sèng-tiān sū-hōng--ê
Nehemiah11:13 iáu ū in ê chhin-cho̍k chòe cho̍k-tiúⁿ--ê
Nehemiah11:14 iáu ū in ê chhin-cho̍k ióng-béng ê chiàn-sū
Nehemiah11:15 Lī-bī -lâng ū Sī-má-ngá
Nehemiah11:16 koh ū Lī-bī -lâng ê léng-siù Sa-pí-thài kap Iok-sat-poa̍t
Nehemiah11:17 Chhōa kî-tó kám-siā--ê sī Má-tha-nî
Nehemiah11:18 Tòa tī Sèng-siâⁿ ê Lī-bī -lâng
Nehemiah11:19 Kò͘-mn̂g ê siú-ōe ū A-kok kap Ta̍t-bûn
Nehemiah11:20 Kî-tha ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Nehemiah11:21 M̄-kú sèng-tiān kang-lâng tòa tī Gô-hui-le̍k; Se-hap kap Ki-su-phà chòe in ê kam-tok.
Nehemiah11:22 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chòe Lī-bī -lâng ê kam-tok
Nehemiah11:23 Ông ū kui-tēng hiàn-si ê lâng ta̍k-ji̍t eng-kai chòe ê chit-bū.
Nehemiah11:24 Pí-tha-hi-ngá tāi-piáu ông pān-lí Iû-tāi jîn-bîn it-chhè ê sū-bū; i sī Bí-sī-sat-pia̍t ê kiáⁿ
Nehemiah11:25 Iû-tāi -lâng tòa ê chng-siā kap in ê chhân-hn̂g

Nehemiah12:10 Iâ-su-a siⁿ Iok-ngá-kim

Nehemiah13:1 Hit-ji̍t
Nehemiah13:2 in-ūi in m̄-nā bô ēng chia̍h-mi̍h kap chúi gêng-chiap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Nehemiah13:3 In thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-tōaⁿ lu̍t-hoat liáu-āu
Nehemiah13:4 Chit-ê tāi-chì í-chêng
Nehemiah13:5 chiū ūi-tio̍h i chún-pī chi̍t keng tōa keng pâng. Chit-keng pâng-keng í-chêng teh siu-khǹg sò͘-chè
Nehemiah13:6 Chit-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî
Nehemiah13:7 Góa kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiah chai Í-lī-a-si̍t só͘ chòe ê pháiⁿ-tāi; i ūi-tio̍h To-pí-ngá tī Siōng-tè sèng-tiān ê tiâⁿ chún-pī chi̍t keng pâng.
Nehemiah13:8 Góa chiū chin siū-khì
Nehemiah13:9 koh bēng-lēng lâng khì kiat-chēng pâng-keng
Nehemiah13:10 Góa mā hoat-kiàn Lī-bī -lâng èng-tit ê hūn-gia̍h bô hō͘ in
Nehemiah13:11 Góa chiū chek-pī hiah-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ
Nehemiah13:12 Tùi án-ni
Nehemiah13:13 Góa chí-phài chè-si Sī-lī-bí-ngá
Nehemiah13:14 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Nehemiah13:15 Tī hit-tōaⁿ kî-kan
Nehemiah13:16 Koh ū tòa tī hia ê Thài-ní -lâng
Nehemiah13:17 Góa chiū chek-pī Iû-tāi hiah-ê kùi-cho̍k
Nehemiah13:18 Í-chêng lín ê chó͘-sian kiám m̄-sī mā án-ni chòe
Nehemiah13:19 Tī An-hioh-ji̍t khai-sí
Nehemiah13:20 Tùi án-ni
Nehemiah13:21 Góa chiū kéng-kò in
Nehemiah13:22 Góa bēng-lēng Lī-bī -lâng kiat-chēng ka-kī lâi kò͘-siú siâⁿ-mn̂g
Nehemiah13:23 Tī hit-tōaⁿ kî-kan
Nehemiah13:24 In ê kiáⁿ-jî ū chi̍t-pòaⁿ kóng A-si̍t-tu̍t-ōe
Nehemiah13:25 Góa chiū chek-pī in
Nehemiah13:26 Góa kā in kóng
Nehemiah13:27 Án-ni
Nehemiah13:28 Tōa-chè-si Í-lī-a-si̍t ê sun
Nehemiah13:29 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Nehemiah13:30 Án-ni
Nehemiah13:31 tēng-kî hōng-hiàn chhâ-liāu kap chho͘-se̍k ê ké-chí. Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Esther1:1 Chit-ê sū hoat-seng tī A-hap-sûi-ló͘ -ông ê sî-tāi. A-hap-sûi-ló͘ tī Su-san ông-kiong chē-ūi
Esther1:2 
Esther1:3 I chē-ūi tē-saⁿ nî
Esther1:4 I ēng chi̍t-pah poeh-cha̍p ji̍t hō͘ in khòaⁿ ông-kok ê hù-jū
Esther1:5 Āu-lâi
Esther1:6 Hōe-tiûⁿ ū pe̍h-sek
Esther1:7 Ông kiong-èng chin chōe chiú
Esther1:8 Ông bēng-lēng kiong-lāi só͘-ū ê jîn-sîn
Esther1:9 Ông-hō͘ Hoa-si̍t-tì tī A-hap-sûi-ló͘ -ông ê kiong-lāi mā pān-toh chhiáⁿ hū-lú.
Esther1:10 Kàu tē-chhit ji̍t
Esther1:11 khì chhiáⁿ ông-hō͘ Hoa-si̍t-tì tì ông-hō͘ ê hoa-koan lâi ông ê bīn-chêng; in-ūi ông-hō͘ chin súi
Esther1:12 M̄-kú ông-hō͘ Hoa-si̍t-tì m̄-khéng lâi
Esther1:13 Ông ū chi̍t ê koàn-lē
Esther1:14 Hit-sî tī ông ê chó-iū
Esther1:15 Ông mn̄g in kóng
Esther1:16 Bí-bō͘-kan tī ông kap hiah-ê tāi-sîn ê bīn-chêng hôe-tap kóng
Esther1:17 in-ūi ông-hō͘ só͘ chòe ê sū
Esther1:18 Kin-á-ji̍t Pho-su kap Bí-tí-a chèng koaⁿ-oân ê hu-jîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h ông-hō͘ ê só͘-chòe
Esther1:19 Ông nā khòaⁿ-chòe thò-tòng
Esther1:20 Ông ê hoat-lēng chi̍t-ē soan-pò͘
Esther1:21 Ông kap hiah-ê tāi-sîn lóng khòaⁿ Bí-bō͘-kan ê ōe chòe thò-tòng; ông chiū chiap-siū i ê kiàn-gī.
Esther1:22 Ông ê chiàu-su ēng ta̍k-séng ê bûn-jī
Esther2:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu
Esther2:2 Sū-hāu ông ê jîn-sîn chiū chham-siông
Esther2:3 In tùi ông kóng
Esther2:4 Ông kah-ì ê lú-chú
Esther2:5 Su-san -siâⁿ ū chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng Boa̍t-tí-kái
Esther2:6 Í-chêng Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lia̍h Iû-tāi -ông Iok-ngá-kun kap jîn-bîn khì ê sî
Esther2:7 Boa̍t-tí-kái ū chi̍t ê chek-peh sió-bē Í-su-thiap
Esther2:8 Ông ê bēng-lēng kap hoat-lēng í-keng soan-pò͘
Esther2:9 Hi-kai chin kah-ì Í-su-thiap
Esther2:10 Í-su-thiap thiaⁿ Boa̍t-tí-kái ê hoan-hù
Esther2:11 Boa̍t-tí-kái ta̍k-ji̍t tī hō͘-kiong ê thâu-chêng kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì
Esther2:12 Chiàu kui-tēng
Esther2:13 Lú-chú tùi hō͘-kiong ji̍p-khì ông-kiong kìⁿ ông ê sî
Esther2:14 ē-hng-sî ji̍p--khì
Esther2:15 Lûn kàu Í-su-thiap tio̍h ji̍p-khì kìⁿ ông ê sî
Esther2:16 A-hap-sûi-ló͘ -ông tē-chhit nî cha̍p--ge̍h
Esther2:17 Ông ài Í-su-thiap chhiau-kè kî-tha ê lú-chú; i pí kî-tha ê chāi-sek-lú koh-khah tit-tio̍h ông ê thiàⁿ-sioh kap un-hūi. Só͘-í
Esther2:18 Ông ēng Í-su-thiap ê miâ pān tōa iàn-se̍k iau-chhiáⁿ bûn-bú-pah-koaⁿ
Esther2:19 Hiah-ê chāi-sek-lú tē-jī piàn chū-chi̍p ê sî
Esther2:20 Í-su-thiap chiàu Boa̍t-tí-kái ê hoan-hù
Esther2:21 Ū chi̍t ji̍t

Esther3:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu

Esther3:4 In ta̍k-ji̍t kā i khó͘-khǹg
Esther3:5 Hap-bān khòaⁿ-tio̍h Boa̍t-tí-kái m̄ tùi i kūi-pài; chiū móa-pak siū-khì.
Esther3:6 In í-keng kā Hap-bān kóng Boa̍t-tí-kái sī Iû-thài -lâng; Hap-bān siūⁿ-kóng kan-ta thâi Boa̍t-tí-kái chi̍t ê lâng bô kàu-gia̍h

Esther4:1 Boa̍t-tí-kái chai chit-ê tāi-chì

Esther4:5 Í-su-thiap chiū tiàu ông phài-lâi sū-hāu i ê thài-kàm Hap-tha-kek lâi

Job1:1 O͘-su tōe-khu bat ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Iok-pek
Job1:2 I ū chhit ê kiáⁿ
Job1:3 I ê châi-sán ū chhit-chheng chiah iûⁿ
Job1:4 I hiah-ê kiáⁿ siông-siông lûn-liû tī in ka-kī ê chhù pān chhe-chhau
Job1:5 Múi chi̍t piàn in lûn-liû pān chhe-chhau liáu
Job1:6 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Job1:7 Siōng Chú mn̄g Sat-tàn
Job1:8 Siōng Chú tùi Sat-tàn kóng
Job1:9 Sat-tàn ìn Siōng Chú
Job1:10 Lí kiám m̄-sī ū ēng lî-pa kā i ûi--teh
Job1:11 I só͘-ū--ê lí chhin-chhiú kā i kha̍p chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-bāi leh
Job1:12 Siōng Chú tùi Sat-tàn kóng
Job1:13 Ū chi̍t ji̍t Iok-pek ê kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tú-á tī in tōa-hiaⁿ ê chhù teh chia̍h teh lim ê sî
Job1:14 ū chi̍t ê sù-chiá lâi kā Iok-pek kóng
Job1:15 Sī-pa -lâng hut-jiân lâi kong-kek
Job1:16 I kóng iáu-bē soah
Job1:17 I kóng iáu-bē soah
Job1:18 I kóng iáu-bē soah
Job1:19 hut-jiân ū tōa-hong tùi khòng-iá thàu--lâi
Job1:20 Iok-pek chiū khiā--khí-lâi
Job1:21 kóng
Job1:22 Sui-jiân tú-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì

Job2:5 M̄-kú lí nā chhun-chhiú kha̍p-tio̍h i ê kut

Job3:1 Āu-lâi Iok-pek khui-chhùi
Job3:2 Iok-pek kóng:
Job3:3 Goān góa chhut-sì hit-ji̍t siau-sit; goān kóng “Ū hoâi-īn ta-po͘-kiáⁿ” hit-mî mā siau-sit.
Job3:4 Goān hit-ji̍t pìⁿ-chòe o͘-àm; goān thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè bô khòaⁿ-kò͘ i
Job3:5 Goān o͘-àm kap sí-ìm kā hit-ji̍t chhú--khì; goān ba̍t-hûn khàm tī hit téng-bīn; goān ji̍t-thâu choân-si̍t phah-kiaⁿ i.
Job3:6 Goān hit-mî hō͘ o͘-àm thun--khì
Job3:7 Goān hit-mî bô lâng siⁿ-kiáⁿ
Job3:8 Goān hiah-ê liām hû-chiù
Job3:9 Goān khé-bêng-chhiⁿ pìⁿ-chòe o͘-àm
Job3:10 in-ūi i bô koaiⁿ-ba̍t góa ê lāu-bú ê chú-kiong
Job3:11 Góa ná ōe bô tī thai--ni̍h chiū sí
Job3:12 Sī-án-chóaⁿ ū kha-thâu-u kā góa chiap
Job3:13 Nā bô
Job3:14 kap tōe-chiūⁿ ūi-tio̍h ka-kī tiông-kiàn hong-hòe ê kiong-tiān ê kun-ông siú-léng chòe-hé teh khùn;
Job3:15 á-sī kap kim-gûn châi-pó móa chhù ê ông-chú chòe-hé khùn
Job3:16 ná bô chhin-chhiūⁿ liû-sán chiū kā tâi ê eⁿ-á
Job3:17 Tī hia pháiⁿ-lâng bōe koh jiáu-loān; ià-siān ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h an-lêng.
Job3:18 Tī hia siû-hoān lóng tit-tio̍h an-hioh
Job3:19 Bô-lūn tōa-sòe kùi-chiān lóng tī hia; lô͘-lē mā thoat-lī chú-lâng ê koán-chè
Job3:20 Siōng-tè sī-án-chóaⁿ sù kng-bêng hō͘ siū-khó͘ ê lâng
Job3:21 In ài-beh sí
Job3:22 In chi̍t-ē chhē-tio̍h hûn-bōng chiū khoài-lo̍k
Job3:23 Lâng ê lō͘ í-keng hō͘ Siōng-tè cha̍h--teh
Job3:24 Góa ēng thó͘-khùi chòe pn̄g chia̍h; tōa-siaⁿ háu
Job3:25 Góa teh kiaⁿ--ê
Job3:26 Góa bô pêng-an
Job4:1 Thê-bān -lâng Í-lī-hoat ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job4:2 Lâng beh kap lí kóng-ōe
Job4:3 Lí bat kà-sī chin chōe lâng
Job4:4 Poa̍h-tó--ê
Job4:5 Chóng-sī chai-lān chi̍t-ē hoat-seng
Job4:6 Lí kiám m̄-sī tùi kèng-ùi Siōng-tè tit-tio̍h khak-sìn? Kiám m̄-sī tùi sûn-choân ê hêng-ûi tit-tio̍h ǹg-bāng?
Job4:7 Siūⁿ-khòaⁿ leh
Job4:8 Góa khòaⁿ
Job4:9 Siōng-tè pûn-khùi
Job4:10 sai teh háu
Job4:11 sai in-ūi bô thang chia̍h sí--khì
Job4:12 Ū ōe tiām-tiām-á thoân kàu góa chia; góa ê hī-khang ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h i sòe-sòe ê siaⁿ.
Job4:13 Mî--sî lâng khùn tāng-bîn
Job4:14 kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ lîm-kàu góa
Job4:15 Ū chi̍t chūn hong tùi góa ê bīn chhe--kè; góa kui seng-khu ê mn̂g chhàng--khí-lâi.
Job4:16 I thêng--teh
Job4:17 Ōe-sí ê lâng tī Siōng-tè gán-tiong kiám sī gī-lâng? Lâng tī Chhòng-chō-chú bīn-chêng kiám ōe-tàng sǹg-chòe bô-chōe?
Job4:18 Siōng-tè bô sìn-jīm ka-kī ê po̍k-jîn
Job4:19 Hiah-ê tòa tī thô͘-kak-chhù ê lâng koh-khah bián-kóng; in ê pún-chit sī thô͘-hún
Job4:20 In chá-khí-sî oa̍h--teh
Job4:21 In pò͘-pîⁿ ê soh khiú--khí-lâi chiū tó--lo̍h-khì
Job5:1 Taⁿ chòe lí kiû-kiò
Job5:2 Siū-khì ōe hāi-sí gōng-lâng; oàn-tò͘ ōe thâi-sí han-bān ê lâng.
Job5:3 Góa bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h gōng-lâng heng-ōng
Job5:4 I ê kiáⁿ-jî bô lâng pó-hō͘
Job5:5 I só͘ siu-sêng--ê
Job5:6 In-ūi chai-hō m̄-sī tùi thô͘ puh--chhut-lâi
Job5:7 Lâng chhut-sì it-tēng ū hoān-lān
Job5:8 Nā-sī góa
Job5:9 I chòe ê tāi-chì tōa kah bōe chhek-to̍k--tit; I kiâⁿ ê kî-sū chōe kah sǹg bōe liáu.
Job5:10 I lo̍h-hō͘ tī tōe-bīn
Job5:11 I ko-seng pi-bî ê lâng
Job5:12 I phò-hoāi khúi-khiat ê lâng ê kè-bô͘
Job5:13 I hō͘ khiáu-lâng tiòng-tio̍h ka-kī ê khúi-kè
Job5:14 In ji̍t--sî tú-tio̍h o͘-àm
Job5:15 Siōng-tè kiù sàn-chhiah-lâng thoat-lī siong-hāi in ê lâng ê chi̍h
Job5:16 Tùi án-ni
Job5:17 Siū Siōng-tè koán-kàu ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; só͘-í
Job5:18 I kā lâng phah-siong
Job5:19 Lí tú-tio̍h la̍k piàn ê chai-lān
Job5:20 Ki-hng ê sî
Job5:21 Lí ōe tit-tio̍h pó-hō͘
Job5:22 Chai-hāi kap ki-hng
Job5:23 Lí lôe-chhân ê sî bōe lôe-tio̍h chio̍h-thâu; iá-siù ōe kap lí hô-hó.
Job5:24 Lí ōe chai lí ê pò͘-pîⁿ an-choân; lí sûn iûⁿ-tiâu
Job5:25 Lí ōe chai lí ê kiáⁿ-sun chin chōe
Job5:26 Lí ōe hè-siū móa chiah kè-óng
Job5:27 Khòaⁿ leh
Job6:1 Iok-pek ìn Í-lī-hoat kóng:
Job6:2 Góa ê iu-būn nā keng-kè chhìn-tāng
Job6:3 it-tēng pí hái--ni̍h ê soa khah tāng; só͘-í góa nā kóng kè-thâu
Job6:4 Choân-lêng-chiá ê chìⁿ siā-tio̍h góa
Job6:5 Iá-lû ū chháu thang chia̍h
Job6:6 Chia̍h-mi̍h bô chham iâm
Job6:7 Chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ góa bô ūi-kháu
Job6:8 Goān góa tit-tio̍h só͘ kiû--ê; góa só͘ ì-ài--ê
Job6:9 Goān Siōng-tè kā góa teh-chhùi
Job6:10 Án-ni
Job6:11 Góa ū sím-mi̍h khùi-la̍t
Job6:12 Góa ê khùi-la̍t kiám ū chio̍h-thâu hiah-ni̍h kian-tēng? Góa ê seng-khu kiám sī tâng chòe--ê?
Job6:13 Góa só͘-ū ê chu-goân lóng ēng-chīn
Job6:14 Lâng choa̍t-bāng ê sî
Job6:15 Góa ê tâng-phōaⁿ chhut-bōe góa
Job6:16 peng iûⁿ--khì
Job6:17 thiⁿ-khì sio-joa̍h
Job6:18 iân khoe teh kiâⁿ ê siong-tūi soah bê-lō͘
Job6:19 Thê-má ê siong-tūi teh chhē chúi; Sī-pa ê seng-lí-lâng teh thèng-hāu khoe-lâu.
Job6:20 In ê ǹg-bāng lóng lo̍k-khong
Job6:21 Taⁿ lín tùi góa mā-sī án-ni
Job6:22 Góa kiám bat kóng: Chhiáⁿ lín sàng mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ góa
Job6:23 Á-sī kóng: Kái-kiù góa thoat-lī tùi-te̍k ê chhiú
Job6:24 Chhiáⁿ lín kà-sī góa
Job6:25 Sêng-si̍t ê ōe jōa-á-ni̍h ū-la̍t! M̄-kú lín ê chí-chek sī teh chí-chek sím-mi̍h?
Job6:26 Choa̍t-bāng ê lâng kóng ê ōe kiám m̄-sī chhin-chhiūⁿ hong
Job6:27 Lín sīm-chì thiu-chhiam pun ko͘-jî
Job6:28 Lín kā góa khòaⁿ chheng-chhó
Job6:29 Lín chim-chiok siūⁿ
Job6:30 Góa kiám ū kóng m̄-tio̍h? Góa kiám bōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t sī-hui?
Job7:1 Lâng tī sè-kan kiám m̄-sī it-tēng ū lô-khó͘? I ê ji̍t-chí kiám m̄-sī chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ lâng chhiàⁿ ê kang-lâng?
Job7:2 Chhin-chhiūⁿ lô͘-po̍k teh pek-chhiat kî-thāi ji̍t lo̍h
Job7:3 Góa mā chù-tiāⁿ tio̍h kè khang-hu ê sòe-goa̍t
Job7:4 Góa beh khùn ê sî siūⁿ-kóng: Mî hiah tn̂g
Job7:5 Góa kui seng-khu siⁿ-thâng
Job7:6 Góa ê ji̍t-chí teh kè pí chit-pò͘ ê so khah kín; ji̍t-chí kè-liáu lóng bô ǹg-bāng.
Job7:7 Siōng-tè ah
Job7:8 Hiān-chāi lí ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa
Job7:9 Hûn siau-sòaⁿ chiū bô--khì
Job7:10 I bōe koh tò-lâi ka-kī ê chhù; i pún só͘-chāi ê lâng mā bōe koh jīn-tit i.
Job7:11 Só͘-í góa m̄ koh tiām-tiām; góa ê sim iu-khó͘
Job7:12 Góa kiám sī tōa-hái
Job7:13 Góa nā kóng: Góa ê bîn-chhn̂g ōe an-ùi góa
Job7:14 lí chiū ēng bîn-bāng hō͘ góa kiaⁿ
Job7:15 Góa lêng-khó hō͘ lâng chhui--sí
Job7:16 Góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ sìⁿ-miā
Job7:17 Lâng sǹg sím-mi̍h
Job7:18 Lí ta̍k chá-khí kàm-chhat i
Job7:19 Lí tī-sî chiah beh oa̍t-cháu bô khòaⁿ góa
Job7:20 Kàm-chhat lâng ê Chú ah
Job7:21 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ m̄ sià-bián góa ê kè-sit
Job8:1 Su-a -lâng Pí-le̍k-ta̍t ìn kóng:
Job8:2 Chit-khoán tāi-chì lí beh kóng jōa kú? Lí só͘ kóng ê ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ kông-hong!
Job8:3 Siōng-tè kiám ōe oai-khiok chèng-ti̍t? Choân-lêng-chiá kiám ōe oai-khiok kong-gī?
Job8:4 Lí ê kiáⁿ-jî ū tek-chōe I
Job8:5 Lí nā chhē-kiû Siōng-tè
Job8:6 lí nā sûn-kiat chèng-ti̍t
Job8:7 Lí khí-thâu sui-jiân bî-sòe
Job8:8 Lí khì mn̄g chêng sè-tāi ê lâng
Job8:9 Lán chā-hng chiah chhut-sì
Job8:10 in kà-sī lí
Job8:11 Bô thô͘-bê
Job8:12 In iáu chíⁿ

Job8:14 In só͘ i-óa--ê sī chin khoài tn̄g ê si
Job8:15 In óa-khò ti-tu-bāng
Job8:16 In chhin-chhiūⁿ si̍t-bu̍t ū ji̍t chiò chiū chhiⁿ-chhùi
Job8:17 In ê kun khûn tī chio̍h-thâu-tui
Job8:18 In nā hō͘ lâng khau--khí-lâi
Job8:19 In it-tēng ōe tī lō͘-piⁿ nōa--khì
Job8:20 Khòaⁿ leh
Job8:21 I ōe hō͘ lí koh-chài chhiò-gī-gī
Job8:22 Oàn-hūn lí ê lâng ōe ēng kiàn-siàu chòe saⁿ chhēng; pháiⁿ-lâng ê pò͘-pîⁿ ōe bô--khì.
Job9:1 Iok-pek ìn Pí-le̍k-ta̍t kóng:

Job9:3 Lâng nā beh kap I cheng-lūn
Job9:4 Siōng-tè ū tì-hūi
Job9:5 I kā soaⁿ sóa-cháu

Job9:7 I bēng-lēng ji̍t-thâu

Job9:9 I chhòng-chō Pak-táu

Job9:20 Góa sui-jiân bû-ko͘
Job9:21 Góa sui-jiân chheng-pe̍k

Job9:23 Lâng nā in-ūi chai-hō hut-jiân sí

Job9:26 chin kín kè--khì chhin-chhiūⁿ khoài-théng; chhin-chhiūⁿ eng-chiáu chin kín chhiong lo̍h-khì la̍k chia̍h-mi̍h.

Job9:30 Góa nā ēng sat-bûn sóe seng-khu

Job10:5 Lí ê ji̍t-chí kiám chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng ê ji̍t-chí? Lí ê nî kiám chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng ê nî?

Job12:1 Iok-pek ìn Só-hoat kóng:
Job12:2 Ū-iáⁿ
Job12:3 Góa kap lín kâng-khoán ōe-hiáu siūⁿ; góa bô khah su lín. Lín kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì siáⁿ-lâng m̄ chai?
Job12:4 Góa kiû-kiò Siōng-tè
Job12:5 Seng-oa̍h hó-kè ê lâng thí-chhiò siū-tio̍h chai-lān ê lâng; chai-hō teh tng-tán lâng poa̍h-tó sit-pāi.
Job12:6 Kiông-tō ê ke heng-ōng; jiá Siōng-tè siū-khì ê lâng pêng-an bô-sū; in óa-khò--ê sī ka-kī ê khùi-la̍t.
Job12:7 Khì mn̄g cháu-siù
Job12:8 khì mn̄g tōe-chiūⁿ ê chhiū-ba̍k
Job12:9 Chiah-ê it-chhè
Job12:10 It-chhè tōng-bu̍t ê sìⁿ-miā kap só͘-ū jîn-lūi ê oa̍h-miā
Job12:11 Lán ēng hī-khang thiaⁿ ōe
Job12:12 Nî-hè chōe--ê ū tì-hūi; hè-siū tn̂g--ê ū kiàn-sek.
Job12:13 Tì-hūi kap lêng-le̍k lóng chāi-tī Siōng-tè; I ū kè-chhek kap kiàn-sek.
Job12:14 I thiah-húi--ê
Job12:15 I bô lo̍h-hō͘
Job12:16 Koân-lêng kap tì-hūi lóng chāi-tī I; siū bê-he̍k kap bê-he̍k lâng--ê
Job12:17 I hō͘ chham-bô͘ siū-lia̍h
Job12:18 I kái-tû kun-ông ê koân-le̍k
