Job13:1 Chiah-ê it-chhè góa ê ba̍k-chiu lóng ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Job13:2 Lín chai--ê
Job13:3 Góa si̍t-chāi ài kap Choân-lêng-chiá kóng-ōe
Job13:4 Lín ēng pe̍h-chha̍t-ōe am-khàm ka-kī ê bû-ti; lín lóng sī bô lō͘-ēng ê i-seng.
Job13:5 Khó͘-bōe-tit lín lóng tiām-tiām; tiām-tiām chiah sī ū tì-hūi.
Job13:6 Chhiáⁿ lín thiaⁿ góa lí-lūn
Job13:7 Lín sī beh ūi Siōng-tè kóng bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê ōe
Job13:8 Lín kiám m̄-sī teh phian-thán Siōng-tè
Job13:9 I nā kā lín chhâ-giām
Job13:10 Lín nā àm-àm-á phian-thán
Job13:11 I ê ui-giâm kiám bōe hō͘ lín kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ? I ê khióng-pò͘ kiám bōe lîm-kàu lín?
Job13:12 Lín só͘ kì-tit ê chim-giân chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-hu bô lō͘-ēng; lín ê piān-hō͘ chhin-chhiūⁿ thô͘-bê bōe-khò--tit.
Job13:13 Lín tiām-tiām
Job13:14 Góa koat-tēng beh mō͘ sìⁿ-miā ê gûi-hiám
Job13:15 Góa í-keng bô ǹg-bāng
Job13:16 Góa án-ni chòe
Job13:17 Tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ góa ê ōe
Job13:18 Khòaⁿ leh
Job13:19 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kap góa piān-lūn? Nā ū
Job13:20 Kiû lí chún góa nn̄g hāng chhéng-kiû
Job13:21 Kiû lí ê chhiú kiu tò-tńg
Job13:22 Án-ni
Job13:23 Góa ê kè-sit kap chōe-kò ū jōa-chōe? Kiû lí hō͘ góa chai góa ū sím-mi̍h chōe-kò
Job13:24 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ ng lí ê bīn
Job13:25 Hō͘ hong chhe-cháu ê hio̍h-á
Job13:26 Lí kèng-jiân siá giâm-hat ê khí-sò͘-su lâi pān góa
Job13:27 Lí ēng kha-khàu khàu góa ê kha
Job13:28 Lâng pāi-hoāi chhin-chhiūⁿ nōa--khì ê mi̍h
Job14:1 Hū-jîn-lâng só͘ siⁿ--ê
Job14:2 I chhin-chhiūⁿ hoe
Job14:3 Chit-khoán ê lâng
Job14:4 Kiám ū lâng ōe-tàng hō͘ chheng-khì ê mi̍h tùi bô chheng-khì--ê chhut--lâi? Bô lâng ōe.
Job14:5 Lâng ê siū-miā í-keng chù-tiāⁿ; i ê sòe-goa̍t
Job14:6 Kiû lí ba̍k-chiu oa̍t-cháu bô khòaⁿ
Job14:7 Chhò--khí-lâi ê chhiū ū ǹg-bāng koh puh-íⁿ; iù-nńg ê ki ōe kè-sio̍k hoat--chhut-lâi.
Job14:8 Sui-jiân i ê kun tī thô͘-tóe it-ti̍t lāu--khì
Job14:9 chúi chi̍t-ē lūn-te̍k chiū koh hoat-íⁿ
Job14:10 M̄-kú lâng sí chiū tó-ti̍t-ti̍t; khùi chi̍t-ē tn̄g
Job14:11 Ô͘ ê chúi ōe ta--khì
Job14:12 lâng mā-sī án-ni
Job14:13 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ǹg-bāng lí kā góa khǹg tī Im-kan
Job14:14 Lâng kiám ōe koh oa̍h--khí-lâi? Chóng-sī tī lô-khó͘ ê ji̍t góa beh thèng-hāu
Job14:15 Hit-sî
Job14:16 Sui-jiân lí iáu-teh kàm-sī góa ê kiâⁿ-ta̍h
Job14:17 Góa ê kè-sit lí ōe hong-ba̍t tī tē-á lāi; góa ê chōe-kò lí ōe chhat-siau.
Job14:18 Soaⁿ pang
Job14:19 Teh lâu ê chúi kā chio̍h-thâu bôa-sún
Job14:20 Lí éng-oán khah iâⁿ i
Job14:21 I ê kiáⁿ-jî tit-tio̍h êng-ū
Job14:22 I chí-ū kám-kak ka-kī seng-khu ê thàng-thiàⁿ
Job15:1 Thê-bān -lâng Í-lī-hoat ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job15:2 Tì-hūi ê lâng kiám ōe ēng khang-hu ê tì-sek ìn-tap
Job15:3 I kiám ōe ēng bô lī-ek
Job15:4 Lí sī teh khì-sak kèng-ùi ê sim
Job15:5 Lí ê chōe éng-hióng lí kóng-ōe; lí ê ōe lóng sī khúi-chà.
Job15:6 Tēng lí ê chōe--ê sī lí ê chhùi
Job15:7 Lí sī thâu chi̍t ê chhut-sì ê lâng sī--bô? Lí pí chiah-ê soaⁿ khah tāi-seng siū-chō sī--bô?
Job15:8 Lí kiám sī Siōng-tè ê chham-bô͘
Job15:9 Ū sím-mi̍h lí chai
Job15:10 Goán tiong-kan ū pe̍h thâu-mn̂g--ê kap nî-lāu--ê
Job15:11 Siōng-tè ê an-ùi kap un-hô khó͘-khǹg lí ê ōe
Job15:12 Lí ê sim ná ōe hiah-ni̍h kek-tōng
Job15:13 hō͘ lí tí-te̍k Siōng-tè
Job15:14 Lâng sǹg sím-mi̍h
Job15:15 Siōng-tè liân I ê chhe-sài to bô sìn-jīm
Job15:16 hô-hòng khó-ò͘ⁿ hú-pāi ê lâng! In lim chōe-ok chhin-chhiūⁿ teh lim-chúi.
Job15:17 Góa beh kā lí chí-sī
Job15:18 Chiū-sī ū tì-hūi ê lâng tùi chó͘-sian só͘ niá-siū
Job15:19 Chit-ê èng-ún ê tōe chí-ū sù hō͘ lán ê chó͘-sian
Job15:20 Pháiⁿ-lâng it-seng siū-chīn khó͘-chhó͘
Job15:21 Khióng-pò͘ ê siaⁿ siông-siông tī i ê hī-khang-piⁿ; an-ún ê sî
Job15:22 I bô siong-sìn ōe-tàng tùi o͘-àm thoat-lī; to-kiàm put-sî teh tng-tán i.
Job15:23 I sì-kòe liû-lōng thó-chia̍h
Job15:24 Hoān-lān khùn-khó͘ hō͘ i kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Job15:25 In-ūi i chhut-chhiú kong-kek Siōng-tè
Job15:26 I ām-kún kek ngī
Job15:27 I ê bīn pûi-lut-lut
Job15:28 I tòa ê siâⁿ bô kú ōe hong-hòe
Job15:29 I bōe koh hó-gia̍h
Job15:30 I bōe-tàng thoat-lī o͘-àm
Job15:31 I m̄-thang óa-khò hu-ké lâi khi-phiàn ka-kī; in-ūi hu-ké ōe chiâⁿ-chòe i ê pò-èng.
Job15:32 Sî iáu-bē kàu
Job15:33 I ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ phû-tô-chhiū
Job15:34 Bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê cho̍k-lūi it-tēng bô hō͘-tāi; khò hóe-lō͘ khí-chō ê chhù-the̍h ōe hō͘ hé sio--khì.
Job15:35 In hoâi-īn to̍k-hāi
Job16:1 Iok-pek ìn Í-lī-hoat kóng:
Job16:2 Chit-khoán ōe
Job16:3 Chit-khoán liâng-khiang-ōe
Job16:4 Lín nā tiàm tī góa ê chhù-kéng
Job16:5 M̄-kú góa ōe ēng chhùi kā lín kó͘-lē
Job16:6 Góa nā kóng-ōe
Job16:7 Taⁿ Siōng-tè ah
Job16:8 Lí ûi-khùn góa
Job16:9 Lí tùi góa hoat siū-khì
Job16:10 In khui-chhùi thí-chhiò góa
Job16:11 Siōng-tè kā góa kau hō͘ put-gī ê lâng
Job16:12 Góa pêng-an bô-sū ê sî
Job16:13 I chân-jím ēng chìⁿ tùi sì-bīn siā góa
Job16:14 I chhin-chhiūⁿ ióng-sū chhiong-lâi kong-kek góa
Job16:15 Góa kā môa-saⁿ chhēng-tiâu-tiâu; góa ê thâu-hia̍h phak tī thô͘-kha.
Job16:16 Góa ê ba̍k-chiu khàu kah ham-ham
Job16:17 m̄-kú góa ê chhiú bô hoān kiông-pō
Job16:18 Tōe ah
Job16:19 Khòaⁿ ah
Job16:20 Góa ê pêng-iú thí-chhiò góa; góa ǹg Siōng-tè ba̍k-sái lâu bōe thêng.
Job16:21 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ǹg-bāng tī Siōng-tè kap lâng ê tiong-kan ū chhâi-phòaⁿ-chiá
Job16:22 In-ūi koh kè bô kúi nî
Job17:1 Góa ê khùi beh tn̄g lah
Job17:2 Góa ê chiu-ûi lóng sī thí-chhiò góa ê lâng; góa só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê lâng lóng teh kek góa siū-khì.
Job17:3 Kiû lí chhin-sin chòe góa ê tam-pó
Job17:4 Lí hong-ba̍t in ê sim
Job17:5 Lâng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê lī-ek chhut-bōe pêng-iú
Job17:6 Góa chiâⁿ-chòe lâng-lâng ê chhiàu-tâm; in tùi góa ê bīn phùi chhùi-nōa.
Job17:7 Góa in-ūi iu-siong ba̍k-chiu bū; góa ê seng-khu siau-sán-lo̍h-bah.
Job17:8 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng khòaⁿ--tio̍h chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ; bô-chōe ê lâng ōe tùi bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng hoat siū-khì.
Job17:9 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ōe kian-siú ka-kī só͘ kiâⁿ ê lō͘; chhiú chheng-khì ê lâng khùi-la̍t ōe ná ke-thiⁿ.
Job17:10 Lín lóng koh tńg--lâi; lín tiong-kan góa chhē bô chi̍t ê ū tì-hūi ê lâng.
Job17:11 Góa ê ji̍t-chí í-keng kè--khì; góa ê kè-ōe kap sim só͘ ì-ài--ê lóng siau-sit.
Job17:12 In kóng mî--sî sī ji̍t--sî
Job17:13 Góa nā kî-thāi Im-hú chòe góa ê chhù
Job17:14 góa nā tùi hûn-bōng kóng “lí sī góa ê lāu-pē”
Job17:15 án-ni góa ê ǹg-bāng tī tó-ūi? Góa ê ǹg-bāng siáⁿ-lâng khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h?
Job17:16 Ǹg-bāng kiám ōe lo̍h-khì Im-hú? I kiám ōe kap góa chòe-tīn tī thô͘-tóe?
Job18:1 Su-a -lâng Pí-le̍k-ta̍t ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job18:2 Lí chhē goán ê ōe-phāng beh chhē jōa kú? Lí léng-chēng siūⁿ khòaⁿ-bāi
Job18:3 Goán sī-án-chóaⁿ hō͘ lí khòaⁿ-chòe cheng-siⁿ
Job18:4 Lí chit-ê lâng
Job18:5 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê teng ōe sit--khì; i ê hé-iām ōe hoa--khì.
Job18:6 I pò͘-pîⁿ lāi ê kng ōe àm--khì
Job18:7 I ún-kiān ê kha-pō͘ khai-sí iô-choah; i ê kè-bô͘ ōe hāi-tio̍h ka-kī.
Job18:8 I ka-kī kiâⁿ-ji̍p hām-khiⁿ; i ê kha ta̍h-tio̍h oa̍h-tauh.
Job18:9 Khoân-thò ōe tîⁿ-tio̍h i ê kha-āu-tiⁿ; lô-bāng ōe lia̍h-tio̍h i.
Job18:10 Liù-soh ūi-tio̍h i khàm tī thô͘--ni̍h; hām-chíⁿ ūi-tio̍h i siat tī lō͘--ni̍h.
Job18:11 Sì-ûi ū khióng-pò͘ teh tng-tán
Job18:12 I ê khùi-la̍t in-ūi iau-gō soe-bî; chai-hō put-sî tè tī sin-piⁿ.
Job18:13 Ōe tì-kàu sí ê pīⁿ thòaⁿ kah kui seng-khu
Job18:14 I ōe tùi só͘ óa-khò ê pò͘-pîⁿ hō͘ lâng khiú--chhut-lâi
Job18:15 I ê pò͘-pîⁿ hō͘ hé sio--khì; ū liû-hông iā tī i khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi.
Job18:16 Tī ē-tóe
Job18:17 Tī tōe-chiūⁿ
Job18:18 I ōe tùi kng-bêng tiong siū kóaⁿ-ji̍p o͘-àm
Job18:19 Tī pún-cho̍k tiong-kan i bô kiáⁿ bô sun; tī khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi i bô lâu pòaⁿ-lâng.
Job18:20 I ê cho-gū hō͘ sai-pêng ê lâng gông-ngia̍h
Job18:21 Che chiū-sī pháiⁿ-lâng ê miā-ūn
Job19:1 Iok-pek ìn Pí-le̍k-ta̍t kóng:
Job19:2 Lín hō͘ góa ê sim iu-khó͘
Job19:3 Lín chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn lêng-jio̍k góa
Job19:4 Góa nā chin-chiàⁿ ū kè-sit
Job19:5 Lín khoa-kháu ka-kī pí góa khah hó
Job19:6 Tio̍h chai
Job19:7 Góa tōa-siaⁿ hoah “Oan-óng o͘h!” m̄-kú bô lâng ìn góa; âu-kiò
Job19:8 I cha̍h góa ê lō͘
Job19:9 I pak-toa̍t góa ê chun-êng
Job19:10 I tùi sì-bīn kong-kek góa
Job19:11 I hoat tōa siū-khì kong-kek góa
Job19:12 I ê kun-tūi chòe-chi̍t-ē chhiong--lâi
Job19:13 I hō͘ góa ê chhin-cho̍k oán-lī góa
Job19:14 Góa ê chhin-lâng kap góa toān-choa̍t koan-hē; góa ê ti-kí lóng bōe-kì-tit góa.
Job19:15 Góa ê lâng-kheh
Job19:16 Góa kiò góa ê lô͘-po̍k
Job19:17 Góa ê khùi hō͘ góa ê bó͘ iàm-chiān; góa ê chhin hiaⁿ-tī mā iàm-ò͘ⁿ góa ê chhàu-bī.
Job19:18 Liân gín-á to khòaⁿ-khin góa; in khòaⁿ--tio̍h chiū thí-chhiò góa.
Job19:19 Góa siōng chhin-bi̍t ê pêng-iú lóng iàm-chiān góa; góa siōng-thiàⁿ ê lâng pìⁿ-bīn hoán-tùi góa.
Job19:20 Góa sán kah phê-pau-kut; góa chí-ū chhun chi̍t-kháu-khùi.
Job19:21 Góa ê pêng-iú ah
Job19:22 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè khún-pek góa? Lín beh khó͘-chhó͘ góa kàu sím-mi̍h sî?
Job19:23 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ǹg-bāng chiong góa ê ōe siá--khí-lâi
Job19:24 ēng thih-chām-á khek tī chio̍h-thâu
Job19:25 Chóng-sī góa chai
Job19:26 Sui-jiân góa ê phê nōa--khì
Job19:27 Góa ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h I khiā tī góa sin-piⁿ; góa ōe chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Job19:28 Lín nā kóng: Lán beh án-chóaⁿ kā i khún-pek? In-ūi būn-tôe ê kun-goân chāi-tī i.
Job19:29 Lín tio̍h kiaⁿ to-kiàm
Job20:1 Ná-má -lâng Só-hoat ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job20:2 Góa thiaⁿ-tio̍h lêng-jio̍k góa ê chek-pī
Job20:3 
Job20:4 Lí kiám m̄ chai
Job20:5 pháiⁿ-lâng tek-ì bô kú-tn̂g; bô kèng-khiân ê lâng ê hoaⁿ-hí ba̍k-nih-kú.
Job20:6 Sui-jiân i kiau-ngō͘ koân kah tú-thiⁿ
Job20:7 kàu-bé mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ ka-kī ê pùn éng-oán siau-sit. Bat i ê lâng ōe kóng: I tī tó-ūi?
Job20:8 I ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ bîn-bāng pe--khì
Job20:9 Bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê lâng bōe-tàng koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h i; mā bōe-tàng tī i tòa ê só͘-chāi koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h i.
Job20:10 I ê kiáⁿ-jî tio̍h pê-siông sàn-chhiah-lâng; i tio̍h chhin-chhiú kau-chhut ka-kī ê châi-hù;
Job20:11 I sui-jiân ū siàu-liân ióng-chòng ê kut-keh
Job20:12 Sui-jiân siâ-ok tī i ê chhùi-lāi sī tiⁿ--ê
Job20:13 m̄-kam phùi--chhut-lâi
Job20:14 m̄-kú hit-ê chia̍h-mi̍h ji̍p-khì pak-lāi chiū pháiⁿ--khì
Job20:15 I thun-chia̍h châi-pó
Job20:16 I ōe suh to̍k-chôa ê to̍k; chôa ê to̍k-gê ōe hāi-sí i.
Job20:17 I bōe-tàng khòaⁿ-tio̍h kang-hô
Job20:18 I lô-khó͘ tit--tio̍h-ê thun bōe lo̍h--khì
Job20:19 In-ūi i ap-chè koh khì-sak sàn-chhiah-lâng
Job20:20 In-ūi i tham-chia̍h
Job20:21 Bô chi̍t hāng bô hō͘ i thun--lo̍h-khì; só͘-í i ê hoân-êng bōe kú-tn̂g.
Job20:22 I hó-gia̍h chhiong-chiok ê sî
Job20:23 I pak-tó͘ tiùⁿ-pá ê sî
Job20:24 I nā siám ōe khui thih ê kiàm
Job20:25 Chìⁿ siā-thàng i ê seng-khu
Job20:26 I chek-chū ê châi-pó lóng ōe siū húi-bia̍t
Job20:27 Thiⁿ ōe po̍k-lō͘ i ê chōe-kò; tōe ōe khí-lâi kong-kek i.
Job20:28 Tī Siōng-tè tōa siū-khì ê ji̍t
Job20:29 Che chiū-sī pháiⁿ-lâng ê miā-ūn
Job21:1 Iok-pek ìn Só-hoat kóng:
Job21:2 Chhiáⁿ chù-ì thiaⁿ góa kóng-ōe; che chiah sī lín ōe-tàng hō͘ góa ê an-ùi.
Job21:3 Chhiáⁿ nāi-sim thiaⁿ góa kóng; góa kóng-liáu
Job21:4 Kiám kóng góa sī teh tùi lâng oàn-thàn? Góa tio̍h-kip kiám bô lí-iû?
Job21:5 Lín chù-ì khòaⁿ góa
Job21:6 Góa nā siūⁿ--tio̍h chiū kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Job21:7 Pháiⁿ-lâng sī-án-chóaⁿ oa̍h--teh
Job21:8 In kiáⁿ-sun boán-tông
Job21:9 In ê ka-têng an-ún bô kiaⁿ
Job21:10 In ê gû-káng thoân-chéng bô tn̄g
Job21:11 In hō͘ gín-á chū-iû thit-thô
Job21:12 In hô lin-long-kó͘ kap khîm chhiùⁿ-koa
Job21:13 In it-seng hēng-hok
Job21:14 In tùi Siōng-tè kóng: Mài chhap--goán! Goán bô ài chai lí ê tō-lō͘.
Job21:15 Choân-lêng-chiá sī siáⁿ-lâng
Job21:16 In chú-tiuⁿ hoân-êng sī khò ka-kī ê khùi-la̍t tit--tio̍h-ê. Pháiⁿ-lâng ê ì-liām si̍t-chāi oh liáu-kái.
Job21:17 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê teng kiám bat hoa--khì? Chai-hō ū jōa-chōe piàn lîm-kàu in? Siōng-tè ê siū-khì kiám bat hō͘ in kan-khó͘?
Job21:18 In ū jōa-chōe piàn chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ hong chhe-sòaⁿ ê chháu-á-iù? Chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ kông-hong chhe--khì ê chho͘-khng?
Job21:19 Lín kóng: Siōng-tè in-ūi lāu-pē ê chōe-kò hêng-hoa̍t i ê kiáⁿ-jî. M̄-kú góa siūⁿ
Job21:20 hō͘ i chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ka-kī pāi-hoāi
Job21:21 Lâng it-tàn sí--khì
Job21:22 Liân thiⁿ-téng ê sù-chiá to siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ
Job21:23 Ū lâng kàu sí kiān-khong ióng-chòng
Job21:24 i ê cheng-le̍k chhiong-chiok
Job21:25 Ū lâng kàu sí
Job21:26 In lóng siâng-khoán kui-thó͘
Job21:27 Góa chai lín teh siūⁿ sím-mi̍h
Job21:28 Lín mn̄g: Tōa-jîn-bu̍t ê chhù tī tó-ūi? Pháiⁿ-lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi tī tó-ūi?
Job21:29 Lín kiám m̄-bat mn̄g kè-lō͘ ê lâng? Kiám bô chiap-siū in só͘ kóng--ê?
Job21:30 Pháiⁿ-lâng tī chai-lān ê sî pêng-an bô-sū
Job21:31 I só͘ kiâⁿ--ê
Job21:32 I ōe hō͘ lâng kng-khì bōng-tōe
Job21:33 Bâi-chòng ê thô͘ tùi i mā kam-tiⁿ; sàng-chòng ê lâng chêng-kiâⁿ-āu-tè sǹg bōe liáu.
Job21:34 Lín ê an-ùi lóng sī hu-ké; lín ê ìn-tap lóng bô ì-sù.
Job22:1 Thê-bān -lâng Í-lī-hoat ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job22:2 Lâng tùi Siōng-tè ū sím-mi̍h lō͘-ēng? Tì-hūi ê lâng tùi I ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek?
Job22:3 Lí chòe lâng kong-gī
Job22:4 I kiám ōe in-ūi lí kèng-ùi I
Job22:5 Lí ê chōe-ok kiám m̄-sī chin tōa? Lí ê chōe-kò si̍t-chāi bû-kiông-chīn.
Job22:6 Lí bô-lí-bô-iû the̍h hiaⁿ-tī ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ choh tí-ah
Job22:7 Ià-siān ê lâng
Job22:8 Sui-jiân lí ū koân-sè tit-tio̍h thó͘-tōe
Job22:9 m̄-kú lí hō͘ kóaⁿ-hū khang-chhiú tò--khì
Job22:10 Só͘-í oa̍h-tauh sì-bīn ûi lí; khióng-pò͘ hut-jiân lîm-kàu lí.
Job22:11 O͘-àm hō͘ lí bōe-tàng khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Job22:12 Siōng-tè kiám m̄-sī tī thiⁿ ke̍k-koân ê só͘-chāi? Lí khòaⁿ chhiⁿ-sîn ê ke̍k-thâu hiah-ni̍h koân;
Job22:13 lí soah kóng
Job22:14 Ba̍t-hûn jia-cha̍h I
Job22:15 Lí kiám beh kiâⁿ í-chêng siâ-ok ê lâng kiâⁿ--kè ê lō͘?
Job22:16 In ê sî iáu-bē kàu chiū siau-sit; in ê tōe-ki hō͘ tōa-chúi chhiong bô--khì.
Job22:17 In tùi Siōng-tè kóng
Job22:18 Iáu-kú Siōng-tè ēng hó-mi̍h tóe-móa in ê chhù. Pháiⁿ-lâng ê ì-liām si̍t-chāi oh liáu-kái.
Job22:19 Gī-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h pháiⁿ-lâng ê kiat-kio̍k chiū hoaⁿ-hí; bô-chōe ê lâng beh kā in thí-chhiò
Job22:20 “Khí-lâi kong-kek goán ê lâng kó-jiân siū siau-bia̍t; in só͘ chhun--ê lóng hō͘ hé sio--khì.”
Job22:21 Tio̍h sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè
Job22:22 Tio̍h chiap-siū I ê chhùi só͘ kóng ê kà-sī
Job22:23 Lí nā khiam-pi oa̍t tńg-lâi kui-ǹg Choân-lêng-chiá
Job22:24 lí nā khòaⁿ n̂g-kim chòe thô͘-hún
Job22:25 hō͘ Choân-lêng-chiá chòe lí ê n̂g-kim
Job22:26 án-ni
Job22:27 Lí tùi I kî-tó
Job22:28 Lí kè-ōe beh chòe ê tāi-chì
Job22:29 Siōng-tè hō͘ kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng kàng-kē
Job22:30 Siōng-tè ōe kiù bû-ko͘ ê lâng; lí ê chhiú nā chheng-khì
Job23:1 Iok-pek ìn Í-lī-hoat kóng:
Job23:2 Góa kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu tōa-siaⁿ bâi-oàn; góa haiⁿ-haiⁿ-chhan
Job23:3 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ài chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ chiah ōe-tàng chhē-tio̍h Siōng-tè
Job23:4 Góa beh tùi I pâi-lia̍t góa ê àn-kiāⁿ
Job23:5 Góa ài chai I ōe án-chóaⁿ ìn góa
Job23:6 I kiám ōe ēng tōa koân-lêng tùi-hù góa? Bōe! I ōe thiaⁿ góa sin-sò͘.
Job23:7 Tī hia chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ōe-tàng kap I piān-lūn; án-ni
Job23:8 M̄-kú
Job23:9 chiūⁿ pak
Job23:10 Chóng-sī I chai góa só͘ kiâⁿ ê lō͘; I khó-giām góa liáu-āu
Job23:11 Góa it-ti̍t tè I ê kha-pō͘
Job23:12 Góa m̄-bat ûi-pōe I hoat-chhut ê bēng-lēng; góa tin-sioh I ê ōe
Job23:13 I chi̍t-ē koat-tēng
Job23:14 I ōe chiàu I ūi-tio̍h góa an-pâi--ê khì chòe; I iáu ū chin chōe chit-khoán ê kè-ōe.
Job23:15 Só͘-í góa tī I ê bīn-chêng phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah; Góa siūⁿ--tio̍h chiū kiaⁿ.
Job23:16 In-ūi Siōng-tè hō͘ góa sit-táⁿ
Job23:17 sui-jiân tōa o͘-àm jia-khàm góa ê bīn
Job24:1 Choân-lêng-chiá sī-án-chóaⁿ bô beh tēng sím-phòaⁿ ê ji̍t? Bat I ê lâng sī-án-chóaⁿ khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h I ê ji̍t?
Job24:2 Ū lâng î-sóa tōe-kài
Job24:3 In kā ko͘-jî ê lû khan--khì
Job24:4 In pak-toa̍t sàn-chhiah-lâng ê koân-lī; pek kan-khó͘-lâng tô-bông bih--khí-lâi.
Job24:5 Sàn-chhiah-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ hong-po͘ ê iá-lû
Job24:6 in tī pa̍t-lâng ê hn̂g koah niû-chháu
Job24:7 In kui-mî bô saⁿ thang chhēng
Job24:8 In tī soaⁿ--ni̍h hō͘ tōa-hō͘ ak-tâm
Job24:9 Ū lâng tùi lāu-bú ê heng-chêng kā bô-pē ê kiáⁿ chhiúⁿ--khì; koh lia̍h sàn-chhiah-lâng ê gín-á tú-siàu.
Job24:10 Sàn-chhiah-lâng bô saⁿ thang chhēng
Job24:11 In tī pháiⁿ-lâng chi̍t-pâi chi̍t-pâi ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū tiong chiⁿ-iû
Job24:12 Siâⁿ-lāi ū teh-beh sí ê lâng haiⁿ-haiⁿ-chhan
Job24:13 Ū lâng khì-sak kng
Job24:14 Thiⁿ iáu-bē kng
Job24:15 Kan-îm ê lâng pek-chhiat thèng-hāu thiⁿ-àm
Job24:16 Chha̍t-á mî--sî ó͘ piah-khang
Job24:17 In khòaⁿ àm-mî chòe ji̍t--sî
Job24:18 Pháiⁿ-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi-pho
Job24:19 Khòng-hān kap iām-jia̍t hō͘ seh iûⁿ--khì
Job24:20 Liân siⁿ in ê lāu-bú mā bōe-kì-tit in
Job24:21 In khi-hū bô hoâi-īn bô siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê hū-jîn-lâng
Job24:22 Siōng-tè ēng I ê koân-le̍k siau-bia̍t kiông-pō ê lâng; in sui-jiân heng-khí
Job24:23 Siōng-tè hō͘ in chiām-sî pêng-an bô-sū; I ê ba̍k-chiu put-sî kàm-sī in ê só͘-chòe.
Job24:24 In sui-jiân heng-ōng
Job24:25 Án-ni
Job25:1 Su-a -lâng Pí-le̍k-ta̍t ìn Iok-pek kóng:
Job25:2 Chú-koân kap ui-giâm lóng chāi-tī Siōng-tè; I tī ke̍k-koân ê só͘-chāi si-hêng hô-pêng.
Job25:3 I ê kun-tūi kiám sǹg ōe liáu? I ê kng chi̍t-ē hoat-chhut
Job25:4 Án-ni
Job25:5 Tī I gán-tiong
Job25:6 Hô-hòng
Job26:1 Iok-pek ìn Pí-le̍k-ta̍t kóng:
Job26:2 Bô khùi-la̍t--ê
Job26:3 Lí án-chóaⁿ kà-sī bô tì-hūi ê lâng
Job26:4 Lí tùi tó-ūi tit-tio̍h lêng-kám
Job26:5 Im-hûn thòng-khó͘ phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah
Job26:6 Tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng Im-kan lō͘-hiān
Job26:7 I thí-khui kiong-chhong tī hūn-tūn ê téng-bīn
Job26:8 I ēng ba̍t-hûn pau chúi
Job26:9 I chiong ge̍h-niû khàm--khí-lâi
Job26:10 I tī chúi-bīn ōe kài-hān
Job26:11 Thiⁿ ê thiāu iô-choah
Job26:12 I ēng lêng-le̍k chè-ap tōa-hái
Job26:13 I pûn-khùi hō͘ thiⁿ chheng-chhái
Job26:14 Chiah-ê put-kò sī I só͘ chòe ê chi̍t sió pō͘-hūn
Job27:1 Iok-pek kè-sio̍k kóng:
Job27:2 Siōng-tè kū-choa̍t góa ê koân-lī; Choân-lêng-chiá hō͘ góa sim-sîn thòng-khó͘. Góa chí éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè chiù-chōa:
Job27:3 Góa ê oa̍h-miā nā iáu tī góa ê lāi-bīn
Job27:4 góa ê chhùi-tûn choa̍t-tùi m̄ kóng put-gī
Job27:5 Góa choa̍t-tùi m̄ khòaⁿ lín chòe tio̍h; góa kàu sí mā kian-chhî ka-kī sûn-choân chèng-ti̍t.
Job27:6 Góa kian-chhî góa sī tio̍h
Job27:7 Te̍k-tùi góa--ê tio̍h siū pháiⁿ-lâng ê cho-gū; kong-kek góa--ê tio̍h siū put-gī ê lâng ê pò-èng.
Job27:8 Bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng siū siau-bia̍t
Job27:9 Hoān-lān lîm-kàu ê sî
Job27:10 I kiám ōe in-ūi Choân-lêng-chiá lâi hoaⁿ-hí
Job27:11 Góa beh kà-sī lín Siōng-tè koân-lêng ê chok-ûi; Choân-lêng-chiá ê só͘-chòe
Job27:12 Chiah-ê
Job27:13 Che sī Siōng-tè hō͘ pháiⁿ-lâng ê pò-èng
Job27:14 Sui-jiân i ê kiáⁿ-jî chin chōe
Job27:15 Só͘ chhun ê lâng in-ūi un-e̍k siū bâi-chòng; in ê kóaⁿ-hū beh khàu
Job27:16 In sui-jiân chek-chū gûn chhin-chhiūⁿ thô͘-hún hiah chōe
Job27:17 chòe in thia̍p
Job27:18 In khí ê chhù chhin-chhiūⁿ ti-tu ê bāng
Job27:19 In khì khùn ê sî hó-gia̍h
Job27:20 Khióng-pò͘ chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi tī ji̍t--sî kā in chhiong--khì
Job27:21 Tang-hong chi̍t-ē chhe
Job27:22 Kông-hong kā in sàu
Job27:23 Kông-hong tùi in phah-pho̍k-á
Job28:1 Gûn ū gûn-khòng; kim ū thê-liān ê só͘-chāi.
Job28:2 Thih sī tùi tōe--ni̍h ó͘--chhut-lâi; tâng sī tùi khòng-chio̍h thê-liān--chhut-lâi.
Job28:3 Lâng lo̍h-khì ke̍k-chhim ê só͘-chāi
Job28:4 In khì chin hn̄g bô lâng khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi
Job28:5 Tōe-chiūⁿ chhut thó͘-sán; tōe-ē ū iām-hé ká--khí-lâi;
Job28:6 kî-tiong ū nâ-pó-chio̍h
Job28:7 Khòng-khiⁿ hit-tiâu lō͘ eng-chiáu m̄ bat
Job28:8 hiong-ok ê iá-siù m̄-bat kiâⁿ--kè
Job28:9 Lâng chhun-chhiú phah tēng-chio̍h
Job28:10 In tī chio̍h-pôaⁿ tiong khui-kau
Job28:11 In kā chúi-goân that--khí-lâi
Job28:12 Chóng-sī tì-hūi beh khì tó-ūi chhē? Chhong-bêng tī tó-ūi?
Job28:13 Tì-hūi ê kè-ta̍t bô lâng chai
Job28:14 Chhim-ian kóng: Bô tī chia. Tōa-hái kóng: Bô tī goán chia.
Job28:15 Tì-hūi bōe-tàng ēng n̂g-kim bóe--tio̍h
Job28:16 Sûn-kim bōe-tàng kap i phēng
Job28:17 N̂g-kim
Job28:18 San-ô͘ kap phek-ge̍k mā bián-kóng; in-ūi tì-hūi iâⁿ-kè chin-chu.
Job28:19 Kó͘-si̍t ê n̂g-ge̍k kap i bōe-pí--tit; sûn-kim m̄-ta̍t-tio̍h i.
Job28:20 Án-ni tì-hūi tùi tó-ūi lâi? Chhong-bêng tī tó-ūi?
Job28:21 Tì-hūi tùi só͘-ū oa̍h-mi̍h ê ba̍k-chiu ún-ba̍t
Job28:22 Húi-bia̍t kap Sí-bông kóng: Goán chí-ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h i ê hong-siaⁿ.
Job28:23 Chí-ū Siōng-tè chai tì-hūi ê lō͘
Job28:24 In-ūi Siōng-tè ōe khòaⁿ kàu tōe ê ke̍k-thâu
Job28:25 I tēng hong ê khin-tāng
Job28:26 I kā hō͘-chúi tēng kùi-choeh
Job28:27 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h tì-hūi
Job28:28 I tùi lâng kóng: Kèng-ùi Chú chiū-sī tì-hūi; lī-khui pháiⁿ chiū-sī chhong-bêng.
Job29:1 Iok-pek kè-sio̍k kóng:
Job29:2 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ài tò-tńg-khì í-chêng ê sòe-goa̍t
Job29:3 Hit-sî I ê teng chiò tī góa ê thâu-khak
Job29:4 Chhin-chhiūⁿ góa chòng-liân ê sî
Job29:5 Hit-sî Choân-lêng-chiá iáu kap góa tông-chāi
Job29:6 hit-sî góa kiâⁿ--kè ê lō͘ ū lin lim bōe chīn
Job29:7 Hit-sî góa kiâⁿ kàu siâⁿ-mn̂g
Job29:8 siàu-liân-lâng khòaⁿ--tio̍h chiū siám-khui
Job29:9 Léng-siù thêng-chí kóng-ōe
Job29:10 kùi-cho̍k bô chhut-siaⁿ
Job29:11 Thiaⁿ-kìⁿ góa kóng-ōe--ê
Job29:12 Góa kái-kiù ai-kiû ê sàn-chhiah-lâng
Job29:13 Teh-beh sí ê lâng kā góa chiok-hok; góa hō͘ kóaⁿ-hū ê sim hoaⁿ-hí chhiùⁿ-koa.
Job29:14 Góa ēng kong-gī chòe saⁿ chhēng
Job29:15 Góa chòe bông-jîn ê ba̍k-chiu
Job29:16 Góa chòe sàn-chhiah-lâng ê pē kā in chiàu-kò͘
Job29:17 Góa phah-chhùi pháiⁿ-lâng ê gê-chô
Job29:18 Góa chiū kóng
Job29:19 Góa ê kun chhun kàu chúi-piⁿ
Job29:20 Góa ê cheng-le̍k put-sî móa-móa; góa ê keng tī góa ê chhiú put-sî ân-ân.”
Job29:21 Lâng pek-chhiat thèng-hāu góa kóng-ōe
Job29:22 Góa kóng-liáu
Job29:23 In thèng-hāu góa chhin-chhiūⁿ thèng-hāu hō͘-chúi; in ê chhùi tōa khui chhin-chhiūⁿ him-bō͘ chhun-thiⁿ ê hō͘.
Job29:24 In sit-bāng ê sî
Job29:25 Góa chòe siú-léng chí-sī in tio̍h kiâⁿ ê lō͘; góa chhin-chhiūⁿ ông teh chhōa i ê kun-tūi
Job30:1 Hiān-chāi pí góa khah siàu-liân ê lâng thí-chhiò góa; kî-si̍t hiah-ê lâng ê lāu-pē
Job30:2 In tùi góa lóng bô lō͘-ēng; in ê cheng-le̍k í-keng soe-thè.
Job30:3 In in-ūi khiàm-kheh
Job30:4 In tī chháu-phō bán kiâm-chháu chòe chhài chia̍h
Job30:5 In tùi jîn-kûn ê tiong-kan hō͘ lâng kóaⁿ-cháu; lâng tī āu-bīn hoah in
Job30:6 In soah tio̍h tòa tī soaⁿ-kok gûi-hiám ê só͘-chāi
Job30:7 In tī chhiū-nâ lāi chhin-chhiūⁿ iá-siù teh háu
Job30:8 In sī gōng-lâng
Job30:9 Taⁿ
Job30:10 In iàm-ò͘ⁿ góa
Job30:11 In-ūi Siōng-tè pak-toa̍t góa ê bú-khì
Job30:12 Chiah-ê húi-lūi khí-lâi kong-kek góa
Job30:13 In chhiat-tn̄g góa tô-cháu ê lō͘
Job30:14 In chhin-chhiūⁿ kun-tūi kong-phòa siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ
Job30:15 Khióng-pò͘ kā góa ap-tó; góa ê chun-giâm chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ hong sàu-chīn; góa ê hoân-êng ná hûn siau-sòaⁿ.
Job30:16 Taⁿ
Job30:17 Mî--sî góa ê kut-thâu chhin-chhiūⁿ chhì teh chha̍k
Job30:18 Siōng-tè tōa-la̍t chang góa ê gōa-saⁿ
Job30:19 I kā góa hiat tī thô͘-bê tiong; góa liân thô͘-hún hé-hu to m̄-ta̍t.
Job30:20 Góa kiû-kiò lí
Job30:21 Lí pìⁿ-bīn chân-jím tùi-hù góa
Job30:22 Lí hō͘ hong kā góa kńg-lâi-kńg-khì
Job30:23 Góa chai lí beh chhōa góa khì sí-bông ê só͘-chāi
Job30:24 Lâng tú-tio̍h chai-lān hoah-kiù-lâng
Job30:25 Lâng tú-tio̍h hoān-lān
Job30:26 Góa ǹg-bāng hok-khì
Job30:27 Góa ê sim-tn̂g kún-ká bô-thêng; khó͘-lān ê ji̍t-chí chhiong-kek góa.
Job30:28 Góa iu-ut kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì
Job30:29 Góa kap chhâi-lông chòe hiaⁿ-tī
Job30:30 Góa ê phê-hu hoán-o͘ liù-phê; góa ê kut-thâu in-ūi hoat-sio chhàu-hé-ta.
Job30:31 Góa ê khîm tôaⁿ pi-ai ê tiāu; góa ê siau kā thî-khàu ê lâng phōaⁿ-chàu.
Job31:1 Góa kap góa ê ba̍k-chiu li̍p-iok
Job31:2 Siōng-tè tùi thiⁿ-téng chí-tēng ê hūn-gia̍h sī sím-mi̍h? Choân-lêng-chiá tùi téng-bīn hun-phòe ê sán-gia̍p sī sím-mi̍h?
Job31:3 Kiám m̄-sī hō͘ chai-lān lîm-kàu put-gī ê lâng
Job31:4 Siōng-tè kiám m̄-sī teh kàm-chhat góa ê lō͘
Job31:5 Góa nā ū kap hu-ké tàu-tīn kiâⁿ
Job31:6 Siōng-tè thang ēng kong-pîⁿ ê thian-phêng chhìn góa
Job31:7 Góa ê kha-pō͘ nā phian-lī chiàⁿ-lō͘
Job31:8 goān góa só͘ iā--ê
Job31:9 Góa ê sim nā hō͘ pa̍t-lâng ê bó͘ ín-iú--khì
Job31:10 goān góa ê bó͘ kā lâng oe-bō
Job31:11 in-ūi án-ni chòe sī chin kiàn-siàu ê tāi-chì
Job31:12 che sī sio kàu Bia̍t-bông ê tōa-hé
Job31:13 Góa ê lâm-po̍k lú-pī ài góa ūi-tio̍h in chú-chhî kong-tō
Job31:14 Siōng-tè khí-lâi sím-phòaⁿ ê sî
Job31:15 Siōng-tè chō góa
Job31:16 Góa nā bû-sī sàn-chhiah-lâng ê su-iàu
Job31:17 góa nā ka-kī chia̍h
Job31:18 kî-si̍t
Job31:19 góa nā khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng kôaⁿ kah beh sí
Job31:20 góa nā bô the̍h góa ê iûⁿ-mn̂g hō͘ lâng moa thang tit-tio̍h un-loán
Job31:21 góa nā chai ka-kī tī hoat-têng ū koân-sè
Job31:22 goān góa ê chhiú-kut tùi keng-kah-thâu lut--lo̍h-khì
Job31:23 In-ūi tùi Siōng-tè lâi ê chai-hō hō͘ góa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ; I ê ui-giâm hō͘ góa m̄-káⁿ chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì.
Job31:24 Góa nā óa-khò n̂g-kim
Job31:25 góa nā in-ūi châi-bu̍t hù-jū
Job31:26 góa nā in-ūi ji̍t hoat-kng
Job31:27 soah àm-tiong siū ín-iú
Job31:28 che mā-sī sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ eng-kai pān ê chōe
Job31:29 Góa m̄-bat in-ūi khòaⁿ-tio̍h oàn-hūn góa ê lâng siū chai-lān lâi hoaⁿ-hí
Job31:30 Góa m̄-bat iông-ún góa ê chhùi hoān-chōe
Job31:31 Goán chhù-lāi ê lâng lóng án-ni kóng: “M̄-bat ū lâng lâi Iok-pek chia bô chia̍h kàu pá.”
Job31:32 Góa m̄-bat hō͘ chhut-gōa-lâng tī gōa-kháu khùn
Job31:33 Góa m̄-bat chhin-chhiūⁿ it-poaⁿ-lâng am-khàm kè-sit
Job31:34 Góa m̄-bat ūi-tio̍h kiaⁿ kong-chiòng ê phoe-phêng
Job31:35 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ǹg-bāng ū chi̍t ūi ōe thiaⁿ góa kóng! Che sī góa chòe-āu ê sin-sò͘; goān Choân-lêng-chiá ìn-tap góa! Nā bô
Job31:36 góa it-tēng beh kā phāiⁿ tī keng-kah-thâu
Job31:37 Góa beh tùi Siōng-tè soat-bêng góa it-chhè ê kiâⁿ-ta̍h
Job31:38 Góa ê chhân-hn̂g nā chhut-siaⁿ kò góa
Job31:39 góa nā bô la̍p-chîⁿ pe̍h-pe̍h chia̍h chhân-hn̂g ê chhut-sán
Job31:40 goān chhì-á hoat-siⁿ tāi-thòe sió-be̍h
Job32:1 Chit saⁿ ê lâng chiū thêng-chí
Job32:2 Hit-sî ū Pò͘-su -lâng
Job32:3 I mā siū-khì Iok-pek saⁿ ê pêng-iú
Job32:4 Í-lī-hō͘ beh kap Iok-pek kóng-ōe
Job32:5 Í-lī-hō͘ khòaⁿ chit saⁿ ê lâng bô ōe thang ìn
Job32:6 Pò͘-su -lâng Pa-la-ka ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-hō͘ hôe-èng kóng: Góa siàu-liân
Job32:7 Góa kóng: Tio̍h hō͘ nî-hè chōe--ê seng kóng
Job32:8 M̄-kú lâng ê lāi-bīn ū sim-lêng
Job32:9 Khah sī-tōa--ê bô lóng ū tì-hūi; khah nî-lāu--ê bô lóng ōe-hiáu hun-piān sī-hui.
Job32:10 Só͘-í góa kóng
Job32:11 Khòaⁿ ah
Job32:12 Góa ū chù-ì thiaⁿ lín kóng
Job32:13 Lín m̄-thang kóng: Goán ū tì-hūi; ōe iâⁿ i--ê sī Siōng-tè
Job32:14 Iok-pek m̄-sī teh kap góa piān-lūn
Job32:15 Iok-pek ah
Job32:16 In bô kóng-ōe
Job32:17 Góa mā beh kóng góa eng-kai kóng ê ōe
Job32:18 Góa ū chin chōe ōe beh kóng
Job32:19 Góa ê pak-lāi chhin-chhiūⁿ ū hong-ba̍t-ba̍t ê chiú
Job32:20 Góa beh kóng--chhut-lâi
Job32:21 Góa bōe khòaⁿ lâng ê sin-hūn tùi-thāi lâng
Job32:22 Góa bōe-hiáu kā lâng phô͘-tháⁿ; nā ōe
Job33:1 Taⁿ
Job33:2 Góa beh khui-chhùi; góa ê ōe tī chhùi-kháu teh-beh chhut--lâi.
Job33:3 Góa beh sêng-si̍t tùi sim-lāi kóng-chhut; góa beh láu-si̍t kóng góa só͘ chai--ê.
Job33:4 Siōng-tè ê sîn chhòng-chō góa; Choân-lêng-chiá ê khùi hō͘ góa oa̍h-miā.
Job33:5 Lí nā ōe
Job33:6 Góa tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng kap lí kâng-khoán
Job33:7 Góa bô sím-mi̍h thang hō͘ lí kiaⁿ
Job33:8 Lí só͘ kóng--ê
Job33:9 “Góa chheng-khì
Job33:10 Siōng-tè chhē lí-iû kong-kek góa
Job33:11 I ēng kha-khàu khàu góa ê kha
Job33:12 Góa kā lí kóng: Lí kóng chiah-ê lóng m̄-tio̍h
Job33:13 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ kap I cheng-lūn
Job33:14 Kî-si̍t Siōng-tè it-chài soat-bêng
Job33:15 Mî--sî lâng tó tī bîn-chhn̂g khùn tāng-bîn ê sî
Job33:16 tùi in kóng-ōe
Job33:17 beh hō͘ lâng lī-khui pháiⁿ hêng-ûi
Job33:18 hō͘ i ê sìⁿ-miā bián lo̍h Chhim-khiⁿ
Job33:19 Ū lâng tó tī bîn-chhn̂g siū-tio̍h thàng-thiàⁿ ê chek-hoa̍t
Job33:20 tì-kàu thó-ià chia̍h-mi̍h
Job33:21 I siau-sán-lo̍h-bah
Job33:22 I ê sìⁿ-miā kūn-óa Chhim-khiⁿ
Job33:23 Chi̍t-chheng ê thiⁿ-sài tiong-kan nā ū chi̍t ê chòe tiong-kan-jîn
Job33:24 thiⁿ-sài chiū lîn-bín i
Job33:25 I ê bah ōe pí gín-á ê bah khah iù-nńg; i ōe ho̍k-tò siàu-liân ê ji̍t-chí.
Job33:26 I kî-tó Siōng-tè
Job33:27 I ōe tī lâng ê bīn-chêng tōa-siaⁿ kóng
Job33:28 Siōng-tè kiù-sio̍k góa ê sìⁿ-miā bián lo̍h sí-bông ê Chhim-khiⁿ; góa ê sìⁿ-miā ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h kng.”
Job33:29 Khòaⁿ leh
Job33:30 beh kiù lâng thoat-lī Chhim-khiⁿ
Job33:31 Iok-pek ah
Job33:32 Lí nā ū ōe beh kóng
Job33:33 Lí nā bô beh kóng
Job34:1 Í-lī-hō͘ koh kóng:
Job34:2 Lín ū tì-hūi ê lâng
Job34:3 Lán ēng hī-khang thiaⁿ-chhut ì-sù
Job34:4 Lán tio̍h piān-pia̍t sím-mi̍h sī tio̍h
Job34:5 In-ūi Iok-pek kóng
Job34:6 Góa bô m̄-tio̍h
Job34:7 Siáⁿ-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ Iok-pek móa-chhùi thí-chhiò
Job34:8 I kap siâ-ok ê lâng tàu-tīn
Job34:9 in-ūi i bat kóng
Job34:10 Só͘-í
Job34:11 I ōe chiàu lâng ê hêng-ûi kā i pò-èng
Job34:12 Siōng-tè it-tēng bōe chòe m̄-tio̍h; Choân-lêng-chiá bōe tian-tò sī-hui.
Job34:13 Kiám ū lâng chí-phài Siōng-tè chiáng-koán tāi-tōe? Kiám ū lâng chiong choân sè-kài kau-tài I?
Job34:14 Siōng-tè nā chiong I ê sîn kap khùi siu-hôe
Job34:15 só͘-ū ê lâng lóng ōe bia̍t-bông
Job34:16 Lí nā bêng-lí
Job34:17 Siōng-tè nā iàm-ò͘ⁿ kong-pêng
Job34:18 Siōng-tè ōe-tàng tùi kun-ông kóng “Lí sī pháiⁿ-lâng”
Job34:19 I tùi-thāi ū koân-sè ê lâng bōe phian-su
Job34:20 In tī pòaⁿ-mî hut-jiân sí--khì; Siōng-tè tī hūn-loān tiong kā in siau-bia̍t. I m̄-bián ēng lâng ê chhiú chiū ōe châu-bia̍t ū koân-le̍k ê lâng.
Job34:21 Siōng-tè ê ba̍k-chiu chù-ì khòaⁿ ta̍k-ê lâng ê lō͘
Job34:22 O͘-àm á-sī sí-ìm
Job34:23 Siōng-tè m̄-bián tēng sî-kan
Job34:24 I m̄-bián chhâ-mn̄g chiū ōe-tàng thiat-tóe táⁿ-tó ū koân-le̍k ê lâng
Job34:25 In-ūi I chai in ê hêng-ûi; it-iā-chi-kan kā in chhia-tó
Job34:26 I tī chèng-lâng ê ba̍k-chiu chêng phah in
Job34:27 In phian-lī bô tè I
Job34:28 tì-kàu sàn-chhiah-lâng âu-kiò ê siaⁿ thàu kàu I ê bīn-chêng; I ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h khùn-khó͘ ê lâng ê âu-kiò.
Job34:29 Siōng-tè nā tiām-tiām
Job34:30 chiah bián bô kèng-ùi I ê lâng chòe thóng-tī-chiá
Job34:31 Lí kiám ū tùi Siōng-tè kóng “Góa í-keng siū hêng-hoa̍t
Job34:32 góa khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h--ê
Job34:33 Kiám sī Siōng-tè só͘ chòe--ê bô chiàu lí ê ì-sù
Job34:34 Bêng-lí ê lâng tùi góa kóng; tì-hūi ê lâng thiaⁿ góa ê ōe chiū kóng
Job34:35 “ Iok-pek kóng--ê bô tì-sek
Job34:36 Iok-pek tio̍h thiat-tóe siū chhì-giām
Job34:37 I chōe-siōng-ka-chōe
Job35:1 Í-lī-hō͘ koh kóng:
Job35:2 Lí kóng
Job35:3 Lí kóng
Job35:4 Góa beh tùi lí kap lí hiah-ê pêng-iú ìn-tap.
Job35:5 Lí gia̍h-ba̍k khòaⁿ thiⁿ
Job35:6 Lí nā hoān-chōe
Job35:7 Lí nā chèng-ti̍t
Job35:8 Lí ê pháiⁿ hêng-ûi kan-ta ōe hāi-tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ lí chit-khoán lâng; lí ê hó hêng-ûi mā kan-ta ōe lī-ek sè-kan-lâng.
Job35:9 Lâng siū tōa ap-pek chiū âu-kiò
Job35:10 M̄-kú bô lâng mn̄g
Job35:11 
Job35:12 Lâng âu-kiò

Job35:14 Lí kóng

Job35:16 só͘-í
Job36:1 Í-lī-hō͘ koh sòa-chiap kóng:
Job36:2 Lí tán--chi̍t-ē
Job36:3 Góa beh tùi sì-hng chhú tì-sek
Job36:4 Góa ê ōe si̍t-chāi
Job36:5 Siōng-tè ū tōa koân-lêng
Job36:6 I bô hō͘ pháiⁿ-lâng oa̍h--lo̍h-khì; I kong-pêng tùi-thāi khùn-khó͘ ê lâng.
Job36:7 I ê ba̍k-chiu put-sî khòaⁿ-kò͘ gī-lâng
Job36:8 Lâng nā hō͘ só-liān liān--teh
Job36:9 án-ni sī Siōng-tè teh chí-sī in chai ka-kī ê só͘-chòe
Job36:10 I koh khui in ê hī-khang siū kà-sī
Job36:11 In nā sūn-thàn lâi ho̍k-sāi I
Job36:12 In nā m̄ sūn-thàn
Job36:13 Sim-lāi bô Siōng-tè ê lâng put-sî teh siū-khì; in siū chek-hoa̍t mā m̄ kiû Siōng-tè pang-chān.
Job36:14 In ōe tī siàu-liân ê sî chiū sí
Job36:15 Siōng-tè thong-kè khó͘-lān kái-kiù siū-khó͘ ê lâng
Job36:16 Siōng-tè ài-beh kiù lí thoat-chhut chai-lān
Job36:17 Chóng-sī pháiⁿ-lâng èng-tit ê hêng-hoa̍t taⁿ lîm-kàu lí; lí bōe-tàng thoat-lī kong-gī ê sím-phòaⁿ.
Job36:18 M̄-thang in-ūi siū-khì tì-kàu lí bú-bān Siōng-tè
Job36:19 Lí ê châi-hù tùi lí kiám ū lī-ek? Lí ê koân-le̍k tùi lí kiám ū pang-chān?
Job36:20 M̄-thang khat-bō͘ àm-mî
Job36:21 Tio̍h kín-sīn
Job36:22 Khòaⁿ leh
Job36:23 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng chí-tēng I tio̍h chòe ê sū? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kā I kóng “Lí chòe m̄-tio̍h”?
Job36:24 Lâng lóng chhiùⁿ-koa o-ló I
Job36:25 Só͘-ū ê lâng lóng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I ê só͘-chòe
Job36:26 Siōng-tè si̍t-chāi úi-tāi
Job36:27 I khip chi̍t-tih chi̍t-tih ê chúi
Job36:28 chiū tùi thiⁿ lo̍h chhiong-chiok ê hō͘-chúi
Job36:29 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe bêng-pe̍k hûn án-chóaⁿ thí-khui
Job36:30 I tùi I ê chiu-ûi hoat-chhut sih-nà
Job36:31 I ēng chiah-ê tī-lí sè-kan-lâng
Job36:32 I chhiú--ni̍h the̍h sih-nà
Job36:33 Lûi ê siaⁿ piáu-bêng I beh lâi
Job37:1 In-ūi án-ni góa ê sim pho̍k-pho̍k-chhéng
Job37:2 Tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê siaⁿ
Job37:3 I ê sih-nà tùi thiⁿ chit-pêng siā kàu hit-pêng; sih-nà ê kng chiò kàu thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak;
Job37:4 sòa-chiap ū lōng-lōng-háu ê siaⁿ; I ui-giâm ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ lûi teh tân
Job37:5 Siōng-tè hoat-chhut tōa koh kî-īⁿ ê siaⁿ; I chòe tōa-sū
Job37:6 I bēng-lēng seh lo̍h tī tōe-chiūⁿ
Job37:7 I kiò lâng lóng thêng-chí kang-chok
Job37:8 Pah-siù lóng ji̍p hia̍t
Job37:9 Tōa-hong tùi lâm-pêng thàu--lâi; peng-léng ê khì tùi pak-hng chhe--lâi.
Job37:10 Siōng-tè pûn-khùi
Job37:11 I hō͘ ba̍t-hûn chek-móa sip-khì
Job37:12 I chiàu ka-kī ê kè-ōe hō͘ hûn tńg-se̍h
Job37:13 I hō͘ chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng
Job37:14 Iok-pek ah
Job37:15 Siōng-tè án-chóaⁿ bēng-lēng chiah-ê hûn
Job37:16 Hûn án-chóaⁿ tī khong-tiong chek chòe-tui teh pe
Job37:17 Lâm-hong án-chóaⁿ hō͘ tāi-tōe tiām-chēng
Job37:18 Lí kiám ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè chòe-hé pho͘ kiong-chhong
Job37:19 Goán chin han-bān
Job37:20 Kiám ū lâng káⁿ tùi I kóng beh kap I kóng-ōe? Bô lâng hiah gōng ka-kī beh thó-sí.
Job37:21 Taⁿ

Job37:24 Só͘-í
Job38:1 Hit-sî Siōng Chú tùi kńg-lê-á-hong tiong-kan ìn Iok-pek:
Job38:2 Lí sī siáⁿ-lâng
Job38:3 Tio̍h chún-pī hó-sè
Job38:4 Góa hē tāi-tōe ê tōe-ki
Job38:5 Sī sím-mi̍h-lâng koat-tēng tāi-tōe ê tōa sòe? Sī sím-mi̍h-lâng ēng chîn-sòaⁿ niû tāi-tōe
Job38:6 Tāi-tōe ê tōe-ki kiàn-li̍p tī sím-mi̍h téng-bīn
Job38:7 Hit-sî
Job38:8 Tōa-hái tùi tōe ê bú-thai chhiong--chhut-lâi ê sî
Job38:9 Góa ēng hûn chòe saⁿ kā i chhēng
Job38:10 Góa kā hái siat-tēng kài-hān
Job38:11 kóng: Lí kàu chia bōe-ēng-tit pôaⁿ--kè; lí chhiong-kông ê éng kàu chia ûi-chí.
Job38:12 Lí kiám bat bēng-lēng ji̍t-thâu khí--lâi
Job38:13 kah i khiú tōe ê sì-kak-thâu
Job38:14 Án-ni
Job38:15 Pháiⁿ-lâng bōe tit-tio̍h kng
Job38:16 Lí kiám bat ji̍p-khì kàu hái ê goân-thâu
Job38:17 Lâng kiám bat pò lí Sí-bông ê ji̍p-kháu? Lí kiám bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h Im-hú ê mn̂g?
Job38:18 Tāi-tōe jōa khoah lí kiám bat chhek-liōng--kè? Nā bat
Job38:19 Lí kiám chai kng tùi tó-ūi lâi
Job38:20 thang chhōa in tńg-khì in tau? Lí kiám chai khì in chhù ê lō͘?
Job38:21 Lí eng-kai chai
Job38:22 Lí kiám bat ji̍p-khì seh ê chhng-khò͘
Job38:23 Chiah-ê lóng sī góa ūi-tio̍h hoān-lān ê sî
Job38:24 Sih-nà tùi sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi siā--chhut-khì? Tang-hong tùi tó-ūi sàu-kè tāi-tōe?
Job38:25 Siáⁿ-lâng kā tōa-hō͘ khui chúi-lō͘
Job38:26 Siáⁿ-lâng hō͘ hō͘ lo̍h tī khòng-iá
Job38:27 hō͘ pha-hng hong-hòe ê thó͘-tōe tit-tio̍h chhiong-chiok ê hō͘-chúi
Job38:28 Hō͘-chúi kiám ū lāu-pē? Lō͘-chúi siáⁿ-lâng siⁿ--ê?
Job38:29 Peng tùi siáⁿ-lâng ê thai chhut--lâi? Thiⁿ-téng ê sng siáⁿ-lâng siⁿ--ê?
Job38:30 Siáⁿ-lâng hō͘ chúi pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ chio̍h-thâu hiah-ni̍h tēng
Job38:31 Lí kiám ōe-tàng kā Báu-chhiⁿ pa̍k--khí-lâi
Job38:32 Lí kiám ōe-tàng hō͘ chhiⁿ-sîn chiàu kùi-choeh chhut-hiān
Job38:33 Lí kiám chai thiⁿ ê tēng-lu̍t
Job38:34 Lí kiám ōe-tàng chhut tōa-siaⁿ bēng-lēng hûn
Job38:35 Lí kiám ōe-tàng kiò sih-nà siā--chhut-khì
Job38:36 Siáⁿ-lâng hō͘ âng-lō͘-chiáu ū tì-hūi chai Nî-lô-hô sím-mi̍h sî ōe hoàn-lām
Job38:37 Siáⁿ-lâng ū tì-hūi thang sǹg hûn ê sò͘-bo̍k
Job38:38 hō͘ thô͘-hún pìⁿ-chòe lō͘-kô͘-bê
Job38:39 Sai-á-kiáⁿ tī tōng-lāi khut-teh tán
Job38:40 
Job38:41 Sòe-chiah o͘-a bô thang chia̍h pe-lâi-pe-khì
Job39:1 Soaⁿ-giâm tiong ê iá soaⁿ-iûⁿ tī-sî siⁿ-kiáⁿ
Job39:2 In hoâi-thai tī-sî kàu-ge̍h
Job39:3 In khut--lo̍h-khì
Job39:4 in ê kiáⁿ tī soaⁿ-iá chiām-chiām tióng-tōa ióng-chòng
Job39:5 Siáⁿ-lâng pàng iá-lû chū-iû? Siáⁿ-lâng tháu-khui soaⁿ-lû ê soh?
Job39:6 Góa ēng khòng-iá hō͘ in chòe chhù
Job39:7 Iá-lû thí-chhiò siâⁿ-lāi ê soan-hoa
Job39:8 Tōa-soaⁿ sió-soaⁿ lóng sī in ê chháu-po͘; in chhē ta̍k-khoán chhiⁿ-chhùi ê chháu lâi chia̍h.
Job39:9 Iá-gû kiám beh kā lí chòe kang
Job39:10 Lí kiám ōe-tàng ēng soh pa̍k iá-gû lâi lôe-chhân? I kiám ōe tè lí khì kā soaⁿ-kok ê tōe pê hō͘ pîⁿ?
Job39:11 Lí kiám thang in-ūi i la̍t tōa chiū khò i
Job39:12 Lí kiám ōe-tàng sìn-jīm i chiong lí ê siu-sêng tòa--tńg-lâi
Job39:13 Tô-chiáu phah-piàⁿ ia̍t-si̍t
Job39:14 I kā nn̄g pàng tī thô͘-kha
Job39:15 bô siūⁿ-tio̍h kha ōe lap--tio̍h
Job39:16 I bô hó-hó chiàu-kò͘ i ê kiáⁿ
Job39:17 In-ūi Siōng-tè bô hō͘ i tì-hūi
Job39:18 M̄-kú i chi̍t-ē théng-sin cháu
Job39:19 Bé ê la̍t kiám sī lí hō͘ i--ê? I ām-kún ê chang kiám sī lí kā i chhēng--ê?
Job39:20 Lí kiám ū hō͘ i chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu-meh hiah gâu thiàu
Job39:21 I tī soaⁿ-kok tiong chhut-la̍t pê thô͘
Job39:22 I bô teh kiaⁿ
Job39:23 Seng-khu téng ê chìⁿ-tē khiang-khiang-kiò; tn̂g-chhiuⁿ
Job39:24 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h lat-pah ê siaⁿ chiū tòng bōe tiâu
Job39:25 Lat-pah chi̍t-ē tân
Job39:26 Bā-hio̍h thí-si̍t pe-khì lâm-pêng
Job39:27 Eng-chiáu chhèng-koân
Job39:28 I tiàm tī soaⁿ-giâm
Job39:29 tùi hia ba̍k-chiu kim-kim siòng hn̄g-hn̄g
Job39:30 Si-thé tī tó-ūi
Job40:1 Siōng Chú koh tùi Iok-pek kóng:
Job40:2 Hò͘ⁿ-piān ê lâng kiám thang kap Choân-lêng-chiá cheng-lūn? Ài chí-chek Siōng-tè ê
Job40:3 Iok-pek chiū ìn Siōng Chú kóng:
Job40:4 Góa chin bî-sòe
Job40:5 Góa í-keng kóng chi̍t piàn
Job40:6 Siōng Chú chiū tùi kńg-lê-á-hong tiong-kan ìn Iok-pek:
Job40:7 Tio̍h chún-pī hó-sè
Job40:8 Lí sī beh hó͘-tēng góa ê chhâi-koat
Job40:9 Lí kiám ū chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè hiah ū-la̍t ê chhiú-kut? Lí kiám ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ góa hoat-chhut lûi lōng-lōng-háu ê siaⁿ?
Job40:10 Án-ni
Job40:11 Tio̍h piàⁿ-chhut lí móa-pak ê siū-khì
Job40:12 Khòaⁿ-tio̍h it-chhè kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng
Job40:13 Tio̍h kā in chòe-chi̍t-ē tâi tī thô͘-tóe
Job40:14 Án-ni
Job40:15 Lí khòaⁿ hô-bé
Job40:16 I ê khùi-la̍t chāi-tī io; i ê la̍t chāi-tī pak-tó͘-kun.
Job40:17 I ê bé-liu khiàu--khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū; i ê tōa-thúi-kun chho͘-ióng;
Job40:18 i ê kut-thâu chhin-chhiūⁿ tâng ê kóng; i ê sù-chi chhin-chhiūⁿ thih ê thiāu.
Job40:19 I sī Siōng-tè ê kia̍t-chok; chí-ū i ê Chhòng-chō-chiá ōe-tàng kā i chè-ho̍k.
Job40:20 Tōa-soaⁿ sió-soaⁿ kiong-kip i chia̍h-mi̍h; chhân-iá ê pah-siù tī hia thit-thô.
Job40:21 I tó tī liân-hoe-hio̍h kha
Job40:22 Liân-hoe-hio̍h kā i jia--teh; khoe-piⁿ ê liú-chhiū kā i ûi--teh.
Job40:23 Hô-chúi hoàn-lām
Job40:24 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng tī i ba̍k-chiu kim-kim ê sî kā i lia̍h--tio̍h
Job41:1 Lí kiám ōe-tàng ēng kau-á thoa hái-siù khí--lâi
Job41:2 Lí kiám ōe-tàng ēng soh chhng-kè i ê phīⁿ
Job41:3 I kiám ōe it-ti̍t kiû lí lîn-bín
Job41:4 I kiám ōe kap lí li̍p-iok
Job41:5 Lí kiám ōe kā i khòaⁿ-chòe chiáu-á kap i thit-thô
Job41:6 Seng-lí-lâng kiám ōe kā i tòng-chòe siong-phín phah-bōe? In kiám ōe kā i chhiat chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè sòaⁿ-sòaⁿ-á bōe?
Job41:7 Lí kiám ōe-tàng ēng hî-pio kā i kui seng-khu chha̍k-thàu-thàu
Job41:8 Lí kā kha̍p khòaⁿ-bāi leh! Lí choa̍t-tùi m̄-káⁿ koh kap i piàⁿ!
Job41:9 Siūⁿ-beh kā chè-ho̍k
Job41:10 Bô lâng hiah hó-táⁿ káⁿ jiá i. Án-ni
Job41:11 Siáⁿ-lâng tùi-khòng góa
Job41:12 Góa bōe-tàng bô kóng chit-ê hái-siù ê seng-khu
Job41:13 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng pak i ê gōa-saⁿ? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng ji̍p-khì i gê-chô ê tiong-kan?
Job41:14 Siáⁿ-lâng káⁿ khui i ê chhùi? I sì-kho͘-lìn-tńg ê chhùi-khí lóng chin khióng-pò͘.
Job41:15 Teh pó-hō͘ i--ê sī chi̍t-pâi chi̍t-pâi ê lân
Job41:16 chi̍t-tè chi̍t-tè thia̍p chòe-hé
Job41:17 lóng liân chòe-hé
Job41:18 I phah-ka-chhiùⁿ ōe siā-chhut kng; i ê ba̍k-chiu chhin-chhiūⁿ thàu-chá ê ji̍t-kng.
Job41:19 I ê chhùi thò͘-chhut hé-iām
Job41:20 I ê phīⁿ-khang chhèng-ian
Job41:21 I ê khì ōe tiám-to̍h thô͘-thòaⁿ
Job41:22 I ê ām-kún ū-la̍t; tú-tio̍h i--ê lóng kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah.
Job41:23 I ê pak-tó͘-bah kiat-si̍t
Job41:24 I ê heng-khám tēng kah chhin-chhiūⁿ chio̍h-thâu
Job41:25 I chi̍t-ē khí--lâi
Job41:26 Lâng ēng kiàm chha̍k bōe ji̍p--khì
Job41:27 I khòaⁿ thih chòe ta-chháu
Job41:28 Keng-chìⁿ bōe-tàng kā i heh-kiaⁿ kóaⁿ-cháu; i khòaⁿ hìⁿ-soh ēng ê chio̍h-thâu chòe chháu-iù-á.
Job41:29 I khòaⁿ kùn-á chòe be̍h-kó
Job41:30 I ê pak-tó͘-ē chhin-chhiūⁿ lāi ê hiā-phìⁿ; i kiâⁿ--kè ê só͘-chāi chhin-chhiūⁿ thih-pê pê--kè ê nōa-thô͘.
Job41:31 I hō͘ chhim-ian chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-tiáⁿ bo̍k-bo̍k-kún
Job41:32 I kiâⁿ--kè ê lō͘ hoat-kng
Job41:33 Tōe-chiūⁿ bô chi̍t ê siū-chō-bu̍t ōe-tàng kap i pí; i sím-mi̍h lóng m̄ kiaⁿ.
Job41:34 I khòaⁿ-khin it-chhè kiông-béng ê tōng-bu̍t; i sī pah-siù chi ông.
Job42:1 Iok-pek ìn Siōng Chú kóng:
Job42:2 Góa chai lí ta̍k-hāng lóng ōe; lí ê kè-ōe bô lâng ōe-tàng chó͘-tòng.
Job42:3 Lí mn̄g
Job42:4 Chhiáⁿ lí thiaⁿ
Job42:5 Góa chêng bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ lí
Job42:6 Só͘-í
Job42:7 Siōng Chú tùi Iok-pek kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
Job42:8 Taⁿ lín tio̍h khan chhit chiah gû-káng
Job42:9 Án-ni
Job42:10 Iok-pek thòe i ê pêng-iú kî-tó liáu-āu
Job42:11 Hit-sî i ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Job42:12 Án-ni
Job42:13 I koh ū chhit ê kiáⁿ
Job42:14 I kā tōa cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-bí-má
Job42:15 Choân-tōe chhē bô chhin-chhiūⁿ Iok-pek ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hiah-ni̍h súi ê lú-chú. Iok-pek hō͘ chiah-ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kap in ê hiaⁿ-tī pîⁿ-pîⁿ tit-tio̍h châi-sán.
Job42:16 Āu-lâi Iok-pek koh chia̍h chi̍t-pah sì-cha̍p hè
Job42:17 Chòe-āu
Psalms1:1 Bô thàn pháiⁿ-lâng ê kè-bô͘
Psalms1:2 
Psalms1:3 I chhin-chhiūⁿ ké-chí-chhiū chai tī khoe-piⁿ
Psalms1:4 Pháiⁿ-lâng chiū m̄-sī án-ni; i chhin-chhiūⁿ chho͘-khng hō͘ hong chhe sòaⁿ--khì.
Psalms1:5 Só͘-í sím-phòaⁿ ê sî
Psalms1:6 In-ūi gī-lâng ê tō-lō͘ Siōng Chú teh khòaⁿ-kò͘; pháiⁿ-lâng chí-ū bia̍t-bông chi̍t tiâu lō͘.
Psalms2:1 Lia̍t-kok sī-án-chóaⁿ teh chō siaⁿ-sè? Bān-bîn sī-án-chóaⁿ kè-ōe khang-khang ê im-bô͘?
Psalms2:2 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông teh pâi-tīn
Psalms2:3 In kóng

Psalms2:5 I siū-khì kā in kéng-kò
Psalms2:6 I kóng

Psalms2:12 chiah bián I khí sèng-tē

Psalms4:7 Lí hō͘ góa sim-lāi ū hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms4:8 Góa beh an-jiân tó-teh khùn

Psalms5:6 Kóng pe̍h-chha̍t--ê

Psalms6:2 Siōng Chú ah

Psalms6:4 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms6:5 In-ūi sí-lâng bōe kì-liām lí; tī Im-hú
Psalms6:6 Góa in-ūi haiⁿ-haiⁿ-chhan ià-siān; góa ta̍k-mî lâu ba̍k-sái im góa ê bîn-chhn̂g
Psalms6:7 Góa in-ūi iu-būn ba̍k-chiu phah-pháiⁿ
Psalms6:8 Lín chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng lóng tio̍h lī-khui góa
Psalms6:9 Siōng Chú ū thiaⁿ góa ê khún-kiû; Siōng Chú beh chiap-la̍p góa ê kî-tó.
Psalms6:10 Góa ê tùi-te̍k lóng ōe kiàn-siàu tōa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ; in ōe hut-jiân kiàn-siàu thiat-thè.
Psalms7:1 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms7:2 Nā bô
Psalms7:3 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms7:4 
Psalms7:5 chiū chhut-chāi tùi-te̍k jip góa
Psalms7:6 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms7:7 Goān bān-bîn lóng chū-chi̍p tī lí chiu-ûi; goān lí chē tī pó-chō tī-lí in.
Psalms7:8 Siōng Chú sím-phòaⁿ bān-bîn. Siōng Chú ah
Psalms7:9 Kiû lí hō͘ pháiⁿ-lâng bōe koh chòe pháiⁿ
Psalms7:10 Siōng-tè sī góa ê tún-pâi; I chín-kiù sim chèng-ti̍t ê lâng.
Psalms7:11 Siōng-tè sī kong-gī ê sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ; I ta̍k-ji̍t tùi put-gī ê lâng hoat siū-khì.
Psalms7:12 Lâng nā m̄ hoán-hóe
Psalms7:13 I chún-pī tì-miā ê bú-khì; I siā--ê sī hé ê chìⁿ.
Psalms7:14 Lí khòaⁿ
Psalms7:15 I ó͘ khut
Psalms7:16 I ê to̍k-hāi ōe tò-tńg kàu ka-kī ê thâu-khak; i ê kiông-pō ōe lak tī ka-kī ê thâu-khak téng.
Psalms7:17 Góa beh in-ūi Siōng Chú ê kong-gī kám-siā I; góa beh chheng-chàn Siōng Chú — Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê miâ.
Psalms8:1 Siōng Chú — goán ê Chú ah
Psalms8:2 tùi gín-á kap eⁿ-á ê chhùi chhiùⁿ--chhut-lâi. Lí khí-chō iàu-sài hông-pī te̍k-jîn
Psalms8:3 Khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō ê thiⁿ
Psalms8:4 ah

Psalms8:6 Lí chí-phài i koán-lí lí chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō ê bān-mi̍h; lí hō͘ i ū koân-pèng chi-phòe it-chhè:
Psalms8:7 It-chhè ê iûⁿ kap gû

Psalms9:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms9:2 Góa beh in-ūi lí hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k; Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms9:3 Góa ê tùi-te̍k oa̍t-tńg-sin thiat-thè poa̍h-tó
Psalms9:4 Lí ū thòe góa sin-oan
Psalms9:5 Lí chek-pī lia̍t-pang
Psalms9:6 Tùi-te̍k siū húi-bia̍t
Psalms9:7 M̄-kú Siōng Chú chē-ūi choh-ông kàu éng-oán; I í-keng an-tì I ê pó-chō beh sím-phòaⁿ.
Psalms9:8 I beh chiàu kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan
Psalms9:9 Siōng Chú sī siū ap-pek ê lâng ê iàu-sài
Psalms9:10 Bat lí ê miâ ê lâng ōe óa-khò lí; in-ūi Siōng Chú
Psalms9:11 Tio̍h chheng-chàn tī Sek-an choh-ông ê Siōng Chú
Psalms9:12 In-ūi I bô bōe-kì-tit khùn-khó͘ ê lâng
Psalms9:13 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms9:14 hō͘ góa thang kóng-khí lí it-chhè thang o-ló ê tāi-chì. Góa beh tī Sek-an ê siâⁿ-mn̂g ūi-tio̍h lí ê chín-kiù hoan-ho͘.
Psalms9:15 Lia̍t-pang poa̍h-lo̍h ka-kī só͘ ku̍t ê hām-khiⁿ; in ê kha tîⁿ tī in pì-bi̍t tiuⁿ ê lô-bāng.
Psalms9:16 Siōng Chú í-keng hián-bêng ka-kī
Psalms9:17 Pháiⁿ-lâng lóng ōe lo̍h Im-hú; m̄ jīn Siōng-tè ê lia̍t-pang mā ōe án-ni.
Psalms9:18 Sàn-chhiah-lâng it-tēng bōe éng-oán hō͘ Siōng-tè bōe-kì--tit; khùn-khó͘-lâng ê ǹg-bāng it-tēng bōe éng-oán bô--khì.

Psalms14:1 Gōng-lâng sim-lāi kóng
Psalms14:2 Siōng Chú tùi thiⁿ àⁿ lo̍h-lâi khòaⁿ sè-kan-lâng
Psalms14:3 In lóng kiâⁿ bê-lō͘
Psalms14:4 Chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng kiám lóng m̄ chai? In thun-chia̍h góa ê chú-bîn chhin-chhiūⁿ teh chia̍h-pn̄g; in bô kiû-kiò Siōng Chú.
Psalms14:5 Chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng ōe tōa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ; in-ūi Siōng-tè tī gī-lâng ê tiong-kan.
Psalms14:6 Sàn-chhiah-lâng ê kè-ōe
Psalms14:7 Goān Í-sek-lia̍t ê chín-kiù tùi Sek-an chhut! Goān Siōng Chú chhōa I siū-lia̍h ê chú-bîn tò-tńg--lâi! Hit-sî

Psalms15:2 Chiū-sī hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t
Psalms15:3 I bô ēng chhùi-chi̍h tiòng-siong lâng; i bô hām-hāi pêng-iú
Psalms15:4 I ê ba̍k-chiu biáu-sī choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng
Psalms15:5 I chîⁿ chioh--lâng m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h lī-sek; i bô siu hóe-lō͘ hām-hāi bû-ko͘ ê lâng. Chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì ê lâng ōe éng-oán khiā-chāi.
Psalms16:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms16:2 Góa bat tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Psalms16:3 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê sèng-tô͘ si̍t-chāi chin chun-kùi; kap in chòe-hé sī góa siōng-tōa ê hoaⁿ-hí.
Psalms16:4 Khì tè pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng ê lâng it-tēng ke-thiⁿ thòng-khó͘! Góa m̄ chham-ú in ê hiàn-chè
Psalms16:5 Siōng Chú
Psalms16:6 Lí chiong chin súi ê thó͘-tōe pun hō͘ góa; góa tit--tio̍h ê sán-gia̍p si̍t-chāi chin hó!
Psalms16:7 Góa beh chheng-chàn kà-sī góa ê Siōng Chú; mî--sî
Psalms16:8 Góa put-sî kám-siū Siōng Chú ê tông-chāi; I tī góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Psalms16:9 Só͘-í
Psalms16:10 In-ūi lí bōe kā góa pàng-sak tī Im-hú
Psalms16:11 Lí ōe chí-sī góa oa̍h-miā ê tō-lō͘. Tī lí bīn-chêng
Psalms17:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms17:2 Kiû lí ēng ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ-chhut sī-hui; kiû lí phòaⁿ góa bô chōe.
Psalms17:3 Lí ū khó-giām góa ê sim
Psalms17:4 Góa chun-thàn lí só͘ kóng ê ōe
Psalms17:5 Góa ê kha it-ti̍t kiâⁿ lí ê lō͘
Psalms17:6 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms17:7 Kiû lí hián-chhut lí kî-biāu put-piàn ê thiàⁿ
Psalms17:8 Kiû lí pó-hō͘ góa
Psalms17:9 Kiû lí hō͘ góa thoat-lī chhiúⁿ-kiap góa ê pháiⁿ-lâng
Psalms17:10 In that-ba̍t lîn-bín ê sim; in ê chhùi kóng kiau-ngō͘ chū-tāi ê ōe.
Psalms17:11 In tui-jip góa
Psalms17:12 In chhin-chhiūⁿ sai siàu-siūⁿ beh thiah-chhùi góa

Psalms18:1 Siōng Chú — góa ê khùi-la̍t ah
Psalms18:2 Siōng Chú sī góa ê soaⁿ-giâm
Psalms18:3 Góa kiû-kiò eng-kai siū chheng-chàn ê Siōng Chú
Psalms18:4 Sí-bông ê soh tîⁿ góa; húi-bia̍t ê tōa-chúi hō͘ góa kiaⁿ.
Psalms18:5 Im-hú ê soh khún-pa̍k góa; Sí-bông ê lô-bāng bāng-tio̍h góa.
Psalms18:6 Góa tī khó͘-lān tiong kî-kiû Siōng Chú
Psalms18:7 I siū-khì
Psalms18:8 Tùi I ê phīⁿ-khang ū ian chhèng-chhut; tùi I ê chhùi ū hé hoat-chhut
Psalms18:9 I thí-khui thiⁿ
Psalms18:10 I khiâ thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek teh pe; I chē hong ê si̍t chhiong--lo̍h-lâi.
Psalms18:11 I ēng o͘-àm chòe I ún-ba̍t ê só͘-chāi
Psalms18:12 Peng-pha̍uh kap teh to̍h ê thòaⁿ tùi I lîm-chāi ê kng siā--chhut-lâi
Psalms18:13 Siōng Chú tùi thiⁿ-téng tân-lûi
Psalms18:14 I siā-chìⁿ
Psalms18:15 Siōng Chú
Psalms18:16 I tùi téng-bīn chhun-chhiú khiú góa
Psalms18:17 I kiù góa thoat-lī hiong-béng ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms18:18 Góa tú-tio̍h chai-lān ê sî
Psalms18:19 I chhōa góa kàu khui-khoah an-choân ê só͘-chāi; I kiù góa
Psalms18:20 Siōng Chú in-ūi góa chèng-ti̍t pò-tap góa
Psalms18:21 Góa chun-siú Siōng Chú ê tō-lō͘
Psalms18:22 I só͘-ū ê bēng-lēng góa ū chun-siú; I ê kui-lē góa m̄-bat pàng-sak.
Psalms18:23 Góa tī I ê bīn-chêng bô thang chí-chek; góa pó-siú ka-kī lī-khui chōe-ok.
Psalms18:24 In-ūi góa chèng-ti̍t
Psalms18:25 Chû-ài ê lâng
Psalms18:26 chheng-khì ê lâng
Psalms18:27 Khùn-khó͘ ê lâng
Psalms18:28 Lí tiám-to̍h góa ê teng; Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè kā góa ê o͘-àm pìⁿ-chòe kng-bêng.
Psalms18:29 Góa in-ūi óa-khò lí
Psalms18:30 Chit-ūi Siōng-tè
Psalms18:31 Siōng Chú í-gōa
Psalms18:32 Chit-ūi Siōng-tè ēng khùi-la̍t chòe tòa hâ góa ê io; I ín-chhōa góa kiâⁿ an-choân ê lō͘.
Psalms18:33 I hō͘ góa ê kha chhin-chhiūⁿ lo̍k gâu cháu
Psalms18:34 I hùn-liān góa ê chhiú gâu kau-chiàn
Psalms18:35 Lí ēng tún-pâi kái-kiù góa
Psalms18:36 Lí hō͘ góa ta̍h ê tōe khui-khoah an-choân; góa ê kha m̄-bat ta̍h-thu̍t.
Psalms18:37 Góa tui góa ê tùi-te̍k kàu jip--tio̍h in; in bô bia̍t-bông
Psalms18:38 Góa phah in thiám-thiám
Psalms18:39 Lí sù góa khùi-la̍t hō͘ góa gâu kau-chiàn; lí hō͘ kong-kek góa ê lâng lóng hâng-ho̍k tī góa ē-bīn.
Psalms18:40 Lí hō͘ góa ê tùi-te̍k oa̍t-tńg-sin tô-cháu
Psalms18:41 In kiû-kiò
Psalms18:42 Góa kā in tûi kàu chhùi-chhùi
Psalms18:43 Lí kiù góa thoat-lī hoán-poān góa ê jîn-bîn; lí siat-li̍p góa chòe lia̍t-pang ê thâu. Góa m̄-bat ê jîn-bîn ōe ho̍k-sāi góa;
Psalms18:44 gōa-pang ê lâng khut-sin tâu-hâng
Psalms18:45 Gōa-pang ê lâng sit-táⁿ
Psalms18:46 Siōng Chú éng-oán oa̍h--teh! Goān góa óa-khò ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ siū chheng-chàn; goān kiù góa ê Siōng-tè siū ko-kú.
Psalms18:47 I chiū-sī ūi góa sin-oan hit-ūi Siōng-tè; I hō͘ chèng-lâng hâng-ho̍k tī góa kha-ē.
Psalms18:48 I kiù góa thoat-lī góa ê tùi-te̍k. Siōng Chú ah
Psalms18:49 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms18:50 Siōng Chú sù ke̍k-tōa ê kiù-un hō͘ I siat-li̍p ê ông
Psalms19:1 Thiⁿ soan-pò͘ Siōng-tè ê êng-iāu; kiong-chhong thoân-iông I ê chok-ûi.
Psalms19:2 Chit-ji̍t tùi hit-ji̍t kóng-ōe; chit-mî tùi hit-mî thoân-pò͘ tì-sek;
Psalms19:3 bô-giân-bô-gú
Psalms19:4 In ê siaⁿ-im thoân kàu choân sè-kài; in ê giân-sû thoân kàu thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak. Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h ji̍t-thâu tī thiⁿ-téng tah pò͘-pîⁿ.
Psalms19:5 Ji̍t-thâu chhin-chhiūⁿ sin-lông tùi tōng-pông chhut--lâi
Psalms19:6 tùi thiⁿ ê chit-pêng chhut--lâi
Psalms19:7 Siōng Chú ê Lu̍t-hoat oân-choân
Psalms19:8 Siōng Chú ê lu̍t-lē kong-chèng
Psalms19:9 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú sī sûn-chin
Psalms19:10 pí kim
Psalms19:11 Lu̍t-hoat hō͘ lí ê po̍k-jîn tit-tio̍h kéng-kài; siú kài-bēng chiū ū tōa pò-siúⁿ.
Psalms19:12 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe chai ka-kī ê chhò-gō͘? Kiû lí sià-bián góa bô-ì-tiong hoān ê kè-sit!
Psalms19:13 Kiû lí pó-siú lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms19:14 Siōng Chú — góa ê pī-lān-só͘
Psalms20:1 Goān Siōng Chú tī hoān-lān ê ji̍t ìn-tap lí; goān Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè kā lí khǹg tī koân ê só͘-chāi pó-hō͘ lí.
Psalms20:2 Goān I tùi sèng-só͘ pang-chān lí
Psalms20:3 Goān I ōe-kì-tit lí it-chhè ê sò͘-chè
Psalms20:4 Goān I chiàu lí ê sim só͘ ài sù hō͘ lí
Psalms20:5 Goán beh in-ūi lí ê tek-sèng chhiùⁿ-koa; goán beh hōng Siōng-tè ê miâ khèng-chiok lí ê sèng-lī. Goān Siōng Chú sêng-choân lí it-chhè ê kî-kiû.
Psalms20:6 Taⁿ góa chai Siōng Chú ōe kiù I soán-li̍p ê ông
Psalms20:7 Ū lâng óa-khò chhia
Psalms20:8 In ōe thâi-su tó--lo̍h-khì; goán ōe thâi-iâⁿ khiā-chāi-chāi.

Psalms21:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms21:2 I ê sim ì-ài--ê
Psalms21:3 In-ūi lí ēng tōa hok-khì teh gêng-chiap i
Psalms21:4 I tùi lí kiû oa̍h-miā
Psalms21:5 I in-ūi lí hō͘ i ê sèng-lī tit-tio̍h tōa êng-kng; lí chiong chun-kùi ui-giâm sù hō͘ i.
Psalms21:6 Lí hō͘ i ū tōa hok-khì kàu éng-oán
Psalms21:7 In-ūi ông óa-khò Siōng Chú
Psalms21:8 Ông ê chhiú ōe lia̍h-tio̍h it-chhè ê tùi-te̍k; i ê chiàⁿ-chhiú ōe lia̍h-tio̍h só͘-ū oàn-hūn i ê lâng.
Psalms21:9 I chi̍t-ē chhut-hiān
Psalms21:10 In ê kiáⁿ-sun ōe tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siū châu-bia̍t; in ê hō͘-tāi ōe tùi lâng ê tiong-kan siau-sit.
Psalms21:11 In beh ēng im-bô͘ hām-hāi ông
Psalms21:12 Lí beh hō͘ in oa̍t-tńg-sin tô-cháu

Psalms22:1 Góa ê Siōng-tè
Psalms22:2 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms22:3 Lí sī sèng ê Siōng-tè
Psalms22:4 Goán ê lia̍t-chó͘ óa-khò lí; in óa-khò lí
Psalms22:5 In ai-kiû lí
Psalms22:6 M̄-kú góa m̄-sī lâng
Psalms22:7 Khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê lâng lóng kā góa thí-chhiò
Psalms22:8 “Lí chiong pún-sin kau-tài Siōng Chú
Psalms22:9 Lí tùi bú-thai kā góa chiap--chhut-lâi; lí hō͘ góa tī lāu-bú ê heng-chêng tit-tio̍h an-ún.
Psalms22:10 Góa tùi chhut bú-thai chiū kau-thok lí
Psalms22:11 Kiû lí m̄-thang lī góa hn̄g-hn̄g
Psalms22:12 Ū chin chōe gû-káng pau-ûi góa; Pa-san ê iá-gû sì-bīn ûi-khùn góa.
Psalms22:13 In chhin-chhiūⁿ sai khui-chhùi tōa-siaⁿ háu
Psalms22:14 Góa ê khùi-la̍t chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi piàⁿ-liáu-liáu; góa ê kut-thâu lóng thu̍t-lûn; góa ê sim chhin-chhiūⁿ la̍h tī pak-lāi siau-iûⁿ.
Psalms22:15 Góa ê cheng-le̍k ta--khì
Psalms22:16 Pháiⁿ-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ kui-kûn káu pau-ûi góa
Psalms22:17 Góa ê kut-thâu lóng ōe-sǹg--tit; in teh khòaⁿ góa
Psalms22:18 In pun góa ê gōa-phàu
Psalms22:19 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms22:20 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī to-kiàm
Psalms22:21 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī sai ê chhùi; lí í-keng ū thiaⁿ góa
Psalms22:22 Góa beh tùi góa ê hiaⁿ-tī pò-iông lí ê miâ; góa beh tī chū-hōe tiong o-ló lí.
Psalms22:23 Lín kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê
Psalms22:24 In-ūi I bōe khòaⁿ-khin sàn-chhiah-lâng
Psalms22:25 Góa beh tī tōa chū-hōe tiong chheng-chàn lí ê só͘-chòe; góa beh tī kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê lâng bīn-chêng siā góa ê goān.
Psalms22:26 Sàn-chhiah-lâng ōe tit-tio̍h pá-chiok; chhē-kiû Siōng Chú ê lâng ōe chheng-chàn I. Goān lín ê sim éng-oán ū oa̍h-khì!
Psalms22:27 Tōe-chiūⁿ só͘-ū ê lâng lóng ōe-kì-tit Siōng Chú ê só͘-chòe lâi kui-sūn I; sè-chiūⁿ bān-cho̍k lóng ōe tī I bīn-chêng kèng-pài.
Psalms22:28 In-ūi chú-koân sio̍k tī Siōng Chú
Psalms22:29 Tōe-chiūⁿ só͘-ū hù-kùi ê lâng ōe chū-chi̍p lim-chia̍h
Psalms22:30 In ê kiáⁿ-sun ōe ho̍k-sāi I; Chú ê chok-ûi ōe thoân kàu in ê hō͘-tāi.
Psalms22:31 Lâng ōe tùi chiong-lâi beh chhut-sì ê chú-bîn kóng

Psalms23:5 Tī góa tùi-te̍k ê bīn-chêng
Psalms23:6 Lí ê un-tián chû-ài it-tēng chi̍t-sì-lâng kap góa chòe phōaⁿ; góa beh éng-oán tòa tī Siōng Chú lí ê chhù.
Psalms24:1 Tōe kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê bān-mi̍h lóng sio̍k Siōng Chú; Sè-kài kap tiàm tī hia ê oa̍h-mi̍h mā lóng sio̍k I.
Psalms24:2 I kā tōe khǹg tī tōa-hái ê téng-bīn
Psalms24:3 Sím-mi̍h khoán lâng ōe-tàng chiūⁿ Siōng Chú ê soaⁿ? Sím-mi̍h khoán lâng ōe-tàng ji̍p I ê sèng-tiān?
Psalms24:4 Chiū-sī chhiú chheng-khì

Psalms28:9 Kiû lí kái-kiù lí ê chú-bîn
Psalms29:1 Thian-kài tāi-lêng-chiá ê chèng kiáⁿ-jî ah
Psalms29:2 Tio̍h chiong Siōng Chú ê miâ èng-ū ê êng-kng kui hō͘ I
Psalms29:3 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ tī chúi-bīn teh hiáng; êng-kng ê Siōng-tè khí-lûi tōa tân. Siōng Chú lîm-chāi tī hái-iûⁿ téng-bīn.
Psalms29:4 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ ū tōa khùi-la̍t; Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ ui-giâm móa-móa.
Psalms29:5 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ phah-chi̍h pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū; Siōng Chú phah-chhùi Lê-pa-lūn ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū.
Psalms29:6 I hō͘ Lê-pa-lūn tiô-thiàu chhin-chhiūⁿ gû-á-kiáⁿ
Psalms29:7 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ hō͘ sih-nà siám-iāu.
Psalms29:8 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ hō͘ khòng-iá iô-tāng; Siōng Chú hō͘ Ka-te-su ê khòng-iá tōa tín-tāng.
Psalms29:9 Siōng Chú ê siaⁿ hō͘ lo̍k-bú tio̍h-kiaⁿ seng-sán
Psalms29:10 Siōng Chú siat pó-chō tī tōa-chúi téng-bīn; Siōng Chú choh-ông kàu éng-oán.
Psalms29:11 Siōng Chú sù khùi-la̍t hō͘ I ê chú-bîn; Siōng Chú sù pêng-an hō͘ I ê chú-bîn.
Psalms30:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms30:2 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms30:3 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms30:4 Siōng Chú sèng ê chú-bîn ah
Psalms30:5 I ê siū-khì chí-ū chi̍t-sî-á-kú; I ê un-tián kàu chi̍t-sì-lâng. Sui-jiân kui-mî ū thî-khàu
Psalms30:6 Tī góa sūn-lī ê sî
Psalms30:7 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms30:8 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms30:9 “Góa sí
Psalms30:10 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms30:11 Lí ū chiong góa ê thî-khàu pìⁿ-chòe thiàu-bú
Psalms30:12 Án-ni góa ê sim-sîn chiū bōe tiām-tiām
Psalms31:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms31:2 Kiû lí àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ góa
Psalms31:3 Lí sī góa ê soaⁿ-giâm
Psalms31:4 Lâng àm-tiong siat lô-bāng beh bāng góa
Psalms31:5 Góa chiong góa ê lêng-hûn kau-tài lí; Siōng Chú — sìn-si̍t ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms31:6 Góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ khîⁿ-tiâu bô lō͘-ēng ê ngó͘-siōng ê lâng; góa chí-ū sìn-khò Siōng Chú.
Psalms31:7 Góa beh in-ūi lí ê chû-ài hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k; in-ūi lí ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa ê kan-khó͘
Psalms31:8 Lí bô kā góa kau tī tùi-te̍k ê chhiú; lí hō͘ góa ê kha khiā tī khui-khoah an-ún ê só͘-chāi.
Psalms31:9 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms31:10 Góa ê sìⁿ-miā in-ūi iu-khó͘ siau-chīn; góa ê nî-hè in-ūi ai-siong kiám-chió. Góa ê khùi-la̍t in-ūi góa ê chōe-kò soe-lám; góa ê kut-thâu ko͘-tâ.
Psalms31:11 Góa só͘-ū ê tùi-te̍k lóng lêng-jio̍k góa; góa ê chhù-piⁿ kā góa bú-jio̍k; liân bat góa ê lâng mā lóng kiaⁿ góa; tī lō͘--ni̍h khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê lâng lóng siám-khui.
Psalms31:12 Góa chhin-chhiūⁿ sí-lâng hō͘ lâng bōe-kì--tit
Psalms31:13 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chin chōe lâng sì-kòe teh chō-iâu; chiu-ûi chhiong-móa khióng-pò͘. In chham-siông beh kong-kek góa
Psalms31:14 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms31:15 Góa ê it-seng tī lí ê chhiú-tiong; kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī tùi-te̍k ê chhiú kap khún-pek góa ê lâng.
Psalms31:16 Kiû lí ēng lí ê bīn ê kng chiò lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms31:17 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms31:18 Goān lí hō͘ pe̍h-chha̍t ê chhùi pìⁿ é-káu
Psalms31:19 Tī sè-kan-lâng bīn-chêng
Psalms31:20 Lí kā in chhàng tī lí ê bīn-chêng ún-ba̍t ê só͘-chāi
Psalms31:21 Siōng Chú eng-kai siū chheng-chàn
Psalms31:22 Góa bat tio̍h-kip kóng “Lí kā góa kóaⁿ-cháu m̄ chhap góa”
Psalms31:23 Siōng Chú sèng ê chú-bîn ah
Psalms31:24 Só͘-ū gióng-bōng Siōng Chú ê lâng ah
Psalms32:1 Kè-sit tit-tio̍h sià-bián
Psalms32:2 Sim bô kan-chà
Psalms32:3 Góa nā tiām-tiām m̄ jīn-chōe
Psalms32:4 Lí ê chhiú mî-ji̍t tāng-tāng hêng-hoa̍t góa
Psalms32:5 Góa ū tùi lí pâi-lia̍t góa ê chōe
Psalms32:6 Án-ni
Psalms32:7 Lí sī góa siám-bih ê só͘-chāi
Psalms32:8 Siōng Chú kóng
Psalms32:9 M̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ bé
Psalms32:10 Pháiⁿ-lâng ōe siū chin chōe thòng-khó͘; m̄-kú óa-khò Siōng Chú ê lâng ū chû-ài sì-bīn ûi i.
Psalms32:11 Gī-lâng ah
Psalms33:1 Gī-lâng ah
Psalms33:2 Lín tio̍h tôaⁿ-khîm kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms33:3 tôaⁿ hō͘ chin súi. Tio̍h tùi I chhiùⁿ sin ê koa
Psalms33:4 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê ōe chèng-khak; I ê chok-ûi lóng khó-khò.
Psalms33:5 Siōng Chú ì-ài kong-pêng chèng-ti̍t; I ê chû-ài phó͘-ki̍p choân-tōe.
Psalms33:6 Kiong-chhong tùi Siōng Chú ê ōe chhòng-chō; ji̍t
Psalms33:7 I kā hái-chúi chi̍p chòe-tui
Psalms33:8 Choân-tōe tio̍h kèng-ùi Siōng Chú; sè-kan-lâng lóng tio̍h kiaⁿ-ùi I.
Psalms33:9 I chi̍t-ē kóng
Psalms33:10 Siōng Chú hō͘ lia̍t-pang ê kè-bô͘ lo̍k-khong
Psalms33:11 Siōng Chú ê kè-ōe éng-oán bōe piàn; I ê sim-ì sòa kàu bān sè-tāi.
Psalms33:12 Jīn Siōng Chú chòe Siōng-tè hit-ê kok chin ū hok-khì! Siū kéng-soán chòe I sán-gia̍p hit-ê chú-bîn chin ū hok-khì!
Psalms33:13 Siōng Chú tùi thiⁿ-téng teh khòaⁿ
Psalms33:14 I tùi I ê pó-chō khòaⁿ--lo̍h-khì
Psalms33:15 I chō chèng-lâng ê sim
Psalms33:16 Kun-ông bōe in-ūi peng chōe chiū sèng-lī; ióng-sū bōe in-ūi khùi-la̍t tōa chiū ōe iâⁿ.
Psalms33:17 Khò chiàn-bé bô it-tēng ōe thâi-iâⁿ; khò bé ê ui-le̍k bô it-tēng ōe kiù lâng.
Psalms33:18 Siōng Chú ê ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ-kò͘ kèng-ùi I ê lâng
Psalms33:19 I ōe kiù in ê sìⁿ-miā thoat-lī sí-bông
Psalms33:20 Goán ê sim-sîn thèng-hāu Siōng Chú; I sī goán ê pang-chān
Psalms33:21 Goán ê sim beh in-ūi I lâi hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms33:22 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms34:1 Góa beh put-sî chheng-chàn Siōng Chú; góa ê chhùi beh siông-siông o-ló I.
Psalms34:2 Góa ê sim-sîn beh khoa-kháu Siōng Chú; khùn-khó͘ ê lâng thiaⁿ--kìⁿ mā ōe hoaⁿ-hí.
Psalms34:3 Tio̍h kap góa chheng-chàn Siōng Chú chòe tōa
Psalms34:4 Góa kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Psalms34:5 Gióng-bōng I ê lâng bīn ū kong-chhái
Psalms34:6 Sàn-chhiah-lâng kiû-kiò
Psalms34:7 Siōng Chú ê sù-chiá tī kèng-ùi I ê lâng ê sì-ûi chat-iâⁿ
Psalms34:8 Chhin-sin thé-giām
Psalms34:9 Siōng Chú sèng ê chú-bîn ah
Psalms34:10 Siàu-chòng ê sai mā ōe khiàm-kheh
Psalms34:11 Sòe-kiáⁿ ah
Psalms34:12 Lín tiong-kan siáⁿ-lâng ì-ài sìⁿ-miā
Psalms34:13 Tio̍h kìm ka-kī ê chi̍h bô kóng pháiⁿ-ōe
Psalms34:14 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t pháiⁿ
Psalms34:15 Siōng Chú ê ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ-kò͘ gī-lâng; I ê hī-khang thiaⁿ in ê kî-tó.
Psalms34:16 Siōng Chú tùi choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng pìⁿ-bīn
Psalms34:17 Siōng Chú thiaⁿ gī-lâng ê kiû-kiò
Psalms34:18 Siōng Chú chhin-kūn sim-lêng phò-chhùi ê lâng
Psalms34:19 Gī-lâng ū chin chōe khó͘-lān
Psalms34:20 Siōng Chú pó-choân in lóng-chóng ê kut-thâu
Psalms34:21 Chōe-ok ōe hāi-sí pháiⁿ-lâng; oàn-hūn gī-lâng--ê
Psalms34:22 Siōng Chú kiù-sio̍k I ê po̍k-jîn; óa-khò I ê lâng liân chi̍t ê to bōe siū tēng-chōe.
Psalms35:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms35:2 Kiû lí the̍h tōa-sòe ê tún-pâi khí-lâi pang-chān góa
Psalms35:3 ēng chhiuⁿ tùi-hù tui-kóaⁿ góa ê lâng. Kiû lí tùi góa kóng
Psalms35:4 Kiû lí hō͘ siàu-siūⁿ góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng siū lêng-jio̍k kiàn-siàu; kiû lí hō͘ kè-bô͘ hām-hāi góa ê lâng thiat-thè làu-khùi.
Psalms35:5 Kiû lí hō͘ in chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ hong chhe ê chho͘-khng
Psalms35:6 Kiû lí hō͘ in ê lō͘ àm koh ku̍t
Psalms35:7 In bô-iân-bô-kò͘ àm-siat lô-bāng beh tng góa
Psalms35:8 Kiû lí hō͘ chai-hō tī bô phah-sǹg ê sî lîm-kàu in sin-chiūⁿ; lí hō͘ in àm-siat ê lô-bāng tîⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī
Psalms35:9 Án-ni
Psalms35:10 Góa kui-ê lâng lóng beh kóng
Psalms35:11 Hiong-ok ê kiàn-chèng-jîn khiā--chhut-lâi; in chhâ-mn̄g góa m̄-chai ê sū.
Psalms35:12 In tùi góa ēng pháiⁿ pò hó
Psalms35:13 M̄-kú
Psalms35:14 Góa khoán-thāi in chòe góa ê pêng-iú
Psalms35:15 M̄-kú góa poa̍h-tó sit-pāi ê sî
Psalms35:16 In chòe-hé phì-siùⁿ góa
Psalms35:17 Chú ah
Psalms35:18 Góa beh tī tōa chū-hōe tiong kám-siā lí

Psalms35:20 In-ūi in bô kóng hô-pêng ê ōe

Psalms35:27 Goān ài góa siū phòaⁿ bô chōe ê lâng khoài-lo̍k chhiùⁿ-koa; goān in put-sî kóng

Psalms36:3 I kóng ê ōe lóng sī chōe-ok kap kan-chà; i bô koh-chài ū tì-hūi
Psalms36:4 I tī bîn-chhn̂g téng iáu-teh kè-bô͘ chōe-ok. I koat-tēng beh kiâⁿ pháiⁿ-lō͘

Psalms36:8 In beh tī lí ê chhù hióng-siū hong-hù ê iàn-se̍k; lí beh hō͘ in lim lí khoài-lo̍k ê hô-chúi.
Psalms36:9 In-ūi oa̍h-miā ê goân-thâu chāi-tī lí; tùi lí ê kng
Psalms36:10 Goān lí kè-sio̍k si-lo̍h chû-ài hō͘ bat lí ê lâng
Psalms36:11 M̄-thang iông-ún kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng ê kha thún-ta̍h góa; m̄-thang iông-ún hiong-ok ê lâng ê chhiú kóaⁿ-tio̍k góa.

Psalms37:1 M̄-thang in-ūi chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng sim-lāi put-pêng; m̄-thang oàn-tò͘ hêng-ûi put-gī ê lâng;
Psalms37:2 in-ūi in chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu chin kín chiū ta--khì
Psalms37:3 Tio̍h óa-khò Siōng Chú lâi chòe hó
Psalms37:4 Tio̍h in-ūi Siōng Chú lâi hoaⁿ-hí; I ōe boán-chiok lí ê sim-goān.
Psalms37:5 Tio̍h chiong lí ê lō͘-tô͘ kau-thok Siōng Chú
Psalms37:6 I ōe hō͘ lí ê gī chhin-chhiūⁿ kng hoat-chhut; lí ê chèng-ti̍t chhin-chhiūⁿ tiong-tàu ê ji̍t-thâu.
Psalms37:7 Tio̍h chēng-chēng tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng thun-lún thèng-hāu; m̄-thang in-ūi pháiⁿ-lâng ê kè-bô͘ sêng-kong lâi put-pêng.
Psalms37:8 M̄-thang siū-khì
Psalms37:9 In-ūi chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng ōe siū châu-bia̍t; thèng-hāu Siōng Chú ê lâng ōe sêng-siū só͘ èng-ún ê thó͘-tōe.
Psalms37:10 Pháiⁿ-lâng chin kín chiū ōe bô--khì; lí siông-sè chhâ i ê só͘-chāi
Psalms37:11 M̄-kú khiam-pi ê lâng ōe sêng-siū só͘ èng-ún ê thó͘-tōe
Psalms37:12 Pháiⁿ-lâng siat-kè beh hāi gī-lâng
Psalms37:13 Chú ōe kā i thí-chhiò
Psalms37:14 Pháiⁿ-lâng pu̍ih to khui keng
Psalms37:15 In ê to ōe chha̍k ji̍p-khì ka-kī ê sim; in ê keng ōe siū at-tn̄g.
Psalms37:16 Gī-lâng só͘-ū--ê sui-jiân chin chió
Psalms37:17 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhiú-kut ōe siū at-tn̄g
Psalms37:18 Siōng Chú koàn-kò͘ oân-choân ê lâng ê nî-ji̍t; in ê sán-gia̍p ōe-tàng éng-oán pó-chûn.
Psalms37:19 In tī hoān-lān ê sî bōe tì-kàu kiàn-siàu
Psalms37:20 Chóng-sī pháiⁿ-lâng ōe bia̍t-bông. Siōng Chú ê tùi-te̍k ōe ká-ná iá-hoe siā--khì
Psalms37:21 Pháiⁿ-lâng kā lâng chioh
Psalms37:22 Siōng Chú sù-hok ê lâng ōe sêng-siū só͘ èng-ún ê thó͘-tōe; siū I chiù-chó͘ ê lâng ōe bia̍t-bông.
Psalms37:23 Siōng Chú hō͘ gī-lâng ê kha-pō͘ ún-kò͘; I hoaⁿ-hí in ê só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe.
Psalms37:24 In tio̍h-tak mā bōe poa̍h-tó
Psalms37:25 Góa chêng siàu-liân taⁿ nî-lāu
Psalms37:26 I put-sî khóng-khài si-sià
Psalms37:27 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t pháiⁿ
Psalms37:28 Siōng Chú ì-ài kong-pêng
Psalms37:29 Gī-lâng ōe sêng-siū só͘ èng-ún ê thó͘-tōe
Psalms37:30 Gī-lâng ê chhùi kóng tì-hūi; i ê chi̍h tâm-lūn kong-pêng.
Psalms37:31 Siōng-tè ê lu̍t-hoat tī i sim-lāi; i ê kha lóng bōe ta̍h-thu̍t.
Psalms37:32 Pháiⁿ-lâng kim-kim teh siòng gī-lâng
Psalms37:33 Siōng Chú bōe pàng i lo̍h tī pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhiú
Psalms37:34 Tio̍h thèng-hāu Siōng Chú
Psalms37:35 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ kiông-pō ê pháiⁿ-lâng heng-ōng
Psalms37:36 Ū lâng tùi hia keng-kè
Psalms37:37 Siông-sè khòaⁿ oân-choân chèng-ti̍t ê lâng
Psalms37:38 M̄-kú hoān-hoat ê lâng ōe chòe-chi̍t-ē bia̍t-bông; pháiⁿ-lâng chòe-āu ōe siū châu-bia̍t.
Psalms37:39 Chóng-sī gī-lâng tùi Siōng Chú tit-tio̍h chín-kiù; hoān-lān ê sî
Psalms37:40 Siōng Chú pang-chān in
Psalms38:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms38:2 Lí ê chìⁿ siā-ji̍p góa ê seng-khu; lí ê chhiú tāng-tāng chhi̍h góa.
Psalms38:3 Lí ê siū-khì hō͘ góa ê seng-khu bô chi̍t ūi kiān-choân; góa ê chōe-kò hō͘ góa ê kut-thâu bô chi̍t ki hó-hó.
Psalms38:4 Góa ê chōe-kò thia̍p--khí-lâi
Psalms38:5 Góa in-ūi gû-gōng
Psalms38:6 Góa hō͘ chōe teh kah beh phih--lo̍h-khì
Psalms38:7 Góa ê io chhin-chhiūⁿ hé teh to̍h; góa ê seng-khu bô kah chi̍t ūi kiān-choân.
Psalms38:8 Góa siū teh-siong
Psalms38:9 Chú ah
Psalms38:10 Góa ê sim pho̍k-pho̍k-chhéng
Psalms38:11 Góa ê pêng-iú tâng-phōaⁿ in-ūi góa ê pháiⁿ chèng-thâu lóng siám khui; góa ê chhin-lâng mā khiā-hn̄g-hn̄g.
Psalms38:12 Siàu-siūⁿ góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng siat lô-bāng; beh hāi góa ê lâng kóng ok-to̍k ê ōe
Psalms38:13 Góa chhin-chhiūⁿ chhàu-hī-lâng bōe thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
Psalms38:14 Góa chhin-chhiūⁿ bô thiaⁿ--kìⁿ ê lâng
Psalms38:15 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms38:16 Góa bat kóng
Psalms38:17 In-ūi góa hiám-hiám-á poa̍h-tó; góa ê khó͘-thàng put-sî tîⁿ-tè góa.
Psalms38:18 Góa beh jīn góa ê chōe-ok
Psalms38:19 Góa ê tùi-te̍k kiông koh ióng; bô-iân-bô-kò͘ oàn-hūn góa ê lâng ke-thiⁿ chin chōe.
Psalms38:20 Ēng pháiⁿ pò hó ê lâng kap góa chòe tùi-thâu; in-ūi góa tui-kiû liông-siān.
Psalms38:21 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms38:22 Chú — góa ê Kiù-chú ah
Psalms39:1 Góa bat kóng
Psalms39:2 Góa tiām-tiām bô chhut-siaⁿ
Psalms39:3 Góa lāi-sim it-ti̍t sio--khí-lâi
Psalms39:4 “Siōng Chú ah
Psalms39:5 “Lí hō͘ góa ê ji̍t-chí si̍t-chāi chin té; góa ê hè-siū tùi lí khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chha-put-to sī bô; lâng put-kò sī chi̍t ê khùi.
Psalms39:6 Lâng teh oa̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ iáⁿ; in bô-êng-chhih-chhih si̍t-chāi bô-chhái-kang; in só͘ chek-chū--ê m̄-chai siáⁿ-lâng ōe tit--khì.
Psalms39:7 “Chú ah
Psalms39:8 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī góa it-chhè ê kè-sit
Psalms39:9 In-ūi sī lí hō͘ góa siū-khó͘
Psalms39:10 Lí hō͘ góa ê chek-hoa̍t
Psalms39:11 Lí chek-hoa̍t lâng
Psalms39:12 “Siōng Chú ah
Psalms39:13 Kiû lí khoan-iông góa
Psalms40:1 Góa nāi-sim thèng-hāu Siōng Chú; I ū àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ góa ê ai-kiû.
Psalms40:2 I tùi sí-bông ê hām-khiⁿ
Psalms40:3 I kà góa gîm sin ê si
Psalms40:4 Choan-sim sìn-khò Siōng Chú ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! I bô pài ngó͘-siōng
Psalms40:5 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms40:6 Chè-sū kap lé-mi̍h
Psalms40:7 só͘-í góa ìn kóng
Psalms40:8 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms40:9 Góa tī tōa chū-hōe tiong soan-iông lí kong-gī ê hó siau-sit; Siōng chú ah
Psalms40:10 Góa m̄-bat chiong lí ê kong-gī khàm-ba̍t tī sim-lāi; góa í-keng ū kóng-khí lí ê sìn-si̍t kap kiù-un. Góa m̄-bat tī tōa chū-hōe tiong am-khàm lí ê chû-ài kap sìn-si̍t.
Psalms40:11 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms40:12 In-ūi ū sǹg bōe liáu ê chai-hō ûi-khùn góa; góa ê chōe-ok jip-tio̍h góa
Psalms40:13 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms40:14 Goān siàu-siūⁿ beh hāi góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng lóng làu-khùi kiàn-siàu; goān ài góa siū hām-hāi ê lâng pāi-thè siū lêng-jio̍k.
Psalms40:15 Goān tùi góa kóng “Hò͘

Psalms44:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms44:2 Lí ū ēng lí ê chhiú kóaⁿ-cháu lia̍t-pang lâi chai-pôe goán ê chó͘-sian
Psalms44:3 In m̄-sī khò ka-kī ê to-kiàm tit-tio̍h thó͘-tōe
Psalms44:4 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms44:5 Goán khò lí chhia-tó goán ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms44:6 Góa bô óa-khò góa ê keng; góa ê to mā bōe kiù góa.
Psalms44:7 Lí ū kiù goán thoat-lī tùi-te̍k
Psalms44:8 Goán beh kui-ji̍t khoa-kháu Siōng-tè
Psalms44:9 M̄-kú hiān-chāi lí pàng-sak goán
Psalms44:10 Lí hō͘ goán tī tùi-te̍k ê bīn-chêng oa̍t-thâu tô-cháu
Psalms44:11 Lí hō͘ goán chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ hō͘ lâng thun-chia̍h; lí kā goán kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ khì lia̍t-pang.
Psalms44:12 Lí kā lí ê chú-bîn sio̍k-sio̍k-á bōe
Psalms44:13 Lí hō͘ goán siū keh-piah kok lêng-jio̍k
Psalms44:14 Lí hō͘ goán tī lia̍t-pang tiong chòe chhiò-khe
Psalms44:15 In-ūi lóe-mē
Psalms44:16 
Psalms44:17 Chiah-ê lóng lîm-kàu goán
Psalms44:18 Goán ê sim bô ûi-pōe lí; goán ê kha-pō͘ bô phian-lī lí ê lō͘.
Psalms44:19 Lí kèng-jiân kā goán phah-tó tī chhâi-lông chhut-ji̍p ê só͘-chāi
Psalms44:20 Goán nā bōe-kì-tit goán ê Siōng-tè ê miâ
Psalms44:21 Siōng-tè kiám khòaⁿ bōe chhut? I it-tēng chai lâng sim-lāi ê pì-bi̍t.
Psalms44:22 Goán in-ūi lí ê iân-kò͘ kui-ji̍t siū sat-hāi; lâng khòaⁿ goán chhin-chhiūⁿ beh hō͘ lâng thâi ê iûⁿ.
Psalms44:23 Chú ah
Psalms44:24 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ oa̍t-thâu m̄ chhap goán? Sī-án-chóaⁿ bōe-kì-tit goán só͘ siū ê ap-chè kap khó͘-lān?
Psalms44:25 Goán í-keng phak tī thô͘-hún
Psalms44:26 Kiû lí khí-lâi pang-chān goán
Psalms45:1 Góa ê sim chhèng-chhut bí-hó ê ōe; góa beh chhiùⁿ ūi-tio̍h ông chòe ê si
Psalms45:2 Lí pí só͘-ū ê ta-po͘-lâng khah phiau-phiat
Psalms45:3 Tōa koân-lêng ê ông
Psalms45:4 Ūi-tio̍h chin-lí
Psalms45:5 Lí ê chìⁿ chin lāi
Psalms45:6 Lí ê pó-chō sī Siōng-tè só͘ sù
Psalms45:7 Lí ì-ài kong-gī
Psalms45:8 Lí ê i-ho̍k ū bu̍t-io̍h
Psalms45:9 Lí ông-hui ê tiong-kan ū lia̍t-kok ê kong-chú; ông-hō͘ ēng siōng-sûn ê kim chng-thāⁿ
Psalms45:10 Cha-bó͘ gín-á ah
Psalms45:11 Ông ōe loân-bō͘ lí ê súi; i sī lí ê chú
Psalms45:12 Thài-ní ê jîn-bîn ōe lâi sàng lé-mi̍h; peh-sìⁿ tiong ê hó-gia̍h-lâng ōe lâi tùi lí kiû un-chêng.
Psalms45:13 Ông ê sin-niû tī kiong-lāi hui-siông êng-hôa; i chhēng kim-sòaⁿ siù ê lé-ho̍k.
Psalms45:14 I chhēng siù-hoe ê lé-ho̍k hō͘ lâng chhōa kàu ông bīn-chêng; phōaⁿ-kè ê chāi-sek-lú tè tī āu-bīn mā lâi kàu lí bīn-chêng.
Psalms45:15 In hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k
Psalms45:16 Lí ê kiáⁿ-sun ōe sòa-chiap lí ê lia̍t-chó͘; lí beh siat-li̍p in tī choân-tōe chòe ông.
Psalms45:17 Góa beh hō͘ lí ê miâ tāi-tāi siū kì-liām; bān-bîn ōe éng-éng-oán-oán chheng-chàn lí.
