Psalms55:17 Ē-hng
Psalms55:18 Sui-jiân hoán-tùi góa ê lâng chin chōe
Psalms55:19 Tùi kó͘-chá éng-oán chûn-chāi ê Siōng-tè ōe thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
Psalms55:20 In chhun-chhiú kong-kek ka-kī ê tâng-phōaⁿ
Psalms55:21 In ê chhùi chhin-chhiūⁿ iû ku̍t-liu-liu; in ê sim chhàng oàn-hūn; in ê ōe pí iû khah jiû-nńg
Psalms55:22 Tio̍h chiong lí ê tàⁿ sià hō͘ Siōng Chú; I ōe hû-chhî lí
Psalms55:23 Thâi-sí lâng--ê kap kan-chà ê lâng bōe oa̍h kàu tiong-liân; Siōng-tè ah
Psalms56:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms56:2 Góa ê tùi-te̍k kui-ji̍t thún-ta̍h góa; Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms56:3 Góa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê sî
Psalms56:4 Góa óa-khò Siōng-tè
Psalms56:5 In kui-ji̍t oai-khiok góa ê ōe
Psalms56:6 In chū-chi̍p
Psalms56:7 In chòe pháiⁿ kiám ōe-tàng tô-thoat? Siōng-tè ah
Psalms56:8 Góa ê pi-siong
Psalms56:9 Góa kiû-kiò ê sî
Psalms56:10 Góa óa-khò Siōng-tè
Psalms56:11 Góa óa-khò Siōng-tè
Psalms56:12 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms56:13 In-ūi lí ū kiù góa ê sìⁿ-miā thoat-lī sí-bông
Psalms57:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms57:2 Góa beh kiû-kiò Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè
Psalms57:3 Siōng-tè ōe tùi thiⁿ si-un kiù góa
Psalms57:4 Góa tó tī hiong-ok ê lâng tiong-kan
Psalms57:5 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms57:6 In tī góa ê kha-chêng siat lô-bāng
Psalms57:7 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms57:8 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms57:9 Chú ah
Psalms57:10 Lí ê chû-ài ná thiⁿ hiah-ni̍h koân; lí ê sìn-si̍t thàu kàu kiong-chhong.
Psalms57:11 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms58:1 Chip-chèng-chiá
Psalms58:2 Bô
Psalms58:3 Pháiⁿ-lâng tùi chhut bú-thai chiū kiâⁿ bê-lō͘; chi̍t-ē lī-khui lāu-bú ê pak-tó͘ chiū kiâⁿ phian-lō͘
Psalms58:4 In ê to̍k chhin-chhiūⁿ chôa ê to̍k; in chhin-chhiūⁿ to̍k-chôa that-ba̍t ka-kī ê hī-khang
Psalms58:5 m̄ thiaⁿ lāng-chôa ê lâng
Psalms58:6 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms58:7 Goān in siau-sit chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi lâu-liáu-liáu
Psalms58:8 Goān in chhin-chhiūⁿ lō͘-lê sô--kè ê jiah liâm-piⁿ bô--khì; chhin-chhiūⁿ hū-jîn-lâng liû-sán ê thai bô kìⁿ-tio̍h thiⁿ-ji̍t.
Psalms58:9 Lín ēng chhì-á hiâⁿ-hé
Psalms58:10 Gī-lâng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ in siū pò-èng chiū hoaⁿ-hí; i ēng pháiⁿ-lâng lâu ê huih sóe-kha.
Psalms58:11 Lâng chiū kóng
Psalms59:1 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms59:2 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng
Psalms59:3 In bâi-ho̍k beh hāi góa ê sìⁿ-miā; hiong-ok ê lâng chū-chi̍p lâi kong-kek góa
Psalms59:4 Góa sui-jiân bô kè-sit
Psalms59:5 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms59:6 In àm-sî tò--lâi
Psalms59:7 In ê chhùi thò͘-chhut ê ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lāi ê to; in siūⁿ
Psalms59:8 M̄-kú Siōng Chú lí beh chhiò in; lí beh thí-chhiò lia̍t-pang.
Psalms59:9 Siōng-tè — góa ê khùi-la̍t ah
Psalms59:10 Góa ê Siōng-tè ōe ēng chû-ài khoán-thāi góa; Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi-te̍k siū pò-èng.
Psalms59:11 M̄-thang châu-bia̍t in
Psalms59:12 In in-ūi chhùi hoān ê chōe kap chhùi-tûn kóng ê ōe
Psalms59:13 kiû lí hoat siū-khì châu-bia̍t in
Psalms59:14 In àm-sî tò--lâi
Psalms59:15 In cháu-lâi-cháu-khì chhē-chia̍h
Psalms59:16 M̄-kú góa beh chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn lí ê khùi-la̍t
Psalms59:17 Siōng-tè — góa ê khùi-la̍t ah
Psalms60:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms60:2 Lí kā tōe iô tín-tāng
Psalms60:3 Lí ū hō͘ lí ê chú-bîn tú-tio̍h khó͘-lān
Psalms60:4 Lí ūi-tio̍h kèng-ùi lí ê lâng ia̍t tōa-kî
Psalms60:5 Kiû lí hôe-èng goán
Psalms60:6 Siōng-tè tī I ê sèng-só͘ kóng
Psalms60:7 Ki-lia̍t sī góa ê
Psalms60:8 Mô͘-ap chòe góa ê e̍k-phûn; góa hiat góa ê ôe tī Í-tong
Psalms60:9 Siáⁿ-lâng beh chhōa góa ji̍p-khì kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ? Siáⁿ-lâng beh chhōa góa ji̍p-khì Í-tong ê tōe?
Psalms60:10 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms60:11 Kiû lí oān-chō͘ goán kong-kek tùi-te̍k
Psalms60:12 Khò Siōng-tè goán chiah ōe tek-sèng; I ōe phah-pāi goán ê tùi-te̍k.
Psalms61:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms61:2 Góa sim sit-chì ê sî
Psalms61:3 In-ūi lí sī góa ê pī-lān-só͘
Psalms61:4 Góa beh éng-oán tòa tī lí ê pò͘-pîⁿ
Psalms61:5 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms61:6 Lí beh ke-thiⁿ ông ê hè-siū
Psalms61:7 Goān i tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng kú-tn̂g chiáng-koân; goān lí ēng chû-ài kap sìn-si̍t pó-hō͘ i.
Psalms61:8 Án-ni
Psalms62:1 Góa ê sim-sîn chēng-chēng
Psalms62:2 Chí-ū I sī pó-hō͘ góa ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms62:3 Lín kong-kek chi̍t ê lâng beh kàu sím-mi̍h sî? Lín chhin-chhiūⁿ teh sak khi-chhiâ ê chhiûⁿ
Psalms62:4 Lín tàu-tīn kè-bô͘
Psalms62:5 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms62:6 Chí-ū I sī góa ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms62:7 Góa ê chín-kiù
Psalms62:8 Bān-bîn ah
Psalms62:9 Lâng chin-chiàⁿ sī khang-hu
Psalms62:10 M̄-thang khò pō-le̍k
Psalms62:11 Siōng-tè kóng chi̍t hāng
Psalms62:12 chû-ài mā sio̍k tī I. Chú ah
Psalms63:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms63:2 Só͘-í góa tī sèng-só͘ chhē lí
Psalms63:3 Góa ê chhùi-tûn beh siōng-chàn lí
Psalms63:4 Góa beh chi̍t-sì-lâng chheng-chàn lí
Psalms63:5 Góa ê sim-sîn ōe boán-chiok
Psalms63:6 Góa tó tī bîn-chhn̂g kì-liām lí
Psalms63:7 In-ūi lí ū pang-chān góa
Psalms63:8 Góa tè lí tè-tiâu-tiâu; lí ê chiàⁿ-chhiú hû-chhî góa.
Psalms63:9 M̄-kú siàu-siūⁿ góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng
Psalms63:10 In ōe hō͘ to-kiàm thâi
Psalms63:11 Chóng-sī ông ōe in-ūi Siōng-tè lâi hoaⁿ-hí; só͘-ū kí I chiù-chōa ê lâng ōe in-ūi I lâi khoa-kháu; m̄-kú kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ê chhùi ōe siū that-ba̍t.
Psalms64:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms64:2 Kiû lí chiong góa khǹg-ba̍t
Psalms64:3 In bôa in ê chi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ bôa to; in ēng ok-to̍k ê ōe chòe chìⁿ teh biâu-chún
Psalms64:4 bâi-ho̍k beh siā bû-ko͘ ê lâng; in hut-jiân siā i
Psalms64:5 In chham-siông pháiⁿ kè-bô͘; àm-tiong siat-kè
Psalms64:6 In tô͘-bô͘ pháiⁿ-tāi
Psalms64:7 M̄-kú Siōng-tè beh ēng chìⁿ siā in; in ōe hut-jiân tio̍h-siong.
Psalms64:8 In ōe hō͘ ka-kī kóng ê ōe hāi-sí; khòaⁿ--kìⁿ ê lâng lóng ōe iô-thâu.
Psalms64:9 Chèng-lâng lóng ōe kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Psalms64:10 Gī-lâng ōe in-ūi Siōng Chú lâi hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms65:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms65:2 Thiaⁿ kî-tó ê Chú ah
Psalms65:3 Chōe ap-tó góa; m̄-kú goán ê kè-sit lí lóng beh sià-bián.
Psalms65:4 Lí só͘ kéng-soán
Psalms65:5 Chín-kiù goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms65:6 Lí chiong-hián lí ê koân-lêng
Psalms65:7 Hái iô-choah
Psalms65:8 Khiā-khí tī tōe chīn-thâu ê lâng ōe in-ūi lí ê sîn-jiah kiaⁿ-ùi; ji̍t chhut ji̍t lo̍h ê só͘-chāi
Psalms65:9 Lí koàn-kò͘ thó͘-tōe
Psalms65:10 Lí koàn-ak chhân-hn̂g
Psalms65:11 Lí ēng hong-siu chòe nî-tang ê ông-koan; lí keng-kè ê lō͘ ū iû teh tih
Psalms65:12 liân khòng-iá ê chháu-po͘ to ū iû teh tih. Soaⁿ-thâu ēng hoaⁿ-hí chòe tòa hâ
Psalms65:13 chháu-po͘ ū iûⁿ-kûn chòe saⁿ chhēng
Psalms66:1 Choân-tōe lóng tio̍h tùi Siōng-tè chhut hoaⁿ-hí ê siaⁿ
Psalms66:2 chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn I miâ ê êng-kng
Psalms66:3 Tio̍h tùi Siōng-tè kóng
Psalms66:4 Choân-tōe ōe kèng-pài lí
Psalms66:5 Lâi
Psalms66:6 I hō͘ hái pìⁿ-chòe ta-tōe
Psalms66:7 I ēng I ê koân-lêng éng-oán thóng-tī; I ê ba̍k-chiu kàm-chhat lia̍t-pang; pōe-ge̍k ê lâng m̄-thang chū-ko.
Psalms66:8 Bān-bîn ah
Psalms66:9 I pó-chûn goán ê sìⁿ-miā
Psalms66:10 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms66:11 Lí hō͘ goán ji̍p lô-bāng
Psalms66:12 Lí iông-ún lâng sái-chhia kauh-kè goán ê thâu-khak; goán keng-kè chúi kap hé. Chóng-sī lí chhōa goán kàu khoan-khoah chū-iû ê só͘-chāi.
Psalms66:13 Góa beh tòa sio-hòa-chè chìn-ji̍p lí ê tiān; góa beh tùi lí siā góa ê goān.
Psalms66:14 Góa beh hêng tī hoān-lān ê sî chhùi-tûn só͘ kóng
Psalms66:15 Góa beh hiàn pûi ê cheng-siⁿ chòe sio-hòa-chè
Psalms66:16 Kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng lóng tio̍h lâi thiaⁿ; góa beh kóng-khí I ūi góa só͘ chòe ê sū.
Psalms66:17 Góa bat ēng góa ê chhùi kiû-kiò I
Psalms66:18 Góa sim-lāi nā ū khǹg pháiⁿ ê liām-thâu
Psalms66:19 M̄-kú Siōng-tè si̍t-chāi ū thiaⁿ--kìⁿ; I í-keng àⁿ-lo̍h thiaⁿ góa kî-tó ê siaⁿ.
Psalms66:20 Siōng-tè eng-kai siū chheng-chàn; I m̄-bat kū-choa̍t góa ê kî-tó

Psalms68:1 Goān Siōng-tè khí--lâi
Psalms68:2 Lí kā in kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ
Psalms68:3 Goān gī-lâng tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k; goān in hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí.
Psalms68:4 Tio̍h tùi Siōng-tè gîm-si
Psalms68:5 Siōng-tè tī I sèng ê só͘-chāi chòe ko͘-jî ê pē
Psalms68:6 Siōng-tè hō͘ ko͘-toaⁿ ê lâng ū chhù thang tòa
Psalms68:7 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms68:8 tōe kìⁿ-tio̍h Se-nāi ê Siōng-tè
Psalms68:9 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms68:10 hō͘ lí ê cho̍k-kûn tī hia khiā-khí. Siōng-tè ah
Psalms68:11 Chú chhut bēng-lēng; chi̍t tōa-tīn hū-lú thoân hó siau-sit
Psalms68:12 “Kun-ông kap in ê kun-tūi lóng tô-cháu lah
Psalms68:13 Lín an-ún tó tī iûⁿ-tiâu lāi ê sî
Psalms68:14 Choân-lêng-chiá tī kéng-lāi kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ lia̍t-ông ê sî
Psalms68:15 Pa-san-soaⁿ sī ke̍k-kî koân-tōa ê soaⁿ; Pa-san-soaⁿ sī ū chin chōe soaⁿ-niá ê soaⁿ.
Psalms68:16 Ū chin chōe soaⁿ-chiam ê soaⁿ ah
Psalms68:17 Siōng-tè ū chiàn-chhia chheng-chheng-bān-bān; Chú tùi Se-nāi chhut--lâi
Psalms68:18 Lí í-keng chiūⁿ kàu koân ê só͘-chāi
Psalms68:19 Chú eng-kai siū chheng-chàn
Psalms68:20 Lán ê Siōng-tè sī chín-kiù ê Siōng-tè; chí-ū Chú Siōng-tè ōe kiù lán thoat-lī sí-bông.
Psalms68:21 Chóng-sī Siōng-tè beh phah-phòa tùi-te̍k ê thâu-khak
Psalms68:22 Chú kóng
Psalms68:23 hō͘ lín tùi in ê huih tiong kiâⁿ--kè
Psalms68:24 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms68:25 Chhiùⁿ-koa--ê kiâⁿ tī thâu-chêng
Psalms68:26 Tio̍h tī tāi-hōe tiong chheng-chàn Siōng-tè
Psalms68:27 Siōng-sòe ê Piān-ngá-bín chòe thâu teh chhōa
Psalms68:28 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms68:29 Ūi-tio̍h lí tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê tiān
Psalms68:30 Kiû lí chek-pī Ai-ki̍p
Psalms68:31 Te̍k-sài beh tòa kòng-phín tùi Ai-ki̍p lâi; Kó͘-si̍t beh kóaⁿ-kín tùi Siōng-tè hiàn lé-mi̍h.
Psalms68:32 Sè-chiūⁿ ê lia̍t-kok ah
Psalms68:33 chheng-chàn chē tī tùi kó͘-chá chiū ū
Psalms68:34 Lín tio̍h chiong koân-lêng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè. I ê ui-giâm tī Í-sek-lia̍t ê téng-bīn; I ê koân-lêng hián-sī tī kiong-chhong.
Psalms68:35 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms69:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms69:2 Góa hām lo̍h-khì chhim ê thô͘-bê
Psalms69:3 Góa in-ūi âu-kiò ià-siān
Psalms69:4 Bô lí-iû oàn-hūn góa ê lâng pí góa ê thâu-mn̂g khah chōe; bô-iân-bô-kò͘ tùi-te̍k góa beh húi-bia̍t góa ê lâng hui-siông kiông-béng. Góa bô thau-the̍h
Psalms69:5 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms69:6 Chì-koân Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Psalms69:7 Góa ūi-tio̍h lí ê iân-kò͘ siū lóe-mē
Psalms69:8 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī khòaⁿ góa chòe siⁿ-hūn-lâng; góa ê tông-pau khòaⁿ góa chòe gōa-kok-lâng.
Psalms69:9 Góa ūi-tio̍h lí ê tiān sim hé-jia̍t
Psalms69:10 Góa thòng-sim lâu ba̍k-sái
Psalms69:11 Góa ēng môa-pò͘ chòe saⁿ chhēng; lâng hoán-tńg ēng góa chòe chhiàu-tâm.
Psalms69:12 Chē tī siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu ê lâng ēng góa chòe ōe-tôe; chùi-hàn ēng góa chòe koa-khek.
Psalms69:13 M̄-kú góa siū chiap-la̍p ê sî
Psalms69:14 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-chhut thô͘-bê
Psalms69:15 Kiû lí m̄-thang iông-ún tōa-chúi im-ba̍t góa; m̄-thang iông-ún chhim-ian thun-chia̍h góa
Psalms69:16 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms69:17 M̄-thang bīn oa̍t-cháu m̄ khòaⁿ lí ê po̍k-jîn; góa tī hoān-lān ê tiong-kan
Psalms69:18 Kiû lí óa-kūn góa lâi kiù-sio̍k góa; kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī góa ê tùi-te̍k.
Psalms69:19 Góa siū--tio̍h ê lóe-mē
Psalms69:20 Lóe-mē hō͘ góa ê sim chhùi
Psalms69:21 In the̍h khó͘-táⁿ hō͘ góa chòe chia̍h-mi̍h; góa chhùi-ta
Psalms69:22 Goān in ê iàn-se̍k pìⁿ-chòe in ka-kī ê lô-bāng; goān in ê hoân-êng an-tēng pìⁿ-chòe hām-chíⁿ.
Psalms69:23 Goān in ê ba̍k-chiu hoe
Psalms69:24 Goān lí ê thòng-hūn piàⁿ tī in ê sin-chiūⁿ
Psalms69:25 Goān in khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi pha-hng; goān in ê pò͘-pîⁿ bô lâng tòa.
Psalms69:26 In-ūi in khún-pek hiah-ê hō͘ lí phah ê lâng; in ke-thiⁿ lí phah-siong ê lâng ê thòng-khó͘.
Psalms69:27 Goān lí kā in chōe-siōng-ka-chōe; m̄-thang hō͘ in bô siū tēng-chōe.
Psalms69:28 Goān lí kā in ê miâ tùi oa̍h-miā-chheh chhat-siau
Psalms69:29 Chóng-sī góa khùn-khó͘ iu-siong; Siōng-tè ah
Psalms69:30 Góa beh ēng si-koa chheng-chàn Siōng-tè ê miâ
Psalms69:31 Án-ni chòe ōe hō͘ Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms69:32 Khùn-khó͘ ê lâng khòaⁿ--kìⁿ ōe hoaⁿ-hí; chhē-kiû Siōng-tè ê lâng ê sim ōe oa̍h--khí-lâi.
Psalms69:33 In-ūi Siōng Chú thiaⁿ sàn-chhiah-lâng ê kî-kiû
Psalms69:34 Goān thiⁿ kap tōe chheng-chàn I
Psalms69:35 In-ūi Siōng-tè beh kiù Sek-an
Psalms69:36 I ê po̍k-jîn ê hō͘-tāi ōe sêng-siū hit-ê tōe; thiàⁿ I ê lâng ōe tī hia tòa--lo̍h-khì.
Psalms70:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms70:2 Goān siàu-siūⁿ beh hāi góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng làu-khùi kiàn-siàu; goān ài góa siū hām-hāi ê lâng pāi-thè siū lêng-jio̍k.
Psalms70:3 Goān tùi góa kóng “Hò͘
Psalms70:4 Goān chhē-kiû lí ê lâng lóng in-ūi lí hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k; goān him-bō͘ lí chín-kiù ê lâng sî-siông kóng
Psalms70:5 Chóng-sī góa khùn-khó͘ sàn-chhiah; Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms71:2 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê kong-gī chín-kiù góa
Psalms71:3 Kiû lí chòe góa khiā-khí ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms71:4 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:5 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
Psalms71:6 Góa tùi thai--ni̍h chiū siū lí hû-chhî; hō͘ góa chhut lāu-bú ê pak-tó͘--ê
Psalms71:7 Chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ góa chòe kî-koài; m̄-kú lí sī góa kian-kò͘ ê pī-lān-só͘.
Psalms71:8 Góa ê chhùi chhiong-móa tùi lí ê chheng-chàn
Psalms71:9 Góa nî-lāu ê sî
Psalms71:10 Góa ê tùi-te̍k gī-lūn góa; tng-tán beh hāi góa sìⁿ-miā ê lâng teh chham-siông
Psalms71:11 kóng
Psalms71:12 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:13 Goān khòng-kò góa ê lâng tú-tio̍h kiàn-siàu bia̍t-bông; goān kè-bô͘ beh hāi góa ê lâng siū lêng-jio̍k làu-khùi.
Psalms71:14 M̄-kú góa beh sî-siông gióng-bōng lí
Psalms71:15 Sui-jiân lí kong-gī ê só͘-chòe kap chín-kiù ê chok-ûi sǹg bōe liáu
Psalms71:16 Góa beh kóng-khí Chì-koân Siōng Chú tōa koân-lêng ê sū
Psalms71:17 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:18 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:19 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms71:20 Lí hō͘ góa keng-le̍k chin chōe tōa chai-lān
Psalms71:21 Lí ōe chiong chun-êng ke-thiⁿ hō͘ góa
Psalms71:22 Góa ê Siōng-tè
Psalms71:23 Góa sī lí só͘ kiù-sio̍k--ê
Psalms71:24 Góa ê chi̍h beh kui-ji̍t kóng-khí lí ê kong-gī
Psalms72:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms72:2 hō͘ i ōe chiàu kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ lí ê chú-bîn
Psalms72:3 Goān tōa-soaⁿ tòa hô-pêng hō͘ i ê peh-sìⁿ
Psalms72:4 I ōe thòe peh-sìⁿ tiong khùn-khó͘ ê lâng sin-oan; I ōe kái-kiù sàn-chhiah-lâng
Psalms72:5 Goān in kèng-ùi lí ji̍t kú ge̍h chhim
Psalms72:6 Goān ông chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘-chúi lo̍h tī chháu koah-liáu ê hn̂g
Psalms72:7 Tī i chē-ūi ê ji̍t-chí gī-lâng ōe heng-ōng
Psalms72:8 I ōe chiáng-koân tùi chit-ê hái kàu hit-ê hái
Psalms72:9 Tòa tī khòng-iá ê lâng ōe kūi-lo̍h tī i bīn-chêng; i ê tùi-te̍k ōe oân-choân hâng-ho̍k.
Psalms72:10 Tha-si kap hái-tó ê lia̍t-ông lâi chìn-kòng; Sī-pa kap Se-pa ê ông lâi hiàn lé-mi̍h.
Psalms72:11 Goān lia̍t-ông lóng phak-lo̍h pài i
Psalms72:12 In-ūi sàn-chhiah-lâng kiû-kiò ê sî
Psalms72:13 I ōe lîn-bín khùn-khó͘ sàn-chhiah ê lâng; I ōe chín-kiù khùn-khó͘-lâng ê sìⁿ-miā.
Psalms72:14 I ōe kiù-sio̍k in thoat-lī ap-pek kap kiông-pō; I khòaⁿ in ê sìⁿ-miā chòe pó-pòe.
Psalms72:15 Goān ông bān-sòe! Goān i chiap-siū Sī-pa chìn-kòng ê kim. Goān peh-sìⁿ sî-siông ūi i kî-tó
Psalms72:16 Goān chit-ê thó͘-tōe ngó͘-kok hong-siu
Psalms72:17 Goān i ê miâ lâu kàu éng-oán
Psalms72:18 Chì-koân Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
Psalms72:19 Goān I êng-iāu ê miâ éng-oán siū chheng-chàn; goān I ê êng-iāu chhiong-móa choân-tōe. Amen! Amen!
Psalms72:20 Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ Tāi-pi̍t ê kî-tó kàu chia kiat-sok.
Psalms73:1 Siōng-tè si̍t-chāi hó khoán-thāi Í-sek-lia̍t
Psalms73:2 Sui-jiân án-ni
Psalms73:3 In-ūi góa ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h pháiⁿ-lâng kap kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng heng-ōng
Psalms73:4 In it-seng lóng m̄-bat kan-khó͘
Psalms73:5 In bô chhin-chhiūⁿ pa̍t-lâng thoa-bôa lô-khó͘
Psalms73:6 Só͘-í in ēng kiau-ngō͘ chòe phoa̍h-liān kòa tī ām-kún
Psalms73:7 In seng-khu pûi
Psalms73:8 In thí-chhiò
Psalms73:9 In ê chhùi siat-to̍k thiⁿ; in ê chi̍h chiù-mē tōe.
Psalms73:10 Liân Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn to kui-óa in
Psalms73:11 In kóng
Psalms73:12 Khòaⁿ
Psalms73:13 Góa pó-siú góa ê sim chheng-khì si̍t-chāi bô-chhái-kang; góa sóe-chhiú bô bak-tio̍h chōe-ok mā-sī khang-khang.
Psalms73:14 In-ūi góa kui-ji̍t tú-tio̍h chai-lān
Psalms73:15 Góa nā kóng góa beh chiàu in án-ni kóng
Psalms73:16 Góa siūⁿ-beh liáu-kái chit-ê tāi-chì
Psalms73:17 kàu ji̍p-khì Siōng-tè ê sèng-só͘
Psalms73:18 Lí it-tēng ōe kā in khǹg tī ku̍t-ku̍t ê só͘-chāi
Psalms73:19 In hō͘ khióng-pò͘ thun-bia̍t
Psalms73:20 Chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khùn-chhíⁿ chiū chai in ê bîn-bāng sī hoàn-sióng
Psalms73:21 Góa ê sim chin sng
Psalms73:22 Góa gû-gōng
Psalms73:23 Chóng-sī góa put-sî kap lí chòe-hé; lí khan góa ê chiàⁿ-chhiú
Psalms73:24 ēng lí ê kà-sī ín-chhōa góa
Psalms73:25 Tī thiⁿ-téng
Psalms73:26 Góa ê jio̍k-thé
Psalms73:27 Lī-khui lí hn̄g-hn̄g ê lâng it-tēng bia̍t-bông; pàng-sak lí
Psalms73:28 Tùi góa lâi kóng
Psalms74:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms74:2 Kiû lí ōe-kì-tit lí chá-chêng kéng-soán ê chú-bîn
Psalms74:3 Kiû lí kiâⁿ-lâi kú-kú pha-hng ê só͘-chāi
Psalms74:4 Lí ê tùi-te̍k tī lí tiān-lāi hoan-ho͘
Psalms74:5 chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng gia̍h pó͘-thâu
Psalms74:6 Sèng-só͘ lāi-bīn it-chhè ê tiau-khek
Psalms74:7 In pàng-hé sio-húi lí ê sèng-só͘
Psalms74:8 In chham-siông kóng
Psalms74:9 Goán bô koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ tiāu-thâu
Psalms74:10 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms74:11 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ chhiú kiu--khí-lâi m̄ chhap goán? Kiû lí chhiú chhun-chhut-lâi kā in húi-bia̍t.
Psalms74:12 Chóng-sī Siōng-tè tùi kó͘-chá chiū-sī góa ê Ông
Psalms74:13 Lí bat ēng lí ê koân-lêng chiong hái pun-khui
Psalms74:14 Lí bat kòng-chhùi hái-siù ê thâu-khak
Psalms74:15 Lí bat pun-khui chúi-goân kap hô-liû
Psalms74:16 Ji̍t--sî kap mî--sî
Psalms74:17 Tōe-chiūⁿ it-chhè ê kài-hān sī lí só͘ tēng; hē-thiⁿ kap tang-thiⁿ sī lí só͘ siat.
Psalms74:18 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms74:19 Kiû lí m̄-thang chiong sûn-liông chú-bîn ê sìⁿ-miā kau hō͘ iá-siù
Psalms74:20 Kiû lí ōe-kì-tit kap goán li̍p ê iok
Psalms74:21 Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ siū ap-chè ê lâng kiàn-siàu tńg--khì; kiû lí hō͘ khùn-khó͘ sàn-chhiah ê lâng chheng-chàn lí ê miâ.
Psalms74:22 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms74:23 Kiû lí m̄-thang bōe-kì-tit lí tùi-te̍k ê hán-hoah
Psalms75:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms75:2 Siōng-tè kóng: Tī só͘ tēng ê ji̍t-chí
Psalms75:3 Tōe kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê chū-bîn lóng iô-choah ê sî
Psalms75:4 Góa tùi kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng kóng
Psalms75:5 m̄-thang chhàng-chhiu
Psalms75:6 Lâng ko-seng m̄-sī tùi tang
Psalms75:7 Chí-ū Siōng-tè si-hêng sím-phòaⁿ
Psalms75:8 Siōng Chú chhiú--ni̍h the̍h poe
Psalms75:9 M̄-kú góa beh chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè
Psalms75:10 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê koân-sè
Psalms76:1 Tī Iû-tāi
Psalms76:2 Tī Sat-léng
Psalms76:3 Tī hia
Psalms76:4 Lí ê êng-kng kap ui-giâm iâⁿ-kè tún-móa chiàn-lī-phín ê soaⁿ-niá.
Psalms76:5 Siōng-ióng ê lâng lóng siū chhiúⁿ-kiap; in khùn--khì bô koh chhíⁿ
Psalms76:6 Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms76:7 Chí-ū lí thang kiaⁿ-ùi; lí ê siū-khì chi̍t-ē hoat-chhut
Psalms76:8 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms76:9 
Psalms76:10 Lâng ê siū-khì chòe-āu ōe pìⁿ-chòe tùi lí ê chheng-chàn; keng-kè lí siū-khì lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê lâng ōe ûi óa-lâi kèng-pài lí.
Psalms76:11 Tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè hē-goān
Psalms76:12 I beh hō͘ kiau-ngō͘ ê kùi-cho̍k làu-khùi; I beh hō͘ sè-chiūⁿ ê lia̍t-ông kiaⁿ-ùi.
Psalms77:1 Góa beh tùi Siōng-tè tōa-siaⁿ kiû-kiò
Psalms77:2 Tī hoān-lān ê ji̍t góa chhē Chú
Psalms77:3 Góa siàu-liām Siōng-tè
Psalms77:4 Lí hō͘ góa ba̍k-chiu kim-khok-khok khùn bōe khì; góa hoân-ló kah lóng bōe kóng-ōe.
Psalms77:5 Góa tui-liām kè-khì ê ji̍t-chí
Psalms77:6 Góa mî--sî chēng-chēng siūⁿ; góa bong sim-koaⁿ ka-kī mn̄g
Psalms77:7 Chú kiám ōe éng-oán pàng-sak lán? I kiám bōe koh si-un hō͘ lán?
Psalms77:8 I ê chû-ài kiám ōe éng-kiú siau-sit? I ê èng-ún kiám ōe éng-oán lo̍k-khong?
Psalms77:9 Siōng-tè kiám bōe-kì-tit si-un
Psalms77:10 Góa kóng
Psalms77:11 Góa beh kóng-khí Siōng Chú lí ê chok-ûi
Psalms77:12 Góa beh chhim-su lí ê chok-ûi
Psalms77:13 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms77:14 Lí sī kiâⁿ kî-sū ê Siōng-tè; lí bat tī bān-bîn tiong hián-sī lí ê koân-lêng.
Psalms77:15 Lí bat ēng lí ê chhiú sio̍k-hôe lí ê chú-bîn
Psalms77:16 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms77:17 Ba̍t-hûn piàⁿ-lo̍h hō͘-chúi
Psalms77:18 Kńg-lê-á-hong lāi-bīn ū lí tân-lûi ê siaⁿ; sih-nà ê kng sih kàu choân-tōe; tōe ngia̍uh-ngia̍uh-chhoah tōa iô-tāng.
Psalms77:19 Hái-tiong ū lí ê tō-lō͘
Psalms77:20 Lí bat ēng Mô͘-se A-lûn ê chhiú
Psalms78:1 Góa ê chú-bîn ah
Psalms78:2 Góa beh khui-chhùi kóng phì-jū
Psalms78:3 chiū-sī goán só͘ thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
Psalms78:4 Goán bô beh chiong chiah-ê sū tùi kiáⁿ-sun ún-môa
Psalms78:5 I tī Ngá-kok siat kài-bēng
Psalms78:6 hō͘ hō͘-tāi
Psalms78:7 Án-ni
Psalms78:8 chiah bián chhin-chhiūⁿ in chó͘-sian ê sè-tāi
Psalms78:9 Í-hoat-liân ê kiáⁿ-sun gia̍h bú-khì kap keng-chìⁿ
Psalms78:10 In bô chun-siú Siōng-tè ê iok
Psalms78:11 In bōe-kì-tit I ê chok-ûi
Psalms78:12 I tī Ai-ki̍p -tōe
Psalms78:13 I kā hái hun-khui
Psalms78:14 I ji̍t--sî ēng hûn chhōa in
Psalms78:15 I tī khòng-iá hō͘ chio̍h-pôaⁿ piak-li̍h
Psalms78:16 I hō͘ chúi tùi chio̍h-pôaⁿ chhèng-chhut
Psalms78:17 M̄-kú in iáu kè-sio̍k tek-chōe I
Psalms78:18 In sim-lāi chhì-thàm Siōng-tè
Psalms78:19 In lām-sám gī-lūn Siōng-tè
Psalms78:20 I bat kòng chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms78:21 Só͘-í
Psalms78:22 In-ūi in m̄ sìn-ho̍k Siōng-tè
Psalms78:23 M̄-kú I iáu bēng-lēng téng-bīn ê kiong-chhong
Psalms78:24 I kàng-lo̍h má-ná hō͘ in chia̍h
Psalms78:25 In ta̍k-ê lâng chia̍h thiⁿ-sài ê chia̍h-mi̍h; Siōng-tè sù bí-niû hō͘ in chia̍h kàu pá.
Psalms78:26 I tùi thiⁿ khí tang-hong
Psalms78:27 I kàng-lo̍h bah hō͘ in
Psalms78:28 lo̍h tī in ê iâⁿ-tiong
Psalms78:29 In chiū chia̍h
Psalms78:30 In só͘ ài--ê iáu-bē pá-chiok
Psalms78:31 Siōng-tè chiū tùi in hoat siū-khì
Psalms78:32 Sui-jiân án-ni
Psalms78:33 Só͘-í I hō͘ in khang-khang kè-ji̍t
Psalms78:34 Siōng-tè thâi in ê sî
Psalms78:35 In chiah ōe-kì-tit Siōng-tè sī in ê pó-hō͘-chiá
Psalms78:36 M̄-kú in ēng chhùi kā I phô͘-tháⁿ
Psalms78:37 In tùi I bô tiong-sìn
Psalms78:38 M̄-kú I iáu chhiong-móa lîn-bín
Psalms78:39 I tài-liām in put-kò sī ōe-sí ê lâng
Psalms78:40 In tī khòng-iá put-sî pōe-ge̍k I
Psalms78:41 In chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn chhì-thàm Siōng-tè
Psalms78:42 In bōe-kì-tit I ê koân-lêng
Psalms78:43 I tī Ai-ki̍p án-chóaⁿ kiâⁿ sîn-jiah
Psalms78:44 I chiong in ê kang-hô pìⁿ-chòe huih
Psalms78:45 I hō͘ kui-kûn hô͘-sîn lâi in hia thun-chia̍h
Psalms78:46 I chiong in ê thó͘-sán hō͘ chháu-meh-kong húi-hoāi
Psalms78:47 I lo̍h-pha̍uh húi-hoāi in ê phû-tô-chhiū
Psalms78:48 koh chiong in ê cheng-siⁿ kau hō͘ peng-pha̍uh
Psalms78:49 I hoat tōa siū-khì
Psalms78:50 I lún bōe tiâu siū-khì
Psalms78:51 I thâi-sí Ai-ki̍p só͘-ū ê tōa-kiáⁿ
Psalms78:52 I chhin-chhiūⁿ teh chhōa iûⁿ kā ka-kī ê chú-bîn chhōa--chhut-lâi
Psalms78:53 I chhōa in
Psalms78:54 I koh chhōa in kàu sèng-tōe ê kéng-lāi
Psalms78:55 I tī in ê bīn-chêng kóaⁿ-chhut lia̍t-pang; ēng soh-á niû thó͘-tōe hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t ê chi-cho̍k chòe sán-gia̍p
Psalms78:56 In iû-goân chhì-thàm Chì-koân-chiá Siōng-tè
Psalms78:57 In sit-sìn pōe-ge̍k
Psalms78:58 In pài soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
Psalms78:59 Siōng-tè thiaⁿ--tio̍h chin siū-khì
Psalms78:60 I khì-sak Sī-lô ê hōe-bō͘
Psalms78:61 I ún-chún lâng kā iok-kūi chhiúⁿ--khì
Psalms78:62 I tùi I ê ke-gia̍p Í-sek-lia̍t hoat siū-khì
Psalms78:63 In ê siàu-liân-lâng siū chiàn-hé sio-bia̍t; in ê chāi-sek-lú bōe-tàng thiaⁿ-tio̍h kiat-hun ê chiok-koa.
Psalms78:64 In ê chè-si tó tī to-ē; in ê kóaⁿ-hū khàu bōe chhut--lâi.
Psalms78:65 Hit-sî Chú chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khùn cheng-sîn
Psalms78:66 I chiū kā tùi-te̍k phah-thè
Psalms78:67 I khì-sak Iok-sek ê hō͘-tāi
Psalms78:68 I kéng-soán Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k
Psalms78:69 I khí-chō sèng-só͘ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiⁿ hiah koân
Psalms78:70 I kéng-soán I ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t
Psalms78:71 hō͘ i bô koh iúⁿ-chhī iûⁿ-kûn
Psalms78:72 Tāi-pi̍t chiū ēng sûn-chèng ê sim bo̍k-ióng in
Psalms79:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms79:2 In chiong lí po̍k-jîn ê sin-si kau hō͘ khong-tiong ê pe-chiáu chòe chia̍h-mi̍h
Psalms79:3 In tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiu-ûi lâu lí chú-bîn ê huih chhin-chhiūⁿ teh piàⁿ-chúi
Psalms79:4 Goán siū-tio̍h keh-piah-kok lêng-jio̍k
Psalms79:5 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms79:6 Kiû lí chiong lí ê siū-khì piàⁿ-lo̍h tī hiah-ê m̄ bat lí ê gōa-pang
Psalms79:7 In-ūi in thun-chia̍h Ngá-kok
Psalms79:8 Kiû lí m̄-thang in-ūi goán chó͘-sian hoān ê chōe hêng-hoa̍t goán; kiû lí chiong lí ê chû-pi kín-kín si-lo̍h hō͘ goán
Psalms79:9 Kiù goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms79:10 Ná beh hō͘ lia̍t-kok kóng
Psalms79:11 Kiû lí hō͘ siû-hoān ê thó͘-khùi thàu kàu lí ê bīn-chêng
Psalms79:12 Chú ah
Psalms79:13 Án-ni
Psalms80:1 Í-sek-lia̍t ê Bo̍k-chiá
Psalms80:2 Kiû lí tī Í-hoat-liân
Psalms80:3 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms80:4 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms80:5 Lí hō͘ goán ēng ba̍k-sái chòe pn̄g chia̍h
Psalms80:6 Lí hō͘ keh-piah-kok in-ūi goán saⁿ-chiⁿ
Psalms80:7 Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms80:8 Lí tùi Ai-ki̍p sóa chi̍t châng phû-tô-chhiū
Psalms80:9 Lí ūi-tio̍h i chéng-tōe; i ê kun tèng chhim
Psalms80:10 I ê iáⁿ jia-ba̍t chèng-soaⁿ; i ê ki jia-khàm tōa-châng ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū.
Psalms80:11 I ê ki chhun kàu Tōe-tiong-hái; i ê tîn thòaⁿ kàu Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô.
Psalms80:12 Taⁿ lí sī-án-chóaⁿ thiah-húi i ê lî-pa
Psalms80:13 chhut-chāi chhiū-nâ lāi ê soaⁿ-ti chau-that
Psalms80:14 Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms80:15 pó-hō͘ lí chiàⁿ-chhiú só͘ chai-chèng ê chhiū
Psalms80:16 Hiah-ê ēng hé sio
Psalms80:17 Goān lí ê chhiú pó-hō͘ lí chiàⁿ-pêng ê lâng
Psalms80:18 Án-ni
Psalms80:19 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms81:1 Siōng-tè sī lán ê khùi-la̍t
Psalms81:2 Tio̍h chhiùⁿ si-koa
Psalms81:3 Tio̍h tī chhoe-it cha̍p-gō͘
Psalms81:4 In-ūi che sī ūi Í-sek-lia̍t tēng ê kui-lē
Psalms81:5 I kong-kek Ai-ki̍p -tōe ê sî
Psalms81:6 Siōng-tè kóng
Psalms81:7 Lín tī hoān-lān tiong kiû-kiò
Psalms81:8 Góa ê chú-bîn ah
Psalms81:9 Lín tiong-kan m̄-thang ū pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng; gōa-pang ê sîn-bêng
Psalms81:10 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè; góa bat chhōa lín tùi Ai-ki̍p -tōe chiūⁿ--lâi. Lín ê chhùi tio̍h tōa khui
Psalms81:11 “M̄-kú góa ê chú-bîn m̄ thiaⁿ góa ê ōe; Í-sek-lia̍t lóng m̄ chhap góa.
Psalms81:12 Góa chiū chhut-chāi in sim ngī
Psalms81:13 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ǹg-bāng góa ê chú-bîn thiaⁿ-thàn góa
Psalms81:14 Góa chin kín chiū ōe chè-ap in ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms81:15 Oàn-hūn Siōng Chú ê lâng ōe tī I bīn-chêng soe-thè; in ōe éng-oán siū hêng-hoa̍t.
Psalms81:16 Siōng Chú beh ēng hó ê be̍h hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t chia̍h
Psalms82:1 Siōng-tè tī thian-têng chú-chhî tāi-hōe
Psalms82:2 “Lín bô chiàu kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ
Psalms82:3 Lín tio̍h ūi sàn-chhiah-lâng kap ko͘-jî sin-oan
Psalms82:4 Tio̍h kái-kiù sàn-chhiah khiàm-kheh ê lâng

Psalms83:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms83:2 In-ūi lí ê tùi-te̍k teh jiáu-loān; oàn-hūn lí ê lâng teh hoán-poān.
Psalms83:3 In ēng kan-chà ê kè-bô͘ beh hāi lí ê chú-bîn; in chham-siông beh hāi lí pó-hō͘ ê lâng.
Psalms83:4 In kóng
Psalms83:5 In tâng-sim chham-siông
Psalms83:6 in chiū-sī tòa pò͘-pîⁿ ê Í-tong kap Í-si̍t-má-lī -lâng
Psalms83:7 Ka-pa-le̍k
Psalms83:8 A-su̍t mā kap in liân-ha̍p
Psalms83:9 Kiû lí tùi-hù in chhin-chhiūⁿ tùi-hù Bí-tiân -lâng
Psalms83:10 In tī Ún To-ní bia̍t-bông
Psalms83:11 Kiû lí hō͘ in ê léng-siù chhin-chhiūⁿ Gô-li̍p kap Se-i-pek
Psalms83:12 In kóng

Psalms83:14 Hé án-chóaⁿ sio chhiū-nâ

Psalms83:16 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms83:17 Goān in éng-oán kiàn-siàu kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ; goān in làu-khùi bia̍t-bông.
Psalms83:18 Goān in chai chí-ū lí sī Siōng Chú
Psalms84:1 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe ah
Psalms84:2 Góa loân-bō͘ Siōng Chú ê tiâⁿ kàu beh hūn--khì! Góa ê sim-sîn ǹg éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí chhiùⁿ-koa.
Psalms84:3 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Psalms84:4 Khiā-khí tī lí tiān ê tiâⁿ ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! In chheng-chàn lí bô-soah!
Psalms84:5 Tùi lí tit-tio̍h khùi-la̍t ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! In pek-chhiat ài chiūⁿ Sek-an-soaⁿ tiâu-sèng.
Psalms84:6 In keng-kè ê ta-sò soaⁿ-kok lóng pìⁿ-chòe chôaⁿ-goân; chhiu-ú kàng-lo̍h
Psalms84:7 In ná kiâⁿ ná ū la̍t
Psalms84:8 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms84:9 Pó-hō͘ goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms84:10 Tī lí ê tiâⁿ tiàm chi̍t ji̍t
Psalms84:11 In-ūi Chú Siōng-tè sī ji̍t-thâu
Psalms84:12 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe ah
Psalms85:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms85:2 Lí ū sià-bián lí chú-bîn ê chōe-ok
Psalms85:3 Lí ū siu-hôe lí lóng-chóng ê siū-khì
Psalms85:4 Chín-kiù goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms85:5 Lí kiám beh éng-oán tùi goán siū-khì? Kiám beh kè-sio̍k siū-khì kàu bān-tāi?
Psalms85:6 Lí kiám m̄ koh kā goán kiù oa̍h
Psalms85:7 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms85:8 Góa beh thiaⁿ Chú Siōng-tè só͘ beh kóng ê ōe; in-ūi I beh tùi I ê chú-bîn
Psalms85:9 I it-tēng ōe chín-kiù kèng-ùi I ê lâng
Psalms85:10 Chû-ài kap sìn-si̍t saⁿ-tú; kong-gī kap hô-pêng sio-lám.
Psalms85:11 Sìn-si̍t tùi tōe hoat-chhut; kong-gī tùi thiⁿ kàng-lo̍h.
Psalms85:12 Siōng Chú sù hó-mi̍h; lán ê thó͘-tōe tōa hong-siu.
Psalms85:13 Kong-gī ōe kiâⁿ tī Siōng Chú thâu-chêng

Psalms87:3 Siōng-tè ê siâⁿ ah
Psalms87:4 Góa beh chiong Ai-ki̍p kap Pa-pí-lûn lia̍t-ji̍p bat góa ê bîn-cho̍k lāi-bīn; khòaⁿ ah

Psalms88:1 Siōng Chú
Psalms88:2 Goān góa ê kî-tó ta̍t-kàu lí bīn-chêng; kiû lí àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ góa ê kî-kiû.
Psalms88:3 In-ūi góa keng-le̍k chin chōe hoān-lān; góa ê sìⁿ-miā biān-lîm sí-bông.
Psalms88:4 Góa kap beh lo̍h Im-hú ê lâng siâng-khoán
Psalms88:5 Góa hō͘ lâng tàn tī sí-lâng tiong-kan
Psalms88:6 Lí kā góa hiat tī Chhim-khiⁿ
Psalms88:7 Lí ê siū-khì tāng-tāng teh góa; lí ēng hái-éng tùi sì-bīn im-ba̍t góa.
Psalms88:8 Lí hō͘ góa ê ti-kí lī-khui góa hn̄g-hn̄g
Psalms88:9 Góa in-ūi iu-siong ba̍k-chiu hoe. Siōng Chú ah
Psalms88:10 Lí kiám beh kiâⁿ kî-sū hō͘ sí-lâng khòaⁿ? Im-hûn kiám ōe khí-lâi chheng-chàn lí?
Psalms88:11 Lâng kiám ōe tī bōng-lāi kóng-khí lí ê chû-ài? Lâng kiám ōe tī bia̍t-bông ê só͘-chāi kóng-khí lí ê sìn-si̍t?
Psalms88:12 Tī o͘-àm ê só͘-chāi
Psalms88:13 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms88:14 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms88:15 Góa tùi siàu-liân siū-khó͘
Psalms88:16 Lí ê tōa siū-khì kā góa teh-chhùi; lí ēng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ kā góa húi-bia̍t.
Psalms88:17 Chiah-ê tāi-chì chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi kui-ji̍t ûi góa
Psalms88:18 Lí chiong góa ê chhin-iú keh-khui hn̄g-hn̄g; o͘-àm soah pìⁿ-chòe góa î-it ê tâng-phōaⁿ.
Psalms89:1 Góa beh éng-oán chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn Siōng Chú ê chû-ài
Psalms89:2 Góa bat kóng
Psalms89:3 Lí ū kóng
Psalms89:4 ‘Góa beh kiàn-li̍p lí ê hō͘-tāi kàu éng-oán
Psalms89:5 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms89:6 Tī khong-tiong tó chi̍t ê ōe-pí-tit Siōng Chú? Chèng sîn-bêng tiong tó chi̍t ê ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng Chú?
Psalms89:7 I tī thiⁿ-sài ê gī-hōe tiong sī ū tōa ui-giâm ê Siōng-tè
Psalms89:8 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè ah
Psalms89:9 Hái-chúi tiòng-koân
Psalms89:10 Lí chi̍t-ē-chhiú chiū phah-chhùi hái-koài La-hap-pek; lí ēng tōa khùi-la̍t ê chhiú phah-sòaⁿ tùi-te̍k.
Psalms89:11 Thiⁿ sio̍k lí
Psalms89:12 Lâm kap pak sī lí só͘ chhòng-chō; Tha-po̍k-soaⁿ kap Hek-bûn-soaⁿ lóng hoaⁿ-hí chheng-chàn lí ê miâ.
Psalms89:13 Lí ê chhiú-kut ū koân-lêng; lí ê chhiú ū la̍t
Psalms89:14 Kong-gī kap chèng-ti̍t sī lí pó-chō ê tōe-ki; chû-ài kap sìn-si̍t kiâⁿ tī lí bīn-chêng.
Psalms89:15 Ōe-hiáu tùi lí hoan-ho͘ ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! Siōng Chú ah
Psalms89:16 In kui-ji̍t in-ūi lí ê miâ hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms89:17 Lí sī in kî-biāu ê khùi-la̍t; in-ūi lí ê un-tián
Psalms89:18 Siōng Chú sī goán ê pó-hō͘-chiá; Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè sī goán ê Kun-ông.
Psalms89:19 Lí chá bat tī īⁿ-siōng tiong tùi lí tiong-si̍t ê chú-bîn kóng
Psalms89:20 Góa chhē-tio̍h góa ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t
Psalms89:21 Góa ê chhiú beh chi-chhî i; góa ê chhiú-kut beh sù i khùi-la̍t.
Psalms89:22 Tùi-te̍k bô hoat-tō͘ ēng kè-tì iâⁿ-kè i; hiong-ok ê lâng bô hoat-tō͘ khún-pek i.
Psalms89:23 Góa beh tī i ê bīn-chêng phah-chhùi i ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms89:24 Góa ê sìn-si̍t kap góa ê chû-ài beh kap i tông-chāi
Psalms89:25 Góa beh hō͘ i ê chhiú chhun kàu Tōe-tiong-hái
Psalms89:26 I beh tùi góa kóng
Psalms89:27 Góa beh siat-li̍p i chòe tōa-kiáⁿ
Psalms89:28 Góa beh tùi i chhî-siú chû-ài kàu éng-oán; góa kap i só͘ li̍p ê iok it-tēng bōe kái-piàn.
Psalms89:29 Góa beh pó-siú i ê hō͘-tāi kàu éng-oán
Psalms89:30 “I ê kiáⁿ-sun nā khì-sak góa ê Lu̍t-hoat
Psalms89:31 ûi-pōe góa ê kui-lē
Psalms89:32 góa beh ēng koáiⁿ-á hêng-hoa̍t in ê kè-sit
Psalms89:33 Chóng-sī góa it-tēng bōe tùi i siu-hôe góa lóng-chóng ê chû-ài
Psalms89:34 Góa it-tēng bōe ûi-hoán góa ê iok
Psalms89:35 “Góa kí ka-kī ê sèng-kiat kian-koat li̍p-sè
Psalms89:36 I ê hō͘-tāi ōe thoân kàu éng-oán
Psalms89:37 chhin-chhiūⁿ ge̍h éng-oán ún-kò͘
Psalms89:38 Chóng-sī lí ū tùi lí boah-iû soán-li̍p--ê hoat siū-khì
Psalms89:39 Lí hòe-tû kap lí ê po̍k-jîn só͘ li̍p ê iok
Psalms89:40 Lí thiah-húi i só͘-ū ê siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ
Psalms89:41 Kè-lō͘-lâng lóng kā i chhiúⁿ-toa̍t; keh-piah-kok lóng kā i lêng-jio̍k.
Psalms89:42 Lí hō͘ i tùi-te̍k ê chiàⁿ-chhiú gia̍h-koân
Psalms89:43 Lí hō͘ i ê to-kiàm tun--khì bōe-tàng ēng
Psalms89:44 Lí chiong i koân-pèng ê koáiⁿ chhiúⁿ--khí-lâi
Psalms89:45 Lí kiám-chió i siàu-liân ê ji̍t-chí
Psalms89:46 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms89:47 Kiû lí tài-liām góa ê sìⁿ-miā hiah-ni̍h té
Psalms89:48 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kú-tn̂g oa̍h--teh
Psalms89:49 Chú ah
Psalms89:50 Chú ah
Psalms89:51 Siōng Chú ah

Psalms90:2 Chèng-soaⁿ iáu-bē siū-chō
Psalms90:3 Lí hō͘ thô͘ chō ê lâng kui-hôe thô͘-hún
Psalms90:4 Tùi lí lâi khòaⁿ
Psalms90:5 Lí ēng tōa-chúi kā lâng chhiong-cháu; jîn-seng chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tiûⁿ bîn-bāng
Psalms90:6 chá-khí-sî hoat--khí-lâi
Psalms90:7 Goán in-ūi lí ê siū-khì siau-bia̍t
Psalms90:8 Lí chiong goán ê chōe-kò pâi tī lí bīn-chêng; goán pì-bi̍t ê chōe tī lí bīn-chêng po̍k-lō͘--chhut-lâi.
Psalms90:9 Goán ê ji̍t-chí lóng tī lí ê siū-khì ē kè--khì; goán ê it-seng chhin-chhiūⁿ thó͘ chi̍t ê khùi.
Psalms90:10 Goán ê hè-siū put-kò sī chhit-cha̍p

Psalms90:12 Kiû lí kà goán ōe-hiáu sǹg ka-kī ê ji̍t-chí

Psalms94:1 Siōng Chú
Psalms94:2 Sím-phòaⁿ sè-kài ê Chú ah
Psalms94:3 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms94:4 In ê chhùi thò͘-chhut kiau-ngō͘ ê ōe; chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng lóng teh tián ka-kī.
Psalms94:5 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms94:6 In hāi-sí ko͘-jî kóaⁿ-hū
Psalms94:7 In kóng
Psalms94:8 Lín chiah-ê chhin-chhiūⁿ cheng-siⁿ ê lâng tio̍h siūⁿ; lín chiah-ê gû-gōng ê lâng tī-sî chiah ōe ū tì-hūi?
Psalms94:9 Chō hī-khang ê Siōng-tè ka-kī kiám bōe thiaⁿ--kìⁿ? Chō ba̍k-chiu ê Siōng-tè ka-kī kiám bōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ?
Psalms94:10 Koán-kàu lia̍t-pang ê Siōng-tè kiám bōe chhú-hoa̍t? Kàu-tō lâng ê Siōng-tè kiám ōe bô tì-sek?
Psalms94:11 Siōng Chú chai lâng ê sim-su
Psalms94:12 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms94:13 beh hō͘ i tī hoān-lān ê ji̍t an-ún chū-chāi
Psalms94:14 Siōng Chú it-tēng bōe pàng-sak I ê chú-bîn
Psalms94:15 I ōe koh chiàu kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ
Psalms94:16 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe ūi góa khí-lâi kong-kek pháiⁿ-lâng? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe ūi góa khiā khí-lâi kong-kek chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng?
Psalms94:17 Nā m̄-sī Siōng Chú pang-chān góa
Psalms94:18 Góa kóng “Góa ê kha ta̍h chhū--khì”; hit-sî
Psalms94:19 Góa sim-lāi ū chin chōe iu-būn khòa-lū
Psalms94:20 Hú-pāi ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ lī-iōng hoat-lu̍t chè-chō kan-ok
Psalms94:21 In tàu-tīn kè-bô͘ beh hāi gī-lâng ê sìⁿ-miā
Psalms94:22 M̄-kú Siōng Chú chòe góa ê pó-lúi; góa ê Siōng-tè chòe góa ê pī-lān-só͘.
Psalms94:23 I hō͘ in ê chōe-ok siū-tio̍h pò-èng; in chòe pháiⁿ ê sî
Psalms95:1 Lâi ah
Psalms95:2 Lán tio̍h ēng kám-siā lâi kàu I ê bīn-chêng! Tio̍h tùi I chhiùⁿ hoaⁿ-hí ê koa!
Psalms95:3 In-ūi Siōng Chú sī úi-tāi ê Siōng-tè
Psalms95:4 I thóng-hat tōe ke̍k-chhim ê só͘-chāi; ke̍k-koân ê soaⁿ-hong mā tī I chhiú-lāi.
Psalms95:5 I chhòng-chō hái-iûⁿ
Psalms95:6 Lâi ah
Psalms95:7 In-ūi I sī lán ê Siōng-tè; lán sī I bo̍k-ióng ê iûⁿ-kûn
Psalms95:8 Lín m̄-thang ngī-sim
Psalms95:9 Hit-sî
Psalms95:10 Sì-cha̍p nî kú
Psalms95:11 Só͘-í
Psalms96:1 Tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ sin ê koa! Choân-tōe lóng tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ-koa!
Psalms96:2 Tio̍h tùi Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ-koa
Psalms96:3 Tio̍h tùi bān-kok soan-iông I ê êng-iāu! Tio̍h tùi bān-bîn kóng-khí I úi-tāi ê chok-ûi!
Psalms96:4 In-ūi Siōng Chú chì-tōa
Psalms96:5 In-ūi gōa-pang ê sîn-bêng put-kò sī ngó͘-siōng; m̄-kú Siōng Chú chhòng-chō chiah-ê thiⁿ.
Psalms96:6 Chun-kùi kap ui-giâm pau-ûi I; koân-lêng kap êng-kng chhiong-móa I ê sèng-só͘.
Psalms96:7 Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! Tio̍h chiong êng-iāu kap koân-lêng kui hō͘ I!
Psalms96:8 Tio̍h chiong Siōng Chú èng-tit ê êng-iāu kui hō͘ I! Tio̍h tòa chè-mi̍h chìn-ji̍p I ê tiâⁿ!
Psalms96:9 Tio̍h chhēng sèng-kiat chòe lé-ho̍k kèng-pài Siōng Chú! Choân-tōe tio̍h tī I bīn-chêng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah!
Psalms96:10 Tio̍h tùi bān-kok soan-pò͘
Psalms96:11 Thiⁿ tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms96:12 Chhân-hn̂g kap kî-tiong só͘-ū--ê lóng tio̍h khoài-lo̍k! Hit-sî
Psalms96:13 Siōng Chú teh lâi lah; I beh lâi sím-phòaⁿ phó͘-thiⁿ-ē. I beh ēng kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ sè-kài; I beh ēng sìn-si̍t sím-phòaⁿ bān-bîn.
Psalms97:1 Siōng Chú choh-ông
Psalms97:2 Ba̍t-hûn kap o͘-àm tī I ê sì-ûi; kong-gī kap chèng-ti̍t sī I pó-chō ê tōe-ki.
Psalms97:3 Hé kiâⁿ tī I ê bīn-chêng
Psalms97:4 I ê sih-nà chiò-kng sè-kài; tāi-tōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ chiū iô-choah.
Psalms97:5 Tī Siōng Chú — choân-tōe ê Chú bīn-chêng
Psalms97:6 Thiⁿ soan-pò͘ I ê kong-gī; lia̍t-pang khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê êng-kng.
Psalms97:7 Só͘-ū ho̍k-sāi tiau-khek ê ngó͘-siōng
Psalms97:8 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms97:9 In-ūi Siōng Chú lí chì-koân
Psalms97:10 Siōng Chú só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng oàn-hūn pháiⁿ. I pó-hō͘ I sèng ê chú-bîn ê sìⁿ-miā
Psalms97:11 Kng ūi-tio̍h gī-lâng chhut-hiān; hí-lo̍k ūi-tio̍h sim chèng-ti̍t ê lâng chún-pī.
Psalms97:12 Gī-lâng ah
Psalms98:1 Lín tio̍h ǹg Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ sin ê koa
Psalms98:2 Siōng Chú í-keng soan-pò͘ I ê kiù-un
Psalms98:3 I ōe-kì-tit I tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -ke èng-ún ê chû-ài kap sìn-si̍t; thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak lóng ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lán ê Siōng-tè ê chín-kiù.
Psalms98:4 Choân-tōe lóng tio̍h ǹg Siōng Chú chhut hoaⁿ-hí ê siaⁿ; tio̍h chhut tōa-siaⁿ hoaⁿ-hí chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn I.
Psalms98:5 Tio̍h tôaⁿ-khîm chheng-chàn Siōng Chú
Psalms98:6 Tio̍h ēng lat-pah kap sàu-kak
Psalms98:7 Goān hái kap hái-tiong ê it-chhè lóng chhut-siaⁿ; sè-kài kap bān-mi̍h mā chhut tōa-siaⁿ.
Psalms98:8 Goān kang-hô phah-pho̍k-á hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms98:9 in-ūi I lâi beh sím-phòaⁿ choân-tōe
Psalms99:1 Siōng Chú choh-ông
Psalms99:2 Siōng Chú tī Sek-an choh-tōa; I siū bān-bîn chun-chông.
Psalms99:3 Goān in chheng-chàn I úi-tāi thang kiaⁿ-ùi ê miâ. I sī chì-sèng!
Psalms99:4 Ū tōa koân-le̍k ê Ông ah
Psalms99:5 Tio̍h chun-chông Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè
Psalms99:6 Tī I ê chè-si tiong ū Mô͘-se kap A-lûn; tī kiû-kiò I ê miâ ê lâng tiong-kan ū Sat-bó-ní; in kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Psalms99:7 I tī hûn-thiāu tiong tùi in kóng-ōe; in chun-siú I pan-pò͘ ê kài-bēng kap kui-lē.
Psalms99:8 Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms99:9 Tio̍h chun-chông Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè
Psalms100:1 Choân-tōe ah
Psalms100:2 Tio̍h hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí lâi kèng-pài Siōng Chú! Tio̍h chhiùⁿ chàn-bí ê si-koa lâi kàu I bīn-chêng!
Psalms100:3 Tio̍h chai Siōng Chú sī Siōng-tè! I chhòng-chō lán
Psalms100:4 Tio̍h ēng kám-siā chìn-ji̍p I ê mn̂g! Tio̍h ēng siōng-chàn ji̍p-khì I ê tiâⁿ! Tio̍h kám-siā I
Psalms100:5 Siōng Chú chì-siān: I ê chû-ài sòa kàu éng-oán! I ê sìn-si̍t thàu kàu bān-tāi!
Psalms101:1 Góa beh chhiùⁿ chû-ài kap kong-gī ê koa; Siōng Chú ah
Psalms101:2 Góa beh kín-sīn kiâⁿ chèng-ti̍t ê lō͘; lí sím-mi̍h sî chiah beh lâi góa chia? Góa beh ēng chèng-ti̍t ê sim tī kiong-lāi seng-oa̍h.
Psalms101:3 Hā-chiān ê sū
Psalms101:4 Oan-khiau ê sim-su
Psalms101:5 Àm-tiong húi-pòng chhù-piⁿ ê lâng
Psalms101:6 Góa beh koàn-kò͘ kok-lāi tiong-si̍t ê lâng
Psalms101:7 Khúi-chà ê lâng bōe-ēng-tit tòa góa ê kiong-lāi; pe̍h-chha̍t ê lâng bōe-ēng-tit khiā tī góa ê ba̍k-chiu chêng.
Psalms101:8 Ta̍k chá-khí góa beh húi-bia̍t kok-lāi ê pháiⁿ-lâng
Psalms102:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms102:2 Góa tī gûi-kip ê ji̍t
Psalms102:3 In-ūi góa ê sìⁿ-miā chhin-chhiūⁿ ian siau-sòaⁿ; góa ê kut-thâu chhin-chhiūⁿ chhâ tī hé-lô͘ lāi teh sio.
Psalms102:4 Góa ê sim siū-siong
Psalms102:5 Góa thó͘-khùi haiⁿ-haiⁿ-chhan; góa siau-sán-lo̍h-bah.
Psalms102:6 Góa chhin-chhiūⁿ khòng-iá ê thê-ô͘
Psalms102:7 Góa kui-mî bô khùn
Psalms102:8 Góa ê tùi-te̍k kui-ji̍t bú-jio̍k góa; thí-chhiò góa ê lâng ēng góa kā lâng chiù-chó͘.
Psalms102:9 Góa ēng hé-hu chún pn̄g chia̍h
Psalms102:10 Che sī in-ūi lí khí sèng-tē hoat siū-khì
Psalms102:11 Góa ê sìⁿ-miā chhin-chhiūⁿ ji̍t chhiâ
Psalms102:12 Chí-ū Siōng Chú lí éng-oán chûn-chāi
Psalms102:13 Lí beh khí-lâi lîn-bín Sek-an; in-ūi hiān-chāi sī si-un ê sî
Psalms102:14 Lí ê po̍k-jîn ì-ài Sek-an ê chio̍h-thâu
Psalms102:15 Lia̍t-kok ōe kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê miâ; sè-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông lóng ōe kèng-ùi lí ê êng-kng.
Psalms102:16 In-ūi Siōng Chú tiông-kiàn Sek-an ê sî
Psalms102:17 I àⁿ-lo̍h thiaⁿ sàn-chhiah-lâng ê kî-tó
Psalms102:18 Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h hō͘-tāi ê lâng kì-chài Siōng Chú ê chok-ûi
Psalms102:19 Siōng Chú tùi chì-koân ê sèng-só͘ khòaⁿ--lo̍h-lâi
Psalms102:20 I beh thiaⁿ siû-hoān ê thó͘-khùi
Psalms102:21 hō͘ lâng thang tī Sek-an thoân-iông Siōng Chú ê miâ
Psalms102:22 hit-sî lia̍t-kok ōe chū-chi̍p
Psalms102:23 I hō͘ góa ê khùi-la̍t bī-ló-sian-soe
Psalms102:24 Góa kóng
Psalms102:25 Lí tī khí-thâu kā tōe hē tōe-ki; thiⁿ mā-sī lí chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō.
Psalms102:26 Thiⁿ-tōe lóng ōe siau-sit
Psalms102:27 Chí-ū lí bōe kái-piàn; lí ê hè-siū bû-kiông-chīn.
Psalms102:28 Goān lí po̍k-jîn ê kiáⁿ-sun kú-tn̂g an-ún khiā-khí
Psalms103:1 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms103:2 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms103:3 I sià-bián lí lóng-chóng ê chōe
Psalms103:4 I kiù lí thoat-lī sí-bông ê hām-khiⁿ
Psalms103:5 I ēng ta̍k-khoán hó-mi̍h hō͘ lí chi̍t-sì-lâng boán-chiok
Psalms103:6 Siōng Chú chip-hêng kong-gī; I ūi-tio̍h it-chhè siū ap-chè ê lâng sin-oan.
Psalms103:7 I ēng I ê tō-lō͘ chí-sī Mô͘-se
Psalms103:8 Siōng Chú ū chû-pi
Psalms103:9 I bōe kú-tn̂g chek-pī
Psalms103:10 I bōe chiàu lán ê chōe-kò chek-hoa̍t lán
Psalms103:11 Thiⁿ lī-khui tōe ū jōa koân
Psalms103:12 Tang lī-khui sai ū jōa hn̄g
Psalms103:13 Lāu-pē án-chóaⁿ thiàⁿ-sioh ka-kī ê kiáⁿ-jî
Psalms103:14 In-ūi I chai-iáⁿ lán siū-chō ê pún-chit; I ōe-kì-tit lán put-kò sī thô͘-hún.
Psalms103:15 Lâng leh
Psalms103:16 hong chi̍t-ē chhe chiū siau-sit; bô lâng ōe koh khòaⁿ--tio̍h.
Psalms103:17 M̄-kú Siōng Chú éng-oán thiàⁿ-sioh kèng-ùi I ê lâng; I ēng kong-gī tùi-thāi in ê kiáⁿ-kiáⁿ-sun-sun
Psalms103:18 chiū-sī hiah-ê chun-siú I ê iok
Psalms103:19 Siōng Chú tī thiⁿ-téng siat-li̍p pó-chō; I ê chú-koân phó͘-ki̍p bān-iú.
Psalms103:20 Ū tōa koân-lêng ê thiⁿ-sài
Psalms103:21 Só͘-ū ê thian-kun
Psalms103:22 Tī I chiáng-koân ta̍k só͘-chāi só͘-ū ê pī-chō-bu̍t ah
Psalms104:1 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms104:2 lí ēng kng chòe gōa-phàu moa. Lí thí-khui thiⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ teh tah pò͘-pîⁿ;
Psalms104:3 lí tī chúi-téng an-tì kiong-tiān ê niû. Lí ēng hûn chòe chhia chē
Psalms104:4 Lí ēng hong chòe sù-chiá
Psalms104:5 Lí chiong tōe hē tī tōe-ki téng
Psalms104:6 Lí hō͘ chhim-chúi ná gōa-saⁿ jia-khàm tōe-bīn
Psalms104:7 Lí chi̍t-ē hoah
Psalms104:8 chhèng kàu soaⁿ-thâu
Psalms104:9 Lí tēng kài-hān hō͘ chúi bōe pôaⁿ--kè
Psalms104:10 Lí hō͘ chúi-chôaⁿ tùi soaⁿ-lāi chhèng-chhut
Psalms104:11 hō͘ soaⁿ-lāi ê cháu-siù ū chúi thang lim
Psalms104:12 Lí hō͘ khong-tiong ê pe-chiáu hioh tī chúi-piⁿ
Psalms104:13 Lí tùi thiⁿ-téng ê kiong-tiān ēng chúi koàn-ak soaⁿ-niá
Psalms104:14 Lí hō͘ chháu seng-tióng
Psalms104:15 koh ū chiú hō͘ lâng ê sim hoaⁿ-hí; ū iû hō͘ lâng ê bīn kong-chhái; ū chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ lâng ióng-chòng ū-la̍t.
Psalms104:16 Siōng Chú só͘ chai-chèng Lê-pa-lūn ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū
Psalms104:17 ū pe-chiáu choh-siū tī hia ê chhiū lāi-bīn; ū ho̍h tī siông-chhiū ê chhiū-ki choh-siū.
Psalms104:18 Ū koân-soaⁿ hō͘ iá-soaⁿ-iûⁿ tòa; ū chio̍h-phāng chòe chio̍h-hoan bih ê só͘-chāi.
Psalms104:19 I ēng ge̍h tēng kùi-choeh
Psalms104:20 Lí hō͘ ji̍t àm chòe mî--sî; hit-sî chhiū-nâ lāi ê pah-siù chiū lóng pê--chhut-lâi.
Psalms104:21 Sai-á-thûn háu beh chhē mi̍h chia̍h
Psalms104:22 Ji̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē chhut
Psalms104:23 Lâng chhut-khì chòe kang
Psalms104:24 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms104:25 Tī hia ū hái
Psalms104:26 Tī hia ū chûn teh kiâⁿ
Psalms104:27 Chiah-ê lóng teh khò lí
Psalms104:28 Lí hiat hō͘ in
Psalms104:29 Lí bīn oa̍t-cháu m̄ khòaⁿ in
Psalms104:30 Lí chi̍t-ē pûn-khùi
Psalms104:31 Goān Siōng Chú ê êng-kng éng-oán chûn-sio̍k; goān Siōng Chú in-ūi ka-kī ê chhòng-chō hoaⁿ-hí.
Psalms104:32 I khòaⁿ tōe
Psalms104:33 Góa beh chi̍t-sì-lâng tùi Siōng Chú gîm-si; góa iáu oa̍h--teh ê sî beh tùi góa ê Siōng-tè chhiùⁿ-koa o-ló.
Psalms104:34 Goān I hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p góa ê be̍k-sióng. Góa beh in-ūi Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k.
Psalms104:35 Goān chōe-jîn tùi sè-chiūⁿ siau-bia̍t; goān pháiⁿ-lâng lóng bô--khì. Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms105:1 Lín tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms105:2 Tio̍h tùi I gîm-si
Psalms105:3 Tio̍h khoa-iāu I ê sèng-miâ. Goān chhē-kiû Siōng Chú ê lâng sim-lāi hoaⁿ-hí.
Psalms105:4 Tio̍h óa-khò Siōng Chú kap I ê koân-lêng
Psalms105:5 I ê po̍k-jîn A-pek-la-hán ê hō͘-tāi
Psalms105:6 
Psalms105:7 I sī Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè; I ê sím-phòaⁿ phó͘-ki̍p choân-tōe.
Psalms105:8 I ōe-kì-tit I ê iok ti̍t-kàu éng-oán
Psalms105:9 I ōe-kì-tit kap A-pek-la-hán li̍p ê iok
Psalms105:10 I chiong chit-ê iok hō͘ Ngá-kok chòe kui-lē
Psalms105:11 I kóng
Psalms105:12 Tng-sî in ê jîn-kháu iú-hān
Psalms105:13 In tùi chit-cho̍k kiâⁿ kàu hit-cho̍k
Psalms105:14 I bô iông-ún lâng ap-pek in; ūi-tio̍h in ê iân-kò͘
Psalms105:15 I kóng
Psalms105:16 I hō͘ ki-hng kàng-lo̍h tī hit-ê thó͘-tōe
Psalms105:17 I chhe chi̍t ê lâng seng khì
Psalms105:18 Lâng ēng kha-khàu khàu i ê kha
Psalms105:19 Siōng Chú ê ōe kā i khó-giām
Psalms105:20 Ông chhe lâng kā i tháu-khui; thóng-tī bān-bîn ê Hoat-ló kā i tháu-pàng.
Psalms105:21 Ông siat-li̍p i chòe cháiⁿ-siòng
Psalms105:22 thang sûi-ì pa̍k i ê jîn-sîn
Psalms105:23 Í-sek-lia̍t mā lâi kàu Ai-ki̍p; Ngá-kok chhut-gōa tī Hâm ê tōe.
Psalms105:24 Siōng Chú hō͘ I ê chú-bîn siⁿ-thòaⁿ chin chōe
Psalms105:25 I kái-piàn tùi-te̍k ê sim
Psalms105:26 I chhe I ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se
Psalms105:27 tī tùi-te̍k ê tiong-kan kiâⁿ I ê sîn-jiah
Psalms105:28 I kàng-lo̍h o͘-àm
Psalms105:29 I hō͘ in ê chúi pìⁿ-chòe huih
Psalms105:30 Tī in ê thó͘-tōe chhân-kap-á móa-móa-sī
Psalms105:31 I chi̍t-ē chhut-siaⁿ
Psalms105:32 I lo̍h-pha̍uh tāi-thòe hō͘
Psalms105:33 I sàu-tó in ê phû-tô-chhiū kap bû-hoa-kó-chhiū
Psalms105:34 I chi̍t-ē chhut-siaⁿ
Psalms105:35 kā in thó͘-tōe ê chhài-soe chia̍h-liáu-liáu
Psalms105:36 I phah-sí in kok-lāi só͘-ū ê tōa-kiáⁿ
Psalms105:37 I chhōa in chhut--lâi
Psalms105:38 In chhut--lâi ê sî
Psalms105:39 I ēng hûn kā in jia
Psalms105:40 In chi̍t-ē kiû
Psalms105:41 I phah-khui chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms105:42 In-ūi I ōe-kì-tit I sèng ê èng-ún
Psalms105:43 I chhōa I ê chú-bîn hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí chhut--lâi
Psalms105:44 I chiong lia̍t-kok ê thó͘-tōe sù hō͘ in
Psalms105:45 thang hō͘ in chun-thàn I ê kui-lē
Psalms106:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms106:2 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-hiáu kóng-khí Siōng Chú ê tōa koân-lêng? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng oân-choân piáu-bêng tùi I ê chheng-chàn?
Psalms106:3 Só͘-ū ûi-hō͘ kong-pêng
Psalms106:4 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms106:5 Kiû lí hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lí ê soán-bîn heng-ōng
Psalms106:6 Goán kap goán ê chó͘-sian kâng-khoán ū hoān-chōe; goán phian-lī chiàⁿ-lō͘ chòe pháiⁿ.
Psalms106:7 Goán ê chó͘-sian tī Ai-ki̍p bô bêng-pe̍k lí só͘ chòe ê kî-sū
Psalms106:8 M̄-kú Chú
Psalms106:9 I chi̍t-ē hoah Âng-hái
Psalms106:10 I kiù in thoat-lī oàn-hūn in ê lâng ê chhiú
Psalms106:11 In ê tùi-te̍k lóng hō͘ chúi im-ba̍t
Psalms106:12 Hit-chūn
Psalms106:13 In chin kín chiū bōe-kì-tit I ê só͘-chòe
Psalms106:14 In tī khòng-iá tōa-tōa khí tham-io̍k
Psalms106:15 In só͘ kiû--ê
Psalms106:16 In tī iâⁿ-tiong oàn-tò͘ Mô͘-se kap Siōng Chú sèng-pia̍t ê A-lûn.
Psalms106:17 Tōe chiū li̍h--khui
Psalms106:18 Ū hé tī in tiong-kan to̍h--khí-lâi
Psalms106:19 In tī Hô-lia̍t-soaⁿ chō gû-á
Psalms106:20 Án-ni
Psalms106:21 In bōe-kì-tit kā in chín-kiù ê Siōng-tè; I bat tī Ai-ki̍p chòe tōa tāi-chì
Psalms106:22 tī Hâm ê tōe kiâⁿ kî-sū
Psalms106:23 Só͘-í
Psalms106:24 In khòaⁿ-khin hit-ê hó ê tōe
Psalms106:25 in tī ka-kī ê pò͘-pîⁿ lāi bâi-oàn
Psalms106:26 Só͘-í I tùi in gia̍h-chhiú li̍p-sè
Psalms106:27 hō͘ in ê kiáⁿ-sun sí tī gōa-kok
Psalms106:28 In tàu-tīn khì pài Pí-ní ê Pa-le̍k
Psalms106:29 In án-ni chòe
Psalms106:30 Hit-sî Hui-nî-hap khí-lâi thòe in pâi-kái
Psalms106:31 Chit-ê tāi-chì Siōng-tè kā i sǹg-chòe gī
Psalms106:32 In tī Bí-lī-pa ê chúi-chôaⁿ piⁿ koh jiá Siōng Chú siū-khì
Psalms106:33 in-ūi in pōe-poān Siōng-tè
Psalms106:34 In bô thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú ê hoan-hù
Psalms106:35 hoán-tńg kap gōa-pang-lâng thong-hun
Psalms106:36 ho̍k-sāi in ê ngó͘-siōng; kiat-kó ka-kī poa̍h-lo̍h hām-chíⁿ.
Psalms106:37 In chiong kiáⁿ
Psalms106:38 in lâu bô chōe ê lâng ê huih
Psalms106:39 Án-ni
Psalms106:40 Só͘-í
Psalms106:41 I chiong in kau tī gōa-pang-lâng ê chhiú
Psalms106:42 In ê tùi-te̍k ap-chè in
Psalms106:43 Siōng Chú chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn kái-kiù in; m̄-kú in kò͘-ì pōe-ge̍k I
Psalms106:44 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h in ê ai-kiò
Psalms106:45 I ūi-tio̍h in siūⁿ-khí I ê iok
Psalms106:46 hō͘ in tit-tio̍h só͘-ū lia̍h in ê lâng ê lîn-bín.
Psalms106:47 Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms106:48 Goān chheng-chàn kui hō͘ Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
Psalms107:1 Lín tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms107:2 Siōng Chú só͘ kiù-sio̍k ê lâng
Psalms107:3 tùi ta̍k-kok
Psalms107:4 In tī khòng-iá pha-hng ê lō͘ liû-lōng
Psalms107:5 In ia̍h iau ia̍h chhùi-ta; in ê sim-sîn hūn--khì.
Psalms107:6 In tī khó͘-lān tiong ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Psalms107:7 I chhōa in kiâⁿ ti̍t ê lō͘
Psalms107:8 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê chû-ài kap I tùi sè-kan-lâng só͘ chòe ê kî-sū
Psalms107:9 I hō͘ chhùi-ta ê lâng ti-chiok
Psalms107:10 Chē tī o͘-àm sí-ìm tiong ê lâng
Psalms107:11 in-ūi in pōe-ge̍k Siōng-tè ê ōe
Psalms107:12 só͘-í I ēng lô-khó͘ kā in kà-koai; in poa̍h-tó
Psalms107:13 In tī khó͘-lān tiong ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Psalms107:14 I tùi o͘-àm sí-ìm tiong chhōa in chhut--lâi
Psalms107:15 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê chû-ài kap I ūi-tio̍h sè-kan-lâng só͘ chòe ê kî-sū
Psalms107:16 In-ūi I phah-phòa tâng ê mn̂g
Psalms107:17 Gōng-lâng in-ūi in ka-kī ê kè-sit
Psalms107:18 In iàm-ò͘ⁿ ta̍k-khoán ê chia̍h-mi̍h
Psalms107:19 In tī khó͘-lān tiong ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Psalms107:20 I chhut bēng-lēng i-hó in
Psalms107:21 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê chû-ài kap I tùi sè-kan-lâng só͘ chòe ê kî-sū
Psalms107:22 Goān in hiàn kám-siā ê chè
Psalms107:23 Chē-chûn kè hái
Psalms107:24 in ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng Chú ê só͘-chòe
Psalms107:25 Siōng Chú chi̍t-ē bēng-lēng
Psalms107:26 In chiūⁿ kàu kiong-chhong
Psalms107:27 In tian-tian-tó-tó
Psalms107:28 In tī khó͘-lān tiong ai-kiû Siōng Chú
Psalms107:29 I hō͘ kông-hong thêng
Psalms107:30 Hong thêng
Psalms107:31 In-ūi Siōng Chú ê chû-ài kap I ūi-tio̍h sè-kan-lâng só͘ chòe ê kî-sū
Psalms107:32 Goān in tī jîn-bîn ê chū-hōe tiong chun I chòe chì-koân
Psalms107:33 I hō͘ kang-hô pìⁿ-chòe khòng-iá
Psalms107:34 I hō͘ pûi-tōe pìⁿ-chòe kiâm-tōe
Psalms107:35 I hō͘ khòng-iá pìⁿ-chòe chúi-thâm
Psalms107:36 I hō͘ iau-gō ê lâng tiàm tī hia
Psalms107:37 koh chèng-choh chhân-hn̂g
Psalms107:38 I sù hok-khì
Psalms107:39 In koh in-ūi ap-pek
Psalms107:40 I hō͘ kùi-cho̍k siū bú-jio̍k
Psalms107:41 M̄-kú I thê-poa̍t sàn-chhiah-lâng
Psalms107:42 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng khòaⁿ--kìⁿ chiū hoaⁿ-hí; pháiⁿ-lâng lóng tiām--khì bô ōe thang kóng.
Psalms107:43 Tì-hūi ê lâng tio̍h chù-ì chiah-ê tāi-chì
Psalms108:1 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms108:2 Khîm ah
Psalms108:3 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms108:4 Lí ê chû-ài pí thiⁿ khah koân; lí ê sìn-si̍t thàu kàu kiong-chhong.
Psalms108:5 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms108:6 Kiû lí ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú khan-kiù goán lâi hôe-èng goán
Psalms108:7 Siōng-tè tī I ê sèng-só͘ kóng
Psalms108:8 Ki-lia̍t sī góa ê
Psalms108:9 Mô͘-ap chòe góa ê e̍k-phûn; góa hiat góa ê ôe tī Í-tong; góa in-ūi khah iâⁿ Hui-lī-sū tōa-siaⁿ hoah.”
Psalms108:10 Siáⁿ-lâng beh chhōa góa ji̍p-khì kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ? Siáⁿ-lâng beh chhōa góa ji̍p-khì Í-tong ê tōe?
Psalms108:11 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms108:12 Kiû lí oān-chō͘ goán kong-kek tùi-te̍k
Psalms108:13 Khò Siōng-tè goán chiah ōe tek-sèng; I ōe phah-pāi goán ê tùi-te̍k.
Psalms109:1 Góa só͘ chheng-chàn ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms109:2 in-ūi siâ-ok kan-chà ê lâng khui-chhùi kong-kek góa; in ēng pe̍h-chha̍t ê chi̍h tùi góa kóng-ōe.
Psalms109:3 In ēng oàn-hūn ê ōe pau-ûi góa
Psalms109:4 Góa thiàⁿ in
Psalms109:5 In tùi góa ēng pháiⁿ pò hó
Psalms109:6 Kiû lí phài chi̍t ê pháiⁿ-lâng koán-hat i
Psalms109:7 Kiû lí hō͘ i tī sím-phòaⁿ ê sî siū tēng-chōe
Psalms109:8 Kiû lí hō͘ i ê sìⁿ-miā kín kiat-sok
Psalms109:9 Kiû lí hō͘ i ê kiáⁿ-jî pìⁿ-chòe ko͘-jî
Psalms109:10 Kiû lí hō͘ i ê kiáⁿ-jî sì-kòe kiû-khit
Psalms109:11 Kiû lí hō͘ chè-chú chhiúⁿ i it-chhè só͘-ū
Psalms109:12 Kiû lí hō͘ i bô tit-tio̍h hó khoán-thāi
Psalms109:13 Kiû lí hō͘ i ê hō͘-tāi toān-choa̍t
Psalms109:14 Kiû Siōng Chú ōe-kì-tit i chó͘-sian ê chōe-ok
Psalms109:15 Kiû Siōng Chú hō͘ in ê chōe-ok put-sî tī lí bīn-chêng
Psalms109:16 In-ūi i bô siūⁿ-beh si lîn-bín
Psalms109:17 I ài chiù-chó͘
Psalms109:18 I ēng chiù-chó͘ chòe saⁿ chhēng
Psalms109:19 Goān chit-ê chiù-chó͘ chòe i-ho̍k chhēng tī i seng-khu
Psalms109:20 Che chiū-sī i tùi Siōng Chú só͘ siū ê pò-èng; i sī góa ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms109:21 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
Psalms109:22 In-ūi góa sàn-chhiah khùn-khó͘
Psalms109:23 Góa ê hè-siū chhin-chhiūⁿ ji̍t-iáⁿ chiām-chiām chhiâ; góa chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu-meh hō͘ lâng pōaⁿ-tiāu.
Psalms109:24 Góa in-ūi kìm-chia̍h kha-thâu-u sng-nńg; góa siau-sán-lo̍h-bah.
Psalms109:25 Góa siū in húi-pòng; in khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa chiū hàiⁿ-thâu.
Psalms109:26 Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Psalms109:27 hō͘ in chai che sī lí chhin-chhiú só͘ chòe
Psalms109:28 In sui-jiân chiù-chó͘ góa
Psalms109:29 Kiû lí hō͘ góa ê tùi-te̍k ēng lêng-jio̍k chòe saⁿ chhēng
Psalms109:30 Góa beh ēng góa ê chhùi tōa-tōa kám-siā Siōng Chú; góa beh tī chèng-lâng ê tiong-kan chheng-chàn I.
Psalms109:31 I beh khiā tī sàn-chhiah-lâng ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Psalms110:1 Siōng Chú tùi góa ê chú kóng
Psalms110:2 Siōng Chú beh hō͘ lí tùi Sek-an chhun-chhut koân-lêng ê koáiⁿ; lí tio̍h tī tùi-te̍k ê tiong-kan chiáng-koân.
Psalms110:3 Lí chhut-cheng ê ji̍t
Psalms110:4 Siōng Chú ū li̍p-sè
Psalms110:5 Chú tī lí ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Psalms110:6 I beh sím-phòaⁿ bān-kok
Psalms110:7 Ông beh lim lō͘-piⁿ ê khoe-chúi
Psalms111:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms111:2 Siōng Chú ê chok-ûi chin kî-biāu
Psalms111:3 I ê chok-ûi chun-kùi ui-giâm; I ê kong-gī éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms111:4 Siōng Chú kiâⁿ kî-sū hō͘ lâng kì-liām; I ū un-hūi
Psalms111:5 I sù bí-niû hō͘ kèng-ùi I ê lâng; I ōe éng-oán kì-tiâu I ê iok.
Psalms111:6 I tùi I ê chú-bîn hián-bêng tōa koân-lêng ê chok-ûi
Psalms111:7 I ê chhiú só͘ chòe--ê sìn-si̍t kong-pêng
Psalms111:8 éng-oán bōe kái-piàn
Psalms111:9 I kiù-sio̍k I ê chú-bîn
Psalms111:10 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú sī tì-hūi ê kun-pún
Psalms112:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms112:2 In ê kiáⁿ-sun tī Í-sek-lia̍t -tōe it-tēng kiông-sēng; chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ê hō͘-tāi it-tēng siū chiok-hok.
Psalms112:3 In ê ke-lāi chhiong-móa châi-hù; in ê hó hêng-ûi chûn kàu éng-oán.
Psalms112:4 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng tī o͘-àm tiong ū kng teh chiò in; in ū un-hūi
Psalms112:5 Khóng-khài chioh--lâng koh kong-chèng chhú-lí ka-kī ê tāi-chì--ê
Psalms112:6 Gī-lâng choa̍t-tùi bōe sit-pāi; in éng-oán hō͘ lâng siàu-liām.
Psalms112:7 Pháiⁿ siau-sit
Psalms112:8 In ê sim chū-chāi
Psalms112:9 In khóng-khài chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng; in ê hó hêng-ûi chûn kàu éng-oán. In ê thâu ōe-tàng gia̍h-koân
Psalms112:10 Pháiⁿ-lâng khòaⁿ-liáu tōa siū-khì
Psalms113:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms113:2 Goān Siōng Chú ê miâ siū chheng-chàn
Psalms113:3 Tùi ji̍t chhut kàu ji̍t lo̍h ê só͘-chāi
Psalms113:4 Siōng Chú thóng-hat bān-kok; I ê êng-kng pí thiⁿ khah koân.
Psalms113:5 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kap Siōng Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè pí? I chē tī chì-koân ê só͘-chāi
Psalms113:6 àⁿ lo̍h-lâi khòaⁿ thiⁿ kap tōe.
Psalms113:7 I tùi tîn-ai ko-seng sàn-chhiah-lâng
Psalms113:8 I hō͘ in pôe-phōaⁿ kùi-cho̍k
Psalms113:9 I hō͘ bōe seng-io̍k ê hū-jîn-lâng ū ka-têng
Psalms114:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut Ai-ki̍p
Psalms114:2 hit-sî Iû-tāi chiâⁿ-chòe I ê sèng-só͘
Psalms114:3 Tōa-hái khòaⁿ--kìⁿ chiū tô-cháu; Iok-tàn-hô tò-lâu.
Psalms114:4 Tōa-soaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-káng tiô-thiàu; sió-soaⁿ mā chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-á-kiáⁿ thiàu-lâi-thiàu-khì.
Psalms114:5 Tōa-hái ah
Psalms114:6 Tōa-soaⁿ ah
Psalms114:7 Tāi-tōe ah

Psalms115:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms115:2 Lí ná beh hō͘ gōa-pang-lâng kóng
Psalms115:3 Goán ê Siōng-tè tī thiⁿ-téng
Psalms115:4 In ê ngó͘-siōng sī lâng ê chhiú ēng gûn
Psalms115:5 in ū chhùi
Psalms115:6 In ū hī-khang
Psalms115:7 In ū chhiú
Psalms115:8 Chō in--ê
Psalms115:9 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Psalms115:10 A-lûn chè-si ê ke ah
Psalms115:11 Lín kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê lâng ah
Psalms115:12 Siōng Chú koan-sim lán
Psalms115:13 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê lâng
Psalms115:14 Goān Siōng Chú ke-thiⁿ lín ê jîn-sò͘
Psalms115:15 Goān chhòng-chō thiⁿ tōe ê Siōng Chú sù hok-khì hō͘ lín.
Psalms115:16 Thiⁿ chí-ū sio̍k Siōng Chú; I chiong tōe sù hō͘ sè-kan-lâng.
Psalms115:17 Sí-lâng bōe chheng-chàn Siōng Chú; lo̍h-khì éng-oán chēng-be̍k ê só͘-chāi ê lâng mā lóng bōe.
Psalms115:18 Chóng-sī goán beh chheng-chàn Siōng Chú
Psalms116:1 Góa thiàⁿ Siōng Chú
Psalms116:2 I àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ góa
Psalms116:3 Sí-bông ê soh khún-pa̍k góa; Im-hú ê thòng-khó͘ khîⁿ-tiâu góa. Góa ū tú-tio̍h hoān-lān iu-khó͘.
Psalms116:4 Góa kiû-kiò Siōng Chú ê miâ
Psalms116:5 Siōng Chú ū un-hūi
Psalms116:6 Siōng Chú pó-hō͘ tan-sûn ê lâng; góa chhiⁿ-chhám-lo̍k-phek ê sî
Psalms116:7 Góa ê sim-sîn ah
Psalms116:8 Chú ah
Psalms116:9 Góa beh tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng
Psalms116:10 Góa sui-jiân kóng góa siū ke̍k-tōa ê khùn-khó͘
Psalms116:11 Góa bat tio̍h-kip kóng
Psalms116:12 Siōng Chú sù góa it-chhè ê un-hūi
Psalms116:13 Góa beh phâng kiù-un ê poe
Psalms116:14 Góa beh tī I só͘-ū chú-bîn ê bīn-chêng
Psalms116:15 Siōng Chú khòaⁿ I sèng ê chú-bîn ê sí ke̍k-kî m̄-kam.
Psalms116:16 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms116:17 Góa beh tùi lí hiàn kám-siā ê chè
Psalms116:18 Tī I só͘-ū chú-bîn ê bīn-chêng
Psalms116:19 
Psalms117:1 Bān-kok ah
Psalms117:2 In-ūi I tùi lán si tōa chû-ài; Siōng Chú ê sìn-si̍t éng-oán chûn-sio̍k. Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms118:1 Tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms118:2 Goān Í-sek-lia̍t kóng
Psalms118:3 Goān A-lûn chè-si ê ke kóng
Psalms118:4 Goān só͘-ū kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ê lâng kóng
Psalms118:5 Tī gûi-kip ê sî
Psalms118:6 Siōng Chú kap góa tông-chāi
Psalms118:7 Siōng Chú ūi góa
Psalms118:8 Chhē Siōng Chú chòe pī-lān-só͘ pí óa-khò lâng khah hó!
Psalms118:9 Chhē Siōng Chú chòe pī-lān-só͘ pí óa-khò thóng-tī-chiá khah hó!
Psalms118:10 Lia̍t-kok kā góa pau-ûi
Psalms118:11 In pau-ûi góa
Psalms118:12 In chhin-chhiūⁿ phang kā góa pau-ûi
Psalms118:13 In chhut-la̍t chhia góa
Psalms118:14 Siōng Chú sī góa ê khùi-la̍t
Psalms118:15 Tī Siōng Chú chú-bîn ê pò͘-pîⁿ lāi ū khái-soân ê hoan-ho͘
Psalms118:16 Siōng Chú ê chiàⁿ-chhiú gia̍h-koân-koân; Siōng Chú ê chiàⁿ-chhiú hián-chhut tōa koân-lêng!”
Psalms118:17 Góa bōe tì-kàu sí
Psalms118:18 Siōng Chú giâm-giâm koán-kàu góa
Psalms118:19 Kā góa khui kong-gī ê mn̂g
Psalms118:20 Chit-ê mn̂g sī Siōng Chú ê mn̂g
Psalms118:21 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms118:22 Khí-chhù sai-hū khì-sak ê chio̍h
Psalms118:23 Che sī Siōng Chú ê chok-ûi; lán khòaⁿ--khí-lâi kám-kak chin kî-biāu.
Psalms118:24 Che sī Siōng Chú só͘ tēng ê ji̍t-chí; lán tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms118:25 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms118:26 Hōng Siōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Goán tùi Siōng Chú ê tiān chiok-hok lí.
Psalms118:27 Siōng Chú sī Siōng-tè
Psalms118:28 Lí sī góa ê Siōng-tè
Psalms118:29 Tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms119:1 Hêng-ûi bô thang chí-chek
Psalms119:2 Thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú ê kà-sī
Psalms119:3 In bô chòe put-gī ê sū
Psalms119:4 Siōng Chú
Psalms119:5 Goān góa ê só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe
Psalms119:6 Góa tiōng-sī lí it-chhè ê kài-bēng
Psalms119:7 Góa ha̍k-si̍p lí kong-chèng ê phòaⁿ-toàn; góa beh sêng-sim kám-siā lí.
Psalms119:8 Góa beh chun-siú lí ê kui-lē; kiû lí choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang pàng-sak góa.
Psalms119:9 Siàu-liân-lâng tio̍h án-chóaⁿ hō͘ seng-oa̍h sûn-kiat? Tio̍h chun-hêng lí ê ōe!
Psalms119:10 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:11 Góa chiong lí ê ōe khǹg tī sim-lāi
Psalms119:12 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:13 Lí só͘ kóng it-chhè ê kui-lē
Psalms119:14 Góa ì-ài lí ê kà-sī
Psalms119:15 Góa ná liām ná siūⁿ lí ê lu̍t-lē
Psalms119:16 Góa ì-ài lí ê bēng-lēng
Psalms119:17 Kiû lí si tōa-un hō͘ lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms119:18 Kiû lí khui góa ê ba̍k-chiu
Psalms119:19 Góa tī tōe-chiūⁿ sī chhut-gōa-lâng; kiû lí m̄-thang tùi góa khàm-ba̍t lí ê kài-bēng.
Psalms119:20 Góa put-sî pek-chhiat him-bō͘ lí ê kui-lē
Psalms119:21 Lí chek-pī kiau-ngō͘ siū chiù-chó͘ ê lâng; in bê-lō͘ lī-khui lí ê kài-bēng.
Psalms119:22 Lâng tùi góa ê lêng-jio̍k kap khòaⁿ-khin
Psalms119:23 Thóng-tī-chiá chē-teh chham-siông beh hāi góa
Psalms119:24 Lí ê kà-sī sī góa só͘ ì-ài
Psalms119:25 Góa siū phah-tó phak tī thô͘-kha; kiû lí chiàu lí ê èng-ún pó-siú góa ê sìⁿ-miā.
Psalms119:26 Góa tùi lí kóng-khí só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì
Psalms119:27 Kiû lí hō͘ góa bêng-pe̍k lí ê lu̍t-lē
Psalms119:28 Góa ê sim pi-siong kàu beh chhùi--khì; kiû lí chiàu lí ê èng-ún hō͘ góa hôe-ho̍k goân-khì.
Psalms119:29 Kiû lí hō͘ góa bô kiâⁿ hu-ké ê tō-lō͘; kiû lí si-un kà-sī góa lí ê lu̍t-hoat.
Psalms119:30 Góa ū kéng chin-si̍t ê lō͘; góa khòaⁿ-tāng lí ê kui-lē.
Psalms119:31 Góa chhî-siú lí ê kà-sī; Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:32 Góa beh jia̍t-chhiat tui-kiû lí ê kài-bēng
Psalms119:33 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:34 Kiû lí hō͘ góa ū tì-hūi chun-siú lí ê lu̍t-hoat
Psalms119:35 Kiû lí chhōa góa kiâⁿ lí kài-bēng ê lō͘; chit-ê lō͘ góa chin ì-ài.
Psalms119:36 Kiû lí hō͘ góa ê sim kui-ǹg lí ê kà-sī
Psalms119:37 Kiû lí hō͘ góa bōe ì-ài hu-ké
Psalms119:38 Kiû lí si̍t-hiān tùi lí po̍k-jîn ê èng-ún
Psalms119:39 Kiû lí hō͘ góa só͘ kiaⁿ ê lêng-jio̍k lī-khui góa
Psalms119:40 Góa him-bō͘ lí ê lu̍t-lē; kiû lí chiàu lí ê kong-gī sù góa oa̍h-miā.
Psalms119:41 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:42 góa chiū thang ìn-tap lêng-jio̍k góa ê lâng
Psalms119:43 Kiû lí m̄-thang chiong chin-lí ê ōe tùi góa ê chhùi chhiúⁿ--khì
Psalms119:44 Góa beh kè-sio̍k siú lí ê lu̍t-hoat
Psalms119:45 Góa beh chū-iû chū-chāi seng-oa̍h
Psalms119:46 Góa tī kun-ông ê bīn-chêng káng-lūn lí ê kà-sī
Psalms119:47 Lí ê kài-bēng hō͘ góa hí-lo̍k
Psalms119:48 Góa chun-tiōng koh ì-ài lí ê kài-bēng; góa mā beh ná liām ná siūⁿ lí ê kui-lē.
Psalms119:49 Kiû lí ōe-kì-tit tùi lí po̍k-jîn ê èng-ún
Psalms119:50 Tī hoān-lān tiong
Psalms119:51 Kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng it-ti̍t bú-jio̍k thí-chhiò góa
Psalms119:52 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:53 Góa in-ūi hiah-ê khì-sak lí lu̍t-hoat ê pháiⁿ-lâng
Psalms119:54 Góa bô-lūn chhut-gōa khì tó-ūi
Psalms119:55 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:56 Góa tit-tio̍h hok-hūn
Psalms119:57 Siōng Chú sī góa ê sán-gia̍p; góa bat kóng
Psalms119:58 Góa bat choân-sim kiû lí ê un; kiû lí chiàu lí ê èng-ún lîn-bín góa.
Psalms119:59 Góa chhim-chhim su-siúⁿ lí ê tō-lō͘
Psalms119:60 Góa kóaⁿ-kín bô iân-chhiân
Psalms119:61 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê soh khún-pa̍k góa
Psalms119:62 Góa in-ūi lí kong-chèng ê phòaⁿ-toàn
Psalms119:63 Só͘-ū kèng-ùi lí
Psalms119:64 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:65 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:66 Kiû lí kà-sī góa
Psalms119:67 Góa chêng ū kiâⁿ bê-lō͘
Psalms119:68 Lí sī liông-siān
Psalms119:69 Kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng ēng pe̍h-chha̍t-ōe kong-kek góa
Psalms119:70 In ê sim chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ iû pau-ba̍t bâ-pì
Psalms119:71 Góa siū koán-kàu tùi góa ū lī-ek
Psalms119:72 Lí só͘ kóng ê lu̍t-hoat tùi góa ū lī-ek
Psalms119:73 Lí ê chhiú chhòng-chō góa
Psalms119:74 Kèng-ùi lí ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa lâi hoaⁿ-hí
Psalms119:75 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:76 Kiû lí chiàu lí tùi po̍k-jîn ê èng-ún
Psalms119:77 Goān lí ê chû-pi lîm-kàu góa
Psalms119:78 Goān kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng sit-pāi kiàn-siàu
Psalms119:79 Goān kèng-ùi lí
Psalms119:80 Goān góa choân-sim chun-siú lí ê kui-lē
Psalms119:81 Góa ê sim pek-chhiat him-bō͘ lí ê chín-kiù kàu beh hūn--khì; lí ê ōe hō͘ góa ū ǹg-bāng.
Psalms119:82 Góa in-ūi ǹg-bāng lí ê èng-ún kàu ba̍k-chiu beh hoe--khì; góa kóng
Psalms119:83 Sui-jiân góa chhin-chhiūⁿ phê-tē hō͘ hé hun kah beh ta--khì
Psalms119:84 Lí ê po̍k-jîn tio̍h koh jím-nāi jōa kú? Lí tī-sî chiah beh sím-phòaⁿ khún-pek góa ê lâng?
Psalms119:85 Kiau-ngō͘ bô thàn lí lu̍t-hoat ê lâng
Psalms119:86 In bô lí-iû khún-pek góa
Psalms119:87 Góa hiám-hiám-á hō͘ in tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siau-bia̍t
Psalms119:88 In-ūi lí ū hong-sēng ê chû-ài
Psalms119:89 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:90 Lí ê sìn-si̍t sòa kàu bān-tāi; lí kiàn-li̍p tōe
Psalms119:91 Thiⁿ tōe chiàu lí ê an-pâi
Psalms119:92 Góa nā m̄-sī ì-ài lí ê lu̍t-hoat
Psalms119:93 Góa éng-oán bōe bōe-kì-tit lí ê lu̍t-lē
Psalms119:94 Góa sī lí ê
Psalms119:95 Pháiⁿ-lâng tng-tán beh húi-bia̍t góa
Psalms119:96 Góa khòaⁿ-chhut só͘ ū oân-choân--ê lóng iú-hān
Psalms119:97 Góa si̍t-chāi chin ì-ài lí ê lu̍t-hoat
Psalms119:98 Lí ê kài-bēng put-sî tī góa sin-piⁿ
Psalms119:99 Góa pí góa lóng-chóng ê sian-siⁿ khah thong-ta̍t
Psalms119:100 Góa pí lāu-lâng khah ū tì-hūi
Psalms119:101 Góa kìm-chí góa ê kha kiâⁿ it-chhè ê pháiⁿ-lō͘
Psalms119:102 Góa bô phian-lī lí ê kui-lē
Psalms119:103 Lí ê ōe tī góa chhùi-lāi
Psalms119:104 Góa tùi lí ê lu̍t-lē tit-tio̍h tì-hūi
Psalms119:105 Lí ê ōe sī góa kha-chêng ê teng
Psalms119:106 Lí kong-chèng ê phòaⁿ-toàn
Psalms119:107 Góa siū-tio̍h ke̍k-tōa ê khó͘-lān; Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:108 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:109 Góa ê sìⁿ-miā put-sî tú-tio̍h gûi-hiám
Psalms119:110 Pháiⁿ-lâng siat lô-bāng beh hāi góa
Psalms119:111 Góa chiong lí ê kà-sī chòe éng-oán ê sán-gia̍p
Psalms119:112 Góa choân-sim kui-ǹg lí ê bēng-lēng
Psalms119:113 Tùi lí bô tiong-sim ê lâng
Psalms119:114 Lí sī góa siám-bih ê só͘-chāi
Psalms119:115 Choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng ah
Psalms119:116 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê èng-ún hû-chhî góa
Psalms119:117 Kiû lí hû-chhî góa
Psalms119:118 Ûi-pōe lí bēng-lēng ê lâng
Psalms119:119 Sè-kan ê pháiⁿ-lâng
Psalms119:120 Góa in-ūi kiaⁿ-ùi lí
Psalms119:121 Góa ū si̍t-hêng kong-gī chèng-ti̍t; kiû lí m̄-thang kā góa pàng hō͘ ap-chè góa ê lâng.
Psalms119:122 Kiû lí pó-chèng lí ê po̍k-jîn sū-sū heng-thong
Psalms119:123 Góa ǹg-bāng lí ê chín-kiù kap kong-gī ê èng-ún
Psalms119:124 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê chû-ài tùi-thāi lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms119:125 Góa sī lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms119:126 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:127 Só͘-í góa ì-ài lí ê kài-bēng
Psalms119:128 Lí ūi bān-sū tēng ê lu̍t-lē
Psalms119:129 Lí ê kà-sī kî-biāu
Psalms119:130 Lí ê ōe chi̍t-ē kóe-seh chiū hoat-chhut kng
Psalms119:131 Góa chhùi tōa khui ti̍t-ti̍t chhoán
Psalms119:132 Kiû lí oa̍t kè-lâi khòaⁿ góa
Psalms119:133 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê èng-ún ín-chhōa góa ê kha-pō͘
Psalms119:134 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-lī lâng ê ap-chè
Psalms119:135 Goān lí ēng lí ê bīn ê kng chiò lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms119:136 Góa ê ba̍k-sái chhin-chhiūⁿ khoe-chúi ti̍t-ti̍t lâu
Psalms119:137 Siōng Chú
Psalms119:138 Lí pan-pò͘ ê lu̍t-lē kong-chèng
Psalms119:139 Góa hui-siông siū-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ hé beh kā góa thun-bia̍t
Psalms119:140 Lí ê èng-ún sûn-chin khó-khò; lí ê po̍k-jîn chin ì-ài.
Psalms119:141 Góa pi-bî
Psalms119:142 Lí ê kong-gī sòa kàu éng-oán; lí ê lu̍t-hoat chin-si̍t.
Psalms119:143 Góa siū-tio̍h hoān-lān iu-khó͘
Psalms119:144 Lí ê kà-sī éng-oán kong-chèng; kiû lí sù góa tì-hūi

Psalms119:148 Góa kui-mî ba̍k-chiu kim-kim

Psalms119:150 Kè-bô͘ chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng pek-kūn góa; in lī lí ê lu̍t-hoat hn̄g-hn̄g.
Psalms119:151 M̄-kú Siōng Chú ah
Psalms119:152 Góa chá chiū ha̍k-si̍p lí ê kà-sī; lí hō͘ in khak-li̍p kàu éng-oán.

Psalms119:160 Lí ê ōe ê pún-chit sī chin-si̍t; lí it-chhè kong-chèng ê phòaⁿ-toàn éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms119:161 Thóng-tī-chiá bô-lí-bô-iû pek-hāi góa; m̄-kú góa ê sim kiaⁿ-ùi lí ê ōe.
