Psalms131:3 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Psalms132:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms132:2 ōe-kì-tit i án-chóaⁿ tùi Siōng Chú chiù-chōa
Psalms132:3 “Góa it-tēng bōe ji̍p-khì góa ê chhù
Psalms132:4 góa bōe hō͘ góa ê ba̍k-chiu khùn--khì
Psalms132:5 thèng-hāu góa ūi-tio̍h Siōng Chú chhē-tio̍h só͘-chāi
Psalms132:6 Goán thiaⁿ-kìⁿ iok-kūi tī Í-hoat-tha
Psalms132:7 Goán beh ji̍p-khì Siōng Chú khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi; goán beh tī I ê kha-tiam thâu-chêng kūi-pài.
Psalms132:8 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms132:9 Goān lí ê chè-si ēng kong-gī chòe saⁿ chhēng; goān lí sèng ê chú-bîn chhut hoaⁿ-hí ê siaⁿ.
Psalms132:10 Kiû lí in-ūi lí ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t ê iân-kò͘
Psalms132:11 Siōng Chú ēng sìn-si̍t tùi Tāi-pi̍t li̍p-sè
Psalms132:12 Lí ê kiáⁿ-sun nā chun-siú góa ê iok
Psalms132:13 Siōng Chú ū kéng Sek-an
Psalms132:14 “Che sī góa éng-oán hioh-khùn ê só͘-chāi; góa beh tiàm chia
Psalms132:15 Góa beh hō͘ Sek-an bí-niû hong-sēng
Psalms132:16 Góa beh hō͘ i ê chè-si ēng kiù-un chòe saⁿ chhēng; I sèng ê chú-bîn ōe chhut tōa hoaⁿ-hí ê siaⁿ.
Psalms132:17 Góa beh hō͘ Tāi-pi̍t ê ông-koân khok-tián chòng-tāi
Psalms132:18 Góa beh hō͘ i ê tùi-te̍k ēng kiàn-siàu chòe saⁿ chhēng; chóng-sī ông tì ê ông-koan ōe hoat-chhut kong-chhái.”
Psalms133:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē chòe-hé khiā-khí
Psalms133:2 Che thang pí-phēng kùi-khì ê iû thîn tī thâu-khak téng
Psalms133:3 Che mā thang pí-phēng Hek-bûn-soaⁿ ê lō͘-chúi
Psalms134:1 Lín chiah-ê mî--sî tī Siōng Chú ê tiān teh sū-hōng ê po̍k-jîn ah
Psalms134:2 Lín tio̍h ǹg sèng-só͘ gia̍h-khí lín ê chhiú
Psalms134:3 Goān chhòng-chō thiⁿ tōe ê Siōng Chú
Psalms135:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms135:2 
Psalms135:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú
Psalms135:4 In-ūi Siōng Chú kéng-soán Ngá-kok kui-sio̍k I ka-kī
Psalms135:5 Góa chai Siōng Chú úi-tāi; lán ê Chú chhiau-oa̍t lóng-chóng ê sîn-bêng.
Psalms135:6 Siōng Chú tī thiⁿ-téng kap tōe-chiūⁿ
Psalms135:7 I hō͘ hûn-bū tùi thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak chhèng--chhut-lâi
Psalms135:8 I chiong thâu-chiūⁿ-siⁿ ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng kap cheng-siⁿ lóng phah-sí.
Psalms135:9 Ai-ki̍p ah
Psalms135:10 I phah-pāi chin chōe pang-kok
Psalms135:11 chiū-sī A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông kap Pa-san -ông Go̍k
Psalms135:12 I chiong in ê thó͘-tōe hō͘ I ka-kī ê chú-bîn
Psalms135:13 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms135:14 in-ūi Siōng Chú beh ūi-tio̍h I ê chú-bîn sin-oan
Psalms135:15 Gōa-pang ê ngó͘-siōng sī lâng ê chhiú ēng gûn
Psalms135:16 in ū chhùi
Psalms135:17 ū hī-khang
Psalms135:18 Chō in--ê
Psalms135:19 Í-sek-lia̍t -ke ah
Psalms135:20 Lī-bī ê ke ah
Psalms135:21 Siōng Chú khiā-khí tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; goān I tùi Sek-an siū chheng-chàn. Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms136:1 Tio̍h kám-siā Siōng Chú
Psalms136:2 Tio̍h kám-siā bān-sîn ê Sîn; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:3 Tio̍h kám-siā bān-chú ê Chú; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:4 Chí-ū I chòe kî-biāu tōa-sū; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:5 I ēng tì-hūi chhòng-chō thiⁿ; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:6 I kā tōe pho͘ tī chúi ê téng-bīn; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:7 I chhòng-chō tōa ê kng-thé; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:8 I ēng ji̍t-thâu koán-lí ji̍t--sî; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:9 I ēng ge̍h kap chhiⁿ koán-lí mî--sî; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:10 I phah-sí Ai-ki̍p -lâng ê tōa-kiáⁿ; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:11 I chhōa Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tùi in tiong-kan chhut--lâi; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:12 I chhun-chhut tōa koân-lêng ê chhiú; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:13 I kā Âng-hái pun-khui; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:14 I chhōa Í-sek-lia̍t tùi hit tiong-kan kè--khì; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:15 I chiong Hoat-ló kap i ê kun-peng hiat-lo̍h Âng-hái; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:16 I chhōa I ê chú-bîn keng-kè khòng-iá; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:17 I phah-sí hiah-ê tōa kun-ông; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:18 I thâi-sí kiông koh ióng ê ông; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:19 I thâi-sí A-mô͘-lī -ông Se-hông; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:20 I thâi-sí Pa-san -ông Go̍k; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:21 I chiong in ê thó͘-tōe sù hō͘ I ê chú-bîn chòe sán-gia̍p; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:22 I sù sán-gia̍p hō͘ I ê po̍k-jîn Í-sek-lia̍t; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:23 I tī lán siū khut-jio̍k ê sî bô bōe-kì-tit lán; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:24 I kái-kiù lán thoat-lī tùi-te̍k; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:25 I sù chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ só͘-ū ê oa̍h-mi̍h; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms136:26 Tio̍h kám-siā thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè; I ê chû-ài éng-oán chûn-sio̍k.
Psalms137:1 Goán chē tī Pa-pí-lûn ê hô-piⁿ
Psalms137:2 Goán chiong khîm tiàu tī hia ê liú-chhiū.
Psalms137:3 Tī hia
Psalms137:4 Goán tī īⁿ-pang ná chhiùⁿ ōe chhut kèng-pài Siōng Chú ê si-koa?
Psalms137:5 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah
Psalms137:6 Góa nā bōe-kì-tit lí
Psalms137:7 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lûn-hām ê ji̍t
Psalms137:8 Pa-pí-lûn -siâⁿ ah
Psalms137:9 Lia̍h lí ê eⁿ-á siak tī chio̍h-pôaⁿ téng hit-khoán lâng ū hok-khì.
Psalms138:1 Góa beh choân-sim kám-siā lí
Psalms138:2 Góa beh ǹg lí ê sèng-tiān kūi-pài
Psalms138:3 Góa kiû-kiò ê sî lí ū ìn góa; lí ū kó͘-lē góa
Psalms138:4 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms138:5 In ōe chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn Siōng Chú ê chok-ûi
Psalms138:6 Siōng Chú sui-jiân chun-kùi
Psalms138:7 Góa sui-jiân hō͘ hoān-lān ûi-khùn
Psalms138:8 Siōng Chú ōe si̍t-hiān tùi góa ê èng-ún. Siōng Chú ah
Psalms139:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms139:2 Góa ê it-kú-it-tōng lí lóng chai; tùi chin hn̄g lí mā khòaⁿ ōe chhut góa ê sim-su.
Psalms139:3 Góa kiâⁿ-lō͘
Psalms139:4 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms139:5 Lí tī góa ê chêng-āu chiàu-kò͘ góa; lí chhin-chhiú pó-hō͘ góa.
Psalms139:6 Lí ê chai-bat hiah-ni̍h kî-biāu
Psalms139:7 Khì tó-ūi
Psalms139:8 Góa nā peh-chiūⁿ thiⁿ
Psalms139:9 Góa nā thí-si̍t pe-khì ji̍t chhut hit-pêng
Psalms139:10 chiū nā tī hia
Psalms139:11 Góa nā kiû o͘-àm kā góa khàm--khí-lâi
Psalms139:12 tùi lí lâi kóng
Psalms139:13 Lí chō góa ê chōng-hú; góa tī lāu-bú ê pak-tó͘ lāi
Psalms139:14 Góa kám-siā lí
Psalms139:15 Góa tī lâng khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h ê só͘-chāi siū-chō
Psalms139:16 Góa bē chiâⁿ-hêng ê seng-khu
Psalms139:17 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms139:18 Góa nā beh sǹg
Psalms139:19 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms139:20 In kóng pháiⁿ-ōe siat-to̍k lí; lí ê tùi-te̍k ēng siâ-ok ê ōe bú-jio̍k lí.
Psalms139:21 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms139:22 Góa chhim-chhim oàn-hūn in
Psalms139:23 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms139:24 Kiû lí chí-tiám góa
Psalms140:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms140:2 In sim-lāi tô͘-bô͘ siâ-ok
Psalms140:3 In ê chi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ to̍k-chôa ê chi̍h hiah-ni̍h lāi; in ê chhùi-tûn ū to̍k-chôa ê to̍k.
Psalms140:4 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms140:5 Kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng àm-tiong ku̍t hām-chíⁿ
Psalms140:6 Góa tùi Siōng Chú kóng
Psalms140:7 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú — góa tōa khùi-la̍t ê Chín-kiù-chiá ah
Psalms140:8 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms140:9 M̄-thang hō͘ ûi-khùn góa ê lâng sèng-lī; tio̍h hō͘ in chhùi-tûn ê to̍k-hāi hāi-tio̍h in ka-kī.
Psalms140:10 Kiû lí ēng teh to̍h ê hé-thòaⁿ kàng-lo̍h tī in sin-chiūⁿ; kā in hiat-lo̍h hé
Psalms140:11 Kiû lí hō͘ chè-chō sī-hui ê lâng tī tōe-chiūⁿ khiā bōe tiâu
Psalms140:12 Góa chai Siōng Chú ōe ūi-tio̍h khùn-khó͘ ê lâng sin-oan
Psalms140:13 Gī-lâng it-tēng ōe kám-siā lí; chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ōe-tàng tī lí bīn-chêng khiā-khí.
Psalms141:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms141:2 Goān góa ê kî-tó chhin-chhiūⁿ hiuⁿ chhèng kàu lí bīn-chêng; goān góa gia̍h-khí ê siang-chhiú
Psalms141:3 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms141:4 Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ góa ê sim phian-ǹg siâ-ok
Psalms141:5 Lêng-khó hō͘ gī-lâng ēng jîn-chû phah góa
Psalms141:6 In ê chip-chèng-chiá siū hiat-lo̍h soaⁿ-khàm
Psalms141:7 Chhin-chhiūⁿ thô͘ hō͘ lôe lôe-sòaⁿ
Psalms141:8 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ah
Psalms141:9 Kiû lí pó-hō͘ góa bián hām-lo̍h in kā góa siat ê lô-bāng
Psalms141:10 Kiû lí hō͘ pháiⁿ-lâng hām-lo̍h ka-kī ê lô-bāng
Psalms142:1 Góa tōa-siaⁿ kiû-kiò Siōng Chú
Psalms142:2 Góa tī I bīn-chêng thò͘-lō͘ góa ê khó͘-chêng
Psalms142:3 Góa ê sim-sîn sit-chì
Psalms142:4 Kiû lí khòaⁿ góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Psalms142:5 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms142:6 Kiû lí àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ góa ê kiû-kiò
Psalms142:7 Kiû lí kiù góa thoat-chhut kaⁿ-lô
Psalms143:1 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms143:2 Kiû lí m̄-thang sím-mn̄g lí ê po̍k-jîn
Psalms143:3 Tùi-te̍k khún-pek góa
Psalms143:4 tì-kàu góa ê sim-sîn sit-chì
Psalms143:5 Góa ōe-kì-tit kó͘-chá ê ji̍t
Psalms143:6 Góa ǹg lí gia̍h-chhiú; góa ê sim khat-bō͘ lí chhin-chhiūⁿ khòng-hān ê tōe thèng-hāu hō͘-chúi.
Psalms143:7 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms143:8 Kiû lí hō͘ góa chá-khí-sî thiaⁿ-kìⁿ lí chû-ài ê siaⁿ
Psalms143:9 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms143:10 Lí sī góa ê Siōng-tè
Psalms143:11 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms143:12 Kiû lí chiàu lí ê chû-ài siau-bia̍t góa ê tùi-te̍k
Psalms144:1 Siōng Chú góa só͘ óa-khò ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ
Psalms144:2 I sī éng-oán thiàⁿ góa ê Siōng-tè
Psalms144:3 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms144:4 Lâng ê sìⁿ-miā chhin-chhiūⁿ chhoán chi̍t ê khùi; i ê ji̍t-chí chhin-chhiūⁿ iáⁿ chin kín chiū siau-sit.
Psalms144:5 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms144:6 Kiû lí hoat-chhut sih-nà kā tùi-te̍k kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ; kiû lí siā-chìⁿ
Psalms144:7 Kiû lí tùi téng-bīn chhun-chhiú kiù góa
Psalms144:8 In ê chhùi kóng pe̍h-chha̍t; in gia̍h chiàⁿ-chhiú choh gūi-chèng.
Psalms144:9 Siōng-tè ah
Psalms144:10 Lí hō͘ kun-ông tek-sèng
Psalms144:11 Kiû lí kái-kiù góa thoat-lī gōa-pang-lâng ê chhiú. In ê chhùi kóng pe̍h-chha̍t; in gia̍h chiàⁿ-chhiú choh gūi-chèng.
Psalms144:12 Goān goán ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ siàu-liân ióng-chòng
Psalms144:13 Goān goán ê chhek-chhng móa-móa
Psalms144:14 Goān goán ê gû pûi koh gâu siⁿ. Siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ bô siū lòng-phòa
Psalms144:15 Hióng-siū chit-khoán kéng-hóng ê chú-bîn chin ū hok-khì! Jīn Siōng Chú chòe in ê Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn chin ū hok-khì!
Psalms145:1 Góa ê Siōng-tè góa ê Ông ah
Psalms145:2 Góa beh ji̍t-ji̍t chheng-chàn lí
Psalms145:3 Siōng Chú chì-tōa
Psalms145:4 Chit-tāi beh tùi hit-tāi chheng-chàn lí ê chok-ûi
Psalms145:5 Lâng beh kóng-khí lí chun-kùi êng-kng ê ui-giâm; góa beh siàu-liām lí kî-biāu ê chok-ûi.
Psalms145:6 Lâng beh kóng-khí lí thang kiaⁿ-ùi ê tōa koân-lêng; góa beh pò-iông lí úi-tāi ê chok-ûi.
Psalms145:7 In beh pò-iông lí ke̍k-tōa ê un-hūi
Psalms145:8 Siōng Chú ū un-hūi
Psalms145:9 Siōng Chú thiàⁿ-sioh bān-iú; I ê lîn-bín phó͘-ki̍p I só͘ chō ê it-chhè.
Psalms145:10 Siōng Chú ah
Psalms145:11 In beh kóng-khí lí kok-tō͘ ê êng-kng
Psalms145:12 thang hō͘ sè-kan-lâng chai lí tōa koân-lêng ê chok-ûi
Psalms145:13 Lí ê kok-tō͘ éng-oán chûn-chāi; lí chip-chiáng ê koân-pèng sòa kàu bān-tāi. Siōng Chú it-chhè ê èng-ún sìn-si̍t khó-khò; I thiàⁿ-sioh I só͘ chō ê it-chhè.
Psalms145:14 Poa̍h-tó sit-pāi ê lâng
Psalms145:15 Só͘-ū ê oa̍h-mi̍h lóng gióng-bōng lí; lí chiàu-sî hō͘ in chia̍h-mi̍h.
Psalms145:16 Lí thí-khui chhiú
Psalms145:17 Siōng Chú it-chhè ê só͘-chòe lóng kong-chèng; I ê chok-ûi chhiong-móa jîn-chû.
Psalms145:18 Só͘-ū kiû-kiò Siōng Chú ê lâng
Psalms145:19 Kèng-ùi I ê lâng
Psalms145:20 Siōng Chú pó-hō͘ só͘-ū thiàⁿ I ê lâng; m̄-kú chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng
Psalms145:21 Góa ê chhùi beh kóng-chhut chheng-chàn Siōng Chú ê ōe; goān it-chhè ū sìⁿ-miā--ê
Psalms146:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms146:2 Góa it-seng beh chheng-chàn Siōng Chú; góa oa̍h ê ji̍t lóng beh chhiùⁿ-koa chheng-chàn góa ê Siōng-tè.
Psalms146:3 M̄-thang óa-khò kun-ông; m̄-thang óa-khò ōe-sí ê lâng
Psalms146:4 In chi̍t-ē tn̄g-khùi chiū kui-thó͘; in ê kè-ōe tī hit-ji̍t chiū lo̍k-khong.
Psalms146:5 Khò Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè pang-chān ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè sī in ê ǹg-bāng.
Psalms146:6 I chhòng-chō thiⁿ
Psalms146:7 I ūi-tio̍h siū óng-khut ê lâng sin-oan; I sù chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ iau-gō ê lâng. Siōng Chú tháu-pàng siū koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê lâng;
Psalms146:8 Siōng Chú hō͘ bông-jîn ōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ. Siōng Chú hû-khí siū ap-chè ê lâng; Siōng Chú thiàⁿ-sioh gī-lâng.
Psalms146:9 Siōng Chú pó-hō͘ chhut-gōa-lâng
Psalms146:10 Siōng Chú ōe éng-oán choh-ông; Sek-an ah
Psalms147:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms147:2 Siōng Chú tiông-kiàn Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Psalms147:3 I i-hó siong-sim ê lâng
Psalms147:4 I sǹg chhiⁿ-sîn ê sò͘-bo̍k
Psalms147:5 Lán ê Chú chì-tōa
Psalms147:6 Siōng Chú hû-chhî pi-bî ê lâng
Psalms147:7 Lín tio̍h ēng kám-siā ǹg Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ-koa
Psalms147:8 I khí-hûn jia-thiⁿ
Psalms147:9 I sù chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ cháu-siù
Psalms147:10 I ì-ài--ê m̄-sī bé ê la̍t tōa; I hoaⁿ-hí--ê m̄-sī lâng ê kha gâu-cháu.
Psalms147:11 Siōng Chú ì-ài--ê sī kèng-ùi I
Psalms147:12 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah
Psalms147:13 In-ūi I kian-kò͘ lí siâⁿ-mn̂g ê mn̂g-chhòaⁿ
Psalms147:14 I hō͘ lí kéng-lāi pêng-an
Psalms147:15 I ǹg tōe hoat-chhut bēng-lēng; I ê ōe thoân-pò͘ chin kín.
Psalms147:16 I lo̍h-seh chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-mn̂g
Psalms147:17 I lo̍h-pha̍uh chhin-chhiūⁿ iù-chio̍h; I thàu léng-hong
Psalms147:18 I chi̍t-ē bēng-lēng
Psalms147:19 I ēng I ê ōe chí-sī Ngá-kok
Psalms147:20 I m̄-bat án-ni khoán-thāi pa̍t-kok; I ê kui-lē
Psalms148:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms148:2 I ê chèng sù-chiá ah
Psalms148:3 Ji̍t kap ge̍h ah
Psalms148:4 Thiⁿ-téng ê thiⁿ
Psalms148:5 Chiah-ê lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú ê miâ
Psalms148:6 I chiong chiah-ê an-tì hó-sè
Psalms148:7 Lín tio̍h tùi tōe-chiūⁿ chheng-chàn Siōng Chú; tōa-hî kap só͘-ū ê chhim-hái
Psalms148:8 sih-nà kap peng-pha̍uh
Psalms148:9 Só͘-ū ê tōa-soaⁿ kap sió-soaⁿ
Psalms148:10 só͘-ū ê iá-siù kap cheng-siⁿ
Psalms148:11 Tōe-chiūⁿ só͘-ū ê kun-ông kap jîn-bîn
Psalms148:12 siàu-liân-lâng kap chāi-sek-lú
Psalms148:13 Lín chiah-ê lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú ê miâ
Psalms148:14 I hō͘ I ê chú-bîn kiông-sēng
Psalms149:1 Ha-lé-lú-iah
Psalms149:2 Goān Í-sek-lia̍t in-ūi in ê Chhòng-chō-chú lâi hoaⁿ-hí; goān Sek-an ê chú-bîn in-ūi in ê Ông lâi khoài-lo̍k.
Psalms149:3 Goān in thiàu-bú chheng-chàn I ê miâ
Psalms149:4 Siōng Chú ì-ài I ê chú-bîn; I ōe ēng kiù-un chòe khiam-pi ê lâng ê chng-thāⁿ.
Psalms149:5 Goān sèng ê chú-bîn in-ūi só͘ tit--tio̍h ê êng-kng lâi hoaⁿ-hí; goān in kui-mî chhut hoaⁿ-hí ê siaⁿ.
Psalms149:6 Goān in ê chhùi chheng-chàn Siōng-tè chòe chì-koân
Psalms149:7 pò-èng gōa-pang
Psalms149:8 ēng thih-liān pa̍k in ê kun-ông
Psalms149:9 tī in ê sin-chiūⁿ chip-hêng só͘ tēng ê phòaⁿ-koat; che sī I sèng ê chú-bîn ê êng-kng. Ha-lé-lú-iah

Psalms150:2 Tio̍h in-ūi I tōa koân-lêng ê chok-ûi chheng-chàn I
Psalms150:3 Tio̍h pûn sàu-kak chheng-chàn I
Psalms150:4 phah-kó͘ thiàu-bú chheng-chàn I
Psalms150:5 ēng siaⁿ tōa ê poa̍h chheng-chàn I
Psalms150:6 Só͘-ū ōe chhoán-khùi--ê lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú. Ha-lé-lú-iah

Proverbs1:3 ōe hō͘ lâng siū kà-sī

Proverbs3:1 Góa ê kiáⁿ ah
Proverbs3:2 án-ni

Proverbs3:15 Tì-hūi pí âng-pó-chio̍h khah kùi-khì; lâng só͘ ì-ài--ê bô chi̍t hāng ōe-tàng kap i pí.
Proverbs3:16 I ê chiàⁿ-chhiú ū tn̂g-hè-siū; i ê tò-chhiú ū hó-gia̍h kap chun-kùi.
Proverbs3:17 I ê lō͘ ū hí-lo̍k; i ê tō-lō͘ hō͘ lâng pêng-an hoân-êng.
Proverbs3:18 Chhî-siú tì-hūi ê lâng tùi i tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā; kian-siú ê lâng lóng chin ū hok-khì.

Proverbs3:20 I ēng tì-sek hō͘ chhim-ian li̍h--khui

Proverbs3:23 Lí chiū ōe an-ún kiâⁿ lí ê lō͘; lí ê kha bōe tak--tio̍h poa̍h-tó.
Proverbs3:24 Lí tó--teh
Proverbs3:25 Hut-jiân hoat-seng thang-kiaⁿ ê tāi-chì
Proverbs3:26 In-ūi Siōng Chú ōe chòe lí ê óa-khò; I ōe pó-siú lí ê kha bô hām-lo̍h lô-bāng.

Proverbs3:31 M̄-thang him-siān kiông-pō ê lâng
Proverbs3:32 Oai-khiok sī-hui ê lâng Siōng Chú iàm-ò͘ⁿ; chèng-ti̍t ê lâng Siōng Chú kap i chhin-bi̍t.
Proverbs3:33 Siōng Chú chiù-chó͘ pháiⁿ-lâng ê ke; gī-lâng ê chhù siū I chiok-hok.
Proverbs3:34 Biáu-sī lâng--ê
Proverbs3:35 Tì-hūi ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h chun-êng; gû-gōng ê lâng só͘ tit--tio̍h-ê sī kiàn-siàu.

Proverbs7:24 Góa ê kiáⁿ-jî ah
Proverbs7:25 Lí ê sim m̄-thang hō͘ i bê--khì
Proverbs7:26 In-ūi i hō͘ chin chōe lâng siū-siong tó--lo̍h-khì; chin chōe lâng hō͘ i hāi-sí.
Proverbs7:27 I ê chhù sī Im-hú ê ji̍p-kháu
Proverbs8:1 Tio̍h thiaⁿ
Proverbs8:2 Tì-hūi tī lō͘-piⁿ koân ê só͘-chāi
Proverbs8:3 Tì-hūi tī siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu
Proverbs8:4 “Chèng-lâng ah
Proverbs8:5 Gōng-ti̍t ê lâng ah
Proverbs8:6 Tio̍h thiaⁿ
Proverbs8:7 Góa ê chhùi kóng chin-si̍t; góa ê chhùi-tûn iàm-ò͘ⁿ siâ-ok.
Proverbs8:8 Góa só͘ kóng ê ōe lóng kong-chèng
Proverbs8:9 Bêng-lí ê lâng lóng ōe liáu-kái; ū tì-sek ê lâng lóng khòaⁿ-chòe chèng-khak.
Proverbs8:10 Chiap-siū góa ê koán-kàu pí tit-tio̍h gûn khah hó; tit-tio̍h tì-sek pí tit-tio̍h sûn-kim khah hó.
Proverbs8:11 In-ūi tì-hūi pí âng-pó-chio̍h khah hó; lâng só͘ ì-ài--ê lóng bōe-tàng kap i pí.
Proverbs8:12 “Góa sī Tì-hūi
Proverbs8:13 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú chiū tio̍h iàm-ò͘ⁿ siâ-ok; kiau-ngō͘
Proverbs8:14 Góa ū chhek-lio̍k kap chin ê tì-sek; góa chhong-bêng
Proverbs8:15 Kun-ông khò góa lâi thóng-tī; thóng-tī-chiá thong-kè góa tēng kong-pêng ê hoat-lu̍t.
Proverbs8:16 Ông-chhin kùi-cho̍k
Proverbs8:17 Thiàⁿ góa--ê
Proverbs8:18 Hó-gia̍h kap chun-kùi sī góa só͘ sù; kú-tn̂g ê hù-jū kap hoân-êng mā-sī góa só͘ sù.
Proverbs8:19 Góa hō͘ lâng ê ké-chí pí kim
Proverbs8:20 Góa kiâⁿ kong-gī ê lō͘
Proverbs8:21 hō͘ thiàⁿ góa ê lâng tit-tio̍h châi-hù
Proverbs8:22 “Tī chhòng-chō ê khí-thâu
Proverbs8:23 Tī siōng khí-thâu
Proverbs8:24 Góa chhut-sì ê sî iáu-bē ū chhim-ian
Proverbs8:25 Góa chhut bú-thai ê sî
Proverbs8:26 Hit-sî tāi-tōe kap chhân-iá iáu-bē chhòng-chō
Proverbs8:27 I an-tì kiong-chhong
Proverbs8:28 I tī khong-tiong pò͘-tì hûn-chhái
Proverbs8:29 kā hái tēng kài-hān
Proverbs8:30 Hit-sî
Proverbs8:31 ì-ài I hō͘ lâng khiā-khí ê sè-kài
Proverbs8:32 “Taⁿ
Proverbs8:33 Tio̍h thiaⁿ kà-sī lâi tit-tio̍h tì-hūi
Proverbs8:34 Thiaⁿ-thàn góa ê lâng chin ū hok-khì! In ta̍k-ji̍t tī góa ê mn̂g-kháu teh tán
Proverbs8:35 Chhē-tio̍h góa ê lâng chiū-sī chhē-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā; i ōe tùi Siōng Chú tit-tio̍h un-hūi.
Proverbs8:36 Chhē bô tio̍h góa ê lâng ōe bia̍t-bông; oàn-hūn góa ê lâng ka-kī chhē sí.”
Proverbs9:1 Tì-hūi ū khí-chhù
Proverbs9:2 ū thâi cheng-siⁿ
Proverbs9:3 I chhe lú-pī chhut--khì
Proverbs9:4 “Gōng-ti̍t ê lâng lóng oat-lâi chia.” Tì-hūi kā bû-ti ê lâng kóng
Proverbs9:5 “Lín lâi
Proverbs9:6 Lín pàng-sak bû-ti chiū tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā
Proverbs9:7 Kiù-chèng ài biáu-sī lâng--ê
Proverbs9:8 M̄-thang khiàn-chek ài biáu-sī lâng--ê
Proverbs9:9 Kàu-tō ū tì-hūi ê lâng
Proverbs9:10 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú sī tì-hūi ê kun-pún; bat hit-ūi Chì-sèng ê Siōng-tè chiū-sī chhong-bêng.

Proverbs9:12 Lí nā ū tì-hūi

Proverbs9:18 M̄-kú gû-gōng ê lâng m̄ chai tī i hia ū im-hûn; i ê lâng-kheh tī Im-hú siōng-chhim ê só͘-chāi.
Proverbs10:1 Só͘-lô-bûn ê chim-giân: Tì-hūi ê kiáⁿ hō͘ lāu-pē hoaⁿ-hí; gû-gōng ê kiáⁿ hō͘ lāu-bú iu-būn.
Proverbs10:2 Put-gī ê chîⁿ-châi lóng bô lī-ek; chí-ū kong-gī ōe kiù lâng thoat-lī sí-bông.
Proverbs10:3 Siōng Chú bōe hō͘ gī-lâng iau-gō; I ōe phò-hoāi pháiⁿ-lâng ê khì-tô͘.
Proverbs10:4 Pîn-tōaⁿ hō͘ lâng sàn-chhiah; kut-la̍t hō͘ lâng hù-chiok.
Proverbs10:5 Chiàu-sî siu-sêng--ê sī chhong-bêng-lâng; siu-koah ê sî ài-khùn--ê sī pāi-ka-chú.
Proverbs10:6 Gī-lâng ê thâu-khak téng ū chiok-hok; pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhùi chhàng kiông-pō.
Proverbs10:7 Gī-lâng ê miâ-siaⁿ siū chheng-chàn; pháiⁿ-lâng it-tēng lâu chhàu-miâ.
Proverbs10:8 Sim-lāi chhong-bêng
Proverbs10:9 Kiâⁿ-lō͘ chèng-ti̍t
Proverbs10:10 Ok-ì sái-ba̍k-bé
Proverbs10:11 Gī-lâng ê chhùi sī oa̍h-miā ê chúi-chôaⁿ; pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhùi chhàng kiông-pō.
Proverbs10:12 Oàn-hūn jiá-khí hun-cheng; jîn-ài jia-khàm lóng-chóng ê kè-sit.
Proverbs10:13 Bêng-lí ê lâng chhùi-lāi ū tì-hūi; bû-ti ê lâng ê ka-chiah ū chhê-á piān-piān teh tán.
Proverbs10:14 Tì-hūi ê lâng chek-chū tì-sek; gōng-lâng ê chhùi chin khoài tì-kàu sit-pāi.
Proverbs10:15 Châi-hù sī hó-gia̍h-lâng ê pó-chiong; pîn-khùn sī sàn-chhiah-lâng ê chai-lān.
Proverbs10:16 Gī-lâng ê pò-siúⁿ sī sìⁿ-miā; pháiⁿ-lâng ê kang-chîⁿ sī hêng-hoa̍t.
Proverbs10:17 Thiaⁿ-siū khoàn-kài
Proverbs10:18 Am-khàm oàn-hūn ê lâng
Proverbs10:19 Kāu-ōe lân-bián ū kè-sit; iok-sok chhùi-chi̍h chiah sī chhong-bêng.
Proverbs10:20 Gī-lâng ê chi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ sûn ê gûn; pháiⁿ-lâng ê sim bô kè-ta̍t.
Proverbs10:21 Gī-lâng ê chhùi pôe-iúⁿ chin chōe lâng; gōng-lâng in-ūi bû-ti sí-bông.
Proverbs10:22 Siōng Chú sù ê hok-khì hō͘ lâng hù-chiok
Proverbs10:23 Gû-gōng ê lâng khòaⁿ choh-ok chòe khoài-lo̍k; bêng-lí ê lâng khòaⁿ tì-hūi chòe hoaⁿ-hí.
Proverbs10:24 Pháiⁿ-lâng só͘ kiaⁿ--ê
Proverbs10:25 Kông-hong chhe--kè
Proverbs10:26 Chhe pîn-tōaⁿ-lâng chòe tāi-chì
Proverbs10:27 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ōe ke-thiⁿ ji̍t-chí; pháiⁿ-lâng ê nî-hè ōe kiám-chió.
Proverbs10:28 Gī-lâng ê ǹg-bāng tòa-lâi hoaⁿ-hí; pháiⁿ-lâng ê kî-thāi kàu-bé lo̍k-khong.
Proverbs10:29 Siōng Chú ê tō-lō͘ tùi chèng-ti̍t ê lâng sī pó-chiong
Proverbs10:30 Gī-lâng éng-oán bōe tōng-iâu; pháiⁿ-lâng bōe-tàng khiā-khí tī èng-ún ê tōe.
Proverbs10:31 Gī-lâng ê chhùi hoat-chhut tì-hūi; oai-khiok sī-hui ê chi̍h ōe siū koah-tn̄g.
Proverbs10:32 Gī-lâng kóng-ōe ha̍p-gî; pháiⁿ-lâng chhut-chhùi oai-khiok sī-hui.
Proverbs11:1 Khi-phiàn ê thian-phêng
Proverbs11:2 Ū kiau-ngō͘ chiū ū kiàn-siàu; ū khiam-pi chiū ū tì-hūi.
Proverbs11:3 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ū sêng-si̍t teh ín-chhōa; khúi-khiat ê lâng in-ūi kan-chà tì-kàu húi-bia̍t.
Proverbs11:4 Siōng Chú tōa siū-khì ê ji̍t
Proverbs11:5 Bô thang chí-chek ê gī-lâng
Proverbs11:6 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ōe hō͘ ka-kī ê gī kiù--tio̍h; kan-chà ê lâng ōe hām-lo̍h ka-kī ê pháiⁿ só͘ siat ê lô-bāng.
Proverbs11:7 Pháiⁿ-lâng chi̍t-ē sí
Proverbs11:8 Gī-lâng ōe-tàng thoat-lī hoān-lān; pháiⁿ-lâng hoán-tńg hām-lo̍h hit lāi-bīn.
Proverbs11:9 Gán-tiong bô Siōng-tè ê lâng kóng-ōe hāi chhù-piⁿ; gī-lâng in-ūi tì-sek tit-tio̍h kái-kiù.
Proverbs11:10 Gī-lâng sūn-lī heng-thong
Proverbs11:11 Siâⁿ in-ūi chèng-ti̍t-lâng ê chiok-hok heng-khí
Proverbs11:12 Biáu-sī chhù-piⁿ ê lâng bô siông-sek; bêng-lí ê lâng chēng-chēng bô chhut-siaⁿ.
Proverbs11:13 Sì-kòe kóng lâng sī-hui--ê
Proverbs11:14 Bô hó ê léng-tō
Proverbs11:15 Kā siⁿ-hūn-lâng pó-chèng ōe siū tōa khek-khui; kū-choa̍t kā lâng tam-pó chiū an-choân.
Proverbs11:16 Hiân-hūi ê hū-jîn-lâng siū lâng kèng-tiōng; pāi-tek ê hū-jîn-lâng chū-chhú-thí-jio̍k. Pîn-tōaⁿ ê ta-po͘-lâng ōe sàn-chhiah; kian-kiông ê ta-po͘-lâng ōe hó-gia̍h.
Proverbs11:17 Jîn-chû ê lâng ka-kī tit-tio̍h lī-ek; chân-jím ê lâng ka-kī siū siong-hāi.
Proverbs11:18 Pháiⁿ-lâng tit--tio̍h ê kang-chîⁿ sī khang-khang; iā gī ê chéng-chí tit--tio̍h ê pò-siúⁿ chiah sī si̍t-chāi.
Proverbs11:19 Kian-chhî kong-gī
Proverbs11:20 Oai-khiok sī-hui ê sim
Proverbs11:21 Pháiⁿ-lâng it-tēng siū hêng-hoa̍t; gī-lâng ê hō͘-tāi ōe tit-tio̍h kái-kiù.
Proverbs11:22 Hū-jîn-lâng súi nā bô bêng-lí
Proverbs11:23 Gī-lâng só͘ ì-ài--ê
Proverbs11:24 Lâng ná si-sià chiū ná hó-gia̍h; lâng ná tàng-sng chiū ná sàn-chhiah.
Proverbs11:25 Ài si-sià--ê
Proverbs11:26 Tún-chek ngó͘-kok m̄ bōe
Proverbs11:27 Chhut-la̍t chòe hó
Proverbs11:28 Óa-khò ka-kī ê chîⁿ-châi
Proverbs11:29 Jiá-khí ka-têng hun-cheng ê lâng
Proverbs11:30 Gī-lâng kiat ê ké-chí sī sìⁿ-miā; kiông-pō ê lâng chân-hāi sìⁿ-miā.
Proverbs11:31 Gī-lâng tī sè-kan tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ; ū-chōe ê pháiⁿ-lâng it-tēng siū pò-èng.
Proverbs12:1 Ì-ài tì-sek ê lâng hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū koán-kàu; gōng-lâng iàm-ò͘ⁿ chek-pī.
Proverbs12:2 Hó-lâng ōe tit-tio̍h Siōng Chú si-un; khúi-kè-to-toan ê lâng ōe siū Siōng Chú tēng-chōe.
Proverbs12:3 Lâng bōe-tàng tùi chòe pháiⁿ tit-tio̍h an-choân; gī-lâng ê kun-ki éng-oán bōe tōng-iâu.
Proverbs12:4 Châi-tek ê hū-jîn-lâng sī tiōng-hu ê hoa-koan; m̄-chai kiàn-siàu ê hū-jîn-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ tiōng-hu kut-lāi ê to̍k-liû.
Proverbs12:5 Gī-lâng ê ì-liām sì-chiàⁿ; pháiⁿ-lâng ê kè-bô͘ khúi-chà.
Proverbs12:6 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê giân-lūn tng-tán beh thâi-lâng; chèng-ti̍t-lâng ê chhùi ōe kiù lâng.
Proverbs12:7 Pháiⁿ-lâng ōe siū chhia-tó siau-sit; gī-lâng ê ke ōe kian-kò͘.
Proverbs12:8 Lâng in-ūi tì-hūi siū o-ló; sim oai-khiok sī-hui ōe siū biáu-sī.
Proverbs12:9 Pi-chiān ê lâng thàn ū chia̍h
Proverbs12:10 Gī-lâng koan-sim i ê cheng-siⁿ ê sìⁿ-miā; pháiⁿ-lâng liân tùi lâng tông-chêng to chân-jím.
Proverbs12:11 Chèng-choh ê lâng ū kàu-gia̍h ê bí-niû; tui-kiû khang-khang bô kè-ta̍t ê sū sī bô tì-sek.
Proverbs12:12 Pháiⁿ-lâng tham-ài siâ-ok ê lâng chhiúⁿ--lâi ê châi-bu̍t; gī-lâng ê kun ōe kiat ké-chí.
Proverbs12:13 Siâ-ok ê lâng in-ūi chhùi-tûn ê kè-sit poa̍h-lo̍h ka-kī ê lô-bāng; gī-lâng ōe thoat-lī hoān-lān.
Proverbs12:14 Lâng tùi chhùi só͘ kiat ê ké-chí tit-tio̍h móa-móa ê hok-khì; ta̍k-ê lâng chiàu i ê só͘-chòe siū pò-èng.
Proverbs12:15 Gōng-lâng khòaⁿ ka-kī ê lō͘ chòe tio̍h; chhong-bêng ê lâng thiaⁿ lâng khó͘-khǹg.
Proverbs12:16 Gōng-lâng chin khoài hián-chhut siū-khì; bêng-lí ê lâng jím-siū bú-jio̍k.
Proverbs12:17 Kóng si̍t-ōe choh-chèng chiong-hián kong-gī; lām-sám choh-chèng hián-chhut khúi-khiat.
Proverbs12:18 Kóng-ōe bô kín-sīn chhin-chhiūⁿ ēng to chha̍k--lâng; tì-hūi ê lâng ê chi̍h i-tī lâng.
Proverbs12:19 Sêng-si̍t ê chhùi éng-oán khó-khò; pe̍h-chha̍t ê chi̍h chí-ū tòng chi̍t-sî-á-kú.
Proverbs12:20 Tô͘-bô͘ pháiⁿ-tāi ê lâng sim chûn khúi-chà; khǹg lâng hô-hó ê lâng ōe khoài-lo̍k.
Proverbs12:21 Gī-lâng bōe tú-tio̍h chai-hāi; pháiⁿ-lâng ōe tú-tio̍h chin chōe chai-hō.
Proverbs12:22 Pe̍h-chha̍t ê chhùi-tûn
Proverbs12:23 Bêng-lí ê lâng khǹg-ba̍t tì-sek; gōng-lâng ê sim hián-lō͘ gû-gōng.
Proverbs12:24 Un-khûn ê chhiú ū-la̍t chiáng-koân; pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng kā lâng chòe khó͘-kang.
Proverbs12:25 Sim ū khòa-lū
Proverbs12:26 Gī-lâng chhōa chhù-piⁿ kiâⁿ chiàⁿ-lō͘; pháiⁿ-lâng chhōa lâng kiâⁿ bê-lō͘.
Proverbs12:27 Pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng ū bah mā bô beh hang; phah-piàⁿ ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h pó-kùi ê châi-bu̍t.
Proverbs12:28 Chèng-ti̍t ê lō͘ hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā; siâ-ok ê lō͘ thàng kàu sí-bông.
Proverbs13:1 Tì-hūi ê kiáⁿ thiaⁿ-thàn lāu-pē ê kàu-tō; chū-ko chū-tāi ê lâng m̄ thiaⁿ chek-pī.
Proverbs13:2 Lâng kóng hó-ōe ū hó ê sêng-kó; kan-chà ê lâng tô͘-bô͘ kiông-pō.
Proverbs13:3 Iok-sok chhùi-chi̍h
Proverbs13:4 Pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng sim him-bō͘
Proverbs13:5 Gī-lâng iàm-ò͘ⁿ pe̍h-chha̍t-ōe; pháiⁿ-lâng sit thé-biān
Proverbs13:6 Kong-gī pó-hō͘ chèng-ti̍t ê lâng; siâ-ok pāi-hoāi ū-chōe ê lâng.
Proverbs13:7 Ū lâng chng-chòe hó-gia̍h
Proverbs13:8 Hó-gia̍h-lâng ēng chîⁿ sio̍k-miā; sàn-chhiah-lâng m̄ kiaⁿ lâng ui-hia̍p.
Proverbs13:9 Gī-lâng ê kng ōe bêng-liāng; pháiⁿ-lâng ê teng ōe sit--khì.
Proverbs13:10 Kiau-ngō͘ it-tēng khí saⁿ-chiⁿ; thiaⁿ lâng khó͘-khǹg ū tì-hūi.
Proverbs13:11 M̄-sī phah-piàⁿ tit--tio̍h ê chîⁿ ōe ná kiám-chió; lâu-kōaⁿ chek-chū ê chîⁿ ōe ná ke-thiⁿ.
Proverbs13:12 Só͘ ǹg-bāng--ê kú bô si̍t-hiān
Proverbs13:13 Biáu-sī kà-sī
Proverbs13:14 Chhong-bêng-lâng ê kà-sī sī oa̍h-miā ê chúi-chôaⁿ
Proverbs13:15 Bêng-lí ê lâng ōe siū chun-tiōng
Proverbs13:16 Thong-ta̍t ê lâng ēng tì-hūi chòe tāi-chì; gōng-lâng hián-lō͘ ka-kī ê gû-gōng.
Proverbs13:17 Pháiⁿ ê sù-chiá hō͘ lâng hām-lo̍h chai-hō; tiong-sìn ê chhe-sài hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h i-tī kiù-chō͘.
Proverbs13:18 Kū-choa̍t kàu-tok
Proverbs13:19 Só͘ ì-ài--ê si̍t-hiān
Proverbs13:20 Kap tì-hūi ê lâng tâng-kiâⁿ chiū ū tì-hūi; kap gōng-lâng choh-phōaⁿ ōe siū siong-hāi.
Proverbs13:21 Chai-hō ōe tui-jip chōe-jîn; hoân-êng sī gī-lâng ê pò-siúⁿ.
Proverbs13:22 Hó-lâng lâu sán-gia̍p hō͘ kiáⁿ-sun; chōe-jîn chek-chū ê châi-hù chòe-āu kui gī-lâng.
Proverbs13:23 Sàn-chhiah-lâng ê chhân-hn̂g seng-sán chin chōe bí-niû
Proverbs13:24 M̄-kam chek-hoa̍t kiáⁿ-jî sī bô thiàⁿ in; nā thiàⁿ in
Proverbs13:25 Gī-lâng ōe-tàng chia̍h kah sim-móa-ì-chiok; pháiⁿ-lâng ê pak-tó͘ put-sî iau-iau.
Proverbs14:1 Tì-hūi ê hū-jîn-lâng kiàn-li̍p ka-kī ê ka-têng; gû-gōng ê hū-jîn-lâng chhin-chhiú thiah-húi.
Proverbs14:2 Chòe sū chèng-ti̍t ê lâng kèng-ùi Siōng Chú; chòe tāi-chì oai-chhoa̍h ê lâng biáu-sī I.
Proverbs14:3 Gōng-lâng kóng-ōe ka-kī siū chek-hoa̍t; tì-hūi ê lâng ê ōe pó-hō͘ ka-kī.
Proverbs14:4 Bô gû keng-choh chiū bô ngó͘-kok; gû ū-la̍t thó͘-sán chiū jú chōe.
Proverbs14:5 Sêng-si̍t ê chèng-jîn bōe kóng pe̍h-chha̍t; hu-ké ê chèng-jîn móa-chhùi hô͘-soat.
Proverbs14:6 Chū-ko chū-tāi ê lâng chhē tì-hūi
Proverbs14:7 Tio̍h lī-khui gōng-lâng
Proverbs14:8 Thong-ta̍t ê lâng ê tì-hūi hō͘ i liáu-kái tio̍h kiâⁿ ê lō͘; gōng-lâng ê gōng tì-kàu kiâⁿ bê-lō͘.
Proverbs14:9 Gōng-lâng khòaⁿ hoān-chōe chòe kún-chhiò; chèng-ti̍t ê lâng hun-hióng Siōng-tè ê un-hūi.
Proverbs14:10 Lâng ê kan-khó͘
Proverbs14:11 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhù ōe tó-hoāi; chèng-ti̍t-lâng ê pò͘-pîⁿ ōe heng-ōng.
Proverbs14:12 Ū chi̍t tiâu lō͘ khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chiàⁿ koh ti̍t
Proverbs14:13 Lâng teh chhiò ê sî sim iáu ū iu-būn; khoài-lo̍k ê kiat-kio̍k ōe pìⁿ-chòe pi-siong.
Proverbs14:14 Pháiⁿ-lâng it-tēng siū pò-èng; hó-lâng it-tēng tit pò-siúⁿ.
Proverbs14:15 Gōng-ti̍t ê lâng ta̍k-hāng lóng sìn; thong-ta̍t ê lâng pō͘-pō͘ kín-sīn.
Proverbs14:16 Tì-hūi ê lâng sū-sū kín-sīn
Proverbs14:17 Khoài siū-khì ê lâng chòe tāi-chì gû-gōng; khúi-chà ê lâng hō͘ lâng oàn-hūn.
Proverbs14:18 Gōng-ti̍t ê lâng sêng-chiap gû-gōng chòe sán-gia̍p; thong-ta̍t ê lâng tit-tio̍h tì-sek chòe hoa-koan.
Proverbs14:19 Pháiⁿ-lâng phak-lo̍h tī hó-lâng ê bīn-chêng; chōe-jîn phak-lo̍h tī gī-lâng ê mn̂g-kháu.
Proverbs14:20 Sàn-chhiah-lâng liân chhù-piⁿ to iàm-chiān; hó-gia̍h-lâng pêng-iú chin chōe.
Proverbs14:21 Khòaⁿ-khin chhù-piⁿ ê lâng ū chōe; lîn-bín sàn-chhiah ê lâng ū hok-khì.
Proverbs14:22 Kè-bô͘ pháiⁿ-tāi ōe kiâⁿ-ji̍p bê-lō͘; kè-bô͘ hó-sū ōe tit-tio̍h lâng ê chin-sêng lîn-bín.
Proverbs14:23 Ta̍k-khoán ê phah-piàⁿ lóng ū lī-ek; khong-tâm ōe tì-kàu sàn-chhiah.
Proverbs14:24 Tì-hūi ê lâng ê châi-hù sī in ê hoa-koan; gōng-lâng ê gōng kàu-bé mā-sī gōng.
Proverbs14:25 Kóng si̍t-ōe choh-chèng kiù lâng ê sìⁿ-miā; choh gūi-chèng sī ēng khúi-chà hāi lâng.
Proverbs14:26 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ū kian-kò͘ ê óa-khò; i ê kiáⁿ-jî ū tô-siám ê só͘-chāi.
Proverbs14:27 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú sī oa̍h-miā ê chúi-chôaⁿ
Proverbs14:28 Peh-sìⁿ chōe
Proverbs14:29 Bōe khoài siū-khì sī tōa chhong-bêng; bô nāi-sim--ê hián-chhut gû-gōng.
Proverbs14:30 Sim pêng-chēng hō͘ sin-thé kiān-khong; oàn-tò͘ hō͘ kut-thâu hiú-nōa.
Proverbs14:31 Ap-pek sàn-chhiah-lâng sī siat-to̍k chhòng-chō in ê Chú; hó khoán-thāi bô-chîⁿ-lâng sī chun-kèng Chú.
Proverbs14:32 Pháiⁿ-lâng ōe in-ūi só͘ chòe ê pháiⁿ bia̍t-bông; gī-lâng kàu sí iáu ū óa-khò.
Proverbs14:33 Tì-hūi ài tiàm tī chhong-bêng-lâng ê sim-lāi; gōng-lâng ê sim-lāi chhē bô tì-hūi.
Proverbs14:34 Kong-gī hō͘ kok-ka kiông-sēng; chōe-ok hō͘ jîn-bîn siū lêng-jio̍k.
Proverbs14:35 Ông ì-ài ēng tì-hūi pān tāi-chì ê koaⁿ-oân
Proverbs15:1 Un-hô ê ìn-tap hō͘ siū-khì soah; chhì-chha̍k ê ōe kek-khí siū-khì.
Proverbs15:2 Tì-hūi-lâng ê chi̍h gâu kóng tì-sek; gōng-lâng ê chhùi thò͘-chhut gû-gōng.
Proverbs15:3 Siōng Chú ê ba̍k-chiu ta̍k só͘-chāi teh khòaⁿ
Proverbs15:4 Un-hô ê chi̍h sī oa̍h-miā ê chhiū; kóng-ōe oai-khiok sún-siong sim-sîn.
Proverbs15:5 Gōng-lâng khòaⁿ-khin lāu-pē ê koán-kàu; goān-ì siū chek-pī sī bêng-lí.
Proverbs15:6 Gī-lâng ê chhù-lāi ū chin chōe châi-pó; pháiⁿ-lâng só͘ thàn--ê chiâⁿ-chòe ka-kī ê hām-hāi.
Proverbs15:7 Tì-hūi-lâng ê chhùi pò-iông tì-sek; gōng-lâng ê sim m̄-sī án-ni.
Proverbs15:8 Pháiⁿ-lâng hiàn ê chè
Proverbs15:9 Pháiⁿ-lâng ê lō͘ sī Siōng Chú só͘ iàm-ò͘ⁿ; tui-kiû kong-gī sī I só͘ ì-ài.
Proverbs15:10 Pàng-sak chiàⁿ-lō͘ ê lâng ōe siū giâm-keh koán-kàu; iàm-ò͘ⁿ chek-pī ê lâng ōe tì-kàu sí-bông.
Proverbs15:11 Im-hú kap Bia̍t-bông Siōng Chú to teh kàm-chhat
Proverbs15:12 Chū-ko chū-tāi ê lâng bô ài siū chek-pī
Proverbs15:13 Sim hoaⁿ-hí
Proverbs15:14 Chhong-bêng-lâng ê sim chhē-kiû tì-sek; gōng-lâng ê chhùi ēng gû-gōng chòe chia̍h-mi̍h.
Proverbs15:15 Khùn-khó͘ ê lâng
Proverbs15:16 Sàn-chhiah ū teh kèng-ùi Siōng Chú
Proverbs15:17 Chia̍h chhiⁿ-chhài
Proverbs15:18 Pháiⁿ sèng-tē jiá-khí oan-ke; bô khoài siū-khì ōe hō͘ saⁿ-chiⁿ soah.
Proverbs15:19 Pîn-tōaⁿ-lâng ê lō͘ hō͘ chhì-phè ûi--teh; chèng-ti̍t-lâng ê lō͘ tōa-tiâu pîⁿ-tháⁿ.
Proverbs15:20 Tì-hūi ê kiáⁿ hō͘ lāu-pē hoaⁿ-hí; gōng-lâng khòaⁿ-khin ka-kī ê lāu-bú.
Proverbs15:21 Bû-ti ê lâng khòaⁿ gû-gōng chòe hoaⁿ-hí; bêng-lí ê lâng chiàu chèng-ti̍t kiâⁿ.
Proverbs15:22 Bô chham-siông
Proverbs15:23 Ìn-tap ha̍p-gî hō͘ lâng hoaⁿ-hí; ha̍p-sî ê ōe si̍t-chāi chin hó!
Proverbs15:24 Tì-hūi ê lâng kiâⁿ-chiūⁿ oa̍h-miā ê lō͘
Proverbs15:25 Siōng Chú thiah-húi kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng ê chhù
Proverbs15:26 Pháiⁿ ê sim-su
Proverbs15:27 Tham put-gī-chi-châi
Proverbs15:28 Gī-lâng ê sim siūⁿ-liáu chiah ìn; pháiⁿ-lâng ê chhùi thò͘-chhut siâ-ok.
Proverbs15:29 Siōng Chú lī-khui pháiⁿ-lâng chin hn̄g
Proverbs15:30 Un-jiû ê gán-sîn hō͘ lâng sim hoaⁿ-hí; hó siau-sit hō͘ kun-kut ióng-kiāⁿ.
Proverbs15:31 Thiaⁿ-thàn koán-kàu ê lâng ōe tn̂g-hè-siū
Proverbs15:32 M̄ thiaⁿ kéng-kài sī khòaⁿ-khin ka-kī; thiaⁿ-thàn koán-kàu ōe tit-tio̍h tì-hūi.
Proverbs15:33 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú sī kà lâng ū tì-hūi; seng ū khiam-pi chiah ū chun-êng.
Proverbs16:1 Lâng teh kè-ōe
Proverbs16:2 Lâng khòaⁿ ka-kī ê só͘-chòe chòe tio̍h
Proverbs16:3 Chiong lí ê só͘-chòe kau-thok Siōng Chú
Proverbs16:4 Siōng Chú só͘ chō--ê lóng ū bo̍k-te̍k
Proverbs16:5 Siōng Chú iàm-ò͘ⁿ sim kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng; pháiⁿ-lâng it-tēng siū hêng-hoa̍t.
Proverbs16:6 In-ūi chû-ài sìn-si̍t
Proverbs16:7 Lâng ê só͘-chòe nā hō͘ Siōng Chú hoaⁿ-hí
Proverbs16:8 Thàn-chîⁿ chió
Proverbs16:9 Lâng kè-ōe ka-kī ê tō-lō͘; Siōng Chú ín-chhōa i ê kha-pō͘.
Proverbs16:10 Ông ê chhùi kóng Siōng-tè chí-sī ê ōe
Proverbs16:11 Kong-tō ê thian-phêng kap chhìn lóng sio̍k Siōng Chú; tē-á lāi ê chhìn-thûi lóng sī I só͘ chè-tēng.
Proverbs16:12 Chòe pháiⁿ sī ông só͘ iàm-ò͘ⁿ; ông-ūi khò kong-gī kiàn-li̍p.
Proverbs16:13 Kong-chèng ê chhùi-tûn sī ông só͘ hoaⁿ-hí; kóng-ōe chèng-ti̍t sī ông só͘ ì-ài.
Proverbs16:14 Ông ê tōa siū-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ sí-bông ê sù-chiá; tì-hūi ê lâng ōe hō͘ i ê siū-khì soah.
Proverbs16:15 Ông kong-chhái ê bīn hō͘ lâng ū sìⁿ-miā; ông ê un-hūi chhin-chhiūⁿ chhun-ú ê hûn.
Proverbs16:16 Tit-tio̍h tì-hūi pí tit-tio̍h kim khah hó; kéng-tio̍h chhong-bêng pí tit-tio̍h gûn koh-khah hó.
Proverbs16:17 Chèng-ti̍t-lâng ê tōa-lō͘ lī-khui pháiⁿ; kín-sīn ka-kī ê kha-pō͘ ōe pó-choân sìⁿ-miā.
Proverbs16:18 Ū kiau-ngō͘ chiū ū sit-pāi; ū chū-ko chiū ū poa̍h-tó.
Proverbs16:19 Sim khiam-pi kap sàn-chhiah-lâng chòe-hé tòa
Proverbs16:20 Thiaⁿ-thàn tō-lí
Proverbs16:21 Sim ū tì-hūi chheng-chòe thong-ta̍t; kóng-ōe bûn-ngá ōe hō͘ lâng sim ho̍k.
Proverbs16:22 Chhong-bêng-lâng ê tì-hūi sī i oa̍h-miā ê chúi-chôaⁿ; gōng-lâng ê gōng sī i ê chek-hoa̍t.
Proverbs16:23 Tì-hūi ê lâng ê sim iok-sok i ê chhùi
Proverbs16:24 Chhin-chhiat ê ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ bi̍t
Proverbs16:25 Ū chi̍t tiâu lō͘ khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chiàⁿ koh ti̍t
Proverbs16:26 Chòe-kang-lâng ūi-tio̍h kò͘ pak-tó͘ chòe kang; pak-tó͘ iau pek in phah-piàⁿ.
Proverbs16:27 Lô͘-môa kè-bô͘ beh hāi lâng; i ê chhùi-tûn chhin-chhiūⁿ teh to̍h ê hé.
Proverbs16:28 Oai-khiok sī-hui ê lâng sì-kòe chè-chō hun-cheng; gâu o̍h-ōe ê lâng hō͘ chhin-bi̍t ê pêng-iú pìⁿ-bīn.
Proverbs16:29 Kiông-pō ê lâng ín-iú chhù-piⁿ
Proverbs16:30 Nih-ba̍k sī-ì sī teh tô͘-bô͘ siâ-ok; chhùi-tûn kā-ân piáu-sī kian-koat chòe pháiⁿ.
Proverbs16:31 Pe̍h thâu-mn̂g sī êng-iāu ê hoa-koan
Proverbs16:32 Jím-nāi iâⁿ-kè ui-le̍k; gâu khòng-chè ka-kī khah iâⁿ cheng-ho̍k kui-chō siâⁿ.
Proverbs16:33 Lâng thiu-chhiam koat-tēng tāi-chì; chòe-āu ê koat-tēng chāi-tī Siōng Chú.
Proverbs17:1 Ū chi̍t-tè-á piáⁿ thang chia̍h
Proverbs17:2 Gâu pān tāi-chì ê po̍k-jîn ōe koán-hat sià-thé-biān ê kiáⁿ
Proverbs17:3 Liān gûn ēng tiáⁿ
Proverbs17:4 Chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng chù-ì thiaⁿ kan-chà ê ōe; kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ê lâng ài thiaⁿ siâ-ok ê giân-gú.
Proverbs17:5 Thí-chhiò sàn-chhiah-lâng sī bú-jio̍k chhòng-chō in ê Chú; ài lâng tú-tio̍h chai-hō--ê it-tēng ōe siū hêng-hoa̍t.
Proverbs17:6 Kiáⁿ-sun sī lāu-lâng ê hoa-koan; lāu-pē sī kiáⁿ-jî ê êng-iāu.
Proverbs17:7 Gōng-lâng kóng tōa-ōe bô ha̍h; ū tōe-ūi ê lâng kóng pe̍h-chha̍t koh-khah bô ha̍h.
Proverbs17:8 Hóe-lō͘
Proverbs17:9 Bōe-kì-tit lâng ê kè-sit ōe tit-tio̍h iú-hó ê hôe-èng; tāi-chì ta̍uh-ta̍uh-liām ōe hō͘ chhin-bi̍t ê pêng-iú so͘-oán.
Proverbs17:10 Kā bêng-lí ê lâng kóng chi̍t kù chek-pī ê ōe
Proverbs17:11 Pháiⁿ-lâng chûn-sim pōe-ge̍k; húi-bia̍t ê sù-chiá ōe lâi kā i tùi-hù.
Proverbs17:12 Lêng-khó tú-tio̍h sit-lo̍h kiáⁿ ê hîm-bú
Proverbs17:13 Ēng pháiⁿ pò hó--ê
Proverbs17:14 Saⁿ-chiⁿ chi̍t-ē khai-sí chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi pang-khiah
Proverbs17:15 Phòaⁿ pháiⁿ-lâng chòe bô-chōe
Proverbs17:16 Gōng-lâng bô siūⁿ-beh bóe tì-hūi
Proverbs17:17 Pêng-iú put-sî saⁿ chiàu-kò͘; hiaⁿ-tī chhut-sì sī beh hun-tam khó͘-lān.
Proverbs17:18 Kā chhù-piⁿ tah-èng chòe tam-pó
Proverbs17:19 Ài hoān-chōe ê lâng ài saⁿ-chiⁿ; chū-ko kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng chū-chhú-bia̍t-bông.
Proverbs17:20 Sim-su siâ-ok ê lâng chhē bōe tio̍h hok-khì; gâu péng-ōe ê lâng ōe hām-lo̍h hoān-lān.
Proverbs17:21 Siⁿ-tio̍h gōng-kiáⁿ sī pē-bú ê iu-būn; gōng-lâng ê lāu-pē bô sím-mi̍h thang hoaⁿ-hí.
Proverbs17:22 Hoaⁿ-hí ê sim sī hó-io̍h; iu-siong ê sîn hō͘ kut ko͘-tâ.
Proverbs17:23 Pháiⁿ-lâng àm-tiong siu hóe-lō͘
Proverbs17:24 Tì-hūi tī bêng-lí ê lâng ê ba̍k-chiu chêng
Proverbs17:25 Gû-gōng ê kiáⁿ hō͘ lāu-pē hoân-ló
Proverbs17:26 Hêng-hoa̍t bû-ko͘ ê lâng m̄ hó; táⁿ-kek chèng-ti̍t ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ mā m̄ hó.
Proverbs17:27 Iok-sok giân-gú--ê ū tì-sek; sèng-chêng léng-chēng--ê sī chhong-bêng.
Proverbs17:28 Gōng-lâng nā tiām-tiām mā khòaⁿ-chòe khiáu; i bô khui-chhùi mā sǹg-chòe chhong-bêng.
Proverbs18:1 Ko͘-ta̍k ê lâng tui-kiû ka-kī ê io̍k-bōng
Proverbs18:2 Gōng-lâng bô ài tì-sek
Proverbs18:3 Ū siâ-ok chiū ū biáu-sī; ū kiàn-siàu chiū ū lêng-jio̍k.
Proverbs18:4 Lâng chhùi-lāi ê ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chhim ê chúi; tì-hūi ê chúi-chôaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ teh lâu ê khoe-chúi.
Proverbs18:5 Phòaⁿ-toàn ê sî phian-thán pháiⁿ-lâng
Proverbs18:6 Gōng-lâng khui-chhùi ín-khí oan-ke
Proverbs18:7 Gōng-lâng ê chhùi hō͘ i bia̍t-bông; i ê chhùi-tûn sī i sìⁿ-miā ê lô-bāng.
Proverbs18:8 Hī-khang piⁿ ê êng-á-ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ hó-chia̍h-mi̍h
Proverbs18:9 Bô chiàu-khí-kang kang-chok ê lâng
Proverbs18:10 Siōng Chú sī kian-kò͘ ê pó-lúi; gī-lâng cháu--ji̍p-khì chiū an-ún.
Proverbs18:11 Hó-gia̍h-lâng siūⁿ-kóng châi-hù sī in ê pó-chiong
Proverbs18:12 Ū kiau-ngō͘ chiū ū sit-pāi; ū khiam-pi chiū ū chun-êng.
Proverbs18:13 Iáu-bē thiaⁿ-liáu chiū ìn-tap
Proverbs18:14 Lâng ê sim ōe-tàng jím-siū pīⁿ-thiàⁿ; sim-lêng phò-chhùi
Proverbs18:15 Chhong-bêng-lâng ê sim tit-tio̍h tì-sek; tì-hūi-lâng ê hī-khang chhē-kiû tì-sek.
Proverbs18:16 Lé-mi̍h kā lâng khui-lō͘
Proverbs18:17 Seng sin-sò͘--ê ká-ná ū-lí
Proverbs18:18 Thiu-chhiam ōe hō͘ oan-ke soah
Proverbs18:19 Hō͘ kiat-oan ê hiaⁿ-tī koh hô
Proverbs18:20 Lâng tùi kóng-ōe só͘ kiat ê ké-chí
Proverbs18:21 Chhùi-chi̍h ōe-tàng chi-phòe lâng ê siⁿ-sí; ài lī-iōng chit-ê koân ê lâng tio̍h sêng-tam hō͘-kó.
Proverbs18:22 Chhōa-tio̍h hó bó͘ sī hok-khì
Proverbs18:23 Sàn-chhiah-lâng khún-chhiat kiû-chêng; hó-gia̍h-lâng pháiⁿ-siaⁿ-sàu ìn-tap.
Proverbs18:24 Ū chin chōe pêng-iú put-kò sī choh-phōaⁿ; ū chi̍t ê ti-kí pí hiaⁿ-tī khah chhin.
Proverbs19:1 Hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t ê sàn-chhiah-lâng khah iâⁿ kóng-ōe khúi-chà ê gōng-lâng.
Proverbs19:2 Jia̍t-sim bô tì-sek m̄ hó; kho̍k-kho̍k-chông tian-tò ōe cháu m̄-tio̍h lō͘.
Proverbs19:3 Lâng in-ūi gû-gōng phò-hoāi ka-kī ê chiân-tô͘; i ê sim tian-tò oàn-thàn Siōng Chú.
Proverbs19:4 Hó-gia̍h
Proverbs19:5 Choh gūi-chèng it-tēng siū hêng-hoa̍t; kóng pe̍h-chha̍t bōe-tàng tô-thoat chek-hoa̍t.
Proverbs19:6 Ū-koân--ê
Proverbs19:7 Sàn-chhiah-lâng liân hiaⁿ-tī to iàm-ò͘ⁿ
Proverbs19:8 Ū tì-hūi chiah ōe-hiáu thiàⁿ-sioh ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā; tin-sioh tì-sek ōe tit-tio̍h hok-khì.
Proverbs19:9 Choh gūi-chèng it-tēng siū hêng-hoa̍t; kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ōe bia̍t-bông.
Proverbs19:10 Gōng-lâng seng-oa̍h chhia-hoa bô ha̍h; po̍k-jîn koán-hat chú-lâng koh-khah bô eng-kai.
Proverbs19:11 Lâng ū kiàn-sek chiū bōe khoài siū-khì; bô tui-kiù lâng ê kè-sit sī ka-kī ê kong-êng.
Proverbs19:12 Ông ê siū-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ sai tōa-siaⁿ háu; i ê un-hūi chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu-téng ê lō͘-chúi.
Proverbs19:13 Kiáⁿ gōng sī lāu-pē ê chai-hō; bó͘ chháu-nāu chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘-chúi chha̍p-chha̍p-tih.
Proverbs19:14 Chhù-the̍h châi-sán sī chó͘-kong só͘ lâu; hiân-hūi ê bó͘ sī Siōng Chú só͘ sù.
Proverbs19:15 Pîn-tōaⁿ hō͘ lâng khùn tāng-bîn; lán-si ê lâng ōe iau-gō.
Proverbs19:16 Chun-siú kài-bēng ōe pó-choân ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā; bô tì-ì Siōng Chú ê lō͘ ōe tì-kàu sí-bông.
Proverbs19:17 Chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng sī chioh hō͘ Siōng Chú
Proverbs19:18 Thàn iáu ū ǹg-bāng
Proverbs19:19 Gâu hoat tōa siū-khì ê lâng it-tēng siū chhú-hoa̍t; nā beh kiù i
Proverbs19:20 Tio̍h thiaⁿ khó͘-khǹg siū kà-sī
Proverbs19:21 Lâng sim-lāi ū chin chōe kè-ōe
Proverbs19:22 Tham-sim hō͘ lâng tì-kàu kiàn-siàu; lêng-khó sàn-chhiah mā bô ài pe̍h-chha̍t.
Proverbs19:23 Kèng-ùi Siōng Chú ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā; i ōe an-ku-lo̍k-gia̍p
Proverbs19:24 Pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng chhiú chhun kàu pôaⁿ--ni̍h
Proverbs19:25 Phah chū-ko chū-tāi ê lâng
Proverbs19:26 Pháiⁿ khoán-thāi lāu-pē
Proverbs19:27 Góa ê kiáⁿ ah
Proverbs19:28 Choh gūi-chèng sī teh hì-lāng kong-pêng; pháiⁿ-lâng ēng chōe-ok chòe pn̄g chia̍h.

Proverbs26:10 Chhiàⁿ gōng-lâng á-sī chùi-hàn chòe tāi-chì
Proverbs26:11 Gōng-lâng it-chài chòe gû-gōng ê sū
Proverbs26:12 Lí bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī sī chhong-bêng ê lâng bô? Liân gōng-lâng to pí i khah ū ǹg-bāng.
Proverbs26:13 Pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng kóng
Proverbs26:14 Pîn-tōaⁿ-lâng tī bîn-chhn̂g kō-lâi-kō-khì
Proverbs26:15 Pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng chhiú chhun kàu pôaⁿ--ni̍h

Proverbs26:18 Lâng khi-phiàn chhù-piⁿ

Proverbs26:26 I sui-jiân ēng khúi-chà am-khàm ka-kī ê oàn-hūn
Proverbs26:27 Ku̍t hām-chíⁿ ê lâng

Proverbs27:1 M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h bîn-á-chài beh chòe ê sū khoa-kháu

Proverbs27:3 Chio̍h-thâu tāng

Proverbs27:5 Tng-bīn ê chek-pī
Proverbs27:6 Pêng-iú chō-sêng ê siong sī chhut tī hó-ì; tùi-te̍k ê chim-chhùi sī hu-ké.
Proverbs27:7 Lâng chia̍h pá
Proverbs27:8 Lâng lī-khui pún só͘-chāi khì liû-lōng
Proverbs27:9 Phang-iû kap hiuⁿ-liāu hō͘ lâng ê sim hoaⁿ-hí; pêng-iú chin-sêng ê khoàn-bián hō͘ sim tit-tio̍h kó͘-lē.
Proverbs27:10 Lí ê pêng-iú kap lāu-pē ê pêng-iú lóng m̄-thang pàng-sak; tú-tio̍h hoān-lān ê ji̍t m̄-thang khì hiaⁿ-tī ê ke; kūn ê chhù-piⁿ iâⁿ-kè hn̄g ê hiaⁿ-tī.

Proverbs27:16 beh kā i tòng

Proverbs28:1 Pháiⁿ-lâng bô lâng tui-jip mā teh tô-cháu; hó-lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ sai lóng bōe kiaⁿ.
Proverbs28:2 Kok-ka tōng-loān
Proverbs28:3 Sàn-chhiah-lâng khi-ap khùn-khó͘-lâng
Proverbs28:4 Khì-sak lu̍t-hoat--ê o-ló pháiⁿ-lâng
Proverbs28:5 Siâ-ok ê lâng bô bêng-pe̍k kong-gī; chhē-kiû Siōng Chú ê lâng oân-choân bêng-pe̍k.
Proverbs28:6 Hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t ê sàn-chhiah-lâng khah iâⁿ chòe tāi-chì oan-khiau ê hó-gia̍h-lâng.

Proverbs28:13 Jia-khàm ka-kī ê chōe-kò

Proverbs28:15 Tú chhin-chhiūⁿ hm̄-hm̄-háu ê sai kap chhē-chia̍h ê hîm
Proverbs28:16 Bû-ti ê thóng-tī-chiá si-hêng pō-chèng; iàm-ò͘ⁿ put-gī-chi-châi ê lâng ōe tn̂g-hè-siū.
Proverbs28:17 Thâi-sí-lâng--ê tio̍h hō͘ i it-seng chòe tô-hoān
Proverbs28:18 Chòe tāi-chì chèng-ti̍t ê lâng ōe an-choân; chòe tāi-chì oan-khiau ê lâng ōe hut-jiân poa̍h-tó sit-pāi.
Proverbs28:19 Chèng-choh ê lâng ū kàu-gia̍h ê bí-niû; tui-kiû khang-khang bô kè-ta̍t ê sū ōe tì-kàu sàn-chhiah.
Proverbs28:20 Ū sìn-iōng ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h chin chōe hok-khì; beh hoat hoâiⁿ-châi ê lâng it-tēng siū hêng-hoa̍t.
Proverbs28:21 Khòaⁿ lâng tōa-sòe-ba̍k

Proverbs28:26 Siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī sī chhong-bêng--ê sī gōng-lâng; chiàu tì-hūi chòe tāi-chì ê lâng ōe an-choân.
Proverbs28:27 Chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng bōe tì-kàu khiàm-kheh; ké bô khòaⁿ--kìⁿ ōe siū chin chōe chiù-chó͘.

Proverbs29:22 Pháiⁿ sèng-tē ê lâng ōe jiá-khí oan-ke; gâu hoat siū-khì ê lâng ōe hoān chin chōe chōe-kò.
Proverbs29:23 Lâng kiau-ngō͘ ōe hō͘ ka-kī kiàn-siàu; sim khiam-pi ōe hō͘ ka-kī tit-tio̍h chun-êng.

Proverbs31:18 I chai só͘ keng-êng--ê sūn-lī ū lī-ek; i ê teng kui-mî tiám-kng-kng.
Proverbs31:19 I ê chhiú the̍h a̍k-á; i ê chhiú-sim hōaⁿ pháng-chhia.
Proverbs31:20 I khóng-khài chín-chè khùn-khó͘-lâng

Proverbs31:23 I ê tiōng-hu tī siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu lâng-lâng lóng bat
Proverbs31:24 I chòe iù-môa-pò͘ ê saⁿ khì bōe

Proverbs31:26 I khui-chhùi kóng tì-hūi ê ōe; i ê chi̍h ū jîn-chû ê kà-sī.
Proverbs31:27 I gâu liāu-lí ke-lāi ê sū

Ecclesiastes1:1 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choh-ông
Ecclesiastes1:2 Góa — Thoân-tō-chiá kóng: Khang-hu ê khang-hu; khang-hu ê khang-hu; it-chhè lóng sī khang-hu.
Ecclesiastes1:3 Lâng it-chhè ê lô-khó͘ phah-piàⁿ
Ecclesiastes1:4 Chi̍t-tāi kè-liáu koh chi̍t-tāi
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ji̍t chhut
Ecclesiastes1:6 Hong ǹg lâm chhe
Ecclesiastes1:7 Kang-hô lóng lâu-ji̍p hái
Ecclesiastes1:8 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hō͘ lâng siān koh ùi; kóng mā kóng bōe liáu
Ecclesiastes1:9 Í-chêng í-keng ū--ê
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kiám ū sím-mi̍h sū
Ecclesiastes1:11 Í-keng kè--khì ê sè-tāi
Ecclesiastes1:12 Góa — Thoân-tō-chiá bat tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chòe Í-sek-lia̍t -ông.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Góa choan-sim ēng tì-hūi gián-kiù chhâ-khó thiⁿ-ē só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ê tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes1:14 Góa koan-chhat ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ê tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes1:15 Oan-khiau--ê bōe-tàng hō͘ i ti̍t; khiàm-kheh--ê pó͘ bōe móa.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Góa siūⁿ-kóng
Ecclesiastes1:17 Góa choan-sim tì-ì bêng-pe̍k tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes1:18 In-ūi lâng jú ū tì-hūi jú ū hoân-ló
Ecclesiastes2:1 Góa tùi ka-kī kóng: Lâi
Ecclesiastes2:2 Góa kóng: Sńg-chhiò sī tian-kông; hióng-lo̍k mā-sī khang-khang.
Ecclesiastes2:3 Góa siūⁿ-beh ēng chiú hō͘ seng-khu sóng-khoài
Ecclesiastes2:4 Góa ūi-tio̍h ka-kī heng-khí tōa kang-thêng: Khí chin chōe chhù
Ecclesiastes2:5 siu-chō hoe-hn̂g kap ké-chí-hn̂g
Ecclesiastes2:6 koh khui chúi-tî koàn-ak chhiū-nâ lāi ê chhiū-á-chai.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Góa ū bóe lâm-lú lô͘-lē
Ecclesiastes2:8 Góa mā ūi ka-kī chek-chū kim gûn
Ecclesiastes2:9 Án-ni góa chiū pí í-chêng só͘-ū tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng koh-khah heng-ōng; koh tì-hūi mā bô lī-khui góa.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Góa ê ba̍k-chiu só͘ ài--ê
Ecclesiastes2:11 M̄-kú góa khòaⁿ góa ê chhiú só͘ chòe ê it-chhè
Ecclesiastes2:12 Góa oa̍t-tńg lâi koan-chhat tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes2:13 Góa khòaⁿ-chhut tì-hūi pí gû-gōng khah hó
Ecclesiastes2:14 Tì-hūi ê lâng khòaⁿ chheng-chhó thâu-chêng ê lō͘
Ecclesiastes2:15 Góa sim-lāi siūⁿ
Ecclesiastes2:16 Tì-hūi ê lâng kap gû-gōng ê lâng pîⁿ-pîⁿ lóng bōe éng-oán hō͘ lâng kì-liām
Ecclesiastes2:17 Só͘-í góa oàn-chhoeh sìⁿ-miā
Ecclesiastes2:18 Góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ it-chhè ê lô-lo̍k
Ecclesiastes2:19 Hit-ê lâng sī tì-hūi á-sī gû-gōng siáⁿ-lâng chai; góa tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn
Ecclesiastes2:20 Án-ni
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ū lâng ēng tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes2:22 Lâng tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn phah-piàⁿ chhau-hoân
Ecclesiastes2:23 I it-seng ê nî-ji̍t chhau-hoân
Ecclesiastes2:24 Lâng siōng-hó sī lâi chia̍h lâi lim
Ecclesiastes2:25 Nā m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè
Ecclesiastes2:26 Siōng-tè chiong tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes3:1 Thiⁿ-ē bān-hāng-sū lóng ū i ê kî; sū-sū lóng ū i ê sî:
Ecclesiastes3:2 Siⁿ ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:3 thâi ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:4 khàu ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:5 tâng-pâng ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:6 chhiau-chhē ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:7 thiah ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:8 thiàⁿ ū sî
Ecclesiastes3:9 Choh-kang ê lâng tùi i só͘ lô-lo̍k phah-piàⁿ--ê ū tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè hō͘ sè-kan-lâng pē tāng-tàⁿ
Ecclesiastes3:11 Siōng-tè hō͘ I só͘ chō ê it-chhè ha̍h in ê sî
Ecclesiastes3:12 Góa chai lâng oa̍h--teh siōng-hó sī khoài-lo̍k koh chòe hó-sū.
Ecclesiastes3:13 Lâng mā chia̍h mā lim
Ecclesiastes3:14 Góa chai Siōng-tè só͘ chòe ê it-chhè lóng ōe lâu kàu éng-oán
Ecclesiastes3:15 Hiān-chāi ū--ê í-chêng í-keng ū; chiong-lâi beh ū--ê chá í-keng ū; kè--khì ê tāi-chì Siōng-tè ōe koh hō͘ i hoat-seng.
Ecclesiastes3:16 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn
Ecclesiastes3:17 Góa sim-lāi kóng: Siōng-tè beh pîⁿ-pîⁿ sím-phòaⁿ gī-lâng kap pháiⁿ-lâng
Ecclesiastes3:18 Góa sim-lāi kóng: Koan-hē sè-kan-lâng
Ecclesiastes3:19 In-ūi sè-kan-lâng ê miā-ūn kap cheng-siⁿ ê miā-ūn lóng siâng-khoán; chit-ê sí
Ecclesiastes3:20 In lóng khì kàu kâng chi̍t ê só͘-chāi; lóng tùi thô͘-hún chhut
Ecclesiastes3:21 Siáⁿ-lâng chai lâng ê sìⁿ-miā chiūⁿ téng-bīn
Ecclesiastes3:22 Só͘-í
Ecclesiastes4:1 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ap-pek ê tāi-chì: Siū ap-pek ê lâng lâu ba̍k-sái
Ecclesiastes4:2 In-ūi án-ni
Ecclesiastes4:3 Koh hiah-ê iáu-bē chhut-sì
Ecclesiastes4:4 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng it-chhè ê lô-khó͘ kap ta̍k-khoán kang-chok ê sêng-chiū
Ecclesiastes4:5 Gû-gōng ê lâng chhiú lám-heng m̄ chòe tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes4:6 Chi̍t chhiú móa-móa m̄-kú an-jiân chū-chāi
Ecclesiastes4:7 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn ū khang-hu ê sū:
Ecclesiastes4:8 Ū lâng ko͘-toaⁿ bô-phōaⁿ
Ecclesiastes4:9 Nn̄g ê lâng pí chi̍t ê khah hó
Ecclesiastes4:10 nā chi̍t ê poa̍h-tó
Ecclesiastes4:11 Nn̄g ê lâng chòe-hé khùn khah sio-lō
Ecclesiastes4:12 Siū kong-kek ê sî
Ecclesiastes4:13 Sàn-chhiah ū tì-hūi ê siàu-liân-lâng pí nî-lāu m̄-khéng siū tiong-kò gû-gōng ê ông khah hó.
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ū lâng tùi kaⁿ-ga̍k chhut--lâi
Ecclesiastes4:15 Góa khòaⁿ tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn teh seng-oa̍h ê jîn-bîn lóng kun-tè sòa-chiap choh-ông ê siàu-liân-lâng.
Ecclesiastes4:16 I ū léng-tō chin chōe jîn-bîn
Ecclesiastes5:1 Lí nā khì Siōng-tè ê tiān
Ecclesiastes5:2 Tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng lí m̄-thang sûi-piān kóng-ōe
Ecclesiastes5:3 Tāi-chì chōe
Ecclesiastes5:4 Lí tùi Siōng-tè hē-goān
Ecclesiastes5:5 Hē-goān bô siā
Ecclesiastes5:6 M̄-thang in-ūi lí ê ōe tì-kàu ka-kī hoān-chōe
Ecclesiastes5:7 Bîn-bāng chōe
Ecclesiastes5:8 Lí nā khòaⁿ-tio̍h sàn-chhiah-lâng siū koaⁿ-oân ap-pek
Ecclesiastes5:9 Thó͘-tōe ū hó ê siu-sêng
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ài chîⁿ--ê bōe in-ūi chîⁿ ti-chiok; ài hó-gia̍h--ê bōe in-ūi só͘ thàn--ê ti-chiok. Che mā-sī khang-hu.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Châi-hù ke-thiⁿ
Ecclesiastes5:12 Lô-kang bô-lūn chia̍h-chōe chia̍h-chió lóng hó-khùn; hó-gia̍h-lâng chia̍h kah pá-pá mā khùn bōe khì.
Ecclesiastes5:13 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn ū chi̍t hāng tōa put-hēng
Ecclesiastes5:14 I in-ūi sū-gia̍p bô sūn
Ecclesiastes5:15 I thǹg-theh chhut bú-thai

Ecclesiastes6:1 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn ū chi̍t hāng put-hēng tāng-tāng teh tī lâng ê sin-chiūⁿ.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Ū lâng tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè sù i chîⁿ-châi
Ecclesiastes6:3 Lâng nā ū chi̍t-pah ê kiáⁿ
Ecclesiastes6:4 Chit-ê thai lâi sī khang-hu
Ecclesiastes6:5 I m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h ji̍t-kng
Ecclesiastes6:6 Hit-ê lâng sui-jiân oa̍h kàu chi̍t-chheng nî koh chi̍t-chheng nî
Ecclesiastes6:7 Lâng ê lô-lo̍k lóng sī ūi-tio̍h pak-tó͘
Ecclesiastes6:8 Tì-hūi ê lâng pí gû-gōng ê lâng kiám ū khah gâu? Sàn-chhiah-lâng chai án-chóaⁿ choh-lâng
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ--tio̍h-ê pí sim siūⁿ--ê khah hó. Che mā-sī khang-hu

Ecclesiastes6:11 Ōe chōe

Ecclesiastes7:1 Hó miâ-siaⁿ iâⁿ-kè hó ê phang-iû; lâng sí ê ji̍t pí chhut-sì ê ji̍t khah hó.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Khì song-sū ê ke pí khì iàn-lo̍k ê ke khah hó
Ecclesiastes7:3 Iu-būn pí chhiò khah hó; in-ūi bīn-tài-iu-iông tùi sim ū hó-chhù.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Tì-hūi ê lâng ê sim tī song-sū ê ke; gû-gōng ê lâng ê sim tī khoài-lo̍k ê ke.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Thiaⁿ tì-hūi-lâng ê chek-pī
Ecclesiastes7:6 Gōng-lâng ê chhiò chhin-chhiūⁿ tiáⁿ-ē sio chhì-á teh to̍h ê siaⁿ; che mā-sī khang-hu.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Khióng-hat chhú-châi ōe hō͘ tì-hūi ê lâng pìⁿ-chòe gōng; hóe-lō͘ ōe hō͘ lâng ê sim hú-pāi.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Tāi-chì ê kiat-kio̍k pí tāi-chì ê khai-sí khah hó; thun-lún pí kiau-ngō͘ khah hó.
Ecclesiastes7:9 M̄-thang sûi-piān siū-khì
Ecclesiastes7:10 M̄-thang kóng: Sī-án-chóaⁿ í-chêng pí hiān-chāi khah hó? Án-ni mn̄g sī bô tì-hūi.
Ecclesiastes7:11 Tì-hūi kap ke-gia̍p lóng sī hó; tùi oa̍h tī ji̍t-kng ē-bīn ê lâng lóng ū lī-ek.
Ecclesiastes7:12 In-ūi tì-hūi ōe tì-ìm lâng
Ecclesiastes7:13 Lí tio̍h siūⁿ Siōng-tè ê chok-ûi; Siōng-tè hō͘ i oan--ê
Ecclesiastes7:14 Sūn-kéng ê sî tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí
Ecclesiastes7:15 Tī khang-hu ê jîn-seng góa ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h: Ū gī-lâng chòe hó tian-tò bia̍t-bông
Ecclesiastes7:16 M̄-thang kè-thâu chòe hó
Ecclesiastes7:17 M̄-thang kè-thâu chòe pháiⁿ
Ecclesiastes7:18 Lí lia̍h-tiâu chit-thâu
Ecclesiastes7:19 Tì-hūi ōe hō͘ tì-hūi ê lâng ū lêng-le̍k iâⁿ-kè siâⁿ-lāi cha̍p ê chiáng-koân-chiá.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Sè-kan bô chi̍t ê chí-ū hêng-siān bô hoān-chōe ê gī-lâng.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Pa̍t-lâng kóng ê ōe m̄-thang lóng khǹg tī sim-lāi; lí khó-lêng ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí ê po̍k-jîn kā lí chiù-mē
Ecclesiastes7:22 in-ūi lí ka-kī chai

Ecclesiastes7:29 Khòaⁿ leh
Ecclesiastes8:1 Siáⁿ-lâng chin-chiàⁿ ū tì-hūi? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-hiáu kái-sek tāi-chì? Lâng ê tì-hūi hō͘ i ê bīn ū kong-chhái
Ecclesiastes8:2 Tio̍h siú ông ê bēng-lēng
Ecclesiastes8:3 Tī ông ê bīn-chêng m̄-bián kiaⁿ
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ông ê ōe ū koân; siáⁿ-lâng káⁿ tùi i kóng: Lí teh chhòng sím-mi̍h?
Ecclesiastes8:5 Siú bēng-lēng ê lâng bōe tú-tio̍h chai-hō; tì-hūi ê lâng khòaⁿ chheng-chhó sî-sè
Ecclesiastes8:6 Sui-jiân khó͘-lān tāng-tāng teh tī lâng ê sin-chiūⁿ
Ecclesiastes8:7 I m̄ chai chiong-lâi ōe hoat-seng sím-mi̍h tāi-chì; mā bô lâng ōe-tàng kā i kóng chiong-lâi ōe án-chóaⁿ.
Ecclesiastes8:8 Bô lâng ōe-tàng chi-phòe ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā
Ecclesiastes8:9 Chiah-ê góa lóng ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Ecclesiastes8:10 Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h pháiⁿ-lâng siū-tio̍h liông-tiōng ê bâi-chòng
Ecclesiastes8:11 Chōe tēng-liáu bô sûi-sî chip-hêng
Ecclesiastes8:12 Chōe-jîn chòe pháiⁿ chi̍t-pah piàn
Ecclesiastes8:13 Chóng-sī pháiⁿ-lâng bōe tit-tio̍h hok-khì
Ecclesiastes8:14 Tī sè-kan koh ū chi̍t hāng khang-hu ê tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes8:15 Só͘-í góa kó͘-lē lâng hióng-siū khoài-lo̍k. In-ūi lâng tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn ia̍h-chia̍h-ia̍h-lim sī siōng-tōa ê hióng-lo̍k. Che sī Siōng-tè hō͘ lâng tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn phah-piàⁿ eng-kai tit--tio̍h ê hióng-siū.
Ecclesiastes8:16 Góa choan-sim tui-kiû tì-hūi koh koan-chhat sè-kan só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes8:17 Góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè it-chhè ê chok-ûi
Ecclesiastes9:1 Góa chiong che it-chhè ê tāi-chì khǹg tī sim-lāi siông-sè siūⁿ
Ecclesiastes9:2 Chèng-lâng ê miā-ūn lóng kâng-khoán: gī-lâng kap siâ-ok ê lâng
Ecclesiastes9:3 Tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ê tāi-chì
Ecclesiastes9:4 Lâng iáu-teh oa̍h chiū ū ǹg-bāng
Ecclesiastes9:5 Oa̍h--teh ê lâng chai in ōe sí; sí ê lâng sím-mi̍h to m̄ chai
Ecclesiastes9:6 In ê thiàⁿ
Ecclesiastes9:7 Chòe lí khì
Ecclesiastes9:8 Lí tio̍h put-sî chhēng súi ê saⁿ; thâu-khak tio̍h siông-siông boah-iû.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Tī lí it-seng khang-hu ê ji̍t-chí
Ecclesiastes9:10 Lí ê chhiú eng-kai chòe ê tāi-chì tio̍h chīn-la̍t khì chòe
Ecclesiastes9:11 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h tī ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn
Ecclesiastes9:12 Lâng ê sî ka-kī m̄ chai
Ecclesiastes9:13 Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h ji̍t-kng ê ē-bīn ū chi̍t hāng tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ū chi̍t ê chin sòe ê siâⁿ
Ecclesiastes9:15 Siâⁿ-lāi ū chi̍t ê sàn-chhiah khiok ū tì-hūi ê lâng
Ecclesiastes9:16 Góa kóng
Ecclesiastes9:17 Tì-hūi ê lâng khin-khin-á kóng ê ōe
Ecclesiastes9:18 Tì-hūi iâⁿ-kè kau-chiàn ê bú-khì; chóng-sī chi̍t piàn sit-chhò ōe phò-hoāi chin chōe hó-sū.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Sí--khì ê hô͘-sîn hō͘ kui-koàn phang-iû hoat-chhut chhàu-bī; sió-khóa ê gû-gōng pí tì-hūi kap chun-kùi khah ū-la̍t.
Ecclesiastes10:2 Tì-hūi ê lâng ê sim ǹg chiàⁿ-lō͘; gû-gōng ê lâng ê sim ǹg phian-lō͘.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Gû-gōng ê lâng khiàm-kheh tì-hūi
Ecclesiastes10:4 Chiáng-koân-chiá nā tùi lí hoat siū-khì

Ecclesiastes10:9 Phah-chio̍h ê lâng ōe hō͘ chio̍h siong--tio̍h; phòa-chhâ ê lâng ōe hō͘ chhâ kòng--tio̍h.

SongOfSongs1:2 Lâi
SongOfSongs1:3 Lí ê phang-iû si̍t-chāi chin phang; lí ê miâ chhin-chhiūⁿ tò--chhut-lâi ê phang-iû; só͘-í
SongOfSongs1:4 Chhiáⁿ khan góa
SongOfSongs1:5 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê cha-bó͘ gín-á ah
SongOfSongs1:6 M̄-thang in-ūi góa phê-hu o͘-o͘ ti̍t-ti̍t kā góa khòaⁿ
SongOfSongs1:7 Góa sim-ài--ê ah
SongOfSongs1:8 Cha-bó͘ gín-á tiong siōng-súi--ê ah
SongOfSongs1:9 Góa ê ài-jîn
SongOfSongs1:10 Lí pìn-piⁿ ê chng-thāⁿ hō͘ lí ê bīn chin súi; lí ê ām-kún kòa chin-chu-liān chin hó-khòaⁿ.
SongOfSongs1:11 Goán beh kā lí chòe kim ê liān-á
SongOfSongs1:12 Ông chē-toh ê sî

SongOfSongs1:15 Góa ê ài-jîn
SongOfSongs1:16 Góa chhin-ài--ê

SongOfSongs2:6 I ēng tò-chhiú hû góa ê thâu-khak
