Isaiah32:15 Kàu Siōng-tè chhe I ê sîn tùi téng-bīn piàⁿ lo̍h-lâi hō͘ lán
Isaiah32:16 Hit-sî
Isaiah32:17 Kong-gī ê kong-hāu sī hô-pêng
Isaiah32:18 Góa ê chú-bîn ōe tòa tī hô-bo̍k ê ke
Isaiah32:19 Sui-jiân chhiū-nâ siū peng-pha̍uh húi-hoāi
Isaiah32:20 m̄-kú lín chiah-ê tī khoe-piⁿ iā-chéng
Isaiah33:1 Chhám ah
Isaiah33:2 Siōng Chú ah
Isaiah33:3 Lí chi̍t-ē hoah-siaⁿ
Isaiah33:4 Lâng ōe lâi siu-si̍p chiàn-lī-phín
Isaiah33:5 Siōng Chú siū chun chòe tōa
Isaiah33:6 I beh hō͘ lí it-seng it-sè an-ún
Isaiah33:7 Lín khòaⁿ
Isaiah33:8 Tōa-lō͘ chhiⁿ-chhìn
Isaiah33:9 Tāi-tōe ai-siong soe-pāi; Lê-pa-lūn kiàn-siàu ko͘-tâ; Sa-lûn pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ khòng-iá; Pa-san kap Ka-bi̍t ê chhiū-hio̍h lak-liáu-liáu.
Isaiah33:10 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Isaiah33:11 Lín hoâi-īn--ê sī chho͘-khng
Isaiah33:12 Bān-bîn ōe hō͘ hé sio kah pìⁿ-chòe chio̍h-he
Isaiah33:13 Lín tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê lâng
Isaiah33:14 Sek-an ê chōe-jîn lóng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ; bô kèng-khiân ê lâng phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah; in kóng
Isaiah33:15 Hiah-ê hêng-ûi kong-gī
Isaiah33:16 chit-khoán lâng ōe tòa tī koân ê só͘-chāi
Isaiah33:17 Lín ōe chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ-tio̍h ông ê kong-chhái
Isaiah33:18 Lín ōe hôe-sióng chá-chêng khióng-pò͘ ê sū
Isaiah33:19 Lín bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ áu-bân ê jîn-bîn; in kóng lâng thiaⁿ-bô ê ōe
Isaiah33:20 Tio̍h chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ Sek-an
Isaiah33:21 Tī hia Siōng Chú beh tùi lán hián-chhut ui-giâm. Hia ū khui-khoah ê kang-hô kap khoe
Isaiah33:22 In-ūi Siōng Chú sī lán ê sím-phòaⁿ-koaⁿ
Isaiah33:23 Chûn ê soh lóng lēng--khì
Isaiah33:24 Tī hia khiā-khí ê lâng bô lâng ōe kóng “Góa phòa-pīⁿ”; chū-bîn ê chōe lóng ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián.
Isaiah34:1 Lia̍t-kok ah
Isaiah34:2 In-ūi Siōng Chú tùi bān-kok hoat siū-khì
Isaiah34:3 Siū thâi-sí--ê ōe hō͘ lâng hìⁿ-sak; sin-si ê chhàu-bī chhèng-koân. Chèng-soaⁿ ōe in-ūi in ê huih hoán âng.
Isaiah34:4 Thiⁿ-téng ê bān-siōng ōe siau-sit; thiⁿ ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chheh kńg--khí-lâi. Thiⁿ-téng ê chhiⁿ-sîn ōe lak--lo̍h-lâi
Isaiah34:5 Góa ê kiàm í-keng tī thiⁿ-téng chhut-hiān. Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah34:6 Siōng Chú ê kiàm kui-ki lóng huih kap iû
Isaiah34:7 Iá-gû ōe kap in chòe-hé siū thâi
Isaiah34:8 In-ūi Siōng Chú ū pò-siû ê ji̍t
Isaiah34:9 Í-tong ê khoe-chúi lóng pìⁿ táⁿ-má-ka
Isaiah34:10 Mî-ji̍t hé lóng bōe sit
Isaiah34:11 M̄-kú thê-ô͘ kap hô-ti ōe chiàm hia
Isaiah34:12 In ê ông-kok ōe bia̍t-bông; in ê kùi-cho̍k kap koaⁿ-tiúⁿ ōe lóng siau-sit.
Isaiah34:13 Kiong-tiān ōe hoat chhì-phè
Isaiah34:14 Khòng-iá ê cháu-siù kap chhâi-lông ōe tòa tī hia
Isaiah34:15 Tī hia ū chìⁿ-thâu-chôa choh-siū
Isaiah34:16 Lín tio̍h chhâ-khó
Isaiah34:17 I ūi-tio̍h in thiu-chhiam
Isaiah35:1 Khòng-iá kap ta-sò ê tōe beh hoaⁿ-hí
Isaiah35:2 Mûi-kùi beh khui-hoe bō͘-sēng
Isaiah35:3 Tio̍h hō͘ loán-jio̍k ê chhiú kian-kiông
Isaiah35:4 Sim-koaⁿ kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê lâng
Isaiah35:5 Hit-sî
Isaiah35:6 Kha-pái ê lâng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lo̍k tiô-thiàu; bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng ōe hoaⁿ-hí chhiùⁿ-koa. Hong-po͘ beh ū chúi chhèng-chhut; soa-bô͘ beh ū kang-hô teh lâu.
Isaiah35:7 Iām-jia̍t ê soa-tōe ōe pìⁿ-chòe chúi-tî; ta-sò ê thó͘-tōe ōe pìⁿ-chòe chôaⁿ-goân. Chhâi-lông tòa ê só͘-chāi ōe hoat chhiⁿ-chháu
Isaiah35:8 Tī hia beh ū chi̍t tiâu tōa-lō͘
Isaiah35:9 Tī hia bô sai
Isaiah35:10 Siōng Chú sio̍k-hôe ê lâng ōe tò-tńg--lâi
Isaiah36:1 Hi-se-ka -ông tē-cha̍p-sì nî
Isaiah36:2 A-su̍t -ông tùi La-kiat phài chóng-su-lēng tòa tāi-kun khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng Hi-se-ka -ông hia. Chóng-su-lēng khiā tī Siōng-tî ê chúi-kau piⁿ
Isaiah36:3 Hit-sî
Isaiah36:4 Chóng-su-lēng tùi in kóng
Isaiah36:5 Lí siūⁿ-kóng ū chhek-lio̍k kap kun-le̍k
Isaiah36:6 Lí só͘ óa-khò ê Ai-ki̍p sī chi̍t ki tn̄g--khì ê lô͘-tek-á-koáiⁿ; lâng nā khò i
Isaiah36:7 Lín nā tùi góa kóng: Goán óa-khò Siōng Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè; Hi-se-ka kiám m̄-sī ū hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ kap chè-tôaⁿ
Isaiah36:8 Taⁿ lâi
Isaiah36:9 Nā bô hoat-tō͘
Isaiah36:10 Hiān-chāi
Isaiah36:11 Í-lī-a-kèng
Isaiah36:12 M̄-kú chóng-su-lēng kóng
Isaiah36:13 Chóng-su-lēng koh khiā khí-lâi tōa-siaⁿ ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe hoah kóng
Isaiah36:14 Ông án-ni kóng
Isaiah36:15 I kiò lín sìn-khò Siōng Chú
Isaiah36:16 M̄-thang thiaⁿ Hi-se-ka ê ōe. A-su̍t -ông án-ni kóng
Isaiah36:17 thèng-hāu góa chhōa lín kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi
Isaiah36:18 M̄-thang hō͘ Hi-se-ka khi-phiàn kóng: Siōng Chú it-tēng ōe kiù lán. Bān-kok ê chèng sîn-bêng tó chi̍t ê bat kiù i ka-kī ê kok thoat-lī A-su̍t -ông ê chhiú?
Isaiah36:19 Hap-má kap A-ní-poa̍t ê sîn-bêng tī tó-ūi? Se-hoat-óa-im ê sîn-bêng tī tó-ūi? In kiám ū kái-kiù Sat-má-lī-a thoat-lī góa ê chhiú?
Isaiah36:20 Chiah-ê kok-ka ê sîn-bêng ū tó chi̍t ê bat tùi góa ê chhiú kiù-chhut i ka-kī ê kok-ka? Án-ni
Isaiah36:21 M̄-kú jîn-bîn lóng chēng-chēng
Isaiah36:22 Hit-sî
Isaiah37:1 Hi-se-ka -ông chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h in ê pò-kò
Isaiah37:2 I phài kiong-têng chóng-koán Í-lī-a-kèng
Isaiah37:3 In kā Í-sài-a kóng
Isaiah37:4 A-su̍t -ông ū phài i ê pō͘-hā chóng-su-lēng lâi siat-to̍k éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè
Isaiah37:5 Hi-se-ka -ông ê tāi-sîn lâi kìⁿ Í-sài-a ê sî
Isaiah37:6 Í-sài-a tùi in kóng
Isaiah37:7 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah37:8 Chóng-su-lēng thiaⁿ-tio̍h A-su̍t -ông í-keng lī-khui La-kiat khì kong-kek Li̍p-ná
Isaiah37:9 A-su̍t -ông thiaⁿ-kìⁿ I-soh-phit-a -ông Te̍k-hap-ka beh lâi kong-kek in
Isaiah37:10 tùi Iû-tāi -ông Hi-se-ka kóng
Isaiah37:11 Lín it-tēng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h A-su̍t chu-ông tùi lia̍t-kok só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì; in kā lia̍t-kok lóng châu-bia̍t. Lín kiám ū hoat-tō͘ pī-bián?
Isaiah37:12 Góa ê chó͘-sian húi-bia̍t ê kok-ka
Isaiah37:13 Hap-má ê ông
Isaiah37:14 Hi-se-ka tùi sù-chiá ê chhiú chiap-tio̍h phoe
Isaiah37:15 Hi-se-ka ǹg Siōng Chú kî-tó kóng
Isaiah37:16 “Chē tī thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek téng-bīn ê Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Isaiah37:17 Siōng Chú ah
Isaiah37:18 Siōng Chú ah
Isaiah37:19 kā in ê sîn-bêng lóng hiat hō͘ hé sio-bia̍t
Isaiah37:20 Taⁿ
Isaiah37:21 A-mô͘-su ê kiáⁿ Í-sài-a chhe lâng khì kìⁿ Hi-se-ka
Isaiah37:22 Koan-hē Se-ná-ki-li̍p
Isaiah37:23 Lí teh bú-jio̍k siáⁿ-lâng
Isaiah37:24 Lí ū thong-kè lí ê po̍k-jîn bú-bān Chú. Lí kóng: Góa sái chin chōe chiàn-chhia peh-chiūⁿ koân-soaⁿ
Isaiah37:25 Góa ó͘ chíⁿ
Isaiah37:26 “‘Lín kiám m̄-bat thiaⁿ--kìⁿ? Chin chá góa chòe chit-ê kè-ōe
Isaiah37:27 Hia ê chū-bîn lóng bô-la̍t; in kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Isaiah37:28 “‘Lí tòa tó-ūi
Isaiah37:29 In-ūi lí ū tùi góa hoat siū-khì
Isaiah37:30 “ Hi-se-ka
Isaiah37:31 Iû-tāi -ke tô-thoat só͘ chhun ê chú-bîn ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ si̍t-bu̍t
Isaiah37:32 Tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh ū chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê chú-bîn chhut--lâi
Isaiah37:33 “Só͘-í
Isaiah37:34 I tùi tó chi̍t tiâu lō͘ lâi
Isaiah37:35 Góa ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘
Isaiah37:36 Siōng Chú ê thiⁿ-sài khì A-su̍t kun-iâⁿ
Isaiah37:37 A-su̍t -ông Se-ná-ki-li̍p chiū thiat-iâⁿ
Isaiah37:38 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Isaiah38:1 Hit-ê sî-chūn
Isaiah38:2 Hi-se-ka chiū oa̍t-tńg-sin ǹg piah
Isaiah38:3 “Siōng Chú ah
Isaiah38:4 Jiân-āu Siōng Chú tùi Í-sài-a kóng
Isaiah38:5 “Lí khì kā Hi-se-ka kóng
Isaiah38:6 Góa beh kái-kiù lí kap chit-ê siâⁿ thoat-lī A-su̍t -ông ê chhiú; góa ōe pó-hō͘ chit-ê siâⁿ.’”
Isaiah38:7 Í-sài-a kóng
Isaiah38:8 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah38:9 Iû-tāi -ông Hi-se-ka pīⁿ hó liáu-āu siá chit-siú si:
Isaiah38:10 Góa siūⁿ-kóng: Góa tī chòng-liân ê sî tio̍h lī-khui sè-kan
Isaiah38:11 Góa siūⁿ-kóng: Tī oa̍h-lâng ê tōe
Isaiah38:12 Góa tòa ê só͘-chāi siū thiah
Isaiah38:13 Góa kui-mî ai-khàu ti̍t-kàu chheng-chá; I chhin-chhiūⁿ sai thiah-chhùi góa só͘-ū ê kut-thâu; tī chi̍t ji̍t ê tiong-kan chiū beh kiat-sok góa ê sìⁿ-miā.
Isaiah38:14 Góa chhin-chhiūⁿ ìⁿ-á chiu̍h-chiu̍h-kiò
Isaiah38:15 Góa ōe-tàng kóng sím-mi̍h? I kā góa èng-ún
Isaiah38:16 Chú ah
Isaiah38:17 Góa siū hiah-ni̍h tōa ê khó͘-thàng
Isaiah38:18 In-ūi Im-hú bōe-tàng kám-siā lí
Isaiah38:19 Oa̍h ê lâng
Isaiah38:20 Siōng Chú beh chín-kiù góa; goán beh chi̍t-sì-lâng tī Siōng Chú ê chhù
Isaiah38:21 Í-sài-a kóng
Isaiah38:22 Hi-se-ka mn̄g kóng
Isaiah39:1 Hit-sî
Isaiah39:2 Hi-se-ka chin hoaⁿ-hí chiap-thāi in
Isaiah39:3 Āu-lâi sian-ti Í-sài-a lâi kìⁿ Hi-se-ka -ông
Isaiah39:4 Í-sài-a kóng
Isaiah39:5 Í-sài-a kā Hi-se-ka kóng
Isaiah39:6 Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu
Isaiah39:7 Koh lí chhin-siⁿ--ê
Isaiah39:8 Hi-se-ka sim-lāi siūⁿ-kóng “Góa chāi-siⁿ ê sî ū thài-pêng an-choân chiū hó”
Isaiah40:1 Lín ê Siōng-tè kóng
Isaiah40:2 Tio̍h kó͘-lē Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn
Isaiah40:3 Ū siaⁿ teh hoah kóng
Isaiah40:4 Ta̍k-ê soaⁿ-kok tio̍h thūn hō͘ móa
Isaiah40:5 Hit-sî
Isaiah40:6 Ū siaⁿ teh hoah kóng: Tio̍h soan-pò͘! Góa mn̄g: Beh soan-pò͘ sím-mi̍h? Tio̍h soan-pò͘: Só͘-ū ê lâng lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu
Isaiah40:7 Siōng Chú chhe--lâi ê hong chi̍t-ē sàu--kè
Isaiah40:8 Chháu ōe ta
Isaiah40:9 Pò hó siau-sit ê Sek-an ah
Isaiah40:10 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú tòa koân-lêng teh lâi lah
Isaiah40:11 I beh chhin-chhiūⁿ bo̍k-chiá kò͘ I ê iûⁿ-kûn
Isaiah40:12 Siáⁿ-lâng bat ēng chhiú-sim niû hái-chúi
Isaiah40:13 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng liáu-kái Siōng Chú ê sim
Isaiah40:14 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng chòe I ê chham-bô͘
Isaiah40:15 Tī Siōng Chú gán-tiong
Isaiah40:16 Lê-pa-lūn ê chhiū-nâ bô-kàu chòe chhâ-liāu sio
Isaiah40:17 Tī Siōng Chú bīn-chêng
Isaiah40:18 Án-ni
Isaiah40:19 Kiám beh ēng ngó͘-siōng? Ngó͘-siōng put-kò sī sai-hū chù-chō
Isaiah40:20 Bô-chîⁿ thang bóe kim gûn ê lâng
Isaiah40:21 Lín kiám m̄ chai
Isaiah40:22 Siōng-tè choh-ông chē tī tāi-tōe ê kiong-chhong téng-bīn; tōe-chiūⁿ ê chū-bîn chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu-meh hiah-ni̍h sòe. I thí-khui thiⁿ
Isaiah40:23 I kā thóng-tī-chiá lóng thoa--lo̍h-lâi
Isaiah40:24 In tú-tú chiah iā-chéng
Isaiah40:25 Sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè mn̄g: Lín beh ēng sím-mi̍h-lâng kap góa pí? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng chhin-chhiūⁿ góa?
Isaiah40:26 Lín gia̍h-thâu ǹg thiⁿ khòaⁿ-bāi leh
Isaiah40:27 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Isaiah40:28 Lí kiám m̄ chai
Isaiah40:29 Ià-siān ê lâng
Isaiah40:30 Liân siàu-liân-lâng to ōe ià ōe siān
Isaiah40:31 M̄-kú óa-khò Siōng Chú ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h sin ê khùi-la̍t
Isaiah41:1 Siōng-tè kóng: Chèng hái-sū ah
Isaiah41:2 Siáⁿ-lâng tùi tang-hng heng-khí chi̍t ê sèng-lī-chiá
Isaiah41:3 I tui-kóaⁿ in hui-siông sūn-lī
Isaiah41:4 Sī siáⁿ-lâng hō͘ chit-hāng tāi-chì hoat-seng? Siáⁿ-lâng tùi khí-chho͘ chiū koat-tēng le̍k-sú ê tōng-hiòng? Chiū sī góa Siōng Chú
Isaiah41:5 Chèng hái-sū ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Isaiah41:6 Ta̍k-ê lâng lóng hō͘-siōng pang-chān
Isaiah41:7 Ba̍k-chhiūⁿ bián-lē gûn-chhiūⁿ; chù-chō ngó͘-siōng ê sai-hū kó͘-lē tèng teng-á ê ba̍k-chhiūⁿ. In tùi phah thih--ê kóng
Isaiah41:8 M̄-kú
Isaiah41:9 lí sī góa tùi tōe ê ke̍k-thâu chhōa--lâi-ê
Isaiah41:10 M̄-bián kiaⁿ
Isaiah41:11 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah41:12 Tùi-khòng lí--ê
Isaiah41:13 In-ūi góa Siōng Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè hû-chhî lí ê chiàⁿ-chhiú; “M̄-bián kiaⁿ
Isaiah41:14 Lí chit-ê ná thâng ê Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Isaiah41:15 Lí khòaⁿ
Isaiah41:16 Lí beh kā in pòa
Isaiah41:17 Sàn-chhiah khùn-khó͘ ê lâng chhē chúi
Isaiah41:18 Góa beh tī chhàu-ta ê soaⁿ-téng khui kang-hô
Isaiah41:19 Góa beh tī khòng-iá chèng pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū
Isaiah41:20 Án-ni
Isaiah41:21 Siōng Chú tùi ngó͘-siōng kóng
Isaiah41:22 Tio̍h tùi goán kóng teh-beh hoat-seng ê sū
Isaiah41:23 Tio̍h hō͘ goán chai chiong-lâi beh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Isaiah41:24 Lín kap lín chòe ê it-chhè lóng bô sǹg sím-mi̍h; soán-te̍k lín--ê si̍t-chāi thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ!
Isaiah41:25 Góa í-keng tùi pak-hng heng-khí chi̍t ê lâng; i tùi tang-pêng lâi
Isaiah41:26 Siáⁿ-lâng tī khí-thâu chiū soan-pò͘ chit-ê tāi-chì hō͘ goán chai
Isaiah41:27 Góa tāi-seng tùi Sek-an soan-pò͘; góa phài chi̍t ê pò hó siau-sit ê sù-chiá khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng.
Isaiah41:28 Góa tī chèng sîn-bêng tiong-kan chhē
Isaiah41:29 Só͘-ū ê sîn-bêng lóng bô lō͘-ēng; in ê só͘-chòe sī khang-khang; in ê siōng put-kò sī hong.
Isaiah42:1 Siōng Chú kóng: “Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah42:2 I bōe chhut-siaⁿ hoah
Isaiah42:3 Siū-siong ê lô͘-úi
Isaiah42:4 I bōe hoe-sim
Isaiah42:5 Siōng-tè chhòng-chō thiⁿ
Isaiah42:6 “Góa Siōng Chú tiàu lí lâi si̍t-chián kong-gī; góa ū khan lí ê chhiú pó-siú lí. Thong-kè lí
Isaiah42:7 Lí beh khui sit-bêng ê lâng ê ba̍k-chiu
Isaiah42:8 Góa sī Siōng Chú
Isaiah42:9 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah42:10 Hái kap hái-tiong it-chhè ê seng-bu̍t
Isaiah42:11 Hong-iá kap lāi-bīn ê siâⁿ-tìn
Isaiah42:12 In tio̍h chiong êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng Chú
Isaiah42:13 Siōng Chú ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chiàn-sū chhut-cheng
Isaiah42:14 Siōng-tè kóng
Isaiah42:15 Góa beh hō͘ tōa-soaⁿ sió-soaⁿ lóng hong-hòe
Isaiah42:16 Góa beh chhōa sit-bêng ê lâng kiâⁿ-lō͘
Isaiah42:17 Óa-khò tiau-khek ê ngó͘-siōng--ê
Isaiah42:18 Lín chiah-ê chhàu-hī--ê
Isaiah42:19 Siáⁿ-lâng pí góa ê po̍k-jîn koh-khah chhiⁿ-mî? Siáⁿ-lâng pí góa chhe ê sù-chiá koh-khah chhàu-hī?
Isaiah42:20 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Isaiah42:21 Siōng Chú ì-ài péng-kong-hêng-gī
Isaiah42:22 M̄-kú chiah-ê siū chhiúⁿ-kiap pak-toa̍t ê chú-bîn
Isaiah42:23 Lín tiong-kan ū siáⁿ-lâng ōe koan-sim chit-ê tāi-chì? Tùi hiān-chāi khí ū siáⁿ-lâng ōe chù-ì chit-hāng sū?
Isaiah42:24 Siáⁿ-lâng chiong Ngá-kok kau hō͘ lâng chòe la̍h-bu̍t
Isaiah42:25 Só͘-í
Isaiah43:1 Ngá-kok ah
Isaiah43:2 Lí keng-kè tōa-chúi ê sî
Isaiah43:3 In-ūi góa sī Siōng Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè; góa sī Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè — lí ê Kiù-chú. Góa ēng Ai-ki̍p chòe tāi-kè kā lí sio̍k-hôe
Isaiah43:4 In-ūi lí tī góa gán-tiong chin pó-kùi
Isaiah43:5 M̄-bián kiaⁿ
Isaiah43:6 Góa beh tùi pak-hng kóng: Pàng in khì! Kā lâm-hng kóng: M̄-thang khàu-liû in! Hō͘ góa ê kiáⁿ-jî tùi chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi
Isaiah43:7 Só͘-ū kui góa ê miâ
Isaiah43:8 Siōng-tè kóng: Ū ba̍k-chiu m̄-kú bōe-tàng khòaⁿ--ê
Isaiah43:9 Tio̍h tiàu-chi̍p bān-kok chū-chi̍p chòe-hé
Isaiah43:10 Siōng Chú kóng: Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Isaiah43:11 Chí-ū góa sī Siōng Chú; góa í-gōa bô pa̍t-ê Chín-kiù-chiá.
Isaiah43:12 Góa bat soan-kò
Isaiah43:13 Góa sī Siōng-tè
Isaiah43:14 Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè
Isaiah43:15 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè; góa sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê Chhòng-chō-chú — lín ê Kun-ông.
Isaiah43:16 Kó͘-chá
Isaiah43:17 I châu-bia̍t chiàn-chhia
Isaiah43:18 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: M̄-thang chí-ū ōe-kì-tit kè-khì ê sū-kiāⁿ; m̄-thang it-ti̍t siàu-liām kó͘-chá ê tāi-chì.
Isaiah43:19 Góa teh-beh chòe chi̍t hāng sin ê sū
Isaiah43:20 Iá-siù lóng ōe chun-tiōng góa; liân chhâi-lông kap tô-chiáu to chun-kèng góa. In-ūi góa hō͘ khòng-iá ū chúi
Isaiah43:21 Chit-ê chú-bîn sī góa chhin-chhiú chō--ê; in ōe chheng-chàn soan-iông góa!
Isaiah43:22 Siōng Chú kóng: Ngá-kok ah
Isaiah43:23 Lí pèng bô chiong lí ê iûⁿ chòe sio-hòa-chè hiàn hō͘ góa
Isaiah43:24 Lí m̄-bat ēng chîⁿ bóe phang-liāu hō͘ góa
Isaiah43:25 Chí-ū góa sī Siōng-tè
Isaiah43:26 Lâi! Lán lâi-khì chiūⁿ hoat-têng
Isaiah43:27 Lí tē-it ê chó͘-sian hoān-chōe
Isaiah43:28 lí ê siú-léng phah lâ-sâm góa ê sèng-só͘. Só͘-í
Isaiah44:1 Siōng Chú kóng: Ngá-kok — góa ê po̍k-jîn
Isaiah44:2 Lia̍p-chō lí
Isaiah44:3 Góa beh piàⁿ-lo̍h chúi hō͘ chhùi-ta ê tōe; góa beh hō͘ ta-sò ê tōe ū khoe-chúi teh lâu. Góa beh chiong góa ê sîn piàⁿ hō͘ lí ê hō͘-tāi
Isaiah44:4 In ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu tī chúi chhiong-chiok ê só͘-chāi tōa-châng
Isaiah44:5 Ū lâng ōe kóng “Góa sio̍k Siōng Chú”; lēng-gōa chi̍t ê kā ka-kī hō-miâ kiò Ngá-kok; koh chi̍t ê tī chhiú ê téng-bīn siá “Siōng Chú ê”
Isaiah44:6 Siōng Chú — thóng-tī Í-sek-lia̍t ê Kiù-sio̍k-chú
Isaiah44:7 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kap góa pí? Tio̍h chhut-lâi kóng! Góa bat tùi kó͘-chá ê chú-bîn ū-kò beh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Isaiah44:8 Lín m̄-bián kiaⁿ
Isaiah44:9 Só͘-ū chè-chō ngó͘-siōng ê lâng lóng bô lō͘-ēng; in só͘ kah-ì--ê lóng bô lī-ek. Pài ngó͘-siōng ê lâng lóng chhiⁿ-mî
Isaiah44:10 Siáⁿ-lâng chè-chō sîn-bêng
Isaiah44:11 Lí khòaⁿ
Isaiah44:12 Phah-thih sai-hū kā thih khǹg tī hé-thòaⁿ lāi pû hō͘ âng
Isaiah44:13 Ba̍k-chhiūⁿ ēng chîn-sòaⁿ niû
Isaiah44:14 I chhò pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū; koh kéng chheng-tông-chhiū kap siōng-chhiū hō͘ in tī chhiū-nâ lāi sêng-tióng; i chai-chèng siông-chhiū
Isaiah44:15 Jiân-āu
Isaiah44:16 Chi̍t-pòaⁿ ê chhâ
Isaiah44:17 I ēng só͘ chhun ê chhâ chòe chi̍t ê sîn-bêng
Isaiah44:18 Chit-khoán lâng m̄ bat koh bōe lí-kái
Isaiah44:19 In lóng bô teh siūⁿ
Isaiah44:20 In ēng hé-hu chún pn̄g chia̍h
Isaiah44:21 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Ngá-kok ah
Isaiah44:22 Góa í-keng kā lí ê chōe-kò sàu-tû
Isaiah44:23 Chiah-ê thiⁿ ah
Isaiah44:24 Hō͘ lí tī bú-thai chiâⁿ-hêng
Isaiah44:25 Góa hō͘ ké sian-ti ê tiāu-thâu hūn-loān
Isaiah44:26 Góa hō͘ góa po̍k-jîn ê ōe tit-tio̍h chèng-si̍t
Isaiah44:27 Góa tùi chhim-ian kóng: Tio̍h ta--khì! Góa beh hō͘ lí ê hô-liû lóng ta-ta--khì.
Isaiah44:28 Góa tùi Sài-ló͘-sū kóng: Lí tio̍h thòe góa bo̍k-ióng; lí tio̍h oân-sêng góa ê chí-ì. I ōe hā-lēng tiông-kiàn Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Isaiah45:1 Siōng Chú soán-li̍p Sài-ló͘-sū choh-ông. Siōng Chú hû-chhî i
Isaiah45:2 Góa Siōng Chú beh chhin-sin thòe lí khui-lō͘
Isaiah45:3 Góa beh chiong àm-tiong ê pó-pòe
Isaiah45:4 Sui-jiân lí m̄ bat góa
Isaiah45:5 Góa sī Siōng Chú
Isaiah45:6 án-ni
Isaiah45:7 Góa chhòng-chō kng
Isaiah45:8 Thiⁿ ah
Isaiah45:9 Kap Chō-bu̍t-chú cheng-lūn ê lâng chhám ah! I put-kò sī tōe-chiūⁿ hiā-phìⁿ tiong ê chi̍t phìⁿ. Liâm-thô͘ kiám káⁿ tùi sio-hûi sai-hū kóng
Isaiah45:10 Káⁿ kā lāu-pē kóng “Lí ná kā góa siⁿ-chòe án-ni”
Isaiah45:11 Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè — chhòng-chō Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Lín bô koân thang chit-būn góa ê kiáⁿ-jî ê chiong-lâi
Isaiah45:12 Góa sī tāi-tōe ê Chhòng-chō-chú
Isaiah45:13 Góa heng-khí Sài-ló͘-sū hō͘ i tit-tio̍h sèng-lī
Isaiah45:14 Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t án-ni kóng: Ai-ki̍p kap I-soh-phit-a ê châi-hù lóng ōe pìⁿ-chòe lí ê; tōa koh lò ê Se-pa -lâng lóng pìⁿ-chòe lí ê lô͘-lē
Isaiah45:15 Kiù-sio̍k-chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè
Isaiah45:16 Chè-chō ngó͘-siōng--ê lóng ōe kiàn-siàu làu-khùi; in lóng ōe chòe-hé siū thí-jio̍k.
Isaiah45:17 M̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t siū Siōng Chú chín-kiù. Lín tit--tio̍h ê kiù-un ōe sòa kàu éng-oán; lín éng-oán bōe koh siū bú-jio̍k.
Isaiah45:18 Siōng Chú chhòng-chō thiⁿ; I chiū-sī hit-ūi î-it ê Siōng-tè. I chhòng-chō
Isaiah45:19 Góa m̄-bat tī ún-ba̍t ê só͘-chāi kóng-ōe
Isaiah45:20 Siōng Chú kóng: Lâi
Isaiah45:21 Lâi
Isaiah45:22 Thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak ê lâng ah
Isaiah45:23 Góa kí ka-kī li̍p-sè; góa pîn kong-gī kóng-chhut ê ōe choa̍t-tùi bōe siu-hôe: Múi chi̍t ê kha-thâu-u lóng ōe tùi góa kūi-pài; múi chi̍t ê chhùi lóng ōe tùi góa soan-sè.
Isaiah45:24 Lâng ōe kóng: Chí-ū thong-kè Siōng Chú chiah ōe tit-tio̍h sèng-lī kap khùi-la̍t; só͘-ū tùi I hoat siū-khì ê lâng lóng ōe siū thí-jio̍k.
Isaiah45:25 Só͘ ū Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun lóng ōe tùi Siōng Chú tit-tio̍h sèng-lī kap êng-iāu.
Isaiah46:1 Pí-le̍k kūi--lo̍h-khì lah
Isaiah46:2 In í-keng lóng kūi--lo̍h-khì
Isaiah46:3 Ngá-kok lâu--lo̍h-lâi ê kiáⁿ-sun
Isaiah46:4 Kàu lín nî-lāu
Isaiah46:5 Siōng Chú kóng: Lín beh ēng siáⁿ-lâng kap góa pí
Isaiah46:6 Lâng tùi tē-á piàⁿ kui-tui kim-á chhut--lâi
Isaiah46:7 In chiong ngó͘-siōng giâ--khí-lâi
Isaiah46:8 Ū-chōe ê lâng ah
Isaiah46:9 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit kó͘-chá hoat-seng ê tāi-chì. Góa sī Siōng-tè
Isaiah46:10 Tùi khí-chho͘ góa chiū ū-chhek chiong-kio̍k ê sū; tùi kó͘-chá góa chiū soan-kò iáu-bē hoat-seng ê tāi-chì. Góa kóng: Góa ê kè-ōe bōe kái-piàn; góa ài chòe ê sū
Isaiah46:11 Góa beh chhe chi̍t ê sù-chiá tùi tang-hng chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi lâi; i beh chhin-chhiūⁿ eng-chiáu chhiong--lo̍h-lâi. Góa í-keng kóng chhut-chhùi
Isaiah46:12 Lín chiah-ê sim ngī
Isaiah46:13 Góa beh hō͘ sèng-lī pek-kūn
Isaiah47:1 Chāi-sek-lú Pa-pí-lûn ah
Isaiah47:2 Khì oe chio̍h-bō
Isaiah47:3 Lâng ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé; lí ê kiàn-siàu ōe lō͘-hiān. Góa beh pò-ho̍k
Isaiah47:4 Goán ê Kiù-sio̍k-chú sī Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè; I ê chheng-ho͘ sī Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe.
Isaiah47:5 Siàu-lú Ka-le̍k-tí ah
Isaiah47:6 Góa ū tùi góa ê chú-bîn hoat siū-khì
Isaiah47:7 Lí bat kóng “Góa beh éng-oán chòe lú-ông”
Isaiah47:8 Taⁿ
Isaiah47:9 M̄-kú
Isaiah47:10 Lí chū-sìn chòe pháiⁿ bô tāi-chì
Isaiah47:11 M̄-kú chai-hō ōe jip-tio̍h lí
Isaiah47:12 Khí--lâi
Isaiah47:13 Lí in-ūi lâng hō͘ lí ê kè-chhek siuⁿ chōe soah ià-siān; khì kiò hiah-ê koan thian-siōng--ê
Isaiah47:14 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah47:15 Tùi siàu-liân chiū kap lí kau-kiat
Isaiah48:1 Ngá-kok ê hō͘-tāi
Isaiah48:2 Lín chū-khoa sī Sèng-siâⁿ ê jîn-bîn

Isaiah48:4 In-ūi góa chai
Isaiah48:5 só͘-í

Isaiah48:7 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hiān-chāi chiah hoat-seng
Isaiah48:8 Lín m̄-bat thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Isaiah48:9 Góa ūi-tio̍h pó-chhî góa ê miâ ê êng-ū
Isaiah48:10 Góa ū kā lín thê-liān
Isaiah48:11 Góa khak-si̍t sī ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê iân-kò͘; góa bô ài hō͘ góa ê êng-ū siū-jio̍k. Góa ê miâ ná thang siū siat-to̍k? Góa bô ài pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng hun-hióng góa ê êng-iāu!
Isaiah48:12 Ngá-kok ah
Isaiah48:13 Góa chhin-chhiú hē tāi-tōe ê tōe-ki; góa ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú thí-khui thiⁿ. Góa chi̍t-ē bēng-lēng
Isaiah48:14 Lín tāi-ke lóng tio̍h chū-chi̍p
Isaiah48:15 Tùi i kóng-ōe
Isaiah48:16 Taⁿ
Isaiah48:17 Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè — lín ê Kiù-sio̍k-chú án-ni kóng: Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè. Góa kà-sī lín sī ūi-tio̍h lín hó; góa chhōa lín kiâⁿ eng-kai kiâⁿ ê lō͘.
Isaiah48:18 Góa jōa-á-ni̍h kî-thāi lín thiaⁿ góa ê bēng-lēng! Nā ū thiaⁿ
Isaiah48:19 lín ê hō͘-tāi ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-soa

Isaiah48:21 Siōng Chú chhōa in keng-kè khòng-iá
Isaiah48:22 Siōng Chú kóng: Siâ-ok ê lâng bô pêng-an!

Isaiah49:24 Lí kiám ōe-tàng tùi ióng-sū ê chhiú chhiúⁿ-toa̍t chiàn-lī-phín? Kiám ōe-tàng tùi pō-kun ê chhiú kái-kiù hu-ló͘?
Isaiah49:25 Siōng Chú án-ni hôe-tap: Ōe-tàng! Ióng-sū ê hu-ló͘ ōe siū chhiúⁿ-toa̍t; pō-kun ê chiàn-lī-phín ōe siū kái-kiù. Góa beh kap te̍k-tùi lí ê lâng te̍k-tùi; góa beh chín-kiù lí ê kiáⁿ-jî.
Isaiah49:26 Góa beh hō͘ ap-pek lí ê lâng chia̍h in ka-kī ê bah
Isaiah50:1 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa hō͘ lín lāu-bú ê lî-hun-su tī tó-ūi? Góa kā lín bōe hō͘ tó chi̍t ê chè-chú? Góa sī in-ūi lín ê chōe chiah kā lín bōe--chhut-khì
Isaiah50:2 Sī-án-chóaⁿ góa lâi ê sî
Isaiah50:3 Góa kā thiⁿ chhēng o͘-saⁿ
Isaiah50:4 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kà góa kóng eng-kai kóng ê ōe
Isaiah50:5 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ū khui góa ê hī-khang
Isaiah50:6 Lâng beh phah góa
Isaiah50:7 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ū pang-chān góa

Isaiah50:9 Khòaⁿ! Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú ū teh pang-chān góa
Isaiah50:10 Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng kèng-ùi Siōng Chú
Isaiah50:11 Khòaⁿ! Lín só͘-ū tiám-hé

Isaiah51:6 Tio̍h gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ thiⁿ

Isaiah51:18 I siⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng kā i chhah--teh; i chhī tōa-hàn ê jî-lú bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng kā i hû--teh.

Isaiah52:2 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah

Isaiah53:1 Lán só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê
Isaiah53:2 Siōng Chú hō͘ I ê po̍k-jîn chhin-chhiūⁿ sin ê íⁿ puh--chhut-lâi
Isaiah53:3 I hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-khin
Isaiah53:4 I khak-si̍t sêng-tam lán ê pīⁿ-thiàⁿ
Isaiah53:5 M̄-kú i sī ūi-tio̍h lán ê kè-sit siū siong-hāi
Isaiah53:6 Lán lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ bê-lō͘; ta̍k-ê lâng kiâⁿ ka-kī ê lō͘. Siōng Chú chiong lán chèng-lâng ê chōe lóng kui tī i sin-chiūⁿ.
Isaiah53:7 I siū ap-pek
Isaiah53:8 I siū bô kong-tō ê sím-phòaⁿ
Isaiah53:9 Sui-jiân i bô ēng pō-le̍k
Isaiah53:10 Chóng-sī Siōng Chú koat-ì hō͘ i siū teh-chhùi
Isaiah53:11 Keng-le̍k siū-khó͘
Isaiah53:12 Só͘-í
Isaiah54:1 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Isaiah54:2 Tio̍h khok-tián lí tòa ê pò͘-pîⁿ ê tōe. Tio̍h kā lí pò͘-pîⁿ ê pò͘ khiú hō͘ khui
Isaiah54:3 In-ūi lí ōe sì-bīn khok-tián léng-thó͘
Isaiah54:4 M̄-bián kiaⁿ! Lí bōe koh-chài kiàn-siàu; lí bián koh jím-siū bú-jio̍k. Tio̍h bōe-kì-tit lí siàu-liân ê sî ê kiàn-siàu; m̄-thang koh kì-tiâu lí chòe kóaⁿ-hū ê thí-jio̍k.
Isaiah54:5 In-ūi chhòng-chō lí--ê sī lí ê tiōng-hu; I ê chheng-ho͘ sī Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe. Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè sī lí ê Kiù-sio̍k-chú; I siū chheng-ho͘ chòe choân-tōe ê Siōng-tè.
Isaiah54:6 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Isaiah54:7 Sui-jiân góa ū chiām-sî khì-sak lí
Isaiah54:8 Góa bat tùi lí hoat ke̍k-tōa ê siū-khì
Isaiah54:9 Che

Isaiah54:11 Siōng Chú kóng: Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Isaiah54:12 Góa beh ēng âng-pó-chio̍h kā lí khí siâⁿ-thah
Isaiah54:13 Lí ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng ōe siū Siōng Chú kàu-tō; lí ê kiáⁿ-sun lóng ōe pêng-an hoân-êng.
Isaiah54:14 Lí ōe in-ūi péng-kong-hêng-gī tit-tio̍h kian-li̍p. Lí bô sím-mi̍h thang kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ

Isaiah54:16 Lí khòaⁿ

Isaiah55:1 “Chhùi-ta ê lâng

Isaiah55:3 “Lín tio̍h àⁿ hī-khang thiaⁿ

Isaiah55:7 Siâ-ok ê lâng tio̍h khì-sak in ê tō-lō͘; put-gī ê lâng tio̍h kái-piàn in ê siūⁿ-hoat. In tio̍h kui-ǹg Siōng Chú

Isaiah57:1 Gī-lâng siū húi-bia̍t

Isaiah57:3 Lín chiah-ê kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t ê cha-bó͘-lâng ê kiáⁿ-jî
Isaiah57:4 Lín teh hì-lāng siáⁿ-lâng? Teh tùi siáⁿ-lâng khui-chhùi thó͘-chi̍h? Lín kiám m̄-sī pōe-ge̍k ê kiáⁿ-jî? Kiám m̄-sī pe̍h-chha̍t ê hō͘-tāi?
Isaiah57:5 Lín tī siōng-chhiū tiong-kan

Isaiah57:7 Lín tī koân koh kiā ê soaⁿ-téng khǹg bîn-chhn̂g kiâⁿ-îm; lín chiūⁿ-khì hia hiàn-chè.
Isaiah57:8 Lín tī mn̂g-āu
Isaiah57:9 Lín tòa iû kap chin chōe phang-chúi khì pài Mô͘-lo̍k. Ūi-tio̍h beh chhē sîn-bêng lâi pài
Isaiah57:10 Lín kiâⁿ chin hn̄g ê lō͘
Isaiah57:11 Lín teh kiaⁿ siáⁿ-lâng soah tio̍h kóng pe̍h-chha̍t? Lín kèng-jiân bōe-kì-tit góa
Isaiah57:12 Góa beh kong-khai lín chū-chheng sī chèng-gī hêng-ûi ê chin-siòng; chiah-ê tùi lín lóng bô lī-ek.
Isaiah57:13 Lín ai-kiû ê sî
Isaiah57:14 Siōng Chú kóng
Isaiah57:15 Chì-ko-bû-siōng

Isaiah57:20 “M̄-kú siâ-ok ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-éng péng-lâi-péng-khì
Isaiah57:21 Siâ-ok ê lâng bô pêng-an!” Góa ê Siōng-tè án-ni soan-kò.
Isaiah58:1 Tio̍h tōa-siaⁿ hoah! M̄-thang thêng-chí. Tio̍h chhut-la̍t hoah! Chhin-chhiūⁿ teh pûn sàu-kak. Tio̍h tùi góa ê chú-bîn soan-pò͘ in ê pōe-ge̍k! Tùi Ngá-kok ê hō͘-tāi soan-kò in ê chōe!
Isaiah58:2 In ta̍k-ji̍t teh chhē-kiû góa
Isaiah58:3 M̄-kú in mn̄g
Isaiah58:4 Lín kìm-chia̍h

Isaiah59:11 Goán chhin-chhiūⁿ hîm teh háu

Isaiah66:1 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Thiⁿ sī góa ê chō-ūi; tōe sī góa ê kha-tiam. Lín beh tī tó-ūi ūi-tio̍h góa khí kiong-tiān? Tó-ūi ōe-tàng chòe góa an-hioh ê só͘-chāi?

Isaiah66:3 Thâi gû hiàn chòe chè

Isaiah66:6 Thiaⁿ leh
Isaiah66:7 Sèng-siâⁿ iáu-bē thàng-thiàⁿ chiū seng-sán; Sek-an iáu-bē chhui-chūn chiū siⁿ-kiáⁿ.
Isaiah66:8 Siáⁿ-lâng bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán sū? Siáⁿ-lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chiah-ê tāi-chì? Kiám ū kok-ka tī chi̍t ji̍t lāi chiū sán-seng? Kiám ū bîn-cho̍k tī chi̍t-ba̍k-nih-kú chiū siⁿ--chhut-lâi? M̄-kú Sek-an chi̍t-ē khai-sí chhui-chūn
Isaiah66:9 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa kì-jiân hō͘ lâng lîm-phûn
Isaiah66:10 Lín chiah-ê thiàⁿ-sioh Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng
Isaiah66:11 Lín thang tī i ê heng-chêng suh-lin tit-tio̍h boán-chiok
Isaiah66:12 Siōng Chú kóng
Isaiah66:13 Chhin-chhiūⁿ lāu-bú an-ùi i ê kiáⁿ
Isaiah66:14 Lín ōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Isaiah66:15 Khòaⁿ leh
Isaiah66:16 Siōng Chú beh ēng hé kap to sím-phòaⁿ choân jîn-lūi; chin chōe lâng ōe hō͘ Siōng Chú chhú-sí.
Isaiah66:17 Siōng Chú kóng
Isaiah66:18 “Góa chai in ê chok-ûi kap ì-liām. Góa beh lâi lah
Isaiah66:19 Góa beh tī in tiong-kan chhāi chi̍t ê kì-hō
Isaiah66:20 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: In beh tùi lia̍t-kok chiong lín ê tông-pau chhōa--tò-lâi; ū-ê khiâ-bé
Isaiah66:21 Góa mā beh chí-tēng in tiong-kan chi̍t-kóa lâng chòe chè-si
Isaiah66:22 Siōng Chú kóng: Góa beh chō ê sin-thiⁿ-sin-tōe ōe chiàu góa ê chí-ì kú-tn̂g chûn-chāi; lín ê hō͘-tāi kap lín ê miâ mā ōe án-ni kú-tn̂g chûn-chāi.
Isaiah66:23 Múi ge̍h ê chhoe-it kap ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Isaiah66:24 Kèng-pài góa ê lâng chhut--khì

Jeremiah1:4 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng

Jeremiah2:1 Siōng Chú ê ōe lîm-kàu góa

Jeremiah2:11 Ū tó chi̍t kok bat ōaⁿ-kè in ê sîn-bêng? Kî-si̍t hiah-ê lóng m̄-sī sîn. M̄-kú góa ê chú-bîn chiong in êng-kng ê Siōng-tè ōaⁿ chòe bô lō͘-ēng ê sîn-bêng.
Jeremiah2:12 Thiⁿ ah
Jeremiah2:13 Góa ê chú-bîn chòe siang-têng ê pháiⁿ tāi-chì: In pàng-sak góa chit-ê oa̍h-chúi ê goân-thâu
Jeremiah2:14 Í-sek-lia̍t kiám sī lô͘-lē? Kiám chhut-sì chiū chòe lâng ê lô͘-châi? Ná ōe chiâⁿ-chòe la̍h-bu̍t?
Jeremiah2:15 Tùi-te̍k chhin-chhiūⁿ siàu-chòng ê sai ǹg i hm̄-hm̄-háu
Jeremiah2:16 Ai-ki̍p ê Bēng-húi-su -lâng kap Tap-pí-le̍k -lâng thì-kng lí ê thâu-khak.

Jeremiah2:18 Taⁿ

Jeremiah2:20 Lí tùi kó͘-chá chiū kòng-tn̄g lí ê taⁿ

Jeremiah2:25 Lí m̄-thang tè lâng cháu kah ôe phòa--khì
Jeremiah2:26 Chha̍t-á hō͘ lâng lia̍h--tio̍h

Jeremiah7:34 Hit-sî
Jeremiah8:1 Siōng Chú kóng: Kàu hit-sî
Jeremiah8:2 hiat tī ji̍t-thâu
Jeremiah8:3 Chit-ê siâ-ok ê bîn-cho̍k chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê lâng
Jeremiah8:4 Siōng Chú hoan-hù góa tùi I ê chú-bîn kóng: Lâng poa̍h-tó
Jeremiah8:5 Lín chiah-ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -lâng
Jeremiah8:6 Góa chù-ì kā in thiaⁿ

Jeremiah19:5 In koh ūi-tio̍h Pa-le̍k khí soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
Jeremiah19:6 Lín tio̍h chai

Jeremiah20:12 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe ah
Jeremiah20:13 Tio̍h ǹg Siōng Chú chhiùⁿ-koa! Tio̍h chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! In-ūi I kái-kiù siū ap-pek ê lâng thoat-lī siâ-ok ê lâng ê chhiú.
Jeremiah20:14 Goān góa chhut-sì hit-ji̍t siū chiù-chó͘; goān góa ê lāu-bú siⁿ góa hit-ji̍t bô siū chiok-hok.
Jeremiah20:15 Goān hit-ê kā góa ê lāu-pē pò siau-sit ê lâng siū chiù-chó͘! I kóng “Lí tit-tio̍h chi̍t ê ta-po͘-eⁿ”
Jeremiah20:16 Goān hit-ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ Siōng Chú húi-bia̍t
Jeremiah20:17 In-ūi i bô tī góa chhut-sì í-chêng kā góa thâi-sí
Jeremiah20:18 Góa sī-án-chóaⁿ tio̍h chhut-sì? Góa ê keng-le̍k lóng sī lô-khó͘ kap iu-siong. Góa tio̍h tī siū bú-jio̍k ê tiong-kan kiat-sok góa ê jîn-seng sī--bô?

Jeremiah22:10 Iû-tāi -lâng

Jeremiah22:23 Lín tòa tī Lê-pa-lūn

Jeremiah25:12 Chhit-cha̍p nî móa liáu-āu

Jeremiah25:14 Góa beh chiàu Pa-pí-lûn -lâng ê hêng-ûi kap in ê chhiú só͘ chòe--ê pò-èng in; ōe ū chin chōe kok kap tōa kun-ông lia̍h in khì chòe lô͘-lē.”
Jeremiah25:15 Siōng Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè án-ni kā góa kóng

Jeremiah28:1 Se-tí-ka -ông thóng-tī Iû-tāi tē-sì nî gō͘--ge̍h
Jeremiah28:2 “Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah28:3 Nn̄g nî lāi
Jeremiah28:4 koh beh kā Iok-ngá-kèng ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi -ông Iok-ngá-kun kap siū-lia̍h khì Pa-pí-lûn só͘-ū ê Iû-tāi -lâng lóng chhōa--tò-lâi
Jeremiah28:5 Sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí chiū tī hiah-ê khiā tī Siōng Chú tiān-lāi ê chè-si kap bîn-chiòng ê bīn-chêng
Jeremiah28:6 “Amen! Goān Siōng Chú ōe án-ni chòe. Goān Siōng Chú si̍t-hiān lí kóng ê ū-giân
Jeremiah28:7 Taⁿ
Jeremiah28:8 Tùi kó͘-chá í-lâi
Jeremiah28:9 Hiah-ê ū-giân pêng-an ê sian-ti tio̍h ài kàu in ê ōe si̍t-hiān ê sî
Jeremiah28:10 Hap-ná-nî-ngá chiū chiong Iâ-lī-bí ām-kún ê taⁿ the̍h--khí-lâi
Jeremiah28:11 I koh tùi só͘-ū ê bîn-chiòng kóng
Jeremiah28:12 Sian-ti Hap-ná-nî-ngá kā sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí ām-kún téng-bīn ê taⁿ kòng-tn̄g liáu-āu
Jeremiah28:13 “Lí tio̍h khì kā Hap-ná-nî-ngá kóng
Jeremiah28:14 In-ūi Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah28:15 Sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí koh kā sian-ti Hap-ná-nî-ngá kóng
Jeremiah28:16 Só͘-í
Jeremiah28:17 Hit-nî chhit--ge̍h
Jeremiah29:1 Sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siá-phoe hō͘ Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lia̍h-khì Pa-pí-lûn iáu oa̍h--teh ê tiúⁿ-ló
Jeremiah29:2 Chit-tiuⁿ phoe sī tī Iok-ngá-kun -ông
Jeremiah29:3 Chit-tiuⁿ phoe sī thok Sa-hoan ê kiáⁿ Í-lī-a-sat
Jeremiah29:4 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah29:5 “Lín tio̍h tī Pa-pí-lûn khí-chhù tòa
Jeremiah29:6 chhōa-bó͘ siⁿ-kiáⁿ
Jeremiah29:7 Lín tio̍h ūi kā lín liû-hòng--khì ê siâⁿ-tìn kiû pêng-an
Jeremiah29:8 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah29:9 In-ūi góa bô chhe-phài chiah-ê lâng
Jeremiah29:10 Siōng Chú koh kóng
Jeremiah29:11 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa khak-si̍t chai
Jeremiah29:12 Lín kiû-kiò góa
Jeremiah29:13 Lín nā chhē-kiû góa
Jeremiah29:14 góa it-tēng ōe hō͘ lín chhē--tio̍h. Siōng Chú án-ni kóng. Góa mā beh kā lín chiah-ê siū-lia̍h ê lâng chhōa--tò-lâi; chiong lín tùi góa kā lín liû-hòng--khì ê ta̍k-kok ta̍k só͘-chāi tiàu-chi̍p
Jeremiah29:15 Lín kóng
Jeremiah29:16 Taⁿ
Jeremiah29:17 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe án-ni kóng
Jeremiah29:18 Góa beh ēng chiàn-loān
Jeremiah29:19 Siōng Chú kóng
Jeremiah29:20 Só͘-í
Jeremiah29:21 Koan-hē Ko-nāi-ngá ê kiáⁿ A-hap
Jeremiah29:22 Lín só͘-ū hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì Pa-pí-lûn ê Iû-tāi -lâng beh kā lâng chiù-chó͘ ê sî
Jeremiah29:23 In-ūi in tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan chòe kiàn-siàu-sū
Jeremiah29:24 Koan-hē Nî-hi-lân -lâng Sī-má-ngá
Jeremiah29:25 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Siōng Chú í-keng siat-li̍p lí Se-hoan-ngá chòe chè-si

Jeremiah29:28 I ū siá-phoe lâi Pa-pí-lûn
Jeremiah29:29 Chè-si Se-hoan-ngá chiong chit-tiuⁿ phoe tha̍k hō͘ sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí thiaⁿ.
Jeremiah29:30 Hit-sî
Jeremiah29:31 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ só͘-ū liû-hòng tī Pa-pí-lûn ê tông-pau: “Koan-hē Nî-hi-lân -lâng Sī-má-ngá
Jeremiah29:32 só͘-í góa Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Góa beh hêng-hoa̍t Nî-hi-lân -lâng Sī-má-ngá kap i ê hō͘-tāi. I ê hō͘-tāi it-tēng bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng tòa tī chiah-ê jîn-bîn tiong-kan

Jeremiah30:4 Í-hā sī Siōng Chú chiam-tùi Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi kóng ê ōe.
Jeremiah30:5 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h khióng-pò͘ ê hoah-siaⁿ; chí-ū kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Jeremiah30:6 Lín ka-kī khì mn̄g khòaⁿ-bāi

Jeremiah30:8 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe án-ni soan-pò͘

Jeremiah30:20 In ê kiáⁿ-sun beh chhin-chhiūⁿ chá-chêng hiah-ni̍h kiông-sēng; in ê kok-ka ōe siū góa khòaⁿ-kò͘ tit-tio̍h kian-li̍p; só͘-ū ap-pek in--ê
Jeremiah30:21 Tī-lí in--ê sī in ka-kī ê lâng
Jeremiah30:22 Lín beh chòe góa ê chú-bîn
Jeremiah30:23 Khòaⁿ leh

Jeremiah34:3 Lí bô hoat-tō͘ thoat-lī i ê chhiú-thâu

Jeremiah34:5 ōe pêng-an sí. Lí sí-liáu

Jeremiah34:10 Hiah-ê ū chham-ú chit-ê iok ê léng-siù kap jîn-bîn chiū tháu-pàng in ê lâm-lú lô͘-lē

Jeremiah34:19 
Jeremiah34:20 Góa beh kā in kau hō͘ in ê tùi-te̍k kap siàu-siūⁿ in sìⁿ-miā ê lâng. In ê sin-si ōe chiâⁿ-chòe khong-tiong pe-chiáu kap tōe-chiūⁿ iá-siù ê chia̍h-mi̍h.
Jeremiah34:21 Góa mā beh chiong Iû-tāi -ông Se-tí-ka kap i ê jîn-sîn kau hō͘ in ê tùi-te̍k kap siàu-siūⁿ in sìⁿ-miā ê lâng
Jeremiah34:22 Góa beh bēng-lēng Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-tūi koh tò-lâi kong-táⁿ chit-ê siâⁿ
Jeremiah35:1 Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-ngá-kèng chòe Iû-tāi -ông ê sî
Jeremiah35:2 “Lí khì Lī-kah -cho̍k hia

Jeremiah35:4 lóng chhōa-lâi Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
Jeremiah35:5 Góa ēng chiú kā chiú-ô͘
Jeremiah35:6 In kóng
Jeremiah35:7 M̄-thang khí-chhù
Jeremiah35:8 Goán chó͘-sian Lī-kah ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-ta̍t kau-tài goán ê ōe
Jeremiah35:9 bô khí-chhù tòa
Jeremiah35:10 kan-ta tòa tī pò͘-pîⁿ

Jeremiah35:12 Siōng Chú hoan-hù Iâ-lī-bí khì kā Iû-tāi -lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê chū-bîn kóng
Jeremiah35:13 
Jeremiah35:14 Lī-kah ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-ta̍t kau-tài i ê hō͘-tāi m̄-thang lim-chiú
Jeremiah35:15 Góa chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn chhe-phài góa ê po̍k-jîn sian-ti khì lín hia
Jeremiah35:16 Lī-kah ê kiáⁿ Iok-ná-ta̍t ê hō͘-tāi ōe-tàng chun-siú in ê chó͘-sian hō͘ in ê bēng-lēng
Jeremiah35:17 Só͘-í
Jeremiah35:18 Āu-lâi
Jeremiah35:19 só͘-í
Jeremiah36:1 Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-ngá-kèng thóng-tī Iû-tāi tē-sì nî
Jeremiah36:2 “Lí the̍h chi̍t kńg chheh lâi
Jeremiah36:3 Iû-tāi -ke thiaⁿ-tio̍h góa beh kàng chai-hō hō͘ in
Jeremiah36:4 Iâ-lī-bí kiò Nî-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Pa-lio̍k lâi
Jeremiah36:5 Iâ-lī-bí hoan-hù Pa-lio̍k
Jeremiah36:6 só͘-í lí tio̍h tī kìm-chia̍h ê ji̍t ji̍p-khì Siōng Chú ê tiān
Jeremiah36:7 In ū khó-lêng ōe tī Siōng Chú ê bīn-chêng kî-tó hóe-kái
Jeremiah36:8 Nî-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Pa-lio̍k chiū chiàu sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí só͘ hoan-hù it-chhè ê ōe
Jeremiah36:9 Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-ngá-kèng choh Iû-tāi -ông tē-gō͘ nî káu--ge̍h
Jeremiah36:10 Hit-sî
Jeremiah36:11 Sa-hoan ê sun
Jeremiah36:12 chiū khì ông-kiong
Jeremiah36:13 Bí-kai-ngá chiong i só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Jeremiah36:14 In chiū phài Kó͘-sī ê kan-á-sun
Jeremiah36:15 In kā i kóng
Jeremiah36:16 In thiaⁿ-liáu
Jeremiah36:17 In koh mn̄g Pa-lio̍k
Jeremiah36:18 Pa-lio̍k ìn kóng
Jeremiah36:19 Hiah-ê koaⁿ-oân kā Pa-lio̍k kóng
Jeremiah36:20 Hiah-ê koaⁿ-oân chiong hit-kńg chheh hē tī su-kì-koaⁿ Í-lī-sa-má ê pâng-keng
Jeremiah36:21 Ông chiū phài Iû-tí khì su-kì-koaⁿ Í-lī-sa-má ê pâng-keng
Jeremiah36:22 Hit-chūn sī káu--ge̍h
Jeremiah36:23 Iû-tí ta̍k-piàn tha̍k saⁿ sì lân
Jeremiah36:24 Ông kap hiah-ê jîn-sîn thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe lóng bô teh kiaⁿ
Jeremiah36:25 Í-lī-ná-tan
Jeremiah36:26 Ông tian-tò bēng-lēng ông-chú Iâ-la-bia̍t
Jeremiah36:27 Iok-ngá-kèng -ông chiong Iâ-lī-bí kóng hō͘ Pa-lio̍k siá--lo̍h-lâi hit-kńg chheh sio--khì liáu-āu
Jeremiah36:28 “Lí koh the̍h chi̍t kńg chheh-kǹg
Jeremiah36:29 Koan-hē Iû-tāi -ông Iok-ngá-kèng
Jeremiah36:30 Só͘-í
Jeremiah36:31 Góa beh in-ūi i
Jeremiah36:32 Iâ-lī-bí chiū koh the̍h chi̍t kńg chheh-kǹg
Jeremiah37:1 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat siat-li̍p Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Se-tí-ka tāi-thòe Iok-ngá-kèng ê kiáⁿ Iok-ngá-kun choh Iû-tāi -ông.
Jeremiah37:2 M̄-kú Se-tí-ka
Jeremiah37:3 Se-tí-ka -ông phài Sī-lī-bí-ngá ê kiáⁿ Iû-kah
Jeremiah37:4 Hit-sî
Jeremiah37:5 koh ûi-kong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Pa-pí-lûn kun-tūi hut-jiân thiat-thè
Jeremiah37:6 Siōng Chú tùi sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah37:7 “Lí kā in kóng
Jeremiah37:8 Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-tūi it-tēng ōe koh lâi kong-táⁿ chit-ê siâⁿ
Jeremiah37:9 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Jeremiah37:10 Chiū-sī-kóng lín kā lâi kong-táⁿ ê Pa-pí-lûn choân-kun phah-pāi
Jeremiah37:11 Pa-pí-lûn kun-tūi ūi-tio̍h beh siám-pī Hoat-ló ê kun-tūi
Jeremiah37:12 Iâ-lī-bí chiū tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chhut-hoat khì Piān-ngá-bín tōe-khu
Jeremiah37:13 I khì kàu Piān-ngá-bín-mn̂g ê sî
Jeremiah37:14 Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah37:15 Hiah-ê koaⁿ-oân lóng chin khì Iâ-lī-bí
Jeremiah37:16 In chiong Iâ-lī-bí koaiⁿ tī tōe-lô kúi-nā ji̍t.
Jeremiah37:17 Se-tí-ka -ông phài lâng khì kā Iâ-lī-bí chhōa--lâi
Jeremiah37:18 Koh kā Se-tí-ka -ông kóng
Jeremiah37:19 Hiah-ê tùi lí ū-giân
Jeremiah37:20 Góa ê chú
Jeremiah37:21 Se-tí-ka -ông chiū hā-lēng
Jeremiah38:1 Má-thán ê kiáⁿ Sī-hoat-thê-ngá
Jeremiah38:2 “Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Só͘-ū lâu tī chit-ê siâⁿ lāi-bīn ê lâng
Jeremiah38:3 Siōng Chú koh kóng: Góa beh chiong chit-ê siâⁿ kau hō͘ Pa-pí-lûn -ông ê kun-tūi
Jeremiah38:4 Hit kúi ê koaⁿ-oân chiū khì kā Se-tí-ka -ông pò-kò
Jeremiah38:5 Ông kā in kóng
Jeremiah38:6 In chiū kā Iâ-lī-bí lia̍h--khí-lâi
Jeremiah38:7 Se-tí-ka -ông tī Piān-ngá-bín-mn̂g teh chhú-lí àn-kiāⁿ ê sî
Jeremiah38:8 chiū chhut ông-kiong khì tùi ông pò-kò
Jeremiah38:9 “Góa ê chú
Jeremiah38:10 Ông chiū bēng-lēng Kó͘-si̍t -lâng Í-pek Bí-le̍k
Jeremiah38:11 Í-pek Bí-le̍k chiū chhōa hiah-ê lâng ji̍p-khì ông-kiong ê chhng-khò͘
Jeremiah38:12 I kā Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah38:13 Án-ni
Jeremiah38:14 Se-tí-ka -ông phài lâng khì kā sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí chhōa-lâi Siōng Chú sèng-tiān tē-saⁿ ê mn̂g ê ji̍p-kháu
Jeremiah38:15 Iâ-lī-bí tùi Se-tí-ka kóng
Jeremiah38:16 Se-tí-ka -ông chiū su-hā chiù-chōa kóng
Jeremiah38:17 Iâ-lī-bí chiū tùi Se-tí-ka -ông kóng
Jeremiah38:18 Lí nā m̄ tâu-hâng Pa-pí-lûn ê chiong-kun
Jeremiah38:19 Se-tí-ka -ông tùi Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah38:20 Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah38:21 Lí nā m̄ chhut-khì tâu-hâng
Jeremiah38:22 Só͘-ū lâu tī ông-kiong ê kiong-lú ōe hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì Pa-pí-lûn -ông ê chiong-kun hia. Hiah-ê kiong-lú ōe chí-chek lí
Jeremiah38:23 Lí ê pîn-hui kap hāu-siⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ lóng ōe hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì Pa-pí-lûn
Jeremiah38:24 Se-tí-ka -ông kā Iâ-lī-bí kóng
Jeremiah38:25 Nā ū koaⁿ-oân chai-iáⁿ góa ū kap lí kóng-ōe
Jeremiah38:26 Lí tio̍h kā in kóng
Jeremiah38:27 Āu-lâi
Jeremiah38:28 Án-ni
Jeremiah39:1 Se-tí-ka thóng-tī Iû-tāi tē-káu nî cha̍p--ge̍h
Jeremiah39:2 Se-tí-ka tē-cha̍p-it nî sì-ge̍h chhoe-káu
Jeremiah39:3 Siâⁿ siū kong-phòa ê sî
Jeremiah39:4 Iû-tāi -ông Se-tí-ka kap só͘-ū ê kun-peng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pa-pí-lûn tāi-kun
Jeremiah39:5 Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-peng tui-jip in
Jeremiah39:6 Pa-pí-lûn -ông tī Lī-pí-la thâi-sí Se-tí-ka ê kiáⁿ
Jeremiah39:7 Āu-lâi Pa-pí-lûn -ông ó͘ Se-tí-ka ê nn̄g lúi ba̍k-chiu
Jeremiah39:8 Pa-pí-lûn -lâng pàng-hé sio ông-kiong kap jîn-bîn ê chhù
Jeremiah39:9 Hit-sî

Jeremiah39:11 Koan-hē Iâ-lī-bí

Jeremiah39:15 Iâ-lī-bí iáu koaiⁿ tī hō͘-ōe-tūi ê tiâⁿ ê sî
Jeremiah39:16 “Lí khì kā Kó͘-si̍t -lâng Í-pek Bí-le̍k kóng

Jeremiah40:1 Pa-pí-lûn -ông ê sī-ōe-tiúⁿ Nî-pò͘-sat-la-tàn tī La-má kā Iâ-lī-bí pàng--chhut-khì í-āu
Jeremiah40:2 Nî-pò͘-sat-la-tàn kiò Iâ-lī-bí lâi
Jeremiah40:3 Taⁿ
Jeremiah40:4 Taⁿ góa chiong liān tī lí ê chhiú ê liān-á pak--khí-lâi. Lí nā khòaⁿ kap góa chòe-hé khì Pa-pí-lûn hó
Jeremiah40:5 Iâ-lī-bí iáu-bē lī-khui í-chêng
Jeremiah40:6 Iâ-lī-bí chiū khì Bí-su-pa
Jeremiah40:7 Tī iá-gōa
Jeremiah40:8 chiū lâi Bí-su-pa kìⁿ Ki-tāi-lī. Chiah-ê kun-koaⁿ pau-koat Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī
Jeremiah40:9 Sa-hoan ê sun
Jeremiah40:10 Góa leh
Jeremiah40:11 Hiah-ê tī Mô͘-ap
Jeremiah40:12 in chiū tùi hō͘ lâng kóaⁿ--khì ê ta̍k só͘-chāi tńg--lâi
Jeremiah40:13 Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân kap hiah-ê tī iá-gōa ê kun-koaⁿ lâi Bí-su-pa kìⁿ Ki-tāi-lī
Jeremiah40:14 tùi i kóng
Jeremiah40:15 Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân tī Bí-su-pa su-hā tùi Ki-tāi-lī kóng
Jeremiah40:16 A-hi-kam ê kiáⁿ Ki-tāi-lī kā Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân kóng
Jeremiah41:1 Chhit--ge̍h
Jeremiah41:2 Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī kap hit cha̍p ê kap i chòe-hé lâi ê lâng
Jeremiah41:3 Í-si̍t-má-lī mā thâi-sí tī Bí-su-pa só͘-ū kap Ki-tāi-lī chòe-hé ê Iû-tāi -lâng
Jeremiah41:4 Keh-ji̍t
Jeremiah41:5 ū poeh-cha̍p ê lâng tùi Sī-kiàm
Jeremiah41:6 Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī tùi Bí-su-pa chhut--lâi
Jeremiah41:7 In chi̍t-ē ji̍p-siâⁿ
Jeremiah41:8 Hit poeh-cha̍p ê lâng tiong-kan ū cha̍p ê tùi Í-si̍t-má-lī kóng
Jeremiah41:9 Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī chiong hiah-ê in-ūi Ki-tāi-lī ê iân-kò͘ hō͘ i thâi-sí ê lâng ê sin-si
Jeremiah41:10 Í-si̍t-má-lī chiong Bí-su-pa chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê jîn-bîn
Jeremiah41:11 Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân kap kun-tè i ê kun-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī só͘ chòe ê pháiⁿ tāi-chì
Jeremiah41:12 chiū chhōa só͘-ū ê pō͘-hā beh khì kap Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī kau-chiàn
Jeremiah41:13 Hō͘ Í-si̍t-má-lī lia̍h--khì hiah-ê jîn-bîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân í-ki̍p kap i chòe-hé lâi ê kun-koaⁿ
Jeremiah41:14 Án-ni
Jeremiah41:15 Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī kap lēng-gōa poeh ê lâng thoat-lī Iok-hap-lân ê chhiú
Jeremiah41:16 Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī thâi-sí A-hi-kam ê kiáⁿ Ki-tāi-lī liáu-āu
Jeremiah41:17 In khì kàu Pek-lī-hêng hù-kūn ê Ki-lô-tek Kim-hán
Jeremiah41:18 thang tô-pī Pa-pí-lûn -lâng. Nî-thàm-ngá ê kiáⁿ Í-si̍t-má-lī àm-sat Pa-pí-lûn -ông só͘ chí-phài chòe séng-tiúⁿ
Jeremiah42:1 Só͘-ū ê kun-koaⁿ

Jeremiah42:7 Cha̍p ji̍t āu

Jeremiah42:22 Só͘-í
Jeremiah43:1 Iâ-lī-bí tùi jîn-bîn thoân-ta̍t Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè chhe-phài i kóng it-chhè ê ōe
Jeremiah43:2 Hô-sa-ngá ê kiáⁿ A-sat-lī-ngá
Jeremiah43:3 sī Nî-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Pa-lio̍k sái-lōng lí hoán-tùi goán
Jeremiah43:4 Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân
Jeremiah43:5 Ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hap-lân kap só͘-ū ê kun-koaⁿ tian-tò chiong Iû-tāi só͘-ū chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê lâng
Jeremiah43:6 pau-koat ta-po͘-lâng
Jeremiah43:7 lóng chòe-hé chhōa-khì Ai-ki̍p kàu Tap-pí-le̍k. Iok-hap-lân kap i ê pō͘-hā bô thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng Chú ê ōe.
Jeremiah43:8 Tī Tap-pí-le̍k
Jeremiah43:9 “Lí tio̍h tī Iû-tāi -lâng ê bīn-chêng the̍h kúi lia̍p tōa lia̍p chio̍h-thâu

Jeremiah43:12 Góa beh sio Ai-ki̍p ê sîn-biō. Pa-pí-lûn -ông beh kā Ai-ki̍p ta̍k-hāng chhiúⁿ-liáu-liáu
Jeremiah43:13 I it-tēng ōe kòng-chhùi Ai-ki̍p thài-iông sîn-biō ê thiāu-siōng
Jeremiah44:1 Ē-bīn sī koan-hē tòa tī Ai-ki̍p ê Bi̍t-toa̍t
Jeremiah44:2 “Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah44:3 Che sī in-ūi in ū chòe siâ-ok ê sū
Jeremiah44:4 Góa chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn chhe-phài góa ê po̍k-jîn chin chōe sian-ti khì kā in kóng: Lín chhian-bān m̄-thang chòe góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ oàn-hūn ê sū.
Jeremiah44:5 M̄-kú in m̄ thiaⁿ
Jeremiah44:6 Só͘-í
Jeremiah44:7 “Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah44:8 Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ tô-lān lâi Ai-ki̍p
Jeremiah44:9 Lín kiám í-keng bōe-kì-tit lín ê chó͘-sian
Jeremiah44:10 Kàu kin-á-ji̍t
Jeremiah44:11 “Só͘-í
Jeremiah44:12 Chiah-ê koat-sim lâi Ai-ki̍p kià-ku chhun--lo̍h-lâi ê Iû-tāi -lâng
Jeremiah44:13 Góa án-chóaⁿ ēng chiàn-loān
Jeremiah44:14 hō͘ chiah-ê lâi Ai-ki̍p kià-ku iáu oa̍h--teh ê Iû-tāi -lâng
Jeremiah44:15 Kui tōa-tīn tòa tī Ai-ki̍p -tōe Pa-te̍k-lô ê Iû-tāi -lâng
Jeremiah44:16 “Goán bô beh thiaⁿ lí hōng Siōng Chú ê miâ tùi goán kóng ê ōe.
Jeremiah44:17 Goán it-tēng beh chiàu goán hē ê goān khì chòe
Jeremiah44:18 M̄-kú goán chi̍t-ē bô kā Thian-hō͘ sio-hiuⁿ
Jeremiah44:19 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng mā kóng
Jeremiah44:20 Iâ-lī-bí kā hiah-ê hôe-tap i ê ta-po͘-lâng kap cha-bó͘-lâng kóng
Jeremiah44:21 “Lín kap lín ê chó͘-sian
Jeremiah44:22 Lín siâ-ok ê hêng-ûi kap só͘ chòe khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
Jeremiah44:23 Lín kā pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng sio-hiuⁿ
Jeremiah44:24 Iâ-lī-bí koh kā choân-pō͘ ê lâng
Jeremiah44:25 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah44:26 Lín só͘-ū tòa tī Ai-ki̍p ê Iû-tāi -lâng
Jeremiah44:27 Lín tio̍h chai
Jeremiah44:28 Sui-jiân ū lâng ōe-tàng thoat-lī chiàn-loān
Jeremiah44:29 Góa beh tī chia kā lín hêng-hoa̍t. Che sī góa hō͘ lín ê tiāu-thâu
Jeremiah44:30 Siōng Chú koh án-ni kóng: Góa beh chiong Ai-ki̍p -ông Hoat-ló Ha̍p-hut-la kau hō͘ siūⁿ-beh thâi i ê tùi-te̍k
Jeremiah45:1 Iok-se-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-ngá-kèng choh Iû-tāi -ông tē-sì nî
Jeremiah45:2 “ Pa-lio̍k ah
Jeremiah45:3 ‘Lí ū teh kóng: Góa ū-kàu chhám; Siōng Chú tī góa thòng-khó͘ ê sî koh ke-thiⁿ góa ê iu-chhiû. Góa thó͘-khùi thó͘ kah chin siān
Jeremiah45:4 Siōng-tè hoan-hù Iâ-lī-bí tio̍h kā Pa-lio̍k kóng
Jeremiah45:5 Lí teh ūi ka-kī tô͘-bô͘ tōa-sū sī--bô? M̄-thang tô͘-bô͘. Khòaⁿ leh
Jeremiah46:1 Koan-hē lia̍t-kok
Jeremiah46:2 Chiam-tùi Ai-ki̍p: Koan-hē Ai-ki̍p -ông Nî-ko ê kun-tūi
Jeremiah46:3 “Tio̍h chún-pī tōa-sòe tún-pâi
Jeremiah46:4 Tio̍h thò bé-oaⁿ
Jeremiah46:5 M̄-kú
Jeremiah46:6 Siōng gâu-cháu--ê mā cháu bōe lī

Jeremiah49:21 Í-tong tó-hoāi ê siaⁿ ōe hō͘ tōe tōa tín-tāng; lâng hoah-hiu ê siaⁿ ōe thàng kàu Âng-hái.
Jeremiah49:22 I ê tùi-te̍k ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ eng-chiáu thí-si̍t chhiong lo̍h-lâi kong-kek Pho-su-la; hit-sî

Jeremiah49:27

Jeremiah49:32 In ê lo̍k-tô ōe hō͘ lâng chhiúⁿ--khì; in chōe-chōe cheng-siⁿ ōe hō͘ lâng kiap--khì; góa beh kā só͘-ū thì pìn-piⁿ ê lâng kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ khì ta̍k só͘-chāi; góa beh tùi sì-chiu-ûi kàng chai-hō hō͘ in. Hā-só ōe chiâⁿ-chòe chhâi-lông tòa ê só͘-chāi

Jeremiah50:1 Ē-bīn sī koan-hē Pa-pí-lûn kap Pa-pí-lûn -lâng ê tōe

Jeremiah50:5 In lóng bīn ǹg Sek-an
Jeremiah50:6 “Góa ê chú-bîn pìⁿ-chòe sit-bê ê iûⁿ; in ê bo̍k-chiá chhōa in kiâⁿ bê-lō͘
Jeremiah50:7 Tú-tio̍h in--ê beh kā in thun-chia̍h; in ê tùi-te̍k kóng
Jeremiah50:8 “Tio̍h lī-khui Pa-pí-lûn
Jeremiah50:9 Góa beh hoat-tōng pak-hng tōa-kok ê liân-bêng chòe-hé lâi kong-kek Pa-pí-lûn. In beh pâi-tīn chìn-kong

Jeremiah50:11 Siōng Chú kóng
Jeremiah50:12 lín ê lāu-bú ōe hui-siông kiàn-siàu

Jeremiah50:17 Í-sek-lia̍t sī hō͘ sai kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ ê iûⁿ; tāi-seng hō͘ A-su̍t -ông thun-chia̍h
Jeremiah50:18 Só͘-í Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe
Jeremiah50:19 Góa beh chhōa Í-sek-lia̍t tò-tńg-lâi in ka-kī ê chháu-po͘; in beh tī Ka-bi̍t kap Pa-san chia̍h-chháu
Jeremiah50:20 Tī hit-ji̍t

Jeremiah50:26 Lín tio̍h tùi ta̍k-ê hong-hiòng chìn-kong; khui i ê chhek-chhng
Jeremiah50:27 Tio̍h thâi in só͘-ū ê chiàn-sū
Jeremiah50:28 Tùi Pa-pí-lûn tô-cháu--chhut-lâi ê lān-bîn kóng

Jeremiah50:30 In ê siàu-liân-lâng ōe tī kóng-tiûⁿ hō͘ lâng thâi-sí; kâng hit-ji̍t

Jeremiah50:32 Kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng ōe poa̍h-tó
Jeremiah50:33 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe án-ni kóng
Jeremiah50:34 Kiù-sio̍k in--ê sī Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe

Jeremiah50:36 To-kiàm ōe lâi kong-kek su̍t-sū
Jeremiah50:37 To-kiàm ōe lâi kong-kek i ê chiàn-bé chiàn-chhia
Jeremiah50:38 I ê hô-liû in-ūi khòng-hān ta-khok-khok; i sī pài ngó͘-siōng ê kok-ka

Jeremiah50:46 Pa-pí-lûn tó-hoāi ê siaⁿ hō͘ tōe tōa tín-tāng; lâng ai-khàu ê siaⁿ thàng kàu lia̍t-pang.”
Jeremiah51:1 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Jeremiah51:2 Góa beh phài gōa-kok-lâng lâi chhim-hoān Pa-pí-lûn
Jeremiah51:3 M̄-thang hō͘ Pa-pí-lûn siā-chìⁿ ê peng siā-chìⁿ
Jeremiah51:4 Pa-pí-lûn -lâng ōe tī ka-kī ê siâⁿ-chhī siū-thâi
Jeremiah51:5 Í-sek-lia̍t kap Iû-tāi sui-jiân tī ta̍k só͘-chāi tek-chōe góa Í-sek-lia̍t sîn-sèng ê Siōng-tè
Jeremiah51:6 Tio̍h kóaⁿ-kín tô-cháu
Jeremiah51:7 Pa-pí-lûn í-chêng sī Siōng Chú chhiú-tiong ê kim-poe
Jeremiah51:8 Pa-pí-lûn ōe hut-jiân tó-hoāi
Jeremiah51:9 Tòa tī Pa-pí-lûn ê gōa-kok-lâng kóng

Jeremiah51:15 Siōng Chú ēng ka-kī ê tāi-lêng chhòng-chō tāi-tōe
Jeremiah51:16 Siōng Chú chi̍t-ē chhut-siaⁿ
Jeremiah51:17 Sè-kan-lâng lóng gû-gōng bû-ti; ta̍k-ê phah-kim sai-hū lóng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī chō ê sîn-siōng kiàn-siàu; in-ūi in chù ê sîn-siōng lóng sī hu-ké
Jeremiah51:18 Ngó͘-siōng lóng sī hu-ké
Jeremiah51:19 Choh Ngá-kok sán-gia̍p ê Siōng-tè kap in bô kâng-khoán; I sī chhòng-chō bān-iú ê Chú; Í-sek-lia̍t sī I ê chú-bîn
Jeremiah51:20 Siōng Chú kóng
Jeremiah51:21 bat ēng lí phah-pāi chiàn-bé kap khiâ-bé--ê; phah-chhùi chiàn-chhia kap sái-chhia--ê;
Jeremiah51:22 bat ēng lí thâi-sí ta-po͘-lâng kap hū-jîn-lâng; thâi-sí lāu-lâng kap gín-á; thâi-sí siàu-liân-lâng kap siàu-lú;
Jeremiah51:23 bat ēng lí thâi-sí bo̍k-chiá kap i ê iûⁿ-kûn; thâi-sí choh-sit-lâng kap i ê gû; thâi-sí chóng-tok kap koaⁿ-oân.”
Jeremiah51:24 Siōng Chú kóng
Jeremiah51:25 Pa-pí-lûn ah
Jeremiah51:26 Lâng bōe koh tùi lí hia the̍h chio̍h-thâu chòe chhù-kak-chio̍h
Jeremiah51:27 “Tio̍h tī kéng-lāi chhāi tōa-kî chòe sìn-hō
Jeremiah51:28 Tio̍h chio-chi̍p lia̍t-kok
Jeremiah51:29 Tōe tōa tín-tāng koh tńg-se̍h; in-ūi Siōng Chú kong-kek Pa-pí-lûn ê chí-ì í-keng khak-tēng
Jeremiah51:30 Pa-pí-lûn ê ióng-sū bô beh koh kau-chiàn
Jeremiah51:31 Sàng-phoe--ê liân-sòa cháu--lâi
Jeremiah51:32 hô ê tō͘-kháu hō͘ te̍k-jîn chiàm--khì
Jeremiah51:33 Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe

Jeremiah51:35 Sek-an ê chū-bîn kóng: “ Pa-pí-lûn -lâng ge̍k-thāi goán kap goán ê chhin-cho̍k
Jeremiah51:36 Só͘-í Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Jeremiah51:37 Pa-pí-lûn beh pìⁿ-chòe thô͘-tui
Jeremiah51:38 Pa-pí-lûn chhin-chhiūⁿ ióng-béng ê sai hm̄-hm̄-háu
Jeremiah51:39 In ê si̍t-io̍k chi̍t-ē khí
Jeremiah51:40

Jeremiah52:1 Se-tí-ka chē-ūi ê sî jī-cha̍p-it hè
Jeremiah52:2 I chòe Siōng Chú khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ ê sū
Jeremiah52:3 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kap Iû-tāi hoat-seng chiah-ê sū
Jeremiah52:4 Se-tí-ka thóng-tī tē-káu nî
Jeremiah52:5 Siâⁿ siū ûi-khùn
Jeremiah52:6 Sì-ge̍h chhoe-káu
Jeremiah52:7 siâⁿ siū kong-phòa; só͘-ū ê peng-sū thàu-mî tùi ông-kiong hoe-hn̂g hù-kūn
Jeremiah52:8 Pa-pí-lûn ê kun-peng tui-jip Se-tí-ka -ông

Jeremiah52:10 Pa-pí-lûn -ông thâi-sí Se-tí-ka ê kiáⁿ
Jeremiah52:11 Koh ó͘ i nn̄g lúi ba̍k-chiu
Jeremiah52:12 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Nî-pò͘-kah-nî-sat tē-cha̍p-káu nî
Jeremiah52:13 ēng hé sio Siōng Chú ê sèng-tiān
Jeremiah52:14 Tè sī-ōe-tiúⁿ ê Pa-pí-lûn kun-peng chiong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sì-ûi ê siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ lóng thiah-húi.

Lamentations1:1 Ài ah! Chit-ê chá-chêng lâng-khoeh-lâng ê siâⁿ-chhī
Lamentations1:2 I kui-mî ai-khàu
Lamentations1:3 Iû-tāi liû-bông tī gōa-pang
Lamentations1:4 Thàng kàu Sek-an ê tōa-lō͘ ai-siong
Lamentations1:5 I ê tùi-te̍k pìⁿ-chòe chú-lâng; i ê siû-jîn hoân-êng sáng-sè. In-ūi i chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn pōe-poān
Lamentations1:6 Sek-an ê êng-hôa í-keng siau-sit. I ê léng-siù chhin-chhiūⁿ chhē bô chháu-tiûⁿ ê lo̍k; in siám-pī tui-jip in ê lâng

Ezekiel1:2 Chit-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng tī Iok-ngá-kun -ông siū-lia̍h khì Pa-pí-lûn í-āu tē-gō͘ nî.
Ezekiel1:3 Tī Pa-pí-lûn ê Ka-pa-ló͘ hô-piⁿ
Ezekiel1:4 Góa teh koan-khòaⁿ ê sî
Ezekiel1:5 Tī tiong-ng ū chhut-hiān sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h: In ê hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng
Ezekiel1:6 ta̍k-ê lóng ū sì ê bīn
Ezekiel1:7 in ê kha ti̍t-ti̍t
Ezekiel1:8 tī ta̍k-ki si̍t-kó͘ ē-bīn ū lâng ê chhiú. Sì ê bīn
Ezekiel1:9 In ê si̍t lóng saⁿ liân-chiap; hêng-tōng ê sî m̄-bián tńg-sin
Ezekiel1:10 Sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h kok ū sì khoán bīn: Thâu-chêng ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng
Ezekiel1:11 In ê si̍t ǹg téng-bīn thí-khui
Ezekiel1:12 Ta̍k-ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê bīn hiòng-chêng
Ezekiel1:13 Chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ teh to̍h ê hé-thòaⁿ
Ezekiel1:14 Chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h chêng-āu chông-lâi-chông-khì
Ezekiel1:15 Góa teh koan-khòaⁿ chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê sî
Ezekiel1:16 Sì ê lián-á lāi-gōa ê hêng-chōng lóng kâng-khoán
Ezekiel1:17 Chit sì ê lián-á tín-tāng ê sî
Ezekiel1:18 Sì ê lián-á ê lián-kheng
Ezekiel1:19 Chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h hêng-tōng ê sî
Ezekiel1:20 Oa̍h-mi̍h ê sim-ì beh khì tó-ūi
Ezekiel1:21 Tng oa̍h-mi̍h hêng-tōng
Ezekiel1:22 Chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê thâu-khak téng ū kiong-chhong ê hêng-chōng
Ezekiel1:23 Tī kiong-chhong ē-bīn
Ezekiel1:24 Oa̍h-mi̍h hêng-tōng ê sî
Ezekiel1:25 M̄-kú oa̍h-mi̍h thêng--teh
Ezekiel1:26 Tī oa̍h-mi̍h thâu-khak téng ê kiong-chhong téng-bīn
Ezekiel1:27 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i ê io téng-koân chhin-chhiūⁿ ōe sih ê kim-sio̍k hiah-ni̍h kng
Ezekiel1:28 Chiu-ûi ê kong-hui chhin-chhiūⁿ lo̍h-hō͘ ê sî hûn-tiong ê khēng kâng-khoán. Che chiū-sī Siōng Chú hián-hiān ê sî êng-kng ê hêng-chōng. Góa chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê kéng-siōng

Ezekiel2:9 Khòaⁿ leh
Ezekiel2:10 I tī góa ê bīn-chêng thí-khui hit-kńg chheh-kǹg; góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chheh ê siang-bīn lóng ū siá-jī
Ezekiel3:1 Siōng-tè tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel3:2 Só͘-í góa chhùi peh-khui
Ezekiel3:3 I koh kóng
Ezekiel3:4 Siōng-tè kā góa kóng
Ezekiel3:5 Góa m̄-sī phài lí khì gú-giân oh-tit lí-kái ê bîn-cho̍k hia
Ezekiel3:6 Góa m̄-sī phài lí khì gú-giân bōe thong
Ezekiel3:7 M̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn m̄-khéng thiaⁿ lí ê ōe
Ezekiel3:8 Góa beh hō͘ lí ì-chì kian-tēng ōe-tàng kap in tùi-khòng.
Ezekiel3:9 Góa beh hō͘ lí ê ì-chì chhin-chhiūⁿ soān-chio̍h
Ezekiel3:10 Siōng-tè koh tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel3:11 Lí tio̍h khì liû-bông ê tông-pau hia
Ezekiel3:12 Hit-sî
Ezekiel3:13 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chiah-ê oa̍h-mi̍h tī khong-tiong teh pe
Ezekiel3:14 Siōng-tè ê sîn kā góa giâ--khí-lâi
Ezekiel3:15 Án-ni
Ezekiel3:16 Chhit ji̍t āu
Ezekiel3:17 “Jîn-chú
Ezekiel3:18 Nā-sī góa soan-pò͘ bó͘ chi̍t ê siâ-ok ê lâng it-tēng tio̍h sí
Ezekiel3:19 Lí nā ū kéng-kò hit-ê lâng m̄-thang kè-sio̍k choh-pháiⁿ
Ezekiel3:20 “Nā-sī gī-lâng lī-khui chiàⁿ-lō͘ khì choh-pháiⁿ
Ezekiel3:21 M̄-kú lí nā ū kéng-kò i m̄-thang hoān-chōe
Ezekiel3:22 Siōng Chú ê khùi-la̍t chhiong-móa góa; I kā góa kóng
Ezekiel3:23 Góa chiū khí--lâi

Ezekiel4:1 Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel4:2 koh tī siâⁿ sì-chiu-ûi khí koân-thah
Ezekiel4:3 Jiân-āu
Ezekiel4:4 “Lí tio̍h tó tò-pêng lâi taⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chōe-kò ê hêng-hoa̍t. Lí tó kúi ji̍t
Ezekiel4:5 Góa í-keng koat-tēng lí tó ê ji̍t-sò͘
Ezekiel4:6 Chit-ê sū liáu-āu
Ezekiel4:7 “Lí tio̍h bīn ǹg siū ûi-khùn ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng -siâⁿ
Ezekiel4:8 Góa beh kā lí pa̍k--khí-lâi
Ezekiel4:9 “Liáu-āu

Ezekiel4:11 Lí múi-ji̍t lim ê chúi sī pòaⁿ kong-seng

Ezekiel5:1 Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel5:2 Siâⁿ siū ûi-khùn ê ji̍t-chí móa liáu-āu

Ezekiel7:2 “Jîn-chú ah
Ezekiel7:3 “ Í-sek-lia̍t ah! Lí ê chiong-kio̍k kàu lah. Góa beh tùi lí hoat tōa siū-khì. Góa beh chiàu lí ê hêng-ûi sím-phòaⁿ lí
Ezekiel7:4 Góa bô beh lîn-bín lí
Ezekiel7:5 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh kóng
Ezekiel7:6 Lí ê chiong-kio̍k kūn lah! Lí ê chiong-kio̍k kàu lah! Khòaⁿ leh
Ezekiel7:7 Kok-lāi ê chū-bîn

Ezekiel7:15 Siōng Chú kóng

Ezekiel7:18 In beh chhēng môa-saⁿ
Ezekiel7:19 In beh chiong kim gûn hiat tī koe-lō͘
Ezekiel7:20 In bat khoa-kháu in súi ê chu-pó
Ezekiel7:21 “Góa beh hō͘ gōa-cho̍k-lâng kā i chhiúⁿ-toa̍t

Ezekiel15:8 In-ūi in tùi góa put-tiong
Ezekiel16:1 Siōng Chú koh tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel16:2 “Jîn-chú
Ezekiel16:3 Tio̍h kā Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kóng
Ezekiel16:4 Lí chhut-sì ê sî
Ezekiel16:5 Bô lâng khó-lîn lí
Ezekiel16:6 “‘Góa kiâⁿ-lō͘ tùi lí hia keng-kè
Ezekiel16:7 Góa chai-pôe lí
Ezekiel16:8 “‘Góa tùi lí hia keng-kè
Ezekiel16:9 “‘Góa ēng chúi kā lí seng-khu ê huih sóe chheng-khì
Ezekiel16:10 Góa hō͘ lí chhēng siù-hoe ê súi-saⁿ
Ezekiel16:11 Góa kā lí soe-chng-táⁿ-pān
Ezekiel16:12 phīⁿ-khoân
Ezekiel16:13 Án-ni
Ezekiel16:14 In-ūi góa — Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kā lí chng-thāⁿ
Ezekiel16:15 “‘M̄-kú lí khò-sè ka-kī ê bí-māu kap miâ-siaⁿ khì chòe chhiong-ki
Ezekiel16:16 Lí ēng lí ê saⁿ chng-thāⁿ soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ
Ezekiel16:17 Lí the̍h góa hō͘ lí kùi-tiōng ê kim-gûn chu-pó
Ezekiel16:18 Lí ēng góa hō͘ lí siù-hoe ê súi-saⁿ kā in moa--teh
Ezekiel16:19 Lí koh chiong góa hō͘ lí ê niû-si̍t
Ezekiel16:20 “‘Lí sīm-chì chiong lí kap góa siⁿ ê hāu-siⁿ
Ezekiel16:21 Lí koh thâi góa ê jî-lú tòng-chòe chè-mi̍h ēng hé sio
Ezekiel16:22 Lí chòe ki-lú kap chòe thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
Ezekiel16:23 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kè-sio̍k kóng
Ezekiel16:24 koh tī siâⁿ-lāi khí-chō hoe-lâu
Ezekiel16:25 Lí tī koe-thâu-hāng-bé khí-chō koân-tâi
Ezekiel16:26 Lí kap hò͘ⁿ-sek ê chhù-piⁿ Ai-ki̍p kiâⁿ-îm; lí hòng-chhiòng chêng-io̍k lâi jiá góa siū-khì.
Ezekiel16:27 “‘Só͘-í
Ezekiel16:28 “‘M̄-kú
Ezekiel16:29 Lí koh kap gâu chòe seng-lí ê Pa-pí-lûn kiâⁿ-îm; chiū-sī án-ni
Ezekiel16:30 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh kóng
Ezekiel16:31 Lí tī lō͘-thâu chō hoe-lâu
Ezekiel16:32 lí sī îm-hū
Ezekiel16:33 Ki-lú sī kā lâng the̍h lé-mi̍h
Ezekiel16:34 Lí kap it-poaⁿ ê ki-lú bô siâng-khoán
Ezekiel16:35 Taⁿ
Ezekiel16:36 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel16:37 Só͘-í
Ezekiel16:38 Góa beh sím-phòaⁿ lí
Ezekiel16:39 Góa beh chiong lí kau tī in ê chhiú; in beh thiah-húi lí ê hoe-lâu
Ezekiel16:40 “In beh chhōa kûn-chiòng lâi kong-kek lí
Ezekiel16:41 In beh pàng-hé sio lí ê chhù
Ezekiel16:42 Án-ni
Ezekiel16:43 Lí bōe-kì-tit sòe-hàn ê sî góa án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lí
Ezekiel16:44 Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel16:45 Lí chin-chiàⁿ kap lí ê lāu-bú siâng-khoán
Ezekiel16:46 “Lí ê tōa-chí sī Sat-má-lī-a; i kap i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tòa tī lí ê pak-pêng. Lí ê sió-bē sī Só͘-to-má; i kap i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tòa tī lí ê lâm-pêng.
Ezekiel16:47 Lí o̍h in ê só͘-chòe
Ezekiel16:48 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh kóng
Ezekiel16:49 Khòaⁿ leh
Ezekiel16:50 In kiau-ngō͘
Ezekiel16:51 “ Sat-má-lī-a hoān ê chōe khah bô lí ê chi̍t-pòaⁿ. Lí só͘ chòe khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū pí in koh-khah chōe. Lí só͘ chòe khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū soah hō͘ lí ê chí-bē pí lí khah chèng-ti̍t.
Ezekiel16:52 Lí kì-jiân ūi-tio̍h lí ê chí-bē piān-hō͘
Ezekiel16:53 Siōng Chú tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kóng
Ezekiel16:54 án-ni
Ezekiel16:55 Só͘-to-má kap Sat-má-lī-a í-ki̍p in ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ beh hôe-ho̍k chá-chêng ê sēng-hóng. Lí kap lí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ mā it-tēng ōe án-ni.
Ezekiel16:56 Tī lí chhia-iāⁿ
Ezekiel16:57 
Ezekiel16:58 Lí beh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê îm-loān kap só͘ chòe khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū siū pò-èng.” Siōng Chú án-ni soan-pò͘.
Ezekiel16:59 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel16:60 Sui-jiân sī án-ni
Ezekiel16:61 Lí chiap-la̍p lí ê tōa-chí sió-bē ê sî
Ezekiel16:62 Góa beh kian-li̍p góa kap lí li̍p ê iok
Ezekiel16:63 Góa beh sià-bián lí só͘ hoān it-chhè ê chōe-kò
Ezekiel17:1 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel17:2 “Jîn-chú
Ezekiel17:3 Lí tio̍h kā in kóng
Ezekiel17:4 tok-tn̄g pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū chhiū-bé iù-nńg ê ki
Ezekiel17:5 I koh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t the̍h chéng-chí chai tī pûi ê tōe
Ezekiel17:6 Chéng-chí puh-gê seng-tióng
Ezekiel17:7 “‘Lēng-gōa ū chi̍t chiah tōa eng-chiáu
Ezekiel17:8 Kî-si̍t
Ezekiel17:9 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh kóng
Ezekiel17:10 Lí khòaⁿ
Ezekiel17:11 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel17:12 “Lí kā hiah-ê pōe-ge̍k ê lâng mn̄g
Ezekiel17:13 koh tùi Iû-tāi ông-cho̍k tiong soán chi̍t ê lâng
Ezekiel17:14 hō͘ Iû-tāi -kok soe-bî bô hoat-tō͘ hoán-khòng
Ezekiel17:15 M̄-kú Iû-tāi -ông hoán-poān. I phài sù-chiá khì Ai-ki̍p iau-kiû chiàn-bé kap tāi-kun lâi chi-oān. I kiám ōe sêng-kong? Chòe chit-chióng tāi-chì ê lâng
Ezekiel17:16 “Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel17:17 Tng tùi-te̍k Pa-pí-lûn -ông lâi kong-siâⁿ
Ezekiel17:18 I ûi-pōe ka-kī chiù-chōa ê ōe
Ezekiel17:19 “Só͘-í
Ezekiel17:20 Góa beh siat lô-bāng
Ezekiel17:21 Só͘-ū tô-cháu ê chiàn-sū ōe chiàn-sí
Ezekiel17:22 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Ezekiel17:23 Góa beh kā i chai tī Í-sek-lia̍t ê koân-soaⁿ téng; i beh hoat-ki
Ezekiel17:24 Chhân-iá só͘-ū ê chhiū-ba̍k lóng beh chai: Góa Siōng Chú hō͘ tōa-châng chhiū pìⁿ sòe-châng
Ezekiel18:1 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel18:2 “Lín Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ná ū chit-kù sio̍k-gú
Ezekiel18:3 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Ezekiel18:4 Múi chi̍t ê lâng ê sìⁿ-miā lóng sī góa ê; pē-bú ê sìⁿ-miā sio̍k tī góa
Ezekiel18:5 “Nā ū lâng chèng-ti̍t
Ezekiel18:6 I bô chia̍h soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ sîn-biō ê chè-mi̍h
Ezekiel18:7 bô khi-ap lâng
Ezekiel18:8 chioh-chîⁿ hō͘ lâng bô the̍h lī-sek
Ezekiel18:9 Chit-chióng lâng ho̍k-chiông góa ê kui-lē
Ezekiel18:10 “Chit-ê lâng nā ū kiáⁿ chòe kiông-tō
Ezekiel18:11 
Ezekiel18:12 khi-ap khùn-khó͘ kap sàn-chhiah ê lâng
Ezekiel18:13 chioh-chîⁿ hō͘ lâng the̍h lī-sek koh the̍h tāng-lī. Chit-chióng lâng kiám ōe-tàng pó-chûn sìⁿ-miā? Bōe! I chòe chiah-ê khó-ò͘ⁿ ê sū
Ezekiel18:14 “Chit-ê pháiⁿ-lâng nā ū chi̍t ê kiáⁿ
Ezekiel18:15 I bô chia̍h soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ sîn-biō ê chè-mi̍h
Ezekiel18:16 bô khi-ap lâng
Ezekiel18:17 bô siong-hāi sàn-chhiah-lâng
Ezekiel18:18 I ê lāu-pē in-ūi khi-ap lâng
Ezekiel18:19 “Lín teh mn̄g
Ezekiel18:20 Chí-ū hoān-chōe ê lâng tio̍h sí. Hāu-siⁿ m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h lāu-pē ê chōe siū hêng-hoa̍t; lāu-pē mā m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h hāu-siⁿ ê chōe siū hêng-hoa̍t. Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng beh in-ūi choh-hó tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ; pháiⁿ-lâng beh in-ūi choh-pháiⁿ siū hêng-hoa̍t.
Ezekiel18:21 “Pháiⁿ-lâng nā hóe-kái
Ezekiel18:22 I só͘ hoān it-chhè ê chōe lóng ōe siū sià-bián; i beh in-ūi i chòe ê hó-sū pó-chûn sìⁿ-miā.
Ezekiel18:23 Pháiⁿ-lâng sí-bông
Ezekiel18:24 “Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng nā lī-khui chiàⁿ-lō͘ khì choh-pháiⁿ
Ezekiel18:25 “M̄-kú lín kóng
Ezekiel18:26 Chèng-ti̍t ê lâng nā lī-khui chiàⁿ-lō͘ khì choh-pháiⁿ
Ezekiel18:27 Pháiⁿ-lâng hóe-kái
Ezekiel18:28 I séng-chhat ka-kī
Ezekiel18:29 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ah
Ezekiel18:30 “Só͘-í
Ezekiel18:31 Tio̍h pàng-sak lín só͘ chòe it-chhè ê pháiⁿ-sū
Ezekiel18:32 Góa bô ài ū lâng sí. Lín hóe-kái chiū ōe-tàng pó-chûn sìⁿ-miā.” Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú án-ni soan-pò͘.
Ezekiel19:1 Lí tio̍h ūi Í-sek-lia̍t ê léng-siù chhiùⁿ ai-ko:
Ezekiel19:2 Lí ê lāu-bú sī sai-bú
Ezekiel19:3 I kā chi̍t chiah sòe-chiah sai-á chhī tōa-chiah
Ezekiel19:4 Lia̍t-kok thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
Ezekiel19:5 Sai-bú khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i ê kî-thāi lo̍k-khong
Ezekiel19:6 Siàu-chòng ê sai tī sai-kûn tiong kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì; i o̍h ōe-hiáu lia̍h la̍h-bu̍t
Ezekiel19:7 I phò-hoāi siâⁿ-pó
Ezekiel19:8 Chiu-ûi ê lia̍t-kok tùi sì-bīn ûi-kong i; in siat lô-bāng
Ezekiel19:9 In ēng kau-á kā i kau--teh
Ezekiel19:10 Lí ê lāu-bú chhin-chhiūⁿ phû-tô-chhiū
Ezekiel19:11 I ê chhiū-ki ióng koh tēng
Ezekiel19:12 M̄-kú
Ezekiel19:13 Taⁿ i siū sóa-chai tī khòng-iá
Ezekiel19:14 Chhiū-châng to̍h-hé
Ezekiel20:1 Tē-chhit nî gō͘-ge̍h chhoe-cha̍p

Ezekiel20:5 Lí tio̍h kā in kóng
Ezekiel20:6 Hit-sî

Ezekiel20:8 M̄-kú in pōe-ge̍k góa
Ezekiel20:9 Chóng-sī góa bô án-ni chòe. Góa bô beh hō͘ góa ê miâ tī in khiā-khí ê lia̍t-kok tiong siū siat-to̍k; in-ūi góa bat tī in khiā-khí ê lia̍t-kok jîn-bîn ê bīn-chêng tùi in kóng
Ezekiel20:10 “Só͘-í
Ezekiel20:11 Góa chiong góa ê kui-lē sù hō͘ in

Ezekiel20:13 M̄-kú
Ezekiel20:14 Chóng-sī góa bô án-ni chòe. Góa bô beh hō͘ góa ê miâ tī in khiā-khí ê lia̍t-kok tiong siū siat-to̍k; in-ūi góa bat tī in khiā-khí ê lia̍t-kok jîn-bîn ê bīn-chêng tùi in kóng
Ezekiel20:15 Só͘-í
Ezekiel20:16 In-ūi in khì-sak góa ê bēng-lēng
Ezekiel20:17 “Sui-jiân án-ni
Ezekiel20:18 Góa tī khòng-iá kā in ê jî-lú kéng-kò
Ezekiel20:19 Góa sī Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè. Lín tio̍h sūn-thàn góa ê kui-lē
Ezekiel20:20 tio̍h siú An-hioh-ji̍t chòe sèng-ji̍t
Ezekiel20:21 “M̄-kú
Ezekiel20:22 M̄-kú
Ezekiel20:23 Góa koh tī khòng-iá ǹg in li̍p-sè: Góa beh kā in hòng-tio̍k khì gōa-pang
Ezekiel20:24 in-ūi in bô chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng
Ezekiel20:25 “Āu-lâi
Ezekiel20:26 hō͘ in sio ka-kī ê tōa-kiáⁿ hiàn-chòe chè lâi phah lâ-sâm ka-kī. Góa beh hō͘ in kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Ezekiel20:27 “Só͘-í
Ezekiel20:28 Góa chhōa in kàu góa èng-ún beh hō͘ in ê thó͘-tōe. In chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h koân ê soaⁿ kap hoat kah chin ām ê chhiū
Ezekiel20:29 Góa mn̄g in: Lín khì hit-ê koân ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe sím-mi̍h? Chit-ê só͘-chāi kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu kiò-chòe Pa-bâ.’
Ezekiel20:30 Só͘-í
Ezekiel20:31 Lín kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu-teh sio ka-kī ê jî-lú hiàn chòe chè
Ezekiel20:32 Lín sim-lāi siūⁿ: Goán beh chhin-chhiūⁿ lia̍t-kok
Ezekiel20:33 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel20:34 Góa beh chhun-chhut tōa koân-lêng ê chhiú
Ezekiel20:35 Góa beh kā lín chhōa-khì gōa-cho̍k-lâng ê khòng-iá
Ezekiel20:36 Góa chá-chêng án-chóaⁿ tī Ai-ki̍p ê khòng-iá hêng-hoa̍t lín ê chó͘-sian
Ezekiel20:37 “Góa beh giâm-giâm koán-kàu lín
Ezekiel20:38 Góa beh tùi lín tiong-kan tû-khì pōe-ge̍k kap tek-chōe góa ê lâng; góa beh kā in tùi kià-ku ê só͘-chāi chhōa--chhut-lâi
Ezekiel20:39 “Koan-hē lín
Ezekiel20:40 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel20:41 Góa beh tùi bān-cho̍k ê tiong-kan kā lín chhōa--chhut-lâi
Ezekiel20:42 Góa beh kā lín chhōa tńg-khì lín ê kò͘-hiong Í-sek-lia̍t
Ezekiel20:43 Lín beh tī hia siūⁿ-khí í-chêng só͘ chòe it-chhè phah lâ-sâm ka-kī ê sū

Ezekiel22:6 “‘Lí khòaⁿ
Ezekiel22:7 Lín ū lâng ngó͘-ge̍k pē-bú
Ezekiel22:8 Lín biáu-sī góa ê sèng-só͘
Ezekiel22:9 Lín ū lâng chō-iâu hāi-sí lâng; ū lâng chia̍h soaⁿ-téng sîn-biō ê chè-mi̍h
Ezekiel22:10 Lín ū lâng kap lāu-pē ê bó͘ ū sèng-koan-hē
Ezekiel22:11 ū lâng kap pa̍t-lâng ê bó͘ su-thong; ū lâng kiâⁿ îm-loān bú-jio̍k sin-pū; ū lâng kā kâng-pē ê chí-bē phah lâ-sâm.
Ezekiel22:12 Lín ū lâng the̍h chîⁿ thâi-lâng; ū lâng m̄-nā chioh lâng chîⁿ the̍h lī-sek
Ezekiel22:13 “‘In-ūi lín the̍h put-gī-chi-châi kap hoān thâi-lâng ê chōe
Ezekiel22:14 Tng góa hêng-hoa̍t lín ê sî
Ezekiel22:15 Góa beh kā lí ê chū-bîn kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ khì lia̍t-kok
Ezekiel22:16 Lín beh siū lia̍t-kok bú-jio̍k

Ezekiel22:18 “Jîn-chú ah
Ezekiel22:19 Só͘-í

Ezekiel22:22 Gûn án-chóaⁿ tī thê-liān ê hé-lô͘ lāi-bīn iûⁿ--khì
Ezekiel22:23 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel22:24 “Jîn-chú ah

Ezekiel31:3 Lí khòaⁿ
Ezekiel31:4 Pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū ū chúi lūn-te̍k; tōe-hā chúi-goân hō͘ i koân-tōa. I chai-chèng ê só͘-chāi sì-chiu-ûi ū kang-hô; chi-liû koàn-ak chhân-iá só͘-ū ê chhiū-ba̍k.
Ezekiel31:5 Só͘-í
Ezekiel31:6 Khong-tiong ê pe-chiáu tī chhiū-oe choh-siū; tōe-chiūⁿ ê cháu-siù tī chhiū-ńg ē seng-sán; lia̍t-kok ê jîn-bîn lóng tī i ê ìm-ńg-ē khiā-khí.
Ezekiel31:7 Chiah-ni̍h tōa-châng koh súi ê chhiū! Chhiū koân
Ezekiel31:8 Siōng-tè hn̂g-tiong ê pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū bōe pí i khah koân; siông-chhiū ê chhiū-ki bōe pí i khah tn̂g; png-chhiū ê chhiū-oe bōe-tàng kap i pí. Siōng-tè hn̂g-tiong ê chhiū bô chi̍t châng chhin-chhiūⁿ i hiah súi.
Ezekiel31:9 Góa hō͘ i ê ki-hio̍h bō͘-sēng

Ezekiel39:7 Góa beh tī góa ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t tiong-kan hián-sī góa ê sèng-miâ
Ezekiel39:8 “‘Lín tio̍h chai! Ji̍t-kî kàu lah
Ezekiel39:9 Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k siâⁿ-tìn ê chū-bîn beh chhut-khì khioh lâng hiat-ka̍k ê kun-khì chòe hiâⁿ-hé ê chhâ
Ezekiel39:10 In m̄-bián koh khì iá-gōa khioh-chhâ
Ezekiel39:11 Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel39:12 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ūi-tio̍h beh kiat-chēng hit-tè tōe
Ezekiel39:13 Hit só͘-chāi ê lâng lóng chhut-lâi chham-ú
Ezekiel39:14 In chhit kò-ge̍h kú phài choan-lâng khì ta̍k só͘-chāi sûn-cha
Ezekiel39:15 Sûn-cha ê lâng kiâⁿ-thàu ta̍k só͘-chāi
Ezekiel39:16 Tī hia mā ū chi̍t chō siâⁿ kiò-chòe Hap-mô͘-ná
Ezekiel39:17 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel39:18 Lín beh chia̍h chiàn-sū ê bah
Ezekiel39:19 Lín beh chia̍h góa ūi-tio̍h lín chún-pī ê chè-bah; chia̍h-bah chia̍h kah pá
Ezekiel39:20 Lín beh tī góa ê iàn-se̍k chia̍h chiàn-bé
Ezekiel39:21 Siōng Chú kóng
Ezekiel39:22 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí
Ezekiel39:23 Lia̍t-kok beh bêng-pe̍k
Ezekiel39:24 Góa chiàu in ê ù-òe kap chōe-kò tùi-thāi in. Góa bīn oa̍t-cháu bô beh khòaⁿ-kò͘ in.”
Ezekiel39:25 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh kóng
Ezekiel39:26 In tī ka-kī ê hiong-thó͘ an-ku-lo̍k-gia̍p
Ezekiel39:27 Góa kā in tùi tùi-te̍k ê tōe chū-chi̍p--khí-lâi
Ezekiel39:28 Góa kā in hòng-tio̍k khì gōa-pang

Ezekiel40:1 Goán siū hòng-tio̍k ê tē-jī-cha̍p-gō͘ nî
Ezekiel40:2 Tī īⁿ-siōng tiong
Ezekiel40:3 I chhōa góa khì hia; góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê lâng
Ezekiel40:4 I tùi góa kóng
Ezekiel40:5 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sèng-tiān
Ezekiel40:6 I kàu tang-mn̂g
Ezekiel40:7 Hia mā ū siú-ōe-sek; ta̍k-keng tn̂g saⁿ kong-chhioh
Ezekiel40:8 I niû beh khì sèng-tiān ê mn̂g ê cháu-lông
Ezekiel40:9 I koh niû thàng khì sèng-tiān hit-ê cháu-lông
Ezekiel40:10 Tang-mn̂g ê siú-ōe-sek chit-pêng saⁿ keng
Ezekiel40:11 I niû tang-mn̂g ê ji̍p-kháu khoah gō͘ kong-chhioh
Ezekiel40:12 Ta̍k-keng siú-ōe-sek ê thâu-chêng lóng ū chhiûⁿ-á
Ezekiel40:13 Nn̄g pêng siú-ōe-sek ê mn̂g sio-tùi
Ezekiel40:14 I sūn chhiûⁿ niû
Ezekiel40:15 I koh tùi tōa-mn̂g-kháu chit-pêng niû kàu cháu-lông āu-bīn ê chhiûⁿ
Ezekiel40:16 Ta̍k-keng siú-ōe-sek
Ezekiel40:17 Hit-ê lâng chhōa góa khì gōa-tiâⁿ. Gōa-tiâⁿ chiu-ûi ū saⁿ-cha̍p keng pâng-keng
Ezekiel40:18 Pho͘ chio̍h ê lō͘ tùi lāi-tiâⁿ se̍h kàu gōa-tiâⁿ
Ezekiel40:19 I koh niû tùi lāi-tiâⁿ ê mn̂g kàu gōa-tiâⁿ gōa-piah ê mn̂g
Ezekiel40:20 Hit-ê lâng koh niû gōa-tiâⁿ pak-mn̂g ê tn̂g kap khoah.
Ezekiel40:21 Cháu-lông nn̄g pêng kok ū saⁿ keng siú-ōe-sek. Nn̄g pêng ê piah-thiāu í-ki̍p cháu-lông ê chhùn-chhioh kap tang-mn̂g siâng-khoán
Ezekiel40:22 Cháu-lông

Ezekiel40:24 Hit-ê lâng chhōa góa kiâⁿ tùi lâm-pêng
