Daniel5:30 Hit-àm
Daniel5:31 Bí-tí-a -lâng Tāi-liû-sū la̍k-cha̍p-jī hè ê sî
Daniel6:1 Tāi-liû-sū chiàu i ê siūⁿ-hoat
Daniel6:2 tī in ê téng-bīn koh siat-li̍p saⁿ ê chóng-tiúⁿ
Daniel6:3 Tān-í-lí in-ūi ū hui-siông hó ê lêng-sèng
Daniel6:4 In-ūi án-ni
Daniel6:5 Hiah-ê lâng chiū chham-siông
Daniel6:6 Chiah-ê chóng-tiúⁿ kap chóng-tok sio-iok lâi kìⁿ ông
Daniel6:7 Choân-kok ê chóng-tiúⁿ
Daniel6:8 Hông-siōng
Daniel6:9 Tāi-liû-sū chiū tī chit-ê kìm-lēng chhiam-sú.
Daniel6:10 Tān-í-lí thiaⁿ-tio̍h ông í-keng tī chit-ê bûn-kiāⁿ chhiam-miâ
Daniel6:11 Hiah-ê lâng tàu-tīn khì Tān-í-lí hia
Daniel6:12 chiū koh lâi kìⁿ ông
Daniel6:13 In chiū tùi ông kóng
Daniel6:14 Ông thiaⁿ-liáu hui-siông hoân-ló
Daniel6:15 Āu-lâi
Daniel6:16 Ông chiū hā-lēng lia̍h Tān-í-lí
Daniel6:17 Ū lâng poaⁿ chi̍t lia̍p tōa-lia̍p chio̍h-thâu kā sai-hia̍t ê kháu that--teh; khàm ông-ìn kap tāi-sîn ê koaⁿ-ìn
Daniel6:18 Ông tò-khì ông-kiong
Daniel6:19 Keh-ji̍t
Daniel6:20 I óa-kūn sai-hia̍t ê piⁿ--á
Daniel6:21 Tān-í-lí kóng
Daniel6:22 Góa ê Siōng-tè ū phài sù-chiá kā hiah-ê sai ê chhùi hong--khí-lâi
Daniel6:23 Ông hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí
Daniel6:24 Ông bēng-lēng
Daniel6:25 Āu-lâi
Daniel6:26 Hiān-chāi góa kàng-chí
Daniel6:27 I tháu-pàng
Daniel6:28 Tān-í-lí tī Tāi-liû-sū kap Pho-su -lâng Sài-ló͘-sū chāi-ūi ê sî
Daniel7:1 Pa-pí-lûn -ông Pek-sa-sat tē-it nî
Daniel7:2 Tān-í-lí siá kóng: Góa tī mî--sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê īⁿ-siōng: Thiⁿ ê sì-bīn hut-jiân khí tōa-hong
Daniel7:3 Ū sì chiah hêng-chōng lóng bô kâng-khoán ê tōa-chiah iá-siù tùi hái--ni̍h khí--lâi.
Daniel7:4 Thâu chi̍t chiah chhin-chhiūⁿ sai
Daniel7:5 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h tē-jī chiah siù
Daniel7:6 Góa koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah siù
Daniel7:7 Góa tī mî--sî ê īⁿ-siōng tiong iáu-teh khòaⁿ ê sî
Daniel7:8 Góa teh koan-chhat hiah-ê kak ê sî
Daniel7:9 Góa tú-teh chù-ì khòaⁿ hit-ê īⁿ-siōng ê sî
Daniel7:10 Ū hé chhin-chhiūⁿ hô-liû tùi pó-chō lâu--chhut-lâi; ho̍k-sāi i--ê ū chheng-chheng
Daniel7:11 In-ūi hit-ki kak teh kóng tōa-siaⁿ-ōe
Daniel7:12 Kî-tha hiah-ê siù
Daniel7:13 Góa koh tī àm-sî ê īⁿ-siōng tiong chù-ì khòaⁿ
Daniel7:14 niá-siū koân-pèng
Daniel7:15 Góa Tān-í-lí in-ūi khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê īⁿ-siōng sim chin iu-siong
Daniel7:16 chiū kiâⁿ óa-khì chi̍t ê teh sū-hāu ê lâng
Daniel7:17 I kóng
Daniel7:18 M̄-kú Chì-koân-chiá sèng ê chú-bîn beh tit-tio̍h chit-ê kok
Daniel7:19 Góa ài-beh koh khak-si̍t chai tē-sì chiah siù ê ì-sù. I kap hit saⁿ chiah siù bô kâng-khoán; i hui-siông khó-phàⁿ
Daniel7:20 I ê thâu ū cha̍p ki kak
Daniel7:21 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ki kak kap sèng ê chú-bîn kau-chiàn
Daniel7:22 M̄-kú tùi bān-kó͘ í-chêng chiū chûn-chāi Hit-ūi ōe lâi kàu
Daniel7:23 Hit-ê teh sū-hāu ê lâng kā góa kóng
Daniel7:24 Hit cha̍p ki kak chiū-sī tùi i ê kok ōe ū cha̍p ê ông; āu-lâi koh heng-khí chi̍t ê kap í-chêng ê ông bô kâng-khoán ê ông
Daniel7:25 I kóng-ōe te̍k-tùi Chì-koân-chiá
Daniel7:26 M̄-kú Chì-koân-chiá chi̍t-ē khai-sí sím-phòaⁿ
Daniel7:27 Chì-koân-chiá ōe chiong koân-pèng
Daniel7:28 Chit-ê sū kàu chia ûi-chí. Góa Tān-í-lí siūⁿ-liáu chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Daniel8:1 Pek-sa-sat choh-ông tē-saⁿ nî
Daniel8:2 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ka-kī tī Í-lân -séng ê Su-san siâⁿ-pó
Daniel8:3 Góa gia̍h-thâu chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ
Daniel8:4 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng ǹg sai
Daniel8:5 Góa iáu-teh siūⁿ ê sî
Daniel8:6 I khì góa tú-chiah khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Daniel8:7 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i óa-kūn hit-chiah mî-iûⁿ-káng
Daniel8:8 Chit-chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng jú lâi jú chhàng-chhiu. Kàu i siōng ióng-chòng ê sî
Daniel8:9 Tùi hit tiong-kan ê chi̍t ki kak koh siⁿ chi̍t ki sòe-ki kak
Daniel8:10 tōa kah tú-tio̍h thiⁿ-téng bān-siōng
Daniel8:11 I chū-ko chū-tāi
Daniel8:12 I kiông-pek sèng ê chú-bîn tī ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn-chè ê sū hoān-chōe; i koh chiong chin-lí hiat tī thô͘-kha. Chiah-ê sū
Daniel8:13 Āu-lâi
Daniel8:14 I kā góa kóng
Daniel8:15 Góa Tān-í-lí khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê īⁿ-siōng
Daniel8:16 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ O͘-lâi-hô hia ū lâng ê siaⁿ hoah kóng
Daniel8:17 I chiū lâi góa khiā ê só͘-chāi. I chi̍t-ē kàu
Daniel8:18 I tùi góa kóng-ōe ê sî
Daniel8:19 I kóng
Daniel8:20 “Lí khòaⁿ--tio̍h hit-chiah ū nn̄g ki kak ê mî-iûⁿ-káng sī chí Bí-tí-a -ông kap Pho-su hông-tè.
Daniel8:21 Hit-chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-káng chiū-sī Hi-la̍h -ông; nn̄g lúi ba̍k-chiu tiong-kan ê tōa-ki kak chiū-sī Hi-la̍h tē-it ê ông.
Daniel8:22 Koan-hē tōa-ki kak tn̄g--khì
Daniel8:23 “Chit sì ê kok kàu boa̍t-kî chōe-ok koàn-boán ê sî
Daniel8:24 I ê koân-pèng hui-siông tōa
Daniel8:25 I chin kan-chà
Daniel8:26 Í-siōng só͘ kóng nn̄g-chheng saⁿ-pah mî-ji̍t ê īⁿ-siōng lóng ōe hoat-seng
Daniel8:27 In-ūi án-ni góa Tān-í-lí hui-siông ià-siān
Daniel9:1 Bí-tí-a -lâng A-hap-sûi-ló͘ ê kiáⁿ Tāi-liû-sū thóng-tī Pa-pí-lûn -kok tē-it nî
Daniel9:2 chiū-sī i choh-ông ê goân-nî
Daniel9:3 Góa chiū ǹg Chú Siōng-tè kî-tó
Daniel9:4 Góa ǹg Siōng Chú — góa ê Siōng-tè kî-tó
Daniel9:5 “Goán ū hoān-chōe
Daniel9:6 lí ê po̍k-jîn chèng sian-ti bat hōng lí ê miâ tùi goán ê kun-ông
Daniel9:7 Chú ah
Daniel9:8 Siōng Chú ah
Daniel9:9 M̄-kú sui-jiân goán pōe-poān lí
Daniel9:10 
Daniel9:11 Goán só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ū ûi-hoán lí ê lu̍t-hoat
Daniel9:12 Lí ū si̍t-hiān lí tùi goán kap thóng-tī goán ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ só͘ kóng kéng-kài ê ōe
Daniel9:13 Lí hō͘ Mô͘-se lu̍t-hoat só͘ kì-chài ê chai-hō
Daniel9:14 Tùi án-ni
Daniel9:15 “Chú — goán ê Siōng-tè
Daniel9:16 Chú ah
Daniel9:17 Goán ê Siōng-tè
Daniel9:18 Góa ê Siōng-tè ah
Daniel9:19 Chú ah
Daniel9:20 Góa kè-sio̍k kóng-ōe kî-tó
Daniel9:21 Góa tú-teh kî-tó ê sî
Daniel9:22 I kā góa kóe-seh
Daniel9:23 Lí khai-sí kî-tó ê sî
Daniel9:24 “Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h lí ê tông-pau kap Sèng-siâⁿ chí-tēng chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan
Daniel9:25 Só͘-í lí tio̍h chheng-chhó liáu-kái
Daniel9:26 La̍k-cha̍p-jī lé-pài kè-liáu
Daniel9:27 I ōe tī chi̍t lé-pài lāi kap chin chōe lâng kiat-bêng; tī chi̍t lé-pài ê chi̍t-pòaⁿ kìm-chí lâng ǹg Siōng-tè hiàn-chè kap hōng-hiàn lé-mi̍h
Daniel10:1 Sài-ló͘-sū chòe Pho-su hông-tè tē-saⁿ nî
Daniel10:2 Hit-sî góa Tān-í-lí iu-siong saⁿ lé-pài.
Daniel10:3 Tī chit tiong-kan
Daniel10:4 Chiaⁿ-ge̍h jī-sì
Daniel10:5 gia̍h-thâu chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ
Daniel10:6 i ê seng-khu chhin-chhiūⁿ chhiⁿ-ge̍k
Daniel10:7 Chit-ê īⁿ-siōng chí-ū góa Tān-í-lí khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Daniel10:8 chhun góa chi̍t ê tī hia. Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê tōa ê īⁿ-siōng
Daniel10:9 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ i kóng-ōe ê siaⁿ; góa chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ--kìⁿ
Daniel10:10 Hut-jiân ū chi̍t ki chhiú kā góa bong
Daniel10:11 I tùi góa kóng
Daniel10:12 I koh kā góa kóng
Daniel10:13 M̄-kú Pho-su -kok ê siú-hō͘ thiⁿ-sài kā góa tòng tī Pho-su ê léng-siù hia jī-cha̍p-it ji̍t. Āu-lâi
Daniel10:14 Hiān-chāi góa lâi sī beh hō͘ lí bêng-pe̍k lí ê tông-pau í-āu ōe tú--tio̍h ê sū; che sī koan-hē beh lâi ê sî-kî ê īⁿ-siōng.”
Daniel10:15 I tùi góa kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî
Daniel10:16 Hut-jiân ū chi̍t ê khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng--ê lâi bong góa ê chhùi-tûn; góa chiū khui-chhùi tùi hit-ê khiā tī góa bīn-chêng--ê kóng
Daniel10:17 Góa sī chú ê po̍k-jîn
Daniel10:18 Hit-ê khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng--ê koh kā góa bong
Daniel10:19 I kóng
Daniel10:20 I chiū kóng
Daniel10:21 M̄-kú góa beh chiong chin-lí ê chheh kì-lio̍k ê sū kā lí kóng. Í-sek-lia̍t ê siú-hō͘ thiⁿ-sài Bí-ka-le̍k í-gōa
Daniel11:1 Hit-ê khòaⁿ--khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng--ê koh kóng
Daniel11:2 Hiān-chāi góa beh chiong khak-si̍t ê sū kā i kóng.” “ Pho-su ōe ū sì ê ông. Tē-sì ê ông pí í-chêng ê ông khah hù-chiok
Daniel11:3 “ Hi-la̍h ōe ū chi̍t ê ióng-béng ê ông chiáng-ak tāi-koân
Daniel11:4 I ê koân-sè chin kiông-sēng ê sî
Daniel11:5 “Lâm-hng ê ông ōe kiông--khí-lâi
Daniel11:6 Kúi-nā nî āu
Daniel11:7 M̄-kú kong-chú ê āu-thâu ū chi̍t ê khí-lâi choh-ông. I ōe chhōa kun-tūi kong-táⁿ pak-hng ê pó-lúi
Daniel11:8 koh chiong pak-hng ê sîn-bêng
Daniel11:9 Āu-lâi pak-hng ê ông ōe chhim-ji̍p lâm-hng ê léng-thó͘
Daniel11:10 “Pak-hng ê ông ê kiáⁿ ōe tiàu-chi̍p tōa-tūi kun-peng
Daniel11:11 Lâm-hng ê ông hui-siông siū-khì
Daniel11:12 Lâm-hng ê ông phah-pāi tùi-te̍k
Daniel11:13 “Pak-hng ê ông ōe chhōa pí í-chêng koh-khah chōe ê kun-peng chhut-khì kau-chiàn; kúi nî āu
Daniel11:14 Hit-sî
Daniel11:15 Pak-hng ê ông ōe koh lâi chō thô͘-tui
Daniel11:16 Lâi kong-kek lâm-hng--ê
Daniel11:17 “Ūi-tio̍h beh thui-hoan lâm-hng ê kok
Daniel11:18 Āu-lâi i chiū kái-piàn chú-ì
Daniel11:19 Liáu-āu
Daniel11:20 “Í-āu ōe ū chi̍t ê lâng sòa-chiap pak-hng ê ông-ūi. Ūi-tio̍h beh cheng-ka ông-kok ê châi-hù
Daniel11:21 “Āu-lâi ōe ū chi̍t ê pi-phí ê lâng khí--lâi. I m̄-sī ha̍p-hoat ê kè-sêng-jîn
Daniel11:22 I ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi chiong só͘-ū hoán-tùi i ê sè-le̍k choân-pō͘ chhiong-sòaⁿ
Daniel11:23 I kap pa̍t-ê kok-ka kiat-bêng
Daniel11:24 I thàn lâng bô hông-pī ê sî
Daniel11:25 “Pak-hng ê ông ōe chhōa tāi-kun choân-le̍k kong-kek lâm-hng ê ông
Daniel11:26 Bô͘-hāi lâm-hng ê ông ê lâng sī i ê chhin-sìn
Daniel11:27 Chit nn̄g ê ông lóng lāi-sim khúi-khiat; sui-jiân chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g
Daniel11:28 Pak-hng ê ông ōe tòa chin chōe châi-pó tńg-khì pún-kok. I sim-lāi hoán-tùi Siōng-tè chú-bîn ê sìn-gióng. I chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe tāi-chì
Daniel11:29 “Kàu chí-tēng ê sî-kan
Daniel11:30 In-ūi Ki-thê ê chiàn-chûn lâi kong-kek pak-hng ê ông
Daniel11:31 phài peng lâi chiàm-léng pó-lúi
Daniel11:32 I ōe ēng khúi-kè tit-tio̍h ûi-pōe sìn-gióng ê lâng ê chi-chhî
Daniel11:33 Ū tì-hūi ê léng-siù ōe kàu-tō chèng-lâng
Daniel11:34 In tī siū pek-hāi ê tiong-kan
Daniel11:35 Ū tì-hūi ê lâng ū-ê ōe siū pek-hāi
Daniel11:36 “Pak-hng ê ông ōe kè-sio̍k chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe tāi-chì
Daniel11:37 Pak-hng ê ông bô chun-tiōng i chó͘-sian ê sîn-bêng kap hū-lú kah-ì ê sîn-bêng
Daniel11:38 I kan-ta chông-pài pó-lúi ê sîn-bêng
Daniel11:39 I khò gōa-kok sîn-bêng ê pang-chān
Daniel11:40 “Boa̍t-kî kàu ê sî
Daniel11:41 Pak-hng ê ông koh ōe chhim-ji̍p pûi koh súi ê tōe
Daniel11:42 I beh koh chhun-chhiú kong-kek ta̍k-kok
Daniel11:43 I ōe chiáng-ak Ai-ki̍p ê kim-gûn châi-pó kap kùi-tiōng ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ
Daniel11:44 M̄-kú tùi tang-pêng kap pak-pêng thoân--lâi ê siau-sit hō͘ i chin hoân-ló
Daniel11:45 I beh tī hái kap súi ê sèng-soaⁿ tiong-kan tah tông-hông ê pò͘-pîⁿ. M̄-kú i ê kiat-kio̍k í-keng kàu lah
Daniel12:1 Siōng-tè ê sù-chiá kè-sio̍k tùi góa kóng
Daniel12:2 Chin chōe í-keng sí--khì ê lâng ōe koh-oa̍h; ū-ê tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê sìⁿ-miā
Daniel12:3 Ū tì-hūi ê lâng ōe hoat-kng
Daniel12:4 “ Tān-í-lí
Daniel12:5 Āu-lâi
Daniel12:6 Kî-tiong chi̍t ê tùi lēng-gōa khiā tī hô-chúi téng-bīn
Daniel12:7 Hit-ê khiā tī hô-chúi téng-bīn
Daniel12:8 Góa thiaⁿ-liáu
Daniel12:9 I kóng
Daniel12:10 It-tēng ōe ū chin chōe lâng tit-tio̍h sóe-chheng
Daniel12:11 “Tùi kìm-chí ta̍k-ji̍t hiàn-chè hō͘ Siōng-tè
Daniel12:12 Só͘-ū kian-chhî kàu chi̍t-chheng saⁿ-pah saⁿ-cha̍p-gō͘ ji̍t ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!
Daniel12:13 “Lí leh
Hosea1:1 Ē-bīn sī O͘-se-a
Hosea1:2 Siōng Chú thâu chi̍t piàn tùi Hô-se-a kóng-ōe

Hosea1:5 Kàu hit-ji̍t

Hosea1:7 Chóng-sī góa beh thiàⁿ-sioh Iû-tāi -ke
Hosea1:8 Lô Lō͘-hap-má tn̄g-lin liáu-āu
Hosea1:9 Siōng Chú kóng

Hosea2:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ah
Hosea2:2 Khì kò lín lāu-bú
Hosea2:3 chiah bián góa kā i thǹg-kng-kng
Hosea2:4 Góa bô beh thiàⁿ i ê kiáⁿ-jî
Hosea2:5 In ê lāu-bú kiâⁿ îm-loān
Hosea2:6 In-ūi án-ni
Hosea2:7 I beh khì jip hiah-ê chêng-jîn
Hosea2:8 I m̄ chai i ê ngó͘-kok
Hosea2:9 Só͘-í
Hosea2:10 Góa beh hō͘ i tī i ê chêng-jîn ê ba̍k-chiu chêng chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé tì-kàu kiàn-siàu; bô lâng ōe-tàng kiù i thoat-lī góa ê chhiú.
Hosea2:11 Góa beh hō͘ i bōe-tàng koh ū iàn-lo̍k
Hosea2:12 Góa mā beh húi-hoāi i ê phû-tô-chhiū
Hosea2:13 I í-chêng sio-hiuⁿ ho̍k-sāi Pa-le̍k
Hosea2:14 Án-ni
Hosea2:15 Tī hia góa beh chiong i ê phû-tô-hn̂g hêng i
Hosea2:16 Siōng Chú kóng
Hosea2:17 Góa bô beh hō͘ i koh kiû-kiò Pa-le̍k
Hosea2:18 “Tī hit-ji̍t
Hosea2:19 “Góa beh chhōa lí éng-oán chòe góa ê bó͘
Hosea2:20 Góa mā beh ēng tiong-si̍t chòe phèng-kim chhōa lí
Hosea2:21 Siōng Chú kóng: Tī hit-ji̍t
Hosea2:22 hō͘ tōe chhut-sán ngó͘-kok
Hosea2:23 Góa beh ūi-tio̍h góa ka-kī kā i chai-chèng tī chit-tè thó͘-tōe; góa beh thiàⁿ-sioh Lô Lō͘-hap-má
Hosea3:1 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Hosea3:2 Góa chiū ēng cha̍p-gō͘ tè gûn-á kap chi̍t-pah gō͘-cha̍p kong-kun tōa-be̍h kā i bóe--tńg-lâi.
Hosea3:3 Góa tùi i kóng
Hosea3:4 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ōe chi̍t tōaⁿ tn̂g ê sî-kan bô kun-ông
Hosea3:5 Āu-lâi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ōe koh tńg-lâi kui-sio̍k Siōng Chú — in ê Siōng-tè
Hosea4:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Hosea4:2 kan-ta teh lām-sám chiù-chōa
Hosea4:3 In-ūi án-ni
Hosea4:4 M̄-thang hō͘-siōng khòng-kò
Hosea4:5 Ji̍t--sî
Hosea4:6 Góa ê chú-bîn in-ūi bû-ti bia̍t-bông; lín m̄ sêng-jīn góa
Hosea4:7 Lín chè-si ê jîn-sò͘ jú chōe jú tek-chōe góa; só͘-í góa beh hō͘ lín ê chun-êng pìⁿ-chòe kiàn-siàu.
Hosea4:8 Lín ài góa ê chú-bîn hoān khah-chōe ê chōe
Hosea4:9 Án-ni
Hosea4:10 Lín chia̍h
Hosea4:11 Chiú kap sin-chiú ōe hō͘ lâng sit-khì liông-ti.
Hosea4:12 Góa ê chú-bîn khì mn̄g chhâ-thâu
Hosea4:13 In tī soaⁿ-téng hiàn-chè
Hosea4:14 Sui-jiân lín ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ îm-loān
Hosea4:15 Sui-jiân Í-sek-lia̍t îm-loān
Hosea4:16 Í-sek-lia̍t kò͘-chip chhin-chhiūⁿ ngī-phīⁿ ê gû-bú; Siōng Chú kiám ōe iúⁿ-chhī in
Hosea4:17 Kì-jiân Í-hoat-liân kap ngó͘-siōng kiat-liân
Hosea4:18 In lim kah chùi-bâng-bâng koh kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ-îm; in ài kiàn-siàu
Hosea4:19 Hong ōe ēng si̍t kā in kńg--khì; in hiàn hō͘ ngó͘-siōng ê chè-sū ōe hō͘ in tì-kàu kiàn-siàu.
Hosea5:1 Chè-si ah
Hosea5:2 Chiah-ê pōe-poān ê lâng tāi-khai-sat-kài
Hosea5:3 Í-hoat-liân ah
Hosea5:4 In ê só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe hō͘ in bōe-tàng kui-ǹg Siōng-tè; in-ūi in ê sim chhiong-móa îm-loān
Hosea5:5 Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiau-ngō͘ chèng-bêng in ka-kī ū-chōe; Í-hoat-liân ōe in-ūi ka-kī ê chōe poa̍h-tó sit-pāi; Iû-tāi ōe kap in siâng-khoán sit-pāi.
Hosea5:6 In beh chhōa gû-kûn iûⁿ-kûn khì chhē Siōng Chú
Hosea5:7 In tùi Siōng Chú bô tiong-si̍t
Hosea5:8 Tio̍h tī Ki-pí-a pûn sàu-kak
Hosea5:9 Hêng-hoa̍t ê ji̍t nā kàu
Hosea5:10 Iû-tāi ê siú-léng kèng-jiân pà-chiàm jîn-bîn ê thó͘-tōe; góa beh chiong góa ê siū-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi piàⁿ-lo̍h tī Iû-tāi.
Hosea5:11 Í-hoat-liân kam-goān khì tè bô lō͘-ēng ê ngó͘-siōng; in it-tēng ōe siū sím-phòaⁿ
Hosea5:12 Góa beh chhin-chhiūⁿ chiù-thâng tùi-thāi Í-hoat-liân
Hosea5:13 Í-hoat-liân khòaⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī ū pīⁿ
Hosea5:14 Góa beh chhin-chhiūⁿ sai tùi-thāi Í-hoat-liân
Hosea5:15 Taⁿ góa beh tò-khì góa ê só͘-chāi

Hosea6:2 Kè nn̄g ji̍t
Hosea6:3 Lán tio̍h jīn-bat Siōng Chú
Hosea6:4 Í-hoat-liân ah
Hosea6:5 In-ūi án-ni
Hosea6:6 Góa khah ài chû-ài
Hosea6:7 M̄-kú in chhin-chhiūⁿ A-tong pōe-iok
Hosea6:8 Ki-lia̍t sī pháiⁿ-lâng ê siâⁿ; in ê kha-jiah lóng sī thâi-lâng ê huih.

Hosea6:10 Tī Í-sek-lia̍t -ke góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ ê sū; Í-hoat-liân hoān îm-hēng

Hosea7:1 Góa siūⁿ-beh i-hó Í-sek-lia̍t ê sî
Hosea7:2 In bô siūⁿ-kóng góa ōe-kì-tit in it-chhè ê chōe-ok; in só͘ hoān ê chōe-ok kā in tîⁿ-tiâu-tiâu
Hosea7:3 Siōng Chú kóng: In chòe pháiⁿ
Hosea7:4 In lóng kiâⁿ îm-loān
Hosea7:5 Tī lán ê ông hí-khèng ê ji̍t
Hosea7:6 In chō-hoán ê sim chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-lô͘
Hosea7:7 In sim-kông-hé-jia̍t
Hosea7:8 Í-hoat-liân kap gōa-cho̍k chham-chhap; in sī bô péng-pêng ê piáⁿ.
Hosea7:9 Gōa-cho̍k-lâng kā in ê khùi-la̍t suh ta--khì
Hosea7:10 Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiau-ngō͘ chèng-bêng in ka-kī ū-chōe; sui-jiân tú-tio̍h chiah-ê sū
Hosea7:11 Í-hoat-liân chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu gōng-gōng m̄ bat pòaⁿ-hāng; in liâm-piⁿ kiû-kiò Ai-ki̍p
Hosea7:12 In khì tâu-khò ê sî
Hosea7:13 In chhám ah
Hosea7:14 In bô sêng-sim tùi góa kî-kiû
Hosea7:15 Góa thoàn-liān in
Hosea7:16 In it-ti̍t khì pài pa̍t-ê sîn-bêng
Hosea8:1 Siōng Chú kóng: Tio̍h pûn sàu-kak hoat kéng-pò! Tùi-te̍k chhin-chhiūⁿ eng-chiáu chhiong--lo̍h-lâi
Hosea8:2 In tùi góa ai-kiò kóng
Hosea8:3 M̄-kú Í-sek-lia̍t kū-choa̍t liông-siān
Hosea8:4 In siat-li̍p kun-ông
Hosea8:5 Sat-má-lī-a -lâng
Hosea8:6 Ngó͘-siōng sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê sai-hū chù-chō--ê; in m̄-sī Siōng-tè. Sat-má-lī-a ê gû-á-siōng it-tēng ōe siū kòng-chhùi.
Hosea8:7 In iā--ê sī hong
Hosea8:8 Í-sek-lia̍t í-keng siū thun-bia̍t; hiān-chāi tī lia̍t-kok tiong chhin-chhiūⁿ bô lō͘-ēng ê khì-khū.
Hosea8:9 Í-sek-lia̍t chhin-chhiūⁿ iá-lû sì-kòe cháu
Hosea8:10 In mā tī lia̍t-kok tiong chhut-bōe ài-chêng
Hosea8:11 Í-hoat-liân ūi-tio̍h beh sio̍k-chōe
Hosea8:12 Góa ūi-tio̍h in siá chin chōe lu̍t-hoat
Hosea8:13 In hiàn-chè hō͘ góa
Hosea8:14 Í-sek-lia̍t khí kiong-tiān
Hosea9:1 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Hosea9:2 Ngó͘-kok-tiûⁿ kap chiú-khut bōe-tàng iúⁿ-chhī lín; só͘ kî-thāi ê sin-chiú mā ōe lo̍k-khong.
Hosea9:3 Í-hoat-liân bōe-tàng koh tòa tī Siōng Chú ê tōe; in ōe tò-tńg-khì Ai-ki̍p
Hosea9:4 In bōe-tàng koh ǹg Siōng Chú hiàn tiān-chiú-chè; in hiàn ê chè bōe hō͘ I hoaⁿ-hí. In ê chè-mi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ song-ka chia̍h ê mi̍h
Hosea9:5 Tī só͘ tēng ê choeh-kî
Hosea9:6 In sui-jiân siám-kè chai-lān
Hosea9:7 Tio̍h hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t chai
Hosea9:8 Sian-ti siū Siōng-tè chí-phài chòe Í-sek-lia̍t ê siú-bōng-chiá; i bô-lūn khì tó-ūi lóng ū lô-bāng teh tng-tán
Hosea9:9 Í-sek-lia̍t thiat-tóe hú-pāi

Hosea9:11 Í-hoat-liân ê êng-kng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chiáu pe--khì
Hosea9:12 In nā ōe siⁿ
Hosea9:13 Góa khòaⁿ
Hosea9:14 Siōng Chú ah

Hosea9:16 Í-hoat-liân siū phah-tó; in ê kun ta--khì
Hosea9:17 Góa ê Siōng-tè it-tēng beh kā in khì-sak

Hosea10:4 In khang-chhùi-pō͘-chi̍h

Hosea10:8 A-bûn ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ

Hosea10:15 Pek-te̍k-lī -lâng ah
Hosea11:1 Siōng Chú kóng: Í-sek-lia̍t sòe-hàn ê sî góa chiū thiàⁿ i; góa ū tiàu góa ê kiáⁿ chhut Ai-ki̍p.
Hosea11:2 Góa ná kiò in
Hosea11:3 Góa khan Í-hoat-liân ê chhiú kà in kiâⁿ; m̄-kú in m̄ chai góa ū i-hó in
Hosea11:4 Góa ēng chû-pi ê soh
Hosea11:5 In m̄-khéng tńg-lâi góa chia; án-ni
Hosea11:6 Chiàn-loān ōe lîm-kàu in ê siâⁿ
Hosea11:7 Góa ê chú-bîn kian-koat pōe-poān góa; án-ni
Hosea11:8 Í-hoat-liân ah
Hosea11:9 Góa bōe hoat-chhut béng-lia̍t ê siū-khì

Hosea11:12 Í-hoat-liân ēng pe̍h-chha̍t
Hosea12:1 Í-hoat-liân kui-ji̍t teh jip tang-hong
Hosea12:2 Siōng Chú khòng-kò Iû-tāi
Hosea12:3 In ê chó͘-sian Ngá-kok tī thai--ni̍h khiú-tiâu hiaⁿ-ko ê kha-āu-tiⁿ; chòng-liân ê sî kap Siōng-tè sio-ián.
Hosea12:4 I ián-iâⁿ thiⁿ-sài
Hosea12:5 Siōng Chú sī Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè; I ê chheng-ho͘ sī Siōng Chú.
Hosea12:6 Só͘-í lí tio̍h kui-ǹg lí ê Siōng-tè
Hosea12:7 Í-sek-lia̍t chhin-chhiūⁿ seng-lí-lâng
Hosea12:8 I kóng
Hosea12:9 Tùi lí chhut Ai-ki̍p ê sî
Hosea12:10 Góa bat tùi sian-ti kóng-ōe

Hosea12:14 M̄-kú in jiá Siōng-tè siū-khì. Chú ōe chiong in lâu lâng ê huih ê chōe kui tī in; in lêng-jio̍k Chú
Hosea13:1 Chá-chêng Í-hoat-liân chi-cho̍k chi̍t-ē kóng-ōe
Hosea13:2 In hoān-chōe
Hosea13:3 Án-ni
Hosea13:4 Tùi lí chhut Ai-ki̍p -tōe ê sî
Hosea13:5 Tī khòng-iá ta-sò ê tōe
Hosea13:6 Góa iúⁿ-chhī chiah-ê jîn-bîn
Hosea13:7 Só͘-í
Hosea13:8 Góa beh kā in kong-kek: chhin-chhiūⁿ sit-lo̍h kiáⁿ ê hîm-bú thiah-li̍h in ê heng-khám; chhin-chhiūⁿ sai-bú kā in thun-chia̍h; chhin-chhiūⁿ iá-siù kā in thiah-chhùi.
Hosea13:9 Í-sek-lia̍t ah
Hosea13:10 Lí thó beh ài ū ông kap léng-siù lâi kiù lí. Taⁿ ông tī tó-ūi? Hiah-ê siâⁿ ê léng-siù tī tó-ūi?
Hosea13:11 Góa tī siū-khì tiong thòe lín siat-li̍p ông
Hosea13:12 Í-hoat-liân ê chōe-kò lóng ū kì-lio̍k
Hosea13:13 I ōe siū chhui-chūn ê thàng-thiàⁿ; i chhin-chhiūⁿ gōng-kiáⁿ
Hosea13:14 Góa kiám tio̍h kiù in thoat-lī Im-hú ê koân-sè? Góa kiám tio̍h sio̍k-hôe in thoat-lī Sí-bông? Sí-bông ah
Hosea13:15 Sui-jiân Í-hoat-liân pí pa̍t-ê chi-cho̍k khah hoân-êng
Hosea13:16 Sat-má-lī-a -lâng tio̍h tam-tng pōe-ge̍k Siōng-tè ê chōe; in ōe tó tī to-ē; in ê eⁿ-á ōe hō͘ lâng siak-sí; ū-sin ê hū-jîn-lâng ê pak-tó͘ mā ōe hō͘ lâng phòa-khui.
Hosea14:1 Í-sek-lia̍t ah

Hosea14:4 Siōng Chú kóng: Góa beh i-hó Í-sek-lia̍t ê pōe-poān
Hosea14:5 Góa beh chhin-chhiūⁿ kam-lō͘ kàng-lo̍h hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t
Hosea14:6 In ê ki chhun-tn̂g

Joel1:1 Ē-bīn sī Siōng Chú tùi Pí-thó͘-ní ê kiáⁿ Iok-ní kóng ê ōe:
Joel1:2 Lāu-lâng ah
Joel1:3 Tio̍h chiong chit-ê tāi-chì thoân hō͘ lín ê kiáⁿ-jî
Joel1:4 Tōa-chiah chháu-meh chia̍h chhun--ê
Joel1:5 Chiú-chùi ê lâng ah
Joel1:6 Ū chi̍t kûn chháu-meh lâi chhim-hoān góa ê tōe
Joel1:7 in húi-hoāi góa ê phû-tô-chhiū
Joel1:8 Lí tio̍h ai-khàu
Joel1:9 Siōng Chú ê tiān bô sò͘-chè kap tiān-chiú-chè thang hiàn; ho̍k-sāi Siōng Chú ê chè-si mā ai-khàu.

Joel2:3 In thâu-chêng ū lia̍t-hé teh thun-bia̍t
Joel2:4 In ê hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ bé
Joel2:5 In tī chèng-soaⁿ téng-bīn teh thiàu
Joel2:6 Só͘-ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h in ê lâng lóng phòa-táⁿ

Joel2:8 In bōe khoeh-lâi-khoeh-khì

Joel2:15 Lín tio̍h tī Sek-an pûn sàu-kak
Joel2:16 chū-chi̍p bîn-chiòng

Joel2:18 Hit-sî Siōng Chú ōe chhim-chhim thiàⁿ-sioh I ê thó͘-tōe
Joel2:19 Siōng Chú ìn I ê chú-bîn

Joel2:21 Thó͘-tōe ah
Joel2:22 Chhân-iá ê cháu-siù ah
Joel2:23 Sek-an ê chú-bîn ah

Joel2:25 Góa phài-lâi lín chia chi̍t-kûn koh chi̍t-kûn ê chháu-meh tāi-kun

Joel3:1 Lín khòaⁿ
Joel3:2 góa beh chū-chi̍p bān-kok

Joel3:5 Lín chhiúⁿ góa ê kim-gûn
Joel3:6 koh kā Iû-tāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng bōe hō͘ Hi-la̍h -lâng
Joel3:7 Góa beh chhui-pek in tùi lín kā in bōe--khì ê só͘-chāi tò-tńg--lâi. Góa beh chiàu lín ê só͘-chòe kā lín pò-èng.
Joel3:8 Góa beh chiong lín ê kiáⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ bōe hō͘ Iû-tāi -lâng; Iû-tāi -lâng ōe kā in choán-bōe hō͘ hn̄g-hn̄g ê Sī-pa -lâng. Siōng Chú án-ni soan-pò͘.

Joel3:11 Sì-ûi ê lia̍t-kok ah
Joel3:12 Tio̍h hoàn-khí bān-kok ê lâng lóng chiūⁿ-lâi Iok-sa-hoat Soaⁿ-kok; tī hia góa beh chē-teh sím-phòaⁿ sì-ûi ê lia̍t-kok.
Joel3:13 Tio̍h gia̍h liâm-le̍k-á koah
Joel3:14 Ū chheng-chheng-bān-bān ê lâng tī soan-phòaⁿ ê soaⁿ-kok

Amos1:2 A-mô͘-sū kóng: “Siōng Chú tùi Sek-an chhin-chhiūⁿ sai teh háu

Amos2:1 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Amos2:2 Góa beh pàng-hé sio Mô͘-ap

Amos2:5 Só͘-í góa beh pàng-hé sio Iû-tāi
Amos2:6 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng
Amos2:7 In thún-ta̍h sàn-chhiah-lâng ê thâu-khak
Amos2:8 In tī ta̍k-ê chè-tôaⁿ piⁿ
Amos2:9 Góa bat tī in bīn-chêng tû-bia̍t A-mô͘-lī -lâng; hiah-ê lâng koân-tōa chhin-chhiūⁿ pek-hiuⁿ-chhiū
Amos2:10 Góa mā ū tòa lín tùi Ai-ki̍p -tōe chhut--lâi

Amos3:1 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ah
Amos3:2 tī tōe-chiūⁿ bān-cho̍k tiong góa chí-ū kéng lín
Amos3:3 Nn̄g ê lâng nā bô sio-iok
Amos3:4 Sai nā bô la̍h-bu̍t
Amos3:5 Oa̍h-tauh nā bô khǹg jī
Amos3:6 Siâⁿ-lāi nā ū sàu-kak ê siaⁿ
Amos3:7 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kè-ōe beh chòe tāi-chì
Amos3:8 Sai teh háu
Amos3:9 Tio̍h tī A-si̍t-tu̍t ê kiong-tiān kap Ai-ki̍p ê kiong-tiān soan-pò͘: Tio̍h tī Sat-má-lī-a ê soaⁿ chū-chi̍p
Amos3:10 In-ūi in bōe-hiáu chòe chèng-ti̍t ê tāi-chì; in ê kiong-tiān tún-móa ēng kiông-pō chhiúⁿ--lâi ê mi̍h. Siōng Chú án-ni soan-kò.
Amos3:11 Só͘-í Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Ū tùi-te̍k beh lâi ûi-khùn chit-ê tōe
Amos3:12 Siōng Chú án-ni kóng: Chhin-chhiūⁿ bo̍k-chiá tùi sai ê chhùi chhiúⁿ--chhut-lâi--ê
Amos3:13 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè kóng: Tio̍h thiaⁿ
Amos3:14 Góa in-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hoān-chōe kā in hêng-hoa̍t hit-ji̍t
Amos3:15 Góa beh thiah-húi in tang-thiⁿ joa̍h-thiⁿ ê pia̍t-chong; chhiūⁿ-gê chng-thāⁿ ê chhù ōe siū húi-bia̍t
Amos4:1 Tòa tī Sat-má-lī-a-soaⁿ Pa-san ê gû-bú
Amos4:2 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú kí ka-kī ê sèng-miâ li̍p-sè
Amos4:3 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng ōe hō͘ lâng thoa-khì siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ ê phòa-khiah

Amos5:4 Siōng Chú tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kóng: Tio̍h chhē-kiû góa

Amos5:6 Tio̍h chhē-kiû Siōng Chú
Amos5:7 Lín chhám ah
Amos5:8 Lín tio̍h chhē hit-ūi Chhòng-chō-chú; I chhòng-chō Báu-chhiⁿ kap Chham-chhiⁿ
Amos5:9 I hō͘ pó-lúi hut-jiân húi-hoāi
Amos5:10 Lín oàn-hūn tī siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu chú-chhî kong-tō ê lâng
Amos5:11 lín thún-ta̍h sàn-chhiah-lâng

Amos5:13 Tī chit-khoán siâ-ok ê sî-sè
Amos5:14 Tio̍h tui-kiû hó
Amos5:15 Tio̍h oàn-hūn pháiⁿ
Amos5:16 Só͘-í
Amos5:17 Tī só͘-ū ê phû-tô-hn̂g ōe ū ai-khàu
Amos5:18 Lín ǹg-bāng Siōng Chú ê ji̍t ê lâng
Amos5:19 Hit-ji̍t lâi-lîm ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng siám-pī sai soah tú-tio̍h hîm; ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi
Amos5:20 Siōng Chú ê ji̍t sī àm
Amos5:21 Góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ
Amos5:22 Lín hiàn sio-hòa-chè kap sò͘-chè hō͘ góa
Amos5:23 Tio̍h hō͘ lín chhiùⁿ-koa ê siaⁿ lī-khui góa; lín tôaⁿ-khîm ê tiāu
Amos5:24 Tio̍h hō͘ kong-pêng chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi tn̂g-lâu
Amos5:25 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ah
Amos5:26 Lín kng lín ūi ka-kī chō ê sîn-bêng Sat-kò͘ -ông kap Ka-un chhiⁿ-sîn ê siōng.
Amos5:27 Só͘-í góa beh hō͘ lín siū-lia̍h khì pí Tāi-má-sū-kek koh-khah hn̄g ê só͘-chāi. Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè án-ni soan-kò.
Amos6:1 Lín tòa tī Sek-an bô-khòa-bô-lū
Amos6:2 Lín tio̍h kè-khì Kah-nî khòaⁿ
Amos6:3 Lín siūⁿ-kóng ū kā chai-hō ê ji̍t sak-hn̄g-hn̄g
Amos6:4 Lín tó tī chhiūⁿ-gê ê bîn-chhn̂g
Amos6:5 siau-iâu chhiùⁿ-koa
Amos6:6 Lín lim-chiú chi̍t-óaⁿ sòa chi̍t-óaⁿ
Amos6:7 Só͘-í lín ōe tāi-seng siū-lia̍h
Amos6:8 Chì-koân Siōng Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe Siōng-tè kí ka-kī li̍p-sè kóng: Góa iàm-ò͘ⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiau-ngō͘
Amos6:9 Chi̍t keng chhù nā iáu chhun cha̍p ê ta-po͘-lâng

Amos6:11 In-ūi Siōng Chú hoat-chhut bēng-lēng

Amos6:13 Lín chiah-ê cheng-ho̍k Lô Tí-pa ê lâng khoa-iāu kóng

Amos7:2 Chháu-meh kā kéng-lāi ê lông-chok-bu̍t lóng chia̍h-liáu
Amos7:3 Siōng Chú in-ūi án-ni kái-piàn sim-ì
Amos7:4 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú koh hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê kéng-siōng: Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú bēng-lēng hé lâi chhú-hoa̍t; hé kā chhim-ian sio-ta
Amos7:5 Góa chiū kóng
Amos7:6 Siōng Chú in-ūi án-ni kái-piàn sim-ì. Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú chiū kóng
Amos7:7 I koh hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê kéng-siōng: Chú chhiú the̍h tūi-chîn
Amos7:8 Siōng Chú tùi góa kóng
Amos7:9 Í-sat ê soaⁿ-thâu-tôaⁿ ōe hong-hòe

Amos7:12 A-má-siā koh tùi A-mô͘-sū kóng

Amos8:1 Chì-koân ê Siōng Chú hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê kéng-siōng: Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t nâ joa̍h-thiⁿ ê ké-chí.
Amos8:2 Siōng-tè kóng

Amos9:15 Góa beh hō͘ in khiā-khí tèng-kun tī ka-kī ê thó͘-tōe; in bōe koh hō͘ lâng tùi góa siúⁿ-sù hō͘ in ê thó͘-tōe pu̍ih--khí-lâi. Siōng Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè án-ni soan-pò͘.
Obadiah1:1 Ē-bīn sī Gô-pa-tí-a tit--tio̍h ê khé-sī
Obadiah1:2 Siōng Chú tùi Í-tong kóng
Obadiah1:3 Lí sim-lāi ê kiau-ngō͘ khi-phiàn lí; lí tòa tī chio̍h-tōng lāi
Obadiah1:4 Sui-jiân lí chhin-chhiūⁿ eng-chiáu pe kah hiah-ni̍h koân
Obadiah1:5 Mî--sî chha̍t nā lâi thau
Obadiah1:6 Í-sò ê kiáⁿ-sun ah
Obadiah1:7 Só͘-ū kap lí kiat-bêng ê kok-ka kóaⁿ lí chhut lí ka-kī ê kok-kéng; lí ê bêng-iú ēng phiàn-su̍t cheng-ho̍k lí. Chia̍h lí ê pn̄g ê lâng siat lô-bāng hām-hāi lí
Obadiah1:8 Siōng Chú kóng: Tī hit-ji̍t
Obadiah1:9 Thê-bān ê chiàn-sū ōe kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Obadiah1:10 In-ūi lí chân-hāi ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī Ngá-kok
Obadiah1:11 Tùi-te̍k kong-phòa i ê siâⁿ-mn̂g ê sî
Obadiah1:12 Lí ê hiaⁿ-tī tú-tio̍h chai-lān hit-ji̍t
Obadiah1:13 Góa ê chú-bîn tú-tio̍h chai-hō hit-ji̍t
Obadiah1:14 Lí m̄ eng-kai khiā tī si̍p-jī-lō͘-thâu cha̍h tô-lān ê lâng
Obadiah1:15 Siōng Chú sím-phòaⁿ bān-kok ê ji̍t kàu lah! Í-tong ah
Obadiah1:16 Lín tī sèng-soaⁿ só͘ lim hêng-hoa̍t ê poe
Obadiah1:17 Sek-an-soaⁿ teh-beh ū chhun--lo̍h-lâi tit-kiù ê lâng; chit-ê soaⁿ beh chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-soaⁿ. Ngá-kok ê hō͘-tāi ōe siu-hôe in ê sán-gia̍p.
Obadiah1:18 Ngá-kok ê hō͘-tāi chhin-chhiūⁿ jia̍t-hé
Obadiah1:19 Iû-tāi lâm-pêng ê Nî-kek-hu chū-bîn ōe chiàm-léng Í-tong-soaⁿ; tòa tī sai-pêng soaⁿ-po͘ ê lâng beh chiàm-léng Hui-lī-sū pêng-goân
Obadiah1:20 Í-sek-lia̍t liû-bông ê tāi-kun ōe tńg-lâi cheng-ho̍k Hui-nî-ki
Obadiah1:21 Hiah-ê tek-sèng-chiá beh chiūⁿ Sek-an-soaⁿ

Jonah1:8 In mn̄g i kóng
Jonah1:9 I ìn kóng

Jonah1:16 Hiah-ê lâng chiū tōa-tōa kèng-ùi Siōng Chú
Jonah1:17 Siōng Chú an-pâi chi̍t bé tōa-hî kā Iok-ná thun--lo̍h-khì; Iok-ná tī hî ê pak-tó͘ lāi saⁿ mî saⁿ ji̍t.

Jonah2:6 Góa tîm lo̍h-khì kàu soaⁿ ê kun-ki; tōe ê mn̂g-chhòaⁿ éng-oán kā góa chhòaⁿ--teh; m̄-kú

Micah1:1 Ē-bīn sī Siōng Chú tùi Mô͘-lī-siat -lâng Bí-ka khé-sī ê ōe; che sī Iû-tāi -ông Iok-thán
Micah1:2 Bān-bîn ah
Micah1:3 Khòaⁿ leh
Micah1:4 Chèng-soaⁿ ōe tī I ê kha-ē iûⁿ--khì
Micah1:5 Che lóng sī in-ūi Ngá-kok ê chōe-kò
Micah1:6 Só͘-í
Micah1:7 Sat-má-lī-a tiau-khek ê ngó͘-siōng lóng ōe siū phah-chhùi
Micah1:8 Bí-ka kóng: In-ūi án-ni
Micah1:9 In-ūi Sat-má-lī-a ê siong bōe-i--tit
Micah1:10 M̄-thang tī Ka-te̍k soan-thoân chit-ê tāi-chì
Micah1:11 Sa-húi ê chū-bîn ah

Matthew14:7 chiū chiù-chōa tah-èng hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h lóng beh hō͘ i.
Matthew14:8 Cha-bó͘ gín-á hō͘ lāu-bú sái-lōng
Matthew14:9 Ông ê sim chin kan-khó͘
Matthew14:10 Ông chhe lâng khì kaⁿ--ni̍h chām Iok-hān ê thâu
Matthew14:11 chiong thâu-khak hē tī pôaⁿ--ni̍h
Matthew14:12 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ lâi siu i ê sin-si khì bâi-chòng
Matthew14:13 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siau-sit chiū lī-khui hia
Matthew14:14 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ
Matthew14:15 Hông-hun-àm

Matthew14:17 Bûn-tô͘ tùi I kóng

Matthew14:20 Tāi-ke lóng chia̍h
Matthew14:21 Chia̍h ê lâng
Matthew14:22 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî pek bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn seng kè-khì tùi-bīn hōaⁿ
Matthew14:23 Kûn-chiòng sì-sòaⁿ liáu-āu
Matthew14:24 Hit-sî
Matthew14:25 Thiⁿ beh kng ê sî

Matthew14:27 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî kā in kóng
Matthew14:28 Pí-tek ìn kóng
Matthew14:29 Iâ-so͘ kóng

Matthew14:31 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî chhun-chhiú kā i khiú--teh
Matthew14:32 In chiūⁿ-chûn

Matthew14:35 Hit só͘-chāi ê lâng chi̍t-ē jīn-chhut Iâ-so͘
Matthew14:36 In khún-kiû Iâ-so͘ hō͘ pīⁿ-lâng kan-ta bong I saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu chiū hó; só͘-ū bong--tio̍h ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h i-hó.
Matthew15:1 Ū Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘

Matthew16:1 Ū Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘

Matthew22:1 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū kā in kóng:
Matthew22:2 “Thian-kok thang phì-jū chòe chi̍t ê kok-ông kā i ê kiáⁿ pān hun-iàn.
Matthew22:3 I chhe po̍k-jîn khì kiò só͘ chhiáⁿ ê lâng-kheh lâi hù hun-iàn
Matthew22:4 Kok-ông koh chhe kî-tha ê po̍k-jîn
Matthew22:5 M̄-kú hiah-ê siū iau-chhiáⁿ ê lâng bô khòaⁿ-chòe iàu-kín
Matthew22:6 kî-tha--ê lia̍h i ê po̍k-jîn
Matthew22:7 Kok-ông hui-siông siū-khì
Matthew22:8 Jiân-āu i kā po̍k-jîn kóng
Matthew22:9 Só͘-í

Matthew27:31 In kā I hì-lāng liáu-āu

Matthew27:33 In kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe Kok-kok-tha
Matthew27:34 chiū ēng chham khó͘-táⁿ ê chiú hō͘ Iâ-so͘ lim; I tam chi̍t-ē
Matthew27:35 Peng-sū tèng Iâ-so͘ tī si̍p-jī-kè liáu-āu thiu-chhiam pun I ê saⁿ
Matthew27:36 jiân-āu chē tī hia kò͘-siú.

Matthew27:47 Ū chi̍t-kóa khiā tī hia ê lâng thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Matthew27:48 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lâng sûi-sî cháu-khì the̍h hái-mî
Matthew27:49 Kî-tha ê lâng kóng

Matthew27:51 Hut-jiân
Matthew27:52 bōng mā khui; ū chin chōe í-keng sí--khì ê Siōng-tè chú-bîn ê si-thé lóng koh-oa̍h--khí-lâi.
Matthew27:53 Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h í-āu hiah-ê lâng tùi bōng chhut--lâi
Matthew27:54 Hit-ê kun-koaⁿ kap chòe-hé kò͘-siú Iâ-so͘ ê peng-sū khòaⁿ-tio̍h tōe-tāng kap só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Matthew27:55 Tī hia ū chin chōe hū-jîn-lâng tùi hn̄g-hn̄g teh khòaⁿ; in sī tùi Ka-lī-lī tè Iâ-so͘ lâi sū-hāu I--ê

Matthew27:57 Hông-hun ê sî

Matthew28:1 An-hioh-ji̍t kè-liáu
Matthew28:2 Hut-jiân
Matthew28:3 I ê bīn-māu chhin-chhiūⁿ sih-nà
Matthew28:4 Hiah-ê kò͘-siú ê ōe-peng kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah
Matthew28:5 Hit-ê thiⁿ-sài kā hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng
Matthew28:6 I bô tī chia
Matthew28:7 Lín kóaⁿ-kín khì kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng
Matthew28:8 In chiū kóaⁿ-kín lī-khui bōng
Matthew28:9 Hut-jiân
Matthew28:10 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Matthew28:11 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng lī-khui ê sî

Matthew28:13 kóng

Matthew28:15 Ōe-peng chiū the̍h hiah-ê gûn-á chiàu in só͘ hoan-hù--ê khì chòe. Chit-ê tāi-chì kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu tī Iû-thài -lâng ê tiong-kan teh liû-thoân.
Matthew28:16 Cha̍p-it ê bûn-tô͘ khì Ka-lī-lī

Mark1:1 Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê hok-im án-ni khai-sí.

Mark1:3 Ū siaⁿ tī khòng-iá teh hoah: Tio̍h ūi Chú chún-pī tō-lō͘
Mark1:4 Kó-jiân
Mark1:5 Iû-thài ta̍k só͘-chāi ū chin chōe lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘-ū ê lâng lóng chhut--lâi
Mark1:6 Iok-hān chhēng lo̍k-tô-mn̂g ê saⁿ

Mark1:8 Góa ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé

Mark6:15 M̄-kú mā ū lâng kóng
Mark6:16 Hi-lu̍t thiaⁿ--tio̍h chiū kóng
Mark6:17 Hi-lu̍t ū phài lâng khì lia̍h Iok-hān
Mark6:18 in-ūi Iok-hān tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ tùi Hi-lu̍t kóng
Mark6:19 Hi-lô-tí sim-lāi tùi Iok-hān khioh-hūn
Mark6:20 in-ūi Hi-lu̍t kiaⁿ Iok-hān
Mark6:21 Hi-lô-tí ê ki-hōe lâi lah. Hi-lu̍t choh-siⁿ-ji̍t ê sî
Mark6:22 Hi-lô-tí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ji̍p-lâi thiàu-bú
Mark6:23 Hi-lu̍t koh tùi i soan-sè kóng
Mark6:24 Cha-bó͘ gín-á chhut-khì mn̄g i ê lāu-bú
Mark6:25 I sûi-sî kóaⁿ tò-tńg--lâi
Mark6:26 Ông ê sim hui-siông kan-khó͘
Mark6:27 Ông sûi-sî chhe chi̍t ê kéng-ōe khì the̍h Iok-hān ê thâu. Kéng-ōe chiū khì kaⁿ--ni̍h chām Iok-hān ê thâu
Mark6:28 chiong thâu-khak hē tī pôaⁿ--ni̍h phâng-lâi hō͘ cha-bó͘ gín-á
Mark6:29 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h chiū lâi siu i ê sin-si
Mark6:30 Sù-tô͘ tńg-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Mark6:31 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Mark6:32 In chiū chē-chûn kan-ta in ka-kī khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi.
Mark6:33 Chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h in lī-khui
Mark6:34 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ
Mark6:35 Sî-kan í-keng chin òaⁿ
Mark6:36 Chhiáⁿ kā in kái-sàn
Mark6:37 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Mark6:38 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Mark6:39 Iâ-so͘ hoan-hù bûn-tô͘ kā chèng-lâng hun-cho͘
Mark6:40 Chèng-lâng chiū chi̍t-cho͘ chi̍t-cho͘ chē--lo̍h-khì
Mark6:41 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ the̍h hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ kap nn̄g bé hî
Mark6:42 Tāi-ke lóng chia̍h
Mark6:43 Bûn-tô͘ khioh chia̍h chhun ê piáⁿ-iù-á kap hî-sut-á
Mark6:44 Chia̍h-piáⁿ--ê
Mark6:45 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî pek I ê bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn seng kè-khì tùi-bīn hōaⁿ
Mark6:46 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui kûn-chiòng liáu-āu chiū chiūⁿ-soaⁿ kî-tó.
Mark6:47 Thiⁿ àm ê sî
Mark6:48 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h bûn-tô͘ chìⁿ-hong teh kò-chiúⁿ
Mark6:49 Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn teh kiâⁿ
Mark6:50 in-ūi tāi-ke lóng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I
Mark6:51 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-chûn khì kap in chòe-hé
Mark6:52 in-ūi in bô bêng-pe̍k hit-ê piáⁿ ê ì-gī
Mark6:53 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ kè ô͘ liáu-āu tī Kek-nî-sat-le̍k chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ
Mark6:54 In chi̍t-ē lo̍h-chûn
Mark6:55 chiū sì-kòe kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu
Mark6:56 Iâ-so͘ bô-lūn kiâⁿ kàu sím-mi̍h chng-siā
Mark7:1 Ū hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap chi̍t-kóa tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lâi ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tàu-tīn lâi chhē Iâ-so͘.
Mark7:2 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ ū lâng ēng bô chheng-khì ê chhiú
Mark7:3 Goân-lâi Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng chip-siú chó͘-sian ê thoân-thóng
Mark7:4 tùi chhī-tiûⁿ tò--lâi
Mark7:5 Só͘-í
Mark7:6 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Mark7:7 In ēng lâng ê kui-lē chòe góa ê kà-sī kà-sī lâng; in kèng-pài góa lóng bô-chhái-kang.
Mark7:8 Lín kèng-jiân pàng-sak Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng
Mark7:9 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng
Mark7:10 Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín ‘Tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú’
Mark7:11 M̄-kú lín kóng
Mark7:12 lín chiū chún i bián hōng-ióng ka-kī ê pē-bú.
Mark7:13 Lín ēng lín só͘ thoân-siū ê thoân-thóng lâi hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê ōe. Lín koh chòe chin chōe chit-khoán ê tāi-chì.”
Mark7:14 Iâ-so͘ koh kiò chèng-lâng lâi
Mark7:15 Tùi gōa-bīn ji̍p-khì lâng lāi-bīn ê mi̍h
Mark7:16 
Mark7:17 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui chèng-lâng
Mark7:18 I kā in kóng
Mark7:19 In-ūi tùi gōa-bīn ji̍p--khì-ê m̄-sī ji̍p-khì sim-lāi
Mark7:20 I koh kóng
Mark7:21 In-ūi tùi lāi-bīn chhut--lâi-ê
Mark7:22 kan-îm
Mark7:23 Chiah-ê it-chhè siâ-ok ê sū lóng sī tùi lāi-bīn chhut--lâi-ê
Mark7:24 Iâ-so͘ tùi hia chhut-hoat khì Thài-ní tōe-khu. I ji̍p-khì chi̍t keng chhù
Mark7:25 Sûi-sî ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì
Mark7:26 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī chhut-sì tī Sū-lī-a Hui-nî-ki ê Hi-la̍h -lâng. I kiû Iâ-so͘ kā i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kóaⁿ-kúi.
Mark7:27 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Mark7:28 Hū-jîn-lâng ìn kóng
Mark7:29 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Mark7:30 Hū-jîn-lâng tńg-khì in tau
Mark7:31 Iâ-so͘ koh lī-khui Thài-ní tōe-khu
Mark7:32 Ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê bōe thiaⁿ--kìⁿ koh bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Mark7:33 Iâ-so͘ chhōa hit-ê lâng lī-khui chèng-lâng khì piⁿ--á
Mark7:34 jiân-āu ǹg thiⁿ
Mark7:35 Hit-lâng ê hī-khang sûi-sî khui
Mark7:36 Iâ-so͘ giâm-giâm bēng-lēng in m̄-thang kā lâng kóng
Mark7:37 Tāi-ke lóng hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ
Mark8:1 Kè bô kúi ji̍t
Mark8:2 “Góa chin khó-lîn chit-tīn lâng
Mark8:3 Góa nā hō͘ in sì-sòaⁿ iau-iau tńg-khì in tau
Mark8:4 Bûn-tô͘ kā I kóng
Mark8:5 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in
Mark8:6 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng kûn-chiòng chē lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha
Mark8:7 In mā ū kúi-nā bé sòe bé hî
Mark8:8 In lóng chia̍h
Mark8:9 Jîn-sò͘ iok ū sì-chheng. Iâ-so͘ kā in kái-sàn
Mark8:10 jiân-āu sûi-sî kap bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn
Mark8:11 Chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng lâi chhē Iâ-so͘

Mark8:13 I chiū lī-khui in
Mark8:14 Bûn-tô͘ bōe-kì-tit tòa piáⁿ
Mark8:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kéng-kò
Mark8:16 Bûn-tô͘ hō͘-siōng gī-lūn
Mark8:17 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ chiū kā in kóng
Mark8:18 Lín ū ba̍k-chiu
Mark8:19 góa peh gō͘ ê piáⁿ hō͘ gō͘-chheng lâng chia̍h ê sî
Mark8:20 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g
Mark8:21 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng
Mark8:22 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu Pek-sài-tāi. Ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê bông-jîn lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Mark8:23 Iâ-so͘ khan hit-ê bông-jîn ê chhiú
Mark8:24 I gia̍h-thâu khí-lâi khòaⁿ
Mark8:25 Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn ēng siang-chhiú bong i ê ba̍k-chiu
Mark8:26 Iâ-so͘ kiò i tńg-khì in tau
Mark8:27 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ khì Khái-sat-lī-a Hui-li̍p-pí hù-kūn ê hiong-chhoan. Tī lō͘-tiong
Mark8:28 In ìn kóng
Mark8:29 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g in kóng
Mark8:30 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in chhian-bān m̄-thang tùi lâng kóng-khí I ê tāi-chì.
Mark8:31 Iâ-so͘ khai-sí kà-sī bûn-tô͘ kóng
Mark8:32 I chiong chit-ê tāi-chì chheng-chheng-chhó-chhó kā in kóng. Pí-tek chiū khiú Iâ-so͘ khì piⁿ--á
Mark8:33 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t kè-lâi khòaⁿ bûn-tô͘
Mark8:34 Jiân-āu
Mark8:35 In-ūi beh kiù ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā--ê
Mark8:36 Lâng tit-tio̍h choân sè-kài soah sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek?
Mark8:37 Lâng ōe-tàng ēng sím-mi̍h tāi-kè lâi kau-ōaⁿ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā?
Mark8:38 Tī chit-ê îm-loān siâ-ok ê sè-tāi

Mark9:9 In lo̍h-soaⁿ ê sî
Mark9:10 In chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ōe khǹg tī sim-lāi

Mark10:18 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Mark10:19 Chiah-ê kài-bēng lí lóng bat: M̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang choh gūi-chèng; m̄-thang chà-khi; tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú.”
Mark10:20 Hit-ê lâng ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng
Mark10:21 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ i
Mark10:22 Hit-ê lâng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-kù ōe
Mark10:23 Iâ-so͘ sì-chiu-ûi khòaⁿ chi̍t lìn
Mark10:24 Bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h I só͘ kóng ê ōe
Mark10:25 Lo̍k-tô chhng-kè chiam-phīⁿ mā pí hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok koh-khah kán-tan.”
Mark10:26 Bûn-tô͘ koh-khah tio̍h-kiaⁿ
Mark10:27 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k kā in khòaⁿ
Mark10:28 Pí-tek chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng
Mark10:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Mark10:30 tī kim-sè ōe tit-tio̍h pah-pē ê chhù-the̍h
Mark10:31 Chóng-sī chin chōe chòe thâu-chêng--ê ōe chòe siōng lō͘-bé; siōng lō͘-bé--ê ōe chòe siōng thâu-chêng.”
Mark10:32 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lō͘-tiong
Mark10:33 “Taⁿ lán beh chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; Jîn-chú ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ōe kā I tēng sí-chōe
Mark10:34 In ōe kā I hì-lāng
Mark10:35 Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān kiâⁿ chìn-chêng
Mark10:36 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g kóng
Mark10:37 In kóng
Mark10:38 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Mark10:39 In kóng
Mark10:40 put-kò chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng tò-pêng m̄-sī góa ōe-tàng hō͘ lâng--ê. Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h sím-mi̍h-lâng chún-pī chiū hō͘ hit-ê lâng.”
Mark10:41 Kî-tha hit cha̍p ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Mark10:42 Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi
Mark10:43 Put-kò lín tiong-kan chiū m̄ eng-kai án-ni. Lín tiong-kan ài chòe tōa--ê tio̍h chòe lín ê chhe-ēng;
Mark10:44 ài chòe tē-it--ê tio̍h chòe chèng-lâng ê po̍k-jîn.
Mark10:45 In-ūi Jîn-chú lâi

Mark10:51 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng

Mark11:3 Nā ū lâng mn̄g lín sī-án-chóaⁿ án-ni chòe
Mark11:4 In khì

Mark11:6 In chiàu Iâ-so͘ só͘ hoan-hù--ê kā in hôe-tap; hiah-ê lâng chiū chún in khan--khì.
Mark11:7 In khan hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Mark11:8 Ū chin chōe lâng ēng in ê gōa-saⁿ pho͘ tī lō͘--ni̍h
Mark11:9 Chêng-kiâⁿ-āu-tè ê lâng tōa-siaⁿ hoah: Hô-sàn-ná! Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn!
Mark11:10 Teh-beh lâi lán chó͘-sian Tāi-pi̍t ê ông-kok eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè

Mark11:12 Keh-ji̍t
Mark11:13 I tī hn̄g-hn̄g khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t châng ū chin chōe hio̍h ê bû-hoa-kó-chhiū
Mark11:14 I chiū tùi hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kóng
Mark11:15 Āu-lâi in lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Mark11:16 I mā m̄-chún lâng the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ ēng Sèng-tiān chòe thong-lō͘ kè-lâi-kè-khì.
Mark11:17 I kà-sī in kóng

Mark11:25 Lín khiā-teh kî-tó ê sî
Mark11:26

Mark11:28 mn̄g I kóng
Mark11:29 Iâ-so͘ kā in ìn kóng
Mark11:30 Iok-hān sóe-lé ê koân-pèng sī tùi Thiⁿ á-sī tùi lâng lâi--ê? Lín kā góa kóng.”

Mark12:1 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng
Mark12:2 Siu-sêng ê sî kàu
Mark12:3 In lia̍h hit-ê po̍k-jîn
Mark12:4 I koh chhe lēng-gōa chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn khì
Mark12:5 Āu-lâi
Mark12:6 I iáu ū chi̍t ê
Mark12:7 M̄-kú hiah-ê tiān-lông chham-siông kóng
Mark12:8 In chiū kā i lia̍h--khí-lâi
Mark12:9 “Án-ni
Mark12:10 Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h chit-tōaⁿ Sèng-keng ê kì-chài: Khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h.

Mark12:13 In chhe kúi-nā ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap Hi-lu̍t-tóng ê lâng khì Iâ-so͘ hia
Mark12:14 In chiū khì
Mark12:15 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-chhut in ê khúi-kè

Mark12:19 “Lāu-su
Mark12:20 Í-chêng bat ū chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī
Mark12:21 Tē-jī--ê chhōa i ê hiaⁿ-só
Mark12:22 Chit chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī lóng bô lâu hō͘-tāi
Mark12:23 Koh-oa̍h ê sî

Mark12:26 Koan-hē sí-lâng koh-oa̍h
Mark12:27 I m̄-sī sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè
Mark12:28 Ū chi̍t ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su lâi
Mark12:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Mark12:30 Lí tio̍h choân-sim
Mark12:31 Tē-jī sī: Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī. Bô pa̍t-ê kài-bēng pí chiah-ê koh-khah tiōng-iàu.”

Mark12:36 Tāi-pi̍t pún-sin siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng kóng: Chú kā góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng

Mark12:38 Iâ-so͘ kà-sī kóng

Luke1:3 Chiah-ê lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì

Luke1:5 Hi-lu̍t chòe Iû-thài -ông ê sî

Luke1:15 in-ūi i tī Chú ê bīn-chêng ōe chòe tōa-jîn-bu̍t. Po̍h-chiú kāu-chiú i lóng bōe-ēng-tit lim. I iáu tī bú-thai chiū hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa.

Luke1:25 I-lī-sa-pe̍k kóng

Luke1:27 khì kìⁿ chi̍t ê chāi-sek-lú

Luke1:29 Má-lī-a in-ūi chiah-ê ōe hui-siông put-an
Luke1:30 Thiⁿ-sài tùi i kóng

Luke1:32 I ōe chòe tōa-jîn-bu̍t
Luke1:33 I ōe éng-oán thóng-tī Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ-sun; I ê ông-kok bû-kiông-chīn.”

Luke1:37 In-ūi Siōng-tè bô chi̍t hāng tāi-chì chòe bōe kàu.”

Luke3:5 It-chhè ê soaⁿ-kok tio̍h thūn hō͘ tīⁿ; só͘-ū tōa-soaⁿ sió-soaⁿ tio̍h siah hō͘ kē; oan-khiau ê lō͘ tio̍h kái hō͘ ti̍t; khâm-khia̍t ê lō͘ tio̍h siu hō͘ pîⁿ!

Luke6:26 “Chèng-lâng lóng teh o-ló lín ê sî
Luke6:27 “Lín chiah-ê teh thiaⁿ ê lâng
Luke6:28 Tio̍h chiok-hok lóe-mē lín ê lâng; tio̍h ūi-tio̍h bú-jio̍k lín ê lâng kî-tó.
Luke6:29 Ū lâng siàn lí ê chhùi-phóe
Luke6:30 Ū lâng kā lí kiû sím-mi̍h
Luke6:31 Lín ài lâng án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lín
Luke6:32 “Lín nā chí-ū thiàⁿ hiah-ê thiàⁿ--lín ê lâng
Luke6:33 Lín nā chí-ū hó khoán-thāi hiah-ê hó khoán-thāi lín ê lâng
Luke6:34 Lín nā chîⁿ chioh hō͘ hiah-ê lín ǹg-bāng ōe hêng ê lâng
Luke6:35 Chóng-sī lín tio̍h thiàⁿ lín ê tùi-te̍k
Luke6:36 Lín ê Thiⁿ-pē sī jîn-chû
Luke6:37 “M̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ lâng
Luke6:38 Tio̍h hō͘ lâng
Luke6:39 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng
Luke6:40 Ha̍k-seng bōe chhiau-kè lāu-su
Luke6:41 “Lí ná kan-ta teh khòaⁿ hiaⁿ-tī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á
Luke6:42 Lí bô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-kho͘
Luke6:43 “Hó-chhiū bōe kiat pháiⁿ ké-chí; pháiⁿ-chhiū mā bōe kiat hó ké-chí.
Luke6:44 Ta̍k-châng chhiū tùi só͘ kiat ê ké-chí lâi chai i ê hó-pháiⁿ. Bōe-tàng tùi chhì-phè bán bû-hoa-kó
Luke6:45 Hó-lâng tùi sim-lāi só͘ chek-chū ê hó hoat-chhut hó; pháiⁿ-lâng tùi só͘ chek-chū ê pháiⁿ hoat-chhut pháiⁿ. In-ūi lâng sim-lāi chhiong-móa sím-mi̍h
Luke6:46 “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín chheng-ho͘ góa ‘Chú ah
Luke6:47 Lâi góa chia thiaⁿ góa ê ōe
Luke6:48 I chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khí-chhù
Luke6:49 M̄-kú thiaⁿ góa chiah-ê ōe bô si̍t-hêng ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khí-chhù bô hē tōe-ki
Luke7:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng hō͘ bîn-chiòng thiaⁿ ê ōe lóng kóng soah
Luke7:2 Ū chi̍t ê Lô-má kun-koaⁿ
Luke7:3 Kun-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì
Luke7:4 Chiah-ê tiúⁿ-ló kàu Iâ-so͘ hia
Luke7:5 in-ūi i ài-hō͘ lán Iû-thài -lâng

Luke7:8 In-ūi góa sī hō͘ lâng koán ê lâng

Luke7:11 Kè bô jōa kú

Luke7:16 Chèng-lâng lóng hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ

Luke7:18 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng kā Iok-hān pò-kò. Iok-hān chiū kiò nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ lâi

Luke8:1 Kè bô jōa kú
Luke8:2 ū chi̍t-kóa bat hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin á-sī phòa-pīⁿ hō͘ Iâ-so͘ i-hó ê hū-jîn-lâng mā kap I chòe-hé khì
Luke8:3 Hi-lu̍t ê koán-ke Khó͘-sat ê bó͘ Iok-a-ná
Luke8:4 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng tùi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī it-ti̍t chū-chi̍p lâi Iâ-so͘ hia ê sî
Luke8:5 “Ū chi̍t ê iā chéng-chí ê lâng chhut-khì iā chéng-chí. I iā ê sî
Luke8:6 Ū-ê lak tī chio̍h-thâu tōe
Luke8:7 Ū-ê lak tī chhì-phè lāi
Luke8:8 Ū-ê lak lo̍h-khì hó thó͘-tōe

Luke8:28 I chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘

Luke17:37 Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke18:1 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū
Luke18:2 I kóng
Luke18:3 Tī hit-ê siâⁿ ū chi̍t ê kóaⁿ-hū it-ti̍t lâi chhē i
Luke18:4 Chit-ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ chin kú lóng m̄ tah-èng
Luke18:5 m̄-kú in-ūi chit-ê kóaⁿ-hū it-ti̍t lâi kā góa chhá
Luke18:6 Chú koh kóng
Luke18:7 Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê lâng mî-ji̍t tùi I ai-kiû
Luke18:8 Góa kā lín kóng
Luke18:9 Iâ-so͘ tùi hiah-ê khòaⁿ ka-kī chòe gī-lâng koh khòaⁿ-khin pa̍t-lâng ê lâng ū kóng chit-ê phì-jū:
Luke18:10 “Ū nn̄g ê lâng chiūⁿ Sèng-tiān kî-tó; chi̍t ê sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng
Luke18:11 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng khiā-thêng-thêng ka-kī kî-tó kóng
Luke18:12 Góa chi̍t lé-pài kìm-chia̍h nn̄g piàn
Luke18:13 M̄-kú hit-ê ba̍uh-sè--ê khiā tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi
Luke18:14 Góa kā lín kóng
Luke18:15 Ū lâng liân eⁿ-á mā phō-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Luke18:16 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi
Luke18:17 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng
Luke18:18 Ū chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-tō-chiá lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke18:19 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Luke18:20 Chiah-ê kài-bēng lí lóng bat: ‘M̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang choh gūi-chèng; tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú.’”
Luke18:21 Hit-ê lâng kóng
Luke18:22 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe
Luke18:23 Hit-ê lâng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe
Luke18:24 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ hit-ê lâng chiū kóng
Luke18:25 Lo̍k-tô chhng-kè chiam-phīⁿ mā pí hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok koh-khah kán-tan!”
Luke18:26 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe ê lâng mn̄g I kóng
Luke18:27 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Luke18:28 Pí-tek kóng
Luke18:29 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke18:30 tī kim-sè it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h koh-khah chōe
Luke18:31 Iâ-so͘ chhōa cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ khì piⁿ--á
Luke18:32 I ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng; in ōe kā I hì-lāng
Luke18:33 In ōe ēng piⁿ kā I phah
Luke18:34 M̄-kú sù-tô͘ tùi chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng bô liáu-kái; chiah-ê ōe ê ì-sù ū tùi in khàm--teh
Luke18:35 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lī-ko ê sî
Luke18:36 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h kûn-chiòng tùi hia keng-kè
Luke18:37 In kā i kóng
Luke18:38 I chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Luke18:39 Tī thâu-chêng teh kiâⁿ ê lâng kā i chek-pī
Luke18:40 Iâ-so͘ chiū thêng-kha
Luke18:41 “Lí ài góa kā lí chòe sím-mi̍h?” I kóng
Luke18:42 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Luke18:43 I sûi-sî koh ōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Luke19:1 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Iâ-lī-ko
Luke19:2 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Sat-kai; i sī ba̍uh-sè ê thâu-lâng
Luke19:3 I ài-beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ sī sím-mi̍h khoán lâng
Luke19:4 I chiū cháu chìn-chêng
Luke19:5 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ kàu hit-ê só͘-chāi
Luke19:6 Sat-kai chiū kóaⁿ-kín lo̍h--lâi
Luke19:7 Chèng-lâng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Luke19:8 Sat-kai khiā--teh
Luke19:9 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng
Luke19:10 Jîn-chú lâi sī beh tui-chhē koh chín-kiù sit-lo̍h ê lâng.”
Luke19:11 Chèng-lâng teh thiaⁿ chiah-ê ōe ê sî
Luke19:12 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke19:13 I tiàu-chi̍p cha̍p ê po̍k-jîn lâi
Luke19:14 Pún-kok ê jîn-bîn oàn-hūn i
Luke19:15 “Chit-ê kùi-cho̍k siū hong choh-ông tńg--lâi ê sî
Luke19:16 Thâu chi̍t ê lâi i ê bīn-chêng
Luke19:17 Chú-lâng kā i kóng
Luke19:18 Tē-jī ê lâi
Luke19:19 Chú-lâng mā án-ni kā chit-ê lâng kóng
Luke19:20 “Koh lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâi
Luke19:21 Góa chin kiaⁿ lí
Luke19:22 Chú-lâng kā i kóng
Luke19:23 lí ná bô chiong góa ê chîⁿ kià tī gûn-hâng
Luke19:24 “Chú-lâng chiū kā khiā tī piⁿ--á ê lâng kóng
Luke19:25 In chiū tùi i kóng
Luke19:26 Chú-lâng kóng
Luke19:27 M̄-kú hiah-ê tùi-te̍k góa
Luke19:28 Kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
Luke19:29 I teh-beh kàu Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ soaⁿ-kha ê Pek-hoat-kî kap Pek-tāi-nî ê sî
Luke19:30 hoan-hù in
Luke19:31 Nā ū lâng mn̄g
Luke19:32 In chiū khì
Luke19:33 In teh tháu hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ ê sî
Luke19:34 In ìn kóng
Luke19:35 In chiū khan hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Luke19:36 Iâ-so͘ khiâ lû-á-kiáⁿ chìn-chêng kiâⁿ ê sî
Luke19:37 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh lo̍h Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ ê só͘-chāi
Luke19:38 Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi ê Ông eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Goān thiⁿ-téng ū hô-pêng
Luke19:39 Chèng-lâng tiong-kan
Luke19:40 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Luke19:41 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Luke19:42 kóng
Luke19:43 In-ūi ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu
Luke19:44 In ōe chiong lí kap lí siâⁿ-lāi ê jîn-bîn choân-pō͘ húi-bia̍t
Luke19:45 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān
Luke19:46 I kā in kóng
Luke19:47 Iâ-so͘ ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng. Chè-si-tiúⁿ
Luke19:48 m̄-kú chhē bô hoat-tō͘
Luke20:1 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Luke20:2 mn̄g I
Luke20:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
Luke20:4 Iok-hān kā lâng sóe-lé ê koân-pèng sī tùi Thiⁿ á-sī tùi lâng lâi--ê?”
Luke20:5 In hō͘-siōng gī-lūn
Luke20:6 Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi lâng’
Luke20:7 Só͘-í in ìn kóng m̄ chai tùi tó-ūi lâi.
Luke20:8 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke20:9 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng chi̍t ê phì-jū kā chèng-lâng kóng
Luke20:10 Siu-sêng ê sî kàu
Luke20:11 Chú-lâng koh chhe pa̍t-ê po̍k-jîn khì. In mā kā i phah
Luke20:12 Chú-lâng chiū chhe tē-saⁿ ê po̍k-jîn khì. In mā kā i siong-hāi
Luke20:13 Āu-lâi phû-tô-hn̂g ê chú-lâng kóng
Luke20:14 M̄-kú tiān-lông khòaⁿ-tio̍h i
Luke20:15 In chiū kā i hiat chhut-khì phû-tô-hn̂g ê gōa-bīn
Luke20:16 I ōe lâi châu-bia̍t chiah-ê tiān-lông
Luke20:17 Iâ-so͘ chù-ì kā in khòaⁿ
Luke20:18 Só͘-ū siak lo̍h-khì hit-tè chio̍h-thâu téng ê lâng
Luke20:19 Hit-sî
Luke20:20 Só͘-í
Luke20:21 Chiah-ê bi̍t-thàm lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke20:22 Goán la̍p-sè hō͘ Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô?”
Luke20:23 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-chhut in ê khúi-kè
Luke20:24 “The̍h chi̍t ê gûn-pè hō͘ góa khòaⁿ. Che ū sím-mi̍h-lâng ê siōng kap jī-hō?” In ìn kóng
Luke20:25 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng
Luke20:26 In tī kong-chiòng bīn-chêng lia̍h bōe tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe-phāng
Luke20:27 Ū chi̍t-kóa chú-tiuⁿ bô koh-oa̍h ê Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia
Luke20:28 “Lāu-su
Luke20:29 Í-chêng bat ū chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī
Luke20:30 Tē-jī--ê
Luke20:31 tē-saⁿ--ê mā chhōa in hiaⁿ-só. Chhit ê lóng án-ni
Luke20:32 Āu-lâi
Luke20:33 Án-ni
Luke20:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke20:35 put-kò ōe-kham-tit tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h koh chìn-ji̍p lâi-sè ê lâng chiū bô kè bô chhōa.
Luke20:36 In-ūi in sī koh-oa̍h ê lâng
Luke20:37 Koan-hē sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū
Luke20:38 I m̄-sī sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè
Luke20:39 Ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke20:40 In chiū m̄-káⁿ koh kā I mn̄g sím-mi̍h.
Luke20:41 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng
Luke20:42 Tāi-pi̍t pún-sin tī Si-phian kóng: Chú kā góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Luke20:43 thèng-hāu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē.
Luke20:44 Tāi-pi̍t to chheng-ho͘ Ki-tok chòe ‘Chú’
Luke20:45 Chèng-lâng teh thiaⁿ ê sî
Luke20:46 “Tio̍h tî-hông keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ài chhēng tn̂g-saⁿ kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì
Luke20:47 In chhim-chiàm kóaⁿ-hū ê ke-hé
Luke21:1 Iâ-so͘ gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h hó-gia̍h-lâng chiong in ê hiàn-kim hiàn lo̍h-khì hōng-hiàn-kūi.
Luke21:2 I koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê sàn-chhiah ê kóaⁿ-hū hiàn nn̄g ê tâng-chîⁿ-á lo̍h--khì.
Luke21:3 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke21:4 In-ūi in lóng sī hiàn in ēng chhun--ê
Luke21:5 Ū lâng teh tâm-lūn Sèng-tiān sī ēng hó chio̍h kap hōng-hiàn ê mi̍h lâi chong-sek--ê. Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke21:6 “Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu
Luke21:7 Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g Iâ-so͘
Luke21:8 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke21:9 Lín thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiàn-cheng kap pō-loān ê siau-sit
Luke21:10 Iâ-so͘ kè-sio̍k kā in kóng
Luke21:11 Ū tōa tōe-tāng
Luke21:12 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng í-chêng
Luke21:13 Chit-ê sī lín chòe kiàn-chèng ê ki-hōe.
Luke21:14 Só͘-í
Luke21:15 In-ūi góa beh sù lín kháu-châi kap tì-hūi
Luke21:16 Liân lín ê pē-bú
Luke21:17 Lín ōe in-ūi góa ê miâ hō͘ chèng-lâng oàn-hūn.
Luke21:18 Put-kò lín liân chi̍t ki thâu-mn̂g to bōe sit-lo̍h.
Luke21:19 Tio̍h jím-nāi chiah ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā.”
Luke21:20 “Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hō͘ kun-tūi pau-ûi ê sî
Luke21:21 Hit-sî
Luke21:22 In-ūi che sī Pò-èng ê Ji̍t-chí
Luke21:23 Tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí
Luke21:24 In ōe hō͘ to-kiàm thâi-sí
Luke21:25 “Hit-sî
Luke21:26 Lâng ōe in-ūi chit sè-kài teh-beh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì kiaⁿ kah hūn--khì
Luke21:27 Hit-sî
Luke21:28 Chiah-ê tāi-chì teh-beh hoat-seng ê sî
Luke21:29 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū kā in kóng
Luke21:30 Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê chhiū puh-íⁿ ê sî chiū chai joa̍h-thiⁿ teh-beh kàu.
Luke21:31 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
Luke21:32 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng
Luke21:33 Thiⁿ kap tōe ōe siau-sit
Luke21:34 “Lín ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn
Luke21:35 
Luke21:36 Tio̍h put-sî kéng-séng
Luke21:37 Chit kúi ji̍t
Luke21:38 Chèng-lâng lóng thàu-chá chiū khì Sèng-tiān thiaⁿ Iâ-so͘ kóng tō-lí.
Luke22:1 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh
Luke22:2 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su in-ūi kiaⁿ bîn-chiòng
Luke22:3 Sat-tàn ji̍p-khì hit-ê kiò-chòe Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi ê sim-lāi; i sī cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê.
Luke22:4 I khì kap chè-si-tiúⁿ í-ki̍p Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ chham-siông
Luke22:5 In chin hoaⁿ-hí
Luke22:6 Iû-tāi tông-ì
Luke22:7 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh
Luke22:8 Iâ-so͘ chhe Pí-tek kap Iok-hān
Luke22:9 In kā I mn̄g
Luke22:10 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke22:11 kā hit-ke ê chú-lâng kóng
Luke22:12 Hit-ê lâng ōe pò lín khòaⁿ lâu-téng chi̍t keng khoán hó-sè ê tōa-thiaⁿ. Lín chiū tī hia chún-pī.”
Luke22:13 In khì
Luke22:14 Boán-chhan ê sî-kan kàu
Luke22:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke22:16 Góa kā lín kóng
Luke22:17 Iâ-so͘ chiong poe chiap--kè-lâi
Luke22:18 Góa kā lín kóng
Luke22:19 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ the̍h piáⁿ
Luke22:20 Chia̍h liáu-āu I koh chiàu án-ni phâng poe
Luke22:21 “Lín khòaⁿ! Chhut-bōe góa hit-ê lâng chit-chūn kap góa chòe-hé chhun-chhiú tī toh-téng.
Luke22:22 In-ūi Jîn-chú ōe chiàu Siōng-tè ê koat-tēng lī-khui sè-kan; m̄-kú chhut-bōe Jîn-chú hit-ê lâng chhám ah!”
Luke22:23 In chiū mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì
Luke22:24 Bûn-tô͘ tiong-kan ū khí cheng-lūn
Luke22:25 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke22:26 Chóng-sī lín m̄-sī án-ni. Lín tiong-kan siōng-tōa--ê tian-tò tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe siōng-sòe--ê; choh léng-siù--ê tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe ho̍k-sāi--ê.
Luke22:27 Án-ni
Luke22:28 “Lín chiah-ê lâng tī góa ê chhì-liān tiong it-ti̍t kap góa chòe-hé.
Luke22:29 Góa ê Pē chiong ông ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ góa
Luke22:30 hō͘ lín thang tī góa ê Kok-tō͘ kap góa chē-toh
Luke22:31 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng
Luke22:32 Put-kò góa ū ūi-tio̍h lí kî-tó
Luke22:33 Pí-tek ìn I kóng
Luke22:34 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Luke22:35 Iâ-so͘ koh kā bûn-tô͘ kóng
Luke22:36 I chiū kā in kóng
Luke22:37 Góa kā lín kóng
Luke22:38 Bûn-tô͘ kóng
Luke22:39 Iâ-so͘ chhut--khì
Luke22:40 Kàu hit-ê só͘-chāi
Luke22:41 Jiân-āu I lī-khui in kàu hiat chio̍h-thâu ōe kàu hiah-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi
Luke22:42 kóng
Luke22:43 Ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ chhut-hiān
Luke22:44 Iâ-so͘ hui-siông thòng-khó͘
Luke22:45 Kî-tó soah
Luke22:46 I chiū kā in kóng
Luke22:47 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî
Luke22:48 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Luke22:49 Iâ-so͘ sin-piⁿ ê bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h teh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Luke22:50 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê kā tōa-chè-si ê po̍k-jîn phut--lo̍h-khì
Luke22:51 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke22:52 Iâ-so͘ kā hiah-ê lâi beh lia̍h I ê chè-si-tiúⁿ
Luke22:53 Góa ta̍k-ji̍t kap lín tī Sèng-tiān
Luke22:54 In lia̍h Iâ-so͘
Luke22:55 In tī tiâⁿ ê tiong-ng khí hé
Luke22:56 Ū chi̍t ê lú-pī khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek ǹg hé teh chē
Luke22:57 Pí-tek m̄ jīn
Luke22:58 Kè bô jōa kú
Luke22:59 Chha-put-to kè chi̍t tiám-cheng
Luke22:60 M̄-kú Pí-tek kóng
Luke22:61 Hit-sî Chú oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ Pí-tek
Luke22:62 I chiū chhut-khì gōa-bīn tōa-siaⁿ thî-khàu.
Luke22:63 Hiah-ê khàn-siú Iâ-so͘ ê lâng kā I hì-lāng
Luke22:64 In ng I ê ba̍k-chiu
Luke22:65 In koh kóng chin chōe ōe kā I bú-jio̍k.
Luke22:66 Thiⁿ-kng
Luke22:67 kā I kóng
Luke22:68 Góa mn̄g lín
Luke22:69 Tùi hiān-chāi khí
Luke22:70 Chèng-lâng kóng
Luke22:71 In chiū kóng
Luke23:1 Choân-thé gī-oân lóng khiā--khí-lâi
Luke23:2 In chiū khòng-kò kóng
Luke23:3 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke23:4 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū tùi hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap kûn-chiòng kóng
Luke23:5 M̄-kú in kian-chhî kóng
Luke23:6 Pí-lia̍p-to chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Luke23:7 I chi̍t-ē chai Iâ-so͘ sio̍k Hi-lu̍t -ông ê koán-hat
Luke23:8 Hi-lu̍t khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘
Luke23:9 I mn̄g Iâ-so͘ chin chōe tāi-chì
Luke23:10 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khiā--khí-lâi
Luke23:11 Hi-lu̍t kap i ê peng mā kā I bú-jio̍k
Luke23:12 Hi-lu̍t kap Pí-lia̍p-to pún-lâi ū oan-siû
Luke23:13 Pí-lia̍p-to tiàu-chi̍p chè-si-tiúⁿ
Luke23:14 kā in kóng
Luke23:15 Hi-lu̍t mā jīn-tēng I bô chōe
Luke23:16 Só͘-í
Luke23:17 Ta̍k-nî ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh
Luke23:18 Kûn-chiòng lóng hoah
Luke23:19 Chit-ê Pa-lia̍p-pa in-ūi tī siâⁿ-lāi chok-loān koh thâi-lâng chiah siū koaiⁿ-kaⁿ.
Luke23:20 Pí-lia̍p-to siūⁿ-beh pàng Iâ-so͘
Luke23:21 M̄-kú in tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Luke23:22 Pí-lia̍p-to tē-saⁿ piàn tùi in kóng
Luke23:23 Put-kò kûn-chiòng kian-chhî
Luke23:24 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū soan-phòaⁿ
Luke23:25 pàng in só͘ iau-kiû hit-ê in-ūi chok-loān
Luke23:26 Hiah-ê peng-sū ah Iâ-so͘ chhut--khì ê sî
Luke23:27 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn bîn-chiòng tè Iâ-so͘
Luke23:28 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t-thâu tùi in kóng
Luke23:29 In-ūi ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu
Luke23:30 Hit-sî
Luke23:31 In-ūi in tùi oa̍h--teh ê chhiū-ba̍k to ōe án-ni chòe
Luke23:32 Lēng-gōa nn̄g ê hoān-lâng mā hō͘ lâng ah-khì kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé chhú sí-hêng.
Luke23:33 In kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe “ Thâu-khak-óaⁿ ”
Luke23:34 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke23:35 Bîn-chiòng khiā tī hia teh khòaⁿ. Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù kā I thí-chhiò
Luke23:36 Hiah-ê peng-sū mā kā I hì-lāng
Luke23:37 kóng
Luke23:38 Tī I ê thâu-khak téng ū chōe-chn̄g ê pâi-á siá “Chit-ê sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông”.
Luke23:39 Chòe-hé tèng ê hoān-lâng
Luke23:40 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê kā i chek-pī kóng
Luke23:41 Lán siū-hêng sī kong-tō
Luke23:42 I chiū tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng
Luke23:43 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
Luke23:44 Chha-put-to tiong-tàu ê sî
Luke23:45 Sèng-tiān lāi ê tiùⁿ-lî li̍h-chòe nn̄g pêng.
Luke23:46 Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Luke23:47 Chi̍t ê kun-koaⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Luke23:48 Chū-chi̍p tī hia teh khòaⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì ê chèng-lâng
Luke23:49 Hiah-ê bat Iâ-so͘ ê lâng
Luke23:50 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Iok-sek; i sī gī-oân
Luke23:51 I bô chàn-sêng kî-tha gī-oân ê kè-bô͘ kap hêng-tōng. I sī Iû-thài -lâng ê siâⁿ A-lī-má-thài ê lâng
Luke23:52 Chit-ê lâng khì kìⁿ Pí-lia̍p-to
Luke23:53 I chiong ûi-thé siu--lo̍h-lâi
Luke23:54 Hit-ji̍t sī Pī-pān-ji̍t
Luke23:55 Tùi Ka-lī-lī kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé lâi hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng tè Iok-sek khì. In chim-chiok khòaⁿ hit-ê bōng
Luke23:56 chiū tńg-khì chún-pī phang-liāu kap phang-iû. An-hioh-ji̍t
Luke24:1 Lé-pài-ji̍t thàu-chá
Luke24:2 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h chio̍h-thâu í-keng tùi bōng kō-khui
Luke24:3 chiū ji̍p--khì
Luke24:4 In ūi-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì gāng--khì m̄ chai beh án-chóaⁿ ê sî
Luke24:5 Chiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ
Luke24:6 Lín tio̍h ōe-kì-tit I iáu tī Ka-lī-lī ê sî kā lín kóng ê ōe
Luke24:7 ‘Jîn-chú it-tēng ōe siū chhut-bōe tī chōe-jîn ê chhiú
Luke24:8 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū siūⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe.
Luke24:9 In lī-khui bōng tńg--khì
Luke24:10 Tùi sù-tô͘ pò-kò chiah-ê tāi-chì--ê
Luke24:11 Sù-tô͘ siūⁿ-kóng chiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng só͘ kóng ê ōe bô-iáⁿ-bô-chiah
Luke24:12 M̄-kú Pí-tek khí--lâi
Luke24:13 Siâng hit-ji̍t
Luke24:14 In tī lō͘-tiong hō͘-siōng teh tâm-lūn só͘ hoat-seng lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì.
Luke24:15 In tâm-lūn lâi tâm-lūn khì ê sî
Luke24:16 In khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Luke24:17 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in
Luke24:18 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Kek-liû-pa ìn I kóng
Luke24:19 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in
Luke24:20 Goán ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap léng-siù kā I sàng-khì hō͘ lâng phòaⁿ sí-hêng
Luke24:21 I chiū-sī goán só͘ teh kî-thāi beh lâi chín-kiù Í-sek-lia̍t Hit-ūi. M̄-nā án-ni
Luke24:22 Koh goán tiong-kan ū kúi-nā ê hū-jîn-lâng hō͘ goán chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ. In thiⁿ phú-kng chiū kàu bōng--ni̍h
Luke24:23 m̄-kú chhē bô Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé. In tńg-lâi pò-kò kóng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h thiⁿ-sài chhut-hiān
Luke24:24 Goán tiong-kan mā ū kúi-nā ê lâng khì bōng--ni̍h
Luke24:25 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng
Luke24:26 Ki-tok kiám m̄-sī eng-kai tio̍h siū chiah-ê khó͘-lān chiah lâi ji̍p I ê êng-kng?”
Luke24:27 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi Mô͘-se kap chèng sian-ti khí
Luke24:28 In teh-beh kàu só͘ beh khì hit-ê chng-thâu
Luke24:29 put-kò in nn̄g ê kiông-kiông kā I lâu
Luke24:30 Iâ-so͘ kap in chē-toh ê sî
Luke24:31 In ê ba̍k-chiu khui
Luke24:32 In chiū hō͘-siōng kóng
Luke24:33 In sûi-sî chhut-hoat
Luke24:34 teh kóng
Luke24:35 Hit nn̄g ê lâng chiū chiong tī lō͘-tiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Luke24:36 Hit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ teh kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì ê sî
Luke24:37 In ia̍h-kiaⁿ-ia̍h-chhoah
Luke24:38 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
Luke24:39 Khòaⁿ góa ê chhiú
Luke24:40 I kóng-liáu chiū chiong I ê kha kap chhiú chhun hō͘ in khòaⁿ.
Luke24:41 In hoaⁿ-hí kah m̄-káⁿ siong-sìn
Luke24:42 In the̍h chi̍t bé hang hó ê hî hō͘ I
Luke24:43 I chiū tī in ê bīn-chêng chiap-khì chia̍h.
Luke24:44 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng

Luke24:46 tùi in kóng

Luke24:48 Lín chiū-sī chiah-ê tāi-chì ê kiàn-chèng-jîn.
Luke24:49 Góa chiong góa ê Pē só͘ èng-ún--ê kau hō͘ lín; tio̍h tī chit-ê siâⁿ thèng-hāu
Luke24:50 Iâ-so͘ chhōa in chhut--khì
Luke24:51 I teh kā in chiok-hok ê sî lī-khui in
Luke24:52 In chiū kā I pài

John1:1 Chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū ū Tō
John1:2 I tī chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū kap Siōng-tè tông-chāi.
John1:3 Siōng-tè thong-kè I chhòng-chō bān-iú; it-chhè pī-chō ê ta̍k-hāng lóng sī thong-kè Tō lâi chhòng-chō.
John1:4 Tī I lāi-bīn ū oa̍h-miā; chit-ê oa̍h-miā sī jîn-lūi ê kng.
John1:5 Chit-ê kng tī o͘-àm tiong teh chiò
John1:6 Ū Siōng-tè chhe--lâi ê chi̍t ê lâng
John1:7 Chit-ê lâng lâi sī beh choh-chèng
John1:8 I pún-sin m̄-sī hit-ê kng
John1:9 Ū chin ê kng chìn-ji̍p sè-kan lâi chiò choân jîn-lūi.
John1:10 I tī sè-kan; sè-kan thong-kè I lâi chhòng-chō
John1:11 I lâi kàu ka-kī ê só͘-chāi
John1:12 Hiah-ê chiap-la̍p I--ê
John1:13 In m̄-sī tùi hiat-thóng
John1:14 Tō chiâⁿ-chòe lâng
John1:15 Iok-hān ūi-tio̍h I choh-chèng
John1:16 Tùi I ê hong-hù lán lóng niá-siū un-tián
John1:17 Lu̍t-hoat thong-kè Mô͘-se pan-pò͘; un-tián kap chin-lí sī thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lâi--ê.
John1:18 Bô lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè
John1:19 Í-hā sī Iok-hān ê kiàn-chèng: Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k phài chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng khì mn̄g Iok-hān ê sî
John1:20 I bô kū-choa̍t hôe-tap
John1:21 In koh mn̄g i
John1:22 In chiū kā i kóng
John1:23 Iok-hān ín-iōng sian-ti Í-sài-a ê ōe
John1:24 Hiah-ê lâng sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhe--lâi-ê.
John1:25 In koh mn̄g Iok-hān
John1:26 Iok-hān ìn kóng
John1:27 I tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi
John1:28 Chiah-ê sū tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ ê Pek-tāi-nî hoat-seng
John1:29 Keh-ji̍t
John1:30 Koan-hē I ê tāi-chì
John1:31 Góa ka-kī mā m̄ bat I
John1:32 Iok-hān koh choh-chèng
John1:33 Góa ka-kī mā m̄ bat I
John1:34 Góa ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
John1:35 Keh-ji̍t
John1:36 i khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ keng-kè
John1:37 Chit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h i án-ni kóng
John1:38 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t--kè-lâi
John1:39 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John1:40 Thiaⁿ Iok-hān ê ōe lâi tè Iâ-so͘ hit nn̄g lâng
John1:41 I seng khì chhē i ê hiaⁿ-ko Se-bûn
John1:42 I chiū chhōa Se-bûn khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘. Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ
John1:43 Keh-ji̍t
John1:44 Hui-le̍k sī Pek-sài-tāi -lâng
John1:45 Hui-le̍k tú-tio̍h Ná-tàn-gia̍p
John1:46 Ná-tàn-gia̍p ìn kóng

John3:18 “Sìn Kiáⁿ ê lâng bōe siū tēng-chōe; m̄-sìn ê lâng í-keng siū tēng-chōe

John3:20 Chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng lóng oàn-hūn kng

John3:24 Hit-sî Iok-hān iáu-bē hō͘ lâng koaiⁿ-kaⁿ.
John3:25 Kúi-nā ê Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ kap chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng ūi-tio̍h kiat-chēng ê lé-gî piān-lūn.
John3:26 In lâi kìⁿ Iok-hān
John3:27 Iok-hān ìn kóng

John3:30 I it-tēng ná heng-ōng
John3:31 Tùi téng-bīn lâi--ê
John3:32 I ūi-tio̍h só͘ khòaⁿ--kìⁿ-ê kap só͘ thiaⁿ--kìⁿ-ê choh-chèng
John3:33 Chiap-siū I kiàn-chèng ê lâng chèng-bêng Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t.
John3:34 Siōng-tè só͘ chhe-khián Hit-ūi kóng Siōng-tè só͘ kóng ê ōe

John4:1 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ pí Iok-hān chio khah chōe bûn-tô͘
John4:2 Kî-si̍t Iâ-so͘ m̄-bat kā lâng sóe-lé
John4:3 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì chiū lī-khui Iû-thài
John4:4 I tio̍h keng-kè Sat-má-lī-a.
John4:5 Iâ-so͘ lâi kàu Sat-má-lī-a ê chi̍t ê siâⁿ
John4:6 Ngá-kok -chíⁿ tī hia. Iâ-so͘ in-ūi kiâⁿ-lō͘ chin siān chiū chē tī chíⁿ-piⁿ. Hit-sî chha-put-to sī tiong-tàu.
John4:7 Ū chi̍t ê Sat-má-lī-a ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi chhiūⁿ-chúi. Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng

John4:9 Sat-má-lī-a ê hū-jîn-lâng ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng
John4:10 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John4:11 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
John4:12 Goán ê chó͘-sian Ngá-kok lâu chit-ê chíⁿ hō͘ goán
John4:13 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John4:14 put-kò lim góa só͘ beh hō͘ i ê chúi--ê bōe koh chhùi-ta. In-ūi góa beh hō͘ i ê chúi tī i ê lāi-bīn ōe chiâⁿ-chòe chúi-chôaⁿ
John4:15 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
John4:16 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
John4:17 Hū-jîn-lâng ìn kóng
John4:18 Lí bat ū gō͘ ê tiōng-hu
John4:19 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng
John4:20 Goán Sat-má-lī-a -lâng ê chó͘-sian tī chit-ê soaⁿ-téng kèng-pài Siōng-tè; lín Iû-thài -lâng kóng Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiah sī kèng-pài Siōng-tè ê só͘-chāi.”
John4:21 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng
John4:22 Lín Sat-má-lī-a -lâng kèng-pài lín só͘ m̄ bat--ê; goán Iû-thài -lâng kèng-pài goán só͘ bat--ê; in-ūi chín-kiù tùi Iû-thài -lâng chhut--lâi.

John4:29 “Lâi-khì khòaⁿ
John4:30 Tāi-ke chiū chhut-siâⁿ khì khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘.
John4:31 Hit-sî bûn-tô͘ kā Iâ-so͘ kóng
John4:32 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John4:33 Bûn-tô͘ chiū mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì kóng
John4:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John4:35 Lín kiám bô án-ni kóng ‘Koh sì kò-ge̍h chiū ū thang siu-sêng’? Góa kā lín kóng
John4:36 Hiān-chāi siu-koah ê lâng í-keng teh niá kang-chîⁿ
John4:37 In-ūi sio̍k-gú kóng ‘Chi̍t ê iā-chéng
John4:38 Lín bô sin-khó͘ keng-choh--ê
John4:39 Hit-ê siâⁿ ū chin chōe Sat-má-lī-a -lâng sìn Iâ-so͘
John4:40 Só͘-í hiah-ê Sat-má-lī-a -lâng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘
John4:41 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng ê ōe
John4:42 Hiah-ê lâng kā hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng

John4:44 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ ka-kī bat kóng
John4:45 Iâ-so͘ kàu Ka-lī-lī ê sî

John4:47 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tùi Iû-thài lâi kàu Ka-lī-lī
John4:48 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng

John4:50 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng

John5:2 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
John5:3 Tī cháu-lông ū chin chōe pīⁿ-lâng tó tī hia; ū sit-bêng--ê
John5:4 
John5:5 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê phòa-pīⁿ saⁿ-cha̍p-poeh nî kú ê lâng.
