John5:7 Hit-ê pīⁿ-lâng ìn kóng
John5:8 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng
John5:9 Hit-ê lâng sûi-sî hó--khí-lâi
John5:10 só͘-í Iû-thài -lâng tùi hit-ê hō͘ Iâ-so͘ i-hó ê lâng kóng
John5:11 I ìn kóng
John5:12 In chiū mn̄g i
John5:13 I m̄ chai hit-ê kā i i-hó--ê sī siáⁿ-lâng
John5:14 Āu-lâi
John5:15 Hit-ê lâng lī-khui liáu-āu tùi Iû-thài -lâng kóng
John5:16 In-ūi án-ni
John5:17 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng
John5:18 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni
John5:19 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng
John5:20 In-ūi Pē thiàⁿ Kiáⁿ
John5:21 Pē án-chóaⁿ hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h
John5:22 Pē lóng bô kā lâng sím-phòaⁿ. I í-keng chiong sím-phòaⁿ ê koân-pèng lóng kau hō͘ Kiáⁿ
John5:23 sī beh hō͘ chèng-lâng chun-kèng Kiáⁿ
John5:24 “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng
John5:25 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng
John5:26 In-ūi Pē pún-sin sī oa̍h-miā ê kun-goân
John5:27 I í-keng chiong sím-phòaⁿ ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ Kiáⁿ
John5:28 Chit-ê sū lín m̄-thang kám-kak kî-koài
John5:29 in ōe tùi bōng--ni̍h chhut--lâi: Choh-hó--ê koh-oa̍h
John5:30 “Góa bōe-tàng chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe sím-mi̍h; góa chí-ū chiàu só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê lâi sím-phòaⁿ. Góa ê sím-phòaⁿ kong-chèng
John5:31 “Góa nā ūi-tio̍h ka-kī choh-chèng
John5:32 Ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâng teh ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng
John5:33 Lín bat phài lâng khì kìⁿ Iok-hān
John5:34 M̄-sī kóng góa su-iàu lâng ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng; kî-si̍t góa kóng chiah-ê sū sī beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h kiù.
John5:35 Iok-hān sī teh to̍h teh chiò-kng ê teng
John5:36 Put-kò góa ū pí Iok-hān khah ū-la̍t ê kiàn-chèng. Pē kau-tài góa oân-sêng ê kang-chok
John5:37 Koh chhe góa ê Pē í-keng chhin-sin ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng. Lín iáu m̄-bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê siaⁿ
John5:38 Lín bô chiong I ê ōe khǹg tī sim-lāi
John5:39 Lín gián-kiù Sèng-keng
John5:40 Án-ni
John5:41 “Góa bô chiap-siū lâng ê chheng-chàn.
John5:42 M̄-kú góa chin-chiàⁿ liáu-kái lín
John5:43 Góa hōng góa ê Pē ê miâ lâi
John5:44 Lín hō͘-siōng chheng-chàn
John5:45 M̄-thang siūⁿ-kóng góa ōe tī Pē ê bīn-chêng khòng-kò lín. Teh khòng-kò lín--ê sī lín it-ti̍t teh gióng-bōng ê Mô͘-se.
John5:46 Lín nā chin-chiàⁿ ū sìn Mô͘-se
John5:47 I siá ê chheh lín to m̄ sìn
John6:1 Chit-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
John6:2 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng tè I khì
John6:3 Iâ-so͘ peh-chiūⁿ soaⁿ
John6:4 Hit-sî Iû-thài -lâng ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh teh-beh kàu.
John6:5 Iâ-so͘ gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng it-ti̍t ǹg I hia teh lâi
John6:6 I kóng án-ni sī teh chhì-giām Hui-le̍k; kî-si̍t
John6:7 Hui-le̍k ìn kóng
John6:8 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘
John6:9 “Chia ū chi̍t ê gín-á
John6:10 Iâ-so͘ kóng
John6:11 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ the̍h hiah-ê piáⁿ
John6:12 In chia̍h pá liáu-āu
John6:13 In chiū chiong hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ ê sut-á
John6:14 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah
John6:15 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ chèng-lâng teh-beh kiông-pek I choh-ông
John6:16 Hông-hun ê sî
John6:17 chiūⁿ-chûn beh kè ô͘ khì Ka-pek-lông. Hit-sî thiⁿ í-keng àm
John6:18 Hut-jiân
John6:19 Bûn-tô͘ kò-chûn
John6:20 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng
John6:21 Bûn-tô͘ chiū hoaⁿ-hí chiap I chiūⁿ-chûn; chûn liâm-piⁿ kàu in beh khì ê só͘-chāi.
John6:22 Keh-ji̍t
John6:23 M̄-kú ū kúi-nā chiah chûn tùi Thê-pí-lí-a lâi kàu óa-kūn Chú kám-siā liáu-āu hō͘ chèng-lâng chia̍h-piáⁿ hit-ê só͘-chāi.
John6:24 Chèng-lâng chi̍t-ē hoat-kak Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ lóng bô tī hia
John6:25 Chèng-lâng tī ô͘ ê tùi-bīn hōaⁿ chhē-tio̍h Iâ-so͘
John6:26 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John6:27 M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h ōe pāi-hoāi ê chia̍h-mi̍h phah-piàⁿ
John6:28 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘
John6:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John6:30 In chiū kóng
John6:31 Goán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chia̍h má-ná
John6:32 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng
John6:33 In-ūi Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê piáⁿ chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi
John6:34 In chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng
John6:35 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John6:36 M̄-kú góa bat kā lín kóng
John6:37 Pē só͘ hō͘ góa ê lâng lóng ōe lâi góa chia; lâi góa chia ê lâng
John6:38 in-ūi góa tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi
John6:39 Chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi ê chí-ì sī án-ni: I só͘ hō͘ góa ê lâng
John6:40 In-ūi góa ê Pē ê chí-ì sī beh hō͘ só͘-ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Kiáⁿ lâi sìn Kiáⁿ ê lâng lóng ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; tī Boa̍t-ji̍t góa ōe hō͘ in koh-oa̍h.”
John6:41 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ kóng “Góa sī tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ”
John6:42 kóng
John6:43 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng
John6:44 Nā m̄-sī chhe góa ê Pē ín-chhōa
John6:45 Sian-ti ê chheh ū kì-chài
John6:46 Che m̄-sī kóng ū lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Pē; chí-ū tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi Hit-ūi bat khòaⁿ--kìⁿ.
John6:47 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng: Sìn ê lâng ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā.
John6:48 Góa chiū-sī hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā ê piáⁿ.
John6:49 Lín ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chia̍h má-ná mā sí--khì.
John6:50 Che chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ
John6:51 Góa chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi hit-ê oa̍h-miā ê piáⁿ. Lâng nā chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ ōe éng-oán oa̍h--teh. Góa beh hō͘ lâng ê piáⁿ chiū-sī góa ê bah
John6:52 Tùi án-ni
John6:53 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng
John6:54 Chia̍h góa ê bah
John6:55 Góa ê bah chin-chiàⁿ ōe-chia̍h--tit
John6:56 Chia̍h góa ê bah
John6:57 Éng-oa̍h ê Pē chhe góa
John6:58 Che chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng--lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ; m̄-sī chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê chó͘-sian só͘ chia̍h ê piáⁿ
John6:59 Chiah-ê sī Iâ-so͘ tī Ka-pek-lông ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng ê sî kóng ê ōe.
John6:60 Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ tiong ū chin chōe lâng thiaⁿ--tio̍h
John6:61 Iâ-so͘ sim-lāi chai-iáⁿ I ê bûn-tô͘ su-hā teh gī-lūn chit-ê sū
John6:62 Án-ni
John6:63 Sù oa̍h-miā--ê sī Siōng-tè ê Sîn; jio̍k-thé lóng bô kong-hāu. Góa kā lín kóng chiah-ê ōe sī Sîn
John6:64 M̄-kú lín tiong-kan ū lâng m̄ sìn.” In-ūi Iâ-so͘ tùi khí-thâu chiū chai sím-mi̍h-lâng m̄ sìn
John6:65 I koh kóng
John6:66 In-ūi án-ni
John6:67 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ kóng
John6:68 Se-bûn Pí-tek ìn kóng
John6:69 Goán í-keng sìn
John6:70 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John6:71 I án-ni kóng sī teh chí Í-su-ka-lio̍k Se-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi
John7:1 Chit-ê tāi-chì í-āu
John7:2 Iû-thài -lâng ê Tah-liâu-choeh teh-beh kàu.
John7:3 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ ê hiaⁿ-tī kā I kóng
John7:4 Lâng beh chhut-miâ bōe tiām-tiām-á chòe. Kì-jiân lí teh chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì
John7:5 In-ūi liân I ê hiaⁿ-tī to bô sìn I.
John7:6 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John7:7 Sè-kan-lâng bô lí-iû oàn-hūn lín; in oàn-hūn góa
John7:8 Lín chòe lín chiūⁿ-khì siú-choeh; góa bô ài chiūⁿ-khì siú chit-ê choeh
John7:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu kè-sio̍k lâu tī Ka-lī-lī.
John7:10 Iâ-so͘ ê hiaⁿ-tī chiūⁿ-khì siú-choeh
John7:11 Choeh-kî ê tiong-kan
John7:12 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng su-hā teh gī-lūn Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì. Ū lâng kóng
John7:13 M̄-kú in kiaⁿ Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù
John7:14 Choeh-kî kè chi̍t-pòaⁿ
John7:15 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù kám-kak kî-koài
John7:16 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John7:17 Lâng nā goān-ì si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì
John7:18 Óa-khò ka-kī kóng--ê sī teh kiû ka-kī ê êng-kng; kiû chhe i Hit-ūi ê êng-kng ê lâng sī chin-si̍t
John7:19 Mô͘-se kiám bô hō͘ lín Lu̍t-hoat? Put-kò lín tiong-kan bô kah chi̍t ê chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat. Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín siūⁿ-beh thâi góa?”
John7:20 Kûn-chiòng ìn kóng
John7:21 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng
John7:22 Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín kiâⁿ kat-lé
John7:23 Kì-jiân lín ūi-tio̍h beh chun-siú Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat
John7:24 M̄-thang khòaⁿ gōa-piáu lâi phòaⁿ-toàn sī-hui
John7:25 Ū chi̍t-kóa Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng teh kóng
John7:26 Lí khòaⁿ
John7:27 M̄-kú chit-ê lâng ê lâi-le̍k lán lóng chai; Ki-tok lâi ê sî
John7:28 Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī ê sî
John7:29 Góa bat I
John7:30 In chiū siūⁿ-beh kā I lia̍h
John7:31 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng sìn I
John7:32 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h kûn-chiòng su-hā teh gī-lūn Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì
John7:33 Iâ-so͘ kóng
John7:34 Lín ōe chhē góa
John7:35 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù hō͘-siōng kóng
John7:36 I kóng ‘Lín ōe chhē góa
John7:37 Choeh-kî ê chòe-āu hit-ji̍t
John7:38 Sìn góa ê lâng
John7:39 Iâ-so͘ án-ni kóng sī chí sìn I ê lâng teh-beh niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn. Hit-sî
John7:40 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū kóng
John7:41 Koh ū lâng kóng
John7:42 Sèng-keng kiám m̄-sī kóng Ki-tok sī Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun
John7:43 Án-ni
John7:44 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siūⁿ-beh lia̍h Iâ-so͘
John7:45 Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe tńg-khì kìⁿ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng. In chiū mn̄g kéng-ōe kóng
John7:46 Kéng-ōe ìn kóng
John7:47 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū tùi in kóng
John7:48 Lán ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ á-sī Hoat-lī-sài-lâng kiám ū lâng sìn I?
John7:49 Chit-tīn m̄ bat Lu̍t-hoat ê kûn-chiòng sī siū chiù-chó͘--ê.”
John7:50 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ê tiong-kan bat khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ kā in kóng
John7:51 “Chiàu lán ê Lu̍t-hoat
John7:52 In ìn kóng
John7:53 Chèng-lâng lóng tńg-khì ka-kī ê chhù
John8:1 m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ.
John8:2 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá
John8:3 Hit-sî keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhōa chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi
John8:4 mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng
John8:5 Kun-kù Lu̍t-hoat
John8:6 In án-ni kóng sī beh chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘
John8:7 In ti̍t-ti̍t kā I mn̄g
John8:8 Jiân-āu I koh khû lo̍h-khì tī thô͘-kha siá-jī.
John8:9 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe
John8:10 Iâ-so͘ khiā--khí-lâi
John8:11 I ìn kóng
John8:12 Iâ-so͘ koh kā chèng-lâng kóng
John8:13 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chiū tùi I kóng
John8:14 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John8:15 Lín ēng lâng ê phiau-chún phoe-phòaⁿ lâng
John8:16 Góa nā phoe-phòaⁿ
John8:17 Koh lín ê Lu̍t-hoat ū kì-chài
John8:18 Góa ūi ka-kī choh-chèng
John8:19 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘
John8:20 Chiah-ê ōe sī Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng ê sî
John8:21 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng
John8:22 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù kóng
John8:23 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John8:24 Só͘-í góa chiah kā lín kóng lín ōe in-ūi ka-kī ê chōe lâi sí; in-ūi lín nā m̄ sìn góa chiū-sī ‘Chū-iú-éng-iú’ Hit-ūi
John8:25 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘
John8:26 Koan-hē lín
John8:27 In bô liáu-kái Iâ-so͘ sī teh tùi in kóng Pē ê tāi-chì.
John8:28 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John8:29 Chhe góa Hit-ūi kap góa tông-chāi; I m̄-bat pàng góa ka-kī chi̍t ê
John8:30 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî
John8:31 Iâ-so͘ tùi sìn I hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng
John8:32 lín ōe bat chin-lí
John8:33 In ìn kóng
John8:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng
John8:35 Lô͘-lē bô éng-oán sio̍k tī chú-lâng ê ka-têng
John8:36 Só͘-í
John8:37 Góa chai lín sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun; m̄-kú lín siūⁿ-beh thâi góa
John8:38 Góa sī teh kóng tùi góa ê Pē hia khòaⁿ--tio̍h-ê; lín sī teh chòe tùi lín ê pē hia thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê.”
John8:39 In ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng
John8:40 Hiān-chāi góa chiong tùi Siōng-tè thiaⁿ--tio̍h ê chin-lí kā lín kóng
John8:41 Lín sī teh chòe lín ê pē só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì.” In ìn kóng
John8:42 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng
John8:43 Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín bô bêng-pe̍k góa ê ōe? Sī in-ūi góa ê ōe lín thiaⁿ bōe ji̍p--khì.
John8:44 Lín ê pē sī Mô͘-kúi; lín kan-ta siūⁿ-beh si̍t-hêng lín ê pē ê io̍k-bōng. I tùi khí-thâu chiū-sī sat-jîn-hoān
John8:45 In-ūi góa kóng chin-lí
John8:46 Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng chí-chèng góa ū-chōe? Kì-jiân góa kóng chin-lí
John8:47 Sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe; lín m̄ thiaⁿ
John8:48 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng
John8:49 Iâ-so͘ kóng
John8:50 Góa bô tui-kiû ka-kī ê êng-kng
John8:51 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng
John8:52 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù ìn kóng
John8:53 Lí kiám pí goán ê pē A-pek-la-hán khah úi-tāi? I í-keng sí
John8:54 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John8:55 Lín m̄ bat I
John8:56 Lín ê pē A-pek-la-hán hoaⁿ-hí teh thèng-hāu góa lâi-lîm ê ji̍t-chí; i ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
John8:57 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng
John8:58 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John8:59 In chiū the̍h chio̍h-thâu beh kā I tìm; m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ siám-khui
John9:1 Iâ-so͘ teh kiâⁿ-lō͘ ê sî
John9:2 I ê bûn-tô͘ kā I mn̄g
John9:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John9:4 Thàn iáu-sī ji̍t--sî
John9:5 Góa tī sè-kan ê sî
John9:6 Chiah-ê ōe kóng-liáu
John9:7 kā i kóng
John9:8 I ê chhù-piⁿ kap bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h i í-chêng teh chòe khit-chia̍h ê lâng
John9:9 Ū lâng kóng
John9:10 In koh mn̄g i
John9:11 I ìn kóng
John9:12 In mn̄g i
John9:13 In chiū chhōa í-chêng sit-bêng hit-ê lâng khì Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng hia.
John9:14 Iâ-so͘ chhiau thô͘ lâi khui i ê ba̍k-chiu hit-ji̍t sī An-hioh-ji̍t.
John9:15 Só͘-í
John9:16 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-lâng kóng
John9:17 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū mn̄g hit-ê sit-bêng ê lâng
John9:18 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù it-ti̍t bô siong-sìn i í-chêng sit-bêng
John9:19 mn̄g in kóng
John9:20 I ê pē-bú ìn kóng
John9:21 M̄-kú i hiān-chāi án-chóaⁿ ōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
John9:22 I ê pē-bú án-ni kóng
John9:23 In-ūi án-ni

John10:1 “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng
John10:2 Tùi mn̂g ji̍p--khì-ê chiah sī iûⁿ ê bo̍k-chiá.
John10:3 Kò͘-mn̂g--ê kā bo̍k-chiá khui-mn̂g; iûⁿ ōe-jīn-tit bo̍k-chiá ê siaⁿ. I kā ka-kī ê iûⁿ chi̍t-chiah chi̍t-chiah kiò-miâ
John10:4 I chhōa ka-kī ê iûⁿ chhut--lâi liáu-āu
John10:5 In it-tēng bōe tè siⁿ-hūn-lâng
John10:6 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng chit-ê phì-jū
John10:7 Só͘-í
John10:8 Só͘-ū pí góa khah tāi-seng lâi--ê lóng sī chha̍t
John10:9 Góa sī mn̂g; thong-kè góa chit-ê mn̂g ji̍p--lâi-ê
John10:10 Chha̍t lâi
John10:11 “Góa sī hó ê bo̍k-chiá. Hó ê bo̍k-chiá ūi-tio̍h iûⁿ pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā.
John10:12 Hō͘ lâng chhiàⁿ--ê m̄-sī bo̍k-chiá
John10:13 I tô-cháu
John10:14 Góa sī hó ê bo̍k-chiá; góa bat góa ka-kī ê iûⁿ
John10:15 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Pē bat góa
John10:16 Góa iáu ū kî-tha ê iûⁿ bô sio̍k chit-ê iûⁿ-tiâu; góa mā it-tēng tio̍h chhōa in lâi. In ōe thiaⁿ góa ê siaⁿ
John10:17 “Pē thiàⁿ góa
John10:18 Bô lâng chhiúⁿ góa ê sìⁿ-miā
John10:19 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe
John10:20 In tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng kóng
John10:21 Lēng-gōa ū lâng kóng
John10:22 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tú-teh khèng-chiok Hiàn-tiān-choeh
John10:23 Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān ê Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông teh kiâⁿ.
John10:24 Iû-thài -lâng kā Iâ-so͘ ûi--teh
John10:25 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John10:26 M̄-kú lín m̄ sìn
John10:27 Góa ê iûⁿ thiaⁿ góa ê siaⁿ
John10:28 Góa sù in éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; in éng-oán bōe bia̍t-bông; bô lâng ōe tùi góa ê chhiú kā in chhiúⁿ--khì.
John10:29 Chiong iûⁿ sù hō͘ góa ê Pē pí it-chhè khah úi-tāi; bô lâng ōe-tàng kā iûⁿ tùi Pē ê chhiú chhiúⁿ--khì.
John10:30 Góa kap Pē sī chi̍t-ê.”
John10:31 Iû-thài -lâng koh the̍h chio̍h-thâu beh kā I tìm.

John10:33 Iû-thài -lâng ìn kóng

John10:42 Tī hia ū chin chōe lâng sìn Iâ-so͘.
John11:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Lia̍p-sat-lō͘

John15:1 “Góa sī chin ê phû-tô-chhiū
John15:2 Liân tī góa koh bô kiat ké-chí ê ki
John15:3 Góa tùi lín kóng ê ōe í-keng hō͘ lín chheng-khì lah.
John15:4 Lín tio̍h put-sî kap góa kiat-liân
John15:5 “Góa sī phû-tô-chhiū
John15:6 Lâng nā bô kap góa kiat-liân
John15:7 Lín nā kap góa kiat-liân
John15:8 Lín nā kiat chin chōe ké-chí
John15:9 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Pē ū thiàⁿ góa
John15:10 Lín nā chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng
John15:11 “Góa kā lín kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì
John15:12 Chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ū thiàⁿ lín
John15:13 Lâng ūi-tio̍h pêng-iú hi-seng sìⁿ-miā
John15:14 Lín nā chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng chiū-sī góa ê pêng-iú.
John15:15 Góa bô koh kiò lín chòe po̍k-jîn
John15:16 M̄-sī lín kéng-soán góa
John15:17 Che sī góa hō͘ lín ê bēng-lēng: Lín tio̍h pí-chhú saⁿ-thiàⁿ.”
John15:18 “Sè-kan-lâng nā oàn-hūn lín
John15:19 Lín nā sio̍k chit sè-kan
John15:20 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit góa kā lín kóng ê ōe
John15:21 Put-kò ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘
John15:22 Góa nā bô lâi
John15:23 Oàn-hūn góa ê lâng mā oàn-hūn góa ê Pē.
John15:24 Góa tī in tiong-kan nā bô chòe pa̍t-lâng m̄-bat chòe ê tāi-chì
John15:25 Che sī beh si̍t-hiān in ê Lu̍t-hoat só͘ kì-chài ê ōe
John15:26 “Góa beh tùi Pē hia chhe chi̍t ūi Ùi-chō͘-chiá lâi lín chia
John15:27 Lín mā tio̍h ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng
John16:1 “Góa í-keng ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng
John16:2 Lâng ōe kā lín kóaⁿ-chhut hōe-tn̂g; sî teh-beh kàu
John16:3 In ōe chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì
John16:4 M̄-kú góa í-keng ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng
John16:5 Hiān-chāi góa teh-beh tńg-khì chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi hia
John16:6 Góa chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng
John16:7 Put-kò
John16:8 I lâi ê sî
John16:9 Tùi chōe
John16:10 tùi gī
John16:11 tùi sím-phòaⁿ
John16:12 “Góa iáu ū chin chōe tāi-chì beh kā lín kóng
John16:13 Chin-lí ê Sîn lâi ê sî
John16:14 I ōe chiong êng-iāu kui hō͘ góa
John16:15 Góa ê Pē só͘-ū ê lóng sī góa ê; in-ūi án-ni
John16:16 “Koh bô jōa kú
John16:17 Ū kúi-nā ê bûn-tô͘ kóng-lâi-kóng-khì
John16:18 Só͘-í in it-ti̍t mn̄g
John16:19 Iâ-so͘ chai in ài-beh mn̄g I
John16:20 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng
John16:21 Sán-hū siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê sî ū iu-chhiû
John16:22 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
John16:23 “Tī hit-ji̍t
John16:24 Kàu hiān-chāi
John16:25 “Chiah-ê tāi-chì góa í-keng ēng phì-jū kā lín kóng lah. Sî teh-beh kàu
John16:26 Tī hit-ji̍t
John16:27 Pē pún-sin thiàⁿ lín
John16:28 Góa tùi Pē hia chhut--lâi
John16:29 I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng
John16:30 Taⁿ goán chai lí bû-só͘-put-ti
John16:31 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John16:32 Lín khòaⁿ
John16:33 Góa ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng
John17:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
John17:2 Lí ū chiong thóng-tī bān-bîn ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ Kiáⁿ
John17:3 Éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā chiū-sī: Jīn-bat lí sī to̍k-it chin Sîn
John17:4 Góa í-keng tī tōe-chiūⁿ ū oân-sêng lí kau-tài góa ê kang-chok lâi êng-iāu lí.
John17:5 Pē ah
John17:6 “Lí tùi chit sè-kan kéng chhut-lâi hō͘ góa ê lâng
John17:7 Hiān-chāi in chai
John17:8 In-ūi góa ū chiong lí hō͘ góa ê sìn-sit hō͘ in; in í-keng chiap-siū koh chin-chiàⁿ chai góa tùi lí hia lâi
John17:9 “Góa ūi-tio̍h in kî-kiû
John17:10 Góa só͘ ū ê it-chhè lóng sī lí ê
John17:11 Góa bô koh tiàm chit sè-kan; put-kò in iáu tiàm tī chit sè-kan. Sèng ê Pē ah
John17:12 Góa kap in chòe-hé ê sî
John17:13 Hiān-chāi góa teh-beh khì lí hia; góa iáu tī chit sè-kan kóng chiah-ê ōe
John17:14 Góa ū chiong lí ê ōe hō͘ in; sè-kan-lâng oàn-hūn in
John17:15 Góa m̄-sī kiû lí chhōa in lī-khui chit sè-kan
John17:16 In m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan
John17:17 Kiû lí ēng chin-lí kā in sèng-hòa. Lí ê ōe chiū-sī chin-lí.
John17:18 Chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ū chhe góa ji̍p sè-kan
John17:19 Ūi-tio̍h in ê iân-kò͘
John17:20 “Góa m̄-nā ūi-tio̍h lí tùi sè-kan kéng chhut-lâi hō͘ góa hiah-ê lâng kî-kiû
John17:21 thang hō͘ in lóng-chóng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê. Pē ah
John17:22 Lí hō͘ góa ê êng-kng
John17:23 Góa tī in lāi-bīn
John17:24 “Pē ah
John17:25 Kong-gī ê Pē ah
John17:26 Góa í-keng ū hō͘ in bat lí ê miâ
John18:1 Iâ-so͘ kî-tó soah
John18:2 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê Iû-tāi mā chai hit só͘-chāi
John18:3 Só͘-í Iû-tāi chiū chhōa chi̍t tūi Lô-má peng
John18:4 Iâ-so͘ chai I só͘ beh tú-tio̍h it-chhè ê tāi-chì
John18:5 In ìn kóng
John18:6 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē kā in kóng “Góa chiū-sī”
John18:7 Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn mn̄g in
John18:8 Iâ-so͘ kóng
John18:9 Chit-ê ōe sī beh èng-giām I í-chêng só͘ kóng--ê
John18:10 Se-bûn Pí-tek ū tòa chi̍t ki to
John18:11 Iâ-so͘ kā Pí-tek kóng
John18:12 Āu-lâi
John18:13 In seng kā I ah-khì hō͘ A-ná
John18:14 Chit-ê Kai-a-hoat í-chêng bat tùi Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k kiàn-gī
John18:15 Se-bûn Pí-tek kap lēng-gōa chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ tè Iâ-so͘ khì; hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kap tōa-chè-si ū se̍k-sāi
John18:16 m̄-kú Pí-tek khiā tī mn̂g-kháu. Kap tōa-chè-si se̍k-sāi hit-ê bûn-tô͘ chhut--lâi
John18:17 Kò͘-mn̂g ê lú-pī tùi Pí-tek kóng
John18:18 In-ūi thiⁿ-khì léng
John18:19 Tōa-chè-si sím-mn̄g Iâ-so͘ koan-hē I ê bûn-tô͘ kap I ê kàu-hùn ê tāi-chì.
John18:20 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John18:21 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ sím-mn̄g góa? Lí khì mn̄g bat thiaⁿ góa kóng-ōe ê lâng
John18:22 Iâ-so͘ kóng-liáu
John18:23 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng
John18:24 Jiân-āu A-ná chiong hō͘ lâng pa̍k--teh ê Iâ-so͘ ah-khì hō͘ tōa-chè-si Kai-a-hoat.
John18:25 Se-bûn Pí-tek iáu khiā-teh hang-hé. Ū lâng mn̄g i
John18:26 Tōa-chè-si ê chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn
John18:27 Pí-tek koh-chài m̄ jīn; hit-sî
John18:28 Thàu-chá
John18:29 Só͘-í
John18:30 In ìn kóng
John18:31 Pí-lia̍p-to kā in kóng
John18:32 Che sī beh èng-giām Iâ-so͘ í-chêng só͘ kóng ê ōe
John18:33 Pí-lia̍p-to koh ji̍p-khì chóng-tok-hú
John18:34 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John18:35 Pí-lia̍p-to kóng
John18:36 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John18:37 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū mn̄g I kóng
John18:38 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g I kóng
John18:39 Lín ū chi̍t ê koàn-lē
John18:40 In koh tōa-siaⁿ hoah
John19:1 Āu-lâi
John19:2 Hiah-ê peng ēng chhì-á pīⁿ chi̍t téng ông-koan kā I tì tī thâu-khak téng
John19:3 In óa--khì
John19:4 Pí-lia̍p-to koh chhut-lâi gōa-bīn
John19:5 Iâ-so͘ chiū chhut--lâi
John19:6 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah
John19:7 Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng ìn kóng
John19:8 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h in án-ni kóng chiū jú kiaⁿ.
John19:9 I koh ji̍p-khì chóng-tok-hú
John19:10 Pí-lia̍p-to tùi I kóng
John19:11 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng
John19:12 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe jú siūⁿ-beh pàng Iâ-so͘
John19:13 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū chhōa Iâ-so͘ chhut--lâi
John19:14 Hit-ji̍t sī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê chêng-ji̍t
John19:15 In chiū hoah kóng
John19:16 Āu-lâi Pí-lia̍p-to chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ in khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè. In chiū kā Iâ-so͘ ah--khì.
John19:17 Iâ-so͘ chhut--lâi
John19:18 In tī hia kā Iâ-so͘ tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè; í-gōa ū nn̄g ê lâng kap I chòe-hé tèng
John19:19 Pí-lia̍p-to siá chi̍t tè chōe-chn̄g
John19:20 Ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng tha̍k-tio̍h chōe-chn̄g
John19:21 Iû-thài -kàu ê chè-si-tiúⁿ tùi Pí-lia̍p-to kóng
John19:22 Pí-lia̍p-to ìn kóng
John19:23 Hiah-ê peng chiong Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè liáu-āu
John19:24 Só͘-í
John19:25 Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú
John19:26 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I ê lāu-bú
John19:27 Āu-lâi I tùi hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kóng
John19:28 Chit-ê sū í-āu
John19:29 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê tóe-móa sng-chiú ê pân
John19:30 Tam liáu-āu
John19:31 Hit-ji̍t sī pài-gō͘
John19:32 Hiah-ê peng chiū khì
John19:33 In lâi kàu Iâ-so͘ hia
John19:34 M̄-kú ū chi̍t ê peng ēng chhiuⁿ chha̍k Iâ-so͘ ê hia̍p-ē
John19:35 Khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê lâng í-keng ū choh-chèng
John19:36 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng sī beh èng-giām Sèng-keng ê ōe
John19:37 Koh lēng-gōa ū chi̍t kù keng-bûn kóng
John19:38 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
John19:39 Koh í-chêng bat tī àm-sî khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ mā tòa iok saⁿ-cha̍p kong-kun ê bu̍t-io̍h chhiau tîm-hiuⁿ ê phang-liāu lâi.
John19:40 In nn̄g lâng chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé siu--lo̍h-lâi
John19:41 Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê só͘-chāi ū chi̍t khu hn̂g
John19:42 In-ūi hit-ji̍t sī pài-gō͘

Acts1:7 I kā in kóng

Acts1:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu

Acts1:11 kóng

Acts1:19 Tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng lóng chai chit-hāng tāi-chì

Acts2:1 Gō͘-sûn-choeh ê ji̍t kàu
Acts2:2 Hut-jiân ū siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi
Acts2:3 Koh ū chhin-chhiūⁿ hun-khui ê hé-chi̍h tùi in chhut-hiān
Acts2:4 In lóng siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa
Acts2:5 Hit-sî
Acts2:6 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siaⁿ hiáng
Acts2:7 In tio̍h-kiaⁿ koh kî-koài
Acts2:8 Lán ná ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h in lóng ēng lán ta̍k-ê lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi ê gú-giân teh kóng-ōe?
Acts2:9 Lán chiah-ê Phà-thê-a -lâng
Acts2:10 Hut-lū-ka kap Pông-hui-lī-a
Acts2:11 Iû-thài -lâng kap kái-chong ji̍p Iû-thài -kàu ê lâng
Acts2:12 Tāi-ke tio̍h-kiaⁿ koh gông-ngia̍h
Acts2:13 Ū lâng thí-chhiò kóng
Acts2:14 Chit-ê sî
Acts2:15 Chiah-ê lâng m̄-sī chiàu lín só͘ siūⁿ teh chiú-chùi
Acts2:16 Kî-si̍t che chiū-sī sian-ti Iok-ní só͘ kóng--ê.
Acts2:17 Siōng-tè kóng: Tī chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí
Acts2:18 Koh tī hiah-ê ji̍t
Acts2:19 Góa beh tī thiⁿ-téng hián-chhut kî-sū
Acts2:20 Tī Chú tōa koh êng-iāu ê Ji̍t lâi-lîm í-chêng
Acts2:21 Hit-sî
Acts2:22 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Acts2:23 Siōng-tè chiàu I ū-tēng ê chí-ì kap kè-ōe
Acts2:24 Siōng-tè kā I kái-tû sí ê thòng-khó͘
Acts2:25 Tāi-pi̍t bat chí I kóng: Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Chú put-sî tī góa ê bīn-chêng
Acts2:26 in-ūi án-ni
Acts2:27 In-ūi lí bōe kā góa pàng-sak tī Im-hú
Acts2:28 Lí í-keng chí-sī góa oa̍h-miā ê tō-lō͘
Acts2:29 “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī
Acts2:30 I sī sian-ti
Acts2:31 Tāi-pi̍t seng khòaⁿ-chhut chit-ê tāi-chì
Acts2:32 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘
Acts2:33 I í-keng siū ko-seng kàu Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Acts2:34 Tāi-pi̍t m̄-bat chiūⁿ-thiⁿ
Acts2:35 thèng-hāu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē.
Acts2:36 “Só͘-í
Acts2:37 Chèng-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe
Acts2:38 Pí-tek tùi in kóng
Acts2:39 In-ūi chit-ê èng-ún sī beh hō͘ lín kap lín ê kiáⁿ-sun
Acts2:40 Pí-tek koh ēng chin chōe ōe chhut-la̍t chòe kiàn-chèng
Acts2:41 Tùi án-ni
Acts2:42 In choân-sim niá-siū sù-tô͘ ê kà-sī
Acts2:43 Sù-tô͘ kiâⁿ chin chōe kî-sū sîn-jiah
Acts2:44 Só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ lóng chòe-hé seng-oa̍h
Acts2:45 koh bōe ka-sán châi-bu̍t
Acts2:46 In ta̍k-ji̍t tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì tī Sèng-tiān chū-hōe
Acts2:47 siōng-chàn Siōng-tè
Acts3:1 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Acts3:2 Ū chi̍t ê chhut-sì kha chiū pái ê lâng
Acts3:3 I chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek kap Iok-hān teh-beh ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān
Acts3:4 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ
Acts3:5 I chiū chù-sîn khòaⁿ in
Acts3:6 Pí-tek tùi i kóng
Acts3:7 Jiân-āu Pí-tek khan i ê chiàⁿ-chhiú
Acts3:8 chiū thiàu khí-lâi khiā--teh
Acts3:9 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ná kiâⁿ ná siōng-chàn Siōng-tè
Acts3:10 koh jīn-tit i sī pêng-siông chē tī “ Súi-mn̂g ” ê mn̂g-kháu teh kiû-khit hit-ê lâng
Acts3:11 Tī Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông
Acts3:12 Pí-tek khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê lâng
Acts3:13 A-pek-la-hán
Acts3:14 Lín kū-choa̍t hit-ūi Sèng koh Kong-gī--ê
Acts3:15 Lín thâi-sí oa̍h-miā ê Goân-thâu
Acts3:16 Tùi sìn-khò chit-ê miâ
Acts3:17 “Hiaⁿ-tī
Acts3:18 Siōng-tè ū thong-kè chèng sian-ti ê chhùi ū-giân I ê Ki-tok tio̍h siū-khó͘
Acts3:19 Só͘-í
Acts3:20 Án-ni
Acts3:21 Chiàu Siōng-tè thong-kè kó͘-chá sèng sian-ti ê chhùi só͘ soan-pò͘--ê
Acts3:22 Mô͘-se bat kóng
Acts3:23 M̄ thiaⁿ chit-ūi sian-ti ê ōe ê lâng
Acts3:24 Tùi Sat-bó-ní kàu í-āu só͘-ū thoân sìn-sit ê sian-ti lóng ū kóng-khí chiah-ê ji̍t-chí.
Acts3:25 Lín sī sian-ti ê kiáⁿ-sun
Acts3:26 Siōng-tè jīm-bēng I ê Po̍k-jîn
Acts4:1 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān tùi kûn-chiòng teh kóng-ōe ê sî
Acts4:2 In hui-siông siū-khì
Acts4:3 In chiū lia̍h chit nn̄g ê sù-tô͘
Acts4:4 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit--ê ū chin chōe lâng sìn
Acts4:5 Keh-ji̍t
Acts4:6 Tōa-chè-si A-ná kap Kai-a-hoat
Acts4:7 In kiò sù-tô͘ lâi khiā tī in tiong-kan
Acts4:8 Hit-sî Pí-tek siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa
Acts4:9 goán kin-á-ji̍t nā-sī ūi-tio̍h hō͘ chit-ê kha-pái ê lâng tit-tio̍h i-hó chit-hāng hó-sū siū chhâ-mn̄g
Acts4:10 lín tāi-ke kap só͘-ū Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng tio̍h chai
Acts4:11 I chiū-sī Sèng-keng só͘ kóng: Lín chiah-ê khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h
Acts4:12 Iâ-so͘ í-gōa lóng bô chín-kiù
Acts4:13 Gī-hōe ê gī-oân khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek kap Iok-hān hiah-ni̍h ióng-kám
Acts4:14 mā khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê tit-tio̍h i-hó ê lâng khiā tī in sin-piⁿ
Acts4:15 Gī-oân chiū kiò in lī-khui gī-hōe
Acts4:16 kóng
Acts4:17 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh pī-bián chit-ê tāi-chì tī bîn-kan ná thoân ná khoah
Acts4:18 Āu-lâi
Acts4:19 M̄-kú Pí-tek kap Iok-hān ìn kóng
Acts4:20 Goán só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê
Acts4:21 Hiah-ê gī-oân m̄ chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ kā in chhú-hoa̍t
Acts4:22 Tùi chit-ê sîn-jiah tit-tio̍h i-hó hit-ê lâng í-keng sì-cha̍p gōa hè.
Acts4:23 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān siū tháu-pàng
Acts4:24 In thiaⁿ-liáu chiū tâng-sim tōa-siaⁿ tùi Siōng-tè kî-tó kóng
Acts4:25 lí bat thong-kè Sèng Sîn ēng lí ê po̍k-jîn goán ê chó͘-sian Tāi-pi̍t ê chhùi kóng: Gōa-pang sī-án-chóaⁿ háng-hoah? Bān-bîn sī-án-chóaⁿ kè-bô͘ bô hāu-kó ê sū?
Acts4:26 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông lóng pâi-tīn beh kau-chiàn; thóng-tī-chiá liân-ha̍p--khí-lâi
Acts4:27 Hi-lu̍t kap Pâng-siu Pí-lia̍p-to kó-jiân tī chit-ê siâⁿ-lāi kap Gōa-pang-lâng í-ki̍p Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng liân-ha̍p lâi kong-kek lí só͘ soán-li̍p sèng ê po̍k-jîn Iâ-so͘.
Acts4:28 In chū-chi̍p beh chòe lí ê koân-lêng kap lí ê chí-ì ū-tēng ōe hoat-seng it-chhè ê sū.
Acts4:29 Taⁿ Chú ah
Acts4:30 Kiû lí chhun-chhiú i-tī
Acts4:31 Kî-tó soah
Acts4:32 Choân-thé sìn-tô͘ lóng tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì
Acts4:33 Sù-tô͘ ēng tōa lêng-le̍k kiàn-chèng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê koh-oa̍h
Acts4:34 In tiong-kan bô lâng ū khiàm-kheh
Acts4:35 só͘ tit--tio̍h ê chîⁿ the̍h-lâi kau hō͘ sù-tô͘
Acts4:36 Ū chi̍t ê chhut-sì tī Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su ê Lī-bī -lâng Iok-sek
Acts4:37 I bōe ka-kī ê chhân-hn̂g
Acts5:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a
Acts5:2 i tit-tio̍h bó͘ ê tông-ì
Acts5:3 Pí-tek tùi i kóng
Acts5:4 Chhân-hn̂g iáu-bē bōe sī lí ê
Acts5:5 A-ná-nî-a chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe
Acts5:6 Ū kúi-nā ê siàu-liân-lâng lâi
Acts5:7 Chha-put-to saⁿ tiám-cheng āu
Acts5:8 Pí-tek mn̄g i
Acts5:9 Pí-tek tùi i kóng
Acts5:10 Sat-hui-lat sûi-sî lek--lo̍h-khì
Acts5:11 Choân kàu-hōe kap thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì ê lâng lóng chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ.
Acts5:12 Sù-tô͘ tī bîn-kan kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah kî-sū. Sìn-tô͘ lóng tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì tī Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông chū-hōe.
Acts5:13 Bîn-chiòng lóng chin chun-tiōng in
Acts5:14 Sìn Chú ê lâng it-ti̍t ke-thiⁿ
Acts5:15 Ū lâng chiong pīⁿ-lâng khǹg tī bîn-chhn̂g á-sī chhn̂g-pho͘
Acts5:16 Koh ū kui-kûn lâng chhōa phòa-pīⁿ--ê í-ki̍p hō͘ siâ-sîn khó͘-chhó͘ ê lâng tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiu-ûi ê hiong-tìn chū-chi̍p óa--lâi
Acts5:17 Tōa-chè-si í-ki̍p kap i kâng-tóng
Acts5:18 In hē-chhiú lia̍h sù-tô͘
Acts5:19 Hit-mî
Acts5:20 “Lín khì
Acts5:21 Sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ i ê ōe
Acts5:22 Siú-ōe kàu ê sî
Acts5:23 “Goán hoat-kiàn kaⁿ-pâng só-tiâu-tiâu
Acts5:24 Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ kap chè-si-tiúⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê pò-kò
Acts5:25 Hit-sî
Acts5:26 Hit-ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ kap i ê pō͘-hā chiū khì kā sù-tô͘ chhōa--lâi; in bô ēng pō-le̍k
Acts5:27 In chhōa sù-tô͘ ji̍p--lâi
Acts5:28 kóng
Acts5:29 Pí-tek kap kî-tha ê sù-tô͘ ìn kóng
Acts5:30 Lín kā I tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè téng ê Iâ-so͘
Acts5:31 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘
Acts5:32 Goán sī chiah-ê tāi-chì ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. Siōng-tè sù hō͘ sūn-ho̍k I ê lâng ê Sèng Sîn mā ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì choh chèng-jîn.”
Acts5:33 Gī-hōe ê gī-oân thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì
Acts5:34 M̄-kú in tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng
Acts5:35 jiân-āu tùi gī-hōe kóng
Acts5:36 Í-chêng Tō͘-ta̍t khí--lâi
Acts5:37 Āu-lâi ū chi̍t ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng Iû-tāi tī hō͘-kháu-phó͘-cha ê sî chhut-hiān
Acts5:38 Taⁿ koan-hē chit-hāng tāi-chì
Acts5:39 nā chhut tī Siōng-tè
Acts5:40 In kiò sù-tô͘ ji̍p--lâi
Acts5:41 Sù-tô͘ lī-khui gī-hōe
Acts5:42 In ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān kap jîn-ke-chhù kè-sio̍k kà-sī lâng
Acts6:1 Kè bô-jōa-kú
Acts6:2 Cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chiū tiàu-chi̍p choân-thé bûn-tô͘
Acts6:3 Só͘-í
Acts6:4 Goán beh choan-sim tī kî-tó kap thoân-tō ê kang-chok.”
Acts6:5 Sù-tô͘ ê ì-kiàn tit-tio̍h choân hōe-chiòng chàn-sêng
Acts6:6 In hō͘ chiah-ê lâng khiā tī sù-tô͘ bīn-chêng
Acts6:7 Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit kè-sio̍k thoân-khui; tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng bûn-tô͘ ê jîn-sò͘ ke-thiⁿ chin chōe
Acts6:8 Sū-thê-hoán chhiong-móa un-sù kap lêng-le̍k
Acts6:9 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng khí-lâi kap Sū-thê-hoán piān-lūn
Acts6:10 Sèng Sîn sù tì-hūi hō͘ Sū-thê-hoán
Acts6:11 Āu-lâi
Acts6:12 In siàn-tōng bîn-chiòng
Acts6:13 In kiò chi̍t-kóa ké chèng-jîn chhut--lâi
Acts6:14 Goán bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h i kóng
Acts6:15 Hit-sî chē tī gī-hōe ê lâng lóng chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ Sū-thê-hoán
Acts7:1 Tōa-chè-si mn̄g Sū-thê-hoán
Acts7:2 Sū-thê-hoán ìn kóng
Acts7:3 kā i kóng
Acts7:4 A-pek-la-hán chiū lī-khui Ka-le̍k-tí -lâng ê tōe-hng
Acts7:5 M̄-kú Siōng-tè lóng bô sán-gia̍p hō͘ i
Acts7:6 Siōng-tè ū án-ni kóng
Acts7:7 I koh kóng
Acts7:8 Jiân-āu Siōng-tè ū kap i li̍p-iok
Acts7:9 “Chiah-ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ oàn-tò͘ Iok-sek
Acts7:10 kiù i thoat-lī it-chhè ê chai-lān
Acts7:11 Āu-lâi Ai-ki̍p kap Ka-lâm choân-tōe hoat-seng ki-hng
Acts7:12 Ngá-kok thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ai-ki̍p ū niû-si̍t
Acts7:13 Tē-jī piàn in khì ê sî
Acts7:14 Iok-sek chhe lâng khì chhiáⁿ i ê lāu-pē Ngá-kok kap choân ka-cho̍k chhit-cha̍p-gō͘ ê lâng lóng khì Ai-ki̍p.
Acts7:15 Ngá-kok chiū lo̍h-khì Ai-ki̍p
Acts7:16 in ê ûi-thé hō͘ lâng ūn kàu Sī-kiàm
Acts7:17 “Siōng-tè tùi A-pek-la-hán ê èng-ún teh-beh si̍t-hiān ê sî
Acts7:18 Āu-lâi ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê m̄ bat Iok-sek ê ông khí-lâi thóng-tī Ai-ki̍p.
Acts7:19 I ēng khúi-kè tùi-hù lán ê bîn-cho̍k
Acts7:20 Tú chit-ê sî Mô͘-se chhut-sì
Acts7:21 I siū pàng-sak ê sî
Acts7:22 I siū chai-pôe ha̍k-si̍p Ai-ki̍p it-chhè ê tì-hūi
Acts7:23 “ Mô͘-se móa sì-cha̍p hè ê sî
Acts7:24 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī hō͘ Ai-ki̍p -lâng khi-hū
Acts7:25 I siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī ōe liáu-kái Siōng-tè beh ēng i ê chhiú lâi kái-kiù in
Acts7:26 Keh-ji̍t
Acts7:27 M̄-kú hit-ê teh khi-hū lâng--ê kā Mô͘-se sak--khui
Acts7:28 Lí mā beh thâi góa chhin-chhiūⁿ chā-hng thâi hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng o͘h?’
Acts7:29 Mô͘-se chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe chiū tô-cháu
Acts7:30 “Sì-cha̍p nî āu
Acts7:31 Mô͘-se khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê kéng-siōng kám-kak chin hi-kî
Acts7:32 ‘Góa sī lín chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè
Acts7:33 Chú tùi i kóng
Acts7:34 Góa ê chú-bîn tī Ai-ki̍p só͘ siū ê thòng-khó͘
Acts7:35 “Chit-ê Mô͘-se
Acts7:36 I chhōa in chhut--lâi
Acts7:37 Chit-ê Mô͘-se bat tùi Í-sek-lia̍t kiáⁿ-sun kóng
Acts7:38 Mô͘-se mā bat kap tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ tùi i kóng-ōe hit-ê thiⁿ-sài í-ki̍p lán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chū-hōe; i ū chiong só͘ niá-siū oa̍h ê sìn-sit thoân hō͘ lán.
Acts7:39 Lán ê chó͘-sian m̄-khéng thiaⁿ-thàn
Acts7:40 In tùi A-lûn kóng
Acts7:41 Hit-sî in chō chi̍t ê gû-á-kiáⁿ ê siōng
Acts7:42 M̄-kú Siōng-tè oa̍t-thâu m̄ khòaⁿ in
Acts7:43 Lín kng Mô͘-lo̍k ê pò͘-pîⁿ
Acts7:44 “Lán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá ū kiàn-chèng Siōng-tè tông-chāi ê hōe-bō͘
Acts7:45 Āu-lâi lán ê chó͘-sian sêng-chiap chit-ê hōe-bō͘. Siōng-tè tùi in bīn-chêng kā gōa-cho̍k kóaⁿ-cháu; in chiàm-léng hit-ê thó͘-tōe í-āu chiah kap Iok-su-a chiong hōe-bō͘ sóa-khì hia
Acts7:46 Tāi-pi̍t ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí
Acts7:47 M̄-kú āu-lâi ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè khí Sèng-tiān--ê sī Só͘-lô-bûn.
Acts7:48 “Kî-si̍t Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè pèng bô tòa tī lâng ê chhiú só͘ khí ê chhù
Acts7:49 Chú kóng: Thiⁿ sī góa ê pó-chō
Acts7:50 Che it-chhè kiám m̄-sī góa chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō--ê?
Acts7:51 “Lín chiah-ni̍h kò͘-chip! Lín ê sim ngī
Acts7:52 Tó chi̍t ê sian-ti bô siū-tio̍h lín ê chó͘-sian pek-hāi? Ū-giân hit-ê Kong-gī ê Po̍k-jîn lâi-lîm hiah-ê lâng lóng hō͘ lín thâi-sí. Taⁿ lín chiâⁿ-chòe chhut-bōe koh thâi-sí hit-ūi Po̍k-jîn ê lâng.
Acts7:53 Lín sī tùi thiⁿ-sài niá-siū Siōng-tè Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng
Acts7:54 In thiaⁿ-tio̍h Sū-thê-hoán chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì
Acts7:55 M̄-kú Sū-thê-hoán hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa
Acts7:56 I kóng
Acts7:57 Chèng-lâng ng hī-khang
Acts7:58 kā i thoa chhut-khì siâⁿ-gōa
Acts7:59 In ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm Sū-thê-hoán ê sî
Acts7:60 I koh kūi--lo̍h-khì
Acts8:1 Thâi-sí Sū-thê-hoán ê tāi-chì Sò-lô mā chàn-sêng. Kâng hit-ji̍t
Acts8:2 M̄-kú ū chi̍t-kóa khiân-sêng ê lâng kā Sū-thê-hoán bâi-chòng
Acts8:3 Hit-sî Sò-lô hē-chhiú chân-hāi kàu-hōe
Acts8:4 Hiah-ê hun-sòaⁿ ê sìn-tô͘ khì ta̍k só͘-chāi thoân-tō.
Acts8:5 Hui-le̍k khì Sat-má-lī-a ê chi̍t ê siâⁿ
Acts8:6 Kûn-chiòng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-le̍k só͘ kóng ê ōe
Acts8:7 Ū chin chōe lâng hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin
Acts8:8 Hit-ê siâⁿ ê lâng lóng tōa hoaⁿ-hí.
Acts8:9 Ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Se-bûn
Acts8:10 Siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng tōa-tōa-sòe-sòe lóng choan-sim thiaⁿ-thàn i
Acts8:11 In lóng choan-sim thiaⁿ-thàn i
Acts8:12 Put-kò in sìn Hui-le̍k só͘ thoân Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im kap Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ liáu-āu
Acts8:13 Liân Se-bûn pún-sin mā sìn; i siū sóe-lé í-āu chiū kā Hui-le̍k tè-tiâu-tiâu. I khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Hui-le̍k só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah kap só͘ chòe tōa koân-lêng ê kî-sū
Acts8:14 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Sat-má-lī-a -lâng í-keng chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit
Acts8:15 In lo̍h--khì
Acts8:16 in-ūi hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ tú siū sóe-lé
Acts8:17 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú
Acts8:18 Se-bûn khòaⁿ-tio̍h sù-tô͘ hōaⁿ-chhiú ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn
Acts8:19 kóng
Acts8:20 Pí-tek tùi i kóng
Acts8:21 Che bô lí ê hūn
Acts8:22 Só͘-í
Acts8:23 Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí sim-lāi chhiong-móa tham-sim oàn-tò͘
Acts8:24 Se-bûn ìn kóng
Acts8:25 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān chòe kiàn-chèng
Acts8:26 Chú ê thiⁿ-sài kā Hui-le̍k kóng
Acts8:27 Hui-le̍k khí--lâi
Acts8:28 
Acts8:29 Sèng Sîn kā Hui-le̍k kóng
Acts8:30 Hui-le̍k cháu óa--khì
Acts8:31 I ìn kóng
Acts8:32 I teh tha̍k ê hit-tōaⁿ keng-bûn sī án-ni: I chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ hō͘ lâng khan-khì thâi
Acts8:33 I jím-siū lêng-jio̍k ê sî bô lâng thòe I chú-chhî kong-tō. Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng soat-bêng I ê sè-hē? In-ūi I ê sìⁿ-miā tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siau-bia̍t.
Acts8:34 Thài-kàm mn̄g Hui-le̍k
Acts8:35 Hui-le̍k chiū tùi hit-tōaⁿ keng-bûn khai-sí tùi i thoân Iâ-so͘ ê hok-im.
Acts8:36 In tùi hit-tiâu lō͘ lo̍h--khì
Acts8:37 
Acts8:38 Thài-kàm kiò chhia thêng--teh
Acts8:39 In tùi chúi--ni̍h khí--lâi ê sî
Acts8:40 Āu-lâi ū lâng tī A-só-to͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-le̍k; i iân-lō͘ tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī thoân hok-im it-ti̍t kàu Khái-sat-lī-a.
Acts9:1 Sò-lô kè-sio̍k khióng-hat beh sat-hāi Chú ê bûn-tô͘. I khì kìⁿ tōa-chè-si
Acts9:2 iau-kiû tōa-chè-si siá kong-hâm hō͘ Tāi-má-sū-kek ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g
Acts9:3 I chiū khì
Acts9:4 I chiū poa̍h-lo̍h thô͘-kha
Acts9:5 I mn̄g kóng
Acts9:6 Khí--lâi
Acts9:7 Tâng-kiâⁿ ê lâng chiū khiā--teh
Acts9:8 Sò-lô tùi thô͘-kha peh--khí-lâi
Acts9:9 I saⁿ ji̍t kú bô khòaⁿ--kìⁿ
Acts9:10 Tī Tāi-má-sū-kek ū chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ miâ kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a. Tī īⁿ-siōng tiong Chú kā i kiò
Acts9:11 Chú kóng
Acts9:12 I tī īⁿ-siōng tiong ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a ji̍p-lâi kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú
Acts9:13 A-ná-nî-a ìn kóng
Acts9:14 I ū chè-si-tiúⁿ ê siū-koân thang lia̍h só͘-ū kiû-kiò lí ê miâ ê lâng
Acts9:15 Chú tùi i kóng
Acts9:16 Góa mā beh hō͘ i chai
Acts9:17 A-ná-nî-a chiū khì
Acts9:18 Sûi-sî ū chhin-chhiūⁿ hî-lân ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ tùi Sò-lô ê ba̍k-chiu lak--lo̍h-lâi
Acts9:19 chia̍h pá liáu-āu
Acts9:20 I sûi-sî tī ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g soan-káng Iâ-so͘
Acts9:21 Thiaⁿ--tio̍h ê lâng lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ
Acts9:22 Sò-lô ná kóng ná ū la̍t
Acts9:23 Chin chōe ji̍t āu
Acts9:24 in ê kè-bô͘ ū hō͘ Sò-lô thiaⁿ--tio̍h. In mî-ji̍t tī siâⁿ-mn̂g tng-tán beh kā i thâi.
Acts9:25 M̄-kú i ê bûn-tô͘ tī àm-sî kā i chhōa--chhut-lâi
Acts9:26 Sò-lô kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng
Acts9:27 Put-kò Pa-ná-pa chiap-la̍p i
Acts9:28 Sò-lô tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kap sù-tô͘ ū chhut-ji̍p lâi-óng
Acts9:29 I mā ū kap kóng Hi-la̍h-gú ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng-ōe piān-lūn
Acts9:30 Sìn-tô͘ chai-iáⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì
Acts9:31 Hit-sî
Acts9:32 Pí-tek khì ta̍k só͘-chāi hóng-būn
Acts9:33 I tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Í-nî-ngá; chit-ê lâng poàn-sin-put-sūi
Acts9:34 Pí-tek tùi i kóng
Acts9:35 Só͘-ū tòa tī Lū-tāi kap Sa-lûn ê lâng lóng ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
Acts9:36 Tī Iok-phà ū chi̍t ê lú sìn-tô͘
Acts9:37 I phòa-pīⁿ sí--khì
Acts9:38 In-ūi Lū-tāi lī Iok-phà bô hn̄g
Acts9:39 Pí-tek chiū khí--lâi
Acts9:40 Pí-tek kiò tāi-ke lóng chhut--khì
Acts9:41 Pí-tek chhun-chhiú kā i hû--khí-lâi
Acts9:42 Chit-ê siau-sit thoân-piàn Iok-phà
Acts9:43 Pí-tek tī Iok-phà chi̍t ê hoan-phê sai-hū Se-bûn ê chhù tòa chin chōe ji̍t.
Acts10:1 Tī Khái-sat-lī-a ū chi̍t ê lâng
Acts10:2 I sī khiân-sêng ê lâng
Acts10:3 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Acts10:4 I kā thiⁿ-sài ti̍t-ti̍t siòng
Acts10:5 Taⁿ tio̍h chhe lâng khì Iok-phà
Acts10:6 I choh lâng-kheh tòa tī hoan-phê sai-hū Se-bûn ê chhù; i ê chhù tī hái-piⁿ.”
Acts10:7 Tùi i kóng-ōe ê thiⁿ-sài lī-khui liáu-āu

Acts10:17 Pí-tek kám-kak kî-koài

Acts10:24 Koh keh-ji̍t

Acts10:31 kóng

Acts10:34 Pí-tek khui-chhùi kóng
Acts10:35 Bô-lūn tó chi̍t ê bîn-cho̍k

Acts10:37 
Acts10:38 chiū-sī
Acts10:39 Goán chiū-sī I tī Iû-thài ta̍k só͘-chāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘ chòe ê sū ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. In kā I tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè téng
Acts10:40 tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè hō͘ I koh-oa̍h
Acts10:41 m̄-sī tùi só͘-ū ê lâng
Acts10:42 I bēng-lēng goán thoân hok-im hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng
Acts10:43 Só͘-ū ê sian-ti lóng ūi-tio̍h I chòe kiàn-chèng kóng
Acts10:44 Pí-tek iáu-teh kóng-ōe ê sî
Acts10:45 Kap Pí-tek tùi Iok-phà chòe-hé lâi hiah-ê siū kat-lé ê sìn-tô͘ lóng tōa tio̍h-kiaⁿ
Acts10:46 in-ūi in ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê lâng kóng lêng-gú koh chheng-chàn Siōng-tè ê úi-tāi. Jiân-āu Pí-tek kóng
Acts10:47 “Chiah-ê lâng kap lán kâng-khoán í-keng ū niá-siū Sèng Sîn
Acts10:48 I chiū bēng-lēng in hōng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé. Āu-lâi
Acts11:1 Sù-tô͘ kap tòa tī Iû-thài ê sìn-tô͘ lóng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Gōa-pang-lâng mā chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê tō.
Acts11:2 Pí-tek chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
Acts11:3 “Lí kèng-jiân ji̍p-khì bô siū kat-lé ê lâng ê chhù kap in chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g!”
Acts11:4 Pí-tek chiū chiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì tùi thâu chi̍t-hāng chi̍t-hāng kā in soat-bêng:
Acts11:5 “Góa tī Iok-phà -siâⁿ teh kî-tó ê sî ū ji̍p-sîn khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng
Acts11:6 Góa siông-sè khòaⁿ
Acts11:7 Góa koh thiaⁿ-tio̍h ū siaⁿ kā góa kóng
Acts11:8 Góa kóng
Acts11:9 Hit-ê siaⁿ tē-jī piàn tùi thiⁿ-téng ìn góa kóng
Acts11:10 Chit-ê tāi-chì kè-sio̍k ū saⁿ piàn
Acts11:11 Tú hit-sî
Acts11:12 Sèng Sîn kiò góa tio̍h kap in khì
Acts11:13 Ko-nî-liû kā goán kóng i ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī i ê chhù-lāi
Acts11:14 I ū ōe beh kā lí kóng
Acts11:15 Góa khai-sí kóng-ōe ê sî
Acts11:16 Góa chiū siūⁿ-khí Chú só͘ kóng ê ōe: Iok-hān ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé
Acts11:17 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè ū chiong lán sìn Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sî só͘ niá-siū siâng-khoán ê un-sù sù hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng
Acts11:18 In thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū tiām--khì
Acts11:19 In-ūi Sū-thê-hoán ê tāi-chì siū pek-hāi sì-sòaⁿ ê sìn-tô͘
Acts11:20 M̄-kú kî-tiong ū chi̍t-kóa Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su kap Kó͘-lī-nāi ê sìn-tô͘ kàu An-thê-o
Acts11:21 Chú ê khùi-la̍t kap in tông-chāi
Acts11:22 Chit-ê siau-sit thoân kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê kàu-hōe
Acts11:23 I chi̍t-ē kàu-ūi
Acts11:24 Pa-ná-pa sī hó-lâng
Acts11:25 Āu-lâi

Acts11:29 Bûn-tô͘ chiū koat-tēng ta̍k-ê lâng chiàu ka-kī ê lêng-le̍k koan-hiàn

Acts12:1 Chha-put-to hit-ê sî

Acts12:4 I lia̍h Pí-tek
Acts12:5 Pí-tek chiū án-ni hō͘ lâng koaiⁿ tī kaⁿ--ni̍h; kàu-hōe ūi-tio̍h i tùi Siōng-tè pek-chhiat kî-tó.

Acts13:30 Chóng-sī Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h

Acts13:52 Bûn-tô͘ móa-sim hoaⁿ-hí
Acts14:1 Siâng-khoán ê tāi-chì mā hoat-seng tī Í-ko-liām. Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa ji̍p-khì Iû-thài -lâng ê hōe-tn̂g káng-tō
Acts14:2 M̄-kú hiah-ê m̄-sìn ê Iû-thài -lâng siàn-tōng Gōa-pang-lâng
Acts14:3 Put-kò in nn̄g lâng tī hia tòa chin kú
Acts14:4 Siâⁿ-lāi ê kûn-chiòng soah hun-lia̍t
Acts14:5 Hit-sî
Acts14:6 Sù-tô͘ chai chit-ê tāi-chì
Acts14:7 tī hia kè-sio̍k thoân hok-im.
Acts14:8 Tī Lō͘-su-tek
Acts14:9 I thiaⁿ Pó-lô káng-tō; Pó-lô chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ
Acts14:10 chiū tōa-siaⁿ kóng
Acts14:11 Kûn-chiòng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô ê só͘-chòe
Acts14:12 In chheng-ho͘ Pa-ná-pa chòe Tiū-su
Acts14:13 Siâⁿ-gōa ū chi̍t ê Tiū-su -biō ê chè-si
Acts14:14 Pa-ná-pa kap Pó-lô nn̄g ê sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h chiū thiah-phòa saⁿ
Acts14:15 “Lín ná teh chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì? Goán mā-sī lâng
Acts14:16 Chá-chêng ê sè-tāi
Acts14:17 Put-kò I it-ti̍t ū thong-kè só͘ chòe ê hó-sū lâi hián-bêng I ka-kī
Acts14:18 Sù-tô͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe chiah lím-lím-á chó͘-chí kûn-chiòng tùi in hiàn-chè.
Acts14:19 Ū chi̍t-kóa tùi Pí-se-tí ê An-thê-o kap Í-ko-liām lâi ê Iû-thài -lâng siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm Pó-lô
Acts14:20 Bûn-tô͘ ûi óa-lâi ê sî
Acts14:21 Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa tī Te̍k-pì thoân hok-im
Acts14:22 iân-lō͘ kian-kò͘ bûn-tô͘ ê sìn-sim
Acts14:23 In nn̄g lâng tī ta̍k-ê kàu-hōe soán-phài tiúⁿ-ló
Acts14:24 In nn̄g lâng keng-kè Pí-se-tí lâi kàu Pông-hui-lī-a
Acts14:25 tī Pia̍t-ka káng-tō liáu-āu lo̍h-khì A-tāi-lī
Acts14:26 tùi hia chē-chûn tò-khì An-thê-o; chiū-sī tī chia kàu-hōe ū chiong in kau-thok tī Siōng-tè ê un-tián
Acts14:27 In kàu An-thê-o chiū tiàu-chi̍p kàu-hōe ê chèng sìn-tô͘
Acts14:28 Āu-lâi in kap chèng bûn-tô͘ tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan.
Acts15:1 Ū kúi-nā ê lâng tùi Iû-thài lo̍h-lâi An-thê-o teh kà-sī sìn-tô͘ kóng
Acts15:2 Pó-lô í-ki̍p Pa-ná-pa kap in ū ke̍k-lia̍t ê cheng-piān. Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê būn-tôe
Acts15:3 Kàu-hōe ê lâng sàng in chhut-hoat. In keng-kè Hui-nî-ki kap Sat-má-lī-a
Acts15:4 In kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
Acts15:5 Put-kò ū kúi-nā ê sio̍k Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê sìn-tô͘ khiā khí-lâi kóng
Acts15:6 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê būn-tôe
Acts15:7 Piān-lūn chin kú liáu-āu
Acts15:8 Hit-ūi chai lâng lāi-sim ê Siōng-tè sù Sèng Sîn hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng
Acts15:9 Tùi sìn
Acts15:10 Kì-jiân sī án-ni
Acts15:11 M̄ eng-kai án-ni
Acts15:12 Tāi-ke lóng chēng-chēng thiaⁿ Pa-ná-pa kap Pó-lô kóng-khí Siōng-tè thong-kè in tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan só͘ kiâⁿ it-chhè ê sîn-jiah kî-sū.
Acts15:13 In kóng soah
Acts15:14 Tú-chiah Se-bûn ū kóng-tio̍h Siōng-tè tong-chho͘ án-chóaⁿ khòaⁿ-kò͘ Gōa-pang-lâng
Acts15:15 Sian-ti ū kóng-khí kap chit-ê siâng-khoán ì-sù ê ōe. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài:
Acts15:16 Chú kóng: Chiah-ê sū í-āu góa beh tò-tńg--lâi
Acts15:17 thang hō͘ só͘ chhun ê lâng
Acts15:18 
Acts15:19 “Só͘-í
Acts15:20 put-kò tio̍h siá-phoe hoan-hù in m̄-thang chia̍h pài ngó͘-siōng bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h; m̄-thang îm-loān; m̄-thang chia̍h ni̍h-sí ê cheng-siⁿ kap huih.
Acts15:21 In-ūi tùi kó͘-chá í-lâi
Acts15:22 Hit-sî
Acts15:23 Sù-tô͘ kau-tài in tòa--khì ê phoe án-ni siá: “Goán chiah-ê choh sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló ê hiaⁿ-tī
Acts15:24 Thiaⁿ-kóng ū tùi goán chia chhut--khì ê lâng khì lín hia
Acts15:25 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni
Acts15:26 chit nn̄g ê lâng ūi-tio̍h lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kam-goān hiàn sìⁿ-miā.
Acts15:27 Só͘-í
Acts15:28 In-ūi Sèng Sîn kap goán koat-tēng
Acts15:29 Chiū-sī m̄-thang chia̍h pài ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h; m̄-thang chia̍h huih kap ni̍h-sí ê cheng-siⁿ; mā m̄-thang îm-loān. Chiah-ê tāi-chì lín nā bô hoān--tio̍h chiū hó. Goān lín pêng-an!”
Acts15:30 In siū-phài lo̍h-khì An-thê-o
Acts15:31 Chèng-lâng tha̍k-tio̍h hit-tiuⁿ phoe
Acts15:32 Iû-tāi kap Se-la
Acts15:33 In tī hia tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan liáu-āu
Acts15:34 
Acts15:35 Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa kè-sio̍k tòa tī An-thê-o; in kap kî-tha chin chōe lâng chòe-hé kà-sī koh soan-káng Chú ê sìn-sit.
Acts15:36 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu
Acts15:37 Pa-ná-pa ài-beh chhōa kiò-chòe Má-khó ê Iok-hān chòe-hé khì
Acts15:38 m̄-kú Pó-lô siūⁿ-kóng bô sek-ha̍p
Acts15:39 In nn̄g ê lâng ì-kiàn ke̍k-lia̍t chhiong-tu̍t
Acts15:40 Pó-lô kéng Se-la
Acts15:41 I kiâⁿ-thàu Sū-lī-a kap Ki-lī-ka
Acts16:1 Pó-lô koh khì Te̍k-pì kap Lō͘-su-tek
Acts16:2 Lō͘-su-tek kap Í-ko-liām ê sìn-tô͘ lóng chheng-chàn i.
Acts16:3 Pó-lô siūⁿ-beh chhōa i chòe-hé khì
Acts16:4 In chi̍t ê siâⁿ kè chi̍t ê siâⁿ chiong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló só͘ gī-koat ê kui-lē kau hō͘ in khì chun-siú.
Acts16:5 Tùi án-ni
Acts16:6 In-ūi Sèng Sîn chó͘-chí Pó-lô kap Se-la tī A-sè-a -séng thoân-tō
Acts16:7 In lâi kàu Múi-se-a pian-kài ê sî
Acts16:8 in chiū se̍h-kè Múi-se-a
Acts16:9 Hit-àm
Acts16:10 Pó-lô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê īⁿ-siōng liáu-āu
Acts16:11 Goán tùi Te̍k-lô-a khui-chûn
Acts16:12 Goán tùi hia lâi kàu Má-kî-tùn tē-it khu ê siâⁿ Hui-li̍p-pí; chit-ê siâⁿ sī Lô-má ê si̍t-bîn-khu. Goán tī hia tòa kúi-nā ji̍t.
Acts16:13 Tī An-hioh-ji̍t
Acts16:14 Ū chi̍t ê bōe chí-sek-pò͘ ê Chhui-ngá-chhui-lat ê hū-lú
Acts16:15 I kap choân-ke lóng siū sóe-lé
Acts16:16 Ū chi̍t ji̍t
Acts16:17 I tè tī Pó-lô kap goán āu-bīn
Acts16:18 I chin chōe ji̍t lóng án-ni hoah; Pó-lô kám-kak chin thó-ià
Acts16:19 Cha-bó͘ lô͘-lē ê chú-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h in thàn-chîⁿ ê ǹg-bāng lóng bô--khì
Acts16:20 kau hō͘ Lô-má koaⁿ-tiúⁿ
Acts16:21 teh thoân lán Lô-má -lâng m̄ eng-kai chiap-siū á-sī chun-siú ê hong-sio̍k si̍p-koàn.”
Acts16:22 Kûn-chiòng chham-teh kong-kek
Acts16:23 Peng-teng kā in kòng chin chōe ē liáu-āu
Acts16:24 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chiap-tio̍h bēng-lēng
Acts16:25 Chha-put-to pòaⁿ-mî
Acts16:26 Hut-jiân ū tōa tōe-tāng
Acts16:27 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chhíⁿ--khí-lâi
Acts16:28 Pó-lô tōa-siaⁿ hoah
Acts16:29 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng kiò lâng gia̍h-teng lâi
Acts16:30 jiân-āu chhōa in chhut--khì
Acts16:31 In kóng
Acts16:32 In chiū chiong Chú ê tō-lí kóng hō͘ i kap in choân-ke ê lâng thiaⁿ.
Acts16:33 Hit-mî
Acts16:34 I chhōa in ji̍p-khì i ê chhù
Acts16:35 Keh-chá-khí
Acts16:36 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chiong chiah-ê ōe kā Pó-lô kóng
Acts16:37 M̄-kú Pó-lô tùi kéng-koaⁿ kóng
Acts16:38 Kéng-koaⁿ chiong chiah-ê ōe tùi Lô-má ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ pò-kò. In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô kap Se-la sī Lô-má kong-bîn chiū chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Acts16:39 lâi kaⁿ--ni̍h khǹg in
Acts16:40 Pó-lô kap Se-la lī-khui kaⁿ-ga̍k
Acts17:1 Pó-lô kap Se-la keng-kè Àm-hui-pho-lí kap A-pho-lô-nî-a
Acts17:2 Pó-lô chiàu si̍p-koàn ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g
Acts17:3 I káng-kái koh chèng-bêng Ki-tok it-tēng tio̍h siū-hāi
Acts17:4 In tiong-kan ū lâng siū sòe-ho̍k lâi sìn
Acts17:5 M̄-kú Iû-thài -lâng khí oàn-tò͘
Acts17:6 In chhē bô
Acts17:7 Iâ-sun kèng-jiân kā in siu-liû. In ûi-pōe Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ê hoat-lēng
Acts17:8 Kûn-chiòng kap tōe-hng-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe tio̍h-kip put-an.
Acts17:9 Koaⁿ-oân tùi Iâ-sun kap kî-tha ê lâng siu chîⁿ kau-pó liáu-āu pàng in chhut--khì.
Acts17:10 Hit-àm
Acts17:11 Chiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng pí Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka ê Iû-thài -lâng khah khai-bêng
Acts17:12 In tiong-kan ū chin chōe chun-kùi ê Hi-la̍h hū-jîn-lâng kap ta-po͘-lâng sìn.
Acts17:13 M̄-kú Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka ê Iû-thài -lâng chi̍t-ē chai-iáⁿ Pó-lô mā tī Pì-lí-a teh thoân Siōng-tè ê tō
Acts17:14 Sìn-tô͘ sûi-sî sàng Pó-lô khì hái-piⁿ; Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài lâu tī hia.
Acts17:15 In chi̍t-lō͘ hō͘-sàng Pó-lô kàu Ngá-tián. Pó-lô hoan-hù in kiò Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài chīn-liōng kóaⁿ-kín khì kap i hōe-ha̍p
Acts17:16 Pó-lô tī Ngá-tián teh thèng-hāu Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài ê tiong-kan
Acts17:17 I tī hōe-tn̂g kap Iû-thài -lâng í-ki̍p kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê Gōa-pang-lâng tâm-lūn
Acts17:18 Ū chi̍t-kóa I-phek-khiu-ló͘ kap Su-to-a ha̍k-phài ê tiat-ha̍k-ka lâi kap i piān-lūn. Ū lâng kóng
Acts17:19 In chiū kā Pó-lô thoa kàu A-lio̍k Pa-kó͘ gī-tiûⁿ
Acts17:20 Ū chi̍t-kóa tāi-chì goán thiaⁿ-liáu koài-koài
Acts17:21 Goân-lâi só͘-ū Ngá-tián -lâng kap tòa tī hia ê gōa-kok-lâng ēng chin chōe sî-kan tâm-lūn kap thiaⁿ sin-kî ê sū.
Acts17:22 Pó-lô khiā tī A-lio̍k Pa-kó͘ gī-tiûⁿ ê tiong-ng
Acts17:23 Góa tī siâⁿ-lāi teh kiâⁿ
Acts17:24 Chit-ūi chhòng-chō ú-tiū kap kî-tiong bān-mi̍h ê Siōng-tè sī thiⁿ-tōe ê Chú
Acts17:25 mā bô khiàm-ēng lâng ê chhiú só͘ hiàn ê mi̍h
Acts17:26 I tùi chi̍t ê lâng chō-chhut ta̍k chióng-cho̍k ê lâng
Acts17:27 Siōng-tè án-ni chòe sī beh hō͘ in chhē I
Acts17:28 In-ūi ‘lán khò I seng-oa̍h
Acts17:29 Kì-jiân lán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-sun
Acts17:30 Jîn-lūi iáu oa̍h tī bû-ti ê sî-tāi
Acts17:31 In-ūi I í-keng koat-tēng ji̍t-chí
Acts17:32 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū
Acts17:33 Jiân-āu Pó-lô tùi in tiong-kan chhut--khì.
Acts17:34 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng tè i khì
Acts18:1 Chit-ê sū í-āu
Acts18:2 I tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê tī Pún-to͘ chhut-sì ê Iû-thài -lâng
Acts18:3 in-ūi kâng hâng-gia̍p
Acts18:4 Ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t
Acts18:5 Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài tùi Má-kî-tùn lâi liáu-āu
Acts18:6 In kā i hoán-tùi koh húi-pòng ê sî
Acts18:7 Jiân-āu Pó-lô lī-khui in
Acts18:8 Hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán Ki-lī-sū-pò͘ kap i ê choân-ke lóng sìn Chú; koh ū chin chōe Ko-lîm-to -lâng thiaⁿ-liáu lâi sìn
Acts18:9 Ū chi̍t àm
Acts18:10 in-ūi góa kap lí tông-chāi
Acts18:11 Pó-lô tī hia tòa chi̍t nî pòaⁿ kú
Acts18:12 Ka-liû choh A-kai-a chóng-tok ê sî
Acts18:13 kò i kóng
Acts18:14 Pó-lô tú-beh khui-chhùi
Acts18:15 Só͘ cheng-lūn--ê kì-jiân sī koan-hē lín Lu̍t-hoat ê jī-gán kap bêng-chheng
Acts18:16 I kā in kóaⁿ-chhut hoat-têng.
Acts18:17 Chèng-lâng chiū lia̍h hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán Só͘-thê-nî
Acts18:18 Pó-lô tī Ko-lîm-to kap sìn-tô͘ koh tòa chin chōe ji̍t liáu-āu lī-khui in
Acts18:19 In kàu Í-hut-só͘
Acts18:20 Tāi-ke chhiáⁿ i lâu lo̍h-lâi ke tòa kúi-ji̍t-á
Acts18:21 Beh lī-khui ê sî
Acts18:22 I tī Khái-sat-lī-a lo̍h-chûn
Acts18:23 Pó-lô tī hia tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan liáu-āu koh chhut-hoat
Acts18:24 Ū chi̍t ê tī A-le̍k-san-tāi chhut-sì ê Iû-thài -lâng
Acts18:25 I tùi Chú ê Tō-lō͘ ū siū-kè hùn-liān
Acts18:26 I tī hōe-tn̂g hó-táⁿ khai-sí káng-tō. Pek-ki-la kap A-ku-la thiaⁿ-tio̍h i ê káng-tō chiū chhōa i khì in tau
Acts18:27 Āu-lâi A-pho-lô koat-tēng beh khì A-kai-a
Acts18:28 in-ūi tī kong-khai ê piān-lūn
Acts19:1 A-pho-lô tī Ko-lîm-to ê sî
Acts19:2 I mn̄g in
Acts19:3 Pó-lô koh mn̄g kóng
Acts19:4 Pó-lô kóng
Acts19:5 In thiaⁿ-liáu chiū hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé.
Acts19:6 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú
Acts19:7 In lóng-chóng ū cha̍p-jī ê lâng.
Acts19:8 Pó-lô liân-sòa saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g hó-táⁿ thoân-tō
Acts19:9 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kò͘-chip m̄ sìn
Acts19:10 Án-ni kè-sio̍k nn̄g nî kú
Acts19:11 Siōng-tè ēng Pó-lô ê chhiú kiâⁿ kî-īⁿ ê sîn-jiah;
Acts19:12 sīm-chì ū lâng the̍h Pó-lô ēng--kè ê chhiú-kun á-sī ûi-kûn khǹg tī pīⁿ-lâng sin-chiūⁿ
Acts19:13 Hit-sî ū kúi-nā ê kiâⁿ-kang-ô͘ teh kóaⁿ-kúi ê Iû-thài -lâng
Acts19:14 Iû-thài ê chè-si-tiúⁿ Sū-ki-óa ê chhit ê kiáⁿ mā teh chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì.
Acts19:15 M̄-kú siâ-sîn ìn kóng
Acts19:16 Hit-ê hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng chhi̍h óa-khì kong-kek hiah-ê kiâⁿ-kang-ô͘--ê
Acts19:17 Tòa tī Í-hut-só͘ só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ; Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ tōa siū chun-chông.
Acts19:18 Ū chin chōe í-keng sìn ê lâng chhut--lâi
Acts19:19 Ū chin chōe kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t ê lâng the̍h in ê chheh lâi
Acts19:20 Tùi án-ni
Acts19:21 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu
Acts19:22 I chiū chhe nn̄g ê chō͘-chhiú Thê-mô͘-thài kap Í-la-to͘ khì Má-kî-tùn
Acts19:23 Tú hit-sî
Acts19:24 Ū chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Tí-bí-te̍k ê phah-kim sai-hū
Acts19:25 Tí-bí-te̍k kā hiah-ê sai-hū kap só͘-ū ê tông-gia̍p chi̍p óa--lâi
Acts19:26 Hiān-chāi lín ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h koh ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê Pó-lô teh chòe ê tāi-chì. I kóng
Acts19:27 Án-ni
Acts19:28 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì
Acts19:29 Choân-siâⁿ lóng loān--khí-lâi; chèng-lâng thoa Pó-lô ê tâng-phōaⁿ Má-kî-tùn -lâng Kai-iû kap A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘
Acts19:30 Pó-lô siūⁿ-beh ji̍p-khì kûn-chiòng lāi-bīn
Acts19:31 Ū kúi-nā ê A-sè-a -séng ê koaⁿ-oân
Acts19:32 Hit-sî kui-ê hōe-tiûⁿ loān-chhau-chhau
Acts19:33 Kûn-chiòng tiong-kan ū lâng chiong jiáu-loān ê chek-jīm kui hō͘ A-le̍k-san-tāi
Acts19:34 In chi̍t-ē jīn-chhut i sī Iû-thài -lâng
Acts19:35 Hit-ê siâⁿ ê su-kì-koaⁿ hō͘ kûn-chiòng lóng an-chēng liáu-āu
Acts19:36 Kì-jiân bô lâng ōe-tàng hó͘-jīn chit-ê tāi-chì
Acts19:37 Lín thoa chiah-ê lâng lâi chia
Acts19:38 Tí-bí-te̍k kap i ê sai-hū nā beh khòng-kò
Acts19:39 Lín nā ū kî-tha ê iau-kiû
Acts19:40 Kin-á-ji̍t só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì
Acts19:41 Kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu
Acts20:1 Jiáu-loān pêng-chēng liáu-āu
Acts20:2 I keng-kè hiah-ê tōe-khu
Acts20:3 tī hia tòa saⁿ kò-ge̍h. I chún-pī beh chē-chûn khì Sū-lī-a ê sî
Acts20:4 Kap i chòe-hé khì--ê
Acts20:5 Chiah-ê lâng seng chhut-hoat
Acts20:6 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh kè-liáu
Acts20:7 Pài-la̍k àm
Acts20:8 Goán teh chū-hōe hit-keng lâu-téng ê pâng-keng ū tiám chin chōe teng-hé.
Acts20:9 Ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng
Acts20:10 Pó-lô lo̍h-khì
Acts20:11 Jiân-āu i koh peh-khì lâu-téng
Acts20:12 In kā hit-ê oa̍h--khí-lâi ê siàu-liân-lâng chhōa--tńg-khì
Acts20:13 Goán seng chiūⁿ-chûn
Acts20:14 I tī A-sok kap goán hōe-ha̍p
Acts20:15 Goán tùi hia khui-chûn
Acts20:16 Pó-lô í-keng koat-tēng bô ài tī Í-hut-só͘ thêng-liû
Acts20:17 Pó-lô tùi Bí-lī-to͘ chhe lâng khì Í-hut-só͘
Acts20:18 In kàu-ūi ê sî
Acts20:19 Sui-jiân góa ū tùi Iû-thài -lâng ê kè-bô͘ siū-tio̍h chhì-liān
Acts20:20 Bô-lūn tī kong-kiōng ê tiûⁿ-ha̍p á-sī kò-pia̍t ê ka-têng
Acts20:21 tùi Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng
Acts20:22 Hiān-chāi
Acts20:23 put-kò góa chai
Acts20:24 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh kiâⁿ-oân góa ê lō͘-thêng
Acts20:25 “Góa it-ti̍t tī lín tiong-kan chhut-ji̍p teh soan-iông Siōng-tè-kok
Acts20:26 Só͘-í
Acts20:27 in-ūi góa í-keng chiong Siōng-tè ê chí-ì lóng-chóng thoân hō͘ lín lah.
Acts20:28 Lín ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn
Acts20:29 Góa chai góa lī-khui liáu-āu ū hiong-ok ê chhâi-lông ōe ji̍p-lâi lín tiong-kan siong-hāi iûⁿ-kûn.
Acts20:30 Sīm-chì tī lín tiong-kan ū lâng ōe chhut-lâi khiok-kái chin-lí
Acts20:31 Só͘-í
Acts20:32 “Hiān-chāi góa chiong lín kau-thok hō͘ Siōng-tè
Acts20:33 Góa m̄-bat tham lâng ê kim
Acts20:34 Lín ka-kī chai
Acts20:35 Ta̍k-hāng sū góa lóng ū chòe hō͘ lín khòaⁿ
Acts20:36 Chiah-ê ōe kóng soah
Acts20:37 Tāi-ke tōa-siaⁿ háu
Acts20:38 in-ūi Pó-lô kóng “Í-āu bōe-tàng koh saⁿ-kìⁿ” chit-kù ōe hō͘ in hui-siông siong-sim. Jiân-āu in sàng i chiūⁿ-chûn.
Acts21:1 Lī-pia̍t chèng-lâng liáu-āu
Acts21:2 tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t chiah beh kè-khì Hui-nî-ki ê chûn
Acts21:3 Goán lâi kàu khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su ê sî
Acts21:4 Goán chhē-tio̍h chi̍t-kóa bûn-tô͘
Acts21:5 Goán kap in lī-pia̍t ê sî-kan kàu chiū lī-khui
Acts21:6 hō͘-siōng saⁿ-sî liáu-āu goán chiūⁿ-chûn
Acts21:7 Goán kè-sio̍k hâng-thêng tùi Thài-ní khì kàu To-lī-mái
Acts21:8 Keh-ji̍t
Acts21:9 I ū sì ê iáu-bē kiat-hun ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ
Acts21:10 Goán tòa tī hia kúi-nā ji̍t ê tiong-kan
Acts21:11 I lâi chhē goán
Acts21:12 Goán chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ--tio̍h
Acts21:13 Pó-lô ìn kóng
Acts21:14 I m̄ siū khó͘-khǹg
Acts21:15 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu
Acts21:16 Ū chi̍t-kóa tùi Khái-sat-lī-a lâi ê bûn-tô͘ mā kap goán khì
Acts21:17 Goán kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
Acts21:18 Keh-ji̍t
Acts21:19 Pó-lô kā in chhéng-an
Acts21:20 In thiaⁿ-liáu lóng kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè
Acts21:21 In ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí kà-sī tòa tī Gōa-pang ê Iû-thài -lâng
Acts21:22 In it-tēng ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí lâi chia ê siau-sit
Acts21:23 Taⁿ tio̍h chiàu goán kā lí kóng--ê khì chòe. Chia ū sì ê hē-goān ê ta-po͘-lâng;
Acts21:24 lí chhōa in chòe-hé khì chham-ka kiat-chēng-lé
Acts21:25 Put-kò tùi í-keng chòe sìn-tô͘ ê Gōa-pang-lâng
Acts21:26 Keh-ji̍t
Acts21:27 Chhit ji̍t ê kî teh-beh móa ê sî
Acts21:28 hoah kóng
Acts21:29 In-ūi in ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Í-hut-só͘ -lâng Te̍k-lô-hui-mô͘ kap Pó-lô chòe-hé tī siâⁿ-lāi
Acts21:30 Choân-siâⁿ jiáu-loān--khí-lâi
Acts21:31 In tú siūⁿ-beh thâi Pó-lô ê sî
Acts21:32 Chí-hui-koaⁿ sûi-sî tòa peng kap kun-koaⁿ cháu kàu bîn-chiòng hia. Bîn-chiòng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h chí-hui-koaⁿ kap peng chiū thêng-chhiú
Acts21:33 Chí-hui-koaⁿ óa-khì lia̍h Pó-lô
Acts21:34 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t ê hoah chi̍t khoán
Acts21:35 Pó-lô teh-beh peh gîm-á ê sî
Acts21:36 Kûn-chiòng tè tī āu-bīn hoah kóng
Acts21:37 Pó-lô tú-beh hō͘ lâng ah ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng ê sî tùi chí-hui-koaⁿ kóng
Acts21:38 Án-ni lí chiū m̄-sī hit-ê bô kú í-chêng chō-hoán
Acts21:39 Pó-lô ìn kóng
Acts21:40 Chí-hui-koaⁿ ún-chún
Acts22:1 Pó-lô kóng
Acts22:2 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe tùi in kóng-ōe
Acts22:3 “Góa sī Iû-thài -lâng
Acts22:4 Góa bat pek-hāi sìn-hōng chit-ê Tō-lō͘ ê lâng
Acts22:5 Tōa-chè-si kap gī-hōe lóng-chóng ê tiúⁿ-ló ōe-tàng ūi góa choh-chèng. Góa mā ū tùi in tit-tio̍h hō͘ Tāi-má-sū-kek Iû-thài tông-pau ê phoe. Āu-lâi góa ū khì hia beh pa̍k tòa tī hia ê sìn-tô͘
Acts22:6 “Góa kiâⁿ beh kàu Tāi-má-sū-kek ê sî
Acts22:7 Góa poa̍h lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha
Acts22:8 Góa mn̄g kóng
Acts22:9 Hiah-ê kap góa chòe-tīn kiâⁿ ê lâng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê kng
Acts22:10 Góa koh mn̄g kóng
Acts22:11 In-ūi hit-ê kng chin chha̍k-ba̍k
Acts22:12 “Tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a
Acts22:13 I lâi chhē góa
Acts22:14 I kóng
Acts22:15 in-ūi lí ōe chiong lí só͘ khòaⁿ--kìⁿ só͘ thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê tùi bān-bîn chòe kiàn-chèng.
Acts22:16 Ná iáu-teh iân-chhiân
Acts22:17 “Āu-lâi
Acts22:18 khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chú kā góa kóng
Acts22:19 Góa ìn kóng
Acts22:20 Lí ê kiàn-chèng-jîn Sū-thê-hoán hō͘ lâng sat-hāi ê sî
Acts22:21 Chú tùi góa kóng
Acts22:22 Chèng-lâng it-ti̍t chù-ì thiaⁿ
Acts22:23 In tōa-siaⁿ jióng
Acts22:24 Lô-má ê chí-hui-koaⁿ bēng-lēng lâng chiong Pó-lô ah ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng
Acts22:25 In kā i pa̍k khí-lâi beh piⁿ-phah ê sî
Acts22:26 Hit-ê kun-koaⁿ chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ--tio̍h chiū khì kìⁿ chí-hui-koaⁿ
Acts22:27 Chí-hui-koaⁿ khì kìⁿ Pó-lô
Acts22:28 Chí-hui-koaⁿ kóng
Acts22:29 Hiah-ê beh sím-mn̄g Pó-lô ê lâng sûi-sî lī-khui. Chí-hui-koaⁿ chi̍t-ē chai Pó-lô sī Lô-má kong-bîn
Acts22:30 Keh-ji̍t
Acts23:1 Pó-lô chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ gī-oân
Acts23:2 Tōa-chè-si A-ná-nî-a bēng-lēng khiā tī Pó-lô sin-piⁿ ê lâng kā i siàn chhùi-phóe.
Acts23:3 Pó-lô tùi i kóng
Acts23:4 Khiā tī Pó-lô piⁿ--á ê lâng kóng
Acts23:5 Pó-lô ìn kóng
Acts23:6 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē chai-iáⁿ in tiong-kan ū-ê sī Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng
Acts23:7 I chi̍t-ē án-ni kóng
Acts23:8 In-ūi Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng kóng bô koh-oa̍h
Acts23:9 Soan-jióng ê siaⁿ ná lâi ná tōa
Acts23:10 Cheng-lūn ná lâi ná ke̍k-lia̍t
Acts23:11 Hit-mî
Acts23:12 Keh-chá-khí
Acts23:13 Ū sì-cha̍p gōa ê lâng chham-ka chit-ê im-bô͘.
Acts23:14 In khì kìⁿ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló
Acts23:15 Hiān-chāi lín kap gī-hōe tio̍h iau-kiû chí-hui-koaⁿ chhōa Pó-lô lâi hō͘ lín
Acts23:16 Pó-lô ê gōe-seng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê bâi-ho̍k ê im-bô͘
Acts23:17 Pó-lô chiū chhiáⁿ chi̍t ê kun-koaⁿ lâi
Acts23:18 Kun-koaⁿ chiū chhōa siàu-liân-lâng khì kìⁿ chí-hui-koaⁿ
Acts23:19 Chí-hui-koaⁿ khan i ê chhiú khì piⁿ--á mn̄g i
Acts23:20 I kóng
Acts23:21 Chhiáⁿ lí m̄-thang thiaⁿ in ê ōe
Acts23:22 Chí-hui-koaⁿ chiū hoan-hù siàu-liân-lâng kóng “M̄-thang tùi lâng kóng lí ū pò góa chai chit-hāng tāi-chì”
Acts23:23 Chí-hui-koaⁿ kiò nn̄g ê kun-koaⁿ lâi
Acts23:24 Koh khì chún-pī bé hō͘ Pó-lô khiâ
Acts23:25 Chí-hui-koaⁿ chiū siá chi̍t tiuⁿ phoe án-ni kóng:
Acts23:26 “ Khek-lô-tē Lū-se-a kā chóng-tok Hui-le̍k-su kok-hā chhéng-an.
Acts23:27 Chit-ê lâng hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng lia̍h--khì
Acts23:28 Góa siūⁿ-beh bêng-pe̍k in khòng-kò i ê lí-iû chiū sàng i khì in ê gī-hōe.
Acts23:29 Góa hoat-kiàn i hō͘ lâng kò sī koan-hē in Lu̍t-hoat ê cheng-lūn
Acts23:30 Āu-lâi ū lâng kā góa pò-kò Iû-thài -lâng kè-bô͘ beh hāi i
Acts23:31 Pō͘-peng chip-hêng bēng-lēng
Acts23:32 Keh-ji̍t pō͘-peng tńg-khì iâⁿ--ni̍h
Acts23:33 In kàu Khái-sat-lī-a
Acts23:34 Chóng-tok tha̍k hit-tiuⁿ phoe liáu
Acts23:35 chiū kóng
Acts24:1 Gō͘ ji̍t āu
Acts24:2 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē siū tiàu chhut-têng
Acts24:3 
Acts24:4 Góa m̄-káⁿ tam-gō͘ lí siuⁿ kú
Acts24:5 Goán khòaⁿ chit-ê lâng sī chi̍t ê gûi-hiám jîn-bu̍t
Acts24:6 I siūⁿ-beh ù-jiám Sèng-tiān
Acts24:7 
Acts24:8 Lí chhin-sin sím-mn̄g chit-ê lâng chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k goán khòng-kò i it-chhè ê tāi-chì.”
Acts24:9 Chāi-tiûⁿ ê Iû-thài -lâng mā lóng chi-chhî chit-ê khòng-kò
Acts24:10 Chóng-tok tùi Pó-lô sī-ì
Acts24:11 Lí tiâu-cha chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k
Acts24:12 Iû-thài -lâng pèng bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa tī Sèng-tiān kap lâng piān-lūn
Acts24:13 In mā bōe-tàng tùi lí thê-chhut hiān-chāi teh khòng-kò góa ê chèng-kù.
Acts24:14 Put-kò góa tio̍h tùi lí sêng-jīn chi̍t hāng sū
Acts24:15 Góa tùi Siōng-tè ū khǹg kap in kâng-khoán ê ǹg-bāng
Acts24:16 In-ūi án-ni
Acts24:17 “Góa lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kúi-nā nî āu koh tńg--khì
Acts24:18 In tī Sèng-tiān khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê sî
Acts24:19 kan-ta ū kúi-nā ê tùi A-sè-a lâi ê Iû-thài -lâng tī hia. In nā beh khòng-kò góa
Acts24:20 Nā bô
Acts24:21 Chí-ū chi̍t hāng sū in ōe-tàng kā góa khòng-kò
Acts24:22 Hui-le̍k-su tùi chit-ê Tō-lō͘ siong-tong chheng-chhó
Acts24:23 Jiân-āu Hui-le̍k-su bēng-lēng hit-ê kun-koaⁿ kò͘-siú Pó-lô
Acts24:24 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu
Acts24:25 Pó-lô kóng-kàu kong-gī
Acts24:26 Siâng-sî i mā ū teh kî-thāi Pó-lô ōe sàng-chîⁿ hō͘ i
Acts24:27 Keng-kè nn̄g nî
Acts25:1 Hui-su-to͘ chiū-jīm saⁿ ji̍t āu
Acts25:2 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù tùi i khòng-kò Pó-lô. In chhéng-kiû Hui-su-to͘
Acts25:3 pài-thok i chiong Pó-lô sàng-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. In kè-bô͘ tī lō͘-tiong bâi-ho̍k beh kā i thâi-sí.
Acts25:4 Hui-su-to͘ ìn kóng
Acts25:5 Só͘-í lín tiong-kan chòe thâu ê lâng thang kap góa chòe-hé khì Khái-sat-lī-a
Acts25:6 Hui-su-to͘ tòa hia chiâⁿ-cha̍p ji̍t
Acts25:7 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē chhut-têng
Acts25:8 Pó-lô ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘
Acts25:9 M̄-kú Hui-su-to͘ ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng hoaⁿ-hí
Acts25:10 Pó-lô kóng
Acts25:11 Góa nā ū chòe m̄-tio̍h
Acts25:12 Hui-su-to͘ kap kò͘-būn chham-siông liáu-āu
Acts25:13 Kè kúi-nā ji̍t
Acts25:14 In tī hia tòa kúi-nā ji̍t liáu-āu
Acts25:15 Góa khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî
Acts25:16 Góa kā in kóng
Acts25:17 Só͘-í
Acts25:18 Goân-kò khiā khí-lâi khòng-kò
Acts25:19 In kap i cheng-lūn--ê sī in ka-kī ê chong-kàu būn-tôe
Acts25:20 Chiah-ê būn-tôe góa m̄ chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ tiâu-cha
Acts25:21 M̄-kú Pó-lô chhéng-kiû kè-sio̍k kā i khàu-liû
Acts25:22 A-ki-phà kā Hui-su-to͘ kóng
Acts25:23 Keh-ji̍t
Acts25:24 Hui-su-to͘ kóng
Acts25:25 M̄-kú góa chhâ bōe chhut i ū hoān-tio̍h sím-mi̍h kai-sí ê chōe. I kì-jiân ka-kī tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘
Acts25:26 Koan-hē chit-ê lâng
Acts25:27 In-ūi chiàu góa khòaⁿ
Acts26:1 A-ki-phà tùi Pó-lô kóng
Acts26:2 “ A-ki-phà -ông
Acts26:3 In-ūi lí tùi Iû-thài -lâng ê koàn-lē kap cheng-lūn ê būn-tôe te̍k-pia̍t cheng-thong
Acts26:4 “Góa tùi siàu-liân kàu taⁿ
Acts26:5 In í-keng bat góa chin kú
Acts26:6 Hiān-chāi góa khiā tī chia siū sím-phòaⁿ
Acts26:7 goán cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k ê tông-pau mî-ji̍t jia̍t-sim kèng-pài mā-sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ chit-ê ǹg-bāng si̍t-hiān. Ông ah
Acts26:8 Siōng-tè hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì
Acts26:9 “Í-chêng góa pún-sin mā siūⁿ-kóng tio̍h ēng ta̍k-khoán ê hong-hoat lâi hoán-tùi Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ.
Acts26:10 Góa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khak-si̍t ū án-ni chòe
Acts26:11 Góa sî-siông tī kok-tōe ê hōe-tn̂g kā in hêng-hoa̍t
Acts26:12 “Ū chi̍t piàn
Acts26:13 Ông ah
Acts26:14 Goán lóng poa̍h lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha. Góa ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê siaⁿ
Acts26:15 Góa mn̄g kóng
Acts26:16 Khí--lâi
Acts26:17 Góa beh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan kā lí kiù--chhut-lâi
Acts26:18 khui in ê ba̍k-chiu
Acts26:19 “Só͘-í
Acts26:20 Góa tāi-seng tùi Tāi-má-sū-kek kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng
Acts26:21 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê iân-kò͘
Acts26:22 Kàu kin-á-ji̍t
Acts26:23 chiū-sī Ki-tok it-tēng tio̍h siū-khó͘
Acts26:24 Pó-lô án-ni ūi-tio̍h ka-kī teh piān-hō͘ ê sî
Acts26:25 Pó-lô kóng
Acts26:26 In-ūi ông chai chiah-ê tāi-chì
Acts26:27 A-ki-phà -ông
Acts26:28 A-ki-phà tùi Pó-lô kóng

Acts26:30 Ông

Acts26:32 A-ki-phà tùi Hui-su-to͘ kóng
Acts27:1 Hui-su-to͘ í-keng koat-tēng goán tio̍h chē-chûn khì Ì-tāi-lī
Acts27:2 Goán chē chi̍t chiah tùi A-tāi-bí-tiân lâi ê chûn; chit-chiah chûn tú-á beh iân A-sè-a -séng kúi-nā ê káng-kháu khui-chûn. Ū chi̍t ê tùi Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka lâi ê Má-kî-tùn -lâng A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘ kap goán chòe-hé khì.
Acts27:3 Keh-ji̍t goán kàu Se-tùn. Iû-liû chin chhin-chhiat tùi-thāi Pó-lô
Acts27:4 Goán tùi hia koh khui-chûn
Acts27:5 Goán keng-kè Ki-lī-ka kap Pông-hui-lī-a ê gōa-hái
Acts27:6 Tī hia
Acts27:7 Liân-sòa kúi-nā ji̍t
Acts27:8 Goán ê chûn sūn hái-kîⁿ kiâⁿ
Acts27:9 Goán í-keng chhiân chin chōe ji̍t
Acts27:10 kóng
Acts27:11 M̄-kú kun-koaⁿ lêng-khó siong-sìn chûn-tiúⁿ kap chûn-chú
Acts27:12 Koh chit-ê káng-kháu mā bô sek-ha̍p kè tang-thiⁿ
Acts27:13 Hit-sî
Acts27:14 Bô kú ū chi̍t chūn kiò-chòe Iú-la-kek-lô ê tang-pak tōa-hong tùi Khek-lí-te̍k -tó sàu--lo̍h-lâi.
Acts27:15 Chûn hō͘ hong sàu
Acts27:16 Goán lâi kàu chi̍t ê sió-tó kiò-chòe Ko-tāi ê lâm-pêng
Acts27:17 Jiân-āu chúi-siú chiong kiù-seng-thêng thoa khí-lâi chûn-téng
Acts27:18 Pō-hong kè-sio̍k chhe
Acts27:19 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t
Acts27:20 Chin chōe ji̍t
Acts27:21 Chèng-lâng chin kú lóng bô chia̍h
Acts27:22 Hiān-chāi góa khǹg lín tio̍h ióng-kám; lín tiong-kan bô kah chi̍t ê lâng ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; kan-ta ōe sit-lo̍h chit-chiah chûn nā-tiāⁿ.
Acts27:23 In-ūi góa só͘ sio̍k só͘ kèng-pài ê Siōng-tè
Acts27:24 kóng
Acts27:25 Só͘-í
Acts27:26 Put-kò lán it-tēng ōe tī chi̍t ê tó-sū khò-chhián.”
Acts27:27 Kàu tē-cha̍p-sì ji̍t ê àm-sî
Acts27:28 chiū tàn chhek-liōng-soh lo̍h-khì thàm
Acts27:29 In kiaⁿ-liáu chûn lôe-tio̍h àm-chiau
Acts27:30 Chúi-siú siūⁿ-beh pàng-sak chûn tô-cháu
Acts27:31 Pó-lô tùi kun-koaⁿ kap peng-teng kóng
Acts27:32 Peng-teng chiū chām-tn̄g kiù-seng-thêng ê soh
Acts27:33 Thiⁿ beh kng ê sî
Acts27:34 só͘-í góa khǹg lín tio̍h chia̍h chi̍t-kóa mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiah ōe-tàng oa̍h--lo̍h-khì. Lín liân chi̍t ki thâu-mn̂g to bōe sit-lo̍h.”
Acts27:35 Pó-lô kóng liáu-āu
Acts27:36 Chèng-lâng sim chiū tiāⁿ--lo̍h-lâi
Acts27:37 Kap goán tâng-chûn ê lâng lóng-chóng ū nn̄g-pah chhit-cha̍p-la̍k ê.
Acts27:38 Tāi-ke chia̍h pá liáu-āu
Acts27:39 Thiⁿ-kng ê sî
Acts27:40 In kā soh chām-tn̄g
Acts27:41 M̄-kú chûn lôe-tio̍h soa-phiâⁿ soah khò-chhián; chûn-thâu kā tiâu--teh bōe tín-tāng
Acts27:42 Peng-teng kiaⁿ-liáu hoān-lâng siû-chúi tô-cháu

Acts28:1 Goán an-choân chiūⁿ-lio̍k liáu-āu chiah chai hit-ê tó-sū kiò-chòe Má-ní-tha.

Acts28:3 Pó-lô khioh chi̍t khún chhâ
Acts28:4 Tong-tōe ê goân-chū-bîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-bé chôa tiàu tī Pó-lô ê chhiú--ni̍h
Acts28:5 Pó-lô chiong hit-bé chôa hiù-lo̍h hé--ni̍h
Acts28:6 Hiah-ê lâng lóng kim-kim teh khòaⁿ i ê chhiú ōe chéng--khí-lâi
Acts28:7 Hái-sū ê thâu-ba̍k Pō͘-pek-liû ū chi̍t tè tōe lī hit só͘-chāi bô jōa hn̄g. I hoan-gêng goán tī hia tòa saⁿ ji̍t

Acts28:15 Lô-má ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē thiaⁿ-tio̍h siau-sit

Acts28:17 Saⁿ ji̍t āu

Acts28:21 In tùi i kóng

Acts28:23 In kap Pó-lô iok-tēng chi̍t ji̍t
Acts28:24 I só͘ kóng ê ōe ū lâng sìn

Romans8:31 Koan-hē chiah-ê tāi-chì
Romans8:32 I kì-jiân bô sioh ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ
Romans8:33 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng khòng-kò Siōng-tè ê soán-bîn? Soan-phòaⁿ in chòe gī-lâng--ê sī Siōng-tè!
Romans8:34 Nā án-ni
Romans8:35 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng chhiat-tn̄g Ki-tok tùi lán ê thiàⁿ? Sī hoān-lān
Romans8:36 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: In-ūi lí ê iân-kò͘
Romans8:37 Lóng m̄-sī! Tī chiah-ê it-chhè ê tāi-chì
Romans8:38 In-ūi góa khak-sìn
Romans8:39 sī thiⁿ-téng á-sī tōe-ē ê sîn-lêng
Romans9:1 Góa choh chi̍t ê sio̍k Ki-tok ê lâng kóng si̍t-ōe
Romans9:2 Góa hui-siông iu-siong
Romans9:3 Góa ūi-tio̍h tông-pau
Romans9:4 In sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; Siōng-tè kéng-soán in chòe kiáⁿ-jî
Romans9:5 In sī cho̍k-tiúⁿ ê kiáⁿ-sun; chiàu hiat-thóng
Romans9:6 Án-ni m̄-sī kóng Siōng-tè ê èng-ún bô si̍t-hiān. In-ūi m̄-sī só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê soán-bîn.
Romans9:7 A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun mā bô lóng sī èng-ún ê kiáⁿ-jî. Siōng-tè bat tùi A-pek-la-hán kóng
Romans9:8 Án-ni sī kóng hiat-thóng ê kiáⁿ-jî bô it-tēng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî; chí-ū tùi Siōng-tè ê èng-ún siⁿ--ê chiah sǹg sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-sun.
Romans9:9 In-ūi èng-ún ê ōe sī án-ni kóng
Romans9:10 M̄-nā án-ni
Romans9:11 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh piáu-sī Siōng-tè khak-si̍t kun-kù ka-kī ê bo̍k-te̍k lâi kéng-soán lâng
Romans9:12 
Romans9:13 Chiàu Sèng-keng kì-chài
Romans9:14 Án-ni
Romans9:15 I bat tùi Mô͘-se kóng: Góa beh lîn-bín góa ài lîn-bín ê lâng; góa beh thé-thiap góa ài thé-thiap ê lâng.
Romans9:16 Só͘-í
Romans9:17 Sèng-keng kì-chài Siōng-tè ū tùi Hoat-ló kóng
Romans9:18 Só͘-í
Romans9:19 Án-ni
Romans9:20 Lí chit-ê lâng
Romans9:21 Sio-hûi--ê kiám bô koân thang ēng kâng chi̍t tè liâm-thô͘ chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chō chi̍t ê kùi-khì ê khì-khū
Romans9:22 Sui-jiân Siōng-tè beh piáu-sī I ê siū-khì hō͘ lâng chai I ê koân-lêng
Romans9:23 I ūi-tio̍h só͘ ū-pī lâi chiap-siū I ê êng-kng hiah-ê lâng
Romans9:24 Lán lóng sī I só͘ ho͘-tiàu--ê
Romans9:25 Chiàu I tī Hô-se-a-su só͘ kóng: Pún-lâi m̄-sī góa ê chú-bîn--ê
Romans9:26 Tī hit-ê só͘-chāi
Romans9:27 Koan-hē Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Romans9:28 in-ūi Chú tī tōe-chiūⁿ ōe chin kín koh thiat-tóe chip-hêng sím-phòaⁿ.”
Romans9:29 Che sī chiàu Í-sài-a í-chêng só͘ kóng: Nā m̄-sī Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe kā lán lâu chéng
Romans9:30 Án-ni
Romans9:31 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tui-kiû tùi Lu̍t-hoat hō͘ Siōng-tè jīn-tēng in chòe gī-lâng
Romans9:32 Ná ōe án-ni? In-ūi in m̄-sī tùi sìn
Romans9:33 Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài: Khòaⁿ leh
Romans10:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans10:2 Góa ōe-tàng ūi-tio̍h in choh-chèng: In tùi Siōng-tè ū jia̍t-sim
Romans10:3 In-ūi in bô bêng-pe̍k Siōng-tè ê gī
Romans10:4 Kî-si̍t
Romans10:5 Koan-hē tùi khò Lu̍t-hoat tit--tio̍h ê gī
Romans10:6 M̄-kú koan-hē tùi sìn chheng-gī
Romans10:7 Mā m̄-thang kóng ‘Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe lo̍h-khì chhim-ian’ — chiū-sī kóng
Romans10:8 Chiah-ê ōe tàu-tóe sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Ì-sù sī: Siōng-tè ê ōe kap lí chin kūn
Romans10:9 Lí nā ēng chhùi soan-jīn “Iâ-so͘ sī Chú”
Romans10:10 In-ūi lâng sim sìn chiū tit-tio̍h chheng-gī; chhùi soan-jīn chiū tit-tio̍h kiù.
Romans10:11 Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài
Romans10:12 Iû-thài -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng lóng bô chha-pia̍t
Romans10:13 In-ūi “Só͘-ū kiû-kiò Chú ê miâ ê lâng lóng ōe tit-kiù.”
Romans10:14 M̄-kú in to bô sìn I
Romans10:15 To bô chhe-phài
Romans10:16 M̄-kú
Romans10:17 Só͘-í
Romans10:18 Put-kò góa beh mn̄g
Romans10:19 Góa beh koh mn̄g
