Romans10:21 M̄-kú koan-hē Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng
Romans11:1 Án-ni
Romans11:2 Siōng-tè m̄-bat pàng-sak I chá chiū kéng-soán ê chú-bîn. Lín kiám m̄ chai Sèng-keng ū kì-chài
Romans11:3 kóng
Romans11:4 M̄-kú Siōng-tè án-chóaⁿ ìn-tap? I kóng
Romans11:5 Hiān-kim chit-ê sî ê chêng-hêng mā-sī án-ni
Romans11:6 Kì-jiân sī Siōng-tè ê un-tián
Romans11:7 Nā án-ni
Romans11:8 chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Siōng-tè hō͘ in ê sim-lêng bâ-pì
Romans11:9 Tāi-pi̍t kóng: Tio̍h hō͘ in ê iàn-se̍k chiâⁿ-chòe hām-khiⁿ
Romans11:10 Tio̍h hō͘ in ê ba̍k-chiu hoe
Romans11:11 Án-ni
Romans11:12 Kì-jiân Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê kè-sit ōe hō͘ sè-kan-lâng tit-tio̍h hong-hù ê chiok-hok
Romans11:13 Hiān-chāi góa tùi lín Gōa-pang-lâng kóng. Kì-jiân góa sī Gōa-pang-lâng ê sù-tô͘
Romans11:14 án-ni thang kek-khí góa ê tông-pau ê oàn-tò͘
Romans11:15 Í-sek-lia̍t tông-pau siū khì-sak nā ōe hō͘ sè-kan-lâng kap Siōng-tè koh hô-hó
Romans11:16 Thâu chi̍t tè mī-oân nā sèng-pia̍t kui hō͘ Siōng-tè
Romans11:17 Lâng kā kaⁿ-ná-chhiū-ki chián--khí-lâi
Romans11:18 lín chiū m̄-thang tùi chián--khí-lâi ê chhiū-ki khoa-kháu. Lín nā beh khoa-kháu
Romans11:19 Lí kiám-chhái beh kóng
Romans11:20 Tio̍h! In m̄ sìn chiah siū chián--khí-lâi
Romans11:21 In-ūi Siōng-tè nā bô lâu goân-lâi ê chhiū-ki
Romans11:22 Só͘-í
Romans11:23 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng nā m̄-sī kian-chhî m̄ sìn
Romans11:24 Lín chiah-ê tùi iá-seng ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū chián--khí-lâi ê chhiū-ki
Romans11:25 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans11:26 Án-ni
Romans11:27 Hit-sî góa beh tû-khì in ê chōe; Che sī góa kap in só͘ li̍p ê iok.
Romans11:28 Chi̍t hong-bīn
Romans11:29 in-ūi Siōng-tè ê un-sù kap kéng-soán bōe kái-piàn.
Romans11:30 Lín Gōa-pang-lâng í-chêng bô sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè
Romans11:31 Kâng-khoán
Romans11:32 Siōng-tè chiong só͘-ū ê lâng lóng koaiⁿ tī bô sūn-ho̍k ê chōng-thāi
Romans11:33 Siōng-tè ê hong-sēng
Romans11:34 Sím-mi̍h-lâng chai Chú ê sim-ì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng thòe I chhut chú-ì?
Romans11:35 Sím-mi̍h-lâng bat seng hō͘ I sím-mi̍h
Romans11:36 In-ūi bān-mi̍h lóng chhut tī I
Romans12:1 Só͘-í
Romans12:2 M̄-thang hō͘ sè-sio̍k tông-hòa
Romans12:3 Khò Siōng-tè hō͘ góa ê un-sù
Romans12:4 Chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t ê seng-khu ū chin chōe chi-thé
Romans12:5 Sui-jiân lán ū chin chōe lâng
Romans12:6 Chiàu Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lán ê un-tián
Romans12:7 ho̍k-sāi ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim ho̍k-sāi; kàu-tō ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim kàu-tō;
Romans12:8 khoàn-bián ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim khoàn-bián; chín-chè ê lâng tio̍h khóng-khài; léng-tō ê lâng tio̍h jia̍t-sêng; chòe chû-siān ê lâng tio̍h kam-sim lo̍k-ì.
Romans12:9 Thiàⁿ tio̍h sêng-sim sêng-ì; tio̍h oàn-hūn pháiⁿ
Romans12:10 Tio̍h ēng hiaⁿ-tī-ài hō͘-siōng saⁿ-thiàⁿ; tio̍h chin-sim saⁿ kèng-tiōng.
Romans12:11 M̄-thang pîn-tōaⁿ; sim-chì tio̍h jia̍t-sêng
Romans12:12 Tio̍h khǹg ǹg-bāng lâi hoaⁿ-hí; tio̍h jím-siū hoān-lān; tio̍h put-sî kî-tó.
Romans12:13 Tio̍h pang-chān lín tiong-kan sàn-chhiah ê sìn-tô͘; tio̍h hó khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng.
Romans12:14 Tio̍h chiok-hok pek-hāi lín ê lâng; tio̍h chiok-hok
Romans12:15 Tio̍h kap hoaⁿ-hí ê lâng chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí
Romans12:16 Tio̍h tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì; m̄-thang kiau-ngō͘; tio̍h chòe pîn-chiān ê lâng ê tâng-phōaⁿ; m̄-thang chū-chok-chhong-bêng.
Romans12:17 M̄-thang ēng pháiⁿ pò pháiⁿ; tio̍h chòe chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū.
Romans12:18 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe kap chèng-lâng hô-bo̍k siong-chhù.
Romans12:19 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans12:20 M̄-kú Sèng-keng mā ū kì-chài
Romans12:21 Só͘-í
Romans13:1 Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h sūn-ho̍k tī téng-bīn ê koân-pèng
Romans13:2 Só͘-í
Romans13:3 Thóng-tī-chiá m̄-sī beh hō͘ choh-hó ê lâng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ
Romans13:4 in-ūi i sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng
Romans13:5 Só͘-í
Romans13:6 Lín la̍p-sè mā-sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê lí-iû
Romans13:7 Tio̍h tùi chèng-lâng chīn lín ê gī-bū; lín khiàm--ê
Romans13:8 Hō͘-siōng saⁿ-thiàⁿ ê chè í-gōa
Romans13:9 Lu̍t-hoat ê iau-kiû sī: “M̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang tham-sim.” Chiah-ê kap kî-tha ê iau-kiû lóng pau-hâm tī “Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī” chit-kù ōe.
Romans13:10 Thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê lâng bōe siong-hāi pa̍t-lâng. Só͘-í
Romans13:11 Án-ni
Romans13:12 Mî--sî í-keng chhim
Romans13:13 Lán ê hêng-ûi tio̍h toan-chèng
Romans13:14 Tio̍h chhēng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chong-pī ka-kī; m̄-thang chí-ū tô͘-bô͘ jio̍k-thé ê sū lâi boán-chiok su-io̍k.
Romans14:1 Sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng tio̍h kā i chiap-la̍p
Romans14:2 Sìn-sim kian-kiông ê lâng sìn ta̍k-hāng lóng thang chia̍h
Romans14:3 Ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng m̄-thang khòaⁿ-khin bô ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng; bô ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng mā m̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng
Romans14:4 Lí sǹg siáⁿ
Romans14:5 Ū lâng khòaⁿ chit-ji̍t pí hit-ji̍t khah tiōng-iàu; mā ū lâng khòaⁿ ta̍k-ji̍t pîⁿ-pîⁿ tiōng-iàu. Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h ū ka-kī bêng-khak ê kiàn-kái.
Romans14:6 Siú te̍k-pia̍t ji̍t-chí ê lâng sī ūi-tio̍h Chú lâi siú; ū chia̍h-bah ê lâng mā-sī ūi-tio̍h Chú lâi chia̍h
Romans14:7 Lán bô lâng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī teh oa̍h
Romans14:8 Lán nā oa̍h
Romans14:9 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bo̍k-te̍k Ki-tok ū sí
Romans14:10 Án-ni
Romans14:11 Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Chú kóng: góa sī éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè; ta̍k-ê kha-thâu-u ōe kā góa kūi-pài
Romans14:12 Án-ni
Romans14:13 Só͘-í
Romans14:14 Góa chai
Romans14:15 Lí nā in-ūi só͘ chia̍h ê mi̍h hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē sim kan-khó͘
Romans14:16 Só͘-í
Romans14:17 Siōng-tè chú-koân ê si̍t-hiān m̄-sī khò lim-chia̍h
Romans14:18 Ēng án-ni lâi ho̍k-sāi Ki-tok ê lâng ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí
Romans14:19 Só͘-í
Romans14:20 M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h chia̍h-mi̍h phò-hoāi Siōng-tè ê kang-chok. Bān-mi̍h lóng chheng-khì
Romans14:21 Khah hó sī bô chia̍h-bah
Romans14:22 Lí tùi chi̍t hāng sū ê sìn-liām sī lí kap Siōng-tè tiong-kan ê tāi-chì. Tùi ka-kī khòaⁿ-chòe tio̍h ê sū bô chū-chek ê lâng chin ū hok-khì.
Romans14:23 M̄-kú sim ū giâu-gî lâi chia̍h ê lâng ōe siū tēng-chōe
Romans15:1 Lán chiah-ê sìn-sim kian-kiông ê lâng eng-kai kā sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng tàu taⁿ tāng-tàⁿ. M̄-thang kiû hō͘ ka-kī hoaⁿ-hí;
Romans15:2 lán ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h kiû hō͘ chhù-piⁿ hoaⁿ-hí
Romans15:3 In-ūi Ki-tok bô kiû hō͘ ka-kī hoaⁿ-hí
Romans15:4 Chá-chêng só͘ siá--ê lóng sī ūi-tio̍h beh kà-sī lán lâi siá--ê
Romans15:5 Goān sù jím-nāi kap an-ùi ê Siōng-tè hō͘ lín tâng sim-chì ha̍k-si̍p Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê bô͘-iūⁿ
Romans15:6 thang tâng-sim tâng-siaⁿ êng-iāu lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè!
Romans15:7 Só͘-í
Romans15:8 Góa kā lín kóng
Romans15:9 mā beh hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng in-ūi Siōng-tè ê lîn-bín thang kui êng-kng hō͘ I. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Só͘-í
Romans15:10 I koh kóng: Gōa-pang-lâng ah
Romans15:11 I koh kóng: Bān-kok ah
Romans15:12 Í-sài-a koh-chài kóng: Iâ-se ê kun ōe puh-íⁿ
Romans15:13 Goān sù ǹg-bāng ê Siōng-tè
Romans15:14 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans15:15 M̄-kú góa hó-táⁿ siá chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lín
Romans15:16 thang tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan ho̍k-sāi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘
Romans15:17 Só͘-í
Romans15:18 Góa m̄-káⁿ kóng pa̍t-hāng tāi-chì
Romans15:19 
Romans15:20 Góa koat-ì bô beh tī í-keng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ki-tok ê miâ ê só͘-chāi thoân hok-im
Romans15:21 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: M̄-bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê tāi-chì ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ--kìⁿ; m̄-bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê lâng ōe bêng-pe̍k.
Romans15:22 Góa ū chin chōe piàn tú-tio̍h chó͘-tòng
Romans15:23 M̄-kú taⁿ tī chiah-ê tōe-khu bô pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi thang khì
Romans15:24 Chit-piàn beh khì Se-pan-gâ ê lō͘-tiong
Romans15:25 M̄-kú góa hiān-chāi tio̍h seng khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kiong-kip hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ ê su-iàu
Romans15:26 in-ūi Má-kî-tùn kap A-kai-a ê kàu-hōe hoaⁿ-hí hiàn chi̍t pit chîⁿ pang-chān Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chi̍t-kóa sàn-chhiah ê sìn-tô͘.
Romans15:27 Che sī in hoaⁿ-hí chòe--ê
Romans15:28 Thèng-hāu góa chit-hāng tāi-chì chòe hó-sè
Romans15:29 Góa chai góa khì lín hia ê sî
Romans15:30 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans15:31 hō͘ góa bián siū-tio̍h Iû-thài m̄-sìn ê lâng ê hām-hāi
Romans15:32 Án-ni
Romans15:33 Goān sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi. Amen!
Romans16:1 Góa tùi lín chhui-chiàn lán ê chí-bē Hui-pí
Romans16:2 Chhiáⁿ lín in-ūi Chú ê iân-kò͘
Romans16:3 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā Pek-ki-la kap A-ku-la chhéng-an; in kap góa sī tī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lāi-bīn ê tâng-kang.
Romans16:4 In bat ūi-tio̍h góa mō͘ sìⁿ-miā ê gûi-hiám; m̄-nā góa
Romans16:5 Mā kā tī in tau teh chū-chi̍p ê kàu-hōe chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Í-pài-nî-thó͘; i sī A-sè-a thâu chi̍t ê kui-sìn Ki-tok ê lâng.
Romans16:6 Mā chhéng-an ūi-tio̍h lín siū chin chōe lô-khó͘ ê Má-lī-a.
Romans16:7 Koh kā góa ê chhin-cho̍k
Romans16:8 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an Chú-lāi góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Àm-pek-lī.
Romans16:9 Chhéng-an tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn ê tâng-kang Ní-pa-ló͘ kap góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Sū-tāi-kó͘.
Romans16:10 Chhéng-an tī Ki-tok keng-kè khó-giām ê A-pí-lī. Kā A-lī-to-pò͘ ke-lāi ê lâng chhéng-an.
Romans16:11 Kā góa ê chhin-cho̍k Hi-lô-thian chhéng-an. Kā Ná-kî-sò͘ ke-lāi sìn Chú ê lâng chhéng-an.
Romans16:12 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an ūi-tio̍h Chú siū chin chōe lô-khó͘ ê Thó͘-hui-ná kap Thó͘-hù-sat. Kā só͘ thiàⁿ ê Pí-sek chhéng-an; i bat ūi-tio̍h Chú lô-khó͘ kang-chok.
Romans16:13 Chhéng-an tī Chú siū kéng-soán ê Ló͘-hu kap i ê lāu-bú; i ê lāu-bú mā-sī góa ê lāu-bú.
Romans16:14 Kā A-sùn-kî-thó͘
Romans16:15 Kā Hui-lô-lô-kó͘ kap Iû-lī-a
Romans16:16 Lín tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an. Ki-tok ê chèng kàu-hōe lóng kā lín chhéng-an.
Romans16:17 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Romans16:18 In-ūi chit-khoán lâng m̄-sī choh po̍k-jîn teh ho̍k-sāi lán ê Chú Ki-tok
Romans16:19 In-ūi lín ê sūn-ho̍k
Romans16:20 Sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè chin kín chiū ōe chiong Sat-tàn ta̍h-chhùi
Romans16:21 Góa ê tâng-kang Thê-mô͘-thài í-ki̍p góa ê chhin-cho̍k Lō͘-kiû
Romans16:22 Góa Tek-thê
Romans16:23 Chiap-thāi góa kap choân kàu-hōe ê Kai-iû kā lín chhéng-an. Chit-ê siâⁿ ê kòe-kè-tiúⁿ Í-la-to͘ kap lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Koat-thó͘ mā kā lín chhéng-an.
Romans16:24 
Romans16:25 Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè! I ōe chiàu góa só͘ thoân ê hok-im
Romans16:26 taⁿ í-keng chiàu éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng
Romans16:27 Goān êng-kng thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kui tī to̍k-it choân-tì ê Siōng-tè
1Corinthians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô
1Corinthians1:2 siá-phoe hō͘ tī Ko-lîm-to Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe
1Corinthians1:3 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an!
1Corinthians1:4 Góa sî-siông ūi-tio̍h lín teh kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè
1Corinthians1:5 hō͘ lín thong-kè Ki-tok ta̍k-hāng tit-tio̍h hù-chiok
1Corinthians1:6 Ki-tok ê sìn-sit í-keng tī lín tiong-kan kian-kò͘ kiàn-li̍p
1Corinthians1:7 hō͘ lín lóng bô khiàm sím-mi̍h un-sù
1Corinthians1:8 I mā ōe hō͘ lín kian-kò͘ ti̍t-kàu chòe-āu
1Corinthians1:9 Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t
1Corinthians1:10 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Corinthians1:11 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Corinthians1:12 Góa án-ni kóng sī in-ūi lín tiong-kan ì-kiàn hun-hun; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Pó-lô ”; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k A-pho-lô ”; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Pí-tek ”; mā ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Ki-tok”.
1Corinthians1:13 Ki-tok kèng-jiân hō͘ lâng hun-koah lah! Pó-lô kiám ū thòe lín tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè? Lín kiám ū hōng Pó-lô ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé?
1Corinthians1:14 Kám-siā Siōng-tè
1Corinthians1:15 Án-ni bô lâng ōe-tàng kóng
1Corinthians1:16 Ū lah
1Corinthians1:17 Ki-tok bô chhe góa kā lâng sóe-lé
1Corinthians1:18 Si̍p-jī-kè ê sìn-sit
1Corinthians1:19 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa beh siau-bia̍t tì-hūi ê lâng ê tì-hūi; góa beh khì-sak chhong-bêng ê lâng ê chhong-bêng.
1Corinthians1:20 Án-ni tì-hūi ê lâng tī tó-ūi? Keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tī tó-ūi? Chit sè-tāi ê hiông-piān-ka tī tó-ūi? Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ chit sè-kan ê tì-hūi pìⁿ-chòe gû-gōng lah!
1Corinthians1:21 Kì-jiân sè-kan-lâng bōe-tàng khò ka-kī ê tì-hūi jīn-bat Siōng-tè
1Corinthians1:22 Iû-thài -lâng kiû sîn-jiah
1Corinthians1:23 put-kò goán soan-iông tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê Ki-tok. Chit-ê sìn-sit tùi Iû-thài -lâng sī chó͘-gāi
1Corinthians1:24 m̄-kú tùi Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-tiàu ê lâng
1Corinthians1:25 In-ūi Siōng-tè ê gû-gōng iâⁿ-kè lâng ê tì-hūi
1Corinthians1:26 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Corinthians1:27 Siōng-tè kò͘-ì ēng sè-kan-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe gōng ê tāi-chì lâi hō͘ khiáu ê lâng kiàn-siàu; Siōng-tè ēng sè-kan-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe jio̍k ê tāi-chì lâi hō͘ kiông ê lâng kiàn-siàu.
1Corinthians1:28 Siōng-tè ēng pi-chiān--ê
1Corinthians1:29 tùi án-ni
1Corinthians1:30 M̄-kú Siōng-tè hō͘ lín kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân
1Corinthians1:31 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài

1Corinthians2:2 In-ūi góa koat-tēng
1Corinthians2:3 Góa tī lín hia ê sî
1Corinthians2:4 Góa só͘ kóng ê ōe
1Corinthians2:5 sī beh hō͘ lín ê sìn-gióng m̄-sī khò lâng ê tì-hūi
1Corinthians2:6 Sui-jiân sī án-ni

1Corinthians2:8 Chit sè-kan ê thóng-tī-chiá bô chi̍t ê jīn-bat chit-ê tì-hūi
1Corinthians2:9 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h thiàⁿ I ê lâng chún-pī--ê
1Corinthians2:10 M̄-kú Siōng-tè í-keng ū thong-kè Sèng Sîn chiong chiah-ê sū tùi lán khé-sī. Sèng Sîn thiat-tóe chai bān-sū
1Corinthians2:11 Chí-ū lâng ka-kī lāi-bīn ê sîn chiah chai ka-kī ê sū; chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni

1Corinthians2:13 Só͘-í

1Corinthians2:15 Sio̍k Sèng Sîn ê lâng ōe-hiáu phòaⁿ-toàn bān-sū
1Corinthians2:16 Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Sím-mi̍h-lâng chai Chú ê sim-ì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng thòe I chhut chú-ì? M̄-kú lán ū Ki-tok ê sim-ì.

1Corinthians3:4 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng kóng “Góa sio̍k Pó-lô ”; mā ū lâng kóng “Góa sio̍k A-pho-lô ”. Án-ni lín kap sè-kan-lâng ū sím-mi̍h bô kâng-khoán?
1Corinthians3:5 A-pho-lô sǹg siáⁿ? Pó-lô sǹg siáⁿ? Goán put-kò sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng

1Corinthians3:7 Iā-chéng--ê kap ak-chúi--ê lóng bô tiōng-iàu

1Corinthians5:3 Sui-jiân góa lâng kap lín saⁿ-lī
1Corinthians5:4

1Corinthians5:6 Lín teh khoa-kháu bô eng-kai! Lín kiám m̄ chai “Chi̍t-sut-á kàⁿ-bú ōe hō͘ kui-oân ê mī-oân hoat--khí-lâi”?

1Corinthians5:13

1Corinthians6:5 Lín si̍t-chāi chin kiàn-siàu! Lín tiong-kan kiám chin-chiàⁿ bô chi̍t ê ū tì-hūi ê lâng thang phòaⁿ-toàn sìn-tô͘ tiong-kan ê sī-hui?
1Corinthians6:6 Lín kèng-jiân ū sìn-tô͘ kò sìn-tô͘
1Corinthians6:7 Kî-si̍t lín sio-kò
1Corinthians6:8 Lín tian-tò oan-óng lâng
1Corinthians6:9 Kiám m̄ chai put-gī ê lâng bōe-tàng chòe Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn? M̄-thang phiàn ka-kī; bô-lūn sī îm-loān--ê

1Corinthians7:2 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h pī-bián îm-loān ê tāi-chì
1Corinthians7:3 Ta-po͘-lâng tùi bó͘ eng-kai chīn choh-ang ê gī-bū; cha-bó͘-lâng tùi ang eng-kai chīn choh-bó͘ ê gī-bū.
1Corinthians7:4 Bó͘ tùi ka-kī ê seng-khu bô koân

1Corinthians9:1 Góa kiám m̄-sī chū-iû ê lâng? Góa kiám m̄-sī sù-tô͘? Góa kiám m̄-bat kìⁿ-tio̍h lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘? Lín kiám m̄-sī góa ūi-tio̍h Chú kang-chok ê sêng-kó?
1Corinthians9:2 Tùi pa̍t-lâng lâi khòaⁿ
1Corinthians9:3 Tùi hiah-ê phoe-phêng góa ê lâng
1Corinthians9:4 Goán kiám bô koân thang chia̍h
1Corinthians9:5 Goán kiám bô koân kap kî-tha ê sù-tô͘
1Corinthians9:6 Kiám kan-ta góa kap Pa-ná-pa it-tēng tio̍h chòe kang chiah ōe-tàng seng-oa̍h?
1Corinthians9:7 Kiám ū lâng choh-peng koh teh chia̍h ka-kī? Kiám ū lâng chèng-choh phû-tô-hn̂g bô chia̍h hn̂g-lāi chhut-sán ê phû-tô? Kiám ū lâng chhī iûⁿ bô lim ka-kī ê iûⁿ-lin?
1Corinthians9:8 Góa kóng chiah-ê kiám sī kun-kù lâng ê siūⁿ-hoat? Lu̍t-hoat kiám m̄-sī mā án-ni kóng?
1Corinthians9:9 Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kui-tēng
1Corinthians9:10 I kiám m̄-sī oân-choân ūi-tio̍h lán kóng--ê? Tong-jiân sī! In-ūi keng-choh ê lâng khǹg ǹg-bāng keng-choh
1Corinthians9:11 Goán nā ū tī lín tiong-kan iā sio̍k-lêng ê chéng-chí
1Corinthians9:12 Pa̍t-lâng nā ū koân thang tùi lín iau-kiû
1Corinthians9:13 Lín it-tēng chai
1Corinthians9:14 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
1Corinthians9:15 M̄-kú góa lóng m̄-bat ēng chiah-ê koân. Góa hiān-chāi siá chiah-ê ōe mā m̄-sī beh cheng-chhú chit-khoán ê koân. Góa lêng-khó sí mā bô ài hō͘ góa só͘ khoa-kháu--ê lo̍k-khong!
1Corinthians9:16 Góa thoân hok-im pèng bô sím-mi̍h thang khoa-kháu; góa sī hōng-bēng teh thoân. Góa nā bô thoân chiū ū chai-hō.
1Corinthians9:17 Góa nā kam-goān chòe chit-ê kang
1Corinthians9:18 Án-ni
1Corinthians9:19 Góa sī chū-iû ê lâng
1Corinthians9:20 Tùi Iû-thài -lâng
1Corinthians9:21 Tùi Lu̍t-hoat-gōa ê lâng
1Corinthians9:22 Tùi sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng
1Corinthians9:23 Góa chòe chiah-ê lóng sī ūi-tio̍h hok-im
1Corinthians9:24 Lín it-tēng chai
1Corinthians9:25 Ta̍k-ê soán-chhiú lóng ū chiap-siū giâm-keh ê hùn-liān; in án-ni chòe sī beh tit-tio̍h ōe pāi-hoāi ê hoa-koan; m̄-kú lán ài tit--tio̍h-ê sī bōe pāi-hoāi ê hoa-koan.
1Corinthians9:26 Án-ni
1Corinthians9:27 Góa giâm-keh chhau-liān ka-kī ê seng-khu kàu ōe-tàng oân-choân khòng-chè

1Corinthians10:2 In tī hûn-lāi

1Corinthians15:39 Ta̍k-khoán tōng-bu̍t ê jio̍k-thé mā lóng bô kâng-khoán: Lâng ê jio̍k-thé chi̍t khoán

1Corinthians15:41 Ji̍t-thâu ū ji̍t-thâu ê kng

1Corinthians15:44 tâi--lo̍h-khì--ê sī hiat-jio̍k ê thé

Galatians6:5 In-ūi ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h taⁿ ka-kī ê tàⁿ.

Ephesians1:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! In-ūi I ū chiong thiⁿ-téng ta̍k-khoán sio̍k-lêng ê hok-khì
Ephesians1:4 Chhòng-sè í-chêng
Ephesians1:5 chá chiū koat-tēng beh thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hō͘ lán choh I ê kiáⁿ-jî kui I; che sī I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí--ê

Ephesians1:10 Chit-ê kè-ōe

Ephesians1:12 Án-ni sī beh hō͘ goán chiah-ê tāi-seng chiong ǹg-bāng khǹg tī Ki-tok ê lâng thang siōng-chàn Siōng-tè ê êng-iāu.

Philippians1:1 Góa Pó-lô kap Thê-mô͘-thài sī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê po̍k-jîn. Goán siá-phoe hō͘ tòa tī Hui-li̍p-pí
Philippians1:2 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an!
Philippians1:3 Góa ta̍k-piàn siūⁿ-tio̍h lín ê sî lóng kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè;
Philippians1:4 ta̍k-piàn ūi-tio̍h lín chèng-lâng kî-tó ê sî lóng ēng hoaⁿ-hí ê sim kî-kiû
Philippians1:5 in-ūi lín tùi thâu chi̍t ji̍t khí kàu hiān-chāi
Philippians1:6 Góa chhim-sìn hit-ūi tī lín tiong-kan khai-sí chòe bí-hó kang-chok ê Siōng-tè
Philippians1:7 Góa siông-siông teh siàu-liām lín
Philippians1:8 Góa ēng Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê thiàⁿ-sim jōa-ni̍h siàu-liām lín tāi-ke
Philippians1:9 Góa só͘ kî-kiû--ê sī án-ni: Lín ê thiàⁿ ōe ná ke-thiⁿ
Philippians1:10 hō͘ lín ōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t sím-mi̍h chiah sī siōng hó
Philippians1:11 chhiong-móa khò Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiah ū ê hó tek-hēng
Philippians1:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Philippians1:13 tì-kàu ông-kiong ê choân-thé kéng-ōe í-ki̍p kî-tha só͘-ū ê lâng lóng chai-iáⁿ góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ sī ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘.
Philippians1:14 Chin chōe hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē mā in-ūi góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ tī Chú lāi-bīn koh-khah khak-sìn
Philippians1:15 Ū lâng thoân Ki-tok sī chhut tī oàn-tò͘ kap hò͘ⁿ cheng-lūn; mā ū lâng sī chhut tī hó ì-sù.
Philippians1:16 Chiah-ê lâng sī chhut tī thiàⁿ-sim
Philippians1:17 Lēng-gōa hiah-ê lâng soan-iông Ki-tok sī chhut tī iá-sim
Philippians1:18 Án-ni ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē? Sī ké-ì á-sī chin-sim
Philippians1:19 in-ūi góa chai
Philippians1:20 Góa pek-chhiat kî-thāi kap ǹg-bāng--ê
Philippians1:21 In-ūi

Philippians1:23 Góa chìn-thè-lióng-lân. Góa si̍t-chāi chin ài lī-khui chit-ê sè-kan kap Ki-tok chòe-hé

Philippians1:25 Tùi chit-hāng

Philippians1:28 Bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h

Philippians1:30 lâi chham-ú siâng-khoán ê cheng-chiàn; chit-ê cheng-chiàn lín ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa án-chóaⁿ chiàn
Philippians2:1 Kì-jiân lín kap Ki-tok kiat-liân ū tit-tio̍h kek-lē; kì-jiân lín tùi I ê thiàⁿ ū tit-tio̍h an-ùi; kì-jiân lín kap Sèng Sîn ū thoân-khè; kì-jiân lín ū keng-giām Siōng-tè ê chû-pi lîn-bín;
Philippians2:2 lín tio̍h ū siâng-khoán ê sim-chì
Philippians2:3 M̄-thang chū-su-chū-lī
Philippians2:4 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng m̄-thang chí-ū kò͘ ka-kī ê tāi-chì
Philippians2:5 Lín tio̍h ū Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sim-chì:
Philippians2:6 I goân-pún ū Siōng-tè ê sin-hūn
Philippians2:7 I hoán-tńg piàⁿ-khang ka-kī
Philippians2:8 I chū-goān khiam-pi

Philippians2:10 Án-ni

1Thessalonians5:6 Só͘-í
1Thessalonians5:7 In-ūi khùn ê lâng lóng sī àm-sî teh khùn; chiú-chùi ê lâng sī àm-sî teh chùi.
1Thessalonians5:8 Kì-jiân lán sī sio̍k ji̍t--sî ê lâng
1Thessalonians5:9 Siōng-tè bô an-pâi lán tio̍h siū hêng-hoa̍t
1Thessalonians5:10 Ki-tok thòe lán sí
1Thessalonians5:11 Só͘-í
1Thessalonians5:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Thessalonians5:13 Koh tio̍h in-ūi in só͘ chòe ê kang
1Thessalonians5:14 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Thessalonians5:15 Lín tio̍h kín-sīn
1Thessalonians5:16 Tio̍h put-sî hoaⁿ-hí;
1Thessalonians5:17 tio̍h kè-sio̍k kî-tó;
1Thessalonians5:18 bô-lūn sím-mi̍h kéng-gū lóng tio̍h kám-siā; in-ūi che sī Siōng-tè só͘ ì-ài
1Thessalonians5:19 M̄-thang phah-hoa Sèng Sîn ê hé;
1Thessalonians5:20 m̄-thang biáu-sī sian-ti ê ōe.
1Thessalonians5:21 Sū-sū tio̍h chhat-giām; hó--ê tio̍h chhî-siú
1Thessalonians5:22 it-chhè ê siâ-ok tio̍h khì-sak.
1Thessalonians5:23 Goān sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè chhin-sin kā lín oân-choân sèng-hòa
1Thessalonians5:24 Ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t
1Thessalonians5:25 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Thessalonians5:26 Tio̍h chin-sêng kā lóng-chóng ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē chhéng-an.
1Thessalonians5:27 Goán hōng Chú ê miâ hoan-hù lín tio̍h tha̍k chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ chèng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē thiaⁿ.
1Thessalonians5:28 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi!
2Thessalonians1:1 Góa Pó-lô
2Thessalonians1:2 Goān lín tùi lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tit-tio̍h un-tián kap pêng-an!
2Thessalonians1:3 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
2Thessalonians1:4 Só͘-í goán tī Siōng-tè ê chèng kàu-hōe tiong ēng lín chòe khoa-kháu
2Thessalonians1:5 Che chèng-si̍t Siōng-tè phòaⁿ-tēng lín ōe-kham-tit sêng-siū Siōng-tè-kok sī kong-tō
2Thessalonians1:6 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè sī kong-tō
2Thessalonians1:7 mā hō͘ lín chiah-ê tú-tio̍h chai-lān ê lâng
2Thessalonians1:8 
2Thessalonians1:9 In ōe siū éng-oán húi-bia̍t ê hêng-hoa̍t
2Thessalonians1:10 I lâi-lîm ê sî ōe tùi I ê sìn-tô͘ tit-tio̍h êng-kng
2Thessalonians1:11 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bo̍k-te̍k
2Thessalonians1:12 thang hō͘ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ tī lín tiong-kan tit-tio̍h êng-kng
2Thessalonians2:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
2Thessalonians2:2 nā ū thiaⁿ lâng kóng goán tī ū-giân
2Thessalonians2:3 Lâng bô-lūn ēng sím-mi̍h hong-hoat
2Thessalonians2:4 Chit-ê te̍k-tùi-chiá thê-ko ka-kī
2Thessalonians2:5 Chit-ê tāi-chì
2Thessalonians2:6 Lín lóng chai
2Thessalonians2:7 In-ūi hit-ê sîn-pì ê put-hoat sè-le̍k í-keng teh ūn-chok
2Thessalonians2:8 Hit-sî Put-hoat-chiá ōe chhut-hiān; Chú Iâ-so͘ ōe ēng tùi I ê chhùi thò͘--chhut-lâi ê khùi kā i thâi-sí
2Thessalonians2:9 Put-hoat-chiá lâi-lîm ê sî ōe ēng Sat-tàn ta̍k-khoán ê koân-lêng kiâⁿ ké sîn-jiah kap kî-sū
2Thessalonians2:10 koh tùi bia̍t-bông ê lâng kiâⁿ ta̍k-khoán siâ-ok ê phiàn-su̍t
2Thessalonians2:11 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni
2Thessalonians2:12 tì-kàu it-chhè m̄ sìn chin-lí
2Thessalonians2:13 Chú só͘ thiàⁿ ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
2Thessalonians2:14 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê
2Thessalonians2:15 Só͘-í
2Thessalonians2:16 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok pún-sin kap thiàⁿ lán ê Pē Siōng-tè tùi I ê un-tián
2Thessalonians2:17 lâi an-ùi lín ê sim
2Thessalonians3:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
2Thessalonians3:2 Mā chhiáⁿ lín kî-kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ goán ōe-tàng thoat-lī choh-ok-choh-to̍k ê lâng
2Thessalonians3:3 Chú sī khó-khò--ê; I ōe hō͘ lín kian-kò͘
2Thessalonians3:4 Chú hō͘ goán tùi lín ū sìn-sim
2Thessalonians3:5 Goān Chú ín-chhōa lín
2Thessalonians3:6 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
2Thessalonians3:7 Lín ka-kī mā chai lín eng-kai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ o̍h goán
2Thessalonians3:8 Goán m̄-bat pe̍h-chia̍h pa̍t-lâng ê pn̄g; hoán-tńg mî-ji̍t thoa-bôa lô-khó͘
2Thessalonians3:9 Goán án-ni chòe
2Thessalonians3:10 Goán tī lín hia ê sî bat bēng-lēng lín kóng
2Thessalonians3:11 Goán án-ni kóng
2Thessalonians3:12 Chit-khoán lâng
2Thessalonians3:13 M̄-kú
2Thessalonians3:14 Nā ū lâng m̄-khéng ho̍k-chiông goán tī chit-tiuⁿ phoe só͘ hoan-hù ê ōe
2Thessalonians3:15 put-kò m̄-thang kā i khòaⁿ-chòe tùi-te̍k
2Thessalonians3:16 Goān sù pêng-an ê Chú put-sî ēng ta̍k-khoán hong-hoat chhin-sin sù lín pêng-an! Goān Chú kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi!
2Thessalonians3:17 Góa Pó-lô chhin-pit kā lín chhéng-an. Góa tī ta̍k-tiuⁿ phoe lóng ū án-ni chhiam-miâ. Góa lóng án-ni siá.
2Thessalonians3:18 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi!
1Timothy1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô
1Timothy1:2 siá-phoe hō͘ Thê-mô͘-thài
1Timothy1:3 Góa beh khì Má-kî-tùn ê sî
1Timothy1:4 mā m̄-thang lōng-hùi cheng-sîn tī bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat kap lò-lò-tn̂g ê cho̍k-phó͘
1Timothy1:5 Chit-ê bēng-lēng ê bo̍k-te̍k sī beh tit-tio̍h jîn-ài; chit-ê jîn-ài sī tùi chheng-khì ê sim
1Timothy1:6 Ū lâng tùi chiah-ê phian-lī
1Timothy1:7 In liân ka-kī só͘ kóng só͘ chú-tiuⁿ--ê to bô lí-kái
1Timothy1:8 Lán chai
1Timothy1:9 Lán mā chai
1Timothy1:10 îm-loān
1Timothy1:11 Chit-ê kiān-choân ê kàu-gī hû-ha̍p eng-kai tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn ê Siōng-tè só͘ kau-thok góa hit-ê êng-kng ê hok-im.
1Timothy1:12 Góa kám-siā hō͘ góa khùi-la̍t ê lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘
1Timothy1:13 Sui-jiân í-chêng góa pòng-to̍k
1Timothy1:14 Lán ê Chú sù góa hong-sēng kàu móa--chhut-lâi ê un-tián
1Timothy1:15 “Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lîm-kàu sè-kan sī beh chín-kiù chōe-jîn” chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn
1Timothy1:16 M̄-kú góa tit-tio̍h lîn-bín sī in-ūi Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok beh ēng góa chit-ê tē-it pháiⁿ ê lâng lâi hián-bêng I bû-hān ê nāi-sim
1Timothy1:17 Goān chun-kùi
1Timothy1:18 Góa ê kiáⁿ Thê-mô͘-thài ah
1Timothy1:19 Lí tio̍h chhî-siú sìn-sim kap chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim. Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng pàng-sak liông-sim
1Timothy1:20 kî-tiong ū Su-bí-nái kap A-le̍k-san-tāi; góa í-keng chiong in kau hō͘ Sat-tàn
1Timothy2:1 Só͘-í
1Timothy2:2 
1Timothy2:3 Án-ni chòe sī eng-kai
1Timothy2:4 I ài chèng-lâng tit-kiù
1Timothy2:5 In-ūi Siōng-tè sī chi̍t ūi
1Timothy2:6 I hiàn pún-sin lâi sio̍k-hôe chèng-lâng
1Timothy2:7 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni
1Timothy2:8 Góa ài ta-po͘-lâng bô siū-khì
1Timothy2:9 Góa mā ài hū-jîn-lâng chhēng-chhah toan-chong phok-sò͘ chéng-chôe
1Timothy2:10 tio̍h ēng hó hêng-ûi chòe chng-thāⁿ
1Timothy2:11 Hū-jîn-lâng tio̍h tiām-tiām-á o̍h
1Timothy2:12 Góa m̄-chún hū-jîn-lâng kà-sī á-sī koán-hat ta-po͘-lâng; i tio̍h an-chēng.
1Timothy2:13 In-ūi A-tong tāi-seng siū chō
1Timothy2:14 Koh A-tong bô siū iú-he̍k
1Timothy2:15 Put-kò hū-jîn-lâng nā an-hūn siú-kí
1Timothy3:1 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn: Nā ū lâng ài choh kam-tok
1Timothy3:2 Só͘-í
1Timothy3:3 bô chiú-chùi
1Timothy3:4 gâu koán-lí ka-kī ê ka-têng
1Timothy3:5 Lâng nā bōe-hiáu koán-lí ka-kī ê ka-têng
1Timothy3:6 Chho͘-sìn-chiá m̄-thang hō͘ i tam-jīm kam-tok
1Timothy3:7 I tī kàu-hōe-gōa mā tio̍h ū hó kiàn-chèng
1Timothy3:8 Chip-sū siâng-khoán mā tio̍h toan-chong
1Timothy3:9 tio̍h ēng chheng-khì ê liông-sim kò͘-siú sìn-gióng ê ò-pì.
1Timothy3:10 Chit-khoán lâng mā tio̍h seng hō͘ in chiap-siū khó-giām
1Timothy3:11 Lú chip-sū mā-sī tio̍h toan-chong
1Timothy3:12 Chip-sū eng-kai chí-ū chi̍t ê bó͘
1Timothy3:13 Chip-sū ê kang-chok nā chòe ōe hó
1Timothy3:14 Góa ǹg-bāng chin kín chiū ōe khì lí hia
1Timothy3:15 
1Timothy3:16 Tāi-ke lóng soan-jīn lán sìn-gióng ê ò-pì sī jōa-ni̍h tōa: Ki-tok hián-hiān chòe lâng
1Timothy4:1 Sèng Sîn bêng-bêng kóng
1Timothy4:2 Chit-khoán ê kà-sī sī tùi khi-phiàn-chiá ê pe̍h-chha̍t lâi--ê; in ê liông-sim í-keng hō͘ Mô͘-kúi ēng pû-âng-âng ê thih-ìn ù kì-hō.
1Timothy4:3 In kìm-chí kè-chhōa
1Timothy4:4 In-ūi Siōng-tè it-chhè ê chhòng-chō lóng sī hó
1Timothy4:5 thong-kè Siōng-tè ê ōe kap lâng ê kî-tó chiū chiâⁿ-chòe sèng.
1Timothy4:6 Lí nā chiong ē-bīn ê sū kà-sī hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Timothy4:7 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t chho͘-sio̍k kap khong-tōng bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat. Ūi-tio̍h kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h
1Timothy4:8 Chhau-liān seng-khu ū tām-po̍h lī-ek
1Timothy4:9 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn
1Timothy4:10 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê
1Timothy4:11 Lí tio̍h chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā in khoàn-bián kap kà-sī.
1Timothy4:12 M̄-thang in-ūi lí ê siàu-liân hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-khin; tio̍h tī kóng-ōe
1Timothy4:13 Tio̍h tì-ì soan-tho̍k Sèng-keng
1Timothy4:14 M̄-thang hut-lio̍k lí só͘ niá-siū sio̍k-lêng ê un-sù
1Timothy4:15 Chiah-ê tāi-chì
1Timothy4:16 Lí ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn
1Timothy5:1 M̄-thang chek-pī lāu-lâng
1Timothy5:2 tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khoán-thāi lāu-bú án-ni khoán-thāi lāu hū-jîn-lâng; tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khoán-thāi chí-bē án-ni ēng oân-choân sûn-kiat ê sim khoán-thāi siàu-liân ê hū-jîn-lâng.
1Timothy5:3 Tio̍h chun-tiōng chin-chiàⁿ bô i-óa ê kóaⁿ-hū.
1Timothy5:4 Kóaⁿ-hū ū kiáⁿ-jî-sun
1Timothy5:5 Chin-chiàⁿ bô-i-bô-óa ê kóaⁿ-hū
1Timothy5:6 M̄-kú chhia-hoa ê kóaⁿ-hū
1Timothy5:7 Lí tio̍h chiong chiah-ê kā in kà-sī
1Timothy5:8 Nā ū lâng bô chiàu-kò͘ chhin-chhek
1Timothy5:9 Kóaⁿ-hū tio̍h chhiau-kè la̍k-cha̍p hè chiah thang teng-kì; i tio̍h chí-ū kiat-hun chi̍t piàn
1Timothy5:10 tio̍h ū chòe hó-sū ê chèng-kù
1Timothy5:11 M̄-kú siàu-liân ê kóaⁿ-hū m̄-thang kā in teng-kì; in-ūi in chêng-io̍k chi̍t-ē chhiong-tōng lī-khui Ki-tok
1Timothy5:12 ûi-pōe tong-chho͘ só͘ hē ê goān
1Timothy5:13 Koh in o̍h pîn-tōaⁿ
1Timothy5:14 Só͘-í góa ài siàu-liân ê kóaⁿ-hū koh kè
1Timothy5:15 in-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa kóaⁿ-hū í-keng lī-khui
1Timothy5:16 Sìn Chú ê hū-jîn-lâng chhù-lāi nā ū kóaⁿ-hū
1Timothy5:17 Hiah-ê gâu tī-lí kàu-hōe ê tiúⁿ-ló eng-kai tit-tio̍h ka-pē ê pò-siû
1Timothy5:18 in-ūi Sèng-keng kóng
1Timothy5:19 Khòng-kò tiúⁿ-ló ê àn-kiāⁿ
1Timothy5:20 Kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng tio̍h tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kā in khiàn-chek
1Timothy5:21 Góa tī Siōng-tè
1Timothy5:22 M̄-thang sûi-piān kā lâng kiâⁿ àn-chhiú-lé. M̄-thang chham-ú pa̍t-lâng ê chōe; tio̍h pó-siú ka-kī sûn-kiat.
1Timothy5:23 In-ūi lí ê ūi bô hó
1Timothy5:24 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ê chōe chin bêng-hián
1Timothy5:25 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
1Timothy6:1 Tī lâng ê koán-hat-ē chòe lô͘-lē--ê
1Timothy6:2 Chú-lâng nā-sī sìn Chú ê
1Timothy6:3 Nā ū lâng kà pa̍t-khoán kàu-gī bô hû-ha̍p lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kiān-choân ê tō-lí
1Timothy6:4 chiū-sī phòng-hong chū-tāi
1Timothy6:5 tì-kàu sim-su pāi-hoāi
1Timothy6:6 Kèng-khiân koh ti-chiok ōe hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h tōa lī-ek.
1Timothy6:7 Seng-put-tài-lâi
1Timothy6:8 ū thang chia̍h
1Timothy6:9 Siūⁿ-beh hoat-châi ê lâng ōe hām-lo̍h iú-he̍k
1Timothy6:10 In-ūi tham-châi sī bān-ok ê kun-goân; ū lâng tham-ài chîⁿ-châi
1Timothy6:11 M̄-kú lí chit-ê sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng
1Timothy6:12 Sìn-gióng ê bí-hó kèng-sài tio̍h chīn-la̍t khì piàⁿ; tio̍h khak-pó éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; ūi-tio̍h chit-ê oa̍h-miā lí ū siū kéng-tiàu
1Timothy6:13 Tī sù oa̍h-miā hō͘ bān-mi̍h ê Siōng-tè
1Timothy6:14 góa hoan-hù lí tio̍h chun-siú só͘ niá-siū ê bēng-lēng
1Timothy6:15 Tī sî-ki sêng-se̍k ê sî
1Timothy6:16 Siōng-tè sī to̍k-it bōe-sí
1Timothy6:17 Tùi hiah-ê kim-sè hó-gia̍h ê lâng
1Timothy6:18 Tio̍h hoan-hù in chòe hó-sū
1Timothy6:19 Án-ni chòe sī teh ūi ka-kī ê chiong-lâi khí-chō kian-kò͘ ê tōe-ki
1Timothy6:20 Thê-mô͘-thài ah
1Timothy6:21 Ū lâng chū-chheng ū chit-khoán tì-sek
2Timothy1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô
2Timothy1:2 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ Thê-mô͘-thài. Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù lí un-tián
2Timothy1:3 Góa kám-siā góa kap lia̍t-chó͘ kâng-khoán ēng chheng-khì ê liông-sim kèng-pài ê Siōng-tè. Góa mî-ji̍t kî-tó ê sî siàu-liām lí bô-soah.
2Timothy1:4 Góa siūⁿ-tio̍h lī-pia̍t ê sî lí teh lâu ba̍k-sái
2Timothy1:5 Góa ōe-kì-tit lí ū sûn-chin ê sìn-sim; chit-ê sìn-sim lí ê gōa-má Lô-í kap lí ê lāu-bú Iú-nî-ki seng ū
2Timothy1:6 In-ūi án-ni
2Timothy1:7 In-ūi Siōng-tè hō͘ lán ê m̄-sī kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê sim-lêng
2Timothy1:8 Só͘-í
2Timothy1:9 Siōng-tè kiù lán
2Timothy1:10 chit-ê un-tián hiān-chāi thong-kè lán ê Kiù-chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê hián-hiān í-keng si̍t-hiān. Ki-tok í-keng húi-bia̍t sí-bông
2Timothy1:11 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê hok-im
2Timothy1:12 Só͘-í góa chiah teh siū-khó͘. Chóng-sī góa bô kám-kak kiàn-siàu
2Timothy1:13 Tio̍h ēng lí tùi góa thiaⁿ--tio̍h hiah-ê kiān-choân ê tō-lí chòe bô͘-iūⁿ
2Timothy1:14 Tio̍h kò͘-siú thong-kè tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn ê Sèng Sîn kau-thok hō͘ lí ê bí-hó ê sìn-sit.
2Timothy1:15 Lí chai
2Timothy1:16 Goān Chú lîn-bín O-nî-sek-hut chi̍t ke ê lâng
2Timothy1:17 tian-tò kàu Lô-má ê sî phah-piàⁿ chhē góa chhē kàu tio̍h.
2Timothy1:18 Goān Chú hō͘ i tī hit-ê Ji̍t tit-tio̍h lîn-bín! I tī Í-hut-só͘ hiah-ni̍h gâu ho̍k-sāi góa
2Timothy2:1 Só͘-í
2Timothy2:2 Lí tī chin chōe kiàn-chèng-jîn bīn-chêng tùi góa thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê kà-sī
2Timothy2:3 Lí tio̍h choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê cheng-peng kap góa chòe-hé siū-khó͘.
2Timothy2:4 Ho̍k-ia̍h ê peng nā beh hō͘ koaⁿ-tiúⁿ hoaⁿ-hí
2Timothy2:5 Ūn-tōng-oân nā bô chiàu kui-chek pí-sài chiū bōe-tàng tit-tio̍h koan-kun ê hoa-koan.
2Timothy2:6 Kut-la̍t chèng-choh ê lông-hu tong-jiân seng siu-sêng.
2Timothy2:7 Góa só͘ kóng ê ōe lí tio̍h hó-hó-á siūⁿ
2Timothy2:8 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok
2Timothy2:9 Góa ūi-tio̍h chit-ê hok-im siū-khó͘
2Timothy2:10 Só͘-í
2Timothy2:11 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn: Lán nā kap I tâng-sí
2Timothy2:12 Lán nā thun-lún
2Timothy2:13 Lán nā sit-sìn
2Timothy2:14 Lí tio̍h thê-chhíⁿ tāi-ke
2Timothy2:15 Tio̍h chīn-la̍t chòe
2Timothy2:16 Tio̍h siám-pī chho͘-sio̍k bô lō͘-ēng ê ōe
2Timothy2:17 chit-khoán ê ōe ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ to̍k-chhng thòaⁿ-khui. Su-bí-nái kap Hui-lí-tô͘ mā-sī chit-khoán lâng;
2Timothy2:18 in í-keng lī-khui chin-lí
2Timothy2:19 Siōng-tè ê tōe-ki kian-kò͘ bōe iô-tāng
2Timothy2:20 Tī tōa keng chhù-lāi
2Timothy2:21 Lâng nā kiat-chēng ka-kī
2Timothy2:22 Tio̍h siám-pī siàu-liân lâng ê chêng-io̍k; tio̍h kap hiah-ê ēng chheng-khì ê sim kiû-kiò Chú ê lâng chòe-hé tui-kiû kong-gī
2Timothy2:23 M̄-thang ū gû-gōng bû-ti ê piān-lūn; lí chai chiah-ê tāi-chì ōe ín-khí oan-ke.
2Timothy2:24 Chú ê po̍k-jîn bô eng-kai oan-ke
2Timothy2:25 un-jiû khoàn-kài hoán-tùi-chiá
2Timothy2:26 Án-ni in sui-jiân í-keng hō͘ Mô͘-kúi lia̍h-khì sūn-thàn i ê ì-sù
2Timothy3:1 Tio̍h chai
2Timothy3:2 Hit-sî
2Timothy3:3 bô chhin-chêng
2Timothy3:4 kan-kúi
2Timothy3:5 ū kèng-khiân ê gōa-māu khiok bô kèng-khiân ê si̍t-chit. Lí tio̍h siám-pī chit-khoán lâng.
2Timothy3:6 In tiong-kan ū lâng chhim-ji̍p lâng ê chhù
2Timothy3:7 in put-sî to teh o̍h
2Timothy3:8 Chhin-chhiūⁿ chá-chêng Ngá-nî kap Iông-pò͘-lûi hoán-tùi Mô͘-se
2Timothy3:9 M̄-kú chiah-ê lâng
2Timothy3:10 Lí ū o̍h góa só͘ kà-sī--ê
2Timothy3:11 í-ki̍p só͘ siū ê pek-hāi kap khó͘-lān
2Timothy3:12 Só͘-ū ài-beh kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân kè kèng-khiân seng-oa̍h ê lâng
2Timothy3:13 Put-kò pháiⁿ-lâng kap khi-phiàn-lâng--ê ōe ná lâi ná pháiⁿ
2Timothy3:14 Chóng-sī lí tio̍h chhî-siú só͘ ha̍k-si̍p só͘ chhim-sìn ê tō-lí
2Timothy3:15 Lí mā chai lí tùi sòe-hàn chiū bêng-pe̍k Sèng-keng
2Timothy3:16 Choân-pō͘ Sèng-keng sī Siōng-tè ê Sîn kám-tōng siá--ê
2Timothy3:17 hō͘ ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè ê lâng chong-pī hó-sè
2Timothy4:1 Tī Siōng-tè kap teh-beh sím-phòaⁿ só͘-ū oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ bīn-chêng
2Timothy4:2 Tio̍h thoân tō-lí
2Timothy4:3 In-ūi sî-ki teh-beh kàu
2Timothy4:4 
2Timothy4:5 Chóng-sī lí hoān-sū tio̍h kín-sīn
2Timothy4:6 Taⁿ góa hi-seng ka-kī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè ê sî kàu lah; chit-chūn chiū-sī góa lī-khui sè-kan ê sî.
2Timothy4:7 Bí-hó ê kèng-sài góa í-keng piàⁿ liáu; tio̍h cháu ê lō͘-thêng góa í-keng cháu oân; tio̍h siú ê sìn-gióng góa í-keng kian-siú.
2Timothy4:8 Gī ê hoa-koan hiān-chāi í-keng ūi góa chún-pī hó-sè
2Timothy4:9 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe kóaⁿ-kín lâi góa chia;
2Timothy4:10 in-ūi Tí-má tham-ài hiān-sè
2Timothy4:11 Chí-ū Lō͘-ka kap góa chòe-hé tī chia. Lí tio̍h chhōa Má-khó chòe-hé lâi
2Timothy4:12 Góa í-keng phài Chhui-ki-kó͘ khì Í-hut-só͘.
2Timothy4:13 Góa tī Te̍k-lô-a lâu tī Ka-pò͘ in tau hit-niá gōa-saⁿ
2Timothy4:14 Phah-tâng sai-hū A-le̍k-san-tāi kā góa hāi kah chin chhám; Chú ōe chiàu i ê só͘-chòe kā i pò-èng.
2Timothy4:15 Lí ka-kī mā tio̍h tî-hông
2Timothy4:16 Góa thâu chi̍t piàn sin-sò͘ ê sî bô lâng tī sin-piⁿ pang-chān góa
2Timothy4:17 M̄-kú Chú ū khiā tī góa sin-piⁿ
2Timothy4:18 Chú ōe kiù góa thoat-lī lóng-chóng ê pháiⁿ-tāi
2Timothy4:19 Chhiáⁿ kā Pek-ki-la
2Timothy4:20 Í-la-to͘ kè-sio̍k tiàm tī Ko-lîm-to; Te̍k-lô-hui-mô͘ phòa-pīⁿ
2Timothy4:21 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe tī tang-thiⁿ í-chêng lâi. Iú-pò͘-lô
2Timothy4:22 Goān Chú kap lí ê sim-lêng tông-chāi! Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi!
Titus1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô
Titus1:2 chit-ê chin-lí hō͘ lán tùi éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā ū ǹg-bāng
Titus1:3 I tī sî-ki sêng-se̍k ê sî
Titus1:4 Thê-to
Titus1:5 Góa kā lí lâu tī Khek-lí-te̍k
Titus1:6 Choh tiúⁿ-ló--ê tio̍h bô thang chí-chek
Titus1:7 Kàu-hōe ê kam-tok
Titus1:8 Tio̍h gâu khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng
Titus1:9 I tio̍h kian-siú hit-ê khó-khò hû-ha̍p kàu-gī ê sìn-sit
Titus1:10 In-ūi ū chin chōe m̄ sūn-ho̍k ê lâng
Titus1:11 Chit-khoán lâng it-tēng tio̍h kìm-chí in kóng-ōe
Titus1:12 In Khek-lí-te̍k -lâng ū chi̍t ê sian-ti bat án-ni kóng
Titus1:13 I kóng--ê sī sū-si̍t. Só͘-í lí tio̍h giâm-keh kā in chek-pī
Titus1:14 bô thiaⁿ-thàn Iû-thài -lâng bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat kap pōe-ge̍k chin-lí ê lâng ê kui-lē.

Titus2:1 Chóng-sī lí

Titus2:4 chiah thang hùn-liān siàu-liân hū-jîn-lâng thiàⁿ tiōng-hu
Titus2:5 koh tio̍h siú-kí

Titus3:1 Tio̍h thê-chhíⁿ tāi-ke ho̍k-chiông chip-chèng-chiá kap tong-koân-chiá
Titus3:2 Tio̍h khǹg in m̄-thang húi-pòng pa̍t-lâng
Titus3:3 In-ūi lán ka-kī í-chêng mā-sī bô tì-sek
Titus3:4 M̄-kú lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè chû-pi jîn-ài hián-bêng ê sî
Titus3:5 I ū chín-kiù lán; m̄-sī in-ūi lán ka-kī ū hó hêng-ûi
Titus3:6 thong-kè lán ê Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok Siōng-tè ū chiong Sèng Sîn hong-hong-hù-hù kā lán koàn-ak
Titus3:7 hō͘ lán thang khò I ê un-tián chheng-chòe gī

Titus3:9 Tio̍h siám-pī gû-gōng ê cheng-lūn
Titus3:10 Chè-chō hun-cheng ê lâng
Titus3:11 Lí chai

Titus3:14 Tio̍h hoan-hù lán ka-kī ê lâng ha̍k-si̍p chòe hó-sū lâi kiong-kip si̍t-chè ê su-iàu
Titus3:15 Só͘-ū kap góa tī chia ê lâng beh kā lí chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe goán kā hiah-ê tâng-sìn ê hó pêng-iú chhéng-an. Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi!

Philemon1:2 goán ê chí-bē A-hui-a

Philemon1:7 Hiaⁿ-tī ah

Philemon1:9 m̄-kú
Philemon1:10 Góa thòe O-nî-se-bô͘ kā lí kiû
Philemon1:11 I í-chêng tùi lí lóng bô lō͘-ēng

Philemon1:14 m̄-kú bô lí ê tông-ì
Philemon1:15 Kiám-chhái in-ūi án-ni
Philemon1:16 bô koh sī lô͘-lē
Philemon1:17 Só͘-í
Philemon1:18 I nā ū tùi lí chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h
Philemon1:19 Góa Pó-lô chhin-chhiú siá: Góa hū-chek hêng. Góa eng-kai m̄-bián kā lí thê-chhíⁿ
Philemon1:20 Sī lah
Philemon1:21 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ lí
Philemon1:22 Mā tio̍h kā góa chún-pī chi̍t keng pâng-keng
Philemon1:23 Ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kap góa tâng choh siû-hoān ê Í-pa-hut beh kā lín chhéng-an.
Philemon1:24 Góa ê tâng-kang Má-khó
Philemon1:25 Goān Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín ê sim-lêng tông-chāi!
Hebrews1:1 Siōng-tè tī kó͘-chá ū thong-kè I ê chèng sian-ti
Hebrews1:2 m̄-kú tī chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí
Hebrews1:3 I hoán-siā Siōng-tè ê êng-iāu
Hebrews1:4 Siōng-tè ū sù Kiáⁿ pí chèng thiⁿ-sài khah chun-kùi ê miâ
Hebrews1:5 Siōng-tè m̄-bat tùi jīm-hô chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Lí sī góa ê Kiáⁿ
Hebrews1:6 Koh Siōng-tè chhe-khián I ê Tōa-kiáⁿ ji̍p sè-kan ê sî
Hebrews1:7 Koan-hē thiⁿ-sài
Hebrews1:8 M̄-kú koan-hē Kiáⁿ
Hebrews1:9 Lí ì-ài kong-gī
Hebrews1:10 I koh kóng: Chú ah
Hebrews1:11 Thiⁿ-tōe lóng ōe siau-sit
Hebrews1:12 lí ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ kńg gōa-saⁿ kā in kńg--khí-lâi; in ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ i-ho̍k kái-piàn. M̄-kú lí éng-oán bōe kái-piàn; lí ê hè-siū bû-kiông-chīn.
Hebrews1:13 Siōng-tè kiám bat tùi tó chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng
Hebrews1:14 Thiⁿ-sài lóng sī teh ho̍k-sāi ê sîn
Hebrews2:1 Só͘-í
Hebrews2:2 In-ūi thong-kè thiⁿ-sài só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit nā ū kong-hāu
Hebrews2:3 án-ni lán hut-lio̍k chiah-ni̍h tōa ê chín-kiù
Hebrews2:4 Siōng-tè koh ū ēng sîn-jiah
Hebrews2:5 Siōng-tè bô chiong lán só͘ kóng chit-ê chiong-lâi ê sè-kài kau hō͘ thiⁿ-sài koán-lí.
Hebrews2:6 M̄-kú Sèng-keng ū chi̍t ê só͘-chāi choh-chèng kóng: Lâng sǹg sím-mi̍h
Hebrews2:7 Lí hō͘ i pí thiⁿ-sài sió-khóa khah kē; lí sù êng-kng chun-kùi chòe hoa-koan kā i tì
Hebrews2:8 hō͘ bān-iú lóng hâng-ho̍k tī i kha-ē. Siōng-tè kì-jiân hō͘ bān-iú lóng hâng-ho̍k i
Hebrews2:9 Lán khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ūi pí thiⁿ-sài sió-khóa khah kē ê Iâ-so͘ í-keng keng-kè sí ê thòng-khó͘
Hebrews2:10 Hit-ūi chhòng-chō koh î-chhî bān-iú ê Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h beh chhōa chin chōe kiáⁿ-jî chìn-ji̍p êng-kng
Hebrews2:11 Sū-si̍t
Hebrews2:12 I tùi Siōng-tè kóng: Góa beh tùi góa ê hiaⁿ-tī kap chí-bē pò-iông lí ê miâ
Hebrews2:13 I koh kóng: Góa beh sìn-khò I; iā kóng: Khòaⁿ leh
Hebrews2:14 Kì-jiân chiah-ê kiáⁿ-jî sī ū-huih-ū-bah ê lâng
Hebrews2:15 koh tháu-pàng hiah-ê in-ūi sí-bông ê kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ it-seng chòe lô͘-châi ê lâng.

Hebrews3:17 Siōng-tè tī hit sì-cha̍p nî kú tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng hoat siū-khì? Kiám m̄-sī hiah-ê in-ūi hoān-chōe sí tī khòng-iá ê lâng?

Hebrews4:1 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè hō͘ lâng chìn-ji̍p an-hioh ê èng-ún iáu lâu--teh
Hebrews4:2 Hok-im pîⁿ-pîⁿ ū thoân hō͘ in
Hebrews4:3 Lán chiah-ê sìn ê lâng ōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê an-hioh
Hebrews4:4 Koan-hē tē-chhit ji̍t
Hebrews4:5 Kâng chit-ê só͘-chāi ū koh kóng
Hebrews4:6 Kì-jiân tāi-seng thiaⁿ-tio̍h hok-im ê lâng in-ūi m̄ sūn-thàn bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p an-hioh

Hebrews4:8 Iok-su-a nā ū hō͘ in an-hioh

Hebrews4:12 Siōng-tè ê ōe sī oa̍h--ê

Hebrews4:14 Kì-jiân lán ū chi̍t ūi úi-tāi ê Tōa-chè-si — Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘
Hebrews4:15 Lán chit-ūi Tōa-chè-si m̄-sī bōe thé-thiap lán ê loán-jio̍k; I tī ta̍k hong-bīn lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ lán ū siū chhì-thàm

Hebrews5:3 In-ūi án-ni
Hebrews5:4 Bô lâng ka-kī tit-tio̍h tōa-chè-si chit-ê chun-kùi ê chit-hūn; chí-ū chhin-chhiūⁿ A-lûn
Hebrews5:5 Siâng-khoán
Hebrews5:6 Tī pa̍t-ūi I mā ū kóng: Chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù
Hebrews5:7 Iâ-so͘ chāi-sè ê sî bat tōa-siaⁿ âu-kiò koh lâu ba̍k-sái
Hebrews5:8 Sui-jiân I sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ
Hebrews5:9 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè hō͘ I ta̍t-kàu oân-choân ê tōe-pō͘
Hebrews5:10 hō͘ Siōng-tè chí-tēng I chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù choh Tōa-chè-si.

Hebrews5:13 Chia̍h-lin--ê lóng sī eⁿ-á
Hebrews5:14 Tōa-lâng chiah chia̍h-pn̄g; in sio̍k-lêng ê sim-khiàu ū keng-kè si̍t-chè ê chhau-liān chiah ōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t hó-pháiⁿ.

Hebrews6:8 M̄-kú thó͘-tōe nā hoat chháu-chhì kap cha̍p-chháu chiū bô lō͘-ēng
Hebrews6:9 Só͘ thiàⁿ ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Hebrews6:10 Siōng-tè m̄-sī bô kong-tō
Hebrews6:11 Goán chin ài lín ta̍k-ê lâng tùi thâu kàu bé pó-chhî jia̍t-sim
Hebrews6:12 Án-ni lín chiah bōe pîn-tōaⁿ
Hebrews6:13 Siōng-tè èng-ún A-pek-la-hán ê sî
Hebrews6:14 kóng
Hebrews6:15 A-pek-la-hán gâu thun-lún
Hebrews6:16 In-ūi lâng sī kí pí i khah-tōa--ê lâi li̍p-sè; mā ēng li̍p-sè chòe tam-pó lâi kái-koat in tiong-kan só͘-ū ê cheng-chip.
Hebrews6:17 Siōng-tè ài hiah-ê sêng-chiap èng-ún ê lâng khak-si̍t chai
Hebrews6:18 I ê èng-ún kap li̍p-sè chit nn̄g hāng lóng bōe kái-piàn
Hebrews6:19 Lán ū chit-ê ǹg-bāng
Hebrews6:20 Iâ-so͘ ūi-tio̍h lán chòe sian-hong í-keng ji̍p-khì hia
Hebrews7:1 Chit-ūi Be̍k-ki-sé-tek sī Sat-léng -ông
Hebrews7:2 A-pek-la-hán ū chiong i só͘ tit--tio̍h ê cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ i. Tē-it
Hebrews7:3 I bô pē bô bú
Hebrews7:4 Lín khòaⁿ
Hebrews7:5 Ū tam-tng chè-si-chit ê Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ-sun
Hebrews7:6 Be̍k-ki-sé-tek m̄-sī sio̍k Lī-bī ê sè-hē
Hebrews7:7 Sī-sòe siū sī-tōa chiok-hok sī lí-só͘-tong-jiân.
Hebrews7:8 Chi̍t hong-bīn
Hebrews7:9 Án-ni mā thang kóng
Hebrews7:10 In-ūi Be̍k-ki-sé-tek gêng-chiap A-pek-la-hán ê sî
Hebrews7:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê Lu̍t-hoat sī kun-kù Lī-bī ê chè-si chè-tō͘ pan-hoat--ê
Hebrews7:12 Kì-jiân chè-si chè-tō͘ kái-piàn
Hebrews7:13 In-ūi chiah-ê sū só͘ chí Hit-ūi sī sio̍k pa̍t-ê chi-cho̍k; chit-ê chi-cho̍k m̄-bat ū lâng tī chè-tôaⁿ chêng sū-hōng.
Hebrews7:14 Lán ê Chú bêng-bêng sī Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k ê kiáⁿ-sun; koan-hē chit-ê chi-cho̍k
Hebrews7:15 Taⁿ
Hebrews7:16 I choh Chè-si m̄-sī kun-kù lâng ê tiâu-lē kui-chek
Hebrews7:17 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū án-ni choh-chèng: Chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù
Hebrews7:18 Chi̍t hong-bīn
Hebrews7:19 in-ūi Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat sím-mi̍h tāi-chì to bô hoat-tō͘ sêng-choân. Lēng-gōa chi̍t hong-bīn
Hebrews7:20 Koh chit-ê ǹg-bāng ū keng-kè soan-sè. Lī-bī hē-thóng ê chè-si bô keng-kè soan-sè;
Hebrews7:21 chí-ū chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ choh Chè-si ê sî ū keng-kè soan-sè; I ê Siōng-tè tùi I kóng: Chú ū soan-sè
Hebrews7:22 Chiū-sī in-ūi án-ni
Hebrews7:23 Lī-bī hē-thóng ê chè-si ū chin chōe
Hebrews7:24 chí-ū Iâ-so͘ m̄-bián chiong chè-si-chit kau hō͘ pa̍t-lâng
Hebrews7:25 Án-ni
Hebrews7:26 Chit-khoán Tōa-chè-si tú-tú ha̍h lán ê su-iàu; I sèng-kiat
Hebrews7:27 I bô su-iàu chhin-chhiūⁿ kî-tha ê tōa-chè-si ta̍k-ji̍t tio̍h seng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī
Hebrews7:28 Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat jīm-bēng bô oân-choân ê lâng choh tōa-chè-si; m̄-kú ū Lu̍t-hoat í-āu
Hebrews8:1 Lán só͘ teh kóng siōng iàu-kín--ê sī án-ni: Lán ū chit-khoán ê Tōa-chè-si
Hebrews8:2 I tī Sèng-só͘
Hebrews8:3 Ta̍k-ê tōa-chè-si lóng sī ūi-tio̍h hiàn lé-mi̍h kap chè-phín jīm-bēng--ê; só͘-í chit-ūi Tōa-chè-si mā it-tēng tio̍h ū sím-mi̍h thang hiàn.
Hebrews8:4 I nā tī tōe-chiūⁿ chiū bô choh chè-si
Hebrews8:5 In só͘ chòe ê ho̍k-sāi put-kò sī thiⁿ-téng tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê hù-pún kap iáⁿ-siōng
Hebrews8:6 M̄-kú hiān-chāi Iâ-so͘ í-keng tit-tio̍h koh-khah chun-kùi ê sū-hōng
Hebrews8:7 Thâu chi̍t ê iok nā bô khoat-tiám
Hebrews8:8 M̄-kú Siōng-tè kā in chí-chek kóng: Chú kóng: Khòaⁿ leh
Hebrews8:9 Chit-ê iok bô chhin-chhiūⁿ góa í-chêng kap in ê chó͘-sian só͘ li̍p--ê
Hebrews8:10 Chú koh kóng: Hiah-ê ji̍t í-āu
Hebrews8:11 In lóng bōe koh kà-sī in ê tông-pau
Hebrews8:12 Góa beh sià-bián in ê put-gī
Hebrews8:13 Kì-jiân kóng-kàu sin ê iok
Hebrews9:1 Thâu chi̍t ê iok mā ū lé-pài ê kui-tēng kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê sèng-só͘.
Hebrews9:2 Ū chi̍t ê tah hó-sè ê tiùⁿ-bō͘
Hebrews9:3 Tē-jī ê tiùⁿ-lî ê āu-bīn-keng kiò-chòe Chì-sèng-só͘
Hebrews9:4 lāi-bīn ū kim-hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ kap choân-pō͘ ēng kim pau ê iok-kūi
Hebrews9:5 Kūi-téng ū êng-kng ê thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek
Hebrews9:6 Chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiàu án-ni an-pâi hó-sè
Hebrews9:7 Āu-bīn-keng chí-ū tōa-chè-si chiah thang ji̍p--khì
Hebrews9:8 Tùi chiah-ê an-pâi Sèng Sîn ū bêng-bêng piáu-sī
Hebrews9:9 Tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê thâu-chêng-keng phì-jū hiān-sè
Hebrews9:10 Chiah-ê kan-ta sī koan-hē lim-chia̍h kap ta̍k-khoán ê kiat-chēng-lé
Hebrews9:11 M̄-kú Ki-tok í-keng lâi
Hebrews9:12 I chí-ū chi̍t piàn chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘
Hebrews9:13 Soaⁿ-iûⁿ kap gû-káng ê huih
Hebrews9:14 hô-hòng Ki-tok thong-kè éng-oán ê Sîn hiàn I bô hâ-chhû ê pún-sin hō͘ Siōng-tè
Hebrews9:15 In-ūi án-ni
Hebrews9:16 Koan-hē ûi-chiok
Hebrews9:17 In-ūi ûi-chiok it-tēng tio̍h li̍p ûi-chiok ê lâng sí chiah ū-hāu. Li̍p ûi-chiok ê lâng iáu oa̍h--teh
Hebrews9:18 Án-ni
Hebrews9:19 Mô͘-se chiàu Lu̍t-hoat chiong it-chhè ê kài-bēng tùi jîn-bîn soan-pò͘
Hebrews9:20 kóng
Hebrews9:21 Siâng-khoán
Hebrews9:22 Chiàu Lu̍t-hoat
Hebrews9:23 Chiàu thiⁿ-téng ê khoán-sit só͘ hóng-chō ê mi̍h su-iàu ēng cheng-siⁿ ê huih lâi kiat-chēng; m̄-kú thiⁿ-téng ê goân-mi̍h su-iàu ēng pí chiah-ê khah hó ê chè-mi̍h lâi kiat-chēng.
Hebrews9:24 Ki-tok ji̍p--khì-ê pèng m̄-sī lâng ê chhiú chō ê Sèng-só͘
Hebrews9:25 Ki-tok m̄-bián chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn hiàn pún-sin
Hebrews9:26 Nā tio̍h chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn hiàn
Hebrews9:27 Chiàu só͘ chù-tiāⁿ
Hebrews9:28 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
Hebrews10:1 Kì-jiân Lu̍t-hoat m̄-sī teh-beh lâi hó-sū pún-sin ê chin-siōng

Hebrews10:4 in-ūi gû

Hebrews10:7 Hit-sî góa kóng: Siōng-tè ah
Hebrews10:8 Góa téng-bīn ū kóng
Hebrews10:9 I sòa lo̍h-khì kóng
Hebrews10:10 Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì
Hebrews10:11 Chè-si ta̍k-ji̍t khiā-teh ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè

Hebrews10:13 thèng-hāu Siōng-tè hō͘ I ê tùi-te̍k chòe I ê kha-tiam.
Hebrews10:14 Ki-tok thong-kè chi̍t piàn ê hiàn-chè
Hebrews10:15 Sèng Sîn mā ū tùi lán choh-chèng. I ū kóng:

Hebrews10:17 Jiân-āu I koh kóng: Góa bōe koh kì-tit in ê chōe-ok kap kè-hoān.
Hebrews10:18 Kì-jiân chōe í-keng tit-tio̍h sià-bián
Hebrews10:19 Só͘-í

Hebrews10:22 lán tio̍h ēng chin-sêng ê sim
Hebrews10:23 Lán tio̍h kian-koat chhî-siú só͘ soan-jīn ê ǹg-bāng
Hebrews10:24 Lán tio̍h hō͘-siōng koan-sim thang kek-lē saⁿ-thiàⁿ kap chòe hó-sū.
Hebrews10:25 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng thêng-chí chū-hōe
Hebrews10:26 Lán jīn-bat chin-lí í-āu iáu kò͘-ì hoān-chōe
Hebrews10:27 chí-ū ēng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê sim thèng-hāu sím-phòaⁿ kap teh-beh sio-bia̍t te̍k-tùi Siōng-tè ê lâng ê lia̍t-hé.

Hebrews10:29 Án-ni

Hebrews10:33 ū sî lín kong-jiân siū bú-jio̍k
Hebrews10:34 Lín kap siû-hoān tâng siū-khó͘; lín ê châi-bu̍t siū chhiúⁿ-toa̍t mā kam-goān jím-siū

Hebrews10:37 In-ūi koh chi̍t-sî-á kú
Hebrews10:38 M̄-kú sio̍k góa ê gī-lâng ōe tùi sìn lâi oa̍h. Nā ū lâng tiû-tû thè-āu

Hebrews11:1 Sìn sī tùi só͘ ǹg-bāng ê sū ū pá-ak

Hebrews11:34 phah-hoa lia̍t-hé
Hebrews11:35 Ū chi̍t-kóa hū-jîn-lâng ū chiap in ê chhin-lâng tùi sí-lâng tiong tò-tńg--lâi. Mā ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ūi-tio̍h beh koh-oa̍h
Hebrews11:36 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siū hì-lāng
Hebrews11:37 In hō͘ lâng ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm--sí

Hebrews11:39 Chiah-ê lâng thong-kè in ê sìn lóng ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè jīn-tēng chiap-la̍p
Hebrews11:40 in-ūi Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h lán ū khah hó ê an-pâi; I ê chí-ì sī ài chiah-ê lâng kap lán ū-hūn tī chit-ê an-pâi
Hebrews12:1 Kì-jiân ū chiah-ni̍h chōe ê kiàn-chèng-jîn chhin-chhiūⁿ hûn kā lán pau-ûi teh
Hebrews12:2 Tio̍h chù-sîn khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘
Hebrews12:3 Tio̍h siông-sè siūⁿ chit-ê lâng ê só͘-chòe
Hebrews12:4 Lín kap chōe-ok tò͘-cheng iáu-bē tí-khòng kàu sí ê thêng-tō͘.
Hebrews12:5 Lín kiám bōe-kì-tit Siōng-tè khó͘-khǹg lín chhin-chhiūⁿ teh khó͘-khǹg kiáⁿ-jî. I kóng: Góa ê kiáⁿ ah
Hebrews12:6 In-ūi Chú koán-kàu I só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng
Hebrews12:7 Tio̍h jím-siū koán-kàu. Siōng-tè khoán-thāi lín chhin-chhiūⁿ kiáⁿ-jî. Kiám ū kiáⁿ-jî bô siū pē-bú koán-kàu?
Hebrews12:8 Lín nā bô siū só͘-ū ê kiáⁿ-jî só͘ siū ê koán-kàu
Hebrews12:9 Siū jio̍k-thé ê pē-bú koán-kàu
Hebrews12:10 Jio̍k-thé ê pē-bú chiām-sî kú chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù koán-kàu
Hebrews12:11 Lán ta̍k-piàn siū koán-kàu bōe kám-kak hoaⁿ-hí
Hebrews12:12 Só͘-í
Hebrews12:13 Tio̍h siu-ti̍t lín beh kiâⁿ ê lō͘
Hebrews12:14 Tio̍h lô-le̍k kap chèng-lâng hô-bo̍k
Hebrews12:15 Tio̍h kín-sīn
Hebrews12:16 chiah bián ū lâng îm-loān
Hebrews12:17 Lín chai
Hebrews12:18 Lín m̄-sī lâi kàu hit-ê bong ōe tio̍h ê Se-nāi-soaⁿ
Hebrews12:19 koh ū lat-pah ê hiáng-siaⁿ kap kóng-ōe ê siaⁿ. Thiaⁿ--kìⁿ ê lâng khún-kiû Siōng-tè m̄-thang koh tùi in kóng-ōe
Hebrews12:20 in-ūi in bōe-tàng jím-siū bēng-lēng in ê ōe
Hebrews12:21 Hit-ê kéng-siōng hui-siông thang kiaⁿ
Hebrews12:22 M̄-kú
Hebrews12:23 Lín lâi kàu Siōng-tè ê tōa-kiáⁿ chū-chi̍p ê hōe-só͘; in ê miâ í-keng kì tī thiⁿ-téng. Lín lâi kàu sím-phòaⁿ bān-lâng ê Siōng-tè bīn-chêng
Hebrews12:24 Lín lâi kàu sin ê iok ê tiong-kan-jîn Iâ-so͘ ê bīn-chêng
Hebrews12:25 Tio̍h kín-sīn
Hebrews12:26 Hit-sî I ê siaⁿ iô-tāng tāi-tōe
Hebrews12:27 “Koh chi̍t piàn” chit-kù ōe chí-bêng
Hebrews12:28 Só͘-í
Hebrews12:29 in-ūi lán ê Siōng-tè sī thun-bia̍t ê hé.
Hebrews13:1 Tio̍h kè-sio̍k saⁿ-chhin saⁿ-thiàⁿ.
Hebrews13:2 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit hó khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng. In-ūi ū lâng án-ni chòe
Hebrews13:3 Tio̍h koan-hoâi siū koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê lâng
Hebrews13:4 Hun-in lâng-lâng tio̍h chun-tiōng; tio̍h pó-chhî sûn-kiat ê hu-chhe koan-hē
Hebrews13:5 M̄-thang tham-châi
Hebrews13:6 Só͘-í lán ōe-tàng hó-táⁿ kóng: Chú sī góa ê pang-chān
Hebrews13:7 Tio̍h siàu-liām ín-chhōa lín
Hebrews13:8 Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chā-ji̍t
Hebrews13:9 Lín m̄-thang hō͘ ta̍k-khoán kî-īⁿ ê kàu-gī chhōa bê-lō͘
Hebrews13:10 Lán ū chi̍t ê chè-tôaⁿ
Hebrews13:11 In ê tōa-chè-si tòa cheng-siⁿ ê huih chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘ ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn sio̍k-chōe
Hebrews13:12 Só͘-í
Hebrews13:13 Án-ni
Hebrews13:14 In-ūi tī chia lán bô éng-kiú ê siâⁿ; lán sī teh chhē hit-ê teh-beh lâi ê siâⁿ.
Hebrews13:15 Só͘-í
Hebrews13:16 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit chòe hó-sū
Hebrews13:17 Tio̍h ho̍k-chiông ín-chhōa lín ê lâng
Hebrews13:18 Tio̍h kè-sio̍k ūi-tio̍h goán kî-tó; goán khak-sìn ka-kī ū chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim
Hebrews13:19 Góa khún-kiû lín tio̍h te̍k-pia̍t ūi-tio̍h góa kî-tó
Hebrews13:20 Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h. I thong-kè Iâ-so͘ só͘ lâu ê huih khak-li̍p éng-oán ê iok
Hebrews13:21 
Hebrews13:22 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
Hebrews13:23 Góa ài lín chai
Hebrews13:24 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā lín só͘-ū ê léng-tō-chiá kap lóng-chóng ê sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an. Tùi Ì-tāi-lī lâi ê sìn-tô͘ mā beh kā lín chhéng-an.
Hebrews13:25 Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi. Amen!
James1:1 Góa Ngá-kok sī Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn
James1:2 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James1:3 in-ūi chai-iáⁿ lín ê sìn-sim keng-kè khó-giām ōe sán-seng jím-nāi.
James1:4 Lín tio̍h jím-nāi kàu lō͘-bé chiah ōe-tàng ta̍t-kàu oân-choân koh oân-chéng
James1:5 Lín tiong-kan nā ū lâng khiàm-kheh tì-hūi
James1:6 Put-kò
James1:7 Chit-khoán lâng sam-sim-lióng-ì
James1:8 
James1:9 Sàn-chhiah ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè thê-seng
James1:10 hù-jū ê lâng siū Siōng-tè kàng-kē
James1:11 Ji̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē chhut
James1:12 Jím-siū chhì-liān ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; in-ūi i ū keng-kè khó-giām
James1:13 Lâng siū ín-iú ê sî
James1:14 Lâng siū ín-iú
James1:15 Io̍k-bōng hoâi-īn chiū siⁿ-chhut chōe-ok; chōe-ok sêng-se̍k chiū sán-seng sí-bông.
James1:16 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James1:17 It-chhè bí-hó ê siúⁿ-sù kap it-chhè oân-choân ê un-sù sī tùi thiⁿ-téng kng-bêng ê Goân-thâu só͘ sù. I bô kái-piàn
James1:18 I chiàu ka-kī ê chí-ì ēng chin-lí ê tō lâi chō lán
James1:19 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James1:20 in-ūi lâng ê siū-khì bōe-tàng si̍t-hiān Siōng-tè kong-gī ê iau-kiû.
James1:21 Só͘-í
James1:22 Tio̍h si̍t-hêng tō-lí
James1:23 Nā ū lâng thiaⁿ tō-lí bô si̍t-hêng
James1:24 siông-sè khòaⁿ liáu-āu
James1:25 M̄-kú ū teh siông-sè chhâ-khó hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h chū-iû hit-ê oân-chéng ê Lu̍t-hoat
James1:26 Nā ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī chin kèng-khiân
James1:27 Chiàu-kò͘ khó͘-lān tiong ê ko͘-jî kóaⁿ-hū
James2:1 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James2:2 Nā ū chi̍t ê kòa kim chhiú-chí
James2:3 lín kan-ta chù-ì hit-ê chhēng súi-saⁿ--ê
James2:4 án-ni lín kiám m̄-sī phian-sim
James2:5 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James2:6 M̄-kú lín bú-jio̍k sàn-chhiah-lâng! Ap-pek lín
James2:7 In chiah sī húi-pòng lín só͘ niá-siū chun-kùi ê miâ hiah-ê lâng!
James2:8 Lín nā chun-thàn Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài “Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī” hit-ê Siōng-tè-kok ê Lu̍t-hoat
James2:9 M̄-kú lín nā khòaⁿ gōa-piáu tùi-thāi lâng chiū-sī hoān-chōe
James2:10 Lâng nā bô siú Lu̍t-hoat tiong ê chi̍t tiâu kài-bēng
James2:11 In-ūi Hit-ūi bēng-lēng “M̄-thang hoān kan-îm” ê
James2:12 Kì-jiân lín teh-beh siū hō͘ lâng chū-iû ê Lu̍t-hoat sím-phòaⁿ
James2:13 In-ūi
James2:14 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James2:15 Lín tiong-kan nā ū hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē bô saⁿ thang chhēng
James2:16 lín kan-ta tùi in kóng
James2:17 Só͘-í
James2:18 M̄-kú ū lâng beh kóng
James2:19 Lí sìn Siōng-tè chí-ū chi̍t ūi
James2:20 Lí ná bōe-hiáu siūⁿ
James2:21 Lán ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán hiàn ka-kī ê kiáⁿ Í-sat tī chè-tôaⁿ téng
James2:22 Khó-kiàn
James2:23 Che sī èng-giām Sèng-keng só͘ kóng
James2:24 Khó-kiàn
James2:25 Ki-lú Lat-ha̍p ê chêng-hêng mā-sī án-ni. I chiap-la̍p Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê sù-chiá
James2:26 Seng-khu bô khùi sī sí--ê; sìn-sim bô hêng-ûi mā-sī sí--ê.
James3:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James3:2 In-ūi lán tāi-ke lóng siông-siông hoān chin chōe chhò-gō͘; kóng-ōe bô chhò-gō͘--ê sī oân-choân ê lâng
James3:3 Lán ēng bé-kā-kiuⁿ tàu tī bé ê chhùi--ni̍h
James3:4 Koh khòaⁿ
James3:5 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni
James3:6 Chhùi-chi̍h sī hé. Tī lán ê chi-thé tiong
James3:7 Lâng ōe-tàng chè-ho̍k ta̍k-chióng iá-siù
James3:8 M̄-kú
James3:9 Lán ēng chhùi-chi̍h o-ló Chú lán ê Pē
James3:10 Kám-siā kap chiù-chó͘ ê ōe lóng tùi kâng chi̍t ê chhùi chhut. Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James3:11 Tùi kâng chi̍t ê chôaⁿ-goân kiám ōe chhèng-chhut tiⁿ--ê kap khó͘ ê chúi!
James3:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James3:13 Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ū tì-hūi
James3:14 Lín sim-lāi nā ū ok-to̍k
James3:15 Chit-khoán tì-hūi m̄-sī tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi--ê
James3:16 In-ūi ū oàn-tò͘ kap chū-su chiū ū hūn-loān kap ta̍k-hāng pháiⁿ hêng-ûi.
James3:17 Tùi téng-bīn lâi ê tì-hūi
James3:18 Kong-gī sī chhiok-chìn hô-pêng ê lâng ēng hô-pêng iā ê chéng-chí só͘ kiat ê ké-chí.
James4:1 Lín tiong-kan ê tò͘-cheng kap cheng-chip tùi tó-ūi lâi? Kiám m̄-sī tùi lín chi-thé tiong-kan put-sî teh cheng-chip kap tò͘-cheng ê io̍k-bōng lâi?
James4:2 Lín siūⁿ-beh tit--tio̍h
James4:3 Lín kî-kiû
James4:4 Lín chiah-ê m̄-sìn ê lâng ah
James4:5 Sèng-keng kóng
James4:6 Put-kò Siōng-tè sù lán ê un-tián koh-khah tōa. In-ūi án-ni
James4:7 Só͘-í
James4:8 Tio̍h chhin-kūn Siōng-tè
James4:9 Tio̍h pi-siong
James4:10 Tio̍h tī Chú ê bīn-chêng khiam-pi
James4:11 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James4:12 Lu̍t-hoat ê chè-tēng-chiá kap sím-phòaⁿ-chiá chí-ū chi̍t ūi
James4:13 Eh
James4:14 Lín liân bîn-á-chài sìⁿ-miā ōe pìⁿ án-chóaⁿ to m̄ chai! Lín ká-ná bông-bū chhut-hiān chi̍t-ē-á kú liâm-piⁿ chiū siau-sit.
James4:15 Lín eng-kai án-ni kóng
James4:16 Lín hiān-chāi káⁿ kiau-ngō͘ chū-tāi; chit-khoán ê kiau-ngō͘ lóng sī siâ-ok.
James4:17 Só͘-í
James5:1 Eh
James5:2 Lín ê châi-hù í-keng pāi-hoāi
James5:3 Lín ê kim
James5:4 Tī lín ê chhân-hn̂g ūi lín chòe kang kā lín siu-koah ê lâng
James5:5 Lín tī tōe-chiūⁿ hióng-siū chhia-hoa iàn-lo̍k. Lín ka-kī chia̍h kah pûi-chut-chut
James5:6 Lín kā bû-ko͘ ê lâng tēng-chōe
James5:7 Só͘-í
James5:8 Lín mā tio̍h jím-nāi. Lín ê sim tio̍h kian-tēng
James5:9 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James5:10 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
James5:11 Hiah-ê thun-lún kàu-bé ê lâng

James5:13 Lín tiong-kan ū thòng-khó͘ ê lâng bô? Nā ū
James5:14 Lín tiong-kan ū phòa-pīⁿ ê lâng bô? Nā ū
James5:15 Ū sìn-sim ê kî-tó ōe kiù pīⁿ-lâng; Chú ōe hō͘ i koh hó--khí-lâi

James5:17 Í-lī-a kap lán pîⁿ-pîⁿ sī lâng. I pek-chhiat kî-tó m̄-thang lo̍h-hō͘
James5:18 I koh kî-tó

James5:20 lín tio̍h chai
1Peter1:1 Góa Pí-tek sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘
1Peter1:2 Lín siū kéng-soán sī chiàu Pē Siōng-tè ū-tēng ê chí-ì
1Peter1:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! Kun-kù I bô-hān ê jîn-chû
1Peter1:4 lâi sêng-siū I ūi-tio̍h lín pó-chûn tī thiⁿ--ni̍h hit-ê bōe hiú-nōa
1Peter1:5 Che sī beh hō͘ lín chiah-ê thong-kè sìn siū I ê tōa lêng-le̍k pó-siú ê lâng
1Peter1:6 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni
1Peter1:7 Che sī beh chèng-bêng lín ê sìn-sim kham-tit siū khó-giām
1Peter1:8 Lín sui-jiân m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h I
1Peter1:9 in-ūi lín ōe tit-tio̍h sìn ê kiat-kó
1Peter1:10 Koan-hē chit-ê chín-kiù
1Peter1:11 In tit-tio̍h tī in sim-lāi Ki-tok ê Sîn tùi in ê chí-sī
1Peter1:12 Siōng-tè ū kā in khé-sī
1Peter1:13 Só͘-í
1Peter1:14 Tio̍h chòe sūn-ho̍k ê kiáⁿ-jî
1Peter1:15 Ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè sī sèng-kiat
1Peter1:16 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài
1Peter1:17 Lín kì-jiân kiû-kiò ēng kâng chi̍t ê phiau-chún
1Peter1:18 In-ūi lín chai
1Peter1:19 sī ēng hit-ūi bô khoat-tiám bô ù-tiám ê iûⁿ-ko Ki-tok só͘ lâu ê pó-huih.
1Peter1:20 Ki-tok tī chhòng-chō ú-tiū í-chêng seng hō͘ Siōng-tè kéng-soán
1Peter1:21 Lín thong-kè Ki-tok sìn hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h koh sù I êng-kng hit-ūi Siōng-tè; án-ni
1Peter1:22 Lín í-keng tùi sūn-thàn chin-lí lâi kiat-chēng ka-kī
1Peter1:23 Lín têng-chhut-sì
1Peter1:24 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Lâng lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu
1Peter1:25 chóng-sī Chú ê ōe éng-oán chûn-chāi. Che chiū-sī thoân hō͘ lín ê hok-im ê sìn-sit.
1Peter2:1 Só͘-í
1Peter2:2 Tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ tú chhut-sì ê eⁿ-á chin ài sûn ê sio̍k-lêng ê lin
1Peter2:3 in-ūi lín í-keng ū tam-tio̍h Chú ê jîn-chû.
1Peter2:4 Tio̍h chhin-kūn Chú
1Peter2:5 Lín mā tio̍h choh oa̍h-chio̍h
1Peter2:6 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Khòaⁿ leh
1Peter2:7 Chit-tè chio̍h tùi lín chiah-ê sìn ê lâng sī pó-kùi--ê
1Peter2:8 Tī pa̍t-ūi ū kì-chài: Chit-tè sī poàn-kha-chio̍h
1Peter2:9 M̄-kú lín leh
1Peter2:10 Sèng-keng kóng: Lín chêng m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn
1Peter2:11 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Peter2:12 Lín tī bī-sìn-chiá ê tiong-kan tio̍h ū hó hêng-ûi
1Peter2:13 Ūi-tio̍h Chú ê iân-kò͘
1Peter2:14 á-sī tùi kun-ông só͘ phài-lâi chióng-lē chòe hó ê lâng
1Peter2:15 In-ūi che sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì; I ài lín chòe hó
1Peter2:16 Lín choh chū-iû ê lâng
1Peter2:17 Lín tio̍h chun-tiōng só͘-ū ê lâng; tio̍h thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē
1Peter2:18 Lín choh po̍k-jîn--ê
1Peter2:19 Tú-tio̍h bô eng-kai siū ê thòng-khó͘
1Peter2:20 Lín nā chòe m̄-tio̍h hō͘ lâng phah lâi jím-siū thòng-khó͘
1Peter2:21 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê
1Peter2:22 I bô hoān-chōe; I ê chhùi mā bô khúi-chà.
1Peter2:23 I siū lóe-mē
1Peter2:24 Ki-tok tī si̍p-jī-kè téng chhin-sin tam-tng lán ê chōe
1Peter2:25 Lín í-chêng chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ bê-lō͘

1Peter3:4 tio̍h khò lōe-chāi ê súi
1Peter3:5 In-ūi chá-sî gióng-bōng Siōng-tè hiah-ê sèng-kiat ê hū-jîn-lâng mā-sī án-ni chng-thāⁿ ka-kī

1Peter3:7 Kâng-khoán

1Peter3:9 bô ēng pháiⁿ pò pháiⁿ
1Peter3:10 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Lâng nā ài sìⁿ-miā
1Peter3:11 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t pháiⁿ
1Peter3:12 In-ūi Chú ê ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ-kò͘ gī-lâng
1Peter3:13 Lín nā jia̍t-sim choh-hó
1Peter3:14 Chóng-sī lín nā ūi-tio̍h gī siū-khó͘
1Peter3:15 Tio̍h chun-chông Ki-tok chòe Chú. Nā ū lâng mn̄g lín sim-tiong ê ǹg-bāng
1Peter3:16 Put-kò tio̍h ēng un-hô kap chun-tiōng ê thài-tō͘ lâi hôe-tap. Tio̍h ū chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim
1Peter3:17 Siū-khó͘ nā-sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì
1Peter3:18 In-ūi Ki-tok mā bat ūi-tio̍h chōe siū-khó͘

1Peter4:2 Án-ni

1Peter4:4 In khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín bô koh kap in kè hòng-tōng bô chiat-chè ê seng-oa̍h
1Peter4:5 In tio̍h tùi teh-beh sím-phòaⁿ oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè kau-siàu.

1Peter4:9 Tio̍h hō͘-siōng hó khoán-thāi

1Peter4:12 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē

1Peter4:17 Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî kàu lah! Siōng-tè ê ke tio̍h tāi-seng siū sím-phòaⁿ; nā tùi lán khai-sí

1Peter5:14 Tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an. Goān pêng-an kui tī lín só͘-ū sio̍k Ki-tok ê lâng!
2Peter1:1 Góa Se-biān Pí-tek sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn kap sù-tô͘
2Peter1:2 Goān lín thong-kè jīn-bat Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè só͘ sù hong-hong-hù-hù ê un-tián kap pêng-an!
2Peter1:3 Siōng-tè ū ēng I ê lêng-le̍k chiong kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h só͘ su-iàu ê it-chhè sù hō͘ lán; che sī thong-kè lán jīn-bat tiàu lán lâi hun-hióng I ê êng-kng kap liông-siān hit-ūi Siōng-tè lâi--ê.
2Peter1:4 Án-ni
2Peter1:5 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê
2Peter1:6 ū tì-sek koh ū chiat-chè
2Peter1:7 ū kèng-khiân koh ū chhiú-chiok-chi-chêng
2Peter1:8 Chiah-ê sī lín só͘ su-iàu ê phín-tek. Chiah-ê lín nā lóng ū
2Peter1:9 Lâng nā bô chiah-ê tek-hēng
2Peter1:10 Só͘-í
2Peter1:11 Án-ni
2Peter1:12 Só͘-í
2Peter1:13 Góa siūⁿ
2Peter1:14 Lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok í-keng ū chheng-chhó kā góa chí-sī
2Peter1:15 Góa beh chīn-la̍t siūⁿ pān-hoat
2Peter1:16 Goán tùi lín só͘ kóng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tōa koân-lêng lâi-lîm ê sū
2Peter1:17 I tùi Pē Siōng-tè niá-siū chun-kùi kap êng-iāu ê sî
2Peter1:18 I tī sèng-soaⁿ ê sî goán mā tī hia
2Peter1:19 Só͘-í goán tùi sian-ti só͘ soan-pò͘ ê sìn-sit koh-khah ū khak-sìn. Lín tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ

2Peter2:1 Í-chêng mā ū ké sian-ti tī bîn-kan chhut-hiān; kâng-khoán
2Peter2:2 M̄-kú iáu ū chin chōe lâng o̍h in îm-loān ê seng-oa̍h
2Peter2:3 Chiah-ê ké kàu-su in-ūi tham-sim
2Peter2:4 Siōng-tè bô khoan-iông hoān-chōe ê thiⁿ-sài
2Peter2:5 Siōng-tè mā bô khoan-iông kó͘-tāi ê sè-kài
2Peter2:6 Siōng-tè chhú-hoa̍t Só͘-to-má kap Gô-mô͘-la ê siâⁿ-chhī
2Peter2:7 Siōng-tè ū kiù gī-lâng Lô-tek
2Peter2:8 Hit-ê gī-lâng Lô-tek tiàm tī in tiong-kan
2Peter2:9 Chú chai án-chóaⁿ kiù kèng-khiân ê lâng thoat-lī chhì-liān
2Peter2:10 
2Peter2:11 Hiah-ê thiⁿ-sài ê khùi-la̍t kap lêng-le̍k sui-jiân pí ké kàu-su khah tōa
2Peter2:12 M̄-kú
2Peter2:13 siū-tio̍h ka-kī put-gī ê hêng-ûi èng-tit ê pò-èng. In khòaⁿ tī ji̍t--sî tîm-bê tī chêng-io̍k chòe hióng-lo̍k. In kap lín chòe-hé lim-chia̍h ê sî
2Peter2:14 In ê ba̍k-chiu chí-ū ài khòaⁿ siâ-îm
2Peter2:15 In lī-khui chiàⁿ-lō͘
2Peter2:16 ūi-tio̍h só͘ hoān ê chōe siū chek-pī. Chi̍t chiah bōe kóng-ōe ê lû-á kèng-jiân ēng lâng ê siaⁿ chó͘-chí sian-ti Pa-lân hong-kông ê siūⁿ-hoat.
2Peter2:17 Chiah-ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ ta--khì ê chúi-chôaⁿ
2Peter2:18 In kóng khong-tōng ê gōng-ōe
2Peter2:19 In tah-èng hō͘ lâng chū-iû
2Peter2:20 Lâng jīn-bat lán ê Chú — Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok thoat-lī sè-kan ê hú-pāi í-āu
2Peter2:21 In jīn-bat kong-gī ê Tō-lō͘
2Peter2:22 In ê chêng-hêng tú chhin-chhiūⁿ sio̍k-gú só͘ kóng “Káu oa̍t tńg-lâi chia̍h ka-kī thò͘--chhut-lâi ê mi̍h”
2Peter3:1 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú
2Peter3:2 Góa ài lín ōe-kì-tit kó͘-chá ê sèng sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe
2Peter3:3 Siōng iàu-kín--ê
2Peter3:4 kóng
2Peter3:5 In kò͘-ì bû-sī chit-ê sū-si̍t
2Peter3:6 Tng-sî ê sè-kài sī hō͘ chúi im-ba̍t lâi húi-bia̍t.
2Peter3:7 M̄-kú hiān-chāi ê thiⁿ kap tōe mā kâng-khoán tùi Siōng-tè ê ōe tit-tio̍h pó-liû kàu sím-phòaⁿ kap put-khiân ê lâng hō͘ hé húi-bia̍t ê ji̍t.
2Peter3:8 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú
2Peter3:9 Ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng Chú iân-tî I tah-èng beh chòe ê sū
2Peter3:10 M̄-kú Chú ê Ji̍t ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t-á hut-jiân lâi. Tī hit-ê Ji̍t
2Peter3:11 Kì-jiân chiah-ê it-chhè ōe án-ni húi-bia̍t
2Peter3:12 thèng-hāu koh chhui-pek Siōng-tè ê Ji̍t kóaⁿ-kín lâi-lîm. Tī hit-ji̍t
2Peter3:13 M̄-kú lán teh thèng-hāu ê sī Siōng-tè só͘ èng-ún sin ê thiⁿ sin ê tōe
2Peter3:14 Só͘-í
2Peter3:15 Tio̍h chiong lán ê Chú ê khoan-iông khòaⁿ-chòe lín tit-kiù ê ki-hōe
2Peter3:16 I só͘-ū ê phoe lóng ū kóng-khí chiah-ê sū. I ê phoe ū chi̍t-kóa oh lí-kái ê ōe

1John1:1 Goán beh kā lín soat-bêng chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū chûn-chāi hit-ê oa̍h-miā ê Tō; chit-ê Tō goán ū thiaⁿ--tio̍h
1John1:2 Chit-ê oa̍h-miā í-keng hián-hiān; goán ū khòaⁿ--tio̍h
1John1:3 Goán khòaⁿ--tio̍h koh thiaⁿ--tio̍h-ê
1John1:4 Goán siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lán ū oân-boán ê hoaⁿ-hí.
1John1:5 Goán tùi Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ thiaⁿ--tio̍h

1John2:23 Kū-choa̍t Kiáⁿ ê bô chiap-la̍p Pē; soan-jīn Kiáⁿ chiū-sī chiap-la̍p Pē.

1John3:6 Kap Ki-tok pó-chhî bi̍t-chhiat koan-hē ê lâng bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe; kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Ki-tok

1John5:1 Sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok ê lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî. Thiàⁿ pē-bú
1John5:2 Lán nā thiàⁿ Siōng-tè koh chun-siú I ê kài-bēng
1John5:3 Chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng chiū-sī thiàⁿ Siōng-tè. I ê kài-bēng m̄-sī oh chun-siú.
1John5:4 In-ūi Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng ōe-tàng khah iâⁿ sè-kan; hō͘ lán khah iâⁿ sè-kan--ê chiū-sī lán ê sìn.
1John5:5 Khah iâⁿ sè-kan--ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Kiám m̄-sī sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng?
1John5:6 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiū-sī thong-kè chúi kap huih lâi--ê; m̄-sī chí-ū thong-kè chúi

1John5:10 Sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng

1John5:12 Lâng ū Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ chiū ū oa̍h-miā; bô Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ chiū bô oa̍h-miā.
1John5:13 Góa siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng chai
1John5:14 Lán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ióng-kám bô kiaⁿ

2John1:1 Góa tiúⁿ-ló siá-phoe hō͘ siū kéng-soán ê hu-jîn kap lí ê kiáⁿ-jî: Góa chin-sim thiàⁿ lín
2John1:2 in-ūi chin-lí tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn
2John1:3 Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap Pē ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lán un-tián
2John1:4 Góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí
2John1:5 Hu-jîn ah
2John1:6 Lán chiàu Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng seng-oa̍h
2John1:7 Ū chin chōe bê-he̍k-chiá í-keng lâi kàu chit sè-kan; in m̄ kong-khai sêng-jīn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chòe lâng lâi sè-kan. Chit-khoán lâng sī bê-he̍k-chiá
2John1:8 Tio̍h sió-sim
2John1:9 Phian-lī bô kian-siú Ki-tok kà-sī ê lâng bô kap Siōng-tè kiat-liân. Kian-siú kà-sī ê lâng chiah ū kap Pē í-ki̍p Kiáⁿ kiat-liân.
2John1:10 Nā ū lâng khì lín hia
2John1:11 in-ūi kā i chhéng-an chiū-sī chham-ú i ê pháiⁿ hêng-ûi.
2John1:12 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá
2John1:13 Kap lí pîⁿ-pîⁿ siū kéng-soán hit-ê chí-bē ê kiáⁿ-jî beh kā lí chhéng-an.

3John1:3 Ū kúi ê sìn-tô͘ lâi

3John1:5 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú
3John1:6 In bat tī hōe-chiòng bīn-chêng chèng-si̍t lí ê thiàⁿ-sim. Chhiáⁿ lí chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí--ê

3John1:13 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá

Revelation1:3 Tha̍k chit-pún chheh ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê ū-giân koh chun-siú chheh--ni̍h só͘ kì-chài ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; in-ūi sî-ki kūn lah.
Revelation1:4 Góa Iok-hān siá-phoe hō͘ A-sè-a ê chhit ê kàu-hōe

Revelation1:9 Góa sī Iok-hān
Revelation1:10 Ū chi̍t ê Chú-ji̍t
Revelation1:11 kóng

Revelation1:14 I ê thâu kap thâu-mn̂g chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-mn̂g hiah-ni̍h pe̍h
Revelation1:15 I ê kha chhin-chhiūⁿ kè hé-lô͘ thoàn-liān kng-liāng ê tâng; I ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi teh chhiâng ê siaⁿ.
Revelation1:16 I ê chiàⁿ-chhiú the̍h chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ; I ê chhùi thò͘-chhut siang-bīn-lāi ê kiàm; I ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ iām-jia̍t ê ji̍t-thâu hoat-kng.

Revelation1:18 Góa sī oa̍h--ê. Góa ū sí
Revelation1:19 Só͘-í
Revelation1:20 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h góa chiàⁿ-chhiú the̍h hit chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ kap chhit ki kim teng-tâi ê ò-biāu sī án-ni: Chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ sī chhit ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài; chhit ki teng-tâi sī chhit ê kàu-hōe.”
Revelation2:1 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Í-hut-só͘ ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài
Revelation2:2 Góa chai lí ê só͘-chòe; lí án-chóaⁿ teh lô-khó͘ kap thun-lún. Góa chai lí bōe iông-jím pháiⁿ-lâng; lí mā bat khó-giām hiah-ê chū-chheng sī sù-tô͘ kî-si̍t m̄-sī ê lâng
Revelation2:3 Lí ū thun-lún

Revelation13:6 I khui-chhùi siat-to̍k Siōng-tè
Revelation13:7 I mā tit-tio̍h ún-chún thang kong-kek sìn-tô͘
Revelation13:8 Só͘-ū tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng
Revelation13:9 Ū hī-khang--ê lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ:
Revelation13:10 Hit-ê eng-kai siū lia̍h--ê tio̍h siū lia̍h; hit-ê eng-kai siū sat-hāi--ê tio̍h siū to sat-hāi. In-ūi án-ni
Revelation13:11 Āu-lâi
Revelation13:12 I tī thâu chi̍t chiah siù ê bīn-chêng chip-hêng thâu chi̍t chiah siù ê koân-pèng. I kiò tōe kap tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng khì pài thâu chi̍t chiah siù
Revelation13:13 I kiâⁿ tōa kî-chek
Revelation13:14 koh ēng siū ún-chún tī siù ê bīn-chêng kiâⁿ ê kî-chek lâi bê-he̍k tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng
Revelation13:15 I koh siū ún-chún chiong oa̍h-khì pûn ji̍p-khì siù ê siōng
Revelation13:16 I mā kiông-pek chèng-lâng
Revelation13:17 Bô khàm siù ê miâ
Revelation13:18 Tùi chit-ê tāi-chì tio̍h ū tì-hūi. Chhong-bêng ê lâng tio̍h sǹg-chhut siù ê sò͘-jī
Revelation14:1 Āu-lâi góa koh khòaⁿ
Revelation14:2 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ū siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng chhut--lâi
Revelation14:3 In tī pó-chō kap sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h í-ki̍p chèng tiúⁿ-ló ê bīn-chêng chhiùⁿ chi̍t siú sin ê koa
Revelation14:4 In sī m̄-bat chhin-kūn lú-sèng ê chāi-sek-lâm. Iûⁿ-ko bô-lūn khì sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi
Revelation14:5 In m̄-bat kóng pe̍h-chha̍t
Revelation14:6 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tī pòaⁿ khong-tiong teh pe; i ū éng-oán ê hok-im beh thoân hō͘ tiàm tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng
Revelation14:7 I tōa-siaⁿ kóng
Revelation14:8 Lēng-gōa ū tē-jī ê thiⁿ-sài sòa lo̍h-khì kóng
Revelation14:9 Lēng-gōa ū tē-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài sòa lo̍h-khì tōa-siaⁿ kóng
Revelation14:10 hit-ê lâng mā tio̍h lim Siōng-tè siū-khì ê chiú
Revelation14:11 Khó͘-chhó͘ in ê hé-ian chhèng-chiūⁿ koân
Revelation14:12 In-ūi án-ni
Revelation14:13 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng
Revelation14:14 Āu-lâi
Revelation14:15 Koh ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi sèng-tiān hia chhut--lâi
Revelation14:16 Chē tī hûn-téng Hit-ūi chiū chiong liâm-le̍k-á hiat-lo̍h tōe
Revelation14:17 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ-téng ê sèng-tiān chhut--lâi

Revelation14:19 Thiⁿ-sài chiū chiong liâm-le̍k-á hiat-lo̍h tōe
Revelation14:20 Phû-tô tī siâⁿ-gōa ê chiú-khut hō͘ lâng ta̍h
Revelation15:1 Āu-lâi

Revelation15:7 Sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê chi̍t ê chiong chhit ê kim-óaⁿ kau hō͘ hit chhit ê thiⁿ-sài

Revelation16:1 Āu-lâi

Revelation16:4 Tē-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h kang-hô kap chúi-chôaⁿ
Revelation16:5 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chiáng-koán chúi ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Hiān-chāi chûn-chāi
Revelation16:6 In-ūi in ū lâu sìn-tô͘ kap sian-ti ê huih
Revelation16:7 Āu-lâi góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chè-tôaⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng: Sī lah
Revelation16:8 Tē-sì ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī ji̍t-thâu
Revelation16:9 Lâng hō͘ tōa iām-hé sio chiū siat-to̍k ū koân chiáng-koán chiah-ê chai-hō ê Siōng-tè ê miâ; in iáu-kú bô hóe-kái
Revelation16:10 Tē-gō͘ ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī hit-chiah siù ê chō-ūi
Revelation16:11 koh in-ūi thòng-khó͘ kap to̍k-chhng siat-to̍k thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè; in iáu-kú bô hóe-kái lâi kái-piàn in ê só͘-chòe.
Revelation16:12 Tē-la̍k ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h Iù-hoat-la-tí tōa-hô
Revelation16:13 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ū saⁿ ê bô chheng-khì ê sîn
Revelation16:14 Chiah-ê sī ōe kiâⁿ kî-chek ê ok-mô͘ ê sîn
Revelation16:15 “Tio̍h chù-ì! Góa ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t lâi. Hit-ê chhíⁿ-chhíⁿ
Revelation16:16 Hiah-ê ok-mô͘ ê sîn chiū chū-chi̍p phó͘-thiⁿ-ē ê kun-ông tī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi
Revelation16:17 Tē-chhit ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī khong-tiong
Revelation16:18 Hit-sî ū sih-nà
