Revelation16:21 Jiân-āu tùi thiⁿ-téng ū lo̍h tōa-pha̍uh lâi tìm lâng
Revelation17:1 Hiah-ê the̍h chhit tè óaⁿ ê chhit ê thiⁿ-sài ê chi̍t ê lâi kap góa kóng-ōe
Revelation17:2 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông bat kap i kiâⁿ-îm; tōe-chiūⁿ ê chū-bîn mā bat lim i îm-loān ê chiú lim kàu chiú-chùi.”
Revelation17:3 Góa siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng
Revelation17:4 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chhēng chí-sek kap chu-âng-sek ê saⁿ
Revelation17:5 I ê thâu-hia̍h ū siá chi̍t ê miâ
Revelation17:6 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng lim sìn-tô͘ ê huih kap ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chòe kiàn-chèng ê sûn-tō-chiá ê huih
Revelation17:7 Thiⁿ-sài chiū kā góa kóng
Revelation17:8 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h hit-chiah siù
Revelation17:9 “Chit-ê tāi-chì tio̍h ēng tì-hūi lâi lí-kái. Hit chhit ê thâu chiū-sī hū-jîn-lâng só͘ chē ê chhit chō soaⁿ
Revelation17:10 Kî-tiong gō͘ ê í-keng tó--lo̍h-khì
Revelation17:11 Kè-khì ū
Revelation17:12 “Lí só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h ê cha̍p ki kak chiū-sī hit cha̍p ê iáu m̄-bat thóng-tī ê ông; m̄-kú in ōe tit-tio̍h koân choh-ông kap siù chòe-hé thóng-tī chi̍t tiám-cheng kú.
Revelation17:13 Chit cha̍p ê ông tông-ì chiong in ê lêng-le̍k kap koân-pèng kau hō͘ hit-chiah siù.
Revelation17:14 In beh kap Iûⁿ-ko kau-chiàn
Revelation17:15 Thiⁿ-sài koh kā góa kóng
Revelation17:16 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h hit cha̍p ki kak kap hit-chiah siù ōe oàn-hūn hit-ê îm-hū
Revelation17:17 In-ūi Siōng-tè chiong chip-hêng I ê chí-ì ê ì-liām hē tī hit cha̍p ê ông ê sim
Revelation17:18 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ--tio̍h hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī teh chiáng-koán tōe-chiūⁿ hiah-ê kun-ông ê hit-chō tōa-siâⁿ.”
Revelation18:1 Āu-lâi

Revelation19:3 In tē-jī piàn hoah: Ha-lé-lú-iah
Revelation19:4 Hit jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló kap hit sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài chē tī pó-chō ê Siōng-tè
Revelation19:5 Tùi pó-chō ū siaⁿ chhut--lâi
Revelation19:6 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng ê siaⁿ

Revelation19:9 Āu-lâi

Revelation19:11 Āu-lâi
Revelation19:12 I ê ba̍k-chiu chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-iām; thâu-khak ū tì chin chōe ông-koan; seng-khu ū siá chi̍t ê miâ
Revelation19:13 I chhēng bak-tio̍h huih ê tn̂g-phàu
Revelation19:14 Thian-kun chhēng iù-môa-pò͘ ê tn̂g-phàu
Revelation19:15 Tùi I ê chhùi thò͘-chhut chi̍t ki lāi-kiàm
Revelation19:16 Tī I ê tn̂g-phàu kap tōa-thúi ū siá chi̍t ê miâ “Bān-ông ê Ông

Revelation19:20 Hit-chiah siù siū lia̍h

Revelation20:4 Góa ū koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ kúi-nā ê pó-chō
Revelation20:5 Só͘ chhun ê sí-lâng kàu chi̍t-chheng nî móa ê sî chiah ōe koh-oa̍h. Che sī thâu chi̍t piàn ê koh-oa̍h.
Revelation20:6 Ū-hūn tī thâu chi̍t piàn koh-oa̍h ê lâng chin ū hok-khì
Revelation20:7 Chi̍t-chheng nî móa ê sî
Revelation20:8 I ōe chhut-khì bê-he̍k tōe-chiūⁿ sì-hng ê lia̍t-pang
Revelation20:9 In chìn-kun piàn-móa choân-tōe
Revelation20:10 Hit-ê bê-he̍k in ê Mô͘-kúi siū hiat-lo̍h hé kap liû-hông ê ô͘; hit-chiah siù kap hit-ê ké sian-ti í-keng tī hia. In ōe mî-ji̍t siū khó͘-chhó͘

Revelation20:12 Góa koh ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sí--khì ê lâng

Revelation21:24 Lia̍t-pang ōe khò teng ê kng kiâⁿ-lō͘; tōe-chiūⁿ kun-ông ōe chiong in ê êng-hôa tòa-lâi hō͘ chit-ê siâⁿ.
Revelation21:25 Ji̍t--sî

Revelation22:1 Thiⁿ-sài koh pò góa khòaⁿ oa̍h-miā-chúi ê hô
Revelation22:2 thong-kè siâⁿ tiong-sim ê koe-lō͘. Hô ê siang-pêng ū oa̍h-miā-chhiū
Revelation22:3 Siâⁿ-lāi lóng bōe koh ū chiù-chó͘. Siōng-tè kap Iûⁿ-ko ê pó-chō ōe tī siâⁿ-lāi; I ê po̍k-jîn ōe kèng-pài I
Revelation22:4 mā ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê bīn; I ê miâ ōe siá tī in ê thâu-hia̍h.
Revelation22:5 Bōe koh ū mî--sî; in bô su-iàu teng ê kng á-sī ji̍t-thâu
Revelation22:6 Thiⁿ-sài kā góa kóng
Revelation22:7 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Revelation22:8 Góa Iok-hān
Revelation22:9 Put-kò i kā góa kóng
Revelation22:10 I koh kā góa kóng
Revelation22:11 Hō͘ put-gī ê lâng kè-sio̍k chòe put-gī; hō͘ ù-òe ê lâng kè-sio̍k ù-òe; hō͘ gī ê lâng kè-sio̍k si̍t-hêng kong-gī; hō͘ sèng-kiat ê lâng kè-sio̍k sèng-kiat.”
Revelation22:12 Iâ-so͘ kóng
Revelation22:13 Góa sī A-ní-hoat kap A-bí-ka
Revelation22:14 Chiong tn̂g-phàu sóe chheng-khì hiah-ê lâng chin ū hok-khì
Revelation22:15 Hiah-ê káu-lūi
Revelation22:16 “Góa — Iâ-so͘ í-keng chhe góa ê thiⁿ-sài
Revelation22:17 Sèng Sîn kap Sin-niû lóng kóng
Revelation22:18 Góa kā ta̍k-ê thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe ê lâng kéng-kò: Nā ū lâng kā i ke-thiⁿ
Revelation22:19 Nā ū lâng san-tû chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe
Revelation22:20 Ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê sū choh-chèng Hit-ūi kóng
